chapters.title: Chapter 802: : Combat Awareness
chapters.body:
Chapter 802: : Combat Awareness

Tuoshan looked very excited, groping his sturdy walls and tears. They never thought about having such a good day, and they had such a good house, and the food and clothes had artificial meat and other nutrients made by technology.

The food, clothing, housing and transportation are settled in just one day, and they no longer have to worry about these living conditions.

"Sir, what should we do now?"

Wake up, Tuoshan looked at Chen Mo.

He was confused. He never thought about what they should do if one day the group no longer worried about food, clothing and housing.

No need to hunt, do nothing in the future, sit and eat and die? Tuoshan is still awake. He knows that once the kind of comfortable life appears, it is the end of their wilderness.

"If you let the tribes do nothing, I am afraid there will be big problems."

Chen defaulted to nod. The environment here is not good, but Tuoshan does have the ability to be a family.

Once they are comfortable and long-lasting, this group is not far from destruction.

"You choose soldiers in the family to form an armed team to protect this territory. Young children read books, learn knowledge, knowledge is the most useful survival weapon in this world." Chen Mo said.

"All listening to Mr.." Tuoshan nodded.

In the past, the survival conditions of the Manzan people had to be heavy and frivolous, but now they are different, their living conditions have changed, and they have changed overnight, so they must make major changes.

"As for the specific things, the robot will arrange for you to teach the children to learn, and also by the robot, each child must learn knowledge." Chen Mo said.

The Manshan people have very good innate conditions, are clever, and have a simple and honest personality. Although the living environment is bad, it is not killing the fierce. And their shape, in addition to skin and eyes, other conditions and humans are more like people of different skin colors, the future can be well integrated into human civilization.

After some incidents in Qituoshan, Chen Mo returned to his residence.

When building the city, Chen Mo also built a home for himself, a villa like the Earth Furnace Bay.

It’s very stuffy to live on a spaceship for a long time.

I don't know how the earth is now. Looking at the familiar combination and arrangement in the house, Chen Mo sighed.

The wild mountain star is now starting from scratch. He needs to create a technological civilization in a short time, build space to pierce the machine, and open the space to leave the small universe before returning to the earth.

This process, the fastest speed also takes several years.

"Mr."

On the occasion of Chen Mozhen, the voice of the extension broke him. Looking back, I saw Jinge and Tuo, and behind them, there were two girls of the Manshan.

"Well, how come you are here?"

"The patriarch let me come." Jing Ge said coldly, as always, with no expression.

Chen Mo was amazed, and then looked at the two wild mountain girls behind Jing Ge. These two girls Chen defaulted to being the girls who gave flowers to him on the birthday.

"What about them?"

"Grandpa let the two sisters come over to follow you, and later take care of the gentleman." Tuo explained.

"Hey? Don't use this, let them go home."

"Sir, their family knows that they are coming to you. According to the rules of the family, you let them go back, and their family will send them back. Other people know that they are coming here, and they don't dare to ask their sisters." ”

"Where is this, strong buy and sell?"

"Unsalable, you can solve the demand."

Chen Mo was almost killed by a breath, what is unsalable? The goods are usually cold and cold, and they are speechless.

"What needs?" asked Curious.

"Matching." Jing Ge said coldly.

Chen Mo's face is green, and he no longer pays attention to this big and small two goods, but the two girls look at him with pity, and suddenly feel a headache.

"Forget it, the house is quite big. If you love to live, just stay in it. It is a nanny. It doesn't matter if you have no popularity at home." Chen Mo doesn't care.

"Thank you, my name is 茼姒."

"Sir, my name is Dina."

When I heard Chen Mo leave them, the two girls were very excited and started to introduce themselves.

Seeing the two girls are extremely happy, and watching his burning gaze, Chen Mo helped the forehead to ignore them and turned into the room, feeling the same.

Nothing in the night.

The early morning of the wild mountain star is beautiful. When the star breaks, the last light of the fluorescent plant is slowly extinguished, and an ordinary dawn arrives. For the Manzan people, this is an extraordinary dawn. Today, they will be born again and start a new life.

Chen Mo is in the courtyard of the villa, and he is not afraid to face the robot and practice fighting skills.

Freehand fighting.

He has developed a habit. The fighting techniques that he used to practice on Earth and Qing Shuixing came to the wild mountain star. The gravity changed and he needed to adapt.

This is his come to the wild mountain star, the first time to take off the armor to practice.

The reason for gravity makes them not as fast as other planets. Freehand fighting is the foundation of the battle, and the basis for maintaining physical fitness. He cannot be abandoned.

"Your training is not right."

When Chen Mo was fascinated, he was suddenly interrupted by a voice. Jinge did not know when he had appeared in the yard and was watching him quietly.

"How?" Chen Mo stopped and asked.

"Your training is not right." Jingo said it again.

"How is training right?"

Jing Ge thought about it and said with a blank expression: "I am playing with you."

"Yes." Chen Mo immediately agreed.

Jinge is known as the strongest warrior of the Manshan people. He has never seen Jinge hands, just try this time.

In the yard, the two stood face to face, see Jing Ge, Chen Mo suddenly had a feeling of lingering, like being stared at by a wild beast, the experience is very bad.

"it has started."

Chen Mo’s words fell, and his footsteps slammed into a fist and pointed to Jing’s chest. His speed is very fast, which is a natural advantage for the brain and body.

The expected blow did not appear. Chen Mo could see that Jingo seemed to know his attack beforehand. When he punched, the upper body was already open sideways, and the knee came toward his abdomen at the same time.

Huh?

Curious special way of fighting.

Jing Ge's movements are very fast, but Chen Mo can see clearly, keep a weird balance in the dodging state, and return to attack him.

boom! !

Chen Mo’s left hand blocked Jinge’s knee, the right fist that fell, the arm bent, and the fist became elbow, pointing straight to Jing Ge’s chest. He only saw Jingo’s figure step back. At the moment when Chen Mo hit the air, his left fist hit him. The ribs of the past.

The movements of both of them are very long, but they are all completed in just one second. The speed is dazzling.

Chen Mo did not expect that Jing Ge's speed is so fast, whether it is reaction or action, he is not lost to him, and it seems that he can see through his next move in advance.

Chen Mo, who does not believe in evil, once again squats, blocking the moment of Jing Ge’s move, and sweeping his right leg to Jinge’s waist.

boom!

One leg swept, Chen Mo felt a pain in the abdomen, the body was uncontrollable and flew out, and stood until three meters away.

Lost.

From start to finish, less than ten seconds.

If Jing Ge had a dead hand, Chen Mo would not be dead or seriously injured. He was hit by Jinge and recalled the match. Just now, no matter how he speeded up the attack, Jing Ge could always hide.

"Come back."

Chen Mo was bullied and, after ten seconds, no doubt, he was beaten again. After three fights, Chen Mo finally stopped.

“Why is this?” Chen Mo asked strangely.

"You have enough speed and strength, but you lack awareness of fighting."

"Battle awareness?"

"I can predict your next attack in advance, this is the battle consciousness, all the people will." Jingo said.

“And this ability?” Chen Mo said with amazement.

chapters.title: Chapter 803: : Location Of The Construction Space Connecting Machine
chapters.body:
Chapter 803: : Location Of The Construction Space Connecting Machine

"Your fighting consciousness is born by nature, or is it that they have been hunting in the mountains for a long time?" Chen Mo is very interested in the fighting consciousness that Jing Ge said.

If he can also have this kind of combat consciousness to see through the enemy's movements in advance, his personal strength can be greatly improved.

"Be born, there are also children in the family. As they grow up, this awareness will become stronger and stronger."

Jing Ge picked up a stone and threw it at the side of the watch. The speed was very fast. He didn't see the trajectory of the stone. He instinctively measured the body and avoided the stone.

"Theirs are weaker and they can't hide faster."

Chen Mo was amazed at the moment. He had not found it before. It is estimated that he was watching the battle between the ethnic minorities, so he could not see it. Now he feels very special.

"Take off, fight with me." Chen Mo said.

"Okay, sir." Extension immediately opened the way, without too much nonsense, coming straight to Chen Mo.

Hey! !

In an instant, the extension will block Chen Mo’s two punches, and it seems that it is not difficult. Chen Mo speeds up and fights together. Soon, Chen Mo stopped and began to test other extensions.

For half an hour, Chen Mo stopped testing.

He found that the fighting consciousness that Jing Ge said was indeed born of the Barbarian, similar to Spider-Man's 'perceived' ability, a special 'super power'.

The Man Shan people are born with a sense of danger in advance.

It is this kind of consciousness that allows them to survive and grow stronger in this extremely harsh environment. The Manshan is a natural warrior.

Knowing that this is the innate advantage of the Manshan people, Chen Mo does not want to be able to learn this skill, in vain.

This natural ability, like electricity, will generate electricity. It requires a unique combination of gene combinations, cellular metabolism, brain structure and body structure that is unique, unless they are genetically altered or develop superpowers.

Two hours later, Chen Mocai completed the training. Just returned to the house to have breakfast, and Tuoshan came over.

"Sir, the people in the family have gathered in the square."

"Well, let's go."

Chen Mo drank the beast milk in the cup and left with Tuoshan.

The people of the Manshan ethnic group have gathered in the square of the city, 300,000 people. This is the first time that they have gathered in the square after they moved into their new home. Everyone has joy on their faces.

They never thought that there would be such a good life one day.

They eat artificial meat. They are no longer worried about food. They are no longer afraid of beasts and poisonous insects in the mountains. There are electric lights in the night, and there are mechanical cars carrying them out. Compared with before, this kind of life only exists in their ancestors. The legend.

And it is Chen Mo who gives them all this.

When Chen Mo appeared in the square, the cheers were already overwhelming, and Chen Mo was treated as a **** to admire.

Seeing the excited crowd below, Chen Mo sighed. He thinks of the believers on earth, and the devout believers seeing the image of God is just such a gaze.

“Today, everyone has to change their way of life.”

The first sentence of Chen Mo’s opening.

For the Manshan people, they are now more excited, and when the excitement period is over, they will fall into a confused stage.

They used to hunt all the time, look for food, and then guard against the dangers of the mountains and survive. Now the dangers of hunting and preparedness are lifted. If they are allowed to idle and do nothing, it will not be long before this group will be chaotic.

Being lazy is the source of extinction.

"In the future, everyone in the family, especially young people and children, must be educated and learn. The soldiers in the group form team training, guard against crisis and defend their homes. I will set up some rules, and you must follow the rules. Only then Our people will become stronger and stronger. Do you understand?"

"understand."

More than 300,000 people shouted and shook the clouds.

Chen Mo saved the Manshan people and used incredible means to build a city. Now, for them, Chen Mo said that everything is right. In the hearts of the people of the Manchus, Chen Mo’s prestige has surpassed their patriarchs, almost faith-like. presence.

In the past, the barbarian family lived on this planet by unity, but after coming out of the interstellar and out of the universe, unity alone was unbelief.

Chen Mo had to put a set of civilized world here first, and prepare for the development of the Manshan people.

"Now, I send each of you a machine, you put it on your hand, write your name, and later it will represent you."

Chen Mo asked the robot to send the prepared bracelet to the people of the Manshan.

The Man Shan people have had the ancestors of civilization. They have the concept and saying of money. They are usually used to exchange some foods and goods that are needed. As with civilized society, the status of money is so high.

Civilization must have civilized rules and management, which is a must. Chen Mo only taught all the rules of the civilized system to the barbarian family at one time.

"In the future, you have to work, you have money at work, and you have money to change what you want."

After a bunch of basic rules, Chen Mocai stopped.

"Now, to participate in the armed soldiers of the ethnic group, click on your bracelet and confirm the registration on the bracelet. The soldiers in the family will be responsible for guarding the homeland and the armor can wear."

Chen Moliang appeared in the armor.

This time, everyone is surging.

They have seen the armor, Chen Mo flew through the air into the air, as a warrior, they actually have a mechanical armor, it must be very powerful.

In less than half a minute, all the soldiers in the family chose to sign up.

They have been hunting in the mountains some time ago, and they are fighting against the sky. The **** nature is still intact. In the view of the Manzan people, becoming a soldier is a kind of glory.

"If you are younger, you don't have to worry. If you are old enough, you can sign up as a warrior. This kind of armor will enter the school as your course. You all can train and use this kind of armor." Chen Mo said.

Schools and courses are not known to the people of the mountain. The concept is not big, but Chen Mo’s last sentence makes the entire barbarian people fall into the crazy cheers.

Tuoshan and Mudu are full of tears, as if living in a dream. This kind of life, they never dreamed before, and now it is real.

"The patriarch, you will manage the affairs of the family in the future, you can find someone in the family to help you manage. According to the rules I gave you, the prize was awarded, and the penalty was wrong."

"Okay, sir." Tuoshan solemnly said.

He knows that the gentleman has given them the best conditions. If the Hanshan people can prosper, they can only rely on themselves.

"Mr. Muxi, you will be the principal of the school in the future, supervising the children to study." Chen Mo said to Muxi.

"Yes, sir."

Mudu nodded very seriously. As a knowledge inheritor of the Manshan people, he naturally knew how important knowledge was. In order to survive, the tribes valued the force, the knowledge could not be transmitted, and now there is no threat of survival. Later knowledge is the most important.

叮嘱 Necessary things, and the determined rules and regulations will be given to Tuoshan and Chen Mochao.

The study will continue, the first city will be formed, and then he will develop the entire wild mountain star, ready to build a space connection machine.

"Mo Mo Mo..."

As soon as he entered the spaceship, Chen Mo was pointed by the little beast, and his face was covered with a slap in the face. It was obvious that he had left it silent, leaving it and squatting on the spaceship.

Chen Mo directly put the little beast on his shoulders and calmed it down. The little guy calmed down and greeted him and went to the spaceship's research room.

In the experimental room, Chen Mo adjusted the star map of the star system in the wild mountain.

This stellar system, a total of twelve planets, the fifth planet of the wild mountain, is located in the livable zone, the other eleven, one in the early days of the evolution of the terrestrial planet, can be developed into a livable planet, another ten The environment is extreme and no large life is found.

Space is the best construction point for space connection technology, and gravitational interference is not that big.

"Ink, release all the data from all the planets in this star system."

As soon as the words fall, there are various data on the screen. Twelve planets are marked with numbers 1 to 12. All the states of the planet are clear on the screen, involving the orbit, gravity, rotation, orbital angle of the planet. All specific data such as volume, radius, and quality.

Just looking at the data, Chen Mo’s mind emerged from the position of five Lagrangian points between the wild star and the star.

The Lagrange point is the five special solutions to the restrictive three-body problem.

Any binary system has five Lagrangian points. To build any large space machine, these five Lagrangian solutions are very good choices. Here is the gravitational singularity. You don't have to worry a lot about machine maintenance. problem.

"Sir, what are you going to do next?" he asked cautiously.

“The technology to get out of the small universe is now looking for a place to build space to connect the machine.” Chen Mo pointed out the location of the Lagrange L1 point between the wild star and the star.

chapters.title: Chapter 804: : Space Jumping Experiment
chapters.body:
Chapter 804: : Space Jumping Experiment

Chen Mo has already handed over the affairs of Manshan to Tuoshan. The city has been built to provide safe houses and food for the people of the Manshan ethnic group. How to manage the Manshan people is a matter of Tuoshan.

The city, safety and comfort, is much better than their previous caves. Every household has a house and a certain amount of artificial food. You don’t have to worry about the beasts in the forest. At least the mountain people have seen it. The hope of growth.

The construction of Manshanxing and Chen Mo’s work on space-connected machines are on the right track. With the beginning of the industrial base and the entire technology library, Chen Mo, who opens his hands and limits, can explode in technology.

What Chen Mo is thinking now is how to build a space-connected machine to create a super-light-speed space curvature spacecraft and leave the small universe.

Although there are only two technology products, there are so many machines and technologies involved that they need a complete industrial system support. Chen Mo plans to build two machines at the fastest speed to get out of the small universe.

Ten days later, a mechanical column carrying satellites and detectors lifted up in the city of Manshan, pointing to the sky.

......

"Mom, why am I called nameless?"

Little nameless sitting in the hall playing with toys, looked up and asked the small fish next to him, in the round eyes, with curiosity and doubt.

"Dad is not at home, waiting to come back to name you, so I will call it no name first."

Xiao Yu gently caressed the little nameless face.

This kind of small face has many traces similar to Chen Mo. Xiaoming is very clever and grows fast. Now that he has learned to walk and talk, he started to recognize the words. You can be sure that the nameless is a super baby. Xiaoyu now concentrates on educating the unknown. The group’s affairs are handed over to Zhao Minhe. Ink girl.

"When did the father come back to the duck?" asked the little nameless milk.

"Soon, Dad went to a deep and distant universe. The ink-woman was building a spaceship. When the spacecraft was built, she would pick up her father." Xiao Yu smiled.

"Mom, what is the universe?"

"The universe is the sky above the head."

"Dad is in the sky? Is Dad a god? It is as powerful as Sun Wukong."

"Your father is more powerful than Sun Wukong. It is more powerful than the gods. Your father can create the world, and Sun Wukong can't."

One big and one small mother and son have a chat without a chat, the ink girl came over.

"what's wrong?"

"The super-light speed spacecraft and the space jump port are all completed. Can Xiaoying sister go to see it?"

"Completed?" Hearing the news of the ink girl, Xiaoyu looked very happy, and hurriedly handed the baby to Chen's mother to look after it. After a few clicks, he found a piece of clothing and changed it to leave with the ink girl.

The first floor of the marching ant group headquarters.

Ink, Zhao Min and Xiao Yu are both there, as well as Wang Hai, Black Eagle, Zhong Lei, Zhu He and other major members of the Army Group of the Army Ant Group, all gathered in underground laboratories.

In the center of the laboratory, a holographically projected circular mechanical building is suspended.

This is the space jump port built by the ink girl at the L4 point of Lagrange. Its true size is 200 kilometers in diameter. It is a small planet that uses robots to capture a large number of solar asteroid belts. It is pushed to this position and decomposed by nano-robots. Material built.

“This is the space jump port ‘Tianhuan’, which was completed last month. Now the experiment is completed and theoretically it can be put into use. Its role is to provide space coordinates.”

The ink girl introduced them to the role of space jumping port.

The space jump port is the docking port of the spacecraft, which provides a spatial coordinate position.

Enter the spatial coordinate position into the space curvature spacecraft, where the space can be folded enough to become the terminal port of the spacecraft. Otherwise, the super-light-speed spacecraft outside the Earth will not be able to lock back the space coordinates of the Earth. When the universe is lost, the consequences are terrible.

"The next step is our first space jump and return experiment. The experiment is a super-light speed space curvature spacecraft, space folding and stretching, which can surpass the speed of light in an instant to make space jump. The spacecraft curvature engine of the spacecraft can fold the spaceship to jump The space needed."

As the ink words fell, a holographic projection of a spacecraft appeared in the center of the laboratory.

This is a scaled-down projection of a two-kilometer ring-shaped spacecraft, one side of which is covered with a large double-ring structure, which is the space curvature engine of the spacecraft.

On the spacecraft, there are large quantum radars and matrix telescopes for detecting life planets. The signs and numbers of the marching ant group are particularly eye-catching. As long as Chen Mo sees the sign of the spacecraft, he can recognize the origin of the spacecraft.

"This spaceship is called 'seeking the silent number'." said the ink girl.

The meaning is obvious, the spaceship is to find Chen Mo built.

"In theory, its spatial curvature engine, a start-up jump, can jump a distance of 100 million light-years at the farthest. We don't know the situation outside the solar system, so it is not appropriate to send a large number of spaceships out to avoid exposure to large-scale alien civilizations. In the middle, it invites the destruction and hunting of aliens.

But looking for Mercury in the universe, the task is more difficult than finding a needle in a haystack, so we must first explore the existence of the universe civilization outside the earth, whether it is a coexistence rule or a dark forest rule, and then think of a way, according to this article that captures the Mergo ship Clues, looking for the civilization to capture Mergo. ”

The ink girl released pictures of Chen Mo’s ‘carrot’-shaped spaceship, as well as various character patterns of the wreckage of the arrester. This is the only clue they are looking for in Chen Mo.

As long as they find the words and goals they want, they can find a way to save Chen Mo.

“Can humans enter the spacecraft experiment?” Wang Hai asked.

Ink nodded: "Theoretically, but not recommended, temporarily uncertain when space jumps, will not let humans have other problems, now is the first experiment, so when the space jumps, temporarily only no one jumps. ”

"There is no other way for humans to follow the experiment. Later, they will enter the spacecraft space. They must be equipped with humans to follow the command. Artificial intelligence has more or less certain limitations." The Black Hawk followed closely.

"Yes, in order to solve this problem, I and Musou have prepared virtual reality technology. Using virtual reality technology and super-speed quantum communication technology, let human consciousness connect the robot's perspective loaded by the spacecraft and follow the space jump."

The essence of this technology is to digitize the scenes seen by the robots and the scenes of the spacecraft, and transmit them back to the Earth through the superluminal quantum communication technology. The virtual reality scenes are built on the Earth's scenes inside and outside the spacecraft. As long as the virtual reality equipment is put on, Equivalent to take over the perspective of the robot, and the robot, as a substitute for human consciousness.

When this is said, everyone is happy.

This means that in the future, they can use virtual reality technology, connect quantum supercomputers and quantum communication, and enter the spacecraft robot perspective. Their consciousness enters the sea of stars, and later they are no longer just listening to the news, but witness.

"Now the space jump port and super-light speed spacecraft have been completed, Xiao Yujie and Zhao Min sister can decide whether to start the experiment of starting space jump back." After the introduction, the ink girl will decide to hand over to the two women.

Xiao Yu and Zhao Min looked at each other without hesitation. For this day, they waited for more than two years.

"Start the experiment."

"okay."

After the promise of the ink girl, far away from the ground space base of Mars, a two-kilometer circular spacecraft was launched and rushed into the sky.

chapters.title: Chapter 805: :Technology Administrator·God
chapters.body:
Chapter 805: :Technology Administrator·God

"After the check is completed, the return coordinates have been stored, the destination is determined, and the request to start the space curvature engine."

In space, the space curvature spacecraft has stopped and floated in space. Control the artificial intelligence of the spacecraft and use the superluminal quantum communication equipment to play the message towards the earth.

"Request for approval."

"Request to pass, start the spatial curvature engine."

Command, the spacecraft space curvature engine starts. Without sound, the double-circular space curvature engine flashes the devastating light of antimatter burning.

Space jumps cannot be completed in an instant, requiring a space-folding accumulation process.

Everyone is waiting, this is the first space jump. The universe spans too much, even at the speed of light, it can only explore the galaxies around the solar system, and the time span required is not low. If this experiment is successful, it will open the real door for humans to enter the universe. Humans can cross the distance beyond the light years in just a few hours.

Time passes by, and ten minutes, the Earth headquarters are quietly waiting for the preparation of the spacecraft.

Space curvature ship first flight, this is a milestone event.

"The spacecraft is ready to sail, the destination is South Gate 2, 10...9...8...2...1."

"set sail."

As the countdown ended, the spacecraft in space suddenly disappeared.

A spaceship of the South Gate, which is 4.3 light years away from Earth, is a spacecraft that floats in space. The spacecraft is the space curvature ship that has just set sail in the solar system.

"Discovering a Centaur A star, found a Centaurus a star B, found a neighboring star, the spacecraft confirmed to reach the destination."

At the headquarters of the marching ant group, at the moment when the ‘seeking number’ disappeared, everyone was nervous, and success or failure was here.

“Received the data feedback of the ‘seeking number’ and succeeded.”

The ink girl transferred all the data out and used the holographic technology to simulate the environment of the ‘Mermaid’ outer space.

The South Gate II galaxies are the most peripheral galaxies of the Southern Cross, and form a three-pointed star with the neighboring stars, which is the three-body star system.

Three different sizes of 'the sun' hang in the laboratory through holographic simulation scenes, the largest yellow Centaurus a star A, orange Centaur a star B, and red dwarf star next to the star.

This is a magnified model. In the real ‘seeking number’ field of view, the three suns are slightly larger than the stars, but the brightness is greater.

“The space curvature spacecraft has sailed successfully.”

The ink girl said this news, the people in the laboratory were ecstatic, a cross-century experiment succeeded, and then the earth civilization, from the development of the star system to the interstellar development, the civilization level completed the jump.

“Is there a trinity there?” Zhao Min asked urgently.

"No life planet was found."

Upon hearing this answer, Xiao Yu’s face clearly showed the color of loss.

The ink woman led the crowd to the virtual reality chair. Xiao Yu and Zhao Min couldn't wait to sit down. Wang Hai and Black Hawk also sat down and put on virtual reality equipment.

In classic sci-fi movies and novels, they all say that there is life in the neighboring stars. They even think that it is an alien from the neighboring star to capture Chen Mo.

After putting on the helmet, everyone fell into a deep sleep and instantly appeared in the virtual reality space. They have all experienced virtual reality space, and they are not surprised.

At this time everyone stood on the top of the ring of the spacecraft, surrounded by endless space, dead and silent.

"This is where the spacecraft is now. In this stellar planet, the conditions are extreme." The ink girl put the detected planet in front of several people and could not see any signs of life activity.

Disappointing, there is no civilization here, meaning they have to go to other galaxies to find.

Switching to the robot's perspective, several people are attached to the robot body than the general, the scene becomes the scene inside the spacecraft, they can control the robot to any corner of the spacecraft. In the future, they can follow the spacecraft to various cosmic galaxies in this way.

"Now test the spacecraft to jump back to the space to jump into the port."

The space curvature engine was started, the spacecraft was quiet, and everyone looked at everything inside the spacecraft through the robot's field of vision. There was no change. Only the spacecraft artificial intelligence prompted the spacecraft to make a space jump.

"Space coordinates are determined, ready to sail, destination: Earth Sky Ring Space Jump Port."

"Tianhuan received a request to jump for the silent number and passed."

"by."

"Countdown 10...9...8...2...1."

At the L4 point of Lagrange, the day is a giant ring-shaped building with a diameter of 200 kilometers. It is continuously running. In the center of the ring, the space seems to have a layer of ripples.

Suddenly, the space in the center of the Tianhuan circle expanded and a spaceship appeared in the center of the Tianhuan.

"Return to success."

Looking for the news of the silent number, Xiao Yu and others are extremely happy.

The space jumps successfully, the space project is announced, and the next step is to truly enter the universe.

"Start the space exploration program."

From the virtual reality space, Zhao Min gave the ink girl a command. The two most important projects are now all successful, which means that the era of space exploration is really coming.

......

Now the wild mountain star has been transformed by nano-robots beyond recognition.

Centered on the wild mountain city, in the plains and coastal areas, intelligent future cities are located in it, fully intelligent and mechanized, even if there is no life to live, it is still in order to produce.

Chen Mo is designing a space connection machine in the laboratory. The design work is very smooth, and it takes time and testing. The mechanical column has traveled to outer space and began collecting materials to build space-connected machines.

Suddenly, Chen Mo settled in the study, and there was a strong sense of excitement in his brain, sweeping away a little bit of fatigue that he had accumulated for a long time.

The science library has changed.

I didn't want to think about it. Chen Mo dropped the research at hand and lay down on the chair and entered the technology library.

This kind of feeling is rare, and only when the technology library task is completed, is there such a heavy excitement.

really.

In the science and technology library, the technology ball has been shot by Zijin.

On the earth, the ink girl made the super light speed spacecraft.

This is the task of [Technology Administrator Zijin], the completion of the super-light speed spacecraft on the Earth, the Science and Technology Library decided that this task is completed.

After leaving this time, there must have been a lot of things happening on Earth. However, the ink girl completed the manufacture of the super-light speed spacecraft, indicating that the solar system is okay and developing rapidly.

The radiant purple gold light makes Chen Mo take a deep breath. He knows that the most important thing is coming, and the authority of the technology library is upgraded.

Every time the upgrade is granted, along with a brain domain development, Chen Mo does not know what effect it is, but he is ready to suffer.

Taking a deep breath, Chen Mo put his palm on the technology ball.

Oh...

A slight vibration, the purple gold light of the technology ball along the palm of Chen Mo, began to spread toward his body, wherever, the blood vessels and even the bones under the flesh and blood began to turn purple gold.

The purple-gold light passes through the blood vessels, quickly touching the spine and extending toward the brain.

As Chen Mo expected, severe pain reappeared.

Chen Mo feels that where the purple gold shines, the cells are recombined from the atomic level. Familiar with the pain, Chen Mo squats on the right hand connecting the technology ball, the muscles on his face are shaking.

If there is a microscope, you can see that the place where the purple gold shines, the flesh and blood under the skin turns into a transparent purple gold, like a tiny purple gold crystal, but there is no difference in appearance.

The most obvious change is the brain. If you can see the inside of Chen Mo's head, you can find that Chen Mo's brain is slowly changing from transparent golden yellow to transparent purple gold, cell level, and all reorganized.

The terrible pain of horror made Chen Mo feel that the brain is undergoing a black hole explosion.

Brain, eyes, spine, bones, heart...

Every important organ and tissue is covered and assimilated by purple gold rays.

Until the purple ball of the technology ball disappeared, Chen Mo’s palm was loosened from the technology ball. The pain disappeared, and Chen Mo squatted directly on the ground, holding his hands on the ground and gasping.

There are countless disasters that have gone through the rest of the life.

Chen Mo feels that this is not an evolution, but a sublimation, a qualitative change, and an unprecedented state of affairs.

After about five minutes of rest, the spirit recovered, and Chen Mo stood up and focused on the technology ball.

Unlocking the new level of authority means that all the technologies of the Zijin level, including the design drawings and manufacturing equipment technology, are all open to him. But what makes Murmo most curious is the new permissions.

The highest authority of the science and technology library has not been achieved so far.

[Technology Administrator God]

Still have a suffix.

Chen Mo slightly disappointed, Shu Lao said, to get the highest authority of the technology library, is the suffix of the technology administrator disappeared, has not disappeared.

But it was in his expectation.

The science and technology library's terror technology, the most powerful weapon can destroy the universe, and now his ability and technical strength can not reach that level.

However, the situation is almost the same. The super-light speed spacecraft is completed and enters the era of space development. The technology and strength will also increase exponentially.

No longer paying attention to the level of authority, Chen Mo will focus on the task of the new authority.

chapters.title: Chapter 806: : Quantum Life
chapters.body:
Chapter 806: : Quantum Life

Quantum Life

Make yourself a quantum life.

When I saw this task, Chen Mo’s heart was extremely shocking. To transform yourself into quantum life, this task is undoubtedly a conceptual impact on Chen Mo.

Quantum eternal life may also be fleeting. If the mission fails, his life will die within the picosecond; if the mission is successful, it will last forever, and the achievement will be immortal.

The gods in mythology can move mountains and reclamation, fly in the sky, live forever, technology can do it, and it can be done, but the price is a bit big.

In the creation of quantum life, we create ourselves with a huge amount of energy, transform each particle of the body into a quantum, and finally let the quantum reorganize the body.

Chen Mo thought of a classic character in the earth science fiction movie, Dr. Manhattan.

The science and technology library is making gods.

After determining the task, Chen Mo fell into meditation.

If you don't reach the highest authority, you will be fascinated by the task of creating the highest authority. Immortality is almost the ultimate in life, and the highest temptation for any intelligent life.

Taking a deep breath, Chen Mo got out of the shock of the mission and put his gaze on the unlocking technology.

[Quantum Life Creation Technology and Theory]

[God particle stabilization and use technology], [Angel particle extraction and preservation theory]

[Two-dimensional space cage], [Black hole child], [Death particle], [Smart downgrade], [Space curtain]

[Advanced intelligent life cloning technology theory], [the principle and technology of intelligent life consciousness transfer], [directional super power development technology theory]

[Energy Conversion Substance Theory]

[Super Galaxy Energy Detecting Quantum Radar]

......

All are ultra-high-level technologies, these techniques, involving a variety of elementary particles and regular weapons, all toward the god-level means of the Creator. Compared with the Zijin-class technology, these technologies are completely a qualitative jump. Even if Chen Mo sees this technology, he is short of breath.

Digesting these techniques, he can make a lot of gods.

Chen Mo won the [quantum life creation technology and theory] to create quantum life, which is the task of his authority at this stage. This technology is one level higher than other technologies.

Chen Mo began to extract other technologies.

At this stage, he was trapped in a small universe. Everything started from scratch. He could not develop these technologies for the time being, but he had to take it out in his mind to prepare for the unexpected.

This is a necessary technology in the era of the universe.

When the technology was taken, Chen Mo looked up at the technology library. The technology ball was restored to colorless and transparent, and it became soft. The inner beautiful lines were turning, which was more like the rotation of the universe.

At this time, the science and technology library is still mysterious in the eyes of Chen Mo.

Turning from the chair, Chen Mo saw the little beast in front of his eyes, staring at him curiously.

"Mo Mo Mo?"

"I am fine."

Chen Mogang wants to reach out and take the little beast into his arms. It just moved. The little body of the little beast has floated in the air and floated toward his hand.

The strange scene in front of him made Chen Mo's body shape a big shock.

"Mo Mo Mo?"

"Momo!"

The little beast's body is uncontrolled, and he is desperately shouting. The chubby claws are struggling in the air like drowning. They are crying for help, and finally fall in Chen Mo's hands, and the body resumes control. Scared the little beast along Chen Mo's arm, drilled into Chen Mo's clothes, stretched out his small head and looked out with a vigilant look.

"Momo?"

Consciousness affects the state of existence of matter.

superpower!

Chen Mo looked at his hand and stayed alone.

......

The black civilization is in a small universe.

On the surface of a calm dwarf planet, a training armor suddenly stopped and looked up at the sky.

Over the dwarf planet, a spacecraft suddenly appeared and landed slowly on the surface of the dwarf planet. A woman wearing a armor came out of the spaceship and walked respectfully to the front of the armor, a pair of dark, ink-colored eyes with a colored magic pattern on her face.

The helmet of the armor landed, revealing the face of a male life.

Men are like human beings. The facial features are typical humanoids. They have black eyes and no variegated colors. They are deeper than the dark stars. The neck below the face is covered with magic lines, and the colored magic lines are beautiful and more restrained than the color of the women's magic lines.

"Is there something?" The man's voice was low.

"The young people of the Qing Dynasty, the intelligence personnel returned the news, the endless sea civilization has a big movement, they may be deploying war preparations." The female warrior said.

"Oh? Endless sea?" The man gave a slight meal and glanced at the starry sky: "It seems that the universe has been peaceful for too long."

"The Speaker invited you to go back and be born," the woman said.

"I? Oh, go out and go, it's very stuffy." The man smiled and walked away from the spaceship, and the female soldier hurriedly followed.

"Adults, the universe is very calm, why is the endless sea suddenly deploying war preparations?" The woman asked.

"This is not a secret, your study is not enough."

"Sorry, adults, must work hard." The woman respectfully said.

"Do you know why God-class civilization will become a god-level civilization?"

"Because we have the strongest technology and weapons."

"This is just a condition."

The man boarded the spaceship and did not care.

"In addition to the strong technology and technology, there is also a high level of life. The ordinary wisdom life is just a flesh and blood, but evolved into a god-level life, each life has a special ability. We are black and civilized, have These special eyes, endless sea civilization, naturally have their special features, otherwise they could not escape the fate of destruction."

"What is the power of the god-level life of the endless sea?" the female soldier asked with doubt.

"In the seven god-level civilizations, the ability of endless sea civilization is the most special. Their preparation means that the cosmic war is coming. Their ability is: the prophet."

......

The solar system, Mars.

Four super-light-speed space curvature ships floated and flew into space.

Earth's marching ant group headquarters, Xiao Yu and Zhao Min are watching the state of the spacecraft. Everything is ready, now is the time to formally explore the space and find the civilization that captures Chen Mo.

“In order to prevent the spacecraft from being destroyed in the alien field, I loaded three war robots in the spacecraft, each of which was used for the armed defense of the space curvature spacecraft.”

The holographic projections of the three war robots are placed neatly in the center of the laboratory, with different shapes and sizes.

This is the latest production of war robots.

“This is the most powerful robot that can be produced by the current technology. The material is dark matter synthesis, the most powerful material currently developed, non-ultra-high energy weapons, can not be cut. In addition, it can withstand the compression of space, and it is equipped with high-strength toroidal magnetic field. The energy shield, when the energy shield is turned on, can withstand the irradiation of ultra-high-energy pulsed lasers."

In spite of all the consequences of the development, now the ink girl has digested all the technology left by Chen Mo, and created some new technologies, and turned these technologies into reality.

"The core of the robot's energy is the anti-matter micro-reactor. The engine material is also a dense material for dark matter synthesis. The atoms are locked by dark matter. The surface of the atomic layer is almost smooth and can be accelerated at full power for a long time.

Its speed can easily reach 100 times the speed of sound, the highest moving speed, theoretically 0.5 times the speed of light. Its radar is the latest miniature quantum radar with a scan radius of 6,000 kilometers. In addition, the eye is two optical radars that can switch to each other.

Finally, it is the most important weapon system. On it, there are three laser weapons, two hands and one shoulder. Elbows, knees, shoulders, fists and other important joints, equipped with ultra-high-energy short-pulse laser fighting thorns, equipped with a super-high-energy pulsed laser cold weapon, the weapon is designed according to the situation of each war robot.

Short-pulse laser fighting thorns and these cold weapons with short-pulse lasers can achieve a pulse power of 130 million times that of previous high-energy lasers, and can easily penetrate dark matter composite materials. ”

The introduction of the ink girl, let the people on the field jump straight.

They all know that this kind of big killer can already destroy the civilization that is unified with the earth.

"As for the use of cold weapons, the remote high-energy pulsed laser can be blocked by the energy shield of the toroidal magnetic field. Once the other party has a similar robot, the remote weapon will lose its function, and the cold weapon will come in handy.

According to the battle exploration of "Super Warrior", it is a good near weapon to corrode the solution and venom with materials, so the war robot is also equipped with a near weapon of corrosive solution.

I eliminated conventional explosives because of the traditional explosives, which could not cause damage to high-density materials and took up a lot of space. For the civilization below us, it is a bit of a chicken, the same civilization as us, and explosives are useless.

But as a supplement to the physical attack of hot weapons, I use antimatter bullets to make up for the shortage of hot weapons. A finger-sized antimatter bullet can destroy a large city. And it is different from the energy weapon and is not detected by the energy radar, which is good for breaking and destroying.

At present, the combat system of war robots is the 'army ant system'. The soldier ant system is a super-artificial intelligence analysis of the 104.37 billion battle scenes in the "Super Warrior", 3.1 trillion battle data, plus computer-calculated simulation data, it is proficient in any known combat methods. .

The robot has a built-in 10,000-bit quantum chip as the computing core, and the amount of calculation is infinite. From data processing to judgment, the machine response speed is 62 nanoseconds on average, and in combat, it can be changed according to the state of the enemy. ”

Ink has introduced three war robots in one breath. This is not a battle armor. It can't bring people. The advantage of non-Battle robots is that they can have more equipment and space in a limited volume.

There are three war robots on the field, two of which are humanoid and one non-classical. Heights range from 4 meters to 1.5 meters, and their combat styles are different.

The largest is the remote robot. The power of the remote pulse laser is higher than that of other war robots, and the flexibility of the close is lower.

The smallest is the Assassin robot, which is based on flexible speed and stealth. The material is radar stealth material, the material is weaker than other robots, and it is mainly aimed at the rapid assassination of the monomer.

There is also an atypical war robot, which is mainly a melee robot. It is shaped like a spiderman's armor. On the basis of the human body, six flexible mechanical octopus legs are added behind it, carrying a short pulse laser fighting thorn. Easily pierce all materials currently available, including dense materials for dark matter synthesis.

These war robots are all soldiers, soldiers of the marching ant group.

Now through artificial intelligence learning, the reaction speed and combat capability of soldiers and ants have already far surpassed humans.

Aliens in the universe, life may be higher than humans, using humans to control the armor, the combat power may be insufficient, so it needs to be replaced by artificial intelligence.

They have reason to believe that aliens also have a technology that is stronger than them, so they must be prepared for everything.

"In addition to war robots, the spacecraft also carries anti-matter star bombs, super viruses, high-pulsation electromagnetic bombs, nano-robots, micro-search robots and catching robots. Search robots are used to find Mergo, spacecraft and medical facilities, and finally It is the armor for Mergo."

"As long as we find the murderer, we can save the murderer by any means. Now I am developing a space dimension weapon. Once completed, it can provide galactic-level combat deterrence." said the ink girl.

All their actions are aimed at saving Chen Mo back.

When everyone understood the force carried by the super-light speed spacecraft, the spacecraft had reached the predetermined space position.

With the order of the ink girl, the spacecraft's space curvature engine was activated. Thirty minutes later, the four spacecraft disappeared into space in different quadrants of the universe.

chapters.title: Chapter 807: : Leaving The Small Universe
chapters.body:
Chapter 807: : Leaving The Small Universe

The endless sea civilization suddenly prepared for the big action of the war, bringing an unprecedented storm to the cosmic alliance.

The parties in the universe began to feel uneasy.

This is not a trivial matter.

The life of a god-level civilization has a special place to come out with the most advanced technology, and they have a special ability.

Among them, the ability to endless sea civilization life is the most special.

prophet.

It is the endless sea civilization that has this special ability to predict the future, allowing the endless sea civilization to survive the once-world civilized war and find a small universe, which later developed into one of the god-level civilizations.

The endless sea civilization is ready for war, which means that there may be a cosmic war in the future, which will threaten the survival of the endless sea civilization, so the endless sea civilization will be prepared in this way.

Involving the seven god-level civilizations may undoubtedly be a battle for a cosmic civilization.

Two years.

For two years, for the universe, it just passed away.

In the past two years, there have been many major events, and the most famous god-class civilization genius has been born with explosive news.

The dark forest civilization, the dark dragon prince, left the dark forest and the small universe, and went to the water cloud to the super-galaxies to find the endless sea civilization challenge.

The dark forest civilization is one of the seven god-level civilizations. It is a kind of orc civilization, and it has always been wild and full of struggles. The dark forest civilization is therefore not subject to other families.

However, the dark forest civilization and its affiliated civilizations like this kind of awkward, unruly character.

The Dark Dragon Prince is even more high-profile news, this time to the endless sea, is to challenge the master of the endless sea.

One of the seven god-level civilizations, the endless sea is a kind of sea civilization, all fish and sea people, civilization has less contact with the outside world, low-key style, has always kept mystery, plus their special prophetic ability, so Give the outside world an unfathomable feeling.

The Emperor of Dark Dragon is only a thousand years old, and he is only a teenager in the age-class civilization, but he is the top warrior in the dark forest civilization.

The two god-level civilizations were separated by hundreds of millions of years, and they collided again. The feast of the top warrior battles made the universe countless civilizations look forward to.

This time, the Emperor of Dark Dragon installed the shooting radar, and the All-Union Alliance broadcasted the battle. When the Dark Dragon Emperor entered the Spiral Cloud Superstar, his figure appeared in the live broadcast of the Universe Alliance through quantum communication.

The violent character of the Dark Dragon Emperor encounters the indifference of the endless sea and the thousands of miles away. It is like a hot oil pan that meets the ice water and instantly blasts.

In the face of the provocation of the Dark Dragon Emperor, the endless sea is not polite with the other side.

The battle was carried out in an inanimate abandoned galaxies training ground in the Sapphire Supernova, and the Dark Dragon Prince is young but powerful.

The defeat of eighteen endless sea civilization masters in World War I attracted the cosmic alliance.

The endless sea civilization master who felt horrified and humiliated began to fight the wheel of the Dark Dragon Emperor and finally lost. Just as everyone thought that the endless sea would be hit by the dark dragon prince, a class of sea fishermen dressed in armor entered the abandoned galaxies.

The fisherman girl is indifferent, wearing a marine armor, holding a long fish gun, and her face and neck are covered with blue fish scales. The scales are colorful under the light, making people feel that this is a saint.

The fisherman girl let the dark dragon prince take a day off and fight again.

The next day, when they fought again, the two men fought for three hours and destroyed 58 planets. In the end, the Dark Dragon Emperor of the Dark Forest was picked by the mermaid girl's spear, and he was seriously injured and left.

The endless sea civilization, which has always been insensitive, has become the object of concern of the All-China Alliance. The low-level civilization of the Universe Alliance knows that the foundation of the seven god-level civilizations is beyond the imagination.

When the All-Union Alliance is admiring the endless sea of depth, one thing triggers the tension of the Cosmic Alliance.

On the way to the dark forest civilization, the Dark Dragon Prince was assassinated.

This incident caused a stir in the Universe Alliance.

The relationship between the dark forest civilization and the endless sea civilization has fallen into the freezing point of hundreds of millions of years. The universe civilization can feel the tension between the situation and some subtleties.

Small universe, pretty mountain star.

The wild mountain star has long had no appearance when Chen Mo just landed here.

Unrecognizable.

The entire wild mountain star is spread over all kinds of large mechanical cities. The main city of the planet is the first mountain town built by Chen Mo.

The city of Manshan is very large, and the population of the Manshan people is very small in this city.

At present, the size of the barbarian population reaches 500,000. When they probed the wild mountain star, they discovered another 200,000 people of the Manshan ethnic group who had not died. They reunited the ethnic group and formed the current barbarian family.

Now, after exploration, Tuoshan and others have learned how to manage the current mountain people.

For two years, Chen Mo is a crucial two years.

In the past two years, Chen Mo has developed all the necessary technologies and techniques, and by the way, probed other galaxies in the small universe.

Chen Mo found a problem. In the small universe, the living environment of the planet is relatively bad, and the development of intelligent life is very slow. Only a few intelligent life planets are in the primitive period of wisdom and civilization, let alone more advanced life.

The wild mountain star is also a civilization that opens wisdom because of the entry of the barbarian family. However, Chen Moruo did not appear in the wild mountain star, the barbarian family here, perhaps one or two hundred years later, will also retreat back to the original period.

Today, space connectors and super-light speed ships are being built, and when they leave.

"Do you really not go?" Chen Mo looked at the beggar next to him. This alien woman, since adapting to the gravity here, began to integrate into life here. Now it is Chen Mo's right-hand man.

Because in this small universe, in addition to Chen Mo, only the martial arts and education of the complete civilization, so many management problems of the Manshan people, she can deal with.

I thought that I would leave the small universe, but I didn’t expect it to stay.

"No, I will stay in the wild mountain star. It is very good here. I am also tired when I go out. I will stay and educate these children." He smiled and asked, "Will you come back later?"

"It should come back, here is the small universe." Chen Mo said.

This is a unique space sanctuary. Entering here means that you can escape the disaster in the cosmic war. Here is the foundation of the god-level civilization. Human beings must develop into one of the god-level civilizations. This is the best foundation.

The small universe has the independent development of artificial intelligence and is on the right track.

Chen Mo left a complete education system from basic to advanced, as well as a complete legal system and development system. As long as the population of the Hanshan people grows up, they will gradually become stronger. There is no need for Chen Mo to intervene.

After the Hanshan people knew that Chen Mo was leaving, they were very reluctant. Chen Mo brought them from the primitive world into the civilized world, and in the heart of the Manzan people, it was the same as God. Although they are not willing, their choice of respect is only the base of the super-light speed spacecraft. They are already full of people and they are coming to bid farewell.

"Sir, you come back soon," said Tuo.

"Yes. In theory, quantum communication can connect the small universe and the main universe. When you think about me, you can use quantum communication to contact me." Chen Mo said, his head turned away.

Say goodbye to the extension and others, Chen Mo put the little beast on the shoulder, and Jingo boarded a super-light-speed space curvature ship with a diameter of one kilometer.

Tie Li wanted to follow Chen Mo, but he was too young, he still had to stay in the small universe to study, and did not help Chen Mo. So with Chen Mo leaving the small universe, only Jinge is alone.

After more than two years of understanding, Chen Mo has already determined that Jing Ge’s strength is amazing, especially after being equipped with the armor, it is almost a natural warrior. Even if Chen Mo’s body evolves again and has special abilities, Jing Ge still has some Hard work.

Jingo is in, Chen Mo is quite a top master as a 'bodyguard'.

The position of the Lagrangian L1 point between the star of the mountain and the star, a circular mechanical float of 100 kilometers in diameter.

This is a space connector.

It took two years and Chen Mo made this space connector a success.

Coming back to the main universe, Chen Mo thinks, his heart is a little excited. The super-light-speed space curvature spacecraft has been completed, and Chen Mo can return to Earth as long as he goes out to find the specific coordinates of the Milky Way in the main universe.

In a few years, Chen Mo was at the moment.

chapters.title: Chapter 808: : Billions Of Stars
chapters.body:
Chapter 808: : Billions Of Stars

"Can't you jump?"

Jing Ge's ever-changing poker face looks cool and cool, and the little beast is in his hands, enjoying his caress.

In the Manshan people, Jinge is a cold man who even the adults and children are respected. Chen Mo even listened to Tuo, saying that the beasts in the forest were afraid of Jinge, but they did not expect that the little beast was not afraid of him.

In the two years of Manshanxing, when Chen Mo studied it, the little beast often went to find Jinge's mane. This seemingly cold Tiehan actually likes licking cats, not cats, a cute little mother who doesn't know the name.

Chen Mo looked at the energy warning of the spacecraft and said faintly: "The anti-matter is exhausted."

They have come out of the small universe, the space door has been closed, and it is turned on again. It is necessary for Chen Mo to rebuild a space connector from the main universe and input the spatial amplitude data of the small universe to open the space door of the small universe from the outside, or from the inside of the small universe again. Open the space connector.

Because the space connectors do not have a specific spatial coordinate, they appear in a remote corner of the universe, from the location of the Rania Kea Super Galaxy Virgo, which is 40 billion light-years across almost half of the universe.

In order to return to Earth earlier, Chen Mo has performed more than 30 long-distance space jumps in just one hundred hours, and now there are more than one hundred light-years away from the Rania Kea Super Galaxy. The antimatter energy carried on the spacecraft is exhausted and it is no longer possible to support them for space jumps over very long distances.

Otherwise, the antimatter is completely consumed in the middle of the road, and it is necessary to drift in space.

"What to do?" Jingo asked.

“Look at where the recent civilization is, and go there to supplement antimatter energy.”

For the Alliance of the Universe, anti-matter is as common as the oil of the Earth, and every galaxy of the Union of Civilizations has many planets dedicated to anti-material energy.

Chen Mo opened the life-detecting quantum radar and matrix telescope. It didn't take long for the specific data to appear in the spacecraft.

The civilization here is quite small. It should be a suburb of the universe. Two light years away, there is a life-intensive planetary belt, which should be a relatively large civilization.

"In the third quadrant, two light years away, there is a densely populated area, where the Shiganxing life belt can jump over, go there for a period of time, reserve anti-material energy, and then jump."

Chen Mo inputs the approximate spatial coordinates of the planet belt in the densely populated area into the space curvature spacecraft.

Long distances of more than 100 million light years can't jump, but the distance of these light years can now jump freely.

Their cosmic star map is the original light speed spacecraft of the three-eye civilization.

With the development of the Universe Alliance for billions of years, the universe's star map is already complete. Even a low-level civilization can get a complete map of the universe's stars and forces, not to mention the middle-class civilization of the three-eye civilization.

Ten minutes later, Chen Mo's spaceship appeared in the space of the Shigan Galaxy. At the prompt of the radar, you can see the dense life planet around.

"Go to the main star of the Shigan Galaxy."

Chen Mo looked at the map and locked the target with the main star of the Shigan Galaxy at the distance between the two lights.

The map mark, the location of the Shigan galaxies is relatively remote, is a middle-class literary star system, the life here is mostly blue-level civilization rule, in the position of the galaxies in the universe, the Shigan galaxies are one level lower than the original point city.

It is within the distance of the two main light stars of the galaxy. It is not a jump range for the space curvature spacecraft jump. This is the regulation of the Universe Alliance. This is to prevent the enemy from using the galaxy-level destruction weapons to attack the main star. The civil life of the main star has time to escape.

"Jing Ge, why do you want to come out with me?" Chen Mo suddenly asked on the way to the main star of Shigan. He was always curious about why Jinge followed him away from the small universe.

"There is no meaning there, can't fight, the tribe does not need my protection." Jing Ge faintly opened.

For Jinge, the wild mountain star is really boring.

In the past, there were people in the family to protect, and Chen Mo gave the people a battle armor and various technologies after the transformation of the Manshan Star. The people now do not need protection at all.

"You need help." Jing Ge added another sentence.

"Oh? Ok."

Chen Mo is undecided.

Jing Ge's strength is very strong, especially after the armor, the combat power is very strong, and Jinge has the sense of super-capability of fighting consciousness, born warrior.

Drops...

"Help! Help!"

During the two chats, the voice of the spacecraft public channel appeared. The display of the spacecraft fire control radar also appeared, a red dot, being chased by seven red dots, coming over them.

The life-saving sound is the red dot of the escape, which is sent out by the electromagnetic waves of the Cosmic Alliance public channel, which can be received by the spacecraft.

The spacecraft's automatic defense mode is turned on, radar is illuminated, and all scenes appear in front of Chen Mo and Jing Ge.

A orc life wearing a beast of the Orc appears in a holographic image, with seven armor chasing behind it, a chase in space.

This is rare, Chen Mo met for the first time.

"Friend, save me, I am the prince of the Greengrass civilization of the Shigan Galaxy. Save me back, I will thank you."

"I beg you to save me."

I found that I was locked by the fire control of the spacecraft. The escaping armor was already in a hurry, and I continued to send a distress call to the public channel. The speed of the approaching spacecraft did not decrease.

"Friend, I can give you money, as long as you save me, I am willing to pay one billion stars, one billion stars."

When he heard a billion stars, Chen Mo’s eyes lit up.

He has just emerged from the small universe, and he is penniless. He is looking for where to take money to supplement antimatter energy in the Shigan Galaxy. I did not expect that someone will be sent to the door.

Originally, he didn't want to take care of this. After all, he had nothing to do with the other party. There is no need to get into trouble. But now, the other party is willing to pay, which is the money he needs most. He doesn't mind managing a gossip.

"Determining the payment of one billion stars?" Chen Mo said.

Jogri was in a hurry and went out to play today. He didn't expect the spaceship to be ambushed, and eventually fell to the end of the flight. I didn't expect the other person to pursue him. Now the armor's energy and weapons are running low. If he can't escape, he will die in space.

In this environment, it is too easy to destroy the dead.

Originally desperate, I did not expect that at the crucial moment, his armored radar prompted a spaceship to suddenly appear nearby, and he turned his head without hesitation.

This sudden spaceship is his last hope.

The initial call for help was useless, and the fire control radar of the other spacecraft did not disappear. Once he approached, he would be attacked by the other spacecraft.

In desperation, he can only throw the temptation of money.

The life of any civilization in the universe, the desire for wealth is the same.

“Are you sure to pay 1 billion stars?”

The short sentence sent by the spacecraft on the public channel made Joe Gregory ecstatic, as if Scorpio: "Yes, one billion stars, not lie to you."

"Friends, advise you not to take care of it, or you will have trouble." Hearing that Chen Mo was impressed by the billion-dollar compensation, the chasers in the rear were obviously in a hurry, and warned Chen Mo's spaceship with the public channel.

"Ink girl, lifted his fire control aim." Chen Mo did not pay attention to the warning of the chaser, ordered.

The radar found that the other party disarmed the fire control, and Joe Gregory was ecstatic, did not hesitate to accelerate, entered the fire control range of the spacecraft, and headed for the spacecraft.

The seven chasers stopped outside the spacecraft fire control and did not dare to approach, and the mood was obviously not very good.

"Friends, look at your spaceship, it should not be the life of this galaxies. Hand over Joe Gregory, you leave, we can do this without happening, there is no need to trouble ourselves." The chaser who is headed in the public channel Give a deep warning again.

"One billion stars, do you give me?" Chen Mo faintly replied.

One billion stars can save a lot of effort.

"So, is the friend planning to intervene?"

The chasing head of the head saw that Georgy was about to enter the spaceship and was extremely anxious. If Jogri is saved, today's mission is gone.

Only Chen Mo did not answer him.

"Then die with him." The chasing head of the head opened the armor's weapon, facing the armor, and did not hesitate to start.

boom!

chapters.title: Chapter 809: : Suspicion
chapters.body:
Chapter 809: : Suspicion

Chen Mo was wearing a 'free black ant' and flew from space into the entrance of the spacecraft. He threw seven antimatter energy cores to the robot and returned to the central cabin of the spacecraft.

When seeing Chen Mo passing by, Joe Greg couldn't help but swallow.

Just now, Chen Mo slaughtered seven chasers, and he was still vivid.

From the attack of the chaser, Chen Mo flew out in the armor. In less than a moment, all seven people were killed, and they couldn’t stop a round. There was no one to fight back. The skill was definitely in the hands of the Shigan Galaxy. Master.

"My name is Green Wo Jogley." Joe Greg smiled politely.

Joe Gerry’s face was barely smiling, but this smile was not good-looking.

He is a kind of orc, the armor helmet falls, from the head to the neck, it is like the green skin of a frog, the head is big, the ratio to the human is the big head doll, the mouth is wide, the eyes are bulging, even laughing A little scary.

"Chen Mo."

Chen Mo said succinctly.

Jing Ge did not pay attention to Georgy, a cold person who was not close to the stranger. He ignored him from the beginning to the end. He sat on the side and squatted with a little beast. Chen Mo was too lazy to introduce to Georgy.

When Joe Grydo saw Jinge a few eyes, he took his eyes back.

"Mr. is really extraordinary. Those fierce thieves can't escape Mr.'s round. It's really admirable." Joe Gerry began to flatter. Just seven chasers started. If he can, he doesn't mind meeting two masters. He also has him. help.

Seeing that Chen Mo and Jing Ge are indifferent, Qiao Geli flashed dissatisfaction, but only for a moment, this dissatisfaction disappeared.

"Looking at the spaceship of the two gentlemen, it should not be the life of the Shigan Galaxy. I usually like to travel around the universe and have seen many civilizations. I don't know which gentleman you are from?"

"Huaxia civilization." Chen Mo said casually.

"Chinese civilization?"

Joe Gerry was puzzled. He had never heard of this civilization. It was certainly not a powerful civilization. But the universe is so big, there are hundreds of billions of civilizations, big and small, and he has never heard of it.

"Where are you going back? I will send you back and pay me."

Chen Mo did not talk to Joe Gregory. He didn't have to know his brain. Qiao Geli was chased and killed this time. He must have been counted and had trouble. He saved the other party this time because of money, if not for money, he would never provoke these unnecessary troubles.

Now Chen Mo only wants to take the reward and add antimatter energy to leave the Shigan Galaxy.

"In this position."

Jogri pointed to a position where the image of the main star of Shigan was off-angle.

On the road, Jogri was very enthusiastic about Chen Mo and Jing Ge. Both of them spoke intentionally or unintentionally to Chen Mo's origins. What kind of civilization belonged to him? Unfortunately, Chen Mo looked very thorough and only took a long time to take care of him. As for Jing Ge, I directly ignored Ogley and I was too lazy to take care of him.

Later, Joe Greg slowly gave up temptation.

For three hours, the spacecraft landed in a berth of tens of kilometers of spacecraft, which was managed by the civilization of the professionally operated spaceship port, without worrying about the safety and civilization of the spacecraft.

Originally, the main star's review of the unknown spacecraft will be relatively strict, but the identity of the Greengrass prince of Georgy is also considered to be a small identity, and the ship of Chen Mo is successfully landed in the main star of the Shigan Galaxy.

The Green Wo civilization is only an ordinary ‘luxury’ in the Shigan galaxies, which can be seen from the territory of the main star of Shigan. In the territory of the main star, there are only a few large areas of ordinary planet land.

The king of the Green Wo civilization is also the father of Georgy, Green Wo. Rum, like a giant dragonfly, or green skin. There are many wrinkles, more than three meters in shape, big belly, and the belly is covered by clothes. Chen Mo is not. Make sure the belly is white.

Rum comforted Jorge and determined that he was not injured, his nervous look was slightly loose, and he eventually became reprimanded. And Georgly stood up and did not dare to refute Rum's reprimand. As for what he thought, no one knew.

Jorge is not stupid, naturally knowing that this time he was ambushed, it is certainly not an ordinary robbery.

After a long time, Rum reprimanded and looked at Chen Mo and Jing Ge. In fact, just after he came out, he looked at Chen Mo and Jing Ge in secret. Even when he scolded Georg, he was secretly observing, but from the beginning to the end, neither of them showed any action. The appearance of oneself.

"Children like to play, do not listen to discipline, this distress, the loss of the two husbands, Lum grateful."

"You're welcome." Chen Mo said.

"I don't know how the two gentlemen call it?"

"Chen Mo, Jing Ge."

“Hey?” Rum was also told by Chen Mo’s succinct self-introduction, but he immediately returned to God: “I don’t know where the two came from? Where are you going?”

"The universe is taking risks." Chen Mo is still not salty or not.

Rum took a deep look at Chen Mo and Jing Ge, indicating that the two had a little rest, and took Joe Greg to the side of the house.

"Talk to me about how they can save you."

"I promised to pay their billions of dollars, and they will save me." Jogri said it.

"Well, one billion is a small thing." Rum thought about it: "You talk to me about the process."

"My father thought that this time I was in danger and related to them?" Joe Greg found that his father's tone was wrong. He was not a fool or a hesitation.

"It's just possible. After all, their origins are unknown, and they happen to be near you." Rum did not say it, but the meaning was obvious.

Joe Greg carefully recalled the process at the time.

"My spaceship was attacked by ambush, then I escaped the spaceship, they came to chase me. Their spaceship suddenly appeared not far away, I flew over to them. The one who saved me was Chen Mo, he wore The armor is very strong, he is also very strong, chasing my seven armored divisions, can not stop a round in his hands, all killed, and all is a fatal."

"See what life is the corpses?"

"Hey?" Joe Greg squinted and shook his head. "At the time, I forgot to see that the bodies were all in space. The Chen Mo seemed to take down the core of antimatter energy, and he ignored the bodies. Father, then we still have to Give them a reward?"

"Give, of course, give it." Rum thought about it: "The rewards, I will handle it."

"Ok."

Joe Greg nodded and ‘good-go’ followed Rum out of the room.

In the palace of the Green Wo civilization, Chen Mo and Jing Ge were as cold as ever, seeing Rum and Jorge coming out, and their eyes were not lifted, but they were still calm.

"Two, in order to thank you for saving my son, I decided to give you the brand of our civilized Star Wars. It is estimated by the authority to be 1.1 billion stars. My son promised that your reward is one billion stars. The extra one is given by my father."

"Father, this..."

When Joe Gerry just wanted to talk, he was stopped by Rum.

"It is so decided. This is the electronic version of the ownership of the Star Wars Company. The agreement is notarized by the Cosmic Alliance Planetary Arbitration Court. It is true and effective." Rum put a holographic projection electronic agreement in front of Chen Mo: "As long as you sign, The electronic agreement will be updated in real time to the arbitral tribunal's database and will take effect immediately, without fear of being cheated."

Chen Mo took a look at Rum and his eyes locked on the company's ownership.

Obviously, the other party is not willing to pay him cash, but he has nothing to say, because Jogri has never promised to give him cash, now give him a company, and a company with a valuation of more than one billion.

He just started this business. The so-called valuations are all virtual. The company's debt and revenue are the key.

Operating well, it is worth one billion, the business is not good, this can be a debt of one billion.

Chen Mo took a glance at the financial situation of ownership. The company has a fixed profit every year, but most of its profits come from so-called subsidies, and the product revenue is very poor. If these subsidies are reduced, the company is in a loss state.

When Chen Mo took over, it is estimated that this part of the subsidy will disappear.

“How?” Rum waited for Chen Mo’s answer: “I will give 50 million stars in cash to two, which is my special thanks.”

Chen Mo slowly picked up the pen, signed his name under the electronic version of the company ownership agreement, and entered the face information to confirm.
