The universe of the universe covers the civilization of the entire universe. There are countless lives. The information between many civilizations is not circulated. Therefore, the identification of the universe is confirmed by facial recognition, regardless of which civilization you belong to.

Taking down the ownership of the new Star Wars company, Chen Mo refused the invitation of Lum’s dinner and left the Green Wo King Palace.

He can see that Rum is prepared for him, has his own small abacus, and he does not like the atmosphere here.

chapters.title: Chapter 810: : Tyrant And Killer
chapters.body:
Chapter 810: : Tyrant And Killer

The Shigan Galaxy is named after the main star of life. Shijiaxing is a big planet. However, compared with the artificial planet of the horror scale of the original city, Shi Ganxing is not outstanding, but it is also a medium-star star.

The Green Wo civilization is just a green civilization.

The green civilization is the basic condition for the survival of Shi Ganxing. Because the lower red orange and yellow life, whether carbon-based life or nitrogen-based life, can not get rid of the specific atmospheric needs and constraints, and can only survive on the planets attached to these civilizations. On the territory.

On the stone star, there are still various high-rise buildings, different buildings, with a strong alien civilization. Even the company's advertising models in the city are all aliens with different shapes.

In the era of the melting pot of the universe, the aesthetic problem is not only based on the beauty and ugliness defined by the human beings of the earth. In terms of aesthetics, this is the greatest gain after Chen Mo entered the Universe Alliance.

I don't know if the Earth has been in contact with aliens. What are the parents and Xiaoyu now?

Thinking of the earth, Chen Mo has some emotions and some eagerness. He wants to go back to Earth quickly, but I am afraid I will delay it for a while.

More than 10 billion light-year distance jumps, anti-material energy costs, need 1.7 billion stars, Chen Mo needs to be here, earn enough 1.7 billion stars, supplement anti-material energy, in order to start.

"This is the New Star Building."

A Green Wo civilization led them to a green building.

The building is located in a remote corner of Shijiaxing's concentrated armor market. It has 2,000 square meters. It is the smallest in the armor market.

Chen Mo probably estimated that there is a small repair shop in a remote location in the car repair market.

The building is 20 meters high, and in an alien city complex that is generally hundreds of meters high, it looks like a small bungalow on the bustling streets of the Earth. However, the appearance of the building is not dilapidated.

In this civilized and developed universe, the value of architecture and land is not high. Just a little nano-robot can start a tall building.

Chen Mo does not expect the company to earn money for him. The valuation is virtual, but at least it is a foothold, and Rum will transfer the 50 million into the account of the new Star Wars company. He needs to come here to raise the money. come out.

Fifty million stars, enough for him to use in Shi Gangxing as an emergency and daily use.

No matter which civilization, wealth is hard currency.

As a temporary destination, Chen Mo can use this as a starting point to earn enough to talk about the anti-matter energy costs of space jumping. As for the means of making money, even if the new star company is not doing well, Chen Mo can also resurrect it. There are a number of physical and chemical methods in his hands. He is not afraid of going to the corner of the universe.

In the end, Chen Mo is also the first to truly contact the civilized system of the Alliance.

The first time he entered the cosmic alliance civilization, he entered the subordinate experimental planet Qing Shuixing under the restriction of the three-eye civilization. Later he escaped and entered the wild universe without civilization.

Nowadays, from the small universe, he really touches the system of cosmic civilization that is not captive and controlled.

If it weren’t for Joe Gurry, Chen Mo would like to take Jinge directly to grab a ‘gas station’ and rob enough of antimatter energy to jump away from the spacecraft.

But as a smart life, Chen Mo still chooses to use civilized means to obtain.

Now is the first step in his contact with the cosmic alliance system. In the future, returning to the earth, the earth civilization will also be in line with the universe civilization. It is necessary for Chen Mo to carefully understand some things in the universe alliance system in advance.

屎 Green building.

When Chen Mo stepped into the building, he found out what was going on.

It’s a good thing to say, it’s a company, and it’s not good to hear it. It’s a warship repair shop, and it’s still a group of idlers.

Entering the gate, Chen Mo saw at first sight that he was sitting in the middle of the hall, several employees who were betting on the gambling, a few playing cards, several employees playing games, and several people listening to music and snacking.

Nineteen are aliens with different expressions, but they can feel from their emotions. At this time, a group of people are playing very happy, and the snacks around them are scattered and tangled.

No wonder it is maintained by subsidies, raising a group of idlers.

Needless to guess, Chen Mo knows that these employees are all related households, and they are still related to the Green Wo Civilization. The relationship is not so heavy, so Rum will give him this company, a mess. The so-called remuneration is estimated to be only tens of millions of dollars in the account.

"Sir, hello, are you here to customize the armor?" A male alien at the front desk saw Chen Mo and Jing Ge come in and rushed to meet.

"Do you think that this company's customized armor, I will use it with confidence?"

Chen Mo pointed to a group of people who were just gathering together and said that they were faint.

"This..." The staff who greeted him was a bit embarrassed: "Sir, I believe we can meet your requirements."

Chen Moduo looked at the male staff, a two-meter-high alien with a pair of small horns and pointed ears, but the five senses are human facial features, and the eyes are twice as large as humans. Strong and mature, it looks honest and honest.

"What is your name?" Chen Mo asked.

"Sir, my name is Niu Mu, sir, please believe that we can customize the armor for you according to your requirements." Niu Mu does not forget to sell products.

"What position are you in the company?"

"manager."

“The manager is a salesman? The employee is playing cards? This is quite unusual.”

Chen Modun was happy. The first time I saw such a wonderful company, I thought that the company was only a small relationship, and the result was all related households and idlers. Chen Mo is skeptical about how the valuation of 1.1 billion stars came.

"Call the company's employees, I am the new boss." Chen Mo pressed the wristwatch and transferred the company ownership agreement to Niumu to see: "By the way, the company's business table, as well as the company's The accounts are taken over."

"Uh?"

A sneak peek, after seeing the agreement, a great earthquake.

The new boss is here.

I didn’t even think of it, and Niu Mu turned and greeted several people who gathered together for entertainment.

"The new boss is here."

When he finished, he ran to the room and held two documents to Chen Mo. He turned to the workshop and called two employees out. The three employees stood in front of Chen Mo and Jing Ge, and the dozens behind were still playing cards, no one took care of him.

Chen Mo did not pay attention to the people who did not come, looked at the company's accounts and business charts. After a long time, Chen Mo looked up and saw that the group was still playing cards and stepped over.

The armor has been put on.

Niumu and others have a bad feeling, but they dare not move. They feel that this new boss is not good at it.

"It's fun? Everyone?"

"Who are you?"

Chen Mo inserted a sentence, the staff of the board just looked back at Chen Mo and ignored it.

"Don't bother us to play."

"I am your new boss, come to a welcoming ceremony." Chen Mo directly launched the atmospheric shock wave.

boom! !

A loud bang screamed in the room.

This scene, the shock of the three people in the heart of the cattle, saw the employees on the ground rolling their ears, secretly glad, but also some of the means of Chen Mo is not calm.

This strong means, they saw it for the first time.

Two minutes later, the 22 employees of the Star Wars Company, all gathered together, and 12 employees endured the wolf with their ears, and looked extremely angry.

"Who are you? Do you know who I am?"

"Do you know who we are?"

"..."

Chen Mo silently looked at these screaming aliens. Sure enough, the weakness of the wisdom of life, no matter where in the universe, some evil faces are the same.

"I am your new boss. This company will be owned by me in the future." Chen Mo projected the electronic agreement.

All of a sudden, the scene was quiet, and a dozen people were stunned for a few seconds.

"Who are you, isn't the company a royal family? Why do you have an agreement in your hand, what are you?"

"I am the relative of the friend of the son of the aunt of the royal princess, who are you?"

"Is that thing fake? How come it is yours."

Ah! ! !

Hey! ! !

With three screams and crashes, the noisy scene came to an abrupt end. The remaining dozens of people swallowed and watched the three people like a dead dog outside the company's gate.

Do you have a word?

Their eyes fell on Jinge, who was next to Chen Mo. Just now they didn't even see Jing Ge's movements, and there was no mood swing, more like a ruthless executioner.

"They are too noisy." Jing Ge said coldly, and he sat on a plate and gave food to the little beast. The cold eyes made the people on the field subconsciously shrink their heads and no longer dare to scream.

Chen Mo continued to speak: "Now I officially took over the company, cattle wood, winter and winter, Kariz three left, others packed up and went."

"Why do you fire us? I am..."

"Yeah, why?"

"..."

Ah! !

Two screams rang again, and there were two more dead dogs on the ground outside the company's gate.

This time it was Chen Mo.

"It's still a little more straightforward." Chen Mo moved his fist and turned his eyes to other people: "Either stand up and go out, or fly out and choose."

Chen Mo’s voice was dull, but he kept everyone in the air. There are examples, they don't think Chen Mo is joking.

"Walking away, nothing great, I don't want to stay."

"Yes, no, we will close sooner or later."

"That is, a broken company."

Seeing that Chen Mo also used violence directly, everyone else changed his mind and hurried back to work, leaving with his personal computer and snacks.

At the end of the game, only the cow wood, winter and Kariz were left.

The three did not dare to move, for fear of provoking Chen Mo as a ‘tyrant’. From the beginning to the present, three hands-on, quick and accurate, no nonsense, all the households were cleaned up.

They even think that Chen Mo is not afraid of offending people?

Unfortunately, their thoughts are redundant. If necessary, Chen Mo is not afraid to offend Rum.

"You three can choose, leave, I will give you double the salary, leave, I will subsidize the three-month salary for you to leave." Chen Mo said.

He just saw the business table, only three people are doing things, and the business of others is blank. In this kind of company, you can get business, and the ability is good.

When I heard this, the three could not believe my ears.

Is the ‘tyrant’ so good?

The three people hesitated when they heard Chen Mo’s conditions. Chen Mo’s ‘tyrant’ who gave them their first impression has already been fixed. If he works under Chen Mo’s hands and makes him dissatisfied, isn’t he guilty?

But with double pay, they go to other companies, but they don't necessarily have such a high salary.

The three faces face each other, and the final look falls on the cow wood.

Others can't manage the oxen, but the two usually follow the oxwood.

“Really?” Niumu questioned.

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded gently.

After looking at the quiet Chen Mo, and looking at the ‘killer’ next to the pet playing with the carving, Niu Mu finally gritted his teeth and nodded and decided to gamble. Winter and Kariz also nodded.

"Okay, let's do your thing."

"Boss, what are we going to do?" asked Niumu.

"What do you usually do, do it now, cancel the information of the employee who left, find the business of the company, and recruit if you have enough people. If you need anything, tell me that you are the manager."

Chen Mo dropped a sentence, and Jing Ge went upstairs, leaving the three people behind.

chapters.title: Chapter 811: : Planetary Safety Agency
chapters.body:
Chapter 811: : Planetary Safety Agency

The Lion's Civilization Palace, adjacent to the Green Wo Civilization, a lion with a crown listened to his reports and his fierce eyes turned. He is the king of the lion's civilization.

"Is Jorge not dead? Was the former armored division dead? And they also recruited two masters?"

These news surprised the Lion King.

This action, using an important traitor within the Green Wo civilization, did not expect to be escaped by Georg.

"Is there news from the two masters?" asked the Lion King.

"Yes, the King of Green Wo rewarded them with a billion-star star-winning company, in the Shijiaxing, where the armored market." The men finished and projected the photos of Chen Mo and Jing Ge.

"Are you sure they have been recruited?"

"This is a rumor from the Green Wo King Palace. The inside has been killed and it is impossible to determine the true and false." The man said: "And the Star Safety Bureau has begun to investigate the attempted murder of Jogri. We dare not go into contact with the evidence. ""

The Lion Head King knocked on his claws and finally shook his head: "Since the Planetary Security Agency is involved, this matter will not be taken care of. It has not happened."

The Planetary Safety Agency, as its name implies, is the team that maintains the safety of the planet. The Planetary Safety Agency is under the management of the Universe Alliance. It is to investigate large-scale inter-star crimes and cross-civilization crimes in the planet. They do not intervene in civilized internal crimes and contradictions, but only the rules of the Universe. The executor is a force that maintains the balance of the planetary civilization.

Although the Green Wo civilization is not big, but Georgi is also a civilized prince, and the assassination is not too small, so the Planetary Security Bureau intervened in the investigation.

In case they are found to be their hands, the Shih civilization will face the sanctions of the Universe Alliance, and by then they will be miserable.

......

Chen Mo went down from the top and checked the new Star Wars Company. This four-story, more than 20 meters high, covers an area of more than 2,000 square meters. Chen Mo's standard is not simple, and the required armor research machines are available.

He also checked the machine again, and several of the cutting-edge machines were still brand new and had not been used several times.

The number of times used is a few armor maintenance machines, and the number of design machines is limited, not to mention the machine that modifies the armor. When I first thought about the style of those employees, Chen Mo was not surprised.

Those employees are not expected to use cutting-edge machines.

Valuation of one billion stars, mainly the valuation of the two thousand square meters of the armor company and the company's machinery and equipment, in addition, Chen Mo can not think of other values. Chen Mo simply understood that these land and equipment packaged and sold, can only sell a maximum of 400 million, 1.1 billion valuation, more than half of the water.

No wonder Rum will be so bold, with a valuation of 1.1 billion, and an additional 50 million stars.

The cow wood warfare entered the top floor where Chen Mo was located. Chen Mo, the new boss’s means of violence, has not adapted yet. The kind of shock wave that just happened, and the scene where five employees were kicked off, are vividly in sight.

He, Dongdong and Kariz have already given Chen Mo and Jing Ge a nickname, tyrant and killer. Starting with their first impressions, these two words describe the best.

He didn't know whether the decision he made was good or bad, but he was doubled in salary, and Chen Mo couldn't understand the style of the locusts, so he finally decided to stay.

There are still three people in the company, and it is already a big one.

Niu Mu stood in front of Chen Mo, as strong and generous as a cow, and he was as good as a cat in front of Chen Mo: "Boss."

Chen Mo stopped to look at the equipment and looked at the cattle: "Well, what?"

"According to the normal operation of the original company, we need 50 employees." Niumu hesitated and said: "There are only three people in the company, and the business can't do it."

"Fifty people?"

"Yes, there used to be more than 50 employees. Later, it was acquired by Green Wo, and some unrelated relationship households came in. The original employees couldn’t stand the anger, and they went on. The old employees only left. I, Dongdong and Kariz are the newly graduated students of the college. They have no business, but they are unable to maintain the company's operations. However, Luhe official gave us some subsidies, which is almost a pension for the group."

“What business did the company do before?”

"Battle armor design, armor modification and armor maintenance." Niumu said: "Winter winter is the design of the armor design, Kariz will be modified and repaired, but not proficient, usually I am responsible for pulling the business. The company With the three of us maintaining only a little business, now we have not received a single business for ten days, and the company has long been revoked by the group."

When Niumu remembered the group of non-working households, he was resentful.

"First recruit 20 people, business, go find some training bases, we help them design and manufacture the basic training armor, as well as the college's basic training armor group purchase."

"But this kind of business, our company does not have that kind of manufacturing ability." Niumu said.

"I have a way, you can get an order."

"it is good."

Although Niumu is not clear about Chen Mo’s method, Chen Mo can get the ownership of this company from the Green Wo royal family, and he certainly has his ability.

Going around is the old line, playing armor and technology, earning small money, Chen Mo shook his head and smiled. Now I have to make a space jump ‘oil money’ to go home, and to travel the universe is to have rich people to play.

“It’s ugly to change the company’s decoration first.”

From the beginning of seeing the company's building, Chen Mo was disgusted. The interior of the building is ok, the white simple style is not bad, but the green decoration of the exterior wall of the building can't be accepted by Chen Mo's aesthetic. This is the architectural style of the Green Wo civilization, one by one.

Chen Mo took out a small bottle of finger size and shook it. The gray powder contained inside was a nano robot.

Nanobots are common in the Universe Alliance, which is the best technology in infrastructure and the fastest.

However, the Universe Alliance has limited limits on the survival time and number of copies of nano-robots, in order to prevent the nano-robots from replicating infinitely. Once there is a disaster or loss due to nanobots, users are punished.

When the nano-robot disaster was used on a large scale in the early days of the universe, there have been many occurrences, and even some of the planets have been eroded by nano-robots to their extinction.

However, there are many ways to deal with nano-robots. The most effective and most direct is the electromagnetic pulse bomb.

Unprotected nano-robots can be destroyed in scope under electromagnetic pulses. For advanced civilizations, nano-robots have no threat at all, and the practicality of such things makes countless lives, almost home travel. Essential items.

Putting the outer wall structure of the new Star Wars Company building into the light brain, Chen Mo opened the nano robot in his hand and fell on the outer wall of the new Star Wars company building.

The nano-robot has a drone limit control, along the wall root, the green exterior paint is corroded and disappeared at a visible speed, like a hoarfrost eroding the grassland, replaced by a silver-white exterior wall.

The nano-robot spread along the outer wall of the building. In less than twenty minutes, the outer wall of the building became silver-white. There is a big logo on the wall. It is a symbol of the marching ant group, but the name has not changed. New Star Wars Company.

In the huge city with high buildings, this tall silver-white building is also a small white pearl in the stone forest.

Soon after the building was just remodeled, Jing Ge was wearing a battle armor.

"somebody is coming."

Chen Mo also found out that the radar of the armor showed that five people wearing armor appeared hovering outside the building, looking at the sign, should be a formal organization or a group.

"Go out and have a look." Chen Mo put on the "free black ants" and said faintly.

chapters.title: Chapter 812: : Dangerous Feeling
chapters.body:
Chapter 812: : Dangerous Feeling

The five armored divisions were suspended outside the building. The types and sizes of the armor were different, but the paintings were the same, and there was a logo on the chest.

Also wrote the general text of the Universe Alliance.

Planetary Security Agency.

The armored helmet faded, revealing five different faces.

Headed by the blue-skinned humanoid, the ears are sharp, the hair is golden red, and the bloodshot eyes are looking around. The other four, two beasts, two humanoids, and skin shapes are also different.

"Is it the building? Is it not green? How to turn it into silver, it looks pretty good." An San compares the information, the shape of the building remains the same, but the color changes, the green is gone, only Silver white, looks a lot of pleasing to the eye.

"This is the building, the new Star Wars company has not changed." A member next to him said: "The Star Wars Company is the asset of the Green Wo Civilization, and the Green Wo Civilization Royal Family confirmed that this is the reward they gave each other."

"Let's go in."

Ansan took the lead and landed at the door of the company's first floor, while Chen Mo and Jing Ge came out from the inside.

"Several people, is there anything?" Chen Mo faintly opened.

An San looked at the information, it was Chen Mo and Jing Ge they were looking for, but his eyes stayed on the armor of Chen Mo and Jing Ge.

Dangerous feeling.

With his years of experience in dealing with Star Trekers and various interstellar criminals, he felt a deep sense of threat from both of them.

This shows that the strength of the two is certainly not weak.

"I am the captain of the Planetary Safety Agency, An San. This is my ID card. I want to ask you some words." An San released an electronic ID card to show his intention.

"Star Safety Agency?"

Chen Moyi, a handful of checks, determined the functions of the Planetary Security Agency, the Earth's Interpol, belonging to the Universe Alliance.

"The inside said."

Chen Mo and Jing Ge turned into the house.

Ann San was a little surprised. He served as the captain of the Planetary Security Agency. Many people have heard of the Planetary Safety Agency. It is always unnatural to have ghosts and ghosts. But Chen Mo and Jing Ge were too calm and felt that they were not taken seriously at all. In this case, he was the first time to see him.

Chen Mo let Niumu pour a little drink to An San and others, sitting calmly on the sofa.

"If you have any questions, just ask."

"It's about the attempted murder of Jogley, you talk about the process." An San straight into the subject, looking directly at Chen Mo's eyes, seems to see through Chen Mo's heart.

Unfortunately, Chen Mo just glanced at him at random and didn't take it seriously.

"This is recorded by my spacecraft, from his call for help to the return of the Green Wo royal family."

Chen Mo handed a chip to An San.

"To sum up in one sentence is that my spacecraft space jump just happened there. He asked us for help and promised to pay. I shot him to save him and send him back. As for the details, the video record is clearer than I said."

Candid.

When An San and Chen Mo’s eyes touched him, he did not see any fluctuations from Chen’s eyes, nor did he have any hurriedness or fear. He did not seem to be afraid of their inquiries.

"Which civilization did you come from, what did Shiganxing do?"

"We come from the Chinese civilization, the expedition of the universe, the anti-matter exhaustion of the spacecraft, to the Shigan galaxy to supplement, and rest by the way." Chen Mo did not hesitate to say.

"Huaxia Civilization? There are a total of 900 billion civilizations recorded in the universe. There are 8.7 billion smart life planets, many of which are called Huaxia civilization. Where is your position?" An San will approximate the universe map. The Ministry released it and let Chen Mo point to where it is.

"Where is my hometown, is this related to the case you investigated?" Chen Mo calmly asked.

"There is no relationship, it is up to us to judge, not you."

A member of the dog head who came along with An San, his mouth was obviously uncomfortable.

"Hey? Your attitude seems to be against us?" Chen Mo glanced at the member who spoke. He could feel that it meant investigating him.

As soon as this was said, the atmosphere of the scene began to be **** for tat.

Each other can feel the alert from the other side, two to five, Chen Mo and Jing Ge's momentum still does not fall, a calm, a cold, five people look at it.

At this time, both sides know that as long as there is a wrong action, it means the real hands.

The atmosphere has reached the edge of the explosion.

An San felt extremely heavy pressure. He noticed the details that other players did not pay attention to. The moment the atmosphere confronted him, he saw the two tiny movements of Chen Mo and Jing Ge.

The footsteps are slightly moved and the body leans forward.

At that moment, he could feel the tremendous pressure from the two men. He even had the feeling that as long as there was a bright weapon action, the five of them would die here before they showed their weapons.

These two men are terrible warriors.

They far underestimated the strength of these two people.

He suddenly remembered the confession of the Green Wo royal family. Chen Mo killed seven chasers in a short time and finally saved Joe Gregory.

"Don't misunderstand, two." An San said, breaking the atmosphere of confrontation: "Just wondering how far you travel in the universe. In fact, I also think about traveling in the universe once."

Chen Mo looked at him and did not answer.

The tit-for-tat atmosphere was broken, and the pressures of the Ansan and the Five were flushed, like the worms that broke free. Just now, not only An San, but the other four people felt the deep pressure from Chen Mo. The players who had just talked with Chen Mo, the look and feel were uncertain.

"The two said that they are to supplement anti-material energy, and by the way, do not know when to leave?" An San seems to have nothing to do, and asks.

"If you are willing to fund our replenishment of anti-material energy, we can leave now."

"Oh... Mr. jokes, do you have a personal space curvature ship, and will you care about adding anti-material energy?"

An San did not tell lies. Chen Mo said that this is like saying that a luxury car can travel around the world, but there is no money to refuel. It’s just that he didn’t know that Chen Mogang had come out of the small universe and really had no money, and the spacecraft was made by himself.

"I said that there is really no money. Do you think that my spaceship is robbed?"

"..."

An San realized that the change between Chen Mo's language was not so polite now. But he didn't say much, the matter was that they first picked it up, and he is not good at blaming the players now.

"The two are really joking. I am here today. Thank you for your cooperation. If you have any information in the future, you can contact me."

Regardless of whether Chen Mo needs it or not, An San wrote his own communication device number on the table, picked up the chip that Chen Mo gave them, and left with four players.

When leaving the New Star Wars Company, the five felt a lot easier around. On the way, An San was thinking about the process of contact with Chen Mo.

"Captain, when I was confronted, I felt a lot of pressure. There was a sense of crisis that was stabbed in the back and could die at any time." A team member still had some embers.

"I have it too." Ann said without hesitation: "The two are masters."

"They don't look like senior life, why give us such a big crisis?"

"Life is not a profiling, color life classification, but a general distinction, not completely accurate, even the life of the same color, there are three or six. Et al. In the god-level civilization, the life of the endless sea civilization, the blood is transparent, They are still in the color system, they are still protoss."

"Call, captain, look at this image."

Among the five, the only female person suddenly exclaimed in the armor team channel and shared an image into the team channel.

It is the video of Chen Mo killing seven chasers in space.

Seeing the murder of the image in the image, An San was secretly glad that the two sides had not fallen out, otherwise they were really dangerous. The danger was just true.

Master, they feel right.

If you encounter this situation, can you kill seven murderers in such a short period of time, or can you not be killed by the murderers during this time?

When watching the video, they didn't consciously put themselves into Chen Mo's position. It was terrible to think about it.

"In the future, when you talk to the witch, don't rush, you are easy to offend people. Even if we are the Planetary Safety Agency, we can't just offend people. The universe is stronger than ours."

"Know, Captain."

The dog-headed player who had just talked with Chen Mo hurriedly promised that he had clearly felt a sense of crisis just now, so he did not dare to talk in the back. Now, after seeing this image, he has a lingering fear.

"What do we do now? Can you check them?"

"Do not check first, the other party is very polite, but it was stimulated by Le Wu. Their armor is very advanced, there is a personal space curvature spaceship, and it is a master, like a high-level civilization, high-level civilization disdain means And conspiracy to deal with the Green Wo civilization."

After listening to Joegri's call for help, Ansan ruled out the investigation of Chen Mo's thoughts. Chen Mo did not agree, and then he heard the money and promised it. It should be paid for the reward.

Their planet seems to have come to two monks.

chapters.title: Chapter 813: : 白姳
chapters.body:
Chapter 813: : 白姳

When An San and others left, Chen Mo began to make armor.

Chen Mo has to have money to be able to afford it. It takes 1.7 billion yuan to supplement antimatter energy. This is not a small amount, but it is not big. It is not difficult to use Chen Mo’s mastery of technology and profitability.

It only takes the Warcraft business to make it easy to earn this money.

There is no need for a strong armor here. The green-level armor is a good armor, and the blue-level armor is the top armor. Chen Mo saw the price of Shijiaxing's various armor. The price of the armor ranged from several million to hundreds of millions. See the technical content and strength of the armor.

The green armor is a very simple armor for Chen Mo.

This level of armor is stronger than his nano-armor in the earth, mainly due to material upgrades, and a simple energy shield installed to withstand the not too high laser pulse attack.

The armor user is the most troublesome.

Many armor companies accept the custom of armor, mainly because there are too many alien civilizations, there are humanoids, orcs, sea-like, zerg, different life, and different shapes. Mutant life, designing a kind of armor does not satisfy all life races and individuals.

Chen Mo chose the armor of the Shiganxing population and the armor of the Orc life to design.

Two sets of armor.

A set of humanoid armor, a set of Orc armor.

The type of armor is very simple, it is a simple shape, there are no other bells and whistles. Chen Mo is a warrior designed according to the uniform data type of Shi Ganxing. When the armor is worn, it will be adjusted according to the specific physical data of the armored division. Battle armor, the helmet part can be deformed.

This kind of adaptation armor has to sacrifice some space and performance, so there are certain limitations in terms of weapons and functions. Masters do not need to adapt the armor, they are generally tailored to their own style and needs.

According to the classification of the Universe Alliance, the two armor belong to the green armor. The basic condition of the Green Armor is that the power meets the speed of the first universe, and the first cosmic speed set by the Cosmic Alliance is about 6 kilometers per second.

"Niumu, where can I sell the armor quickly?" Chen Mo called the cow wood.

"Hey? Boss, is this the armor you designed?" Niumu looked at the two sets of armor, and the bulls eyed the old round.

"Well, practice your hands." Chen Mo said.

"Do you still practice?"

Niumu does not know what to say.

Only a few days later, Chen Mo completed the manufacture of two sets of armor. He used to think that Chen Mo was just a powerful armored division, and he is still a powerful armor designer.

Warrior designers need strong professional skills, including the parameters, data, functions, mechanical design, power design, weapon design, and various professional software editing capabilities of the various components of the armor. It can be said that the designer of the armor is the most comprehensive talent, but not everyone can do it.

The company's winter and winter is just barely designing some low-end armor. Now, looking at the data parameters of Chen Mo's armor, it is a green-level armor, or a better green-level armor.

"Boss, if you want to sell the armor, there is a battle armor trading city not far from there."

Niumu transferred the map and pointed to one of the buildings.

The 452-story building is 3,560 meters high and belongs to the tallest building in the center of the armor. It resembles a pyramid and is only slimmer than the pyramid. Around the building, there are hundreds of buildings of almost the same level.

A warrior rises up the sky, crosses the forest, crosses the ocean, and goes straight into space, in the eyes of the cosmic star sea. Buy Tianxin Battle Armor and enjoy free life. The ad word and the battle logo appear, and the ad ends.

Then, a battle armor shuttles with the Zerg army, the bomb command, the Zerg die in pieces, the picture is a pair of ten masters fighting, the armor is still easy. Ten opponents were all killed, and the advertising words came late: sneak out of the enemy and win the battle. Star River Battle Armor, your path to the master.

"Do you want to be called a powerful armored division? Do you want to be a master of homage to the people? Sparks division training class, your ultimate choice."

"..."

Various armored advertisements bombed, occupying the sky above the armor trading city. In addition, there are various cool holographic video ads.

Numerous suspension transport vehicles, flying skateboards, flying motorcycles, and armor are constantly flowing in the air.

Shiganxing Battle Armor Trading City is next to the Warship Maintenance Area. This is the most prosperous location of Shiganxing. Shi Ganxing is the life star of the Shigan Galaxy. It has 300 billion lives and has a developed culture. The demand for the battle armor can be imagined.

Chen Mo flew in the air wearing a battle armor, and could see the armor and aircraft that were constantly landing on the various high-rise platforms of the building.

The battlefield trading area of Qingshuixing is a heaven and a ground compared to here. This is the most prosperous alien city Chen Mo has ever seen. This kind of prosperity is only in the middle and lower level of the universe. The prosperity of the top cities in the advanced civilization of the universe can be imagined.

In accordance with the guidelines of Niumu, Chen Mo landed on the platform of the 241th floor of the highest building of the Warrior Trading City, carrying two sets of armor boxes and entering the floor.

The 200-300 storey building is a free-selling shop for green-level armor. It can rent temporary cabinets to sell its own armor, and the pavement rent is 5,000 stars a day, without dividing the percentage.

Chen Mo entered the building, and both sides were transparent armored cabinets, and various styles of armor.

All kinds of aliens are looking at their own armor. If they find the favorite armor, they can pay the stars directly, unlock the cabinets, and get the armor.

These cabinets are temporarily rented and sold, many of which are used in second-hand armor, personal, armor studios or armor designed and manufactured by small companies without fixed pavements.

The cabinets with better flow of people have been rented out, and there are still some armor in line.

After visiting for a long time, Chen Mo chose a two empty cabinets with a relatively low position and low flow. After paying the rental fee, the two sets of armor were put on the cabinet, and the simple parameter data of the armor was transmitted into the cabinet with the hard disk. It is convenient for the purchaser to view the parameter data. Finally, click on the rental and sale agreement to determine the quality assurance and trouble-free agreement.

In terms of selling price, Chen Mo chose the average reasonable selling price of a green-level armor, 20 million stars.

Doing all this, Chen Mo is satisfied with leaving.

The unique universe civilization makes Chen Mo very interested.

The universe has experienced the era of war destruction of the 'dark forests' and finally entered the civilized era of the Universe Alliance under the joint supervision of the seven god-level civilizations.

Although large and small interstellar wars still exist, under the control of high civilization, it does not affect the big pattern of the Universe Alliance. Similar to the United Nations system of the Earth, it achieves a delicate balance under the game and competition of the seven god-level civilizations.

For centuries, the god-level civilization has subconsciously maintained this delicate balance of the cosmic system. The cosmic civilization has been able to develop and communicate relatively peacefully. Nowadays, a very unique system of rules of the universe and civilization has been formed.

The more contact and understanding, the more interested Chen Mo is in this system of cosmic civilization, which at least will not allow him to reject.

After a few laps in the building, Chen Mo appreciates the design style of all kinds of armor and learns the unique civilized habits here. For a long time, Chen Mocai went to the material market and bought some materials for making armor.

......

Bai Hao landed on the building platform and stepped into the Battle Armor Trade City.

Short hair, ear and ear leopard fur, not ugly, covered with leopard armor, a slender and flexible leopard tail, the five senses are classic people, eyes full of wildness. The life on the side of the road will sneak a glance at the white, a leopard woman.

This style is different from the humanoid and the orc, the half-orc.

The typical humanoids are only the facial features and limbs of the humanoid, the skin of the body is the skin, there is no hair; the animal family is the shape of the preserved animal, the hair and signs of the body change little, but the wisdom is different.

The Orc is the most successful life of the humanoid and the Orcs in the universe, retaining only the most classic features of the Orc, and possessing the human body shape and the strongest wisdom.

The reason why the Orcs are called the most successful combination of life is because of the white star civilization.

The white star civilization, one of the seven god-level civilizations, is the god-level civilization established by the half-orcs.

The half-orc also has a characteristic, the female half-orc body is extremely flexible, full of wildness, people want to conquer, the male half-orc inherits the strong body and speed of the orc, and the combat power is also very embarrassing.

Bai Hao ignored the gaze around him and walked around in the trading city.

This time with a mission to Shi Ganxing, the little nephew let a little gift back, she thought of bringing a warrior back to him. Although they are not lacking in armor, they are also a commemorative gift.

After a few months, Xiaozizi began to learn to fight armor. As a younger sister, she sent a set of armor to him as a gift, and it was a small toy.

Walking around the building, Bai Hao did not see any amazing armor.

Huh?

Bai Hao stopped in front of the two cabinets, and opened the data parameters of the two armor and the virtual demonstration video. It was the cabinet that Chen Mo had just consigned the armor.

"interesting."

The two armor models are not stunning, but the overall performance is very average, speed, weapon, strength are balanced, like the barrel has no special long and short board.

However, as a novice practice armor, the parameter balance is very important, and it is a self-adapting armor. She thinks that they organize the green training armor, but the design is no different.

Here is the middle-level literary star system, there is actually a good armor designer, which makes her somewhat surprised.

I didn't even think about it. Bai Hao paid 40 million directly and took both sets of armor.

chapters.title: Chapter 814: : Chen Mo'S Super Power
chapters.body:
Chapter 814: : Chen Mo'S Super Power

The small universe came to communicate.

Not long after Chen Mo returned to the New Star company, he received communication from the small universe. When the communication device was connected, the holographic projection of the extension and others was ejected.

"Sir, are you going back to your hometown now?" Tuo Li saw Chen Mo and Jing Ge, and looked very happy.

"Not yet." Chen Mo nodded.

Quantum entanglement is not disturbed by space and distance, so they can talk to the small universe.

"Mr. How far is your current position from your hometown?"

"Very far, there are more than 10 billion light years. Now the spacecraft's antimatter energy is exhausted, and it is staying on the planet to supplement antimatter energy." Chen Mo said.

"Sir, the fleet just arrived at a new life planet, where there is a sulfur-based life."

The extension began to introduce the situation inside the planet, and it is endless.

The Manshan people restored a complete education system, showing a strong talent, learning technology and knowledge quickly, and even Chen Mo was somewhat surprised. Coupled with the special ability of the savage mountain to have a 'combat consciousness', Chen Mo can almost certainly determine that the Manshan is a high-level life, but the harsh environment and incomplete knowledge system of the mountain star has curbed their growth.

"I followed the fleet to the planet, the planet is beautiful, but poisonous."

"What is your recent training score? Show me." Jing Ge, who has been quiet, suddenly opened his mouth and interrupted the excitement.

Tuo is very afraid of Jinge. He heard Jing Ge want his training results. The face that was just excited was immediately stunned. He did not dare to disobey Jing Ge and reluctantly released his training results.

"Regressed."

Jing Ge is only three words, so that Tuo is crying and mourning.

After the extension of the extension of the mountain and the raft, the look is loose, Jinge and Chen Mo left, Tuoshan to manage the affairs of the family, constrained the number of people who have been removed, and recently relaxed a lot, and now finally have personal management .

Even if Tuoshan did not say much, Jing Ge taught him to leave, he acquiesced.

Chen Mo and Jing Ge set a training standard for the Warring Academy of the Manshan. The extension was Chen Mo’s student. He used to learn Jingo and had higher natural standards.

When Jing Ge was in the process of personal training, the other students only had gloating, but they did not dare to follow the standard of extension. Some students tried it and described it as terror. I didn't expect Jinge to leave, and when I left it, I was discovered.

"The training doubled, and Teng Na overtook him." Jing Ge said coldly.

Yan and Teng Na were given to Chen Mo by Tuoshan. The two were naturally taught by Chen Mo to be managers and help him deal with some trivial matters. Now there is no small prestige in the family, like Chen Mo’s spokesperson.

Chen Mochao and Teng Na nodded: "The supervision is not good, I am fined you."

"Okay, sir." He and Teng Na Zheng focused on the head.

Seeing Chen Mo also promised, Tuo almost did not cry out, just contacted Chen Mo, too proud of it, now tragedy.

"The speed of small space development, according to your plans and steps, is developing planets, the people are slowly becoming stronger. Also, Momei No. 2 follows the technology you left behind, and research on super-capacity medicine has begun... ..."

He gave Chen Mo a report on the recent small universe, and everything went well. As long as there was enough time, they could control the entire small universe.

"Sir, do you want us to send soldiers out to help you."

"No need to."

Chen Mo refused.

"You develop a small universe according to plan. The space connector is not authorized by me and cannot be opened. You can't mess it out. If you find a small universe by high-level civilization, it will be very troublesome."

"Understood." He nodded and promised.

"When I get back to my hometown, I will build a space connector and connect the small universe. I don't have to worry about other issues until then. You should concentrate on developing the small universe first."

Knowing the specifics of the small universe, Chen Mo put away the communicator.

Jing Ge led Chen Mo into a training room, which is the training room for Jinge transformation.

training.

Training is already a normal state for both of them.

Since the identity of Chen Mo Technology Administrator has risen to the authority of [God], the development of the brain domain, his body has once again evolved, awakening a special ability.

When the special ability first appeared, Chen Mo was extremely surprised.

His magical understanding of life, at that moment, goes one step further.

Consciousness affects the state of existence of matter. That is the first time that Chen Mo has determined that at the macro level, consciousness affects the state of existence of matter.

In the past two years, Chen Mo has learned a lot about his ability. The special ability of his awakening is related to consciousness and the ability to read. The power of reading is the expression of willpower.

Control objects.

This is Chen Mo's ability to determine himself.

Chen Mo has tested it many times and determined that he can control almost all inanimate active substances and energy visible to the naked eye.

Knowing this special ability, Chen Mo began to worry very much, for fear of being careless. This special ability caused a serious and irreversible serious consequence with him.

Therefore, Chen Mo sought the help of Jing Ge. Based on Jinge's experience in controlling ‘combat consciousness,’ he learned how to use his special ability to control and understand himself in the books on the super-capability record of the Science and Technology Library.

At the beginning, Jing Ge was amazed at the special ability of Chen Mo's awakening. After thorough understanding, Jing Ge only said a word to Chen Mo: very terrible ability.

After that, Jing Ge has been helping Chen Mo to practice super power control.

Putting 10 solid football **** of different sizes and different materials, Jing Ge will return to Chen Mo.

In the two years of development training, according to the definition given by Jing Ge, Chen Mo's current super power is in the first stage of the primary state.

Jing Ge divides the super power into three stages according to the growth experience of his own 'combat consciousness'. Each stage has three different states. Although Jinge's classification is still very vague, it does have a little prototype.

Jing Ge found in his ‘fighting consciousness’ ability of the Man and the ethnic minorities that this ability can continue to grow and develop. His own powerful ‘combat consciousness’ is grown in the danger of hunting in the mountains and forests.

And to a certain extent, the ability will change qualitatively and enter the second stage. Jing Ge’s sense of fighting changed qualitatively, making him the best fighter in the family, so he knew that special abilities would be staged.

Chen Mo's ability is very special. Even Jinge, a warrior who grew up on the edge of life and death, feels that Chen Mo's ability is terrible. As for the qualitative change, this ability will become stronger, and Jinge is not sure.

To use this special ability in combat, it is necessary to thoroughly understand the specificity of the ability, otherwise it will easily hurt yourself or even get out of control.

After two years of training and exploration, they still have a lot of gains.

Chen Mo has made rapid progress. With the development of their abilities, they have explored that Chen Mo’s own power will affect the strength of special abilities and will be affected by the distance, quality and speed of objects.

To determine this characteristic, they are specifically developed for Chen Mo's mind.

When he first acquired his ability, Chen Mo's subconscious mind could not control the kind of power to activate special abilities. Later, after groping and training, Chen Mo had been able to control his freedom to enter that state and thus freely control this special ability.

Chen Mo called the ability to activate the state, which is called the 'super' state.

"Start."

When Jinge’s words fell, Chen Mo raised his hand and entered the ‘super’ state. Raising your hand to help concentrate on your mind, now that he is in control of the power of mind, has not yet reached the point of being particularly proficient.

In the next moment, I saw the training room, and ten solid **** of different materials slowly floated.

"1.7 seconds."

When the solid ball floats, the stopwatch freezes, which reflects the time when Chen Mo entered the 'super' state.

The shorter the time, the better, which is good for the battle.

This time, it was 0.2 seconds faster than the last time. The more difficult it is to progress, the Jinge’s request is that Chen Mo can enter the state of ‘super’ in an instant.

"Fold according to this."

Jing Ge took out a carved wood carving, the shape of the black beast, and let Chen Mo wood carving to shape the shape of the solid ball. The shape of the woodcarving is very delicate, and each hair and detail is clear. It is a huge challenge to control the silence of ten different material objects.

I saw ten solid **** and started to lengthen slowly...

Two hours later, Chen Mozhen fell to the ground, his face pale, and he gasped.

He feels that the brain is as painful as acupuncture.

The training of this ability is very burdensome on the brain, and it is a huge temper for the body and the willpower.

On the ground is a broken piece of solid ball. At the last moment, Chen Mo’s limit is reached, consciousness is fluctuating, and almost the model is exploded.

"Come back." Jing Ge said lightly.

chapters.title: Chapter 815: : 80 Billion Light Years Outside The Search
chapters.body:
Chapter 815: : 80 Billion Light Years Outside The Search

Xiao Yu and Zhao Min used virtual reality technology to look at the planet in front of the robot through the perspective of the robot on the spacecraft. Even if human beings have imagination, it is difficult to understand the existence of such an incredible planet.

A large, unimaginable artificial planet, Dyson Ball, the origin city.

The closer to the origin city, the smaller the fisherman and Zhao Min.

It has been two years since the super-light speed spacecraft began to explore the universe. The marching ant group is developing the Milky Way, discovering many life planets and wars, but those lives are not the civilization they are looking for.

Two years ago, their spacecraft jumped out of the Rania Kea super galaxies to find an alien civilization.

The words of the alien civilization are the same as the words of the spacecraft that arrived at Earth.

I thought they had found the alien civilization that took Chen Mo, in order not to accidentally hurt Chen Mo, but also to find the location of Chen Mo, they did not attack the alien civilization.

After disguise, he grabbed an alien, used neuro-conscious translation, learned the language and words of aliens, and let the ink girl imitate the alien's shape, and created a large number of intelligent robots mixed into the alien star ball to investigate Chen Mo. Message.

However, soon after, they got a glimpse of the blue sky.

That is not the text of the alien civilization they found, but the universal text of the Universe Alliance, the entire universe, the trillions of planets, and countless lives.

They are still looking for a needle in a haystack.

The universe spans nearly 100 billion light years, with countless civilizations and countless lives. It is impossible for them to verify who is arresting Chen Mo. And when they were desperate, they got another good news.

The intelligent robot that sneaked into the civilization of the Universe Alliance bought news from an intelligence dealer. The ship that captured Chen Mo belonged to a planet called the origin city, and was the main star of the origin galaxies.

It is the planet in front of you.

For two years, they have been mixed into alien civilizations through intelligent robots, collecting a large amount of information about the Universe Alliance. Today, they have a general understanding of the form, history, and existing rules of the universe.

They speculated that Chen Mo was arrested and may be needed for advanced civilization research.

Because they collected the rules of the Universe Alliance, the rules stipulate that: StarCraft examiners can capture 100,000 newly discovered low-level intelligent life individuals for life science research.

In combination with the various behaviors of aliens in the past, they speculated that Chen Mo was arrested for research, like humans going to deep-sea investigations to capture the samples of the seabed.

If it is similar, Chen Mo should now be stocked in a similar experimental base of a civilization.

They chose to send a spaceship to the origin city, here is their last hope.

8 billion light years outside the search for husband.

In order not to expose human traces, their spacecraft uses the words and symbols of the Universe Alliance. But there is one thing that is the same, Logo, the logo of the marching ant group.

As long as Chen Mo sees this logo, he will know that they are looking for it.

The ‘purpose’ of coming to the origin city is to buy and sell armor.

After learning the rules of the Universe Alliance, they registered a war company in a cosmic league star, the name is called marching ants. There is a civilized legitimate identity, their spaceships are free to enter and exit the Cosmic League's literary star ball, and also add a layer of disguise to their identity.

Even the robots they make are the appearance models of alien humans, not modeled on human appearance.

They have just been exposed to the universe and everything must be careful.

"Let's land."

Xiaoyu gave the ink girl instructions, and the space curvature spacecraft quickly went to the port. An hour later, a light speed spacecraft departed from the port of mooring and entered the civilized area of the origin city.

......

Niumu handed the order materials and hard disk in his hand to Chen Mo, standing in the side and picking up his hands.

"Only I got an order for a small armor training base. They need 20 sets of training armor. Because our company is small, they don't trust it, so we have to take out the sample, they confirm the parameters and quality. A deposit will be paid. This is the data of several trainees they provide."

“Is there a price?”

"No, he said that he needs to look at the battle armor prototype and negotiate the price according to the sample."

Chen Mo took over the hard disk, opened the data with the light brain, and immediately modeled the composition. Ten minutes later, several sets of armor models were completed.

Next to the cattle wood, Kariz and winter and winter, until Chen Mo is still in a state of sluggishness.

When is the design of the armor so simple?

Chen Mo's armor design ability is terrible. The senior armor designers they have heard are not so easy, and they can complete several sets of armor design.

Is Chen Mo a senior armor designer?

"Just bought some engines and the armor can be assembled now. When you are done, you will show them to them."

Chen Mo enters the design data into the brain and lets the shop start printing the parts needed.

The armor design is very simple now, and it is not difficult to manufacture. Although their company is small, the intelligent machines for manufacturing and assembling the armor are all complete. As long as the design drawings and parts are complete, it is very simple.

Handing over the manufacture of the armor to Kariz, Chen Mo returned to the top floor.

"let's start."

Nantian pointed to the solid ball in the training room. The solid **** of red, orange, yellow, blue, purple, black and white, and ten colors were vivid on the table. Chen Mo raised his hand, ten solid **** floated up, quickly deformed in the air, and soon the outline of the black beast appeared roughly.

"0.97 seconds."

Nantian saw the actual number on the stopwatch. This is a big breakthrough. After the extreme squeeze, Chen Mo is now entering the ‘super’ state, breaking through 1 second.

This is Chen Mo's first breakthrough of 1 second into the 'super' state.

Chen Mo's progress speed, even Nantian was surprised, he has seen the fastest-moving warriors in the family, and Chen Mo is not so terrible. It seems that Chen Mo has an infinite potential, and no matter how much he has given Chen Mo a high-demand training program, he can meet his requirements to complete.

Not long after, ten different black animal models were formed at the same time. Each black beast had different looks, but they were all the same.

An incredible power.

Even Chen Mo is now amazed at this special ability, and also feels magical for life in the universe.

Nantian picked up the black beast model and looked over it again. The surface was smooth and smooth, and it was natural.

"On the practice."

Nantian’s armor appeared next to him and quickly wrapped him up.

His armor is in the small universe, Chen Mo tailored for him [the beast], completely black painted, cold texture, **** eyes like the beast's gaze, it is creepy.

This set of armor is made by Chen Mo using the most advanced technology he has mastered. In addition to his free black ants, [Beast] is Chen Mo's most proud work so far.

Nan Tian showed the armor, Chen Mo did not hesitate, put on the [free black ants], went out to the platform of the foreign side.

Jing Ge's application of combat consciousness is so terrible that every movement of his heart can't hurt Jing Ge. However, it is not without progress. In the past, it was only 10 minutes in Jinge's hands. Now it has been half an hour. This is a huge improvement.

In the battle, Chen Mo has been able to use his special power to create a lot of trouble for Jing Ge. When he played, he felt that the armor received the influence of Chen Mo and was everywhere. Just because the speed is too fast, and Chen Mo's use of the power is not mature enough, Chen Mo will be defeated.

If Chen Mo thoroughly develops the special ability to control, he can stand in an invincible position in battle.

"Exercise to control the high-speed moving objects." Jing Ge said coldly.

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded slightly.

Suddenly, Jing Ge felt a little and looked at the horizon in the distance.

chapters.title: Chapter 816: : Guild Wars
chapters.body:

A purple laser straddles the sky, sweeping the earth, and the long focal line seems to cut the earth.

The goal was to take research products from the lab that should not be taken.

If they complete this task, their rank will rise by one level, otherwise the consequences can be imagined, they have to face huge punishment, that is not everyone is willing to face.

"Block his way forward, his destination is the armor trading city, don't let him into the city." Seeing the radar map shows the city 100,000 kilometers away, Vijay's voice is much lower.

Boom! !

This tactical action is very difficult, and the triumph is very beautiful, even if Vijay did not expect it. He looked at him, his body swooping, sticking to his death, and the bullet in his hand aimed.

The fireball exploded around the Jue, and the fireball was scattered into a large pit with a diameter of 200 meters. The pit became a scorched earth.

A masterpiece of miniature anti-matter bullets, a few milligrams of antimatter, has the effect of destruction. Vijay can't take care of anything else, just want to kill the prince, otherwise he will have trouble himself.

The heat shield destroys the heat of anti-matter bullets. It only sees the small wooden boat in the stormy waves under the shock wave, but still does not stop, quickly penetrates the fireball and flies at the fastest speed.

Vijay squinted and opened the bullet at the other arm, sticking out a small-thick-sized bullet.

"Decelerate upwards and turn on the energy shield."

Remind the players behind, Vijay did not hesitate to fire bullets.

......

The top of a towering building, decorated in a luxurious room, this position, can look at Shijiaxing's armor trading city, and can see the armor and various aircraft passing outside the building.

There is an aerial platform next to the room, which is the platform that is landed by the armor. There is no need to pass the elevator, wear armor and aircraft, you can land in the platform to enter the room.

Drops...

The communication device suddenly sounded, sitting on the sofa and drinking a drink to see the scenery of the white 姳 retracted his eyes, seeing the name of the call, her elegant appearance disappeared, turned into a charming appearance.

"Uncle Egret."

What appears in the holographic display is a male life wearing a white battle suit. His body is awkward and looks like a middle-aged man. The 'Wang' word on the forehead is obvious. The armor is also a tiger pattern, and the tail is long. The tiger tail looks very domineering.

Seeing the white pheasant, the tiger-printed man smiled and looked a little bit smug: "White 姳, is it adapted to Shi Ganxing?"

"Fortunately, it is more lively than the main star, and the environment is just like this. But this time, I bought two sets of good green-level armor and went back to Xiaowen as a gift."

"That little place, and the armor into your eyes? Rare." The tiger man said in amazement.

"The main design is a short board that discards the material. Its design can be compared with the training armor design of our main star."

"Oh? The armor designer who can make you praise? Do you want to include each other in us?"

"Let him be wild, it is a little difficult to join us with low-level life, and a designer of the armor has little effect, no need to bother."

With a sweet smile on his lips, the body does not consciously lean forward, completely like a spoiled look, completely disregarding the loose collar, revealing the snow of temptation.

"Uncle, when are you coming over?"

"Soon, it won't be too long." The tiger-patterned man turned a blind eye to the temptation of the white-skinned inadvertently exposed: "Is there any movement in the magical flame civilization?"

"No, it's calm. I sent people to check. They didn't have big moves there, but their defenses were a bit tight. I didn't go deep in order not to expose them." Bai Yan shook his head and rubbed his chin with his hands: "How is the situation at home?" ”

"It's a bit nervous. After the endless sea civilization prepared for war, the situation changed. The lady asked for full preparation."

The tiger-faced man's expression became extremely serious. In a few short sentences, his solemnity was seen.

"This Shiganxing mission is very important. You must take the thing of the magic flame civilization. The things in their hands are very important. The lady said that it can be done without any means."

When I heard my wife, Bai Hao looked a little surprised and very respectful: "What about the Planetary Security Agency here?"

"Don't care about them, as long as they can get the information of the magic flame civilization project, even if the entire Shigan galaxies are destroyed, it does not matter." The tiger-printed man's voice is extremely firm, showing his determination, the planet's hundreds of billions of lives, for them It doesn't matter at all.

"You let me stare at the movements of the Magic Flame Civilization and Shi Ganxing, but the specific task content did not tell me, what should I do if I miss something?"

"Contacting you this time is to tell you the specific task content." The tiger-printed man sorted out his thoughts a little: "Mrs. got the news, a secret life research project by Magic Flame Civilization made a big breakthrough, is a super-capacity development technology. Super power Don't you explain it? This is one of the status symbols of God's life."

When I heard the super-power development technology, my eyes were round and unbelievable.

In addition to having a small universe as a habitat, the seven god-level civilizations also have an important identity symbol and unique super powers.

In the seven god-level civilizations of the Universe Alliance, each civilization has its own unique special abilities.

This special ability can only be found in the life of the god-level civilization. The life of the lower class will not exist. Its most obvious function is that the life with super power will be stronger and smarter than the life of the same level.

The god-level civilization can survive in the former cosmic war and establish the order of the cosmic alliance. It is because the life level of the god-level civilization is higher than other life, and it is smarter, so the technology develops very rapidly.

Superpower has always been one of the most mysterious forces in the universe. It gives life an incredible ability. Even if it is as strong as a god-level civilization, it cannot make a complete and reliable scientific explanation for the existence of superpower.

Even within the god-level civilization, not every life has super powers. Once awakened, it will be sent to the civilized master.

Numerous high-level civilizations in the universe have done various research on superpower and life evolution, including seven god-level civilizations, research on superpowers, and evolution of higher-level life levels.

Once this technology breaks through, it means that the advanced life in the universe has the potential to evolve into a god-level life. But countless civilizations have been researching for hundreds of millions of years and there has been no major breakthrough in reliability.

Whoever masters the super-power development technology, whoever is likely to become the next god-level life group, and whoever receives this technology in the god-level civilization means that the people's super powers awaken, the strength will far exceed the other six .

For any civilization, this technology has terrible value.

The white cockroaches couldn't help but excite, and the body was shaking and excited. On the loose clothes, the snowy temptation trembled with her trembling.

"The magic flame civilization seems to have a history of 130 million years. Why can they develop super-power development technology?"

Bai Hao did not feel that she was going to go away, and there was a doubt in her heart. She knew the history of the magical flame civilization. She had seen it before she came to Shijiaxing. The Magic Flame Civilization is a blue-level civilization. It can only be regarded as a middle-class civilization in the universe. Even the advanced is not counted.

There is no big breakthrough in the study of the god-level civilization, but the unremarkable civilization of the magic flame civilization has a breakthrough. If not the uncle said, Bai Hao will never believe.

"Technology is a thing that breaks through only one second, no breakthrough, and billions of years are just outside the door, sometimes just a gap in the small idea of inspiration."

The tiger man’s eyes are slightly scattered and no longer focus on the white scorpion. The figure of this girl has been long open, and it is estimated that it can attract a lot of the opposite sex. As a big brother, he should also avoid it. Think about how to avoid this gimmick in the future.

"Uncle..."

"Drips..."

Bai Hao wanted to continue, and the alert of the armor was interrupted by her. The white face changed slightly, and only jumped from the position in an instant, letting the armor automatically cover the body, seeing the body wrapped, the whole process did not exceed one second. Almost shortly after the two sides played against each other, Bai Hao realized what the other party was doing. Procrastinating her, the two rear armor divisions are looking for something.

What is the ability to develop technology?

Smoke interference, stealth, attack, V-fold fly, put up the energy shield, laser irradiation, a set of counter-attack tactics in one go, without a trace of muddy water, completed in a very short time, successfully strangled a warrior.

Such high-level tactical action made Vijay's body stiff, saw the slain players, and witnessed the splitting of the other side. The strength of the other side was beyond imagination, and it was no wonder that they dared to fight them eight people.

Is the other party a Planetary Security Agency? Is the Planet Security Agency so powerful? I underestimated the strength of the Planet Security Agency?

"Nawu, Sinan, have you found it?" Vijay's voice was gloomy.

"No."

Seeing that the radar showed more and more than two armored divisions, Vijay had a glimpse of his mind and made a determination. Now I don’t want to know that Jue is dead or alive. If they are dragged, they can’t escape today.

crazy.

The fire was exhausted. In the center of the explosion, a deep pit with a diameter of more than 20 kilometers was left. The surrounding 100 kilometers was turned into nothingness. The surrounding area was left with scorched earth. The mountain was plowed again, and a mountain was flattened.

chapters.title: Chapter 819: :Save? Not Saving?

If you are close to the road, you can catch it and catch it. If you can't catch it, you will completely obliterate it. At any cost. After returning, the reward is doubled." trouble!

When Chen Mo started the stealth mode plus the camouflage mode, Nawu saw that the weak armor signals that were hidden when the armored radar was on, all disappeared. The gaze under his armor instantly condensed and quickly converted to the optical radar mode.

For the first time, he encountered such a warrior. The stealth of the armor was beyond the imagination. He even avoided the detection of excessive radar. Even the optical radar can only capture a little difference, the opponent’s armor. Chameleon, camouflaged in the broken wall.

If it is not the target at the foot, he cannot determine the position of the opponent.

When he is unable to detect the other person's whereabouts in battle, he is quite blind to the blind, and the unknown threat can cause great psychological pressure. After drinking the repair liquid, Chen Mo began to wait, but he unloaded the other armor, lest the other side suddenly counterattack.

"Momo wipe ~~"

The little beast jumped to the armor of this unknown armored division, extended his fingertips to the position of the arm, and stared at Chen Mo.

"Is there something?"

Chen Mo came to interest.

At the beginning of the Qing Shuixing, but the little beast helped him to find a broken armor, he quickly escaped the control of the three-eyed civilization.

What makes the little beast interested, Chen Mo is very curious and what is the baby.

Use a short pulse laser to cut the parts of the armor arm, and at the dark, a finger-sized potion lies quietly on it. The container of the medicament is very special and is wrapped in a mechanical structure, but it is not a weapon, which is obviously very important.

Chen Mo is speculating that those people chasing him may be because of this potion. Seeing Chen Mo's pharmacy, the little beast was satisfied, jumped to his shoulder, and quietly groaned.

Jinge came back, carrying a box in his hand, making Chen Mo a bit strange.

Does this block others have boxes to send?

"what?"

"Snacks."

Jing Ge opened the box, a bag of various foods piled in the box, is a variety of packaged meat snacks. Seeing the snacks, the little beast immediately jumped over and grabbed a pack of skilled tears and sat on Jinge's shoulders to eat.

"Snacks? You actually buy snacks?" Chen Mo seems to find the New World as rare, a little incredible, always cold and ruthless Jinge, actually buy snacks.

"Potato," Jing Ge said coldly.

The potato is the name that Chen Mo gave to the little beast. This round little guy, in addition to eating, is eating, a typical snack food.

"You just left, just to buy snacks for potatoes? The battle doesn't look."

"No fun."

"Okay." Chen Mo accepted the fact that Jinge’s brain circuit is indeed different: "What happened then?"

Chen Mo only saw Jing Ge killing a person, the rest did not know, he did not pay attention.

"If you kill one, you will be honest." Jinge squinted at the gray-skinned man who was rescued, and took the little mother holding the snack to the side, picking up the carving knife and carving it quietly.

Silence to Jing Ge, Chen Mo has long been used to, continue to sit aside, waiting for the gray person to be rescued to wake up.

Fifteen minutes later, the gray-eyed man's narrow eyes moved and slowly opened, and his mind continued to flash through the scene before the coma. Soon he noticed Chen Mo and Jing Ge in the house, and a cute little pet.

He remembered that he was saved before he was in a coma, and then he was unconscious.

Climbing up from the ground, the gray man made a tens of moves toward Chen Mo, his expression was sincere.

"Thank you for saving me."

"You're welcome." Chen Mo carefully looked at the gray-skinned people. At least after waking up, the reaction was not like the evil spirits.

Thinking of his promise before the coma, the gray-skinned man bent over and grabbed the armor arm on the ground. When he got the hand, he found that the groove of the arm was burned through, the medicine had been taken out, and it was empty.

"What are you looking for?" Chen Mo took the potion that had just been smashed and shook it in front of the gray-skinned person.

"Yes, this is for you, when it is the reward for rescuing the life." The gray-skinned man once again salutes.

"What is this?" Chen Mo curiously asked.

"The magical civilization developed a super-capacity that can make life more powerful." Gray-skinned people have no hidden meaning.

"What's the matter?" Chen Mo wondered if he had got it wrong.

A gray-skinned man, he found that Chen Mo was not as excited as he thought, to know that for this thing does not leak, the magic flame civilization is unscrupulous.

"This is the super-power development agent of the Magic Flame civilization."

chapters.title: Chapter 823: : Instant Move And Grey Twenty-One
chapters.body:
Chapter 823: : Instant Move And Grey Twenty-One

Determined to be a superpower to develop a medicament, Chen Mo lost interest.

He has a lot of this technology, and now the wild mountain star in the earth and the small universe should be developing this medicine. The current [God] permissions, as well as super-powered directed development technology.

This potion is very attractive to other civilizations and lives, but it is not enough for them.

"Take it away and you can go."

Chen Mo took the potion. This was the reward he brought back at the risk of causing trouble. The mosquito leg was also meat. Although he was not sure how effective it was, it could provide a reference for his research on the development of potions.

"I have one more thing, sir." As soon as he turned around, the gray man turned back, gritted his teeth and determined: "I want to follow Mr."

"?"

Chen Mo was startled.

He didn't expect this gray man to think of following him. Rescued an individual and got caught?

This guy is a big trouble.

The demonic civilization and the mysterious force are looking for him. If he is found here, it is not a joke. The two will definitely trouble him directly, and certainly not only the troubles of the two, but also the continuous troubles of other follow-up civilization forces.

Although Chen Mo is not pleasantly surprised by this superpower development potion, it does not mean that it is not important. Chen Mo knows how powerful this special ability is, and he and Jing Ge are a good example.

To life, this mysterious power is simply incredible.

"Why do you want to follow me?"

"Sir saved me, I want to repay you, and I have nowhere to go, and I can't live without this planet. Sooner or later, I will be caught back by the magic flame civilization. And you feel to me, not like ordinary people." Greyhide The man turned towards Chen Mo, bent down, and saluted solemnly.

Chen Mo was unmoved: "You are in trouble now, give me a reason to keep you."

The gray-skinned man knew his situation, and the Demon Flame civilization was looking for him, and he had such a big secret. It was an infinite trouble. If he did not convince Chen Mo, Chen Mo could not continue to help him.

"I will be superpowered." Hesitating for a moment, the gray man told his secret.

As soon as the gray-skinned man said this, Chen Mo and Jing Ge were all confused. Jing Ge, a small stone carving, stopped.

"Have you ever used this super potion?" Chen Mo pointed to the potion just obtained.

"Have used it, because I had super powers, I escaped from the base." The gray-skinned man said seriously, he knew that if he wanted to follow Chen Mo, he could not hide it, otherwise Chen Mo would not accept him.

"The last phase of the test of the magic flame civilization used a lot of lives. Listening to the researchers was 10 million. There are beasts, humans, zerg, and beasts without wisdom.
