I am one of 10 million. A lot of lives died, a lot of madness, and some super powers appeared successfully, but after a period of time they lost control and died.

There are only five successes and controlled abilities, and I am one of them. At first I pretended to be crazy and didn't dare let them know. Later, I discovered that I can adapt to the environment of this planet, no longer rely on oxygen to survive, and my body becomes stronger. Then when they do n’t pay attention, I use super powers to escape from the isolation room and steal their potions and armor. Come out.

This potion is the kind we have used. Our group of twenty lives, including me, five of them succeeded, and the other lives awakened and died out of control. I pretended to be crazy and died, and the magic flame civilization sent me to this planet. "

The gray-skinned man told Chen Mo the whole story.

A life raised on a low-level planet was tested in captivity by the Demon Flame Civilization, and then screened out, he was sent to the experimental planet. Among the successful undead subjects, select the headquarters that may be successfully sent to the life research of the magic flame civilization.

This is how the Greyskins were screened and survived.

Chen Mo, who has been captured by three-eyed civilization, naturally knows that some higher civilizations support lower civilizations for experiments.

Calm thumbs up and appreciation for the gray-skinned man.

At least he knew how to plan to escape, much like he was at Qing Mercury, but the gray-skinned man was not as lucky as Chen Mo, and fled when he was raising him.

"What is your superpower? It allows you to escape from a heavily guarded base."

"Teleport."

Hearing this ability, Chen Mo immediately raised his spirit, Jing Ge glanced back, and returned to the cold appearance, carved with small stone carvings. His stone sculpture model is a small animal, and various forms of small animals have been portrayed to life by him.

"You used this ability to escape from that explosion?" Chen Mo can now understand that he was in the explosion center before the explosion, and there was no reason to die.

"Yes." The gray man nodded.

"How far can you move?" Chen Mo continued to ask.

"Five kilometers is the limit. I was able to escape because I started to follow the shock wave, then moved out, and then moved to that city. Moving five kilometers twice was the limit of my day, and my brain was very heavy and painful. Plus the shock I was unconscious in the city. "

The gray-skinned man was determined to follow Chen Mo and tell everything about himself.

He knew that leaving the planet required many things and conditions. And once he shows up, the Demon Flame civilization will surely catch him back, and he can't escape the planet.

When Chen Mo heard about the development of medicaments by super powers, he did not feel greedy, as if he heard a very ordinary thing. He bet that Chen Mo was not an ordinary person, plus Chen Mo was kind to him, he was determined to follow.

"You try, from here to the end of the room." Chen Mo pointed at the wall of the training room in front.

"I can control the direction, but I can't control the distance."

"Oh?"

Chen Mo nodded slightly, and immediately understood that the gray-skinned man had not been trained in how to master his abilities, and his environment did not allow him to train.

"Then you try, no matter how long the distance is."

Chen Mo stepped aside, giving way to the gray-skinned man.

The gray-skinned man sorted his emotions, his expression began to focus, and after a while, a painful look appeared on his face. The next moment, his body disappeared and appeared at ten meters away.

Jing Ge glanced at it and looked at the small animal sculpture quietly. The little beast cooperated and carved him in a fixed position.

"Very special ability."

Chen Mo was hesitant to accept the gray man. He has a lot of troubles. If his whereabouts are leaked, he will be trapped in the mud and troubles will continue in the future.

"What's your name? How old is it now?" Chen Mo asked.

"My name is Gray Twenty-one and I'm nineteen."

"Gray Twenty-one? I can stay with you and keep you safe, but when you are here, you must obey my arrangements to avoid revealing your identity. Once you reveal your identity here, I can't keep you."

Chen Mo finally decided to accept him.

His experience is a bit similar to his own. He was captured by captive civilization and escaped.

At the age of nineteen, he escaped from the magic flame civilization, which shows that he is smart and extraordinary, and because the gray-skinned man's mind is not like the deep-hearted generation, he still decides to keep him.

As long as he is properly trained and his abilities are used correctly, the gray man may be a good master in the future.

"Thank you sir." The gray-skinned man heard Chen Mo leave him with a look of excitement and put his hands on his chest. It seemed as if he was performing a ritual on Chen Mo as never before.

One minute later, the ceremony was over, Gray Twenty-one opened his eyes and bowed to Chen Mo.

"My name is Chen Mo, and his name is Jing Ge. During this time, you can't go out for a while." Chen Mo thought about it and looked at Jing Ge: "Jing Ge, this little ghost's super power, can you train?"

For some reason, Gray Twenty-one heard that he was going to be trained by Jing Ge, and felt a hairy feeling.

chapters.title: Chapter 824: : Decision Of The Demon Flame Civilization
chapters.body:
Chapter 824: : Decision Of The Demon Flame Civilization

A large-scale high-level armor battle took place at high altitude outside Siyuan City. Siyuan City was destroyed by anti-material bombs, causing millions of casualties. The news shook the entire Shi Ganxing.

Fighting of this scale has not happened in Shi Ganxing for a long time.

Although Siyuan City is only a small city in Shi Ganxing, but because it is closer to the Warframe Trading City, it lives more than 50 million lives. Antimatter bombs exploded outside Siyuan City. Most of the lives fled by flying vehicles, but one million lives still died.

In Shi Ganxing, in addition to the war between civilizations, such a large-scale deaths rarely occur.

This battle attracted the attention of the entire federation. When the Star Security Agency stated that the three unknown forces were fighting, the reason for the fight was not known, and details were not announced.

The anti-matter bomb exploded, leaving a deep pit with a diameter of 20 kilometers outside the city of Siyuan, breaking the silence of Shi Ganxing.

Anyone who knows well knows that Shi Ganxing is surging inside.

Bai Yan was not looking good on the sofa. This operation was very aggrieved. Not only was the target robbed, they also killed and injured several team members. Compared with the injured members, the failure made her more unhappy.

The first time he performed such an important task, he failed. There is also the eyes of the white warframe, which has been imprinted on her mind so far, the coldness that touches the soul and the memory is fresh.

She was sure that no one in the base could ever give her such a terrifying fear.

The egret looked at the image saved by the white cricket armor and saw the extremely high-speed instantaneous stop, even he couldn't help wondering: "This division is really as powerful as you said?"

"It may still be conservative, Uncle Egret, what you give me is a sense of oppression, a kind of pressure, but what he gives me is a kind of cold chill, a sense of fear." Bai Yan said seriously.

The egret sitting opposite Baiji looked surprised, a pair of tiger eyes were extremely dignified.

According to Bai Yan, I am afraid that some top players who are not weaker than him enter Shi Ganxing. The universe is so big and there are many top masters, but most of them are advanced civilizations and forces above the indigo level.

The white cricket met at Shi Ganxing, indicating that the other party may have been prepared.

Others are staring at the Flame Flame civilization.

Now that the target is in the opponent's hands, it is likely that what the Warframe Division stole from the base of the Moyan civilization will also fall into the opponent's hands.

"Can you find out who the other party is?"

"No news." The egret shook her head.

Shi Ganxing has hundreds of billions of intelligent lives, and wanting to check one or two Warframe Divisions is tantamount to finding a needle in a haystack, and the other party is still wearing Warframe and can't see the true colors. The opponent's armor is exposed in front of them and will definitely be replaced.

"What should we do now?"

"Mrs. is putting pressure on the Demon Flame civilization. We wait for the news to be as low-key as possible during this period of time.

...

After the battle in Siyuan City, the Demon Flame ignited for two days, his face looked exhausted. Beside him, his assistant Samori also frowned.

Vijes died and the target was rescued. At least two powerful forces were staring at them secretly. Just now the Star Safety Agency came to the door and asked them to cooperate with the investigation.

In any previous investigations, they could refuse to use the internal events of the Demon Flame civilization as an excuse, but this time the explosion of Siyuan City caused millions of lives to die. The department was also very angry.

They did not expect that this matter would be so bad.

The Demon Flame civilization is also one of the big civilizations of Shi Ganxing, but this Siyuan City incident has offended several major civilizations. It is dangerous to use anti-matter bombs on the planet that exceed the specified equivalent. If it is out of control, it will bring the entire Shi Ganxing into disaster.

So after the antimatter bomb exploded, Shi Ganxing's major civilizations and other small civilization forces used the Star Alliance to press the magic flame civilization, which was the biggest crisis since their establishment.

The Demon Flame King suspected that a larger force was behind it, but could not find out which force did it.

"Is the path of those two forces clear?" The Red Flame King's hair became more scarlet, apparently angry.

"Everything can't be found, but the one who killed Vigers who was determined to be the top master, and the origin of the Star Safety Agency can't find their origin." Senji's words and expressions were full of prudence: "Baixing civilization may have received some Special news, so we will contact us to negotiate. "

Demon Flame King's expression suddenly gloomy.

The development of super-powered medicament is close to success. When the medicament matures and trains a group of top warframe divisions, they will be among the top civilizations. They only need time, but only at this point in time.

"What's your suggestion in the current situation?" The Demon Flame King looked at Senji.

Senji is the chief think tank of Demon Flame Civilization, his most powerful assistant, and his most trusted confidant. In recent years, the magic flame civilization has been stable and strong, and the think tank chaired by Senji has contributed a lot.

"We are facing the White Star civilization. They are god-level civilizations that can crush us to death."

The Demon Flame King nodded slightly, agreed with him, and let him continue.

"At present, it is known that at least two top-level forces are staring at us, and we don't know how many are staring at us secretly. After this incident, technology must not be kept secret. So we might as well introduce competitors from the White Star civilization and let them play. We use The chips on hand maximize our benefits. "

"Do you mean to introduce several other god-level civilizations and join in the negotiation of super-power development technology?" The magic flame king's eyes were uncertain: "If so, the risks we have to bear are not small."

There are good and bad ways to do this. The advantage is that once they are negotiated, their interests can be maximized, but the disadvantage is that if these parties are in trouble, their magic flame civilization is at the center of the storm, the battle of several god-level civilizations, a little bit of aftermath, They can be destroyed without residue.

Among the beasts of the seven god-level civilizations, they are as weak as pets.

"Yes, but if we do n’t, we will be swallowed up by Baixing civilization. Once Baixing civilization gets super-power development technology, they want to be a big one, and absolutely do not allow this technology to remain in our hands. Because we are still In the hands, there is a risk of leaking to other god-level civilizations. So no matter where we give it to, this technology cannot be maintained. "

Senji explained all the stakes.

If this time, they succumb to Baixing civilization, they may be swallowed up by Baixing civilization in the future. However, if they do not succumb to Baixing civilization, the other party will cooperate with Shiganxing's many civilizations, and use this event to put pressure on them, their magic flame civilization will also perish.

Because of this technology leak, their magic flame civilization has been pushed to the blade to dance. If they are not careful, they will be killed by the blade. So now they can only find a balance point on the blade, if they lean to one side and lose the balance of gravity, they will die on it.

Therefore, a third party or even a fourth party must be introduced to make them eligible for price increase negotiations.

"The chips are in our hands, we take the initiative, at least the initiative is in our hands." Senji said.

For the Demon Flame King who has the ambition to evolve to a top-level civilization or even a god-level civilization, it is impossible to lose the initiative and surrender to the god-level civilization.

After a long time of hesitation, the Demon Flame King made up his mind.

"Just follow your method. Also, control all personnel involved in the research and development of super-capable technologies, protect them secretly, and centralize all technical information. That is our only bargaining chip. Only after we get the bargaining chips can we go to table negotiations qualifications."

"Understand." Senji focused his head.

Until Senji left, the Demon Flame King was unwilling.

If the information is kept secret and the technology succeeds, they secretly cultivate top-level Warframe Divisions with superpowers. In less than a thousand years, they can enter the ranks of top civilizations and be separated from the divine civilization's remaining 'small universe'.

But unfortunately, the news leaked, and his ambition was put to naught, and now he can only use technology in exchange for the benefits they want.

He thought about the relocation of civilization and brought the core of civilization to a planet incognito development. But in the future, it will take countless years to restore the glory of the magic flame civilization. At that time, the existence of the Moyan civilization was still uncertain. There was no migration of civilizations in the small universe, and the possibility of secretly developing and growing was too small. Divine civilization could easily find them.

chapters.title: Chapter 825: : Fengyunjihui
chapters.body:
Chapter 825: : Fengyunjihui

Niu Mu handed over the company's accounts to Chen Mo. Today, the Warframe order was successfully delivered to the training base of Party B. The final payment of the order was received. The profit of this order was 100 million yuan, which was more than their previous years' profits.

He remembered the expression on the training base owner's face when he received the sample A test, it was just the excitement of picking up Bao, and he gave them the order without hesitation.

At that time he knew that the Rising Star Warrior Company was back to life.

During this time he was fortunate how wise his decision to stay was.

"Dongdong and Kariz are three million each, and you five million are considered bonuses."

Chen Mo swiftly allocated 11 million star coins to Niu Mu. It was not difficult for him to earn star coins. It was also courage for the three men to decide to stay and follow him.

After hearing millions of bonuses, Niumu was almost happy.

Such a big bonus is something they never dared to think about before, which is equivalent to their one-year salary. The boss's generosity is beyond his imagination.

"It's a bit slow to make money like this, so hurry up."

Looking at the remaining funds, Chen Mo muttered.

Chen Mo, who was still excited, heard Chen Mo's muttering, her smile froze. It didn't take long for this new star company to make a hundred million. Is it still making money slowly?

Niu Mu doubts that poverty has limited his imagination.

Chen Mo thought for a while and said, "I'll give you a list, you go and buy the materials and equipment of the list, the sooner the better."

"OK." Niu Mu agreed without hesitation.

"Also, you release the news, we accept the customized business of the blue warframe."

"Blue ... blue-level battle armor?" Niu stammered.

The boss will design even the blue-level battle armor.

In terms of material technology, power engines, weapons, and energy shields, the blue-level armor is one level higher than the green-level armor.

Although all major civilized companies now sell materials and technologies for Blue-Grade Armor, Blue-Grade Armor does not rely on simple assembly.

It can be assembled randomly, and the function will not be too powerful.

The customization of the blue-level warframe is generally a teamwork, and the warframe is designed according to the requirements of the customizer. Individual warframe designers have few designs, but each one who can design blue-level warframes individually is a top warframe designer, and the citrons grabbed by major civilizations.

Now Chen Mo is more mysterious in his eyes.

What exactly is the boss?

Chen Mo's identity and origin are not what he should ask. He knows that he only needs to execute according to Chen Mo's orders and then manage the company. In the future, his benefits will be indispensable. A three million bonus is a good example.

The bill of materials was given to Niumu, and Chen Mo began to design the battle armor.

The earning speed of the green-level warframe is slower. He needs to design several blue-level warframes in order to quickly raise money to supplement anti-material energy. The price of the blue-level armor is much higher than the green-level armor, and the profit is considerable.

For him, the difficulty of the blue warframe is not too great.

Now that he has returned to Earth, he just hopes that he can make enough money quickly, replenish antimatter energy, and return directly to the earth with a space curvature ship.

Niumu's efficiency is indeed okay. He gave him the bill of materials. In less than three hours, he purchased all the materials and equipment he needed.

The design of the blue armor is different from the green armor. The green armor is generally a junior armor, the armor used by ordinary armor divisions, and the blue armor is generally the armor used by intermediate and advanced armor divisions. .

They have obvious requirements for the performance and style of the armor.

Many middle and senior armor divisions will actively seek out armor companies and armor design teams to design unique armor for him. Therefore, the Wanjin oil-type blue-level armor is not popular in the market.

It's the same, it can't show its strength and style. .

To sell the unique blue-level armors, they need to be seen by middle- and high-level armors, and they must be suitable for their body shape and also meet their style and characteristics. Therefore, uncustomized blue-level armors are often relatively difficult. sell away.

I don't know when Niu Mu can receive customized orders, so Chen Mo plans to design a few models and try to sell them.

...

The interior of the Rising Star Company building is as usual, but it is not quiet outside.

A message appeared, causing a stir on the Universe Channel of the Universe.

"I am King Morric of the Kenilkburn Super Galaxy, the Supersatellite Cloud Saturn, and the Magic Flame civilization of the Shigan Galaxy of the Long River. Here, I announce good news to the Universe Alliance. Yanming Wenming successfully developed super-capable development technology, and is now looking for technical partners for the entire universe. "

A short image made the whole universe shake.

Superpower is the most mysterious power in the universe, even if the divine civilization has not understood the essential principle. And this special ability is a unique ability of God-level life.

Science in the universe believes that superpower is a way for life to evolve to god-level life. Countless civilizations in the universe are studying this technology and experimenting countlessly, but without exception, no one has succeeded.

Now the magic flame civilization has announced the success of the super power development technology, and the whole universe is shocked.

What is even more surprising is that the Moyan civilization chose to announce this technology and find partners.

Once you have this kind of technology, it is best to develop and grow in secret, but the magic flame civilization is actually open, which makes many civilizations puzzled. However, the civilization on Shi Ganxing soon understood that it was probably related to the Siyuan City explosion some time ago.

For a moment, a dark tide surged in the Universe.

Super ability development technology is a possibility for life to evolve to a higher level of life, and it is also a way to become a top warframe division. Many high-level life is desperately desperate, and now it really appears.

Shortly after the news of the Demon Flame Civilization was issued, it was answered.

Heitui Civilization sent a message that it would send personnel to Shi Ganxing to discuss cooperation with Moyan Civilization on super power development technology. Immediately afterwards, Lagerstroemia civilization, endless sea civilization, Thor civilization, dark forest civilization, ghost civilization, and Baixing civilization all opened up, and they will be sent to discuss and cooperate with the magic flame civilization.

The entire Universe was uproar.

For seven hundred million years, the seven mysterious civilizations that are so high and mysterious have manifested themselves at this moment and gathered in the Shigan galaxy.

The importance of superpower development technology has been pushed to a new level again.

Because of this news, the magic flame civilization immediately became the most dazzling star in the universe. Almost all universe-level newspapers and media are promoting and touting. The promotion of the magic flame civilization to the top civilization is already a matter of prestige.

The several major civilizations of Shi Ganxing, who had put pressure on the Demon Flame civilization, collectively snorted, and even the sanctions originally prepared were all withdrawn, and they did not dare to spit.

The pressured magic flame civilization had disappeared instantly.

The entire Universe has focused on the Shigan galaxy. At this moment, the Shigan galaxy has become the focus of the entire universe. This is the first such feast to appear after the Great War.

chapters.title: Chapter 826: :Tracked
chapters.body:
Chapter 826: :Tracked

Inside the Warframe Company, three sets of warframes are on display, which are two sets of blue-level warframes designed and manufactured by Chen Mo. His only money is enough to make three sets of blue-level armor, so the armor designer is a profession that can spend money, but this profession can also make money.

At present, the market price of the blue-level battle armor is an average of 250 million star coins, and if it is sold, it is still not enough space for the spacecraft's "oil" money.

Chen Mo wanted to make enough money quickly to add anti-material energy back to the earth, but he still needed to roll it out. This time, the blue-grade armor was sold. Then, using the money as a cost, several sets of blue-grade armor were sold. Almost enough money.

Back at the top floor of the building, Chen Mo saw Gray Twenty-one in training, and Jing Ge was responsible for training him.

During this time, Gray Twenty-One was tormented by Jing Ge. Every time he got tired and passed out, he would let him go, and then let him rest and continue to toss training.

When Chen Mo saw it, he couldn't help but mourn for him.

Jing Ge's training is really hell-style training.

But Grey Twenty-one is not bad, at least he can carry Jing Ge's devil training without saying a word. Even strict Jing Ge is satisfied with Grey Twenty-one. Seeing that Grey Twenty-one was fainted again, Chen Mo twitched and walked over.

"So it won't happen, right?"

"He's okay." Jing Ge glanced casually at Gray 21, who passed out: "He's suitable to be an assassin."

Chen Mo thought for a while that Grey Twenty-one's ability is indeed suitable for being an assassin. The ability to miss a single shot and walk away instantly is very difficult to entangle with his opponent.

Coupled with Jinge's perverted training, Gray 21 will definitely not be too weak.

"I went out and sold the armor."

When handing over the twenty-one to Jinge, Chen Mo didn't care about it. Chen Mo's own training must obey Jinge's coming.

This is the last time I visited the Warframe Trading Center building. This is the best place to sell warframes. The traffic and potential buyers are concentrated here.

Most of the basic armors and green armors sold here, and there are a lot of blue armors, but the armor divisions who can afford the blue armor are more willing to customize according to their own style than to buy Those systems are mass produced.

This is the last Warframe Trading Center. Chen Mofei landed on the 320-layer Warframe platform and carried the three Warframe chests into the trading center.

This floor is where the Blue Warframes are consigned. Many second-hand Blue Warframes, or some ordinary Blue Warframes, will be sold here. In addition, there are some armored company pavilions on the floor, which specialize in providing customized services for blue armor.

Chen Mo set the consignment price at 280 million. He made reference to the prices of other warframes and made this pricing, which is not too high. When Chen Mo stepped out of the building, he didn't notice. There was a life at the door of the building staring at him with surprise.

"It's him!"

Zeqi stared at Chen Mo's armor with certain eyes.

He was assigned to Shi Ganxing, as a representative of Ziwei Civilization, to discuss cooperation with the Moyan civilization, came to Shi Ganxing, idle and bored, he went out to visit the Warframe Trading City.

I did not expect to encounter this Warframe Division here.

Chen Mo's armor is no stranger to him.

Three-eye civilization gave him the image of Qingshui's life defection, and the leader's armor was exactly the same as Chen Mo's.

He once suspected that the Warframe Division was with the Catheads who destroyed their small universe plan, because such a high-level Warframe Division appeared on a captive planet, and was similar in style to the Cathead's Warframe. Similarly, there should be a connection between the two.

Because the catheads caused the small universe they tracked to close, Ziyun accepted the most terrifying black hole punishment, and so far life and death are unknown.

He traced the news of the senior Warframe Division and determined that he disappeared in a turbulent space, and there was no trace after that.

Unexpectedly, he was encountered in Shi Ganxing.

He didn't know whether to sigh that the universe was too big or too small.

Zeqi didn't jump up to shock the other side. When the superpower development potion of the magic flame civilization appeared, the Warframe Division appeared here. He didn't believe that the universe was so big and there were so many coincidences.

The opponent's organization may have developed technology for the superpower's superpowers.

Zeqi is now almost certain that Chen Mo has a strong organization behind him and may have a relationship with Maotou.

If they can investigate the organization behind the cathead who caused them to lose a small universe, then the other party must bear the anger from their divine civilization.

Seeing Chen Mo take off and leave the trading center, Zeqi slowly urged the armor to follow.

The Warframe Trading City is already in the dark, and there are many lives to go out for shopping, various aircraft in the air, rushing traffic, and the roaring Warframe. The colorful holographic projection advertisements depict the Warframe Trading City full of fantasy colors. Under the glory of the city, the beauty is like a city that never sleeps.

Alternating night and Guanghua, coupled with the crowded Warframe Trading City, gave Zeqi the best cover.

He flew at a different height from Chen Mo. With the cover of the flying vehicle and surrounding buildings, he carefully followed Chen Mo and kept a short distance.

He wanted to figure out where the other party was in Shi Ganxing's old nest, and which party it belonged to. Determine which force was behind the origin galaxy last time.

If they can find the forces behind them, maybe the host star will reduce the punishment for Zi Yun, and Zi Yun also hopes to come back alive from the black hole punishment.

This time in Shi Ganxing, they were in the dark and the other was in the bright.

There is a big difference between high-altitude flight and intra-city flight. High-altitude flight outside the city's high-rise buildings has relatively few obstacles and aircraft, and the flight speed is very fast. However, in the city, there are many high-rise buildings and flying machines. If you want to keep flying at high speed, the flight will be more difficult, and some places have limited speed. Of course, Zeqi will not manage any speed limit.

What he wants most now is to track the other person back to where he left off without revealing himself.

The radar noticed that the other party was accelerating at a high altitude, and Zecchi looked anxious.

If you continue this way, you may lose it, but if the fire control radar detection and tracking is turned on, the other party will find it as soon as possible.

In desperation, Zeqi can only increase the flying height and adopt irregular flight routes to reduce the possibility of being detected by the opponent's radar.

After flying at high speed for about 20 minutes, Zeqi felt that the building in front of him was a lot shorter and sparse. It didn't take long to reach out of the Warframe Trading City.

Suddenly, the armor in the sky turned suddenly, shaking Zeqi's spirit, hesitating.

He wasn't sure if the other party had found his follow-up, hesitated, or controlled the armor, and kept up to close.

Chen Mo did find nothing wrong.

The radar showed that a set of advanced armor was always within his radar range. He reproduced the flight trajectory through radar and finally determined the flight trajectory of the opponent. The opponent started from the Warframe Trading Center and followed him all the way, like tracking, but not tracking.

Now that god-level civilizations gather in Shi Ganxing, it is an eventful autumn, and he has to be careful. Seeing that the other party also turned and followed not far and near, Chen Mo was almost sure that he was being followed.

Do not want to, Chen Mo slowly turned the direction, the destination is the trading city.

Who is the other person? Why follow him? ...

Almost all kinds of questions flashed in his mind, and he even wondered whether the rescue of Grey Twenty-One was exposed. It seems that Shi Ganxing is not a place to stay for a long time.

chapters.title: Chapter 827: : "Super" State First Battle
chapters.body:
Chapter 827: : "Super" State First Battle

Soon, Zeqi discovered that something was wrong. Chen Mo's flight trajectory was curved. After a large circle, they returned to the scope of the Warframe Trading City, and the other party was flying around the Warframe Trading City.

not good! Was found.

Almost instantaneously, Zheqi came up with the idea.

Good vigilance.

Without waiting for him to speed up, Chen Mo's Warframe quickly changed to paint, completely turning into the black of the night, and rushed into the Warframe Trading City. On Zeqi ’s Warframe Radar, Chen Mo ’s Warframe signals were slowly disappearing.

Stealth mode that shields quantum radar detection has been activated.

"It's not so easy to escape."

Zeqi saw the change of Chen Mo's armor, and immediately determined that it was the same material as the cat's head armor, and he was more affirming his relationship with the organization behind the cat's head.

The opponent's Warframe has a stealth mode, which means that as long as the other party escapes from the optical vision of his Warframe, the other party may be able to merge into the crowd of Warframe Trading City.

After finally encountering the other party, he could not let the other party escape so easily, otherwise it would be more difficult to find the other party again. Even if it's exposed, grab each other and give them at least a clue.

The two sides no longer cover up, chasing one after another and are playing in the air.

Chen Mo calmly watched the getting closer to the Warframe Trading City. In the end, he did not slow down and rushed straight into the high-rise city.

"Want to play difficult?"

Zeqi sneered and did not slow down, and quickly entered the Warframe Trading City immediately after Chen Mo.

High-speed obstacle avoidance is an indispensable lesson in the training of the Warframe Division. It is the basis of the basis of the Warframe Division. Now is the time to show off your skills. As a genius of god-level civilization in the universe, Zech is not worried about any problems.

They have the best genes and innate conditions, as well as the best Warframe. This level of obstacle avoidance is nothing to him.

The chase was staged in the city, and both chose supersonic speed, so in the city, the sound of sonic boom was roaring and attracted countless people.

"The battle armor is soaring into the city.

"You can't hit it again, but if you hit a high-rise building or a shop, you will be killed at most."

"There are few who dare to soar Warframes in the Warframe Trading City."

"They are all old pilots of Qiu Mingxing."

"Well? The back armor is like the armor of Ziwei civilization."

Soon, the onlookers on the road recognized the provenance of the set of back armor, and the Lagerstroemia civilization's war armor had a very obvious Lagerstroemia flower symbol. Unless this mark was specifically erased, it could be recognized at a glance.

The life of Ziwei civilization is chasing an unknown Warframe Division in Warframe Trading City.

The main forces in Shi Ganxing immediately received the news.

The news caused much debate and fantasy. After all, on Shi Ganxing, there are very few Warframe Divisions who dare to offend Ziwei civilization. They are god-level civilizations. One unhappy, the entire galaxy will suffer.

Chen Mo is concerned about the map of the Warframe Trading City launched by the radar. The buildings are fixed and the warframe can be changed automatically. The only uncertainty is the various aircraft and warframes flying in the air.

Obstacle avoidance, a very familiar scene, when he trained, he used this kind of irregular obstacle avoidance.

At super high speeds, to circumvent these goals and test the foundation of the Warframe.

Chen Mo concentrated on the twelve minutes. The armor was accelerating. He shuttled between buildings and various aircraft. There was no meaning of deceleration because he was in the city. During the flight, Chen Mo continuously changed his appearance of armor painting. The lighting and environment of the area is constantly changing.

Both sides kept their distance, and Chen Mo could be sure that the other party could catch up with a delay of one second. This is in the city, and the opponent will have so little scruples, so Chen Mo is not worried.

From the control skills of the Warframe, the opponent's accomplishments are not under him, and the level of the Warframe is similar, so the highest way to get rid of the opponent is to use his stealth mode and camouflage mode to take advantage of this complex environment.

The stealth mode shields the quantum radar lock, and the camouflage mode reduces the possibility of optical radar lock, which is the advantage of the stealth warframe. In this complex environment, he can change from a prey to a hunter as long as he gets rid of the opponent's tracking.

Near the three forks surrounded by a high-rise building, Chen Mo's eyes narrowed, and he instantly urged the armored engine to the power that kinetic energy wanted.

boom! !!

Instant stop.

The sound explosion exploded in the air, causing the heartbeat of Chen Mo's armor to follow.

The perfect instant stop makes the whole process very natural and easy.

Chen Mo didn't know how many times he tried it, especially after the actual training with Jing Ge, he became smoother. Faced with the pressure of Jing Ge's natural warriors, if Chen Mo is not proficient in these advanced skills, fighting Jing Ge is to look for abuse.

At the moment of the instantaneous stop, Chen Mo crushed an interfering smoke and surrounded the entire Sanchakou with interfering smoke. He could not see his five fingers, and he was drowned in it.

The back of Zeqi's pupil shrank, and he decelerated into a confused smoke before stopping. The quantum radar lost its target, the optical radar could not capture the target, and his face was gloomy.

Only then did he feel the difficulty of the other party.

On the operation of the Warframe, the opponent is not worse than him, which reminds him of the original cathead.

The brakes on the road were not timely, and the aircraft and the armor in the smoke started to slow down and turn on the lights, disturbing the chaos in the smoke. Zeqi quickly flew over the interference smoke to inspect, and Sanchakou did not have any shadow of the other party.

Interfering smoke was blown away, and there were five minor aircraft collisions at the fork location, and there were no other serious problems. Chen Mo's figure had long since disappeared. Let's look at the flying vehicles and armor in the air, watching the crowd There are a lot of flying machines and armor.

Escaped by the other party.

Zeqi looked strangely pale.

He didn't notice that at the corner of the building near the fork in the road, Chen Mo's armor was changed, and with the cover of the night, he was watching him secretly.

Lagerstroemia civilization.

Chen Mo also recognized the sign on the opponent's armor, he did not remember when he had offended the Ziwei civilization. I have only heard of God-level civilization before, and have not even touched the life of God-level civilization. This is the first time to see the Warframe Division of God-level civilization.

Could it be that the other party knew that he had taken Grey Twenty-One and wanted to get Grey Twenty-One from him? Chen Mo is still not sure about this speculation.

Seeing that Zeqi couldn't find him leaving, Chen Mo started stealth mode to keep up.

However, he is not afraid of god-level civilization. Others would think that god-level civilization cannot be defeated, but Chen Mo would not think so.

The positions of hunters and hunters change at this moment.

What Jing Ge taught him, hunting in the jungle, the most important thing is camouflage in the dark.

Whether it is a person or a beast, an excellent hunter must let the prey enter his own best attack range, and then determine which method to use to get the prey more likely.

At such a short distance, weapons of mass destruction cannot be adopted, or else they will catch it. The laser irradiation cannot burn through the opponent's armor in nanoseconds, the opponent's energy shield will automatically activate, and his position will be directly exposed.

Thinking about it, Chen Mo decided to use the most adventurous method, and the easiest.

Assassination.

Warframe with stealth and camouflage mode turned on, like a ghost in the night, no one noticed him in this huge city.

Zeqi's communication instrument suddenly rang, opened the battle armor communication, and a holographic light curtain jumped out in his field of vision. Lagerstroemia indica came from other members of Shi Ganxing this time.

Zeqi chases an unknown Warframe Division, and has been shocked to come to Shi Ganxing's god-level civilization.

"Zech, are you chasing a Warframe Division?" A member of the Ziwei civilization hurriedly spoke.

"Yes, maybe you found the companion of the cathead last time." Zeqi said solemnly.

"Did you catch it?" One of the members who had originally traveled to Origin City hurriedly asked, and they could clearly remember that the cat-headed man had destroyed the entrance to the small universe with red matter.

"No, let him escape."

He didn't know that Chen Mo didn't run away, let alone Chen Mo followed quickly and flickered in the shadow of the building not far from him, just like a veteran beast waiting for an opportunity.

When he reached the side of a high-rise building, Chen Mo spurred the battle armor and quickly circled. With the help of the building's cover, he quickly urged the engine to circle the building, accelerated at the moment of emergence, and pointed at the normal flying Zeqi.

At this time it was only kilometers away from Zeki.

Boom! !!

The instantaneous acceleration of the hypersonic speed caused the sound explosion to explode again. The kilometer distance is only a blink of an eye for the Warframe Division.

The fighting thorns in Chen Mo's hands, the glare of the ultra-short pulse laser flickering, the light of death, the power has exceeded one watt per femtosecond. At this power, it is easy enough to cut the armor material.

Fighting stabs mixed with short-pulse lasers pointed directly at Zech's face.

Chen Mo knows that the vitality of senior life is very tenacious, especially the god-level life, which completely kills the other party and destroys the other party's brain. Unless killed immediately, the life support system carried in the Warframe will be able to treat the opponent.

Chen Mo's actions are not like novice assassins, but more like a field-tested old hunter. Everything moves smoothly.

This was learned from Jing Ge. Jing Ge's weird and fierce fighting style has been affecting Chen Mo.

Warframe suddenly signaled danger, Zeqi's face changed greatly.

The danger came so suddenly that someone wanted to kill him.

As divine beings, their brain structure and body structure are already at the top of the universe. Only in an instant, Zecchi found a solution.

I saw Zeqi not retreating, his body passed by at an incredible angle, and the engine on the side of the battle arm tried his best to make Chen Mo's fighting stab stab in the air on his shoulder.

It was a horrible adventure, and Zage had complete confidence in his operation.

At the same time, Zeqi already has a long sword in his hand. The blade and the tip of the sword are braved with a short pulse laser and chopped down towards Chen Mo's waist with a dangerous breath. If he is chopped, Chen Mo can be easily divided into two sections.

boom!

With a muffled sound, Zeqi only felt the huge power coming from his hand, and the movement of the sword was blocked.

The battle has attracted the onlookers of passersby in the Warframe Trading City. Each of the two moves is extremely fast, and the ordinary Warframe Division simply cannot keep up with the rhythm, causing an uproar.

It is impossible to see the battle of the advanced Warframe Division in peacetime.

Zeqi looked dignified, and the reaction speed of the opponent's close combat was faster than he imagined, and he was not lost to him. With this speed of combat, only indigo-level life or higher, even he may be a god-level life.

As the top life, his innate brain allows him to see extremely fast movements, but he cannot predict the next movement of the other party. This Warframe Division's attack is weird and vicious, and his movements are as fast as lightning. Even if he is a god-like life, he feels a lot of pressure.

Close combat, the distance between the two sides is not too far away, any combat action is completed in an instant. But in such a small range, the opponent's armor can complete more than thirty changes in a very short period of time. Advanced tactical actions come in handy. He has strong control over the armor, even if he has seen few armor divisions. Every one All are terrible.

The two people's high-frequency attacks continued. Zeqi was up twelve and did not dare to relax. They thought they were divine life and would be born strong, but this time gave him an alert. The last time Catheads killed their team members, this time a new one appeared. The senior Warframe Division in the universe was not as weak as imagined.

Chen Mo's spirit is very concentrated. Since the unlock of the authority of the [Technological Library], his body has evolved again. The brain structure and the body structure are completely different, and the speed has become very scary.

This is the second Warframe Division he has encountered so seriously after Jinge. This is a divine life, but it does not give him the terrible oppression of Jing Ge.

At first I was worried that the god-level life was scary and a little nervous, and now that tension is gone.

boom! !!

The collision between the two sides exploded in the air and each retreated. Chen Mo took a deep breath, her eyes became sharp, and she went into a 'super' state. Fighting Jing Ge, he was training the ‘super’ state, and now is the first battle of his ‘super’ state combined with the armor.

It can't be dragged now, otherwise it may lead to other god-level life and advanced armor divisions. It will be more troublesome at that time. It is most important to get out as soon as possible.

Hum! The remote laser is activated and hits the energy shield of Zecchi directly.

Suddenly, Ze Qi frowned, and he saw that Chen Mo raised his other hand.

Is it like using other long-range missiles?

For this level of combat, ordinary long-range missiles have little effect, but there are still some special missiles, such as corrosive agents.

"Drip, the armor defense system is under unknown interference, and the energy shield is turned off." Zeqi just wanted to procure the armor to dodge, and the prompt in his ear made him pale.

superpower?

Top Warframe Division?

impossible!

Nearly instantaneously, Zeqi flashed a lot of thoughts in his mind, and each thought made him feel horrified. The next moment, he felt severe pain in his body, the armor was pierced by laser, and his movement became slow.

chapters.title: Chapter 828: : Planet Trading Market
chapters.body:
Chapter 828: : Planet Trading Market

The egret stared at the video of the battle, for fear of missing any details. The closer he looked, the more dignified his expression was, seeing the laser hole piercing the Lagerstroemia civilization, he couldn't help shrinking his pupils.

When the video was over, the egret exhaled and leaned on the sofa.

"What do you see?" Egret looked at the white magpie beside him, and other members.

"The shape of this warframe is the same as the warframe of the life that escaped the flames civilization last time. It should be the same organization, or the same life." Bai Yan's eyes were burning.

She has always remembered her last failure.

The egret nodded, agreeing with her thoughts: "What else?"

"A sudden failure of the Energy Shield will kill him, otherwise he should be able to fight." Bai Yan spoke and watched the video of the battle. She determined that she and Ziwei Civilization were almost the same in strength, and she replaced herself in this battle. She was sure to fight.

The other members nodded in agreement.

"No." The egret shook her head slightly, with a calm expression: "You're gone, you're still dead."

"Uncle, it's impossible, the mysterious Warframe Division. It's not terrifying to see the movements and operations, I can handle it." Bai Yan apparently disagreed with the egret.

They are all senior divisions, but they are divided into three, six, and nine, and she is sure that she belongs to the best part.

This combat speed, she was obviously capable of coping.

"You are wrong. This mysterious Warframe Division is not a senior Warframe Division, it is a top Warframe Division." Egret said lightly.

As the words came out, the room became dead.

"Top Warframe Division? It seems that Shi Ganxing has a lot of experts."

The Shigan Galaxy, a barren planet near the main star of Shigan, a building with a 'Thunderbolt' sign hanging alone in the endless barrenness, and a superlight spacecraft docked outside, a young life sitting at the top of the building , Look a little arrogant.

He is the messenger, Thunder, sent by the Thunder God civilization to the Shigan Galaxy to negotiate with the Demon Flame civilization.

At this time he was also watching the image transmitted from the Warframe Trading City.

"Master Thunder, how do you see that he is a top division?" The members next to him puzzled.

"Energy Shield is not a malfunction," Thunder said lightly.

Although he was arrogant, he never refused to give advice on some questions asked by his subordinates. The video frequency came out and paused at the moment when Chen Mo raised his left hand.

"Senior battle armor divisions will not have this useless action. When this movement occurs, the energy shield of the Ziwei civilization armor armor is broken. He has special super powers that affect the armor shield of the armor."

All members of the Thor civilization on the field are as dead as chickens.

Each member was dignified, and they knew what superpower meant. Super powers are the quilt skills that enter the ranks of top warframe divisions, and each one is a very scary master.

In the universe, divine life has superpowers that are not fake, but those lives are not all concentrated in divine civilization.

Divine life and divine civilization are two concepts.

Some god-level life defected from the god-level civilization, and then awakened the superpowers to become the top war division division.

Zidi is the best example.

Two thousand years ago, a Zi Emperor appeared in the Lagerstroemia civilization. Because it was the offspring of a mother who combined with ordinary life, she was looked down upon and abused everywhere in Lagerstroemia civilization. No matter how hard she tried, she was not recognized. For these reasons, after his mother died, Zidi defected. In the process of being hunted down, the 13 constellations of Lagerstroemia civilization were destroyed, three super galaxies, and billions of planets, killing countless lives. Killing Ziwei civilization encircled his eight top warframe divisions, hundreds of senior warframe divisions, and eventually awakened to escape from super powers. Until now, it is still known as one of the most terrifying killing gods in the universe.

The Ziwei civilization also suffered heavy losses due to this defection.

In addition to the life of the betrayal of the divine civilization, the combination and mutation between life may also mutate into the divine life. The half-orc of the Baixing civilization is the best example.

There are also some life mutations, even if the probability of such mutations is small, but the cardinal number of the universe life is too large, so there are still some god-level life in the universe except for the god-level civilization, but the descendants of these god-level lives cannot be awakened. Inheritance, cannot be a god-like civilization group like Baixing civilization,

Many leaders of large-scale cosmic forces are created by life with sudden superpowers. Life with terrible superpowers, in a single-armor battle, is just like an existence, and can easily become a top-level armour division.

"Can you determine what this superpower is? Which civilization?" Asked a dark-eyed male person on another earth-like planet in the Shigan system.

The members around him were a little uncertain.

"Like mind control, and it's uncertain. Or is it a kind of super power that affects the Warframe? It is known that there are only two lives with similar super powers."

One member voiced awe.

"Master Zidi and Tong Qing."

"Will it be Zidi himself or Zidi's offspring who avenge Ziwei civilization?" Another member interjected.

The black pupil man was in deep thought, and after a while, he began to say, "He is not Zidi, and it is even less likely that he is Master Tong Qing. Check the information of this Warframe Division."

"OK." The member in charge of the intelligence nodded in agreement.

...

The Ziwei Civilization Armor Division was killed during the battle, and the armor and corpses were taken away.

This news swept through every corner of the Shigan Galaxy like a storm, and even the entire universe.

The armored division of the god-level civilization was killed by an unknown armored division in the battle. This is a blatant attack on the face of the Ziwei civilization. As one of the oldest god-level civilizations, the Ziwei civilization will never give up.

Shi Ganxing is in an eventful season. This battle has turned the undercurrent of the undersea into a rough sea.

Some people who smelled the wrong life and began to escape from the Shigan galaxy in a super-light spaceship. The battle between god-level civilizations, once the fish caught in the pond, the fish in the entire pond will die. Now the Shigan galaxy is this pond.

The seven god-level civilizations converge. This battle is just the beginning. No one knows what will happen in the future.

Soon, the wanted order of Lagerstroemia civilization appeared as expected by many lives, with a reward of 5 billion stars, and the whole universe wanted to kill Zeqi's mysterious Warframe Division.

Shi Ganxing became lively, looking frantically for the shadow of the mysterious Warframe Division.

Chen Mo, who is looking for the outside, is wearing Jinge and Gray twenty-one wearing battle armor in the Shigan Galaxy planet trading market. The armor of him and Jing Ge has been modified by the shell of the body, and the head has been converted into a beast. The body is larger, and the body and appearance of the original armor are completely invisible. If necessary, the extra spare parts can be discarded at any time. .

In addition to the armor, the three were also disguised as blue-eared aliens.

In order to prevent detection, he must change his original appearance. Although he has not been found by the Star Safety Agency, if found, he will cause endless trouble, so he must be easy to disguise and temporarily avoid investigation.

The planet trading market is a place dedicated to buying and selling planets. It is as common as buying and selling land on earth. In the vast and boundless universe, land is the least valuable thing.

The Shigan galaxy has a diameter of 110,000 light years, nearly 300 billion planets, more than 80 billion terrestrial planets, and many barren and lifeless planets.

Many civilizations set up cosmic space territories to confirm the ownership of the planets, and these planets can be leased and sold.

The three Chen Mo entered the building of the planet's trading market, and a blue-faced old man greeted with a smile: "Hello, are you here to rent the planet? I can work for you."

"Lend a small terrestrial planet." Chen Mo said.

"Okay, please follow me."

The star intermediary old man led Chen Mo into a spacious hall, and transferred the information of the planet that met the conditions through holographic projection and put it in front of Chen Mo.

The diameter, gravity, atmospheric concentration, surface temperature difference, and location of the planet are noted above, which are very detailed.

"Which one do you need?"

"Just this one, lease for a month."

Chen Mo pointed to a terrestrial planet slightly larger than the earth. The planet is brown, the gravity is almost the same as that of the earth, and the environment is relatively peaceful.

That position is one light month away from Shi Ganxing. There is no life planet on the star. It is a remote suburb of Shi Ganxing area. He has a spacecraft with super-light-speed space curvature.

Counting the time, he can make enough money by staying for one month, replenishing antimatter energy and leaving.

After the evolution of the body, Chen Mo no longer had to rely on oxygen to maintain his survival needs, and Jing Ge did not need it anymore. Gray 31 also adapted to an oxygen-free environment, so they are not oxygen-rich planets, and they can still pass.

"The entire planet is leased for a month, for a total of one million stars." The star intermediary old man looked at the price and said. The farther away from the bustling planet, the lower the price of the planet, so Chen Mo rented the entire planet is not expensive.

"Do you need a nano robot for construction?"

"No, I have."

Chen Mo declined the recommendation of the old man of the intermediary of the planet, paid the planet's rental fee, got the coordinates of the planet and the security satellite password, and left the planet trading market with two people, Jing Ge and Gray.

chapters.title: Chapter 829: : Identity Exposure
chapters.body:
Chapter 829: : Identity Exposure

"Master Thunder, the mysterious Warframe Division has news."

"Oh? Tell me."

Thunder closed the holographic light curtain in front of him and turned to look at the person.

Ke looked a little excited, because this time she found something incredible.

With Thunder's permission, Ke quickly put the information in her hand into the projection of the room, and the news she wanted to say was on it. There are two photos on the screen. If Chen Mo is here, he will definitely recognize the photos, that is his [Free Black Ant] and Jing Ge's [Beast].

"Who is this Warframe?" Thunder asked, looking around.

"This black-red armor is the one that killed Zecchi."

Ke clicked it, and brought up the picture of Chen Mo and Zeqi fighting, intelligently captured the shape of Chen Mo's armor, put it on the contrast plate, and removed the painting, it has become very obvious.

The painting has changed, but the shape and structure have not changed.

"This division is called Chen Mo. Soon after he came to Shi Ganxing, the data shows that he saved the prince of Lvhe civilization as soon as he arrived in Shiganxing. In return, the king of Lvhe civilization sent him a small war armor company named Xinxing Warframe Company. It is understood that he is also followed by a Warframe Division, but the strength is unknown. "

Ke released all the information he found. This is when she obtained Zeqi's information, she found that Zeqi traced a black-red warframe in the Warframe Trading City, and accidentally found that the shape of the warframe was similar, so she thought about the comparison. I did not expect to have such a big gain. .

The Thunder began to meditate.

One of the Warframe Divisions is a top master, and the other is unknown in strength. There are various indications that the two may come from a top power and their strength cannot be underestimated.

Shi Ganxing is very lively and interesting.

For a long time, Thunder looked up: "Do you know where they are now?"

"Unclear, their whereabouts are currently unknown, but we have photos of their looks." Ke brought up two photos, which looked like Chen Mo and Jing Ge.

Thunder shook his head.

For him, the photo is useless. Now changing the appearance condition is too simple. Some small technologies can complete it. The other party has to change the appearance. They ca n’t find the other person by their appearance, and they are not sure if the photo is the other person ’s true appearance. .

"Knowing exposure, hiding."

Bai Ye looked at the armor of Chen Mo and Jing Ge, his face was not good-looking.

She has recognized that they are the two mysterious Warframe Divisions who took away the target of the Demon Flame civilization last time. Although they are painted differently, they have the same appearance. Last time Jing Ge killed a senior Warframe division of the Demon Flame civilization, making her feel the oppression of death and shocking the audience. This time Chen Mo killed the senior Warframe Division of Ziwei civilization.

They confirmed Chen Mo's identity, and when they went to investigate again, the other party was no longer a Star Warrior Company. In order not to frighten the snake, they did not dare to act rashly.

Even if the other party is still hidden in the Shigan galaxy, with a span of 110,000 light years, 300 billion planets, and countless lives, they will not be able to find it in a short time.

"Both armour divisions are top armour divisions, a little troublesome." Egret was a little hesitant.

Make sure that the opponent is not the Warframe Division of the Seven Divine-level civilizations, which means that a strong force from the eighth party has joined Shigan Xing's chase. Last time they took away the target of the Demon Flame Civilization, and this time killed the Armor Division of the Ziwei Civilization. They don't think this is a coincidence.

Two top warframe divisions, but they are currently the most powerful side in Shi Ganxing.

"Leave them alone, what's going on in the Moyan civilization?" Egret asked the intelligence personnel next to him.

"No major action has been found for the time being, but it is certain that the other party has hidden those R & D personnel." Intelligence personnel said: "They are waiting for the major civilizations to give them conditions for negotiation."

"It should be to hide the chips and increase the negotiation capital." Egret said coldly.

The magic flame civilization stopped them together. When they announced the news, they would attract people from the other six civilizations to thoroughly stir up the water of Shi Ganxing so as to maximize their gains.

Appetite is too big, and you are not afraid to die.

Didi ...

The communicator sounded, and when seeing the caller ID, the egret had a complete look and turned on the projection of the communicator.

A beautiful woman appeared in the light curtain. She had fox ears, her eyes were coquettish, her eyes were like water, the woman was sexy, and the white ditch in front of her was tempting.

The coquettish and noble style perfectly blends in a woman, making people feel embarrassed when they see it.

Seeing the half-orc woman in the light curtain, the egret looked full of respect and bowed down: "Mrs."

Foxwoman nodded: "How is Shi Ganxing now?"

"The situation is a bit tense, with their own plans and plans." Egret said: "We found that the Warframe Division that killed Ziwei ’s civilization is probably a top-level Warframe Division, and there is a companion, and it may be top War Armor Division. The target of the last Evil Flame civilization escape was they took away. The current speculation may be the eighth party. "

The egret put Chen Mo's photos and armor information on the projection light curtain.

"Oh? This is an accident." Foxwoman browsed the information and said quietly: "If there is an eighth party, there is one more variable, but it should not matter, you will follow the plan I gave."

"Okay, ma'am." The egret agreed seriously.

...

On a fifth planet in a remote galaxy one light moon away from Shi Ganxing, a large building stands alone on the barren land. This is a building built by nano-robots, and there is a large airport next to the hyper-light space curvature spacecraft. .

This is Zong Saturn, which is also a place rented by Chen Mo for temporary shelter.

Jinge and Gray 21 are still training. On this barren planet, there is no small space to restrain them. Jinge can release his hands and feet to train.

After this period of devil training, Grey Twenty-one has made great progress. At least he moved this special ability instantly, and he began to take control. And now, after teaching him assassination techniques and killing techniques.

Jing Ge puts his own experience in hunting and killing wild beasts on assassinations. In essence, the hunters in the jungle can also be regarded as a kind of "Assassin".

As for the little mother beast, she sat in the building window and watched them train leisurely.

"Jing Ge, I'll go to Shi Ganxing." Chen Mo saw the two stopped training and passed a message to Jing Ge.

"Well." Jing Ge said a little.

Shi Ganxing was killed because of the Battlegear Division of the Lagerstroemia civilization, and the situation is now very tense. Like a gunpowder barrel that may explode at any time, they are afraid of each other, so a short-term balance appears, and no one dares to break this balance.

Chen Mo landed in front of a full-body black building, guided by the robot, very good light speed spacecraft, and followed the robot to the city next to it. His armor and appearance were disguised, no one could recognize him, and he didn't have to worry about being recognized.

After changing his identity, he is now as usual.

This is not Shi Ganxing. It is a satellite of Shi Ganxing. Bai Yunxing is slightly smaller than the earth. It belongs to an oxygen-rich planet and has a beautiful environment. The environment here is very prosperous and the scenery is beautiful. There is a city of nearly 20 million square kilometers, Black City.

Black City occupies half the land area of the entire planet and is unique. I heard that he can find any materials he needs, including some special materials. Chen Mo is now in Heicheng Building, the center of Heicheng.

Three sets of blue-grade armor were sold, and now Chen Mo has 850 million, and doubling it again is almost enough to fill the spacecraft's anti-material energy costs.

Entering the Black City Building, a cute little flying robot arrives at him.

"Hi distinguished guest, do you need any help?"

"I want to buy dark matter." Chen Mo said.

"Honored guest, dark matter is on the 207th floor." An autopilot came over carrying Chen Mo and flew towards the 207th floor under the guidance of a small robot.

The Dark Matter was bought to make Indigo Warframe.

He needs to make a set of indigo-grade armor for Grey Twenty-one, and at the same time make an indigo-scale armor for sale.

The price of the indigo armor is ten times that of the blue armor. Just selling a set of indigo war armor is enough for him to replenish antimatter energy. Shi Ganxing is now a land of right and wrong, Chen Mo just wants to leave here quickly.

"One hundred million stars and one gram of dark matter." The small robot brought Chen to the dark matter, which was packed in a special device and wrapped in a transparent liquid.

"It's 6 mg." Chen Mo said.

Dark matter is like the material's 'rare earth', 6 mg is enough for him to build two sets of armor. Chen Mo started to buy the required materials and parts according to his own list.

chapters.title: Chapter 830: : Buy Some Snacks
chapters.body:
Chapter 830: : Buy Some Snacks

Dongdui smiled at Chen Mo and was very friendly.

This is a big customer.

As the business director of Heicheng, from the time Chen Mo purchased dark matter, he was informed by the news and hurried down.

Because the special matter of dark matter is almost the top material matter in the universe. Generally, this material is used by top scientific research teams to develop and formulate the required materials.

When he saw Chen Mo, his eyes lit up. He has been operating the Black City for many years, and has seen countless figures of various levels. The life of the blue-skinned pointed ears gives him a very special feeling, and the armor he wears on the other side is definitely high-quality goods.

The first time the other party came, they purchased 800 million yuan worth of materials and spare parts, which are all top-level materials and accessories. This is generally the case only for professional companies.

From the materials purchased by the other side, there is a Warframe design team or Warframe company behind the other side.

This kind of customer is a big customer. If they can cooperate with each other, it will be beneficial to both of them. They have one more stable Warframe designer customer, and the other has a stable supply channel of advanced material accessories.

The technical staff of Warframe Designers is the most popular life of major civilizations. No matter which civilization they go to, they will be very popular.

This kind of life needs to use its own wisdom to integrate various high-tech into a set of warframes. This requires very comprehensive scientific research capabilities. Every civilization, the team of warframe designers, is almost the smartest group in that civilization. one.

"Sir, do you have any other needs?" Dong asked.

Chen Mo glanced at the brown-skinned middle-aged man with big eyes and nodded gently: "Are you renting a research institute here?"

"Institute for lease?" Dong Dong eyes brightened: "Yes, we in Heicheng provide the most complete service from materials to technical equipment. The institute and workshop equipment are all available. Industrial system equipment. From low-level to high-level, you can meet your various research needs. "

The lease of this institute confirms Dongxin's idea even more. The other party is a Warframe designer and may be a ‘wild’ Warframe designer.

There are many articles to do inside.

If this Warframe Designer has no influence, they can solicit for their own use.

After linking Chen Mo's Warframe communications with East Link, he started the Warframe and flew up, leaving Chen He with the Black City Mansion: "Sir, what level of research is needed?"

"What's the highest level of fees?" Chen Mo followed East, paying attention to the black city below from time to time.

"The highest level?" Dongxi Yixi said, "The highest level research institute is one million a day. For the first time, sir, we have a 20% discount."

Chen Mo uses the most advanced research institute, which shows that what he is going to manufacture must be a blue warframe, which already belongs to a senior warframe designer. Senior Warframe designers, wherever they go, are rare talents.

Chen Mo thought for a while and said, "Live for fifteen days."

The two men flew at an ultra-high speed of about 1,600 kilometers before reaching their destination.

Below is a research base. Overlooking from a high altitude, hundreds of research sites can be seen. Each research base is fully equipped and covers an area of more than 20 square kilometers. All research bases here are for rent.

It must be said that in the context of the Universe, many business models have become special.

"Sir, can I introduce to you the use of the research base?"

Landing with Chen Mo at the entrance of a senior research base, Dong introduced it enthusiastically, speculating that Chen Mo might be a senior Warframe designer, and he became more eager.

"Every advanced research base has complete supporting equipment, from heavy industry to precision parts processing equipment, including material synthesis equipment. The base has artificial intelligence. If you are not assured of the artificial intelligence of the base, you can embed your own personal artificial intelligence assistant, Management system of the base during the lease.

Our research base uses a quantum security system, which is an unbreakable security system. During your research, all technical data will be protected by the quantum security system, and only your personal authorization and password can access the data. After the lease is over, you only need to choose to delete the technical data stored during use, and it will completely disappear, and no one will be able to access your data without worrying about data security issues. "

After the introduction, Dong handed Chen Mo an identity card.

"This is the ID card of the advanced research base. With this ID card, you can enter any laboratory in the research base and use all the equipment."

"Thank you." Chen Moshun took the ID card and looked at the research base. On earth, research bases that require energy and material resources to build can be rented here and are fully equipped.

"Sir, do you ship the materials you bought directly to your research base?" Dong asked.

"Yes."

"Okay, sir, I wish you a good harvest." Dong Ke resigned and left, and it is not appropriate to send out a solicitation message. For fifteen days, he can slowly contact the other party.

Dong left, and Chen Mo contacted Zong Saturn's Gray Twenty-one.

"Twenty-one, you go into the scan room of the spaceship. I will use your physical data to customize a set of armor for you."

"Okay, sir." Gray Twenty was overjoyed and nodded excitedly.

"Jing Ge, I will make a battle armor here in fifteen days. I will let the spacecraft fly back to Saturn on your own. Be careful, you have been in the limelight recently. Many forces may be looking for us. Please contact me if you have any questions." Chen Mo told Jing Ge said.

"Well." Jing Ge nodded slightly. "Buy some snacks, potatoes."

"..."

Hanging up the communication, Chen Mo took out a hard disk, inserted it into the management system, and began to take over the artificial intelligence and robot control of the research base.

...

Lagerstroemia civilization.

A black hole with a diameter of 40 million kilometers has been floating in space for a long time. Against the bright edge of the edge, the shaded part in the middle, like a hole in the universe, is like a door to another universe.

Beyond the edge of the black hole, a space-curvature spacecraft is floating in space and seems to be waiting for something.

Suddenly, a small black spot emerged from the black hole, a small special spaceship.

The spacecraft quickly stopped by the space curvature spacecraft and slowly opened. A tall figure appeared on the spacecraft, a purple charm that had disappeared for a while.

At this time, the temperament of Ziyun has changed, becoming even colder. The purple fluorescence on her skin has become brighter, mysterious and noble, a pair of purple eyes, or the ancient well-being of thousands of years, it seems that nothing can arouse a trace of her mood swings.

The lines drawn by the special tights are softer than before, and the figure is the perfect golden ratio.

Zi Yun looked back at the black hole.

Looking at the time now, it's been a few years. She just felt a moment in the black hole.

The gravitational twisted spacetime of the black hole makes her seem to have a momentary dream with endless pain and suffering. The horrible gravity tears every molecule on her at all times. The horrible torture is beyond description, as if it could be torn into particles at any time.

"What's the matter?" Ziyun asked coldly.

"Master Ziyun, the Lord of the Stars ordered to waive your punishment. There is a special task that requires you to perform and make up for it." Zimu said in awe.

For some reason, he felt that Ziyun had changed, a kind of transformation.

This black hole-level punishment seems to have transformed Ziyun to a higher level. Before, she just felt that she was cold and noble. Now she can clearly feel an invisible oppression in front of her.

"What task?"

"Zeqi was killed, it is likely to be the Warframe Division of Maotou's organization last time." Zimu released the video of Zheqi and Chen Mo fighting, and also investigated, Chen Mo's appearance information and war A message.

"It's him." Ziyun's cold purple eyes waved slightly.

Chen Mo is the life she encountered last time on Qingshuixing. At that time, she just felt special and did not expect to see it again in this way.

The low-level life of Qingshuixing escaped the control of the three-eyed civilization. The suspected cat-headed accomplice disappeared in the space. Now he kills Zeqi, Ziyun simply scans information about Chen Mo.

"The magic flame civilization of the Shigan galaxy successfully developed the super power development technology. Zeqi, as a messenger, was killed in the battle with him." Zimu briefly explained the situation.

"Star Master lets you go to the Shigan Galaxy and win superpower development technology."

??? As Zimu introduced the mission to Ziyun, the armored communication device rang. Seeing the contact person, Zimu's expression was tense, and she hurriedly connected. After a few serious murmurs, she hung up the communicator and looked up at Ziyun.

"Does the mission change?" Ziyun asked coldly.

Zimu's expression was very serious: "The news from the Shigan Galaxy just returned, and the magic flame civilization released the big news."

chapters.title: Chapter 841: : Black City Auction
chapters.body:
Chapter 841: : Black City Auction

The magic flame civilization released the news. Sixteen days later, the super-capacity development technology will be put on the Black City auction for technology exchange technology auction. The technologies exchanged include indigo-class warframe technology, dark matter extraction technology, material technology, super-light speed space curvature spacecraft technology, and constellation-level weapon technology.

Any top technology is within the scope of the exchange.

Whoever has the best technology and the best conditions, the magic flame civilization will use super power development technology to exchange with whom.

Indigo Warframe technology, including the full set of Warframe technology, is the Warframe technology only mastered by Indigo Civilization, and it is also a technology that can be upgraded to Indid Civilization.

Although some civilizations in the universe will sell indigo-grade armor, many blue-level civilizations do not master the design technology of indigo-grade armor. If you want to indigo-grade armor, you need to buy it from the big forces. However, many indigo-class civilizations will never sell indigo-level armor to advanced civilizations, because indigo-level armor is also the most advanced technology in indigo-level civilization.

In addition, dark matter extraction technology is also a technology blocked by the monopoly of large civilizations, it is impossible for middle-level civilization to possess, let alone other technologies.

The development of cosmic civilization has put many civilizations ahead, and technology has also been developed.

The Cosmos Alliance has management of intellectual property protection, and it is very strict. Many special advanced technologies have long been monopolized by large civilizations and forces. Even the blue-level civilizations do not have the technology of indigo warframes. If it is misappropriated, it will face the joint sanctions of top civilization and divine civilization.

As soon as the exchange conditions of the Demon Flame civilization appeared, it again caused a lot of shock.

Want technology rather than territory and star coins, in this regard, many people admire the wisdom of the magic flame civilization.

To gain a foothold in the universe, territories and sterling coins are all imaginary. Technology is the hardest-core wealth that cannot be bought with money, and these technologies can be taken away at any time. As long as the magic flame civilization has the top technology he needs, then it can be determined that the rise of a new indigo civilization is inevitable.

The magic trick of the magic flame civilization almost disrupted the plans of all god-level civilizations.
