Push the god-level civilization that was secretly stronger in the dark to the bright surface at once, like in turbid water, and drop a big rock again.

The auction half a month later became the focus of the All-Cosmic Alliance.

The exchanged objects no longer include god-level civilizations. Other top civilizations can also offer exchange conditions at the auction. As long as the conditions meet the requirements of the magic flame civilization, any civilization can obtain super-power development technology.

The dark tide in Shi Ganxing is raging again. Some top civilizations who secretly pay attention to the magic flame civilization also want to join the auction exchange in an unknown way. As long as the identity of the transaction is kept secret, the identity will not cause trouble.

...

Black City Research Base.

Chen Mo carefully examined the two sets of holographic projection designs.

A set of thin battle armors with soft lines and no more flamboyant designs, this is customized for Grey Twenty-one. The other is an adaptive armor, which is adjustable in size and body.

He has rich experience in designing warframes and masters top-level warframe engine technology, so manufacturing warframes is not difficult for Chen Mo now.

His main consideration is the positioning of the Warframe, and the required materials and weapons are synthesized according to the positioning.

After contact during this period of time, Chen Mo found that Grey Twenty-one was very clever. Maybe because of his long-term use as a test body by the demonic civilization, he was able to endure hardships. He received Jing Ge's super-intensive training. He never complained. Strong. And with less contact with the outside world, the character is relatively simple.

In this regard, he satisfied both Chen Mo and Jing Ge.

Gray twenty-one's super power has been figured out, which is instantaneous movement.

This ability is very special and requires a lot of mental energy, so Gray Twenty-One cannot move too far in an instant, only in a certain range, and the number of uses is limited, otherwise it will cause brain fatigue.

This is the characteristic of every super-powered person, so is Chen Mo. Overloading can also cause brain fatigue.

But as an assassin, proper use of teleportation can achieve unexpected results. Chen Mo plans to build a special armor for him based on the ability of Gray Twenty-one.

[God] After the permissions are turned on, open technology has reached a very high level, and more advanced technologies are readily available. But now Chen Mo only wants to go back to the earth, and hasn't concentrated on the development of those technologies.

However, some materials technology and other necessary simple technologies, Chen Mo can be manufactured at any time.

[God] Authority is the task of creating [quantum life].

This task is highly technical and targets itself. Chen Mo must be fully prepared to confirm that after returning to the earth, there will be a stable environment and security before Chen Mo dares to launch this plan.

The task of using yourself as an experimental subject is, in the eyes of the Earthlings, simply heartbroken. But after experiencing the vastness of the universe, Chen Mo has turned aside many things.

Some of the moral standards of humans on Earth do not apply to the rules of the universe.

If human beings undergo natural evolution, they need billions of years of natural selection, and the universe will not give life so comfortable and smooth evolutionary conditions. Many lives and civilizations in the universe use technology to accelerate and assist the evolution of living organisms, and superpower development technology is the most typical representative.

Back to the study of Warframes, Chen Mo admired the Warframes in front of him as he appreciated his art works.

Grey Twenty-one Warframe is a set of Warframe comparable to Jinge [Beast], which belongs to two different areas.

Top-level battle armor, dark material materials are standard. At this level, space weapons may be used in the battle of some top-level armors. Dark-material war armor can withstand the squeeze of space, so it is a unique choice.

Similarly, assassin-type armor, the material must be stealth and camouflage material.

Positioning is a special armor of the Assassin's Armor. Stealth and camouflage are standard, and can be detected by the opponent's radar. The armor's sneak attack ability will be weakened. Chen Mo found better stealth camouflage material than his [Free Black Ant] in the science and technology library.

Dynamic positioning is fast and flexible.

Warframe must have the function of missing a shot and turning away.

"Why dog fight?"

"Because I have quantum stealth, camouflage mode, super flexible maneuver, super fast flying speed, super melee skills ..."

"Wrong! Because you are stupid!"

The positioning of the Assassin Warframe is not a dog fight, but an unexpected assassination operation. Assassination is unsuccessful. Escape is the best choice, so escape speed is a very important condition. Chen Mo changed the engine he mastered. The main functions were speed. As for steering, it was only necessary to rely on the auxiliary engine.

As for weapons, far laser weapons and short laser pulse melee weapons are standard. Other weapons are not required for assassins. The focus is on weapons that assist in assassination and escape.

"Mu Nu, start to manufacture the parts needed for the Warframe." Confirming that the design of the Warframe is okay, Chen Mo gave Momo 2 a command.

"Okay, Moe."

Because of the black city auction, Dong now says he is busy. The magic flame civilization put the super power development technology on the Black City auction, which made them the center of the universe's attention.

In order to raise the popularity of the Black City, the group behind the Black City chose to undertake this unprecedented auction, so now the entire Black City is preparing for the auction.

However, Chen Mo came to him for consultation, and he still took a moment to come out. During this time, he basically determined that Chen Mo was a senior armor designer, and senior armor designers were everywhere.

"Mr. Mo Chen, what can I do for you?" Dong asked Chen Mo when he saw it. Mo Chen is the name Chen Mo told him.

"Do you have any good sales channels here?" Chen Mo asked.

"There are many channels. Shi Ganxing's War Armor Trading City is everywhere. Mr. Mo Chen was made from War Armor?" Dong was curious. War Armor is the most popular thing. As long as the War Armor parameters and Good technology, never worry about selling, and Chen Mo chose to ask him.

"It is being assembled and manufactured, and it will be ready soon. Ask in advance." Chen Mo said.

"Mr. Mochen's Warframe, what level is it? I can help you take a look and estimate the price." Dong was curious, Chen Mo, the level of the Warframe designer.

"The top battle armor, the parameter is probably this." Chen Mo released the set of armor to be sold through holographic projection.

"Top ... Top Warframe?"

East's eyes burst, his eyes almost fell out of his eyes.

I thought it was a high-level warframe, and the result was a top-level warframe. There was a big technical gap between them.

There are very few top-level armors that have been circulated. Most of them are in the hands of big civilizations and powers. A team can design top-level armors, and any one of the top powers can get the best treatment. Even if it is a divine civilization, these teams will be accepted, which shows how precious such teams are.

"This is a self-adaptive top-level warframe. As long as human and beast-like life within two meters and five meters, and the body size is not particularly large, it can be used, and its size can be adjusted to adapt."

Chen Mo began to deform the projected hologram.

After a while, I stopped.

"Director Dong, are there any good buyers?" Chen Mo asked after he demonstrated.

"There are a lot of buyers. If you want to maximize the profit, there is a special place."

Dong Pingfu was shocked before introducing Chen Mo.

"Seven days later, we will hold an auction in Heicheng. Have you heard about the magic flame civilization? They will also sell superpower development technology at the early auction. At that time, there will be all gods and top civilizations from the universe. Life. Their demand for top-tier armor is high, and you can maximize the benefits of this suit. If you can make the armor in 7 days and complete the test, we can help you put it on the auction floor. "

Chen Mo nodded for a moment before thinking: "Just five days later, it can be almost completed."

chapters.title: Chapter 832: : [Swallow] And [Grayscale]
chapters.body:
Chapter 832: : [Swallow] And [Grayscale]

Over time, news about Black City auctions has been raging.

The business group behind this black city auction is so aggressively propaganda that Shi Ganxing has attracted the attention of most of the top forces in the Universe, coupled with the god-level civilization, this is an unprecedented auction.

According to rumors from the outside world, in order to win the super-capacity development technology of the Moyan civilization, Heitong Civilization has prepared a large number of top-level technologies as exchange chips. These include the top-level armor technology of the black pupil civilization, a variety of top-level materials, dark matter extraction technology, and the constellation-level weapon technology most desired by the magic flame civilization. In addition, a large number of star coins and galaxy territories will be exchanged.

As long as the magic flame civilization obtains these technologies, it will only be a matter of time until it develops into a top civilization.

However, other god-level civilizations are not to be outdone. They test their opponent's conditional bottom line through various channels, whether they release their own conditions, true or false.

The Shigan galaxy gathers the eyes of the entire universe.

It started with the superpower development technology of the Demon Flame Civilization, and then the senior Warframe Division of the Ziwei Civilization was killed, then the Black City auction of the technology auction technology proposed by the Demon Flame Civilization, and now the seven god-level civilizations compete for hegemony.

The stars of the galaxy galaxy gather.

Among the seven god-level civilizations, the most active is the Baixing civilization. Baixing civilization releases a variety of true, false, and high-profile news, and it is an inevitable attitude towards superpower development technology.

The most low-key is the endless sea civilization and the corpse civilization.

Ghost civilization is arrogant and arrogant. It is the hardest one among the seven god-level civilizations. This time it did not make a high-profile appearance. It seems that it is not interested in superpower development technology.

Endless sea civilization and dark forest civilization, because the prince of the dragon was killed, are engaged in a fierce confrontation. And from the beginning to the end of the endless sea civilization, there is no obvious attitude to rob superpower development technology.

There are rumors from the outside world that the Prophet of the Endless Sea Civilization foresees Shi Ganxing's trip. The Endless Sea will not have much to gain, so he is not ready to compete, but only sends people here symbolically. No one knows true or false.

As a traditional hegemon, the once most powerful god-level civilization, the Lagerstroemia civilization that created the Warframe system, was not too strong and had a relatively calm attitude. It did not join the high-profile battle of the White Star civilization, the Black pupil civilization, and the Thor culture. Later, it was confirmed that Ziwei civilization sent a new messenger to Shi Ganxing.

All kinds of news have become more and more chaotic over time. All forces know that the final confrontation will be at the Black City auction.

Black City Research Base.

A set of battle armor was placed on the base's experimental platform.

Dong looked at the armor in front of him, the black and white paint, and the design was a little different, which is one of the forms of the holographic image demonstration he saw last time.

It is an adaptive warframe and has no fixed form, only design concepts.

He has been the director of the Black City for many years and has been seen in the world, but he has n’t seen much of the indigo warframe. This top-level warframe is a precious thing in the top civilization. Only masters and core personnel will be equipped. Warframe divisions are not equipped with top warframes.

"It's called [Swallow]." Chen Mo said.

"Swallow?" Dong looked at the armor. "What does swallow mean?"

"My hometown is a very flexible bird." Chen Mo said: "It is a warframe designed for melee. It has 38 engines large and small. The short pulse laser weapon reaches 1.3 watts. The material is made of dark material synthetic materials. It can withstand 150 nanoseconds of ultra-high-energy laser exposure for ten kilometers. This time is enough for the armor to activate the energy shield, which can effectively avoid being attacked by long-range attacks. "

[Swallow] At present, there are only laser weapons and matching melee weapons [Swallowtail Spikes]. Other weapons are mainly in the form of empty slots, providing the function of freely carrying weapons. Warframe divisions can freely equip their favorite weapons.

At the hip position of the armor, there are two shark-fin tails. In addition, there are similar movable shark-fin structures at the thighs and calves. This is the tail of the "swallow", which can make the direction of the armor more flexible.

If the beast-like equipment is equipped with the armor, this tail component can be adaptively composed into the tail portion of the beast-like.

"Excellent melee performance and flexibility are its biggest advantages." Chen Mo said: "At the same time, it is a zero-latency brain control, ultra-high-speed maneuvering, which can accelerate up to three-fifths of the speed of light. In addition, its short-distance storage It can burst into the sky and it is very good. It can reach microseconds and kilometers. "

Chen Mo said it briefly.

The east look is amazing. There is a gap between the top battle armor and the advanced battle armor. The advanced battle armor is an outbreak of at most milliseconds and the top battle armor is already an outbreak of microseconds.

There is a word difference, but the performance is a thousand times difference, not at all.

"Are you sure you want to sell this suit?" Dongdu was hesitant. Chen Mo chose to sell such a good suit instead of using it by himself.

"Sell." Chen Mo nodded.

He has now spent all his coins, and he needs to sell this set of armor to get the cost of supplementing anti-material energy. Now the Shigan galaxy is very unstable, Chen Mo just wants to hurry away from this right and wrong place and rush back to Earth.

"Your warframe, our professional auctioneer will conduct an evaluation auction. This is an invitation letter from the Black City auction the day after tomorrow, and the auction will begin to enter the auction site with the invitation letter."

Dong handed a card to Chen Mo, a VIP invitation.

"Thank you." Chen Mo was polite to accept the invitation.

Dong Chen sighed as Chen Mo left.

Since knowing that Chen Mo is a top-tier Warframe designer, he has given up the idea of recruiting Chen Mo for his own use.

Such top-tier armor designers will never look after their little temple. If he wants, the divine civilization will accept him and get a place in it.

There are still two days before the start of the Black City auction. The price of the top armor is not less than 4 billion. As long as the armor is sold, he can add antimatter to leave Shi Ganxing.

Jing Ge is still training Grey 21. These two training madmen are a little scared even when Chen Mo sees it.

When the spacecraft landed, Jinge stopped and let the gray twenty-one pass.

Grey Twenty-One seemed to be free, lying directly on the pits of the desolate land. The more he trains, the more he discovers Mr. Jing Ge ’s horror. He is a pervert. After training for so long, he has never resisted more than three moves in the hands of Jing Ge.

Jing Ge allowed him to attack him at any time, as long as he could hurt him, he was a teacher. As a result, he has been living a tragic life since then.

"Twenty-one, come here." Chen Mo beckoned.

"Oh, oh ..."

Gray Twenty-one struggled, endured the soreness of the body, and disappeared in situ instantly, appearing in front of Chen Mo. After being squeezed by Jing Ge, he can now flexibly use 'momentary movement'.

"Sir." Gray twenty one stood still, saying respectfully.

"Give you customized warframes."

Chen Mo opened the box in her hand, revealing the true colors of the armor.

The appearance of silver-gray is similar to that of gray-twenty-one skin, but this set of armor can be camouflaged. It can be transformed into a camouflage of the same color as the environment.

"Thank you, sir." Gray Twenty-one looked excited when he saw the battle armor.

This is the first time he has his own Warframe. The escaped senior battle armor last time was just not fit, so he was hit by a huge coma.

He chose to follow Chen Mo, betting on it. He did not expect that Chen Mo would take risks to accept him, and specially customized such a high-level armor for him.

An inexplicable emotion stuck in my heart, looking at Chen Mo's eyes, becoming more revered. During the experiment of the Demon Flame civilization, he suffered all kinds of sufferings. Chen Mo was the first person to treat him so well.

"Its name is [Grayscale], to store identity information, and later it belongs to you." Chen Mo patted Gray Twenty-One's shoulder and motioned for him to pass.

"it is good."

Gray Twenty-one didn't say much, he knew that it was better to use actions to repay Mr.

[Grayscale] Under the attention of Chen Mo and Jing Ge, slowly cover the body of Gray Twenty-one, and the moment the mask was covered, the silver-white eyes lighted up, and Gray Twenty-one's heart was so passionate that it felt unprecedentedly powerful.

This is his Warframe, the first set truly belongs to him.

However, Chen Mo did not expect that the gray twenty-one he would retain would become the most powerful assassin in the assassin world in the future, achieving the legend of a generation of assassin warframe divisions.

"training."

Jing Ge's cold voice, like the same pot of ice water pouring down, the sad twenty-one feeling of gray twenty-one fell from heaven to the abyss, back to reality again, the day of hardship has just begun.

Bai Yunxing has entered the final preparation stage of the Black City auction.

Two days later, the All-Union Alliance's eye-catching Black City auction was held as scheduled.

chapters.title: Chapter 833: : Black City Auction
chapters.body:
Chapter 833: : Black City Auction

The Black City Auction House is Shi Ganxing's largest auction house. Among the Shi Ganxing, the largest city is undoubtedly the Warframe Trading City, but the status of the Black City is still irreplaceable.

Heicheng is a commercial city built on a land area of 20 million square kilometers on a half planet. From materials to warframes, all goods are readily available. Buy warframes at Shiganxing. Wargames City is the first choice. Other goods, Black City is the first choice.

The Black City auction house is also very famous in Shi Ganxing because it often auctions all kinds of rare commodities from all over the universe.

Perhaps in the entire Shishi constellation, or even the Universe Alliance, Heicheng is just a trivial business group, but under the attention of superpower development technology, Heicheng is now the most attractive destination in the universe at this time.

In Bai Yunxing, the number of spaceships entering and exiting is much less than before. The Star Safety Agency dispatched more than half of the police force to maintain order and alert here, for fear of problems here.

But the police of the Star Safety Agency are very clear that if there is a fight here, they cannot control it.

The lowest level on the field is also the high-level Warframe Division. The lives of the major top-level forces and god-level forces are in Bai Yunxing, and none of them can manage it.

Only those who participated in the auction today can enter Bai Yunxing.

A large number of spacecraft did not land on Bai Yunxing, hovering in space, floating densely, and looking at the past, they were all strangely shaped spacecraft.

Thousands of lives, wearing battle armor, flew from space to the black city of Bai Yunxing.

Everything is in order.

Those who can enter Bai Yunxing are all the high-level armored divisions, top-level lives, and the lives of god-level civilizations. No one is willing to conflict, otherwise it may cause public anger, so no matter whether there is hatred or not, all parties have agreed to do nothing.

At the scene of the Black City auction house, people flowed endlessly. The auction house is very large. It is a 'Colosseum'-style building that can accommodate nearly one million people. It is one hundred kilometers away from the Black City Building and is one of the landmarks of the Black City.

A small spacecraft landed not far above the auction house, and the thunderbolt symbol of the thunder **** civilization was extremely conspicuous. The emergence of small ships attracted the attention of all those who came.

In the spotlight, Thunder flew out of the small spacecraft slowly, and landed slowly in his armor. He was surrounded by the Warrior Division of Thor's civilization following him. To the surrounding eyes, Thunder turned a blind eye, glanced around and flew towards the auction house without any obstruction along the way.

Upon arriving at the door, the Thunder stopped, and his armored communication device rang. Seeing the display of the communication device, the Thunder froze, and his proud face suddenly became serious.

"Master Dan."

The display of the Warframe Communicator is a young humanoid, with Hu Zhazi, looking older than the Thunder, purple electricity flashing in the pupils, and plasma seems to flow on the skin.

"I'm in Shi Ganxing. Heizu Civilization has some secret movements. The teacher is afraid of an accident and will let me come over. Don't say a word."

"Understand." Thunder responded solemnly.

He dared not have any arrogance in front of this man.

"Shi Ganxing will not be peaceful, so be careful about everything." After the admonition was over, the man hung up the communication.

Thunder sorted out his thoughts, and if nothing happened, he didn't even tell them. Just after the box entered the auction house, there was some movement in the back, and for a moment, Thunder turned around.

A small spaceship with a black eye sign appeared at the scene.

Black pupil civilization.

This weird eye is the highest sign. The small spaceship is like a scary black eye pupil. Looking at this eye pupil makes people have a sense of horror staring into the abyss, and it is like being seen through the heart.

"What a coincidence, Thunder, are you welcoming me?" A tone of laughter appeared, a set of colored armor with black eyes appeared, the helmet opened, and a man's face was exposed.

The black-eyed pupil is as heavy as an abyss, with a strange smile on his face, which is a bit ridiculous.

Wu Wu, the genius Warframe Division of the Black-Daughter Civilization, has been rumored to have awakened his super powers and entered the ranks of top Warframe Divisions at a young age, but it has never been confirmed.

But the status of the Witch Witch in the black pupil civilization is also regarded as a top talent. It is almost recognized as a future high-level candidate. It is no surprise that in the future, there will be retirement vacancies in the high-level black pupil civilization, and the witch will fill the gap.

This person's style is vicious and unpredictable.

"Oh!" Thunder smirked strangely. "I forgot to bring a pet from my family and was waiting for it."

As soon as this word came out, the witch's eyes were frozen, staring at the thunder coldly, and the black pupils looked a little weird. Thunder was not to be outdone, and looked at the witch, the thin blue thunderbolt in his eyes flickered.

For a moment, the lively atmosphere cooled down.

The onlookers were sweating, and if the two of them fought, the entire planet would suffer.

"Shall we go and fire?"

In the distance, the white magpie looked excited, and there was an urge to keep the world from chaos. The seven god-level civilizations have inherent checks and balances. During this trip to Shi Ganxing, they were rivals to each other and no one was afraid of anyone.

The egret looked at the scene and shook his head: "Let them fight, we will take advantage of the fishermen."

Suddenly, the scene raged again, and another small spacecraft appeared at the scene. The purple flat-body spaceship has bright crape myrtle flowers on its hull, and purple fluorescence flows, noble and mysterious.

Once the most powerful overlord, Ziwei Civilization arrived.

The Ziwei civilization's senior Warframe Division was killed, and the Warframe and the corpse were taken away, causing a face blow. Later I heard that Lagerstroemia civilization sent another messenger to come, but never showed up.

The appearance of the Ziwei civilized spaceship eased the atmosphere of confrontation at the scene. The thunder and the witch stopped in tacit agreement, and turned to look at the Ziwei civilization spaceship.

Ziyun slowly left the spacecraft, glanced at it coldly, but paused at the positions of Thunder and Witch, and flew to the auction house unattended, and ignored anyone from beginning to end.

"is her."

Chen Ziyun came out by default. A female person he saw on Qing Mercury did not expect to see him here again. She is the ambassador of the Lagerstroemia civilization, and last time appeared with Zeqi on the blue-eyed civilization Mercury.

He didn't know what was happening when he arrived inside.

I am afraid that this auction will not be so simple. Chen Mo has made up his mind that the auction will end and he will leave Shi Ganxing as soon as the auction is over.

With so many great gods converging, Grey Twenty-one is in his hands, and the sooner you leave, the less trouble there will be.

The tit-for-tat between Wu Wu and Thunder has disappeared, staring at Zi Yun's back for a moment, then turning to enter. The atmosphere at the venue returned to normal, and others entered in accordance with the order.

Chen Mo waited for a while and followed the crowd into the auction hall.

Chen Mo has an invitation letter, which belongs to VIP staff. There is an independent small box, the small box is isolated and detected, and there is a single-sided glass in front. No information can be seen inside the box.

Not long after Chen Mo entered the auction house, the low-key endless sea civilization, dark forest civilization, and corpse civilization began to appear one after another. The three companies staggered and did not meet, so there was no contradiction.

It's time for the auction and no one is watching it again.

The black city auction house was full of enthusiasm.

From the top to the bottom, there are various forms of life. The humanoid, beast-like, sea-like, half-orc, and Zerg have low wisdom. On this occasion, there are almost no discussions about this auction item, as well as the super power development technology of the seven major god-level civilizations.

The VIP floor is on the middle floor of the auction house. This position overlooks the auction site and has a wide field of view, which allows you to look around the auction site very well.

Suddenly, the scene of nearly a million participants quieted down.

An old auctioneer wearing a battle armor slowly landed on the stage of the auction floor and stood firmly on the stage. The old auctioneer bowed seriously around him.

"It is an honor to host this unprecedented auction. Before today, everyone should have heard of a news. In this auction, we have undertaken a special auction of the magic flame civilization. But in addition to this, we also searched this time There are a lot of good things, and everything is rare. Let me witness this special moment with everyone. "

After the old auctioneer finished speaking, a waitress came into the scene holding a small box. The **** warframe only covered a few important parts of the body, and a large piece of skin was exposed in the air, causing a warm cheer on the field.

This auction was broadcast live through the various news platforms of the Universe, and the whole universe can see it. Countless people's eyes focused on the box carried by the two waitresses, staring at each other.

The box was opened and a document lay quietly on it.

The old auctioneer picked up the document, his expression remained unchanged, and he said lightly: "This is the first lot today, and the ownership of the planet Tami. The planet Tami is an oxygen-rich life planet discovered by the Tami expedition in the universe. ... "

The old auctioneer was very skilled in introducing and soon began to auction.

The planet is tradable in the universe. The unknown planet with primitive life is also a kind of wealth. Many cosmic exploration teams live on it. Some lives who want to have their own private planet will participate in the auction.

The second lot is jewelry designed by a master artist of the Universe, made of rare gems in the universe.

This kind of jewelry is the favorite thing for women's life. Most of the female life in the universe has no resistance to the glittering beautiful jewelry and will not change due to species.

...

With five lots coming down, the atmosphere of the scene is enough, and over time, many things have entered the mood of bidding.

The sixth lot was pushed by two hot-dressed waitresses. A three-meter-high cabinet was covered by cloth. It is larger than the previous lots, and the solemn attitude of the waitress attracted everyone's attention.

The old auctioneer took the holographic record handed over by the female guest and saw the data parameters of the "swallow" recorded above, and his expression became extremely excited.

chapters.title: Chapter 834: : 10.2 Billion
chapters.body:
Chapter 834: : 10.2 Billion

"In this auction, in addition to the superpower development technology of the magic flame civilization, are there other good things?"

"What the **** is that? It can excite an old auctioneer."

"It's a good thing I've never seen before."

"..."

The auction scene became a lot noisy, and the expression of the old auctioneer made them associate a lot. The old auctioneer is also very knowledgeable, and it is difficult to see any precious items showing such an excited expression.

The old auctioneer soon calmed down his excitement.

"The next one is one of the treasures of today's auction. It is absolutely rare, and there may only be one chance." When the old auctioneer introduced it, there was a hint of excitement in his tone.

At this moment, the appetite of all the personnel on the field was hanged to the extreme, and they wished to fly down and uncover the covered cloth.

This auction is mainly the superpower technology of the magic flame civilization. Now there is another lot that excites the auctioneer, and everyone on the field is extremely excited.

"Before starting the auction, let's take a look at this lot."

The old auctioneer opened a holographic projection at the auction site.

The auction site has the most advanced display technology. In addition to a small screen and bid button on each participant's seat, on the auction stage, there is a huge holographic screen for project projection.

The holographic projection turned on, and a set of holographic warframes appeared over the stage.

"Warframe."

"It should be Warframe."

There was an instant commotion on the field, and the Warframe system developed by the Universe made the Warframe the most popular technology product. The more advanced the armor, the stronger it is.

Life's pursuit of power is endless.

If it is a blue-level battle armor, the old auctioneer will not be so excited at all, because the blue-level battle armor can be easily purchased at Shi Ganxing. Only the more advanced and very rare top-level battle armor can make him so excited.

Top Warframe, how many Warframe Divisions dream of.

It seems to have guessed that countless Warframe Divisions on the field are excited.

The gap between their ordinary senior armored division and the senior armored division of the god-level civilization is day by day. Why? In addition to the innate conditions of life, the spiritual response of the life of the god-level civilization is higher than that of other lives. There is also a reason that the battle armor of the god-level life preparation is the top battle armor.

Adding them one by one, this makes the high-level Warframe Divisions of God-level life generally more powerful than the other high-level Warframe Divisions.

Top-level armors have always been owned by top-level civilizations and god-level civilizations. Ordinary high-level forces, even if they possess them, are extremely rare, and they will not be easily sold, because the top-level armors that are suitable for them have no market.

If there is a top warframe at this auction, it is undoubtedly a scramble.

Many of the lives of top civilizations on the field, even the lives of god-level civilizations, were present. They were not afraid that they would not have money, and that they would not have what they needed.

boom! !!

As everyone looked forward to it, the armor suddenly moved.

Fighting with him were ten senior armour divisions, wearing Shi Ganxing's most classic advanced armour.

I saw [Swallow] move, like an eagle rushing into the sky, surrounded by a sound boom, constantly changing direction in the air at an extremely scary speed. The long-range laser of the ten War Divisions did not even stay on [Swallow] for a moment, it had disappeared into its original position.

Every time I change direction, I change to the fold line, I can't figure out where it will fold in the next direction.

Advanced tactical skills [z-fold]. This kind of skill requires particularly high maneuverability of the Warframe, and continuous z-folds can only be completed by highly skilled Warframe divisions.

Even the lives of some of the top civilizations on the field are focused.

"It's a very special design. The designer who designed this Warframe is amazing." Thunder's eyes narrowed and he stared at the Warframe demonstrated in the video.

"Want to buy it back?" An assistant asked next.

"Bidding, if the price is right. Buy this type of armor, it can be used as a reference, an additional design style of melee armor." Thunder said, "I am more interested in the designers who design this armor. "

Top-tier armor designers are already rare talents. Such talents are popular everywhere.

God-level civilization has a wealth of scientific and technological knowledge, which can be used by Warframe designers, but there are few excellent Warframe design teams, because there are too many technologies involved, Warframe designers are difficult to control in the only Warframe space. Put all the good technology into it.

Once the armor is huge, the action will slow down. The large armor is a living target on the battlefield.

As soon as the video frequency started, a tactical skill of the Warframe Division controlling the Warframe made everyone on the auction site realize the flexibility and mobility of the Warframe.

"Calculate to which level the short-distance break erupted just now." Egret looked surprised, said to Bai Yan.

"About 500 microseconds in kilometers, microseconds." Bai Yan answered without hesitation.

"Very good Warframe, this technology is already on par with our civilization's top Warframe." Egret said, "If you can find the design team behind it and recruit it back, it is also a rare talent."

The top battle armor is already a powerful presence in a divine civilization, and only the core personnel of the main star will be equipped. Because the combat effectiveness of this armor is very strong, if equipped with full weapons, you can destroy a star at will.

In their civilization, many of the top warframes are standard, and there are prescribed design models for mass production, which are used by army soldiers. And the top masters, there will be a dedicated team to customize his own personal top-level warframe.

The combat effectiveness of the top-level armor is generally weaker than a custom-made top-level armor.

The set of armor in front of you has the gene of standard armor and the powerful performance of custom armor. It is definitely a rare design. The most important thing for the egret is the designer or team that designed this suit.

The discussion on the court was noisy, and everyone was admiring the various techniques appearing in the Warframe demo. Many people are anxious, what is the price of this set of armor?

The ten Warframe divisions in the video were easily defeated, and the video ended here.

"A lot of people may think that the Warframe Division won because of the need of the plot, but it is not." The old auctioneer said after receiving the information. The originally noisy venue became quiet in an instant.

"The Warframe Division in the video just now is not a top master. It is a senior Warframe Division at the same level as the other 10 Warframe Divisions."

call! !!

As soon as the words fell, the exclaimed voice appeared. The senior Warframe Division at the same level easily made those difficult tactical moves just now?

Everyone understands what this means.

An advanced Warframe Division, it is incredible to continuously make a variety of difficult tactical skills. This means that this set of armor is greatly improved.

"We could not find the top Warframe Division to test the Warframe, but after the demonstration of our Warframe Division, the advanced Warframe Division did not show its true performance. I believe that many top Warframe Divisions on the field have seen some problems. "The old auctioneer said excitedly:" It is definitely the best in the top battle armor. And it is an adaptive battle armor. It can be used in a standard body size of less than two meters and five meters. "

The old auctioneer showed wearing images between several races. Humanoids, beasts, half-orcs, and sea-like people all appear in the image.

This time, the scene became extremely fiery.

These races are the most common civilization races in the universe. This set of top battle armor covers most of the lives in the auction venue.

Seeing that the atmosphere was completely ignited, the old auctioneer was already a veteran and knew what to do, and immediately hesitated to uncover the cloth covering the transparent cabinets, revealing the true face of [swallow].

The black and white painting, the flawless streamlined shape, does not look brilliant, but the demonstration just now has explained its many special places.

"Now it is auctioning, and after our appraisers set the price, it will start at 3 billion stars."

"3.5 billion."

"3.6 billion."

"4 billion."

...

"5.8 billion."

In less than a minute, the price of the armor rose to 5.8 billion, almost doubled, and even Chen Mo, who was sitting in the box watching it, was startled.

For a set of top battle armor, these armor divisions are crazy and red-eyed.

After all, the rare armors, and the close combat effectiveness are so strong, making the armored divisions fighting on the field very hot. Miss this time, they don't know when they will get a more powerful Warframe.

Isn't fighting in this life just for a very powerful set of armor?

"6 billion." Thunder began slowly, seemingly very interested in [Swallow].

The sorceress glanced at the location of the box where the thunder **** civilization was located, unwilling to show weakness: "6.1 billion."

"6.2 billion."

"6.3 billion." Egret also joined the competition.

Baixing civilization joined the competition, causing a lot of turmoil on the field.

The superpower development technology of the Moyan civilization has not yet been auctioned off. The three god-level civilizations are competing for a set of top-level armor.

It stands to reason that there is no shortage of top-level armors for divine civilization. Although the top armor is precious, for the god-level civilization, the soldiers of the army are equipped with top armor.

More powerful armors and legendary armors are precious things.

Now that the three civilizations have joined the battle for the Warframe, it also illustrates some problems. This set of warframes has its extraordinary features, so that the three god-level civilizations can fight for it.

The lack of top-level Warframe Masters, their eyes became hot.

Some Warframe Divisions have begun to ask friends to borrow money. After this village, there is no such shop. If they cannot take this set of Warframes, they may not be able to buy such a powerful top-level Warframe in the future.

"..."

"8.7 billion." A loud voice of applause appeared, and a top civilized Warframe Division joined the fight.

"9 billion."

"9.1 billion."

crazy! crazy!

Constantly someone was added to the auction, making the scene instantly uproar. It is close to 10 billion. Maybe for the top civilization, this is a small sum, but for the Warframe Division personally, it is a huge sum. Even if it is a top division, this is already the wealth.

In the box, Chen Mo said secretly when he heard the price.

I thought it was more than 3 billion, but it has tripled. It seems that the popularity of the top warframe in the market is much better than he imagined.

"10.2 billion." A Warframe Division shouted with red eyes.

chapters.title: Chapter 835: : The Choice Of The Demon Flame King
chapters.body:
Chapter 835: : The Choice Of The Demon Flame King

[Swallow] The transaction was finally completed at a price of 10.2 billion. The buyer was not a god-level civilization or a top-level civilization. He was an unknown senior Warframe division. At the time of the transaction, he left Shi Ganxing after completing the transaction in the background.

[Swallow] disappeared into the field of vision afterwards.

10.2 billion to buy a set of top battle armor, God-level civilization and life of the top civilization have given up competition, many people are wondering whether the true performance of the battle armor is worth its price, or the buyer is stupid.

This incident later became a conversation between tea and armour divisions.

When [Swallow] reappeared, two years later, an unknown Warframe Division dressed in [Swallow] in order to get revenge, slaughtered dozens of senior Warframe divisions of a blue-level galaxy civilization, and ended up with enemies. Destroy the entire star and bury millions of lives.

It is said that the owner of [Swallow] was also a senior armored division, because the tribe was slaughtered by the blue civilization and finally returned to revenge.

After this incident, no one dared to question the performance of [Swallow].

The Warframe designers who designed [Swallows] have never made public appearances. There have been many speculations from the outside world. All the teams mentioned have denied that [Swallows] were designed by them.

[Swallow] The real identity of the designer has also become a mystery.

The auction is still going on, [Swallow] is finished, and subsequent auctions are still going on. After that, the auction items were unsatisfactory, mainly some private planets, technical ownership, and some better armors, but compared to [Swallow], these armors were much inferior.

Numerous lives are waiting for the finale auction.

The magic flame civilization develops technology with super powers and exchanges technology with top civilizations and god-level civilizations. This is the focus of the entire universe.

With the auction going on, the atmosphere on the court has begun to dignify.

The old auctioneer also knew that the key point was coming, and there was no ease in starting. Many top civilizations and seven god-level civilizations on the field were present for this auction.

"The following is the last auction of this auction. The superpower development technology of the magic flame civilization." The old auctioneer cleared his throat and solemnly said.

The atmosphere on the court became serious, everyone began to hold their breath and straightened their feet, waiting for the auction to begin.

"Because this auction is special, we decided to use a sealed bid auction. All people present can participate in the auction, write down the terms of exchange with the Demon Flame civilization in a sealed manner, and the demon flame king will ultimately choose your terms. We No final buyer and exchange technology will be announced. "

The auction scene was lively, and it was not expected that the Black City auction house would choose a sealed bid auction.

In this way, it can be avoided that the outside world knows what technology and conditions fall into the hands of the magic flame civilization, and the magic flame civilization can also choose its own trading conditions, which is the best way anyway.

In the boxes of various god-level civilizations and top-level civilizations, each other was guessing the conditions given by the opponents, and the auction site became cold.

Life on the field is guessing who gives the highest conditions, and who will be chosen by the Demon Flame civilization.

...

Chen Mo felt that something was wrong and came out of the box to go to the auction house's trading backstage.

Intuition told him that this is a right and wrong place and should not be left for long.

"Mr. Mo Chen, why did the auction come before the auction was over?" After seeing Chen Mo, Dong became too enthusiastic with a smile on his face.

"I'm in a hurry. I want to leave now. Can I be accommodating and give me the Warframe money first?" Chen Mo asked.

"That's the case. This is no problem. I've prepared it for Mr .. Our auctioneer will take a 2% commission and round you up to 10 billion SGD." Dong easily took out a SGD card from his body and handed it to Chen Mo.

It can be said that the appearance of the top warframe at their auctions has given them a reputation, and as a person in charge, he was naturally very surprised. As long as this auction comes to an end successfully, their black city can become a ringing trading city within the scope of Shishi, and its status can be imagined.

"Sir, many lives have been asked through me. I want to know you and ask you to customize a set of armor. Would you like to meet?"

"No."

Chen Mo doesn't plan to stay long, but now in the auction house, it seems calm, but it feels like a gunpowder barrel that is about to explode, the silence before the storm.

"Your black city has an energy station that supplements antimatter energy?"

"Yes." Dong Zhong focused.

"Filling my space curvature spacecraft with antimatter energy, about 17 gallons."

"17 luns need 1.77 billion." Dong looked at Chen Mo with a little surprise. "Add so much, do you want to travel around the universe?"

Dong knew that Chen Mo was an alien life, because there was no such large-scale human group as Chen Mo on Shi Ganxing, and it was normal to leave Shi Ganxing.

It was a pity that Dong Mo got a positive answer from Chen Mo.

"If Mr. has armor to sell after that, please contact us. We will halve the commission. Power, you take Mr. Mochen to add anti-material energy."

Dong shouted to the female person around her and led Chen Mo to leave outside the auction house. Later, Dong went to a closed room behind the auction house.

...

At auction venues, the current sealed bidding auction has just begun.

"interesting."

The egret is in front of the holographic screen. Just exchange the exchange conditions of their white star civilization into the light curtain, and the Black City auction house will receive it, focusing on the choice of the magic flame civilization.

Their competitors don't know the conditions given by each other. In order for the technology to finally fall into their own hands, they must give the optimal conditions to the choice of the magic flame civilization. The greatest value is not necessarily the best, but the conditions that the magic flame civilization likes are the best.

This is undoubtedly the highest gain for the Demon Flame civilization.

"Uncle, what conditions do you say they will give?" Bai Yan asked curiously.

"It's useless to guess." The egret shook her head. The other six parties, as well as the top civilizations that maintain a mysterious identity below, are staring at superpowers to develop technology, and it is impossible to determine who will give what conditions.

"what should we do?"

"Give him the wife's terms of exchange, anyway, this time it is not as simple as an auction. The magic flame civilization is playing with fire, and you must be ready to be burned to death."

The egret sounds Mori cold, making people feel the temperature. The other members of the field heard the chill in the words, which made people shudder.

The egret took out the memory of the exchange condition list and transferred it to the holographic light curtain. After confirmation, the holographic light curtain in his hand disappeared.

"Brother Thunder, are you interested in revealing the conditions for comparison and comparison?" The voice of Wu Wu suddenly appeared, shouting across the box of the thunder civilization from the opposite side, breaking the noise at the auction house.

In the box where the black pupil civilization is located, the glass in front gradually becomes transparent, revealing the situation inside.

All life begins to watch.

This obviously started playing tricks.

"Master Witch, so ..."

A staff member next to him wanted to dissuade him and was interrupted by a witch.

"I have my own share."

Upon seeing this, the others stopped talking.

On the other hand, the Thunder ignored the witch's shouting, and put the list of conditions for exchange into the light curtain for confirmation.

After completing a series of actions, the Thunder focused on the witch, and the glass in the bag became transparent. Separated at two ends of the auction house, the two can look directly at each other.

"Brother Thunder, what's your condition? Afraid I know?" The witch's mouth had a strange smile, and the black pupils became deeper. These eyes seemed to have the ability to penetrate the heart.

"I think you will be more interested in the conditions of the Ziwei civilization." Thunder didn't look directly into the sorceress's eyes and said loudly, "Do you want to ask her?"

The glass booth of the Ziwei civilization became transparent.

Zi Yun sits side by side with a cold look.

"Who wants to know, I can tell him, do you want to listen?" Zi Yun said lightly, her voice couldn't quite fluctuate.

As Ziyun said this, the scene became silent.

Even Wu Wu's black pupils were stunned.

People of god-level civilization know that the special ability of the Ziwei civilization tradition reads mind. This kind of special ability is strange, if you communicate with them, you can't find out the conditions of the Ziwei civilization, then the conditions here will be known to them all.

"Do you know her information?" Wu Wu whispered to ask the staff around her.

"Not very clear, there is no detailed information on this woman in the information," the staff member answered quickly.

"What exactly is the woman that Ziwei civilization exchanged this time?" Wu Wu's heart was muttering, her eyes stared at Ziyun, and the moment his eyes collided, his heart froze, and a hint of chill appeared in the black pupil.

The scene became cold.

Many parties participating in the auction have entered their own conditions into the auction system of the Black City Auction House. Soon, the bidding time was over and the auction ended.

The next step is to choose the time. The Moyan civilization will choose one of the many parties participating in the auction.

Black City Auction House backstage.

The Demon Flame King's face was red, and the joy on his face was lingering.

Seeing a list of more than two dozen conditions displayed, he felt unprecedentedly excited. This time was his most spirited time, flattered by the imams of the surrounding civilization, and bargaining with the god-level civilization.

The exchange terms here are higher than one and better than one, leaving him to choose.

Even if they get the conditions on one of the lists, their magic flame civilization has the capital to develop into a top civilization. An ambitious ambition stirred in his mind, top civilization, the hope of their magic flame civilization for many years.

Unfortunately, only one of the conditions can be selected. If he can, he can't wait to take all the conditions here.

Some unnamed top civilizations have attractive conditions, but they are still a lot worse than divine civilizations. The wealthy god-level civilization provides conditions that are crazy enough.

After the excitement, the Demon Flame King calmed down.

Seven, which one to choose? The flame king's eyes fell on one of the lists.

chapters.title: Chapter 836: : Space Cannot Be Folded
chapters.body:
Chapter 836: : Space Cannot Be Folded

"Are you sure you want to choose this?" Dong glanced at the selection list of the Demon Flame King, and asked him to confirm his choice.

The conditions on every list here are terrifying, and any one is infinitely valuable. This is just the tip of the iceberg of those god-level civilizations and top-level civilizations. It can be seen how terrifying the heritage of top-level civilizations and god-level civilizations is.

It is no wonder that no advanced civilization wants to challenge the status of a top civilization. The gap between the two has an insurmountable gap.

The demon flame king glanced at the conditions of several other houses again, and nodded after thinking about it: "OK."

"it is good."

East presses the button to destroy other bid conditions. It is no longer possible to obtain information on those lists, including himself.

"The trading conditions have been determined. The auction will end. The Black City auction house will notify the successful bidder to prepare the trading conditions after ten o'clock to facilitate the transaction between the two parties. The auction is now over.

Dong used the communicator to notify the old auctioneer that the auction was over.

Confirming the transaction party, the life of the auction house is noisy at once, and they are guessing which one has the highest conditions. Now no one is sure. Who can successfully exchange superpower development technology with the magic flame civilization.

Only the Magic Flame civilization and the auction house know who gets the technology.

Black City did not dare to announce the winning forces on the spot, otherwise other top-level forces and god-level forces determined that they could not get the technology to compete here, and the little Bai Yunxing would be destroyed by battle in an instant.

The atmosphere of the auction house is a bit weird.

"It's a bit interesting, who do you say will get the technology?" Wu Wu made the glass of the box transparent, and the internal situation was exposed again, with a sneer in the corner of his mouth.

"I want to know too." The box of the thunder **** civilization also became transparent, and thunder looked still proud.

The box of the Ziwei civilization has also become transparent, and the cool appearance of Ziyun appears in everyone's vision. Baixing civilization, dark forest civilization, endless sea civilization, and ghost civilization, all the seven god-level civilizations appear.

The atmosphere instantly became subtle.

"Brother Thunder is so unconfident?" Wu Wu's black pupil narrowed a slit, with a smirk at the corner of her mouth.

"Is the witch brother very confident?" Thunder refused to show weakness and looked at him.

"Hehe." Wu Wu said uneasily: "Brother Thunder now dare to talk about the conditions he gave?"

"It should be a little worse than you, after all, you are not as rich as your black pupil civilization." Thunder Youyou said.

The black pupil civilization is indeed the richest of the seven god-level civilizations. The status of the seven god-level civilization leaders was Ziwei civilization. The loss of Lagerstroemia civilization was slumped.

The black pupil civilization has another pupil, known as the genius most likely to achieve the God-level Warframe Division, known as a master tied with the Purple Emperor. After that, the black pupil civilization became the most powerful of the seven god-level civilizations.

"Let's go."

The egret ignored the tit-for-tat confrontation, got up from the position, and left the seat. The battle between the two has nothing to do with them. The bidder was notified privately after ten o'clock, and it is now useless to stay in Bai Yunxing.

The managers of the Black City didn't want to let them fight in the Black City, so they chose to postpone the announcement.

Otherwise, Bai Yunxing is likely to become dust in the universe.

"Uncle, do you say that Madam's conditions can make the Demon Flame civilized?" Bai Yan asked curiously.

"It's not clear. The endless sea seems to have no intention to fight. The dark forest is weak. The civilization of the corpse is too poor. The conditions are definitely worse than ours, so the four who are most likely to fight are ours. The Ziwei civilization has been declining since the defection of the Emperor Ziwei a thousand years ago Wanting to restore glory, I heard that some time ago, the search for the small universe failed. They may pay a large price for superpower development technology. "

The egret is heavily analyzed.

It is clear inside the divine civilization that because of various genetic dilutions, the probability of the awakening superpower of each divine life is getting smaller and smaller. The emergence of superpower development technology means that the probability of superpower awakening can be increased, and top-level Warframe Divisions are continuously created.

Whoever gets it will take the initiative in the future.

Baixing civilization left.

The envoys of the endless sea civilization, the dark forest civilization, and the corpse civilization also left the boxes one after another, and the spacecraft that flew to space left. Next is the time to wait for the news. It doesn't make sense to stay here.

On a desolate planet far from the edge of the Shigan Galaxy, a holographic figure suddenly popped from a communication light curtain in a building.

"The machine is ready to start."

The voice of life speaking was a bit cold, with doubt and majesty.

"Okay, sir."

Upon receiving the order, the Warframe Division in the building immediately pressed a button to activate an unknown instrument.

When all the participants left the Black City, many lives did not know that a blockade against the Shigan galaxy had been initiated.

...

In the outer space of Zong Saturn, a spaceship hovered and floated into Zong Saturn's gravitational circle, and was locked by Zong Saturn's tide, which is Chen Mo's space curvature spaceship.

Just now I jumped back from the space of Bai Yunxing, jumped to a position outside the half-light time from Zong Saturn, and there was a half-light deviation from the original space point. Finally, the spacecraft cruised at the speed of light and returned to Zong Saturn.

There is always a slight distance deviation in non-fixed point space jumps. Because all galaxies and stars are moving, it is not unusual to have a certain deviation from the original location, so Chen Mo didn't care.

For light distances below half a day, cruising at the speed of light is more convenient than folding in space, so cruise back at the speed of light.

The spacecraft has refilled antimatter energy in Black City.

In the Universe, the amount of antimatter provided by the space curvature spacecraft to jump one billion light years is counted as one gallon unit. The amount of anti-matter of 17 gallons is enough for the space curvature spacecraft to jump 17 billion light-years long enough to return him to the Milky Way of the Virgo.

The antimatter for one gallon unit is 104 million, with a cost of 1.772 billion.

Space travel also requires a lot of wealth to support it, just like Earth's global travel. For non-advanced life teams and special expeditions, it is best for individuals to obediently move between several galaxies or constellations.

Most lives cannot travel around the universe in a lifetime.

After more than a month of delay in Shi Ganxing, now he can finally set foot on his way home, and Chen Mo's heart is more or less excited. Jing Ge, Grey Twenty-One, and the Beast are still in Saturn, so they can return to Earth after they are connected.

Chen Mo didn't land on Zong Saturn. For some reason, he just wanted to leave Shi Ganxing as soon as possible. It is not a good thing that the life of the seven god-level civilizations gathered here. He had a hunch that something might happen to this galaxy next.

"Jing Ge, antimatter energy refueling is complete, it's time to go home."

"Ok."

Jing Ge responded, and hung up the communication.

Twenty minutes later, Jing Ge took Grey Twenty-One and the Beast out of the spaceship.

"Go home."

Chen Mo smiled lightly. After leaving the earth for several years, he can't wait to go home now. The space curvature engine starts and the space at the engine begins to collapse.

"Didi Didi ..."

"Alert! Space cannot be folded."

"Alert! Space cannot be folded."

"Alert! Space cannot be folded."

The sirens of the spaceship made Chen Mo still excited, joy stiffened on his face.

chapters.title: Chapter 837: : Space Trap
chapters.body:
Chapter 837: : Space Trap

The Shigan galaxy is messed up.

The space of the entire Shigan galaxy is blocked, making all life in the galaxy messy.

Except for ordinary life, the impact is small, and the life that often jumps between the planets has a very large impact. The short distance between two star systems is calculated as light day, and the long distance is calculated as light moon.

Space is blocked, no space jumping is possible, and communication between most galaxies is almost blocked.

The most depressing places are Shi Ganxing and nearby planets.

Those who possess the ability to block the space are undoubtedly god-level civilizations. Seven god-level civilizations gather at Shi Ganxing to compete for the super power development technology of the magic flame civilization.

Immediately after the auction, the Shigan Galaxy was blocked, and no one wanted to leave.

Panic has spread within the scope of Shi Ganxing.

Some feared senior life swarmed on the speed of light spacecraft to escape from the main star of Shi Ganxing, for fear that the battle of the main star of Shi Ganxing would fall on them. Fighting between the seven god-level civilizations, stepping on some ants will not have life to show pity.

Soon, the seven god-level civilizations came forward to deny that they had blocked the space and condemned the forces that blocked the space.

The situation in the Shigan galaxy has become confusing.

Soon, the technology to block the Shigan galaxy was identified.

[Space trap]

This terrible space trap has the function of fixed space, and the interference space cannot be folded. In addition, the space trap has a special function, one-way.

Outside the enclosed space, the space can be folded into a certain position within the space trap, but within the space trap, the space cannot be collapsed to escape.

This technique was once a trap technology commonly used by god-level civilizations in space wars. Besiege the life of a galaxy so that it cannot escape.

A galaxy has a diameter of tens of thousands of light years and cannot be folded in space. Except at the edge of the galaxy, if you want to escape the space trap, you need cruising at the speed of light for tens of thousands of years.

The Shigan galaxy has a diameter of 110,000 light years, and it takes at least tens of thousands of years to escape from the speed of light inside.

However, the launch of the space trap technology requires a period of preparation. Obviously, some people have prepared for the blockade in advance, and everything has been planned for a long time.

Soon after the blockade of space, the struggle began.

There was a battle between the Thor and Black pupil civilizations, and Shi Ganxing turned into a battlefield. Hundreds of billions of lives have disappeared under the horrible weapons of god-level civilization, and Shi Ganxing has become purgatory.

The bustling city is turned into ruins, and countless unavoidable low-level lives mourn, scream and despair in the ruins without any mercy.

Neither side tried to test and hesitate. The power of the top warframe can destroy a small planet with just one weapon. Anti-material bullets don't need the costly bombing, so that wherever the battle passes, they become powder.

Shi Ganxing's space and ground have become the main battlefield. The armor divisions of the two sides either fight alone or in groups, anti-material bullets and lasers illuminate Shi Ganxing, and plow the surface of Shi Ganxing back and forth like raindrops. Any single antimatter bullet is enough to cover dozens of square kilometers.

The huge Shigan star became unrecognizable within a day.

Fighting in space, anti-material bombs fell to Shi Ganxing, bombings were everywhere, and every time they landed in the city where they lived, it was a disaster.

This is still under the restraint of two major god-level civilizations. Both sides know that they do not dare to use weapons of destruction above the star level. The space of the Shigan galaxy is blocked. If a space destruction weapon is used, no whole Shiganxing can escape, including the life of a god-level civilization, will be destroyed with the space.

In both battles, the battle that attracted the most attention was the battle between the Thunder and the Witch.

Thunder is a genius warframe division of the Thunder God civilization, and the sorceress's status in the black pupil civilization is not lower than Thunder's status in the Thunder God civilization. The two sides were half a catty, this battle affected three advanced civilizations, over 80 million square kilometers of land, and more than 500 billion lives died and were displaced in the battle between the two.

Shi Ganxing's life began to flee Shi Ganxing wearing a battle armor, swarming to Shi Ganxing's satellites to take refuge. Conditional life, fled by the speed of light spacecraft. Today, Shi Ganxing has become the battlefield of god-level civilization, leaving no one knowing when to become the soul of the god-level civilization.

Chen Mo's face was as dark as the bottom of the pot.

This was the first time he had such a depressed mood.

According to a predetermined plan, after replenishing energy here, they can return to Virgo in half a month to find the Milky Way and the Earth. As a result, the space of Shi Ganxing was imprisoned and the space could not be folded.

Just over an hour.

An hour earlier, he could jump out of Shi Ganxing.

Obviously there is a premeditated space for hands-on restraint immediately after the auction. Chen Mo suspected that the distance deviation when returning was so large, which was also the reason.

Quantum's cosmic broadcast, Chen Mo learned why the space of the Shigan galaxy was confined.

[Space trap]

The 110,000 light-year Shigan galaxy is imprisoned in space, like the handwriting of a god-like civilization wrapped in soap bubbles. This is not difficult for a god-level civilization that masters space technology.

The struggle of god-level civilization limited him here, which made Chen Mo very upset and helpless.

In this position, it is one light month away from the main star of Shi Ganxing, belonging to the 'suburb' outside the main star. In the case of imprisoned space, it is impossible for him to take a light-speed spacecraft, fly to Shi Ganxing for a month, find a person of god-level civilization, and order them to close the [space trap], which is unrealistic.

He didn't even know which imprisoned space it was, or this time [Space Trap] had more than one hand. Several hands were imprisoned, and the means of lifting the space imprisonment of one family was useless.

"What now?" Jing Ge asked lightly.

"The Shigan galaxy is now quite a one-way semi-permeable 'small universe'. The outside world can jump in, but it cannot jump out in space. If you want to go out, you must build a space connector, like the 'small universe', and connect with the connector. Beyond imprisonment and escape. "

Chen Mo's expression was extremely depressed, like a fish being dragged into a large net for no reason.

It takes a lot of time to build a space connector.

"And the faster the construction, the better. No one knows whether God-level civilization will drop space destruction weapons in the Shigan galaxy." Chen Mo said in a deep voice.

Weapons of space destruction, such as weapons similar to two-way foils. If the speed of destruction spreads at the speed of light, if they are thrown near them, they can only escape at the speed of light until they are chased to death by a few hundred thousand years.

Chen Mo only hoped that the god-level civilization would not randomly place space destruction weapons. If the space destruction weapons appear near Zong Saturn, the Shigan galaxy that cannot jump in space is no different from waiting for death.

The current Shigan galaxy is a huge loach trap, and anyone who enters will be trapped inside.

"What are you going to do?" Jing Ge asked.

Chen Mo said for a moment: "Equipment, instruments. I put nano-robots on the planet to completely transform the planet, and I can save a lot of time by buying some equipment and instruments for making machines at the nearest habitable planet."

Chen Mo just wants to make some space connectors quickly. He doesn't want to pin his hope on the god-level civilization to unlock the [space trap], which is very unrealistic.

While Chen Mo was thinking about how to escape, as far away as Shi Ganxing, another battle was underway.

chapters.title: Chapter 838: : Big Mess
chapters.body:
Chapter 838: : Big Mess

Demon flame civilization was destroyed.

Some days ago, it was still in the middle of the sky. It was called the advanced civilization most likely to be promoted to the top civilization, and was destroyed in just tens of hours. The 2 billion-square-kilometer territory of Demon Flame Civilization was devastated overnight, with countless deaths and injuries.

The territory where the Royal Palace of Civilization is located has been reduced to purgatory on earth, and the entire royal palace group has been razed to the ground, and members of the royal family and the Royal Palace of Royal Flame remain unknown.

The cause of the entire incident is also the most important technical information on the development of superpowers. I don't know who fell into it.

In the war between civilizations, the outside world at most only paid attention to it, and it was not strange.

But this time is different from the past. The seven god-level civilizations and many top-level forces gathered in Shiganxing. The magic flame civilization in the center of the storm was destroyed by no resistance, leaving many advanced civilizations feeling a deep chill.

The seven god-level civilizations came forward to condemn them, and denied that they destroyed the flames of civilization.

But many lives are clear that one or more of the seven parties did it.

Many advanced civilizations and top civilizations have issued a joint announcement on the Cosmos Alliance channel, hoping that the use of the [space trap] civilization to lock the Shigan galaxy can lift the space barrier and let the life of the Shigan galaxy escape.

But to no avail, the seven god-level civilizations deny that [Space Trap] is their arrangement, and [Space Trap] still exists.

For a time, the battle of the Shigan galaxy became more intense.

The Thor civilization and the Black pupil civilization are fighting again. In addition to thousands of Warframe Divisions, there are also war robots and spaceships on both sides, which face off in space, air and ground.

The entire Shi Ganxing became a battlefield.

Thunder and the witch's second encounter became the focus of external attention.

The battle between the two continued for a day, but the Witch defeated him and escaped with serious injuries. In the battle, the Thunder showed the level of the top Warframe Division and became famous in the first battle.

During the battle, Thunder wore the battle armor [Battle Drum], and the way of fighting was so wide open that it impressed countless lives. Also let the outside world marvel at the exquisite fighting skills of Thor's civilization.

...

A spaceship traversed at the speed of light in space.

The whole body is a smooth swordfish-shaped spaceship with blue paint. The logo is a classic fish tail and the endless sea.

Inside the spacecraft, a female mermaid was standing by the light curtain wearing aquamarine armor.

The surface of the armor is painted with colorful fish scales, and behind it is a long gun with a pattern of fish scales. Only the head exposed outside the armor, you can see the colorful fish scales that extend from the neck to the body. Virgin.

If the other life is there, it can be recognized. When the Dark Forest civilization Prince Dark Dragon provoked the endless sea civilization, the endless mermaid girl who seriously injured the Dark Dragon Prince, Shui Ling.

"Teacher, everything is fine here now, I have come in accordance with your direction." A water Ling asked to the communication instrument.

"Be careful, escape from the Shigan galaxy is the most important." On the light curtain, an old and sloppy mermaid said: "The distance is about a light moon, and there are ways to escape the Shigan galaxy."

"Where can I leave the Shigan galaxy?" Shuiling asked puzzled.

In the impression, the best way to be surrounded by [space trap] is to use space connection technology to connect outside space and leave the locked galaxy.

And the master of space connection technology, there are currently only seven god-level civilizations, she could not think of the position predicted by the teacher, what can help them leave Shi Ganxing.

"I don't know." He Yaoyuren shook his head: "Maybe some other civilization has mastered the technology of space connection."

"Teacher, why don't we make a space connector ourselves?" Shui Ling asked in confusion.

The old fisherman grinned, but his eyes sank: "The beasts of the dark forest civilization are here, and they will not let you worry about making space connectors. The struggle of the Shigan galaxy is very confusing, and at least two of them have made space there now. The blockade, no matter who has the technology, can't escape with peace of mind. "

"Teacher, why don't we rob that technology?"

The old merman shook his head slightly: "This time when you go to the Shigan Galaxy, you are mainly seeing the world, and you are not yet suitable to participate in the battle."

Shui Ling didn't take the teacher's words to heart, and she didn't consider herself unsuitable to participate in the battle.

Her strength is not worse than others, but she has to listen to what the teacher says.

And they have an endless sea of god-level life, born with a faint ability to ward off evil and avoid evil. This ability awakening is the most special ability of the endless Poseidon-level life, the Prophet.

She also knew that the teacher said the direction was right, because she also felt that it was her direction.

...

Zong Saturn, five giant spacecraft landed.

Spaceship of a transport company.

This was bought on the planet inhabited closest to Zong Saturn, which is a planet with a lot of life. Chen Mo used all the star coins obtained from the sale of the armor to buy the equipment and rare raw materials of these five ships.

Shi Ganxing's main star is in the struggle of divine civilization. There is a light moon from the star system where Zong Saturn is located. In the range of Shi Gan Galaxy, their position belongs to the suburbs of the city. It is not a danger, but it is not absolutely safe. .

No one knows when the struggle for divine civilization will spread to this side.

Many conditional lives leave the planet in the speed of light spacecraft, as far away as possible from the main star of Shigan Star, and some have the idea of leaving early and staying at ease, otherwise, once the war spreads in this direction, it will be late.

Because the Shigan galaxy was blocked and the war spread, prices here have been chaotic.

The price of spaceships and armors soared, anti-material energy soared to sky-high prices, and nobody even wanted to sell them.

The prices of ordinary materials and instruments that are difficult to transport away are madly reduced. In addition to this, land and houses are used. In this kind of war, land and houses appear worthless, because once the war spreads here, the planet may be beaten into cosmic dust.

Chen Mo easily bought the ultra-precision instruments and equipment he needed. In one step, he was the best equipment he could buy, saving him a lot of energy and thought about manufacturing equipment.

These devices are enough for him to use.

Nano-robots are transforming Zong Saturn, buildings and factories, which are slowly taking shape under the control of Mo Nu.

The spacecraft has data and data on the transformation process of the Wild Mountain Star. The transformation of this planet is relatively simple.

The most important thing is the dark matter and antimatter extraction device. These two things are indispensable in the interstellar era. Without these two things, the next step is impossible.

"What do I need?" Jing Ge glanced lightly at the container stacked in front of the hill.

Chen Mo thought for a moment and said, "If you have time, go and push several asteroids into the synchronous orbit of Zong Saturn. How big will it be? Momo will tell you after calculation. Building a space connector requires a lot of materials. . "

"it is good."

When Jing Ge just wanted to take Gray 21 to space to search for an asteroid, the radar alarm of the Zongtu planetary guard system suddenly sounded, and the alarm screen popped up within the three-person battle armor system.

There were two spaceships in the stellar system. It seemed that Zong Saturn was found, and the direction was turned in a direction toward Zong Saturn.

Chen Mo called two people and urged the armor to go straight into the sky.

chapters.title: Chapter 839: : Keep Moving To Space To Move Bricks
chapters.body:
Chapter 839: : Keep Moving To Space To Move Bricks

This stellar system is not a dwelling galaxy, but belongs to a private territory. Because it is too desolate, the stellar system belongs to civilization and all the stars in this stellar system are used for private lease.

Strictly speaking, other spacecraft entering the Saturn's stellar system must send a signal ‘knock on the door’ and ask. It can only be entered with the permission of the Saturn inhabitants, otherwise it will trigger the planetary alarm system and be regarded as an invasion.

Chen Mo looked at the spacecraft entering the galaxy through the holographic picture of the armor.
