Now that the Shigan Galaxy is in an eventful season, the entire Shigan Galaxy has become a place of no rules. Here it has returned to the era of the law of forests. Any invasion must be taken seriously and should not be taken lightly.

There are him, Jinge and Gray Twenty-one. Don't worry about the combat effectiveness, they can calmly face the invading spacecraft.

When the three entered space, Chen Mo sent a warning signal to the spacecraft entering the stellar system. For the entire space alliance, the frequency band of the public channel is universal. As long as the other party is a spaceship of the space alliance, they will receive their warning signals.

After a while, the speed of the invasion of the spacecraft decreased.

"Boss, radar shows that the planet is not a life planet, there is no large-scale life inhabited, and the planet is under construction." A nearby man reminded.

Hearing this, it seemed determined that Kuimu's blue lips cracked, showing white teeth and a treacherous smile.

"Get off the ship, go."

"Don't drive over the spacecraft?" One of his men asked in confusion.

"Drive the spacecraft over, fight, the spaceship is destroyed, what do you take away? No light speed spacecraft waiting to die?" Kuimu cursed, the helmet of the battle armor closed, and left the spacecraft to fly towards Zong Saturn.

The other players knew it, and all kept up.

Soon, ten minutes later, the group met Chen Mo. The distance was only ten kilometers. The armored radar could find the other figure. Kui Mu did not hesitate to connect with Chen Mo's video call.

"Hello friend."

"Hello there."

When Chen Mo heard the message from the other party, he responded lightly, without any friendly politeness.

Kuimu looked at Chen Mo through the radar's video frequency, her round green eyes flickered, with a touch of greed.

This kind of private stellar system is rich in life. Generally, it has its own super light spacecraft or light speed spaceship, and there is a lot of antimatter energy. If they can get a vote, they will not have to worry about the energy of the spacecraft in the future, maybe there is another spaceship.

The price of spacecraft and antimatter energy has been soaring, especially near Shi Ganxing.

"Friend, we are fleeing for our lives, just passing by. Would you like to stop for some time, would you like to let us land and rest on the planet?" Kuimu was expressionless and tried to be as kind as possible.

"Sorry, we are not allowed to rest here. Two light days away from the sixth quadrant, there is a dwelling galaxy. You can go there to rest." Chen Mo refused without hesitation.

He is not a proper shelter here, and everyone should be prepared for this situation.

Kuimu was a little surprised by Chen Mo's unthinking refusal, but still maintained a friendly appearance: "Now the Shigan galaxy is in the midst of a disaster, and we should help each other. Can't friends be able to harmonize once?"

"No." Chen Mo refused again.

"Will that give us a little antimatter energy, there is no antimatter energy supplement now, and we can pay for it."

"No interest, you go." Chen Mo was unmoved.

"Friend, aren't you okay? Holding up a hand when you are in trouble can be considered good, can't you help people once?" After being rejected twice, Kui Mu was even more upset, and was still on the verge of an outbreak, but still could not bear it.

"Not interested in."

"That being the case, then we can rest assured."

Kuimu grinned, and his eyes became vicious, without the kindness he had just seen.

They have more than 130 Warframe Divisions, more than 20 Senior Warframe Divisions, and only three of the other side. Whatever they think, they have determined the other side.

"Oh? Do you see Tu Qiong?"

Chen Mo was not surprised.

The imprisonment of the Shigan galaxy means that it has become a cage without rules. There is no so-called moral rule to survive. Just like the struggle of god-level civilization in Shi Ganxing, hundreds of millions of lives are buried in it, and there will be no compassion at all.

Kuimu grinned, did not hesitate to procure the battle armor, started the laser to shoot at Chen Mo, there is no meaning to communicate with Chen Mo, but to take the lives of the three of Chen Mo.

He was decisive, but let Chen Mogao take a look.

At least not so much nonsense, but unfortunately they chose the wrong object.

Jing Ge and Chen Mo broke out at the same time, and the battle armor disappeared.

Gray twenty-one is not slow, a flash, and the armor is disappearing in everyone's radar. This is the first battle since his training for so long. When the training results are checked, he will naturally not miss such a good actual combat. opportunity.

Huh! !!

The figure of Gray Twenty-one flashed to ten meters behind Kui Mu, which was faster than Chen Mo and Jing Ge, and the process was full of weirdness. This is the first time that [Grayscale] is used for real combat. At this time, [Grayscale], if it is from the death of hell, it makes people feel a kind of cold from the heart.

The threat of death shrouded, leaving Kuimu cold.

The greed on his face disappeared, replaced by fear and incredible. The opponent's strength far surpassed his imagination, he didn't even know how the opponent appeared to him.

It's over! Kicked the iron plate.

In spite of the horror, Kuimu instinctively urged the armor to dodge. Now his only thought was to escape, but the speed was much slower. Just listening to the porch, a sharp blade pierced his heart through his armor.

not good!

Kuimu felt very light. He looked down and saw a headless warframe flying in space, getting farther and farther from him.

That is his body.

The fear of death has become extremely strong.

He regretted it, but there was no regretful medicine to take.

Grey Twenty-One disappeared again, appearing without warning on top of a Warframe Division not far away.

Kuimu still had a conscious head, and her mouth grew big. That's not the ability of the Warframe, but the special ability, superpower, and existence of God-level life of the Warframe Division.

The battle between Chen Mo and Jing Ge was more fierce, both were fatal in one move, and the strengths were so different that there was no fancy fighting skills.

Seeing Chen Mu's three-member slaughtering team member Kui Mu, there was fear and unwillingness in his expression. Eventually, consciousness slowly fell into the dark, and a small head floated further and further in space.

The players behind Kuimu were terrified. They never thought that more than a hundred of their armoured divisions were easily slaughtered by three armoured divisions. During the whole process, they had no resistance.

"We surrender!"

Looking at the teammates who were killed by one hit, the psychological defense of a Warframe Division was smashed, and the public channel was called directly, while the Warframe engine was turned off.

The first surrender appeared, the second, the third ...

The three men's sturdy fighting force made the rest of them give up the idea of resistance.

From the beginning to the end, there are no ten minutes.

There are more than 130 Warframe Divisions, and now there are only 41 Warframe Divisions. Surviving Warframe Divisions are surrendered, and their faces are full of fear. It wasn't fighting at all, it was one-sided slaughter.

They don't know what monster they are facing.

Jinge stopped and glanced at the Warframe Division, whose engines were floating in space: "Should you kill them all?"

He opened a public channel, and with this murderous remark, the forty-one Warframe Divisions who surrendered stiffened.

"No, it's time to build space connectors and keep them going to space to move bricks."

"Okay." Jing Ge agreed without hesitation and kept them moving bricks. He and Gray Twenty-One didn't need to 'move bricks', and some people would send pillows when they were dozing off.

The forty-one Warframe Division surrendered did not cry, and escaped again.

Looking at the corpse floating in space, Chen Mo was not at all happy.

The space of the Shigan galaxy was blocked and returned to the random world, where it was messed up.

chapters.title: Chapter 840: :Confusion
chapters.body:
Chapter 840: :Confusion

"With the bracelet, the core chips are installed." Chen Mo asked the robot to divide the bracelet and chips for forty-one people.

In order to control these forty-one unlucky eggs and make them obedient, Chen Mo chose a two-pronged approach. Let them put on an imprisoned bracelet, and implant procedures in the core of their Warframe, so that Mo Nu 2 can control the Warframe at any time.

Without a Warframe life, nothing can be done here.

Now that the Shigan Galaxy is in troubled times, some helpers are not bad and can speed up the construction. And the star system also needs some guards, which can save Chen Mo a lot of trouble and energy.

"Now enter your name and identity information into the bracelet." Chen Mo said.

Forty-one Life did not hesitate to Chen Mo's instructions, and hurriedly entered his information into the light curtain popped up by the bracelet. After seeing Chen Mo's three perverts, they didn't even think of resistance.

Now Shi Ganxing is in great chaos, and the current affairs officer is Junjie. These three war armor divisions are so perverted that following them, there is at least one guarantee.

"Which of you is the strongest." Everyone brought the bracelet, Chen Mo continued to ask.

I saw forty lives turned to look at a relatively thin and delicate life. It is a humanoid, two meters tall and slender. The most obvious is the poker face with a paralyzed face.

When poker face saw everyone pointing at him, he could only stand up obediently, still expressionless, a natural zombie face.

"What's your name?" Chen Mo asked.

"General guest."

"..." Chen Mo's mouth twitched. This name and poker face were a natural match: "In the future, you will be their captain. Do you choose a deputy captain yourself, is there a problem?"

"No problem." Pu Ke nodded without hesitation: "Hong Pi is the vice captain."

Pu Ke points to the life of a **** red skin

"Now go to space to move bricks." Chen Mo gave them the first instruction directly.

"Moving bricks?"

"Moving the asteroid and putting it into the orbit of Saturn, I'm useful."

"understand."

Although they do n’t know what Chen Mo needs from the asteroids, they do n’t dare to disobey the orders. Now, life and death are in the hands of Chen Mo and can only be left at the mercy of Chen Mo.

Chen Mo left a few words, all other things were given to Mo Nu II, Mo Nu II will tell them how many asteroids they need.

After solving the forty-one unlucky eggs, Chen Mo entered the spacecraft and started quantum communication to connect the wild mountain star in the small universe.

"Mr."

Seeing Chen Mo, everyone in the wild mountain star was overjoyed, especially Tuo Li, and the joy in his expression couldn't be masked.

"How is it in the little universe?" Chen Mo asked.

"Everything is going on according to plan. It is expanding and developing. Now it has controlled 30 living planets and is exploring other galaxies." Tuo Li can't wait to answer, and He and Tuoshan defaulted on this situation.

"Sir, have you been to your hometown?"

"Not yet. I'm stuck in the Shigan galaxy and I'm having some trouble." Chen Mo said.

As soon as this word came out, the crowd of the wild mountain star immediately fry.

"Sir, we are very fighting now. Would you like to go out and support you?" Takuya was eager to try, and everyone else was looking forward to the same look.

"Sir, we can help you," I also said.

"No, this galaxy is imprisoned by a space trap and requires a space connector to leave. You are useless here. I can handle it here. I will contact you again if I really need help." Chen Mo refused to hesitate: "Now you Develop the small universe, and I will be able to contact you when I return home. "

Chen Mo urged them to hand over the communication screen to Jing Ge. When Tuo Li saw Jinge, he saw a cat like a mouse. The excitement just disappeared, and he persuaded like a mouse that saw a cat.

After Kui Mu's invasion, Chen Mo has known that the Shigan galaxy is now like a beast cage.

Under the threat of the battle of divine civilization, the rules here are broken and there is no order at all, especially around Shi Ganxing, which is near the center of the storm, and the struggle is even more crazy and chaotic.

Chen Mo is not sure when this situation will spread to him, but he needs to plan ahead.

After all, two fists are hard to beat four hands.

If the enemy chooses to invade from different directions, there are many people, even if he is powerful, he has no skill.

It is necessary to build a batch of top-level war robots to protect the security of the galaxy.

There are still space connectors to protect in the future.

The war robots in the Manshan Star, as the people of the Manshan tribe began to popularize the Warframe and the small universe interstellar expansion, the battle data has been large enough. Chen Mo can use the data of those war robots to build the war robot that guards Saturn.

Three light days away from Shigan, a terrestrial dwelling planet, Black Bull.

"My lord, it has been clear that the Shigan galaxy is surrounded by at least three space traps. In addition to ours, there are also the Black pupil civilization and the White star civilization. The first legion of the Black pupil civilization is moving, and the white star civilization is the seventh army blocking It seems that other civilizations have not participated in the blockade and have no specific intelligence information. "The middle-aged man reported meticulously.

"It's interesting now." Dan turned, exposing the side of the copper-colored skin, his eyes were dignified: "The first legion of the black pupil civilization has action, which means that He is involved in this matter. First, Tong Qing, and then He appears black. Hitomi has made a lot of determination this time. "

He is the chief of staff of the First Corps of Heitong Civilization and the chief of staff of the General Staff of Heitong Civilization. He is regarded as one of the most intelligent legendary conductors. In conjunction with Tong Qing, a legendary master, to join forces, Dan must treat it carefully.

"Any way, check if Tong Qing and Li are not in the Shigan galaxy, and immediately notify me when found, and their space connector." Dan Dandan said.

"Understood." The middle-aged man solemnly took the lead, thought for a while, and then said, "Sir, do we want to help Lord Thunder."

"He doesn't need to help, he always grows up." Dan slightly shook his head: "He is very clever and has a lot of talents, but he is a bit proud, so let him hone and practice here. My goal here is to stare at Hitomi Qing, Tong Qing didn't come out, we don't need to be exposed. "

The middle-aged man nodded.

"How is the space connector building?" Dan continued to ask.

"It's under construction. It's located twenty light days away. It's safe in the cover of a liquid planet." The middle-aged man immediately reported.

"By the way, check the movement of the Baixing civilization. The destruction of the Demon Flame civilization is by their hands. They are hiding behind the scenes and want to watch us fight and take them out. By the way, check where their space connectors are. Destroy it. "

"Okay." The middle-aged man nodded.

The battle between the two sides did not stop.

The sorceress retreated, leaving the black pupil civilization temporarily at a disadvantage in this struggle. And the Thunder civilization was happy for a long time, and another master of the Black pupil civilization entered Shi Ganxing.

Tour, the top-famous Warframe Division who has been famous for the black pupil civilization for a long time, has the ability to awaken superpowers and has a high reputation in the black pupil civilization. He is one of the future successors of the black pupil civilization.

At the risk of being unable to go, Tour, with the black pupil civilization's reinforcements fleet, jumped into the space of Shi Ganxing.

The space alliance was once again scared by the courage of the black pupil civilization. It seems that the black pupil civilization is determined to win this battle for superpower development technology.

Fighting between the two sides broke out again.

With the recovery of the defeated sorceress and the support of Tours, two-on-one, the black pupil civilization quickly gained the upper hand in the struggle. The team led by the thunder civilization thundered steadily, and eventually led the fleet to escape from the original stellar system.

Chaos is spreading around Shiganxing.

chapters.title: Chapter 841: : Endless Sea Civilization Arrives
chapters.body:
Chapter 841: : Endless Sea Civilization Arrives

One month of effort, the captives of Zong Saturn, from forty-one at the beginning, soared to two hundred and thirty. There are 45 senior armour divisions and 185 middle armour divisions. The classification of the Warframe Divisions identified by the Universe has always been vague, and Chen Mo suspects that those senior Warframe Divisions are hydrated.

Weak is weak, strong strength is okay.

Chen Mo wondered.

This month, three waves of invading teams came, and it seemed that his personal star system was a soft persimmon.

Some people who really escaped sent a signal to request repairs outside the stellar system. Chen Mo also refused to let them repair on the outermost planet of the stellar system, and would not let any untrusted people approach the Saturn because of the space connector Under construction.

However, Chen Mo never wanted to come to the robbery team.

Captives should be coolies, and Chen Mo will not abandon coolies.

The space connector entered the construction phase. Chen Mo did not choose to build at Lagrange point, but chose to position in the orbit of Zong Saturn.

A giant ring frame with a diameter of 20 kilometers is floating in the orbit of Zong Saturn. This is the initial outline of the space connector. A steady stream of nano-robots corrodes the asteroids being moved over, then piles up barriers and forms the main body of the space ring like a 3D printer.

The main body of the giant ring will slowly take shape. At that time, Chen Mo will install a special space device that requires dark material on the main body structure.

Not only is the space connector, Zong Saturn is also being ‘ruined’ by nanobots

A month of nano-robot transformation, Zong Saturn is beyond recognition.

On the desolate planet, there are large factories and workshops. Everything here is for the manufacturing of space connectors. In addition, it is a robot manufacturing factory.

In a five-story workshop of 40,000 square meters, in the assembly line, a personal war robot is assembled and formed in the assembly line.

As soon as the robot left the factory, it immediately flew into space and joined the defense system of the stellar system.

The specially designed war robot, spider humanoid, imitates the design of Spider-Man, with six 'octopus legs' behind, with sharp spikes. This is a good form of war robot in melee.

War robots are just one kind of weapon. Their combat effectiveness is quite top-level advanced warframe divisions. Of course, this is because war intelligence is not available without war artificial intelligence. War robots are not so useful.

To target war robots, war intelligence viruses are needed. That kind of procedural weapon can only be owned by top-level civilization and god-level civilization, and only advanced civilization can be partially owned.

Chen Mo used war robots to defend against massive invasions of ordinary life. In Shi Ganxing, no civilization other than a god-level civilization has a war intelligence virus.

Chen Mo also designed suicide drones and ultra-high-energy space-based weapons, which will be deployed outside the entire stellar system and stars.

He needs to build it into a fortress to build space connectors with peace of mind.

Space is blocked, and there is no absolute security in the Shigan galaxy.

Just need to use super-light-speed space curvature spacecraft to jump into the vicinity of their stellar system from outside to detonate the space-destroying weapons. The entire stellar system will be destroyed at the speed of light, just like throwing a bomb into a person swamped in a swamp.

They can only defend against non-space destruction weapons and enemies in the galaxy.

As long as the space connector is successfully constructed and Shi Ganxing is escaped, how the god-level civilization wants to fight has nothing to do with him.

...

"It should be near here."

Shui Ling took a look at the star chart, which was similar to the star chart the teacher said. The place they were looking for should be near here.

"Look at the radar, what special place is nearby."

"Out of four light days, there is a dwelling galaxy. Within five light days, there are seven galaxies, two of which have life planets." An old turtle man standing next to Shu Ling opened his mouth. The forearm is also green tortoise shell-like and appears somewhat bloated. The head is exposed, the skin is water-blue, and the nose has a long finger, like an elephant's nose, which is very characteristic.

"The direction is in the third quadrant."

Shui Ling looks for a rough direction based on her feelings.

"The third quadrant has only one galaxy, and in one light day, it is a desolate galaxy. The data show that it is a civilized territory that can be used for lease." The old turtle man looked at the star map and said.

"Go and see." Shui Ling gave instructions.

The fleet started slowly and accelerated.

A day later, the fleet stopped outside the galaxy, and in the holographic video of the spacecraft, it could clearly see the specific conditions of the galaxy, including the orbits of the planets.

"Someone is developing this star system," a Murloc reported.

The image of Zong Saturn was enlarged and put out, huge holographic images can be seen, various buildings and factories on Zong Saturn.

"The teacher should be here." Shui Ling said.

"Would you like to go in and order the owner of the galaxy to come out to greet him?" The old tortoise asked.

Shui Ling thought for a moment, and shook his head, saying: "We don't know what life is inside. The teacher said that they can leave Shi Ganxing, it may not be ordinary life. Follow the rules, send them a signal, explain our origin, and hope to see you."

Although Shui Ling also wanted to enter directly, the teacher told her that she didn't dare not listen, otherwise it would not be good to offend others.

Chen Mo has noticed that a fleet of fleets stopped outside the galaxy, and he is also vigilant. Radar shows that this fleet is much larger than previous fleets. More than thirty spacecraft are obviously of no small origin.

"The other party has sent a message, the life of the endless sea civilization, and they hope to see the owner of the galaxy." Mo Nubao reported.

"Endless sea civilization?"

Chen Mo's pupil contracted like a needle.

The life of the endless sea civilization is strange here.

In just one moment, Chen Mo had many possibilities to dodge his mind. In the impression, he did not have any intersection with Endless Sea. The other party came here, should not come to seek revenge; or was the news of Gray Twenty-one here exposed? Or is it to find the difference?

Chen Moke doesn't think that people of endless sea civilization need to come to him for his help.

"Contact them." Chen Mo immediately ordered the Mo woman.

Soon, the holographic call video was switched on, and a mermaid girl popped up in front of Chen Mo's holographic light curtain. For the first time, Chen Mo saw sea-like life, water-blue skin and scales, and occasionally glowing other colors under the light.

For Chen Mo, this look is not very ugly, but looks cute.

"I'm Mo Chen, the owner of this stellar system. Is there anything wrong with your Excellency?" Chen Mo asked happily. There is no inferior feeling because the other party is the life of a divine civilization.

He doesn't think that the life of this universe is more precious than anyone else.

"Hello, Mr. Mo Chen, we are the fleet of endless sea civilization, and I am Shuiling."

Shui Ling looked at Chen Mo. In order to avoid the wanted of Lagerstroemia civilization, Chen Mo's face was disguised with blue skin instead of the original appearance. Shui Ling felt that the man in the holographic video was very strange, but couldn't say anything special.

"We are not malicious here, can we talk face to face?" Shui Ling asked.

Chen Mo looked at Shui Ling in the holographic video and was lost in thought. Let him guess, absolutely could not guess where Shui Ling came from. The other party wants to talk to him in person, he doesn't think he has anything to talk to Shui Ling in person.

But Chen Mo nodded and agreed: "You can talk face to face and unload the Warframe's destructive thermal weapon before you can enter."

"Master Shuiling, no." The old Turtleman hurriedly reminded: "We don't know the origin of the other party, it's a bit risky."

Shuiling is also in trouble.

Unloading the devastating thermal weapon, after she entered, the only combat method left was melee, and the combat effectiveness and threats would plummet. If the opponent had an attempt, her situation would be very passive.

"Okay, I unloaded the hot weapon and went in." Shui Ling said.

Closed the communication, the old turtle man sighed: "Master Shui Ling, this is a little risky, what if the other party has a plan for you?"

"Tortoise, don't worry, even if there is no hot weapon, my strength is still there, and if they have any motivation, the fleet can support it." Shui Ling is still very confident in her own strength.

"Sir, I'll stay with you," said the elephant.

chapters.title: Chapter 842: :Cooperation
chapters.body:
Chapter 842: :Cooperation

Shui Ling and Guixiang watched the situation of the galaxy all the way, and they could detect all kinds of intelligent weapons. They were already discovered, and how many were unexplored.

This stellar system is quite a fortress. If you do not use space destruction weapons and break from the outside, you will need a lot of thought.

Thermal weapons exploded in space and did little damage.

Nanorobots are corroding asteroids and meteorites in space, and they are building various weapons and machinery.

Shui Ling and Gui Xiang have seen the world and can't help wondering.

The number of stellar galaxies is small, but the technological strength is no less than a top civilization. When did Shi Ganxing have such power? The entire Shigan galaxy is unaware.

It seems that this star system is not as simple as they think.

At 7 billion kilometers, Shui Ling was relatively calm. She was brought in according to the teacher's instructions. The subject was a bit of a right, because the teacher knew she could help her leave Shi Ganxing.

If it is ordinary, water lingling will be strange.

The horror of the tortoise's heart is like the tsunami earthquake. I thought they were looking for a common target. Perhaps there is a special space for chaos here, but now he doesn't think so.

The owners here master the technology of no less than the top forces.

All kinds of floating robots and space-based weapons in space can be clearly sensed even if they are flying in space.

"Two, please follow me."

A war robot appeared next to the two, greeted them, and led them to land towards Zong Saturn.

"Top artificial intelligence?" Seeing the war robot, the look under the turtle tortoise changed.

Top artificial intelligence is a tool only mastered by top civilizations. This kind of thing is dangerous but practical.

In the history of the development of cosmic civilization, there have been accidents in which top-level artificial intelligence has betrayed intelligent life, occupying three galaxies, and developing wars. To destroy the natural life between the universe, eventually the galaxy space was blocked by god-level civilization and a large number of intelligent virus programs were launched Signals before destroying top artificial intelligence.

"There are antimatter factories and dark matter factories."

Seeing the anti-matter and dark matter accumulation locations indicated by the radar of the Warframe, the face of the tortoise changed again and again, and it did not calm down instantly. The anti-material factory is a technology only mastered by top civilizations, and even advanced civilizations are blocked for technological monopoly.

Dark matter is even more scarce. It is only available to god-level civilizations and some top civilizations. In order to monopolize, several companies with dark matter extraction technology have joined the dark matter club to realize the dark matter monopoly of the entire universe.

Now they see dark matter factories and antimatter factories here.

There is no doubt that this is a stellar system occupied by a top civilization.

The look of the tortoise is uncertain. Shui Ling is much calmer, but as she approaches, her eyes slowly become more dignified. The arrangement and technology of this star system also shocked her.

She was sure that this was not the base of a divine civilization.

She didn't know what kind of forces the teacher predicted.

It didn't take long for Shui Ling and Gui Xiang to meet the people they wanted to see. They looked at Chen Mo, who also looked at them.

Shui Ling and Turtle Elephant's complexions changed.

The god-like life of the endless sea civilization is more or less sensitive to the future, including danger. Chen Mo and Jing Ge's reaction to them was extremely terrifying.

The magnetic field of the two is not weaker than their teacher.

In the holographic video call just now, Shui Ling just felt that Chen Mo was special. Now, close contact will make the magnetic field so clear.

When was it that the top masters like teachers were so common? When they appeared, they were two, and they still looked so young, and Ling Ling and Guixiang were shocked inexplicably.

Chen Mo is not surprised to have seen all kinds of strange aliens and the endless sea-like sea people in the shape of the mermaid.

"Two, what's the matter, let's talk straight."

"Mr. Is there a way to leave the Shigan galaxy?" Shuiling reorganized her shocking mood and cut into the subject.

At least Chen Mo's magnetic field of life didn't give her the disgust like the beasts of the dark forest civilization, but a very comfortable feeling.

As soon as this word came out, Chen Mo's eyes narrowed, Jing Ge's eyes locked on them.

Feeling that the atmosphere was not right, Shui Ling opened her mouth and explained, "We have the prophet ability in the endless sea. The teacher foresees that there is a way to leave Shi Ganxing. Come here deliberately and not malicious. Life with prophet ability does not lie, otherwise it will affect the consciousness of the brain Function, making the prophet weak. "

Sensing the special magnetic field of life of Chen Mo and Jing Ge, the original superiority of Shui Ling's divine life disappeared, and she became more cautious. She also knew that the two in front of her might be god-level life, otherwise she would not be given that feeling.

"Oh?"

Chen Mo was very surprised. The god-level life of the endless sea civilization possessed this special ability. He was the first to contact.

"We do have a way to leave the Shigan galaxy. What do you want?"

"We can stay and help sir. When leaving, sir can take us." Shui Ling said.

"As far as I know, god-level civilizations have techniques and methods for leaving. Why don't you think of it yourself?" Chen Mo asked curiously.

Shui Ling looked directly into Chen Mo's eyes, and was a little serious: "I want to build it myself, but the teacher asked me to come over. If Mr. is feasible and convenient, the endless sea is grateful."

Chen Mo ponders the pros and cons.

The grievances of the endless sea civilization and the dark forest civilization, he heard some in Shi Ganxing.

Now the dark forest is also in Shi Ganxing, leaving the endless sea life, which may attract the hostility of the dark forest, but at the same time, it will also get the friendship and help of the endless sea civilization.

The endless sea foresees that he has a way to leave Shi Ganxing, and there may not be no cause and effect.

"You can stay, but there are conditions." Chen Mo said.

"Sir, you say." Shui Ling An Song relieved.

"Your fleet and personnel, including you, must obey my command and arrangement before leaving. On this condition, you are not allowed to leave." Chen Mo said.

"Master Shui Ling, this ..."

"Okay." As soon as the elephant wanted to say something, it was interrupted by Shui Ling, and he agreed without hesitation.

The teacher's prediction and close contact made Shui Ling choose to believe in Chen Mo.

Their endless sea has the special ability of the prophets. Once awakened, the prophets will not lie to the things predicted, and will choose to believe the things predicted. If you don't even believe what you foresee, let alone believe in other lives, it will affect brain activity and cause them to weaken and inaccurate.

Chen Mogao took a look at Shui Ling's decisiveness.

The endless sea civilization did not behave high, at least in this regard, they did not dislike Chen Mo.

"Let's all of you in."

Oder drank the scarlet drink in his hand, the fingers as rough as crocodile skin, squeezed the glass in his hand into pieces, and his eyes were full of wildness and wildness.

On the armor of his body, a black flame symbol can be clearly seen, which is the symbol of civilization in the dark forest.

Oder's mouth was like a dinosaur. He stretched out his long tongue and licked the scarlet drink left at the corner of his mouth. He shook the glass **** in his hand, and his eyes fell on the holographic video. Is this stellar system? "

"OK, this stellar system is undergoing a large-scale transformation, and it may be a space connector." The lion head next to him answered.

"Oh, it's interesting." Oder grabbed a drink again, narrowed his eyes with a round slit, and flickered with a sinister light: "The news of the endless sea civilization's seafood is spread out in this stellar system, letting the entire galaxy know Let them be busy. "

Oder gave a weird sneer, full of jokes.

chapters.title: Chapter 843: : The Unsympathetic Of The Universe
chapters.body:
Chapter 843: : The Unsympathetic Of The Universe

The endless sea civilization enters an unknown stellar system and there is a way to leave Shigan Star in the galaxy. The news spread like a storm across the galaxy, and even the coordinates of the stellar system where Chen Mo was exposed were exposed.

As soon as they came out, they escaped from the life of Shi Ganxing's main star, and changed directions one by one, converging towards the star system where Chen Mo was.

Today the Shigan galaxy is like a closed marsh, and the struggle of god-level civilization is spreading beyond the Shigan star, and more and more galaxies are being destroyed. At this time, the endless sea civilization is undoubtedly a life to escape.

The endless sea civilization has the ability of prophets. In other life speculations, the endless sea civilization should predict the safety of the galaxy and choose a garrison if there is a way to escape.

There is a steady stream of spaceships, and every life on the spacecraft has a rush of hope, with hope in its eyes.

Chen Mo and Shui Ling stared at the video frequency detected by the radar.

Neither of them looked very good.

The quantum radar of the spacecraft of the endless sea civilization shows that the center of the galaxy is centered. Within three light days, a variety of light-speed spacecraft, like locusts, fly towards their stellar system.

"Mu, start the highest combat alert. Any unauthorized spacecraft will be destroyed once it enters the range of the galaxy."

"Ok."

As soon as the order came, all the weapons deployed in the galaxy were activated. A steady stream of public channel electromagnetic wave warnings and quantum information warnings are sent to the Shigan Galaxy.

Shui Ling was also very decisive, and he did not hesitate to let the fleet of endless sea civilization, follow the instructions of Chen Mo, and join the guard of the stellar system.

The Warframe Division of Endless Sea Civilization has no arbitrary objection, obeys Chen Mo's instructions, and joins the guard team. The consequences of letting a continuous stream of spaceships enter the galaxy are unimaginable.

"Trouble to Mr." Shui Ling said lightly.

They knew in their hearts that the accident was caused by them. Someone was staring at them, and now exposed the position of Chen Mo's star.

"If you choose to let you stay, you just want to bear the possible troubles." Chen Mo said without hesitation.

Both were silent.

This is just the beginning. The news that the endless sea civilization is stationed here spreads out, and a continuous stream of life will converge here.

The special prophet ability of the endless sea civilization gives these homeless lives a bit more hope, so they do n’t need to be tempted to come over.

The main star of Shi Ganxing has nine trillion intelligent lives, excluding the surrounding affected galaxies.

There are tens of billions of lives successfully escaped by the speed of light spacecraft, all of which are noble officials, civilized nobles, rich people, or powerful armour divisions. Without the ordinary intelligent life of the speed of light spacecraft, it is still far behind, and that part is at least trillions, which is the most terrible.

Stellar space and stellar outer space are densely packed with a variety of space-based weapons, war robots and nano-robots. Without warning, they entered the spacecraft docked in the stellar system, and there was only one end.

But I managed to catch a little intelligent life of hope for survival and freedom, but I didn't listen to these warnings in my ears, holding on to the fluke of being lucky.

Chen Mo and Shui Ling's eyes fell on the alarm radar at the same time, their expressions were quiet.

Shui Ling needless to say, the genius of the god-level civilization, one of the future heirs, low-level life to her, like an ant, she would not care about the life and death of those lives. Chen Mo, seeing wind and rain, will not show pity to the innocents of these wars, because in the universe, especially before the war, compassion has no value.

The universe does not sympathize with the weak, and this is a **** reality.

A locust-like spacecraft finally flew into the edge of the stellar blockade of the galaxy.

Boom boom! !!

The explosion took place in space, and the flare of the fire suddenly exploded, like a devastating firework. At first, more than a dozen spacecraft blasted into the blockade, tens of thousands of lives inside, and all died under the terrible high temperature of anti-material bombs.

Subsequent approaching ships did not have time to slow down at all, and as soon as they entered the blockade, they were destroyed along with all life inside.

The vast majority of light-speed spacecraft are manned transport spacecraft. There is no other weapon except the protection system to protect the cosmic meteorite. There is no resistance in the face of space-based weapons.

Boom ...

The explosion continued. Hundreds of spacecraft burst like balloons. In space, there was no sound of explosion, and it was destroyed instantly.

Chen Mo and Shui Ling looked calm, as if watching moths extinguish fire.

After receiving warnings of various explosions, the speed of some spacecraft began to slow down and hover outside the galaxy, and they dared not enter it rashly.

More and more spacecraft hovering outside the stellar system. Unlucky spacecraft collided directly and disintegrated in space. The surviving life inside floated in space wearing armor.

Finally stopped, Chen Mo thought it was over, and sudden changes occurred.

Nearly 500 large spacecraft hovering outside the galaxy, the hatches opened, and dense machines were thrown out like horses and bees, swarming towards the star system.

Obviously, the five hundred spacecraft were camouflaged, and the robot's technology was not low.

The spacecraft is good at attacking, but these robots are relatively troublesome, and the number is obviously prepared.

"Dark flame." Shui Ling saw the design style of the machine and the black flame logo, and blurted out subconsciously: "It is the beast of the dark forest civilization."

For those orcs in the dark forest, Shu Ling can't be more familiar. The design style and logo are all very clear and you can see it at a glance.

"It should be the news they spread."

Shuiling looks ugly.

"Here it is." Chen Mo looked coldly at the spaceship where the robot was dropped. In this case, he was not surprised, so he stood quietly: "Mo girl, put a war robot."

All the war robots deployed on the planets in the edge of the galaxy and in space were released, and they flew towards them in the direction of the coming robots.

Chen Mo's response was obviously much faster than the other party expected.

Ten minutes later, the war machines of both sides finally approached and hit one place at a speed of tens of thousands of kilometers per second.

Millions of war robots are fighting.

Fighting, explosions, and lasers are raging in space, and menacing invading robots are blocked by war robots.

Nanobots do not work in this level of battle.

The universe has developed into the current system, and the unique attributes of various technologies and tools have already been tapped. Nanorobots are useful for construction in peacetime. But as a weapon, it has little effect when it comes to trained and prepared teams.

The horrific electromagnetic pulses and the electromagnetic pulse bombs targeting the nano-robots during the battle can destroy all the nano-robots wherever they pass. Nanomachines without electromagnetic pulse protection shells are like fleas jumping into magma in the presence of high-energy electromagnetic pulses.

To Chen Mo's defense, the attacker was obviously a little unexpected, and the speed of throwing the machine suddenly accelerated. When the other party dropped the machine recklessly, the spacecraft suddenly exploded and turned into a piece of cosmic debris.

"What method did you use to destroy those spaceships?" Su Lingling asked in surprise.

Chen Mo smiled and said, "The most taboo thing in war is to attack the heavily fortresses of the opponent without knowing what weapons and means the enemy has. There are stealth robots in the war robots, which can hide the detection of excess radar and touch those Attack next to the ship. "

Shui Ling put herself in the enemy's position to find a countermeasure. After thinking about it for a long time, in addition to storming, she found no feasible way to break through the galaxy.

The current galaxy is a fortress.

The only feasible thing is to use space weapons and light-speed destruction weapons to attack and destroy the entire star system.

However, light speed weapons and space weapons are generally held by the military of all major civilizations. Once the use of space weapons and weapons of light destruction means that the military participates in battle, a comprehensive war will erupt.

In the command post of their spacecraft, they can intuitively understand the actual situation of the entire battlefield.

The most direct collision of intelligent robots is without superfluous tricks. Destroying each other is the goal. It is very tragic, and the stump of the robot floats in space.

"If it is a dark forest civilization, they should be more than just this means?" Chen Mo looked at the confrontation in confusion.

Shui Ling agreed to nod: "The life of the dark forest civilization is very cunning, and it will not be that simple."

As soon as the remarks came to an end, the alarm sounded suddenly, and Chen Mo looked at the video frequency that jumped out of the alarm.

chapters.title: Chapter 844: : Intruder
chapters.body:
Chapter 844: : Intruder

Radar revealed that the ten Warframe Divisions did not know when they had entered the stellar space and were approaching Saturn quickly.

Assassin stealth battle armor, which was not discovered by quantum radar, was discovered by optical radar deployed in the stellar system.

Chen Mo also has an Assassin Warframe, knowing that this Warframe is special, so when deploying defensive weapons and radar, he specially arranged two types of quantum radar and optical radar.

Chen Mo immediately understood that the other party's large-scale invasion was just a disguise, and their target was Zong Saturn. Knowing that Zong Saturn is building the escaped Shigan galaxy's space connector here and destroying Zong Saturn, his hard work during this time will be wasted.

"Jing Ge, twenty-one, you have a look. There are turtles, Aojin, Orli ... Ten of you, also go up." Chen Mo will also be on the field ten good endless sea civilization war armor division Call up.

It would not be a good thing to bring the Warframe Division of the Dark Forest civilization to Zong Saturn.

Jing Ge and Gray didn't say anything, turned around and left.

The Warframe Division of Endless Sea Civilization is a bit unwilling to directly command Chen Mo, but here is Chen Mo's territory. When he came in, Shui Ling had already agreed to the party's conditions, and they could not help it.

Attracted Dark Forest civilization, this trouble is directly related to them.

"Give them some toys first to relieve their boredom, Mo Nu, greet them and stop them from approaching Zong Saturn."

Chen Mo ordered the Mo woman.

Space-based weapons and war machines floating in space near the invasion location surrounded the position where ten Warframe Divisions were sitting.

Since preparing to build the space connector, Chen Mo has considered the possibility of various invasions, including the possibility of the struggle of the divine civilization to spread to this stellar system.

The stellar system is well-prepared. The entire stellar system is covered by various radar detections and weapons. Chen Mo wants to ensure that without strategic space weapons and light-speed weapons, the galaxy cannot be destroyed.

Today, these deployments are working.

This stellar system is slightly smaller than the solar system. It takes three light hours to travel from the star to the stars at the edges of the galaxy. Those infiltrating lives are still one hour away from the location of Zong Saturn.

Chen Mo is not worried that they can destroy Zong Saturn.

Even if the speed of light weapons detonated at their location, it would take an hour to reach Zong Saturn, and they could leave the galaxy calmly. It is not a light-speed weapon or a space weapon. It only needs to be intercepted in space. Antimatter explosion in space is without threat.

It only detonated the speed of light weapons. Those Warframe Divisions did not escape at the speed of light. They could only use traditional thermal weapons.

The invading ten Warframe divisions were cautious, but the speed of the Warframe was not low. It was 150,000 kilometers per second and half the speed of light. This speed can reach Zong Saturn in two hours.

The formation of the ten Warframe divisions is scattered, but they use quantum communication to echo each other.

The penetration of small teams can reduce the probability of being discovered.

After another ten minutes of flight, the ten War Armor Divisions apparently thought that they had successfully invaded, speeding up a bit.

suddenly.

Four light masses appeared in space. When the light mass exploded, ten laser beams struck space and bombarded ten people's armor.

Space-based weapon in the sky, aiming to trigger.

Two armoured divisions that did not start their defenses were engulfed in heat.

The surrounding robots and space-based weapons, like piranhas smelling meat, slammed into the other eight armour divisions.

Chen Mo himself did not count how many space-based weapons were deployed in the space of the stellar system. When the planet began to transform, a continuous stream of space-based weapons and war robots lifted off from various terrestrial planets in the galaxy, spreading across all corners of the galaxy. .

This is why Chen Mo is not worried about outside invasion.

However, on the eight invading Warframe divisions, the energy shield blocked the laser, forming an obvious light spot, the identity was exposed, and the speed decreased significantly.

"Both are top-tier battle armors." Chen Mo at a glance determined the level of the other's armor, and instantly became energetic.

God-level civilization's top battle armor technology is much higher than that of other top civilizations. Only with superb technology can we dare to advance with such a high-energy pulsed laser.

And these ten sets of battle armor do not look like standard battle armor.

This is a master of Dark Forest civilization, and only masters will use custom warframes.

The intruder had confirmed that he had been found.

This level of preparedness is unexpected.

In their opinion, the endless sea civilization just came here not long ago, and they should not be able to completely control the entire galaxy, but they are wrong.

Now in the stellar system, it is considered to be encircled.

The invaders were not afraid, they did not retreat, and evaded the direct exposure of the laser in space, began to look for opportunities to destroy space-based weapons, and quickly approached Saturn.

Chen Mo was surprised by their actions, but was quickly attracted to one of the Warframe Divisions. This Warframe Division has a faster response and action than several other Warframe Divisions, and its strength is obviously stronger.

"It should be a big fish, focusing on taking care of him." Chen Mo ordered the Mo woman to mark the warframe division among them.

All laser targets turned to the Warframe Division that Chen Mo referred to.

Pulse lasers, war robots and anti-matter bombs all surrounded him, dozens of lasers, and various war robots and weapons were approaching. The rapid warning of the Warframe radar caused the intruder to stagnate, and he did not expect that he would be targeted.

No longer hidden, the leader turned on the full power of the Warframe, quickly approached a space-based weapon, and raised his hand to destroy the weapon.

With the cover of the exploding rays, he quickly escaped from the place and continued to approach Zongsa quickly. Each time the laser is about to converge on him, an interference bomb is released, and the lock is released from the interference bomb.

In space, five space-based laser weapons were destroyed, and the other party did not seem to stop.

"Guts are so fat." Chen Mo was surprised, and then contacted Jinge: "Will you play?"

"Yes." Jing Ge's indifferent voice came from the call.

Shui Ling next to him was not nervous, but he looked forward to it. The first time she met, she clearly felt that Jing Ge and Chen Mo gave her a strong sense of oppression, like the pressure of a teacher, which was very scary.

During this time, she tried to inquire about the origin of Chen Mo and others, but it was blank.

The top warframe division is comparable to the top civilization weapon technology and warframe technology, and it is a technology chain in the entire industrial field.

This strength and technological capital can establish a top civilization in the Universe, and should not be anonymous. However, she could not find any information about Chen Mo and Jing Ge, and the two appeared out of thin air.

Had it not been for the teacher's foreknowledge to have her look for each other, she would certainly not have believed in this strange life of unknown origin.

She has never seen Jing Ge and Chen Mo do it, and now she can understand it intuitively.

...

Oder is very surprised that this stellar system has such a top-level weapon system and defense.

In the information he obtained, this private stellar system was untapped and it was thought that the defense would be weak, but now it is discovered that the defense here is not lost to a top-level civilized military base.

In order to achieve this level of defense, a top-level civilization and the entire system of technical support are needed, and then deployed at full speed for more than a month before it can be achieved. And the endless sea civilization has just been stationed in for a short time, it is impossible to have so much time.

The only possibility is that it was already deployed here before the Lingling came.

This makes sense, but what surprised him was that all the weapons technology deployed in the stellar system, including the war robots that blocked their large forces, were not the technical style of endless sea civilization.

Now Odd is puzzled, but his main purpose is to destroy the hope of the endless sea civilization to escape.

If he can catch Shui Ling back to the dark forest, it is best, but his prestige in the dark forest will surely increase, and he will become a strong heir to inherit the dark forest in the future.

When Orde destroyed a space-based weapon, the radar sirens became sharp again.

Oder saw that a Warframe Division was approaching him quickly, and it was Jing Ge.

chapters.title: Chapter 845: : Death Of Orde
chapters.body:
Chapter 845: : Death Of Orde

Jing Ge's speed is fast, the route is calculated by the artificial intelligence of the Warframe, and the distance to Oder is the fastest. Even close to Oder, Jing Ge still did not mean to slow down.

The moment the laser swept over, I saw Jing Ge's simple shift and hid easily. The laser didn't even activate the armor shield of the armor. Under the battle armor, Jing Ge's gaze was still cold, without a wave.

Ord was a little surprised. Ultra-high-speed offset, which seems simple, requires strong control. After being easily escaped by the other side for a few laser shots, Oder became cautious, his expression moved.

After the radar prompts, the distance between the two people is not far, and at the speed of the warframe, the distance is instantly shortened, and the distance between the two people is only a thousand miles.

Master.

Although Aude was arrogant, but born in the dark forest, he could naturally distinguish his opponent's ability.

Without hesitation, it was just a moment when Orde fired a dozen anti-material bullets, blocking Jing Ge's flight path towards him. The trajectory of each bullet is calculated. No matter how Jing Ge changes direction, the bullet can accurately seal the road of flight.

The anti-material bullet tracking function and detonation function allow Oder to control the explosion of the bullet at any time.

Jing Ge still didn't flinch, a burst of antimatter bullets fired at a constant speed.

The bullets collided in space, more than a dozen huge light clusters lit up, Jing Ge's body was folded, and he passed through the position between the two light clusters in front, straight out of Oder.

At the moment when he was close to Oder, a momentary stop, the fighting thorn in his hand illuminated the terrible short-pulse laser cold, and stabbed at Oder's heart.

Strong body, wide open and close fighting style, there is not even a trace of lag, the purpose is to kill Orde.

At this moment, Oder's dark green skin, finally facing Jin Ge's thorn, finally moved. Even if he tried to think high, he still underestimated the strength of his opponent. This Warframe Division is the top Warframe Division.

A feeling of horror.

This feeling has not appeared on him for a long time.

There is fierce competition inside the dark forest. Struggles are often seen, and he grew up in this environment. Even facing the masters in the dark forest, except for the top few powers, others have never given him such a terrible feeling.

The beast's perception made him particularly sensitive to danger.

Huh!

Odd snarled, forcing his body to lean back. I saw Jing Ge's fighting stabs brushing the armor, pulling a piece of flesh on his shoulders, dark black blood with a metallic luster floating in space.

Ode, who had stabilized his figure, saw the wound on his shoulder, healed at a rate that was visible to the naked eye, and the metal of the armor was slowly creeping back to his original state.

After waiting for Jing Ge to do it again, Oder's body was quickly raised. The original sturdy body of more than two meters was pulled up one meter, the body was stronger than the original, and the armor became larger.

"Crazy, not dead."

Seeing the change of the water Ling of Aude, startled.

Madness and immortality are special abilities of the Dark Forest civilization. Generally, only one awakens. When she fought with Prince Dark Dragon, Prince Dark Dragon was awakened and crazy, and it took her a lot of effort to seriously hurt each other.

The speed and response of the mad dark forest civilization beast will increase to a higher level. Without death, he can quickly heal injuries, horror of cells and schizophrenia. As long as the other party does not die directly, he can heal without medical technology.

Among the top warframe divisions, the orc-like strength of Dark Forest definitely belongs to the top four positions. After the madness of the Dark Forest Civilized Warframe Division, the strength of the body has also increased, and many incredible tactical skills can be made.

Now she actually sees the beasts of the dark forest civilization awakening two special abilities at the same time.

In the history of the Dark Forest, those who awakened both abilities at the same time are legendary figures. It is said that the founding beast of the Dark Forest civilization is an orc-like creature with two special abilities.

Shui Ling did not expect that the dark forest civilization actually let such a good seedling come to the Shigan Galaxy.

"Can he do it?" Shui Ling didn't begin to calm down.

The presence of such a character in the dark forest is undoubtedly a huge threat to the endless sea. She thought that the Dark Dragon Prince was the top seed of the Dark Forest, but there was no one hidden here.

Shui Ling determined that if he was himself, he would definitely lose.

"rest assured."

When Chen Mo heard Shui Ling explained the special ability of the Dark Forest civilization, she nodded calmly and told Jinge instead.

He knows Jing Ge's ability very well, and is not worried about any major problems.

Chen Ge in combat status is a metamorphosis, and Chen Mo is well aware of this. Every time I practiced with Jing Ge, I was abused enough. So far, Chen Mo doesn't know what Jing Ge looks like after he puts out all his strength.

In another place, the Warframe Division of Grey Twenty-One and Endless Sea Civilization have already encountered the Warframe Division of Dark Forest Civilization.

Gray twenty-one was the first, and his body was erratic in space. Stealth armor and camouflage, let the opponent's armored radar lock the target is not stable. After Jinge's perverted training, to deal with these Warframe Divisions again, it is just a beast who breaks out of his cage.

Without the horrible pressure of Jinge, the twenty-one movements of the gray are flowing.

The figure and flight path are very weird and cannot be followed even if they are seen.

Instant stop!

Gray Twenty-one approached the Dark Forest Civilized Warframe Division and stopped on his side. The other party apparently noticed the arrival of Gray Twenty-One, turned around and raised his hand, but the next moment, Gray Twenty-one's body suddenly disappeared and appeared on the other's head.

This turn of events suddenly made the other party lose their scale and caught off guard.

laugh……

The piercing sound was only heard by him in space, but his body was unable to move, his brain no longer thought, and his vision was fixed on this strange gray armor.

With no defense from the opponent, it took less than five seconds from the start to the end of the battle.

"superpower?"

All the lives that discovered this scene, including the Warframe Division on the endless sea, look very different.

They thought that this little man who looked thin and thin was just an ordinary senior armor division, but now, the instantaneous movement shown by Gray Twenty-One has completely changed them.

When was superpower so common?

Shui Ling was unhappy with the color of the shiny fish scales.

I thought that Chen Mo and Jing Ge were top divisions. The little man was just a small follower. I didn't expect that little man was so powerful.

Chen Mo's real identity became mysterious in Shui Ling's eyes.

Judging from the previous battle, Grey 21's ability should be the ability to move instantly or flash, but Jing Ge can't see through it, it should be an invisible ability that does not show the appearance.

As for Chen Mo, she didn't know what special ability he had from beginning to end.

But she was sure that Chen Mo must have.

Here, obviously Chen Mo said, is the leader of the three.

She was guessing what kind of force she was, and she had three superpowers casually, and so was the top civilization.

Facing the body-like Ode, Jing Ge's expression was still cold, and there was no fluctuation due to the change of the other party. Bullying up, the instant burst out, the two sides collided together.

"You are the first one to let me use my full life, and you can die." Aude uttered on the public channel, his voice was angry, like the unhappy after being bitten by an ant.

The face of the crocodile under the armor was bleak.

He didn't expect to be forced out of two abilities here.

Before the dark prince was here, he was arrogant and arrogant, and he was very high-profile, so he hid as an outbreak of competition for dark forest succession talents.

The more he fought, the more shocked Oder became.

From the contact between the two sides, he was forced to dodge. Even if his speed became faster, there was nothing he could do about this strange Warframe Division. The opponent seemed to be able to see through his movements.

This Warframe Division revealed weirdness everywhere.

The opponent looks like the top armour division of the endless sea, but not like it.

The opponent can see through his combat moves, like the endless sea's ability to predict, but his armor design is not endless sea, and the fighting style is brutal, similar to their dark forest civilization's orclike, more like an orcs s life.

He doesn't even know where the other Warframe came from now.

There was no sound of the dogfights in space, but onlookers knew that extreme danger was always revealed there. Consecutive advanced combat skills, even a small mistake or a few milliseconds slow, can be fatal.

Suddenly, Aude's beast-like sharp pupils quickly rounded, seeming to catch each other's mistakes. He grinned, and with the paw in his hand turned, he seemed to be able to see Jing Ge cut into two sections.

The next moment, Oder froze.

One claw grabbed the air, and the opponent's armour avoided his attack at an incredible angle. The rounded pupil shrinks like a needle instantly, and Ode is in chaos, feeling that this beast meets a terrible hunter.

The corner of his eyes glanced at the same time as he swept away, the other party had turned around.

Too much.

But it's too late.

Jing Ge's fighting thorns reached his face door. The next moment, the fighting thorns penetrated from the center of his eyebrow like thorn tofu and came out through his brain.

chapters.title: Chapter 846: : Dialogue With The Lord Of The Endless Sea
chapters.body:
Chapter 846: : Dialogue With The Lord Of The Endless Sea

Aude's body was in front of her, and Shui Ling couldn't help swallowing her mouth. When she recalled the last incredible movement of Jing Ge during the battle just now, she still didn't want to understand how Jing Ge did it.

Now Jing Ge's eyes changed.

This man was shocked by her horrific fighting power and wide open fight.

The legendary seed of the Dark Forest Civilization's dual-power awakening was killed here, or was killed by an unknown Warframe Division. I am afraid that the Dark Forest Civilization is going crazy.

It can be imagined that the anger of the dark forest civilization is high.

What kind of monster power did the teacher predict in Shi Ganxing?

Shui Ling is fortunate that she has not been hostile to Chen Mo, otherwise there will be hostility from the dark forest civilization, and with such an unknown top-level force, they will have a lot of trouble.

"You may face revenge in the dark forest in the future," Shui Ling reminded.

The endless sea is not afraid, because the Dark Dragon Emperor was seriously injured in the endless sea and was assassinated on the way back. The dark forest blame the endless sea. The two are already on the same level.

There is one more hate now.

She was curious how Chen Mo would react.

It just disappointed her. When Chen Mo heard the news, her face remained calm, and she didn't seem to take it seriously.

"Now it is time to consider whether the dark forest is hysterical or not, and use space curvature spacecraft to drop space weapons at us. Space weapons are the most troublesome," said Chen Mo.

Didi ...

At this moment, Shuiling's quantum communication instrument sounded. Seeing the caller ID, Shuiling hesitated and connected in front of Chen Mo.

The pop-up holographic light curtain is an old merman, who is Shui Ling's teacher.

"Shui Ling, let me talk to that gentleman."

"Ok."

Shui Ling was extremely surprised. Even the teacher called the other person 'sir', which was enough to see the teacher value Chen Mo and treat Chen Mo as a person at the same level.

What the teacher is, she knows.

The power of one of the seven god-level civilizations compares with only six.

In surprise, Shuiling sent the holographic light curtain to the light curtain of the war room.

The old mermaid also looked at Chen Mo, and the two looked at each other.

"Hello, I'm Neptune Fuhen of the Endless Sea, and I'm also a teacher of Water Ling." The old mermaid made a brief introduction, revealing the light of wisdom in his eyes: "In the Shigan system, Mr. Trouble.

"Just help each other."

Chen Mo and Fuyi looked at each other. They were neither humble nor humble. They were not restrained because the other party was the ruler of the god-level civilization, but a kind of equal dialogue.

This was his first contact with the ruler of a divine civilization.

The old merman in front of him looks nothing special. It looks like an ordinary sea-like old man. The fish scales covered in his body are not as colorful as the young life like water lingling, but his eyes contain endless majesty. This is a temperament that has been formed by standing in a high position for a long time. It is a natural inflow and has its own gas field.

"I have made the space of the Shigan galaxy solid, so I do n’t have to worry about the dimensional reduction of the dark forest. To destroy the Shigan galaxy, the dark forest can only start from the edge of the Shigan galaxy, and there are 40,000 light years away from you. Now For the Shigan Galaxy, the space connector is the only way to leave, and external support cannot enter. "

"Thank you." Chen Mo's eyes brightened and she thanked him sincerely.

"It's just helping each other." Fuyi Heshan smiled. "Sir, can you see your true colors?"

Because Chen Mo had killed Ziqi of Ziwei civilization, Ziwei civilization was looking for him. Now his face is camouflaged, and his blue skin can't see his original appearance at all.

Chen Mo didn't expect that the old mermaid knew that he had disguised himself, and was surprised. But thinking of the capabilities of the endless sea civilization, Chen Mo was relieved.

Chen Mo also didn't hide it, and removed the blue nano robot from his body to restore his original appearance. Shui Ling looked at Chen Mo in surprise and dropped her camouflage. It looked pleasing to the eye. She felt that Chen Mo had a special temperament.

Seeing Chen Mo's positive eyes, the old mermaid smiled kindly: "Leave the Shigan galaxy another day. If you are free, sir, you can come to the endless sea as a guest. I will definitely welcome you.

"If you have time, you must go and disturb the old gentleman." Chen Mo said calmly.

After ending the dialogue with the old merman, Chen Mo will continue to do his own thing. Now there is no need to worry about the dark forest sending space weapons to conduct dimensionality reduction strikes. The current threat is mainly the struggle in the Shigan system.

The space of the Shigan galaxy has been solidified, causing an uproar.

The original space trap just made the Shigan galaxy into a swamp. Today the space is solidified, which is equivalent to constructing a cover on the swamp, completely covering the swamp. It is difficult to get in and out.

This means that all forces in the Shigan Galaxy, including god-level civilizations, will lose external assistance. The outer space can only jump outside the Shigan galaxy and cannot enter the interior.

The endless sea did not announce that the solidification of the space was what they did, and the outside world was speculating that it was an endless sea.

Because the top armor division of the Dark Forest civilization was killed, it caused a lot of shock. It may be that the endless sea chooses to block the Shigan galaxy in order to prevent the dimensional reduction of the dark forest.

During the battle between the two sides, there were many spacecraft hovering around the star system, and the battle was observed with radar throughout. The dual abilities shown by Oder have shocked countless lives.

But it is such a legendary seed, strangled by a nameless generation.

The stellar system contains a top power.

This is the first time that forces other than divine civilization dare to challenge the majesty of divine civilization.

The dark forest team was killed, letting countless forces want to forcibly break into the stellar system, completely eliminating unrealistic thoughts. They don't think that their strength is comparable to god-level civilization.

The video of Jing Ge's killing of Orde was quickly sorted out and spread.

"Good fighting consciousness." Dan watched Jinge's fighting picture, his expression was serious: "It's getting more and more interesting here."

The men next to him looked at each other with great surprise. For the first time, they saw adults express such a serious expression, and for the first time they exaggerated. Adults never take a look at the battle of the armoured division.

In the Universe, the strength of a single player can be comparable to that of an adult, and there are only so many people, and they are confident that they still have it. Adult is the first successor to Thor's civilization.

"Sir, what shall we do now? The space here is solidified, and outside reinforcements cannot come in." One of his men asked.

"It should be done by the endless sea, otherwise the dark forest may reduce the dimensionality of that star system. Don't worry, it is isolated here, as we are, and so are others." Dan Shen said, thinking for a moment before continuing: "find pupil Is the Blue and White Civilization resident? "

"No trace of Tong Qing has been found for a while. Baixing civilization seems to have a little trace, but it is not yet certain." Intelligence personnel said.

Dan was still watching Jing Ge's fighting picture seriously, as if he was enjoying an art, he paused after hearing this, his expression was steady, and his throbbing fingers were still flashing with thunder.

Fifteen light-days away from Shi Ganxing live in a concentrated galaxy, in an inconspicuous building on the planet.

A noble-looking woman emerged from a secret room, covering her unaware fatigue. The woman had white fox ears, the skirt behind the buttocks was that, and she pulled a white fox tail.

The half-orc race of the Baixing civilization, the fox girl.

Next to the Foxwoman is an old man with a lion's mane and a tail of a lion.

As soon as the two came out, the egret hurried forward with a look of anticipation.

"Ma'am, is the technology good?" The egret looked at Foxwoman with some respect.

"It's only partial and incomplete. The information in the hands of these scientists of the Demon Flame Civilization is limited, and the Demon King is missing with the complete information." The Fox Girl rubbed her tired brows and sighed.

When they destroyed the Demon Flame civilization, they found the hiding place of the scientists who study superpower technology.

Unfortunately, he was run away by the Demon Flame King.

"Some parts should be enough. There is a direction. The scientist of the host star can touch the vine to find a way." The egret said, turning to look serious: "Mrs., the situation in Shigan Star has changed a bit."

"Oh? Tell me." Foxwoman looked at the egret.

"A top warrior division of the Dark Forest civilization was blatantly killed. It may be that the endless sea has solidified the galaxy space, which has completely reduced to an isolated cage. According to reliable information, this warframe division is not an endless sea." Egret will pass The video came out.

Seeing the battle of Jing Ge, the half-lion old man next to him saw his eyes soaring, his expression was a little shocked.

"Uncle Shi, how are you better than him?" Foxwoman asked lightly.

"His fighting consciousness is terrible. It is similar to the endless sea, but it is not like it. He should not have done his best. He will not know until after the test." Griffin said seriously.

The foxwoman finally moved: "It seems that the dragon and the tiger are hiding here."

chapters.title: Chapter 847: : Space Village
chapters.body:
Chapter 847: : Space Village

Chen Mo is in a production workshop, where robots are fully automated, and large circular instruments are printed out, with a diameter of more than forty meters.

These instruments are space amplifiers and are the most important components of space connectors.

While in the small universe, Chen Mo developed space connector technology, and he now has a complete technical reserve. Only materials are needed to complete the manufacturing. Therefore, the construction of the space connector is not slow, the main structure is completed, and the rest is to install these special components.

The use of space connectors requires two spaces with different frequencies to connect, like the connection between the small universe and the main universe. The space trap semi-closed the Shigan galaxy, changing the frequency and amplitude of the space. The internal space of the galaxy cannot be folded, which is different from the main universe.

Without space traps, the space connector can only be used to communicate between the main universe and the small universe, but not the channels between the two galaxies, because the space of all galaxies in the main universe is the same frequency.

Chen Mo has seen some history and major events of the Universe Alliance.

One hundred and sixty million years ago, there was a humanoid life called Eisenroll, who proposed the bold concept of the "Cosmic Village": using space traps, closing some inanimate and desolate galaxies, changing the space frequency of galaxies, A large number of space connectors are manufactured at the edges. As the hub of cosmic traffic, the space connectors in the galaxy are used to connect all corners of the universe, which can greatly reduce the risk and time of long-distance space jumps in the universe. In the shortest time, shuttle to all corners of the universe.

Once this concept spread, it once caused a stir in the Universe, and until now, there are still lives praising this imaginary concept.

Because with the technology of god-level civilization, the concept of 'Universal Village' can be realized. This means that any ordinary life can travel around the universe without spending too many stars.

But the ideal is full and the reality is skinny.

The seven god-level civilizations rejected this idea and suppressed it in parallel. The reason is simple.

Divine civilization does not want to make the space connection technology public, because the space connection technology can find small universes and can connect the small universes of **** civilizations. In case the spatial frequency of the god-level civilization small universe is leaked, the top civilizations that control the technology of space destruction use space connections to connect the god-level civilization's small universe and throw space-destruction weapons into it, which can threaten the status and security of the god-level civilization.

Therefore, space connection technology has not been controlled by other civilizations. Even the top civilizations do not dare to take it out brazenly, for fear of being annexed by the divine civilization.

When it was determined that the Shigan galaxy was blocked by a space trap, Chen Mo first thought of using the space connector technology to leave the Shigan galaxy. This predicament now should be considered for escape, not for the suppression of divine civilization.

The most critical part of the connector is these spatial amplitude meters in front of him.

The spatial amplitude device can adjust the amplitude of the spatial frequency back to the same spatial frequency as the main universe, thereby opening up the barriers of blocking space.

Because the space amplitude device needs to withstand the compression and pulling of space, a dark matter synthetic material is necessary.

Today, the dark matter extraction factory has been mass-produced, and the space amplitude device is being produced and assembled. After that, it will be tested and tested to be OK before it is installed on the space connector.

That space connector in space now requires at least two million amplituders.

"How high is the output now?" Chen Mo asked Mo Nu.

"The average daily output is 22,000 and 570,000 have been produced. It will take about 65 days to reach the target number." Mo Nu gave an answer. There are 300 workshops on this planet, all of which are used to service the parts of space connectors.

"65 days?"

Two and a half months, this time is fairly fast, but also a little nervous.

Since the news that the endless sea civilization is stationed here has been spread, more and more spaceships and lives around the star system have been used as a hope for escape.

After killing Ode in the dark forest, life outside was deterred for a short time, and he dared not act lightly, but there was also a potential threat. No one knows whether there are other Warframe Divisions or other ulterior motives lurking in the dark forest civilization in their lives.

In the back there are a steady stream of non-light speed spacecraft and warframes coming. In the event that outside life mutates during these 60 days, it will be troublesome. Hundreds of billions of lives are mutinous, and unless this galaxy is destroyed, it is impossible to stop them from coming in.

Life is irrational in the face of the threat of death and insecurity.

Now we must find a way to deal with the crowd of people gathered outside.

"Mo brother." During thinking, Mo Nu interrupted him: "Shui Ling is looking for you. She brought a humanoid to want to enter Saturn."

"Uh? Let them in."

Chen Mo turned and left the workshop.

Shui Ling entered Chen Mo's base with a humanoid who looked very big. The copper-colored skin looked very majestic. The face had a knife-like face, with sharp edges and two long bones on the forehead angle.
