Judging from his temperament, Chen Mo determined that this person was not an ordinary life and should be a superior person.

When Shui Ling introduced, Chen Mo knew that her guess was correct.

"This is the ruler of Yunzhou civilization. Yunzhou civilization is an indigo-level civilization. Mr. Tuyun's mediocrity has shaped Yunzhou civilization in one hand, and built Yunzhou civilization into an indigo-level civilization. He is a close friend with his teacher. .This time I came over to visit my friends and made a lot of fun, but I was stuck here. "

Shui Ling introduced them.

"This is Mr. Mo Chen, currently the owner of the galaxy."

"Hello." Chen Mo first stretched out his hand, using the Earth's handshake.

Tuyun also extended his hand and Chen Mo shook hands. There are countless civilizations in the Universe Alliance, and all the ceremonies he has seen will not be accidental. Handshake rituals are one of the rituals commonly used in universe civilization.

"Hello, Mr. Mo Chen is really young." Tu Yun looked at Chen Mo, and exaggerated, he was really boastful.

According to the average life of the top civilization for thousands of years, Chen Mo's age is only the first stage for them. You know, the students of top civilized education only need 50 years at school.

It is difficult to imagine that such a young life dared to challenge the authority of the dark forest civilization and was treated with support and equality.

The Jing Ge beside Chen Mo is the Warframe Division who defeated Aude. Tu Yun couldn't help but take a high look. He had seen the battle picture. There was no doubt that he was a master. Even he was not sure that he would beat Jinge.

"Hello." Tu Yun also reached out to Jinge.

"Um." Jing Ge also reached out, but looked at Tuyun. The man felt a little dangerous to him. He should be a master. Out of habit, he was instinctively guarded and his eyes were still cold.

"What's wrong with Mr. Tu Yun this time?" Chen Mo interrupted the two of them.

"Let's do it." Shui Ling took the lead in speaking: "Mr. Tu Yun hopes to be able to bring in his men, and he can promise that the 500 high-level Warframe Divisions and other weapons that followed him will be handed to you. To command, including Mr. Tu Yun himself. Mr. Tu Yun himself is also a top battle division. "

"Oh?" Chen Mo glanced at Tuyun in surprise, "Yes, one more person and more strength."

Tuyun smiled lightly, and then said, "Mr. Mo Chen now has a headache with the spacecraft gathered outside the galaxy?"

"It's really annoying." Chen Mo nodded.

chapters.title: Chapter 848: : Buy A Hope In One Hundred Years
chapters.body:
Chapter 848: : Buy A Hope In One Hundred Years

Tu Yun took Chen Mo to meet a humanoid.

A middle-aged person with silver hair and silver skin, eyes with narrow fingers, black and white rainbow pupils, black and white 'Newton's ring', chin is sharp, like a snake face.

At this time, the middle-aged person, in a white plain clothes, was watching the ‘good-looking’ movie intently, with a wry smile from time to time, a little bit heartless.

"He is my friend who came to visit me this time."

Tuyun sighed.

"He used to be a rare strategist. Unfortunately, an accident three hundred years ago made him completely decadent. It is a pity. If he does, he should have a solution to the countless lives stranded outside the galaxy. In fact, I I wanted to ask him to come back to Yunzhou Star with me this time, but he was rejected. "

Chen Mo was somewhat surprised. Rejecting the invitation of a top civilization creator immediately attracted Chen Mo: "Why?"

"Because I can't solve his problem, he doesn't want to go out of the mountain." Tu Yun also didn't hide it, and said loudly, "If Mr. can solve his problem, it's no problem to ask him to go out of the mountain."

"Oh? A problem you can't solve?"

Chen Mo was slightly surprised that the strength of the top civilization is beyond doubt, and Tuyun is also the leader of the top civilization. It can be said that except for matters involving top civilization and god-level civilization, Tuyun should be able to solve it.

Chen Mo was interested: "What happened to him?"

"Three hundred years ago, his wife and daughter were involved in a spaceship accident, his wife died on the spot, and his daughter was half dead. That's why he became what he is now."

It's a pity that Tuyun turned to look at middle-aged people.

"Half-dead?"

"Necrosis in a local area of the brain, because freezing and dormant in time, temporarily keep some of the brain's activity and physical activity. But the brain you should know, the most complex and mysterious organ. Current medical technology, as long as the brain is kept intact, life can be revived.

However, the technology for resurrecting the necrotic brain is not yet mature, and the medical technology of god-level civilization cannot guarantee the complete resurrection of the necrotic brain. "

Chen Mo agreed to nod.

The technology for brain resurrection is really troublesome. The brain has always been the most complicated organ in humans, but to Chen Mo, it doesn't seem to be as difficult.

"And the most important thing is that the case is special. The brain nerves of him and his daughter are more terrible than the brain nerves of the god-like life. So he and his daughter are born smart people, and he is a very powerful strategist. If he wants to enter the god-level civilization, as long as he speaks, any of the Big Seven will send messengers to pick him up. "

"Can I see the case?" Chen Mo asked.

Being praised by Tu Yun, Chen Mo was interested in this middle-aged man.

With the case at hand, Chen Mo also felt extremely tricky.

Partial necrosis of the motor cortex and somatosensory cortex, partial necrosis of the hypothalamus structure, and necrosis of three important areas of the brain, and the most troublesome part is that in the brain, the inner nerves are very complicated.

Like the internal necrosis of a piece of tofu, once the body and brain thaw, the brain cell death of the brain will gradually spread. Once the brain dies completely, it is impossible to save it.

Almost a living person.

"Is there no way?" The middle-aged person looked at Chen Mo's expression with some loss, apparently used to disappointment.

"I really can't do it now, but I will definitely do it in the future." Chen Mo said.

The terrible collection of technology in the science and technology library, as well as numerous books on medical technology, including the technology of [Transfer of Consciousness]. As long as Chen Mo concentrates on the technology in the medical field, it is not impossible to revive a life.

"Really?"

The middle-aged human voice was a little excited. The insignificant appearance of watching the movie just disappeared, and his narrow eyes were sharp like a knife.

"Really."

Chen Zigui really looked at this middle-aged person who was different from just now, and began to believe in the words of Tuyun.

After the middle-aged person was excited, he became calmer and stared at Chen Mo. Obviously, Chen Mo needed to prove that he had that technical ability: "If you can heal my daughter, you are willing to do anything for you."

"Mr. Mo Chen, isn't it a blank check?" Tu Yun asked beside him.

The middle-aged person is his friend, and if Chen Mo really has a way, then he is naturally very happy. But it's incredible, after all, in god-level civilization, this technology is immature, not to mention an unfamiliar young man.

"I can't be full, so to speak, the space connector technology and the complete industrial chain are all self-made. And the space curvature spacecraft technology is also self-made, not the seven major technologies. It is from Nothing, everything is self-developed. "

Chen Mo will go through the bottom, if this person really has the talent that Tu Yun said, he just lacks a strategist.

He is about to return to the earth, and the earth will also enter the age of the universe. He is assisted by a strategist who is familiar with the divisions and rules of the universe. He can save a lot of trouble and energy.

Hearing Chen Mo's own research and development of space connection technology and space curvature technology, there was a little more horror in the cloud.

He knows how difficult and terrible these two techniques are.

Space connection technology is currently only mastered by god-level civilizations, and space curvature engine technology is also mastered by top civilizations and some powerful advanced civilizations.

But it was after tens of millions of years and hundreds of millions of years of technology accumulation and countless research and development genius investment, and finally broke through technical barriers to success.

This shows how scary Chen Mo's R & D capabilities are.

"I have mastered the drugs and technologies to increase life expectancy. I don't have time to study other biomedical technologies now, but in the future, you can bet once and bet on whether I can research the medical technology that cures her."

Tu Yun set his sights on middle-aged people, and he chose.

Silver-haired middle-aged people at this time also began to think about the credibility of Chen Mo's words.

Now Chen Mo said that he developed space connection technology and space curvature technology by himself, and the news was terrible. If it were ordinary people, he would never believe it, but Chen Mo's mastery of spatial connection technology is a fact.

"You think about it, think about it and tell me."

This matter is related to his daughter's life and death. It takes time to hesitate to think about it. This is normal. Chen Mo will not force it. All choices are up to him.

Chen Mo turned to leave.

"Wait." Silver-haired middle-aged people called Chen Mo: "I believe in you."

Middle-aged humans became firm and seemed to be making a difficult decision.

Seeing that his old friend recovered his fighting spirit, Tu Yun was relieved and secretly happy for him. The old friend in front of him was the old friend he was familiar with. Although he didn't follow him back, Chen Mo also seemed to be a good choice.

The life predicted by the old mermaid, the young human beings who can talk to the old mermaid equally, and mastered the god-level civilization can only have technology. All signs show that Chen Mo is not simple.

"One hundred years, you can cure my daughter, and I will work for you in my life. If you can't come up with the techniques and methods for healing my daughter, I will take my daughter away. , Buy a hope for my daughter. "Middle-aged people added.

"Yes. In this century, if you feel that I lie to you, you can leave at any time." Chen Mo nodded happily.

chapters.title: Chapter 849: : Cunning God Lan
chapters.body:
Chapter 849: : Cunning God Lan

Changed his clothes and rearranged his uncle's face, and the middle-aged person seemed to be a person. Eyes that are as narrow as a knife, as sharp as a sheath, aggressive, eye-like pupils of reincarnation, add a kind of deterrence, hit people's hearts, as if they can see everything in the world.

The slender body and silver-white skin, the corner of his mouth with a treacherous smile.

Multiple temperaments are combined, making it impossible to judge what kind of person he is from his appearance.

Judging by temperament, it can't lie to people.

The unbelievable self-confidence and pride can't be masked, and people can see at a glance that they are not ordinary people. Middle-aged human beings, even if they are of different races, can fascinate many girl aliens.

The image of Uncle Wuji disappeared, and now he is an uncle with temperament.

Even when Chen Mo saw a middle-aged person again, he couldn't help blinking his eyes.

"Introduce yourself formally." The middle-aged person gave a gift to Chen Mo, very solemnly: "Yang Sikar Lan. Yang Sikar in our hometown said: God of cunning. You can call me Lan."

"Chen Mo." Chen Mo returned a gift and also told Lan his real name.

Lan immediately understood that Chen Mo had previously used a pseudonym.

"Today is your first day on the job. Mr. Tu Yun told me about your deeds. So, follow me, you need to know some things first." Chen Mo said.

Lan immediately became serious, with a serious expression, wondering if Chen Mo should have any rules. Although he did not like the rules personally, following Chen Mo, he was ready to follow Chen Mo's rules.

"The first thing you know, we killed the Warframe Division of Dark Forest Civilization and offended Dark Forest Civilization."

Lan nodded.

This is a well-known thing in the entire galaxy. It is no secret that they killed the top Warframe division of the Dark Forest civilization. The news went crazy, and the lives of a little concern were known.

"The second thing is that in Shi Ganxing, the messenger of the Ziwei civilization was also killed by us. The Warframe Division wanted by the Ziwei civilization is us."

Chen Mo dropped the blue camouflage to reveal his true colors.

At this moment, Lan Yuan's pupils contracted layer by layer and looked at Chen Mo in shock. Offensive to two god-level civilizations at the same time, it is hard to imagine how bold it is to be so crazy.

In the future, we will face revenge from two god-level civilizations.

There is currently no force in the universe that can resist the revenge of the two god-level civilizations.

"If you are worried, you can make a choice now, you can choose to leave, and I will have that medical technology in the future. You come to ask for help. As a father, I understand and I will help."

He didn't want to make it difficult for Lan to cause conflicts because of these incidents. Sooner or later, let him have a mentally prepared choice.

"Since I promised, I would naturally obey. Even if you offend all the seven god-level civilizations, I will not change my decision."

Shocked and shocked, Lan did not hesitate to respond, disdain to make another choice, he has his pride, Chen Mo told him in advance that this is also a trust in him.

"But I also have a condition. I want to take over the command and defense of the galaxy."

"can."

Chen Mo did not hesitate to agree, and Lan was extremely surprised: "Are you not afraid that I will mess up after taking over the command?"

"Tuyun told me about your deeds. You have no doubt about your ability. You also know that you are a faithful person. You do n’t need to be suspicious, you do n’t doubt it. Since you promised to follow me, you naturally trust you.”

Lan suddenly respected him, looking at Chen Mo's eyes, she became admired, and moved a little: "What should I call you in the future."

"Call me the boss."

"Boss." Lan gave Chen Mo a gift.

"I do n’t have to be so polite in the future. I do n’t have many rules here. Mr. Tuyun said that you are a strategist and have a way to solve the life that continually gathers outside the galaxy. Now you can leave it to you?" Chen Mo said.

"It's simple."

Lan's eyes were so confident that she answered extremely bluntly.

"But there is a very important question that I need to confirm first. Is there a big civilization, power, or organization behind the boss?"

"It is." Thinking of the power in the earth and the small universe, Chen Mo nodded.

Lan was not surprised. With so many powerful technologies, if Chen Mo said no, that would be the strangest: "What about strength? What level is it?"

Chen Mo thought for a while: "I don't know how far it has developed, because I have been away from home for many years, but the strength I currently have should be between advanced civilization and top civilization."

They still need some development and talent precipitation from the top civilization, but the technology he has now mastered is higher than that of advanced civilization.

Knowing the power in Chen Mo's hands, Lan thought for a moment and said, "Boss, there are many ways to solve the life gathered outside the stellar system. Now I want to ask the boss's meaning, do the bosses need to recruit the Warframe Division to grow themselves? Long-term, build An armoured division. "

"Say your thoughts directly."

Chen Mo somewhat understood what Lan was going to do.

"If the boss just wants to solve the problem in a short period of time, after leaving the Shigan galaxy, he will go his own way. It is easy to deal with the outside life. But if the boss wants to develop the power, he can take this opportunity to absorb the senior warframe division and excellent of the Shigan galaxy. Talent is for our own use. The Shigan system is now on the verge of crisis. The main star of Shigan is destroyed. A large number of talents fled, and many gathered outside.

Moreover, the struggle of god-level civilization is spreading. We have attracted the attention of god-level civilization here. It will not be ruled out that the fight will be brought to us in the future. Therefore, it is necessary to have a disciplined and organized force to defend, in order to ensure the smooth manufacturing of space connectors. "

Chen Mo thought for a moment, and finally replied, "Develop long-term forces."

Just because the power of the earth is too weak, even if he has a large number of high-tech, there are still many shortcomings. It is a very good idea to absorb talents for his own use, which is conducive to long-term development.

Having seen the size of the universe, and confined to that one-third of the acre of the earth, I just jumped out of the wellhead and jumped back inside.

"Technical talents and senior warframe divisions are just a small part of their lives. There are hundreds of billions of lives gathered outside, most of them are ordinary lives. Can others handle it?"

"Yes." Lan nodded without hesitation.

"I give you the star's defense map and weapon command, and the star's defense system is for you to build. You handle the lives gathered outside."

Chen Mo ordered the Mo woman to open the weapon system to Lan.

"Boss, what's our name?"

"The marching ant group. By the way, there is one more thing that I just forgot to say. Grey Twenty-one is the superpower technology experimental body that the flame flame civilization and the white star civilization are fighting for. I was rescued and have a superpower potion. The samples are in my hands. "

"Ga ..."

Chen Mo left, leaving a lanky wood chicken.

Soon after, Chen Mo announced a decision on all life in Zong Saturn, and Lan took over the command of weapons in the stellar system.

But then came another news. After Lan controlled the stellar system, he used the public channel of the universe to issue the first instruction to life outside the galaxy.

chapters.title: Chapter 850: : Traitor
chapters.body:
Chapter 850: : Traitor

He heard that Lan took over the command and defense system of the weapons of the galaxy.

Who is Lan, but he knows that the strategy master of the great civilization. He admired Chen Mo's courage, and as soon as he stayed, he gave him the command of the weapon of the star, which required a lot of courage.

It seems that Lan has found a master this time.

However, the first instruction issued by Lan subsequently made Tuyun's face unbelievable.

Lan uses the public channel of the universe to issue a signal: there are methods and techniques for leaving the Shigan galaxy in the galaxy, and at the same time, it will provide escape routes and docking places for all the victims. At the same time surrender all the weapons of the Warframe to enter the stellar system to stay, the stellar system will provide safety and protection.

After leaving the space connector such as tolls, it will be counted separately. You only need to prepare enough stars during this time. Star coins are not enough, they need to serve the stellar system for a short period of time during construction, obey the command, and protect the stellar system. At the same time, Lan also announced the long-term employment of various technical personnel and senior Warframe Division news.

"This guy is still so treacherous and shameless, adulterer." Tu Yun heard the news, and his copper-colored skin was pumping.

Enough strategy.

It is simply a bandit with Zhanshan as the king.

Each docked life costs 100,000 stars, there are 100 billion lives outside, and a steady stream of life is coming towards their star system.

With this strategy, they are making a lot of money and robbery is not so scary.

And this no doubt soothes all lives, as long as they have money and can afford to travel, they can leave the Shigan galaxy. If you have no money, you only need to join the Volunteer Defense Force and you can leave the Shigan Galaxy.

Not only make money, but also guarantee the safety of the stellar system, while at the same time differentiation of stranded life and resolution of possible mutiny crisis.

"Uncle Tuyun, who is the person you introduced to Mr. Mo Chen this time?" Shui Ling asked curiously.

With a light instruction, the potential crisis of the galaxy was lifted. Shui Ling had to admire those who had just taken over the command. It was too smart.

"Do you know the Black Maple Leaf Armor Group more than three hundred years ago? The Black Maple Leaf Armor Group destroyed the four main legions of the Dahe civilization, eventually leading to the division of the Dahe civilization and the demise of a top civilization."

"He is the Warframe Division of the Black Maple Leaf?"

"He is the general staff of the Black Maple Leaf Armor Regiment and the mastermind of the main army of ambush of Dahe civilization. It can be said that Dahe civilization is destroyed in his hands. Destroy the main army of Dahe civilization, and then design the surrounding civilization to share the Dahe civilization "Tuyun said.

"Is he, the black maple leaf general staff silver hair?" Shui Ling was extremely surprised.

At that time, the black maple leaf armor group was extremely popular and almost ranked among the top armor groups. Unfortunately, it disappeared and no one knows why. But the "Silver Hair", the chief of staff of the Black Maple Leaf Armor Group, was very popular.

With the strength of a Warframe, killing the four main army of a top civilization, ‘Silver Hair’ that year received invitations from the seven god-level civilizations, but was rejected.

Later, the black maple leaf armor group disappeared, and the identity of ‘Silver Hair’ is still a mystery. No one has ever seen his true face and name. Only he knows that he has long silver hair.

Didi ...

The communicator rang during the conversation between the two.

Lan's holographic image popped up, his narrow eyes stared at Tuyun and Shui Ling, with a smile on his face.

"Have you received all the messages I sent?"

"Received, congratulations." Tuyun nodded.

"Just receive it, congratulations will be avoided. If I remember well, you are in the stellar system and belong to our command. There is something you need to help."

"Before leaving the Shigan galaxy, I did obey Mr. Mo Chen's command. Now I follow your command. If there is anything you need, I will definitely help." Tu Yunlang said.

Shui Ling nodded.

"That's good, I'm afraid you don't talk too much." Lan smiled. "Now there is one thing. Now that the staff is tight, you need two masters who can live there. You go to the stellar system to collect money. Uh? No, go 'maintaining order' outside the stellar system. "

The cloud-colored forehead of the tea cloud leaps black.

He is a grand civilized power leader and a top warframe division. He wants him to ‘maintain order’?

Shui Ling looked at Lan. After learning about his previous identity, Shui Ling was extremely curious about the legendary strategy strategist who destroyed a top civilization in one hand, and now Lan refreshed her cognition.

"Don't want to go? Don't want to go and don't make any promises." Lan Mu muttered, his voice was a little weird, his eyes looking at Tuyun also became scornful, then turned to Shui Ling, and immediately smiled: "What about the little fisher sister? "

"Yes." Shui Ling nodded slightly.

"You see, the mermaid sisters are very faithful. Unlike some people, although I have a little friendship with you, I still despise you ..."

The cloud-shaped brain of Tuyun turned into bronze immediately. He couldn't wait to give the goods two slaps, even if the treacherous merchants, his idea hit him: "Who said I didn't want to go?"

"That's right." Lan smiled successfully: "Trouble you then."

News blew up outside the stellar system.

Most of the people who came by the speed of light spaceship were some rich lives. One hundred thousand stars was drizzle. Staying in the spacecraft was not ordinary stuffiness.

Almost immediately after the news came out, there were countless lives waiting in line to pay into the stars of the galaxy.

"People who pay the money, line up one by one, come in line. Those who don't line up will get me out. Those who cut in line will not be allowed to enter the galaxy. Those who attack the war robots will all be regarded as intruders."

Lan's voice was transmitted to every spacecraft in the galaxy through electromagnetic waves of the public signal channel.

"The entire spacecraft wants to enter the stellar system, and the spacecraft pays one-time coins according to the head of life. Whoever pays first will come first. Special warning: Disarming can only be entered. Once a weapon is found, it will be treated as an invader. Dark forest civilization We all dare to kill the top warframe divisions of yours. Do you think about it, are you better than the warframe divisions of the dark forest civilization?

We are not afraid of the dark forest civilization. In the stellar system, we can provide you with a safe environment space. As long as you follow our rules until the space connector is complete, we guarantee your safety, otherwise roll away. "

In the outer space of the galaxy, teams of war robots flashing signals are maintaining order, allowing life that wants to dock to the galaxy to line up on the prepared spacecraft.

As for the weapons they surrendered, they were all confiscated and transformed by intelligent machines. These machines were transformed into intelligent weapons that defend the stellar system.

Orderly.

Among the armour divisions that maintain order, there are armour divisions of endless sea civilization and armour divisions of Yunzhou civilization. A god-level civilization, a top-level civilization, and the governor of Yunzhou civilization, Tuyun, is present, and there is an endless sea of water lings. If you want to make trouble, you should consider the consequences carefully.

Ten trillion stars.

On the first day, 100 million lives entered the terrestrial planets around the galaxy, and all were rich people.

Chen Mo also stunned, it was too easy to make money.

He was still annoyed by more than a billion people a long time ago, which caused him to be unable to leave the Shigan Galaxy, and now he has a trillion yuan a day directly. This kind of war money and disaster money is not ordinary fast.

There are a steady stream of people who want to stay in the stellar system behind.

Now Chen Mo suddenly felt that it was wise to leave Lan. You Lan manages arming, Chen Mo pulls away, and can focus more on the manufacture of space connectors.

And Shi Ganxing's struggle for god-level civilization, a change is about to come.

chapters.title: Chapter 851: : Plot
chapters.body:
Chapter 851: : Plot

Fifteen light-days away from Shi Ganxing, a clustered galaxy, a clustered planet.

The Witch appeared in the distance of an inconspicuous building. Under the cover of the surrounding buildings and the night, he observed the inconspicuous manor-type building. Next to him was a middle-aged man, Tour, who had come to reinforce him. A strong humanoid, with dragon-like muscles, crooked furrows on the skin, black eye pupils as deep as ink.

"If the news is reliable, the secret stronghold of Baixing civilization should be here."

炅 The witch's eyes remained intent, and his voice was a little strange.

"The Demon Flame civilization was destroyed by the White Star civilization. We all know that all those scientists are missing, most likely they are in their hands. The beginning of our dispute with the Thor civilization pointed to the White Star civilization. They thought they could control the situation. It's a pity that it is almost. "

"Now that the Flame Lord is missing, these scientists are the last technical hope. If this is the case, no destructive weapons can be used here, only a forced attack."

"Would you like to investigate their specific strength again?" Wu Wu asked a little later.

Toure shook his head, with a look of conceit: "No, of the three civilizations involved in the technology battle, we are the strongest, Thor is the second, and White Star is the weakest, and we can win them."

"I'm afraid ..." Wu Wu still hesitated, he had a bad hunch.

"There is nothing to fear, just listen to me." Tours interrupted him directly, not thinking: "Give them a surprise, our target is those researchers."

The Witch is not easy to refute, he can only take that bad feeling into his heart. On the level, Tour is one level higher than him, and he is stronger than him.

"action."

With an order, two hundred armoured divisions flew towards the manor, and the anti-material bullets in their hands aimed at the armoured division being prepared.

In order not to carry out a large-scale explosion, the captive Devil Flames civilized scientists were killed. The bullets they used were only a few hundred nanograms of antimatter and the diameter of the explosion was 20 meters. As long as they were hit, it would be enough to destroy a set of advanced armor. And this kind of bullet, because the antimatter content is too low, can deceive the antimatter radar detector.

Bang Bang Bang ...

A fierce bombardment broke the night of the manor.

"What's going on?" Foxwoman awakened from her dream with a very unpleasant tone. During this time, in order to obtain technology from the mouth of the scientist of the magic flame civilization, she used excessive powers, and her spirit was quite bad.

Now it's hard to rest, but was awakened by the explosion, and a anger was in his heart.

"Madam, there is an enemy attack." The griffin rushed into the room with a maid serving the fox girl in a tight voice.

"An enemy attack? Who attacked us?" Fox girl's lazy look disappeared for the most part.

"The egret replied that it was the Warframe Division of the Black Eyed Civilization. Maybe they found our stronghold." Griffin said.

Foxwoman frowned slightly, keeping calm: "How did they find it?"

"I don't know." Griffin looked a little anxious: "For safety's sake, the lady first put on the armor and left, and took the spacecraft to leave the planet. The planet is now unsafe."

If the black pupil civilization drops a weapon of destruction in this manor, the wife may be in danger, then they will be in trouble.

"Egret, who is it?" Foxwoman was still in a hurry, and put on her armor to connect with her.

"Tour and the sorceress are here, and I'm pestering sorceress. The sorceress is a bit troublesome. Madam, you leave quickly, this planet is in danger." The egret's voice was extremely tense.

"Uncle Lion, go and help the egrets and solve them." The fox lady's expression became cold, her voice mixed with a trace of anger.

"But Madam's safety ..."

"I go to the spacecraft to temporarily leave the planet to evade. At this point there will be no danger, and I have the armor, although it will not be used too much, but its function is sufficient for me to protect myself." Foxwoman's tone can not be doubted: "From Judging by the offensive of the other party, they don't want to hurt ordinary people. They should be the researchers who know that the Flame Flame civilization is here. They don't know that I exist, otherwise they will use destruction-grade weapons in the beginning. "

Toure's brow frowned and tightened. He didn't expect that the Warframe Division was so strong. He is the top Warframe Division of the Black Pupil Civilization. He originally thought that although Baixing Civilization sent someone over, there should be no top Warframe Division.

Now he is wrong. He is fighting against a top Warframe Division, which is weaker, but he can do nothing but help each other, and here is the stronghold of the other side. There are more Warframe Divisions than them.

At first, the other side was attacked, and their positions were messed up. They killed dozens of Warframe Divisions, but now that they have stabilized, he suddenly finds that his advantage is not great. The only advantage is that the witch has a high combat effectiveness. No one is an opponent of the witch. He is a lean chip on both sides.

The strength of this stronghold is not weak, and the sorceress is entangled by several senior armour divisions. Even if some Warframe divisions are killed, there will be other Warframe divisions to make up, as if to die.

The will to die made Toure feel a chill.

This is just the strength of the dark base of the Baixing civilization. The strength of the bright base is not here. The combined power is probably not lost to their black pupil civilization.

Suddenly, a danger signal displayed by the radar suddenly appeared, making Toure's face change.

Griffin shot.

Tour felt a dangerous breath, and more than a dozen seeds popped up inside his quantum dot radar matrix, heading towards different Warframe Divisions in the field. The radars of the top warframe and the radars of the advanced warframe are one grade higher, especially the famous top masters like them, and the equipment technology is the best.

Huh!

The bullet easily penetrated the armour division's energy shield and was not included in the armor.

Boom boom! A series of explosions exploded, forming a large fireball in the air, submerged in high temperature, like a violent dragon roaring in the air.

The black pupil civilization armor who was excited and thought that the sneak attack succeeded, seemed to be poured into a cold water in the snow and ice, and the body was cold. More than a dozen Warframe Divisions, with no corpses left, were annihilated in the explosion.

The armored division of the black pupil civilization, all discoloration.

Warframe radar shows that a set of top warframes appeared on the field, and there is a second top warframe division here. One shot resulted in the loss of more than a dozen Warframe divisions of the black pupil civilization.

Tour's expression changed.

The other side hides a master in the manor.

Is this a trap?

The balance was only slightly tilted. With the addition of the griffins, the battle over the manor turned to attack. The griffins dealt with Tours, and the egret fought against the witch who was killing the ring.

Knowing that his wife had left safely, the Warframe Division of Baixing Civilization let go of his arms and legs, and the explosion at high altitude caused the space to ripple layer by layer.

"retreat!"

Knowing that something was wrong, Tour didn't hesitate too much, and immediately ordered a retreat.

"It's not so easy to walk."

After contacting the griffon and the egret, they immediately ordered to catch up. The two of them stared at Tour and the witch. These two are the main characters of the black pupil civilization in the Shigan galaxy. The loss is great.

Antimatter bullets and corroded bullets blocked their escape route, and the two sides were entangled again.

"Sure enough, it's a bit tricky."

Space beyond the planet, after disguised disguise, followed the war situation through video.

The information obtained by Black pupil civilization, Tour and others, was secretly disclosed by them, with the purpose of letting them verify the secret location of the Baixing civilization they found. What are the potential problems?

It seems that there is really a problem.

In this stronghold, there are actually two top divisions of Baixing Civilization, and their strength is not weak.

This is very interesting.

"Master Dan, what are we going to do now? Continue waiting? Or join the battle? The manor seems to be hiding important things, and they all deliberately avoid the destruction of the manor." A staff member next to Dan asked.

"Not for now, wait until they are almost, then go on." Dan Lang said.

chapters.title: Chapter 852: : Stellar Bastion
chapters.body:
Chapter 852: : Stellar Bastion

"Wu Mu, Da Mazu, Poison Girl, Red Crab"

Lan led the four to Chen Mo.

Wat Mu looks like a dead wood zombie. He is a humanoid, expressionless, drowsy eyes, looks ordinary, extremely harmless to humans and animals. But only Lan knew that this guy's zombie-like face was deceiving. In the answers and tests of Lan's selection of talents, the zombie face scored the highest, and some of the schemes were insidious.

Da Mazu is an orc-like creature with a huge body and teeth, like World of Warcraft's World of Warcraft. Under the rough appearance, there is a delicate heart hidden in the strategy, which is a rare general.

Blue and black veins appear on the colored skin of the poisonous woman, and there are three eyes on the forehead, which is very strange. She is a humanoid woman. As the name implies, her skin and body fluids can secrete toxins, and her acting style is extremely spicy. Even Lan is a little afraid of this kind of danger.

The outer skin of the red crab is bone, red, and there are several sharp bones on the back. The head is raised with long fingers. The forehead has the simple texture of the crab, which is very strange.

"Wu Mu was a civilized veteran with good combat qualities and skills. I am going to make him the head of the" guard group ". Da Mazu is a deputy head of the Wild Warframe Regiment. Because the head of the team is afraid that he can't hold back his talents, he will be kicked out of the team. It is just cheaper for us. He will be the head of the `` Big Magic '' Poison skin girl has been in the underground world for a long time, knows the dark world, is proficient in assassination and intelligence spying, and has good strength.

Twenty-one's strength is very strong, but his character cannot serve as commander. I'm going to hand over the intelligence department to the poison skin girl and run the assassin team. Red crabs are aggressive and temperamental, but have strong personal strength and can be used as a guard by the boss. Wat Mu was selected during the test. I invited Da Mazu, Poison Girl and Red Crab. "

Lan introduced the four to Chen Mo, and gave them their materials and a letter of appointment to Chen Mo.

Chen Mo glanced at the resumes of the four and said, "If you are a red crab, just be your escort. You lack expert protection. I have Jinge and Twenty-one here. Don't worry about safety."

The stubborn red crab, when he heard Chen Mo's words, did not immediately agree: "Boss, are you doubting my strength?"

"Uh? No."

"Why can't you be your guard?" Red Crab said unconvinced, and he always thought he was the best.

"Mr. Lan is also very important and needs expert protection." Chen Mo said.

"This reason is not true," said Red Crab stubbornly. "Let me fight with him and make sure he is better than me. I will be convinced and obey your arrangements."

"?" Chen Mo looked at Jing Ge and saw Jing Ge nodded before he said, "Start lightly."

"Ok."

Jing Ge stood out, Lan and others also subconsciously backed up to make room for the two. The two were fighting with bare hands and did not cause much damage. They did not need to go to a professional training ground.

"let's start."

boom! !!

A sound boom exploded, and Jing Ge disappeared in place.

Just listening to the muffled sound, the bones and feet of the red crab froze, kneeling on the ground with its waist around, visible pain, and the red exoskeleton became more red. Less than three seconds before and after, the battle was over.

As the audience's lan, he was already mentally prepared for this scene.

Red crabs are aggressive and stubborn. If they are white, they do n’t know how high they are, but they have good credit and character. So Lan brought him over, let Jinge beat his bad temper, give him a disposition, and he could completely conquer him.

Wu Mu and others looked at Jing Ge with awe in their eyes. The red crab's exoskeleton was very hard and strong, and it turned out that it couldn't be beaten with a punch, which was scary.

This is a pervert.

The red crab still knelt down on the ground in pain: "I lost, I'm willing to gamble to lose, and listen to you later."

"You go back first, Wat Mu, the three of you are training according to the plan, and the red crabs go to the medical cabin to recover."

Lan asked them to leave the command center, and then retrieved the stellar defense map for Chen Mo.

Millions of senior armour divisions, millions of reserve armour divisions, and millions of talents with mastery of technology and skills. With the help of Momo II Super Artificial Intelligence, Lan completed recruitment in a few days and recruited all the required talents.

The elite talents of the Shigan galaxy are in Shiganxing. The elite talents of Shiganxing have all gathered here. Lan absorbs them without any scruples. They all adopt the highest selection standards. Among the hundreds of billions of people, the best talents to participate in the selection will be selected. come out.

He is not worried about the entry of spies. The current technology is very advanced. The technology of polygraph is almost a toy. According to the selection of Lan, most of the people who want to sneak in can be screened out. As for the anti-lie detection, it will affect the overall situation. Not big, find it slowly later.

Excellent talents were absorbed, some advanced life and some advanced civilized royal families settled in the stellar system, the weapons in their hands were taken over, and ordinary life with no strength remained, waiting for the completion of the space connector outside the stellar system.

The crowds gathered outside the stellar system now are not a hidden danger, but a line of defense for them.

With endless sea and Yunzhou top battle divisions, coupled with Jing Ge and others and the power in their hands, Lan believes that their current strength in the Shigan galaxy can rival the power of god-level civilization.

"Boss, the initial formation of the team is almost formed. At present there are two Warframe teams and Assassin teams, the Guardian and the Big Devil, managed by Wat Mu and Damazu. The Assassin team also serves as the intelligence branch. I do n’t Too understand, it is currently arranged by super artificial intelligence. "

"Ok."

Chen Mo was surprised by Lan's means.

Within a few days, a stricter rule system than the military was formulated. The system includes the rank system, the promotion system, the reward and punishment system, the training system, and the management system.

He found that this time he had picked up treasure.

In Chen Mo's original system, Zhao Min can manage economic and commercial exchanges. Although Wang Hai has some skills in military armed forces, he can only be regarded as a general and not enough to become a handsome talent.

Lan's ability in strategy and command has undoubtedly made up for the vacancy of commander in military armed forces.

"Now here is quite a stellar fortress. Unless the military of god-level civilization uses space weapons and the speed of light to destroy weapons, even if their military pulls over and wants to capture the stellar system, they will have to peel off a layer. In addition to using space weapons and speed of light Weapons, this is one of the safest bases for Shi Ganxing at present. "

Lan introduced Chen Mo's defenses in the galaxy.

Ordinary non-light-speed destruction weapons, such as large antimatter bombs, can be intercepted in the outer space of the stellar system. In space, apart from special weapons such as space weapons, the explosion of antimatter weapons poses little threat to the planet.

When the speed of light destruction weapons and space weapons appear, along with terrifying space shocks and energy fluctuations, quantum radar can detect long distances, and only need to take the speed of light or space curvature spacecraft to escape before the explosion.

Therefore, unless a space weapon and a light-speed weapon are designed in advance, or transported by a super-light speed spacecraft, it is instantly jumped to the battlefield to strike, otherwise, at the beginning of the battle, once there are light-speed destruction weapons and space weapons close to the battlefield, far away In addition, radar can detect the presence of weapons.

The long-term development of the universe alliance system has formed a unique rule system.

The speed of light destruction weapons are generally only in the hands of the military of the top civilizations, not ordinary blue civilizations and below. Space weapons exist only in the hands of god-level civilizations and a few powerful top civilizations.

Now that the space of the Shigan galaxy is locked and unable to jump in space, no one dares to use galaxy-level space destruction weapons and light speed destruction weapons in the struggle, otherwise everyone will die together.

"You can now build space connectors with peace of mind," Lan said.

...

"It's almost there. It's our turn to see what's going on here."

In space, watching Dan at the scene of the planet ’s battle, his face was silent, a flash of warfare flashed in his eyes, and his body armor covered, falling towards the planet.

The Warframe Division with him did not hesitate, and immediately after Dan, fell towards the planet.

chapters.title: Chapter 853: : Standard Warframe
chapters.body:
Chapter 853: : Standard Warframe

"Have me up. Your consciousness is as innocent as the snot of Geka Xing. 枉 You are still a wise life and you ca n’t lose it? Do you have a brain?"

"Will a synchronous attack? Will teamwork work?"

"If you have technology, you don't need to cooperate with the team? What do you eat? You let the top Warframe Division come over. I pulled 10,000 Legion soldiers and fired at him. Do you think he died or I died?"

"Peace is too long, the legion battle is too far away from you, is it?"

"You see a top master, can you destroy a trained top legion alone? Ah?"

Lan roared unscrupulously, through the radio, into the ears of every player, deafening.

In front of the high-altitude training ground, 100,000 War Armor Divisions are training collectively, the team is extremely neat, and each War Armor Division is training basic operational awareness.

The 100,000 War Armor Division was trained to be speechless.

"Now I use the team as a unit and train freely. Next time, which team will score the lowest score, I will sing" Mom's Good "in public, and will be equipped with the new battle armor, the lowest score, and the latest equipment. Our team only needs the best. Whoever admits he is a waste, get me out now. "

Lan collected the team's wireless communications, landed the red crab from high altitude, and headed towards the research base where Chen Mo was.

The boss usually stays in laboratories and research institutes. He doesn't know what he is researching, but he has to admire the full set of space connector and space curvature spacecraft technology.

After this period of contact, he has learned the personality of this young boss, calm and confident, smart and terrible, and he is a type of person, but in a different direction. So the two were very comfortable with each other, and hardly need to say too much, they knew each other what to do.

Landed to the research base, the red crab waited outside, and Lan was guided by the robot into the base.

Upon learning that Lan came in, Chen Mo stopped his research and left the laboratory: "Is something wrong?"

"Warframe problem," Lan said.

Now that the team is taking shape, the first thing that is lacking is the Warframe, not the ordinary Warframe, but the standard Warframe.

The standard battle armor is the most important equipment of the legion's battle armor system. Any top-level army with a standard battle armor has a terrible combat effectiveness. There is no standard armor, because the different armored combat systems and performance problems will greatly reduce the combat effectiveness of the Legion team, or even a piece of sand.

So this problem, he needs the boss to solve.

"Is the standard armor?" Chen Mo nodded sternly: "I haven't designed a standard armor, are there any requirements for the design of the standard armor? Give me a reference."

"The Legion Warframe Division is also called a war soldier. Unless there is a special requirement for the war soldier team, all war soldiers will adapt to training based on the performance and functions of the standard war armor. Combatants have no style.

The Warframe Designer team is to design Warframes based on the required combat concepts and tactical styles, or to design the Warframes in the style of more legion commanders. Long-range combat and close-attack combat are calculated by the armor designer. Warframes designed by warframe designers. If they are long-range warframes, the commander will select and train warfighters suitable for long-range operations based on the performance of the warframes.

After Lan's explanation, Chen Mo suddenly realized that there was so much knowledge in it.

However, as a relief, after growing up on the earth and being captured by the Three-Eye civilization, he has not been exposed to the education and knowledge of the regular Cosmic Alliance system. He has step by step to understand what he has already contacted. , And have not been in contact with the top civilized army, it is normal to not understand these.

"Here are some videos and information about the top corps of the universe god-level civilization. You can check it out. I have marked and commented on many team tactics." Lan gave all his information to Chen Mo.

After Lan left the research base, Chen Mo opened the video data.

Many-to-one combat blockades, salvos, wheel battles, synchronized laser irradiation, interference, two-person cooperative operations, multi-person cooperative operations, team battles, cross-armor joint operations, cross-arms operations, cross-weapon joint operations ...

For each type of battle, Lan has carefully marked and explained.

Chen Mo seems to open a new world.

In the Warframe operations he was in contact with, all Warframe divisions fought alone, and very few co-operated. On Earth, a set of warframes can crush the armies of a country.

Now it is the first time that he has watched the combined operations of the Warframe.

Countless kinds of design ideas for the battle armor came to his mind, and he wished to immediately implement various ideas.

Without hesitation, Chen Mo immediately plunged into the design of the armor.

Outside, a message spread.

Baixing civilization's dark base was attacked. Baixing civilization's mysterious top armored division counter-attacked the black pupil civilization's attacker, Tur, and the witch escaped with serious injuries. After that, the Thor civilization also attacked the Baixing civilization.

Dan, the first heir to the thunder civilization, took the shot, seriously hurting the mysterious warframe division of Baixing civilization, and obtained a group of research talents from the flame civilization of Baixing civilization.

The news caused a wave.

The black pupil civilization wanted the mantis to catch cicadas, but found that the white star civilization was a cardinal. And before the Baixing civilization had time to be happy, the hunter of the thunder **** civilization appeared.

The most interesting news is the emergence of thunder civilization.

Dan, the first heir of the thunder civilization, is known as the most powerful genius of the thunder civilization. When he was only thirty years old, he awakened the superpower of Thor's civilization, and challenged the leader of Thor's civilization, and was also the strongest of Thor's civilization.

Even if he failed in the end, it made him famous.

Now that the millennium has passed, some people have speculated that Dan's personal combat power has surpassed Thunder Star, and once Thunder Star abdicates, Dan will take over.

Dan's prestige in the Universe Alliance is the only one to be compared with the Hitomi of the black pupil civilization and the traitor Zidi of the Ziwei civilization.

Dan appeared, Tour died, and the mysterious top-flight armor division of the Baixing civilization fled, leaving the uncertain Shigan galaxy to become the sole thunder civilization. Dan also took control of Shi Ganxing's main star, took away the remaining ordinary life of Shi Ganxing's main star, and built a base and fleet on the main star.

Soon after the news spread, the Lagerstroemia civilization and Hades civilization announced that they would withdraw from this battle. All the battles and destruction of the Shigan galaxy have no light with them. The two civilizations will assist refugees in the Shigan galaxy to escape the Shigan galaxy.

The actions of the Lagerstroemia civilization and the underworld civilization have attracted praise from the entire universe alliance.

The matter did not end there. Another news came when everyone thought that Dan wanted to control the Shigan system.

Tong Qing appears in the Shigan galaxy.

The news spread quickly.

The origin of Tong Qing is better than Dan. When Tong Qing was forty years old, while he was still studying in school, he defeated Hei Weifu Luoyun, the strongest of the black pupil civilization. That battle shook the entire universe alliance, and Tong Qing was therefore hailed as the most talented life in the black pupil civilization for thousands of years. Not only the personal combat effectiveness, but also the combat command and strategy, are extremely powerful, courageous and motivated, and have a friendly personality, almost a perfect man, known as the person most likely to become the next God-level Warframe division of the black pupil .

This battle of the Shigan galaxy, the collision of two heirs of god-level civilization, made the outside world look forward to it. With the emergence of Dan and Tong Qing, several battles originally turned faintly into confrontation between the two.

There is no doubt that the encounter of two contemporaries was a confrontational battle.

The outside world knows that the fight against superpower development technology has deteriorated.

chapters.title: Chapter 854: : Message
chapters.body:
Chapter 854: : Message

Xiaoyu and Zhao Min stared blankly at the starry sky. No one spoke, and they sat quietly.

A few years have passed, and until now, Chen Mo still has no news. The marching ant group is supported by several women.

After searching for a long time in Origin City, they found the three-eyed civilization and werewolf who leased space curvature spacecraft. After this time mixed into the origin city investigation, some clues were also found.

The humanoid who came to Earth at the beginning was a research team of Three Eyes Civilization. After investigation, it was determined that they would trap the human beings in captivity on an oxygen-rich planet of Blue Mercury for an evolutionary study.

However, after a secret investigation, they received a terrible news.

There was a turnaround in Qing Mercury, and a captive life escaped from captive life. There was some escape from Qing Mercury. They could find other humans on Earth, but they did not find Chen Mo.

Chen Mo is missing.

The news almost made Xiaoyu and Zhao Min desperate. They desperately searched, but they did not expect it to be the result.

Now the last hope is the laboratory of the three-eyed civilization they couldn't investigate.

Now it's time to make the final decision, to fight against the Three-Eyed Civilization, conquer the Three-Eyed Civilization, and receive all their laboratories in order to find Chen Mo, but the chaos caused by the war may cause Chen Mo to die in the laboratory. Or continue to investigate secretly and find a way for people to learn about Chen Mo from the laboratory of Three Eyes Civilization.

To this day, they still do not believe that Chen Mo is dead, and even more believe that Chen Mo escaped in the rebellion.

Suddenly, the two heard a little excited voice from Mo Nu.

"Little fisherman, sister Zhao Min, look at something."

The dull eyes of the two women slowly appeared, and they turned to look at Mo Nu.

Mo Nu is considered an intelligent life, but since Chen Mo disappeared, they have not heard Mo Nu's happy tone for a long time, this is the first time. The two turned their heads and the holographic video played by Mo Nu came into view.

At this moment, the two women's breath stagnates and their hearts begin to beat faster.

In the holographic video, there is a wanted order, Chen Mo's [Free Black Ant] Warframe, and a face they have dreamed of numerous times, a familiar face.

Almost without thinking, it can be determined that it is Chen Mo.

The eyes of the two women burst into endless expression, and tears burst into their eyes.

"It's her husband, it's her husband."

Xiao Yu held Zhao Min crying and laughing. She did not expect to see Chen Mo's news again when she was almost desperate. She is not afraid of the wanted order, as long as Chen Mo is alive, she is not afraid of anything.

"It's him." Zhao Min patted Xiao Yu's back and burst into tears. The pressure in these years has been released.

"Husband ... he ... where is he?"

"This is a wanted order from Ziwei civilization a few months ago. I also just saw that Mo Ge killed the messenger of Ziwei civilization in the Shigan galaxy and was wanted by Ziwei civilization." Mo Nu said.

Over the years, they have focused on investigating Chen Mo's news in Origin City, ignoring the All-Universe Alliance. After discovering the Qing Mercury rebellion and having escaped, Mo Nu turned her investigation outside the city of origin, only to discover the news of Chen Mo.

"Lagerstroemia civilization? Is the Shigan galaxy?" Xiaoyu murmured: "Can you go to the Shigan galaxy to find a husband?"

"I'm afraid it's difficult. Now the Shigan Galaxy is experiencing a change. The space is blocked by god-level civilization and all life can't come out. You can only build a space connector in it to leave, or wait for the god-level civilization to solidify the space traps and space. Open it, otherwise the life inside needs to fly at the speed of light for tens of thousands of years to escape. "Mo Nu said.

"Why is this?"

Xiao Yu's hopeful face disappeared.

In these years of development, in order to find the news of Chen Mo, the marching ant group has quietly integrated into the cosmic alliance system and has long understood some issues. The existence of the Ziwei civilization as one of the seven god-level civilizations, they are all clear.

"Don't worry, as long as he is alive, he will definitely be able to leave." Zhao Min stiffened Lou Xiaoyu's shoulder after calming his emotions, comforting softly: "Because he is Chen Mo, the best.

"Well." Xiaoyu slowly stabilized his mood, his eyes became firm: "I believe he can come back."

"When the battle is over, the god-level civilization should release the space blockade, and he will be able to come out at that time." Zhao Min comforted: "What we have to do is not to expose it casually, otherwise the Ziwei civilization keeps an eye on us and he returns to the earth It ’s dangerous. Maybe the Lagerstroemia civilization will be destroyed together. ”

"What is the best way to think about it now?" After Xiao Yu calmed down, he began to think of a way.

"The best thing is to wait and do nothing. So as not to be caught by Ziwei civilization, and wait for the god-level civilization to let go of space, he will come back by himself. When he doesn't come back, we will go to him again. We will also put some earth When he saw the text on the Universe Network, he knew that the address was back, and the life of the Universe could not understand our text. "

Xiaoyu focused his head, staring gently at Chen Mo's wanted order. This man is everything in her world: "Mom, do you have the latest news of the Shigan Galaxy?"

"Have."

Tong Qing appeared in the Shigan galaxy, causing a lot of vibration in the Shigan galaxy. However, everyone thought that when Tong Qinghui dealt with the thunder civilization and Dan for the first time, Tong Qing didn't take any action and seemed to be indifferent to Tour's death.

It was just outside the stellar system that the black pupil civilization was furious and announced that it had broken off with the white star civilization and had confrontation and conflict.

The superpowered technical researcher of the magic flame civilization fell into the hands of the thunder civilization and became the focus of this battle.

The cause of the Shigan galaxy chaos is the superpower development technology of the magic flame civilization. Now that Magic Flame King is missing, the R & D personnel of super-capable development technology is the last hope of super-capable development technology.

First arrested by Baixing civilization, now it falls into the hands of Thor's civilization.

The smell of gunpowder is arrogant in the Universe, first the conflict between the endless sea and the dark forest civilization, and now the confrontation between the black pupil civilization and the white star civilization, some lives have asked unusually.

The battle and confrontation of the seven god-level civilizations of the Universe will cause the entire universe to suffer.

The chaos is coming.

The witch came out of the medical cabin, and the serious injury was that his body had recovered without any trace of injuries. After this battle, the evil spirits in the Witch ’s eyes disappeared a lot, they became much more stable, and their temperament changed a lot.

"Sir, we planted this time." Wu Wu stood before a man and pleaded guilty.

"It's not your fault, it's that Toure is too conceited." The man said, his voice thick and calm, without blame.

The man turned around and stared at the star system of the holographic screen. The black pupils had no trace of noise, deeper than the starry sky, and the colored magic lines under his neck were restrained and heavy.

He is Tong Qing, who Dan is looking for, and has been in a galaxy not far from the main star of Shi Ganxing, unknown to the outside world.

"Is the information on the owner of this star system clear?" Hitomi Qing asked in a deep voice.

It is Chen Mo's stellar system.

"Master Tong Qing, currently the identity of the owner of the galaxy is unknown." The artificial intelligence of the holographic screen answered him: "According to the clues returned by investigators, we cannot find each other's ethnic group and specific forces."

Tong Qing's dark eyes stared at Chen Mo's image, not knowing what to think. It was Chen Mo's appearance after disguise, and he could not distinguish his original face at all.

Similarly, after Dan reorganized the main star of Shigan Star, he set his eyes on the star system that is half light moon away from the main star of Shigan Star. Now, apart from Tong Qing, the power of that galaxy is currently the biggest uncertainty factor in the Shigan galaxy.

chapters.title: Chapter 855: : It'S A Pervert
chapters.body:
Chapter 855: : It'S A Pervert

Entering the research base, Lan's smile almost reached his ears, and silver scum trembled. Today, there is very good news. The standard armor set designed by Chen Mo has been completed.

"Let's see how.?" Chen Mo took him to the Warframe Workshop.

Three sets of battle armor are neatly placed in the workshop.

"Let me introduce the first set."

Chen Mo pointed at the first set of battle armors, carrying two thick-legged robotic laser cannons behind his back, sturdy in shape.

Chen Mo adjusted the holographic simulation video of the battle armor.

The mobile nature of the Warframe and the particularity of the weapon are suitable for testing in the barren planet and space. The current situation is not suitable for public testing.

boom! !!

The laser burst fired, and the target armor on the opposite side exploded.

"Nine hundred terawatt milliseconds? An effective distance of 100,000 kilometers in space, an effective distance of 5,000 kilometers in the standard atmosphere of the universe, crazy." The beating data from the computer put Lan into a state of insanity.

This energy-level laser weapon surpasses most of the top warframe laser weapons.

If there is only one set of standard warframes, it may not be able to beat a single customized warframe of the same level, but its advantage lies in the standard. A team's standard battle armor cooperates with tacit understanding, and the combat effectiveness is even more terrifying.

The top standard armor and the armor system of the soldiers cooperate to allow the laser power to be superimposed, even if it is a top armor division, wearing the top armor is also daunting.

"Top-level battle armor." Lan looked very excited.

A middle-aged old man almost danced a square dance in the armor shop.

This is a top-level battle armor. This is a top-level battle armor only equipped by the god-level civilization and a few top-level civilizations.

"Weapons are the most important part of a Warframe. Warframes without weapons are toys. So I worked **** Warframe weapons to develop a new laser gain medium. At the same time in the standard antimatter On the energy core, two energy cores are added at its two shoulders to provide the energy of laser weapons. This set of armor has three energy cores.

This has the advantage that there is no need to worry about the problem of excessive energy consumption of the armor due to the power of the laser weapon. At the same time, the system equipped in the Warframe is equipped with quantum fire control radar and super artificial intelligence system, which can effectively improve the accuracy of laser stacking. "

Chen Mu talked eloquently. He was technically professional, but Chen Mo was a pity then.

"However, because of the pursuit of the power of lasers, I made sacrifices in other aspects. I reduced the space of other weapons and only stacked the laser cavity and gain medium. Therefore, its other weapons only have simple anti-material gun barrels at the arms and Jamming bombs. In addition, there are slow energy storage and frequency issues. The laser can be irradiated after about five seconds of storage. In the face of the melee armor, its resistance is too weak. "

Fired once every five seconds. This frequency is enough to kill you hundreds of times for melee divisions. Once the enemy is close, there is almost no chance to resist.

Lan immediately found this method of battle.

Laser sniper cannons are used to spot important targets or top armor divisions appearing on enemy battlefields. Super artificial intelligence plus quantum fire control radar spot firing, the energy level of laser horror is for laser snipers.

Miles away, kill the enemy.

Imagine that in the battlefield, 100,000 kilometers away, Leng Buding exploded a laser pointing directly at the enemy's master and important targets. The laser instantly burned through the opponent's energy shield and hunted the target in a horrible picture.

It makes people **** and shuddering.

As for the problem of large energy consumption and long storage time, it is easy to be detected by radar and transmitted frequency. This is the result of sacrificing other weapons and flexibility to stack laser weapons. The advantages are obvious, and the disadvantages are obvious.

But its advantages, in the battlefield, are better than its disadvantages. Even if it hits an important target, a set of machines will pay for itself. Its positioning is very clear.

Lan swallowed, calmed down, and stroked the armor as carefully as he touched the artwork: "What's its name?"

"[Shooter]" Chen Mo gave the Warframe a simple and easy-to-understand name, which fits well with its positioning.

"Good name."

Lan's excitement has not faded, and there are two other sets of battle armor on the field.

He wanted to know what warframe the boss had developed this time. This ability is already the strength of the top Warframe designer, and one's business ability surpasses a Warframe design team.

"There is a second set." Chen Mo began to introduce the second set of warframes: "It's called [Galaxy Surfer]"

[Galactic Surfer] Unlike the other two sets of armors, it is a set of melee combat armors, with the most sensitive quantum radar system and mobile system. Its shell material uses hadron-dense silver material. This material is a dense material formed when silver atoms collide with hadrons.

This material has an advantage that it is extremely reflective, and the laser light will be totally reflected by 100% of the material. This means that laser weapons are not effective against it. Convenient for close range penetration and aiming at enemy laser launch targets.

Similarly, if in space, there is a natural camouflage. Because the Warframe will reflect the light of the cosmic starry sky, the outside world can only see the stars through this optical field of vision.

"Laser is ineffective? Natural camouflage?" Lan stared, his mouth murmured.

His current worldview needs to be refurbished again. These technologies are all mastered by god-level civilization, and Chen Mo took them out.

At this moment, Lan looked at Chen Mo and felt more and more mysterious.

In the end, what kind of force has science and technology comparable to god-level civilization.

"However, it has disadvantages. Because of the material of the casing, it only has quantum detection radar and cannot use optical radar system. Once the enemy's armor is a quantum stealth armor, it can only rely on the eyes of the armor division to judge the enemy. Level-level battles rely on eyes to judge. It is quite semi-blind. And it has another disadvantage. In the standard atmosphere, its active speed cannot exceed one hundred times the speed of sound, otherwise the dense silver material will disintegrate. So it is suitable for space and in the atmosphere of the planet. Battles can be kited by the enemy. "

"What does 'kite flying' mean?" Lan didn't understand the technical term.

"Do not fight with you close, use quantum radar to lock you, hit you far away, and you can't catch up with each other. So it is best positioned for space melee." Chen Mo pointed to the introduction of the last set of the most powerful warframe : "Next is the third set of battle armor, it is called [violent mad]"

Its physique and shape are thicker versions, like the anti-Hulk armor in Iron Man, with two 'big boxes' pendants on the shoulders, which are magazines, anti-material bullet magazines.

The holographic video demonstration has been projected into the workshop.

I saw the violent mad standing in the sky, suddenly raised his hand, the armor of his hand changed, and a round of muzzles appeared.

Buzz!

The armor shot suddenly, and saw a string of fire tongues coming out of the muzzle. Thousands of thumb-sized anti-material bullets rushed to the surface of the planet like a bee colony, which was extremely scary.

Bang Bang Bang ...

Thousands of horrific light clusters exploded on the surface of the planet, and the planet twenty times larger than the earth exploded into fragments, beyond recognition, and the destructive force of terror was creepy.

Lan opened her mouth, and made a few vague syllables in her throat.

Chen Mo turned a blind eye to Lan's shock and introduced the performance of the Warframe.

"In two seconds, [violent madness] can fire 10,000 anti-material bullets and make a planet a sieve. The inspiration for this design comes from a gun with 'Gatling' in our hometown, but with it The difference is that it uses ultra-high electromagnetic emission and is extremely fast. Its bullets are also anti-matter smart bullets that can control detonation. The two magazines behind the armor are 10,000. This armor is used for fire coverage and active power. Annihilation, no matter what combat skills, is unreasonable fire coverage. "

Lan swallowed madly again, and his voice was a little squeak: "It doesn't make sense, but I like it."

"But its obvious disadvantage is that it costs a lot of bullets. There are 10,000 anti-material bullets in two seconds. After a few seconds, there is no time to fight." Chen Mo reluctantly said: "The only way is to back up a few magazines when the battle requires, and rear The supply should also keep up. "

Lan came back a little, thinking about the positioning and application of [violent madness] in the army tactics.

If [violent madness] forms a legion and confronts the enemy, the sky is blocked by anti-material bullets. Alas ... the kind of horrible picture is simply horrifying.

A stellar system can't bear a round of fire from the [violent fanatic] legion.

However, the consumption is also particularly horrible. A set of armors fires 10,000 anti-material bullets in one round. If a 10,000-strong violent team fires a volley, 100 million anti-material bullets in two seconds.

This is simply ... a pervert.

In a short time, three sets of top-level battle armors were developed, and Lan felt that his world had gone crazy.

"Boss, the skills of these warframes?"

"It's all my own technology, very simple technology."

"Easy?"

Grunt? Lan felt that her worldview had been refreshed. So many technologies comparable to god-level civilization are simple to the boss's point of view, that's not ...

chapters.title: Chapter 856: : I Will Not Participate In Your War
chapters.body:
Chapter 856: : I Will Not Participate In Your War

The news of the first batch of new warframes was quickly spread throughout the entire guard system of the stellar system. The boss developed three sets of new top-level standard armors and spread them among the teams. In the future, one set of manpower will be used according to the standards of the Legion.

The news spread so extensively that Lan didn't stop it and let the news spread.

Independent research and development of top-level battle armor, and come up with three different plans at a time, it is shocking. Chen Mo's origins have also been investigated by more and more lives, but nothing has been found.

Even as the leader of the top civilization in power, the news was shocking.

In a short period of time, he came up with three sets of top-level warframe solutions, even his Yunzhou civilization's warframe R & D team did not have this ability.

He knew that Chen Mo was extraordinary and showed his ability to transcend all the lives he knew. Even Tong Qing and Dan, who were considered to be the most talented, he had contacted. Maybe the combat effectiveness of the two is higher than Chen Mo, but in terms of research and development capabilities, courage, structure, and personal charm, they are definitely not lost.

Tuyun carefully realized that after a short period of contact, he actually unknowingly rated Chen Mo so high.

"Girl Shuiling, do you know the origin of Mr. Mo Chen?" Tu Yun whispered to ask Shuiling around him.

He entered the galaxy through water Ling, specifically, he came here through the endless sea civilization.

When the galaxy was blocked, he contacted the help of the endless sea civilization for help, hoping to leave by the passage of the endless sea. Fu Yan asked him to contact Shui Ling, so he appeared here.

He also knew that Shui Ling came here according to Fu Yi's guidelines.

He didn't understand the identity of "Mo Chen" from the beginning. Even now, there is almost no information other than killing the dark forest civilization and the enemy of the dark forest. The introduction of Lan to Chen Mo was entirely out of concerns about the security of the stellar system. After learning that Chen Mo was able to build the space connector, he took a fluent attitude and hoped that Chen Mo would have the technology to help his old friend.

"Uncle Tuyun, I'm not in a position to say it." Shui Ling shook her head with a smile, and the fish scales were unusually bright.

She couldn't lie, but it wasn't easy to disclose.

The last time Chen Mo showed his true face to his teacher, she also saw that the Warframe Division wanted by Ziwei civilization also killed the life of the messenger of Ziwei civilization at Shi Ganxing.

She doesn't know what the other party and Lagerstroemia civilization have, but this is obviously not the time to investigate.

"I see." Tu Yun understood and stopped asking this question: "What does your teacher mean? Is it convenient to disclose?"

"The teacher asked me to make friends with him, to learn from him, and to maintain friendship no matter what." Shui Ling did not hide this, Tu Yun's personality was hearty and affectionate, and she was serious and righteous. She also had endless cooperation with them. Friend, so she doesn't need to hide.

Tuyun's expression converged, and his heart was shocked.

He heard for the first time that Fu Yi took the initiative to hand over a life, not a civilization, but a life. Even as strong as Tong Qing and Dan, Fu Yi never said anything.

Shui Ling is the first heir of the endless sea. Fuzheng asked her to make a good relationship with Chen Mo, which is to make the future of the endless sea and the other side good.

He is the holder of top civilization.

Possessing technology and technology comparable to god-level civilization, Fuyi's initiative to make good friends, and a powerful top-level Warframe Division counterpart, Lan also followed the other with a heart.

Last time Lan let them maintain order, he knew that Lan had followed Chen Mo's heart desperately.

He still knew Lan well.

This time, Chen Mo became more mysterious in Tuyun's eyes.

A spaceship appeared at the toll gate outside the stellar system and immediately attracted the attention of the Warframe Division who maintained order.

The spaceship of the black pupil civilization.

The atmosphere suddenly became tense.

This picture was also passed into Lan's hands for the first time, and then a video communication request was sent over.

On the holographic light curtain, Lan asked through a video communication request, and a light face popped up. The man was wearing a black armor, and the colorful patterns on the armor made people feel astonished.

"Your Excellency?" Lan asked seriously.

At this very time, the armored division of the black pupil civilization came over and had a significant impact. Although they did not participate in the fight, they were pulled into the water accidentally. The boss has offended two god-level civilizations, and the third one, the gods can't stop it.

The comer didn't care, the little smile hanged at the corner of his mouth, and the black pupil looked at Lan.

"Tong Qing took the liberty to disturb and asked to see the owner of the galaxy." The voice was thick and breathtaking.

As soon as this remark came out, the entire headquarters was in a dead silence, and all life was shocked. Even Lan leaned against the body of the chair and couldn't help sitting upright, staring brightly with Tong Qing.

Chen Mo was very surprised. Hei Qingming's Tong Qing came to visit?

Chen Mo has read all kinds of news about the Shigan galaxy, and there are not many reports about Tong Qing. Tong Qing is currently the strongest of the black pupil civilization and the first heir to the black pupil civilization.

There is no doubt that he will be in charge of the black pupil civilization in the future.

Such a character suddenly came to visit, Chen Mo was a little aggressive. He believes that he has no intersection with the other party, and no conflict of interest.

At this special time, Tong Qing swaggered over to visit, and Chen Mo could not help but be a little vigilant.
