Tong Qing is already in the reception room, and Tuyun and Shui Ling are also present.

A humanoid with black pupils and colored magic lines on the body makes people see a lot of mystery. The figure is a golden ratio, and the white cloak trench coat contrasts with him, giving a sense of freedom and uninhibited. In the face of Tu Yun and others, Tong Qing still calmly drank the drink, contented himself, without any worries.

The only one who entered the stellar system with the black pupil civilization was Tong Qing. The weapon of the battle armor, except the cold weapon, was unloaded. Chen Mo admired Tong Qing's courage, and she dared to enter the base camp of others by herself.

Either trust each other or be confident in yourself.

Chen Mo believes that Tong Qing belongs to the latter.

Chen Mo arrived at the scene, Lan naturally walked behind Chen Mo to stand. Hitomi's black eye pupils fell on him, and their eyes collided instantly.

Tong Qing's face was slightly surprised, followed by a thoughtful look.

"Mr. Tong Qing, I am honored to be here." After Chen Mo's Zhao Yun Shui Ling and others nodded slightly, he turned to Tong Qing and extended his right hand, using his earth etiquette.

"Hello, Mr. Mo Chen." Tong Qing naturally reached out her hand and shook it with Chen Mo.

They only paused slightly for two seconds before releasing each other in tacit agreement.

"Jiu Yang's name has always wanted to come to visit, but he has nothing to do with trivial matters. Today, I rushed to bother you without notice in advance. Tong Qing is here to forgive me. This time, I came to know Mr. Mo Chen, and it was a little bit wrong. Ask Mr. Mo Chen to discuss. "Tong Qing's polite attitude makes people feel uncomfortable and feels a lot of affinity.

"Mr. Tong Qing is polite. Your arrival will make us flourish." Chen Mo said with a smile, and he was impeccable in etiquette: "Let's sit and talk."

A crowd seated.

There are people with faces and faces on the field. Even if they haven't seen each other, they have heard some deeds. The scenes of talking about heaven and earth are very harmonious. About an hour later, Tong Qing brought the topic to the Galaxy.

The atmosphere on the court changed instantly.

Tu Yun and Shui Ling glanced at each other, leaned on the sofa, and looked on with a sideline. They know that when Tong Qing came this time, the focus was not on them. For the next topics, their opportunities to participate were limited.

"Tong Qing took the liberty to bother to discuss something with Mr. Mo Chen." Tong Qing cut into the subject and still had a friendly smile on his face.

"Sir, please." Chen Mo said lightly without expressing much emotion.

"Mr. Is there any interest in the super-power development technology of the magic flame civilization?" Hitomi Qing said with a smile. The black pupil looked directly at Chen Mo and seemed to want to see through Chen Mo's heart.

"Not interested." Chen Mo was straightforward.

For a moment, the atmosphere was stagnant, and everyone on the field looked at Chen Mo in surprise. They are not ordinary people, and they can naturally hear the affirmation in Chen Mo's tone.

Chen Mo is not lying.

Even Tong Qing's smile froze before she finally relaxed, looking at him with a surprised look: "Is it convenient to hear the reason? Mr. Mo Chen."

"I'm just passing by, I just want to leave here, I'm not interested in anything else," Chen Mo said lightly.

When thinking about the space jump, he found that the space was blocked, and Chen Mo felt very depressed. Had it not been for the delay, he would have returned to Earth now.

"Is that Mr. interested? After passing by, let's get a super power development technology?" Tong Qing asked again, waiting for Chen Mo to answer, and continued to add: "We can join hands to capture the thunder civilization, and then the flame civilization The scientific research staff at hand arrived, and gave him a copy of the super-capable technology. Also, he can provide any conditions, as long as I can do it, I will not refuse. "

Tu Yun and Shui Ling both looked at Chen Mo, and were a little nervous. If Chen Mu agrees, I'm afraid it's hard to cope with it. But the conditions are tempting, and the super-capacity development technical information plus an arbitrary condition.

Who is Tong Qing? They are very clear about this arbitrary condition, even if they will be tempted.

Compared to them, Lan looked calm. I'm afraid they don't know. The supercapacity development experimental body that the magic flame civilization successfully escaped is here, and there is a supercapacity development potion.

"No interest, I won't participate in your war. I didn't belong to me, I took a hot hand." Chen Mo refused casually, like a trivial matter.

Sitting next to Tu Yun and Shui Ling secretly relieved, they were afraid that Chen Mo would fall into it. Now Chen Mo refuses, they can still stay away.

Chen Mo's desireless appearance, even Tong Qing was a little surprised. Such a young life actually refused such a big temptation: "Mr. Mo Chen didn't think about it carefully?"

"No," Chen Mo said lightly.

"It's a pity." Tong Qing showed a pity look. "Since Mr. Tong is not willing to participate, there are two other things that Tong Qing wants to talk to Mr. Mo Chen."

chapters.title: Chapter 857: : Stellar System For Super Galaxy Cluster?
chapters.body:
Chapter 857: : Stellar System For Super Galaxy Cluster?

"I want to buy this stellar system from my husband. I heard that Mr. Mo Chen has standard warframes here. I also want to buy 100,000 sets of standard warframes. As for the conditions, I would like to exchange the territory of a super galaxy cluster with my husband . "

Super galaxy cluster?

Everyone on the field was shocked.

Luanda Yun and Shui Ling were both frightened by Tong Qing's courage.

A super galaxy cluster they know what it means, quite a territory of top civilization.

An average galaxy has hundreds of billions of stars, with galaxies as the unit, and an average of 100 galaxies as galaxy clusters with a diameter of 10 million light years. When several galaxy clusters and galaxy clusters come together, a higher-level celestial system super galaxy cluster is formed, and the smallest diameter of the super galaxy cluster is also 100 million light years.

The territory of the Yunzhou civilization is nothing but a local super galaxy cluster of ten super galaxy clusters.

Adding a stellar galaxy with 100,000 sets of standard armors, and changing a super galaxy cluster, is just heaven and earth.

This is undoubtedly a bottle of water for a golden mountain. But here is the 'desert', and the 'water' here is more precious than the Jinshan outside the desert.

"If Mr. Mo Chen is not satisfied with this condition, you can change one at will. I promise to make Mr. Mo Chen satisfied. If Mr. Mo Chen does not want to sell, I will not force it." Tong Qing still smiled and waited until Chen Mo's answer.

The choice is now Chen Mo.

This time, even Lan looked nervously at Chen Mo.

Chen Mo's next choice is very critical, related to their future development and layout. He was only a part-time job. At this time, Chen Mo didn't ask him. He was not good at speaking to Chen Mo.

Shui Ling and Tu Yun also set their sights on Chen Mo.

A star system with a defensive system for a super-galactic cluster with a diameter of 100 million light years will not be rejected even by this business.

"The stellar system can be sold to you, but the armor is not sold. I will destroy the Dark Matter Factory and the Antimatter Factory. You will rebuild it yourself. I do n’t want the territory, as long as the stars and technology, 70% of the coins, 30% of the technology.

Tong Qing's eyes became dark for an instant, and looking at Chen Mo again, he still couldn't see through this young humanoid.

Even Shui Ling and Tu Yun were surprised by Chen Mo's conditions, abandoning the territory and choosing money. But soon they were relieved, accepting Tong Qing's conditions, and fixed in the super galaxy cluster he arranged for development, which meant that his development would be under the supervision of Tong Qing.

Once settled, it will be easy for the black pupil civilization to deal with them in the future.

Star coins and technical data are all alive. Chen Mo can take these wealth to develop anywhere in the universe without being restricted and monitored by the black pupil civilization.

Even Lan was relieved, he knew that he was more concerned, and the boss was much smarter than he thought.

"Okay." Tong Qing did not hesitate to agree: "Seven trillion star coins, thirty top-level technologies."

"Also, I will destroy the space connector after escaping. It involves a lot of space technology issues." Chen Mo said without hesitation.

His space connector technology is definitely different from other homes. If it falls into the hands of other forces, it may cause technology leakage.

"I can use the space-connected machine. In this way, I will add five trillion yuan of coins to you and promise not to crack your technology." Tong Qing thought for a moment and said, "If you don't worry, Mr. Tu Yun and Endless Sea can be witnesses. Let third-party robots supervise here. Until the end, they supervised me to blow it up. "

Tuyun and Shuiling glanced at each other and nodded at the same time.

"Closing." After Chen Mo made his decision, he no longer hesitated: "After sixteen days, our space connector will be completed. You have sixteen days to prepare the money and technology. By then, you will get the money and technology , I'll give you control of the stellar defense system, and then we leave the Shigan galaxy. "

"Mr. is courageous and happy to cooperate." Tong Qing stood up and shook hands with Chen Mo, smiling brightly.

After talking about the trading conditions, Hitomi turned and said goodbye.

"You go and prepare. Sixteen days later, we will leave the Shigan Galaxy." Chen Mo glanced at Tong Qing, who was escorted by the spacecraft, turned and said to Lan.

"We will also go back and arrange to leave." The two Tuyun Shuiling and Chen Mo said hello and left.

When the two sides reached a deal, Tong Qing's face leaving the galaxy with a smile on his face was also captured by the major media in the galaxy and spread to all corners of the galaxy.

The deal between Tong Qing and the mysterious stellar system makes the situation in the Shigan galaxy subtle.

"The hand is fast." Dan saw the news from Tong Qing's stellar system where Chen Mo was located, staring at the light curtain, his eyes flashing with Lei Guang didn't know what he was thinking.

The men behind him did not dare to disturb him.

"If Dan, Tong Qing and the other side join forces, we are afraid that we will lose the top combat power. There are many masters in that stellar system. The three unknown top armor divisions, Tuyun and the endless sea of water, are all there. Thunder threw his frowns together, unable to stretch.

"Don't worry, at this level, everyone is a smart person. The master of the stellar system must know the pros and cons of this step when he reaches this stage." Dan Dandan said without any worries.

"What shall we do next?"

"Wait, they are going to leave. Tong Qing should have bought the stellar system. The defense there is perfect, with the level of the god-level civilized military, and the commander of the stellar system is not ordinary people."

"God-level military means?" Thunder shook his body, and almost exclaimed, "How is that possible? They are not god-level civilizations, how could such a means be possible."

Dan calmly said: "The guys who set up defenses are very good. We are not completely sure that when special weapons are restricted, we use our power in the Shigan galaxy to break that star system."

"It's impossible." Thunder still didn't believe it.

"Lei Yue said."

"Master Thunder?" Thunder convinced.

As one of the heirs of the thunder civilization, the thunder knew the identity of thunder. The General Staff of the Thor Military Civilization and the General Staff of the First Corps of the Black Hitomi Civilization are on the same level, and are the top commanders and strategists of the Universe.

If Lei came here, they would have a high chance of winning this battle. Even if the black pupil civilization has a mischief, they are not afraid.

"Is Lord Lei also here?" Thunder asked.

Dan shook his head slightly: "He didn't come here. After all, this blockade is dangerous. He can't risk leaving the military, otherwise there will be trouble. Our space connector is almost ready, and you know the position. I am from the technical backbone of the magic flame civilization Get some superpower development materials. When you get it, leave here and return to the main star. "

"Master Dan, don't you leave? Leave with the technical backbone of the Demon Flame civilization." Thunder was extremely puzzled.

"I won't go first. The fight has changed."

"why?"

"Because he is here."

Dan stared at the star map of the Shigan Galaxy and calmed down. The Thunder was also quietly thinking.

On the other side, the massive movement of Chen Mo's stellar system also began.

With the coordination of Lan's instructions and the Momo II super artificial intelligence, all information is almost synchronized, and all posts in the stellar system operate as efficiently as precision machines, showing unprecedented efficiency.

chapters.title: Chapter 858: : Escape The Shigan Galaxy
chapters.body:
Chapter 858: : Escape The Shigan Galaxy

On the first day, Lan issued an order to start preparations for all life that wanted to leave the galaxy, disarm the armor and weapons and put them under the unified control, and put on an identity bracelet to enter the transport spacecraft and wait. Any troublemaker will be wiped out directly. Tickets for the unified space connector cost 50,000 yuan per life. Those who have no money and finally leave, disobey the arranger, will be driven out of the galaxy or even obliterated. Those who are involved in uniforming the troublemaker can leave the space connector first.

The military order was so strict that many lives trembled. There was a voice protest, but the perpetrators were killed directly by others and qualified to leave first. After a few times, the life that really wanted to leave, did not dare to make trouble.

With the coordination of super artificial intelligence, hundreds of billions of fleeing lives were arranged in an orderly manner.

The first batch of light-speed transport ships and various other transport ships began to load the lives they had paid for, and waited for orders in space.

On the fourth day, under the pressure of high pressure, all the lives that wanted to leave were prepared, and they were arranged clearly and confiscated, all weapons and armor were seized, leaving only a clothes and a bracelet that they ‘gifted’. Life without warframes is not worth mentioning in the face of horrible technology. Without life and trouble, the troublemakers are dead. In order to be free, you can only endure a period of insecurity.

On the seventh day, after getting enough antimatter and dark matter as a backup, Chen Mo ordered the production of antimatter and dark matter to be stopped, and began to let robots dismantle important parts of the antimatter and dark matter factories, and let the metal nanorobots disassemble the remaining machines in all factories.

On the tenth day, the first batch of standard armors of the Warframe Factory was 300,000 sets, which were successfully distributed to the `` guard group '' and `` big magic group '' equipment. The first batch of 300,000 War Armor Divisions took shape. The entire galaxy has entered an unprecedented state of alert.

The movement away from the Shigan galaxy is getting faster and faster, apparently entering the stage of white fever. Subsequent rushes to the life of the stellar galaxy, and continued to join the ranks to leave.

No force dares to come to stop, this is quite a rescue of civilians on the battlefield. Even if it is a god-level civilization, in the face of this situation, it will not choose to chaos.

On the thirteenth day, Lan ordered that he stop accepting subsequent lives. Without permission, no life can enter the stellar system, otherwise the consequences will be at your own risk. As soon as the news came out, the first battle broke out. Subsequent mutiny of blocked life, forcing a galaxy into the galaxy, the final result can be imagined.

Under the horrible defense system of the galaxy, all the lives of the storms died in space, without exception. After a day of slaughter, hundreds of millions of violent lives were killed, and the follow-up life and spacecraft stopped and did not dare to rush into the galaxy.

The sixteenth day arrived as scheduled.

In space, a huge ring-shaped machine is floating, and the space connector is tested as scheduled. In the space outside the space connector, millions of transport ships of various shapes are neatly arranged in four rows, one at each end of the ring structure of the space connector, waiting for Chen Mo's instructions to leave.

Chen Mo was receiving guests at this time.

Both Tuyun and Shui Ling were present to witness the deal. Both were expressionless, and Chen Mo's non-participation in the battle between the black pupil civilization and the thunder civilization was a very wise choice.

"This is the data of seven trillion star coins and thirty top-level technologies." Tong Qing handed a card and a memory card to Chen Mo, completely treating the two things as ordinary items, which seemed not expensive.

Chen Mo was unpretentious, took the money card and the memory card and handed them over to Lan.

Lan took down the card, swiped at the wrist instrument in his hand, and transferred all the coins in it, confirming seven trillion trillion coins. Copy all the information inside to your own memory.

"Don't Mr. Mochen check the authenticity of the technology?"

"No, this thing is insignificant to Mr. Tong Qing, and will not cheat me as an ordinary person. Enter your identity information." Chen Mo took out a small instrument and handed it to Tong Qing: "The star inside Weapons control system permissions, you can enter artificial intelligence programs, and one minute after I leave the Shigan galaxy, the system's artificial intelligence will be automatically destroyed, giving control and command to you. "

"Happy cooperation."

Tong Qing smiled after entering the identity information and writing into the smart program.

"If it isn't for the special situation, I will definitely get together with Mr. Mo Chen. I am always admired and admired for such an excellent genius like Mr. Mo."

Tong Qing said very seriously, with an intimate smile on his face, making people feel that Chen Mo is an old friend he hasn't seen in years.

"I have always admired Mr. Tong Qing." Chen Mo laughed.

"If you have time the other day, you must invite Mr. My hometown as a guest. At that time, I hope Mr. Mo Chen will not refuse." Tong Qing said with a right hand, smiling.

"Sure." Chen Mo reached out and shook Tong Qing.

And Tong Qing's men are all looking at Chen Mo, wondering how this man is eligible to sit on par with Tong Qing, and have Tong Qing invite. However, to disappoint them, they could not see anything from Chen Mo.

"Mr. Tong Qing, I will have the opportunity to talk again the other day, and leave." Chen Mo said faintly.

"Okay, Mr. Mochen all the way." Tong Qing smiled gently.

At the back of Chen Mo's departure, Tong Qing was lost in thought. The women on the side stepped forward and whispered in his ear: "Master, why did you make this deal?"

In this sentence, ask the voices of other subordinates. Seven trillion trillion coins, plus thirty top-level technologies, are not small, and it is completely worthless to change to a stellar system.

"Tara, don't look at the surface." Tong Qing shook his head slightly. "This stellar system is worth the price. The precautionary measures here have the taste of the military, and the layout is the master. He said that we are in the Shigan galaxy. The power of the attack also delaminated. "

Tara opened her mouth and looked at Chen Mo's back, her face shocked.

"Launch the space connector."

Chen Mo enters the spacecraft and gives Mo Nu No. 2 an instruction.

In the annular space connector in space, the inner wheel rotates slowly, like a dragonfly's tail gently tapping on the calm lake-like surface. The fixed space inside the ring seemed to come alive, and an invisible ripple spread at the speed of light, which only instruments could detect.

"The space connector started successfully."

Space junctions are provided by the endless sea from outside, in galaxies 100,000 light years away from the Shigan galaxy.

"All teams listened to the order and left the Shigan galaxy five minutes later. All spacecraft entered the state of artificial intelligence-controlled autopilot in accordance with the plan and were ready." Lan sent a message to the fleet on standby in space.

When millions of life-laden transport ships were commanded, they all went into autonomous driving.

Lan was on the spacecraft, sighing, overlooking the lowered Zong Saturn.

"What do you think of this battle?" Chen Mo asked.

"It's bad, I'm afraid there will be a lot of movement in the Shigan galaxy this time." Lan said, "Tong Qing and Dan, two peak figures of the same age meet here, they both understand that there will be one Winning and losing. "

"How to say?" Chen Mo asked curiously.

"I have studied these two people. They are the same natural talents, powerful, confident, courageous, strong personal charm, the same strategy and ambition, almost the most perfect life, even if they have not met before, but they Knowing that each other is an opponent, they are too much like each other.

The endless movement of the endless sea indicates that the chaos is about to come. This is an opportunity for them to defeat each other. Otherwise, when the chaos comes, both parties will be blessed by the strength of the god-level civilization and the strength of the Legion. "

Evaluation of the two, Lan's expression became very serious and solemn.

There is no room for two tigers.

Sheng Shengyu, He Shengliang?

Chen Mo immediately understood what Lan said.

"The space connection point is determined and you can jump."

Mo Nu No. 2 suddenly spoke, interrupting their communication. In the inner ring of the space connector in space, the space fluctuations have stabilized, the space solidification has been untied, and regular fluctuations have been restored.

"Mo Mo wi ~~~" The little mother animal also jumped over and jumped over Chen Mo's shoulder, pointing at the quadrant where the space connector was located.

"Got it."

Chen Mo held the little mother beast in her arms, and held it gently.

"lets go."

Chen Mo glanced at Saturn. Zong Saturn's pupil Qing is also watching Chen Mo's spacecraft.

Suddenly, the two seemed to have a feeling of looking away from each other.

chapters.title: Chapter 859: : Pisces-Whales Super Galaxy Cluster Complex
chapters.body:
Chapter 859: : Pisces-Whales Super Galaxy Cluster Complex

"set off."

Received Lan's instructions, as the great magic group of the vanguard team, all together, a spirit of killing pervaded, giving a great sense of danger. At the order of Da Mazu, the spacecraft started slowly.

Similarly, at the same time as the start of the Big Mighty Vanguard, other spacecraft were also launched at the same time. The spacecraft was controlled by artificial intelligence and set off toward the space connector.

There are a large number of weapons around the fleet to maintain security, and even the team of the black pupil civilization did not dare to approach. Until the control is not officially excessive, neither the spacecraft nor the Warframe Division of the black pupil civilization can enter the stellar system.

Ten minutes later, the large magic group armed spacecraft at both ends of the space connector sank into the space connector and disappeared into the star system. As if penetrating through a thin film, the space outside the spacecraft changed slightly.

"Confirm the position and report it to the adult." Damazu notified Mo Nu No. 2.

"Confirm the location, the edge of the stone pattern galaxy [pencil novel www.qbxs.xyz], the distance is 100,000 light years from the Shigan galaxy." Mo Nu 2 notified the spaceship in the Shigan galaxy via quantum communication.

"The team behind starts."

With a command, the spaceships in the rear kept coming over and entering. The efficiency of the team is extremely high. Under the control of super artificial intelligence, the distances between the spacecraft are equal. The fleet looks like a long snake into the hole without any stagnation.

"Finally getting out of trouble." Tuyun said with a sigh when he heard the report from the pioneer team.

He was the first to try to cure this kind of space, and also marveled at the speciality of the space connector. Only this technology is not afraid of being blocked by divine civilization in war.

Chen Mo's spacecraft is at the rear of the team and is protected by the armed spaceship regiment of the wooden guard group. There is no life to approach.

As the distance from the space connector gets closer, Chen Mo becomes more and more nervous. After this blockade, Chen Mo has been clear about the basic situation of the Universe Alliance. Finally left the cage, the next step is to go home.

As the spacecraft submerged into the space connector, Chen Mo felt a bit of a puppet and had already appeared in space.

Chen Mo's spacecraft left the stellar system, and with the last spacecraft of the latter army leaving, the countdown of Zong's weapon system command has begun. The super artificial intelligence installed by Chen Mo at the headquarters will be destroyed automatically, and the system here will be taken over by Tong Qing.

Five minutes later, as the countdown ended, the screen in the command post flashed, and a pair of black eyes appeared on the screen, which is the most classic Peugeot of the black pupil civilization.

"Master Tong Qing, the weapon system took over successfully." Inside the command post, a thick old-fashioned voice sounded.

"Tara, go ahead and let the intelligence department pay attention to the movement and position of their team and report information to me at any time." Tong Qing's voice is as strong as ever. He is thinking about the situation when he met Chen Mo twice, that young life, Too much surprise for him.

"I understand, sir." Tara nodded.

"Master Dan, the original owner of the stellar system has left, and Tong Qing took over the stellar system. The news shows that Tong Qing bought it from the other party." A subordinate reported to Dan.

"I see." Dan nodded gently. "He should wait this day, it should be a long time."

Dan's eyes shot a war of will.

...

The team of millions of spacecraft all reached the stone galaxy. After learning about freedom, Chen Mo ordered contact with the control of those transportation spacecraft and returned them to freedom.

The team was dismissed, and Chen Mo had only 800 space-curvature spacecrafts left here. Reprinted the technical talents and the War Armor Division that Chen Mo absorbed in the Shigan Galaxy.

For other life freedoms, these talents are ready to follow him.

Three million lives.

Tuyun and Shui Ling also found Chen Mo, who is now free and their expressions are more relaxed than in the past three months.

"Mr. Mo Chen, thank you for your help this time, otherwise it will be a little trouble to leave that right and wrong place." Tu Yun said gratefully, the smile on his face never disappeared.

"You're welcome." Chen Mo nodded in greeting.

"Sir, the teacher asked me to thank you on behalf of him. If you have time to show up, you can come to our endless sea at any time in the future. Endless sea welcomes Mr. at any time." Shui Ling also thanked Chen Mo.

"Tell me to tell your teacher, if you have time, you must disturb the old gentleman." Chen Mo smiled slightly at Shui Ling.

"Okay. I give both my personal communication number and our official Quantum communication number to Mr. Hu, so that he can contact us at any time. The teacher also said that Mr. Wu will be our best friend of the Endless Hai civilization." Shui Ling said.

There was a flash of light in the eyes of Tuyun next to him, very surprised.

Because of his special ability, Fuyu always had to be a prophet to do things, occupying opportunities, and rarely doing business at a loss. Chen Mo was helped by the old guy as the best friend of the endless sea, and it is worth considering here.

"Mr. Mo Chen, I also welcome you to Yunzhou civilization at any time." Tu Yun laughed.

Chen Mo did not refuse the goodwill of the two civilizations. One more friend is better than one more enemy. Although he has mastered many technologies, his power is still very small, and he is in a developing state. It is definitely beneficial to him to hand in a god-level civilization and a top-level civilization.

Just need to maintain the proper distance and connection, and he also has a small universe in hand.

"Mr. Mo Chen, we are leaving, we have to rush back to the endless sea." Shui Ling said.

Shui Ling left and Chen Mo didn't stop her. She is one of the heirs of the Endless Sea and has a very high status. This time she has been trapped in the Shigan galaxy for a long time, so she must go back.

Soon after Ling Ling left, Tu Yun and Lan said hello, and then left with Chen Mo. He came to the Shigan Galaxy to invite Lan out of the mountain. Although Lan chose to follow Chen Mo in the end, he was sincerely happy about the choice of his old friend.

From the known technology, Chen Mo has the technology that is not inferior to them. Lan followed Chen Mo, which may not be a good choice.

Tuyun and Shui Ling left, leaving only Chen Mo's team floating in space. Eight hundred spacecraft were waiting for Chen Mo's order.

Lan stopped beside Chen Mo.

The next thing they have to think about is where to go for development. The universe is so large, but many places are divided by various civilizations and forces. They can occupy one or two stellar galaxies for development, but if they want to grow, they will face restrictions and even hostility from other civilizations around the galaxy.

And in the Shigan galaxy, they offended the Dark Forest civilization, and also Lagerstroemia civilization. Once found, they face the means of a divine civilization.

"Go to the Pisces-Cetacean super galaxy complex." Chen Mo said.

"Pisces-Cetacean Super Galaxy Cluster Complex?" Lan's eyes appeared surprised.

"Rania Kea Super Galaxy cluster."

It is called ‘Heaven of Life’, and there ’s another name: Hell of Life. There are many turbulences in the space, many black holes, scarce primitive wisdom life, no advanced life, scarce civilization, and far away from the large civilization and the bustling galaxy. For the bustling territory of the Universe, that location is quite a primitive forest.

"My home is there."

Chen Mo who left the Shigan galaxy did not know that in the Shigan galaxy, something that shocked the entire universe was happening.

chapters.title: Chapter 860: : Space Mixer
chapters.body:
Chapter 860: : Space Mixer

"let's start."

Tong Qing looked at the machines suspended in the holographic video. Hundreds of the same machines in space, ten kilometers in size, had just been transmitted from the space connector.

He has prepared something for a long time.

The barren planet in front of me and the endless starry sky in the sky, Tong Qing is like a thousand-year-old pine, watching quietly, black eyes reflecting the starry sky, deeper than the starry sky.

The cold temperature of Zong Saturn fluttered on his skin, making the colored magic lines on his body dim. Hitomi's gaze regained focus and she exhaled.

Looking at him again, his eyes became sharper than ever.

With his order, centered on the star system, an irregular space wave spread at the speed of light. Regular spatial amplitude also becomes uncertain at this moment. The fluctuations of the inner ring of the space connector have become chaotic due to the influence of this random space fluctuation.

"Master, do you really want to do this?" Tara approached Tong Qing, asking respectfully.

"It's the least costly for me or him. I believe he will do the same." Tong Qing's voice was extremely calm, as if she was talking about something insignificant.

"Next, fight with peace of mind."

For a moment, Tong Qing's voice became war-fighting.

The outside world is completely confused at this moment.

The space of the Shigan galaxy has been changed again, and the pupil of the black pupil civilization, Tong Qing, is transmitted through the space connector and uses a special space weapon [space agitator], resulting in an irregular space centered on the star system where Tong Qing is Volatility spreads.

[Space Agitator] is a space weapon used by the god-level civilized military. This special space weapon can artificially create space turbulence and disrupt regular space fluctuations into irregular space turbulence.

As long as the [Space Mixer] does not stop, the scope of the turbulent flow of space will continue to expand, until it wraps Shigan Star and other planets around it.

Even if you stop running, this random space turbulence, including space connectors, will be affected. This effect, even if stopped, will have a recovery period of 100 days.

The outside can no longer determine the specific spatial coordinates of the spatial connector, and if it jumps away from the inside, it is like performing a spatial jump in a turbulent space, and the risk coefficient rises exponentially.

Before long, with the location of the star where Tong Qing is located as the center, the surrounding star system, including Shi Ganxing, will be completely reduced to an island, and the range will expand at the speed of light. In galaxies that are blocked in space and can't travel faster than the speed of light, even the last escape route of the space connector will be cut off.

Tong Qing's approach shocked the Commonwealth Federation.

Still trapped in the Shigan galaxy, the god-level civilization that did not complete the space connector escape, put pressure on the black pupil civilization, asking the black pupil civilization to order the cancellation of [space agitator] and punish Tong Qing.

The reaction of Thor and Baixing civilization is the most intense. Dan is one of the iconic characters of Thor and Baixing civilization. There are also special characters trapped inside. Both released news that if the black pupil civilization did not lift the interference of the [Space Mixer] and caused them great losses, they would declare war on the black pupil civilization.

Lagerstroemia civilization and corpse civilization also issued a warning to the black pupil civilization, ordering the black pupil civilization to immediately stop space agitation, otherwise the black pupil civilization will also be sanctioned.

The pressure of the four god-level civilizations joined forces to make the pressure of the black pupil civilization suddenly rise. The holder of the black pupil civilization, the speaker of the black pupil council, Hei Weifu Luoyun, was furious and annoyed that Tong Qing was good at using military forces.

For a month!

The Space Alliance was so upset because of what happened in the Shigan galaxy, and as the only group of people who escaped, they were fortunate in private.

Chen Mo, on his way home.

The Pisces-Cetacean super galaxy complex is a large-scale fiber structure that accommodates this super-galaxy cluster, with a billion-light-year span. The complex has five parts, including the Pisces-Whale Super Galaxy Cluster, Pisces-English Fairy-Pegasus Chain , Pegasus-Pisces chain, Jade constellation-Wu Perseid super galaxy cluster, Rania Kea super galaxy cluster.

The Virgo Supergalactic Cluster, in which the Milky Way is located, is within the Rania Kea Supergalactic Cluster. It is shaped like a pancake and has a diameter of 200 million light years.

Suddenly, an armed fleet appeared in space within the Virgo range, and eighty spacecraft floated in space, waiting for the next space jump.

"Mo Ge, according to the SN482 pulsar's label, the sixth quadrant of Virgo here should be 210 million light-years away from the position you said. You only need to make another jump to reach What you call the Milky Way. "Mo Nu 2 appeared on the light curtain, marking out all their location information.

Upon hearing this report, Chen Mo, who had always been calm, was shocked and slightly nervous.

Eight years, he left the earth for almost eight years, and now he is finally back. He has experienced many things in the past eight years. He is not sure now whether there have been any major events on earth and what happened to his family.

There is a feeling of cowardice near home.

"I'm going to change my clothes." Chen Mo was so excited that he walked back to his room.

Five minutes later, Chen Mo changed her attire, her blue skin was gone, and she was restored to her previous appearance. She had black hair and yellow skin, and she looked bright. A globe-style casual clothing with a gentle and confident smile on the corner of the mouth.

Lan saw Chen Mo's eyes bright.

The little beast saw Chen Mo's original appearance, and also realized Chen Mo's joyful mood. She jumped off Jing Ge's shoulders and jumped into Chen Mo's arms. Her head enjoyed the chattering.

Jing Ge and Gray 21 calmed down a lot. When Chen Mo removed the camouflage, they also removed all the camouflage on their bodies and restored their original appearance.

Wat Mu, Da Mazu, Red Crab, Poison Skin Girl, and other members of the main spaceship. They knew that Chen Mo was disguised, but never saw Chen Mo's appearance after disguising. This was the first time he saw Chen Mo. His true face looks a lot more pleasing to the eye than the blue skin after disguise, which is his original face.

Suddenly, an astonishing voice appeared from Da Mazu.

"Isn't the portrait like the cruel man wanted by Ziwei civilization?"

This muttering made the people in the main spaceship's cabin shake their spirits, and flashed in their minds the life that was desperately wanted by the Ziwei civilization in Shi Ganxing, the cruel man who killed the messenger of the Ziwei civilization.

Exactly the same.

"It's not like it, it's just that," Poison Girl said calmly.

call……

There was no small commotion in the cabin. They had never seen an adult do it, and the adult's research and development was very good. He thought it was the leader of the smart line. I did not expect that the adult was also a ruthless person.

"The Ziwei civilization, the dark forest civilization, isn't it that we offend both?" Wu Mu murmured.

At this moment, the members of the cabin were frightened. The seven rulers of the universe, they have offended two, it is simply terrifying.

"What are you afraid of? You do n’t have to worry about debts. You have to fight with one another. You will die in the next life. Lao Tzu's early look at the high-level gods' civilization is very unpleasant." Red Crab's hot temper, coupled with his loud voice, attracted the eyes of others.

Chen Mo's discussion with them just passed by with a smile.

"It's the most comfortable to return to the old way." Chen Mo rubbed his face, and people became a lot more relaxed: "Mo girl, ready to jump, target the Milky Way."

chapters.title: Chapter 861: :I Am Back
chapters.body:
Chapter 861: :I Am Back

"The fleet has entered the Orion spiral arm of the Milky Way, 26,500 light years away from the Galaxy."

When the fleet appeared in space, Mo Nu reported her current position. Chen Mo glanced at the familiar starry sky map, his expression gradually relaxed, and he was getting closer and closer to home.

When you reach the Orion spiral arm, it is much easier to find the solar system. The solar system is inside the Orion spiral arm.

"Turn on the Life Planet Quantum Detector and confirm the location of the Life Planet." Chen Mo said.

"According to the" Lania Kea Super Galaxy Cluster Life Research Record and Interstellar Archaeological Memorandum "uploaded to the Cosmic Union Scientific Research Data Sharing Library uploaded by the origin city galaxy professor Lan Lan's scientific research team, the coordinates of the life planet in the Orion spiral arm and The picture is as follows: Red-tailed star (quadrant 6th, 3729, 238466, 488362), nitrogen-rich planet. Note: The intelligent life planet bred red-level nitrogen-based intelligent life, there is an immature star civilization, stars are about to die, and red tail nitrogen Base Life is seeking to escape from the galaxy and perform the most primitive interstellar colonization ... "

Mo Nu II released the coordinates and data of all surrounding life planets.

Chen Mo was so shocked that he quickly looked for the shadow of the earth in the picture. After filtering by color and size, Chen Mo soon saw the data and coordinates of the earth.

"Blue Star (sixth quadrant, 4692, 230451, 480252), an oxygen-enriched planet. Note: The planet of intelligent life, bred a red-level carbon-based intelligent life, has a mature planet-level civilization, according to the Cosmos Alliance's original life planet protection law, this The planet of life belongs to the protection scope of this regulation, and it is recommended not to destroy the development of the planet's civilization. "

"I found it, right here, Blue Star."

Chen Mo opened up the image of the earth. He couldn't be more familiar with this image of the earth. Just a few years later, he was so excited to see the earth again.

"Jump to the star system where Blue Star is." Chen Mo ordered without hesitation.

"Okay, confirm the space coordinates, the space curvature engine starts, and prepare for the space jump."

The voice of Mo Nu 2 spread throughout the fleet. Twenty minutes later, the fleet disappeared again. When it appeared again, it was already in the space of the solar system.

"Dididi!"

"Received the announcement information from the Marching Ant Group. This stellar system is a non-open stellar system. The Marching Ant Group has declared sovereignty over this stellar system according to the law of ownership of the Universe Alliance. You need to land the stellar system, please send an access request and ask for approval before entering the stellar mooring. "

"Please note……"

"..."

Warnings from the galaxy came from the public channel on the universe.

"I did not expect that in this remote corner, there is still a good civilization." Lan saw the various defense weapons displayed on the spacecraft, could not help but stunned, and his expression became dignified.

The spacecraft has detected that the entire space of the star system is an antimatter reaction and is a variety of space-based weapons. The weapons here are only a lot more than the weapons of the stellar galaxy where they are stationed.

If they fight, I am afraid they will all be planted here, and the other party will pile them up with weapons. Just how insecure life is, so many horrible weapons will be deployed.

This is almost a stellar fortress. There is no space weapon, and the price you want to capture is definitely not small.

"Boss, isn't there a problem?" Lan asked cautiously.

Everyone else in the cabin looked at Chen Mo. This position was where Chen Mo wanted to come. They did not expect that such a remote corner actually had such an advanced galaxy.

"Which big force is the Marching Ants?" Asked the mastiff, curious.

"The universe has countless civilizations and influence groups, many of the same name." Poison skin girl answered coldly.

"It's okay, this is my home. I formed the marching ant group." Hearing the warning from the public channel, Chen Mo smiled. It was the voice of Mo Nu, his most familiar voice.

"Send a video call application." Chen Mo tried to keep herself calm, but her voice excitement could not be suppressed.

Huaxia, Binhai.

There is no longer a shadow here eight years ago. Today Binhai is the most prosperous and futuristic city in China. A variety of sci-fi-like buildings line the headquarters or branches of many of the world's largest technology companies.

Various private aircraft can also be seen flying in the air in an orderly manner, and the ground is full of traffic.

In the bustling area of the commercial center, various holographic projection advertisements occupy every corner. The greening is very beautiful. After the petrochemical energy is eliminated, even the most prosperous cities can still see the pure sky.

Incense Burner Bay.

Facing the sea and backing the mountains, the tranquility and the atmosphere of the bustling international metropolis have never spread to this location. It was developed as a gathering area for the rich, surrounded by the highest-end villa areas, because Chen Mo's home is here.

The Mo woman sitting in the study in a daze suddenly looked up, her expression full of surprise.

The next moment, a holographic video jumped out in front of her, which was Chen Mo who had been searching for nearly eight years. Gaze quietly, if she had tears at this time, she must be crying with joy.

Mo Nu smiled, a very happy smile. This was the first time in eight years that she had been conscious.

Her consciousness was created by Chen Mo. In her consciousness, Chen Mo has an irreplaceable position and is her most important person.

"I'm back." In a short sentence, Chen Mo's voice was very calm. In the calm, it was the thrill and hardship of these eight years, but everything was worth it.

"Well, welcome home." Mo Nu focused her head. At this time, there is not much to say, a simple sentence is enough to express everything.

"How is your family? Xiaoyu?" He was most worried about Xiaoyu. When he was caught, Xiaoyu was still pregnant and had severe vomiting. He was worried many times over the years.

"Family is very good, just miss you. Xiaoyu took Wuming and went out with her grandparents. Sister Zhao Min is in the company, and Wushuang is in the Institute of Building No. 1." Mo Nu simply reported to Chen Mo.

"Is the child nameless?" Chen Mo smiled rejoicingly, and his family was in good health.

"Yes, Chen Wuming. Shortly after her seventh birthday, Xiao Yu said, wait for you to come back and name him. We have been looking for you all these years." Mo Nu's smile was still gentle, and she passed the nameless photo to Chen Mo .

The seven-year-old nameless, not short, is almost the same as Chen Mo when he was twelve or three years old, with bright eyes and a lot like Chen Mo when he was young.

"Now come back, don't tell them, give them a surprise, wait for me at home, everyone is reunited." Chen Mo smiled with relief, the fatigue and worry of the long journey, all disappeared. Now it's all worth it.

"I told them to go home."

"Okay, first help me connect to the unparalleled call."

Wushuang was interrupted by a holographic video call.

Today's Wushuang is already a slender young girl, full of youthful spirit, influenced by the three daughters in her temperament, doing things like Zhao Min's capable, but without the aura of Zhao Min's birth, his personality is as gentle as Xiao Yu's The science and technology women are unique in reason and wisdom.

The outside world is spreading that in the future, Wushuang will inherit Chen Mo's name and take charge of the marching ant group, because she is the best genius after Chen Mo.

Connected to the call, a familiar figure popped up, the familiar smile in memory, still so kind. Wushuang stood still, tears couldn't help anymore, and the flowers came out with rain.

chapters.title: Chapter 863: : Rain And Dew
chapters.body:
Chapter 863: : Rain And Dew

The closer to the earth, the more excited Chen Mo was.

In the last eight years, he has countless times wanted to come back early, and after many twists and turns, he finally achieved his wish today.

Boom ...

The supersonic speed of the battle armor exploded in the air, and Binhai City soon came into view, Xiangluwan, a familiar home. The building was magnified in Chen Mo's eyes, Chen Mo's speed gradually slowed down, and he slowly landed outside the villa.

Inside the villa, a family is in the lobby.

Chen Mo's parents, Xiao Yu, Zhao Min, Mo Nu, and sister Wu Shuang are all in the living room. Wushuang's eyes were still red and swollen. When they first saw them, Xiaoyu and Zhao Min thought she was bullied and startled.

Asking the reason is not willing to say, just to say that a technology has been developed, and I was too happy to cry.

Seeing Wushuang looks like crying when sad. Moreover, Wushuang also went back to his room deliberately, changed his clothes, and rarely put on a light makeup to make himself look beautiful.

Xiao Yu and Zhao Min looked at each other and seemed to guess some possibilities. They were extremely expectant and nervous. Even Chen Shanhe and Shao Xuemei were very confused, but they only listened to Wushuang and Mo Nu and waited quietly.

"Arrived."

Mo Nu smiled, got up from the position, and walked towards the door.

"Grandparents, mother, Aunt Min, surprise came, you stand up to greet." Wushuang took Xiaoyu and Zhao Min's hands and pulled them up.

Xiaoyu and Zhao Min stared at each other and stared straight at the doorway. They guessed a possibility, but they weren't sure if it was true, and they hoped it might be true.

The palms of the two women were unconsciously clenched, their palms sweated, and they even had a slight rush in breathing, obviously extremely tense.

Suddenly, Mo Nu brought men into their field of vision. The eyes of the two were fixed on the man, the brain's thoughts exploded, the whole person was frozen in place, and his eyes became red at the speed visible to the naked eye.

Looking at each other silently.

It was just a trembling body, betraying their seemingly calm faces.

Seeing the appearance of the two women, Chen Mo felt sour and opened her arms: "I am back."

In a short sentence, the two women couldn't help but pounced on like a yan, ignoring everything.

Wushuang looked in place, and burst into tears with a smile. She dreamed of her father returning countless times, but did not expect this moment to really come.

"Sister, is Dad back?" Wushuang's eyes were staring at Chen Mo, who was holding Xiaoyu and Zhao Min. He had clearly recognized them, but he was still a little bit uncertain because they had only been seen in the photos.

"Yes, Dad is back." Wushuang touched his head.

The parents of Chen Mo, whose eyes are already red, have been confused and desperate. Xiaoyu said that Chen Mo is still alive and will return one day. They have been doubtful until some time ago, when Xiaoyu showed them Chen Mo's wanted order, they were not sure. Their son is okay, and will be back soon, but did not expect to be back.

Chen Shanhe, who has always been calm and unsmiling, also secretly wipes his tears.

About five minutes later, the two women released Chen Mo in tacit agreement. The eyes still looked red and swollen, but the mental appearance on their faces had completely changed.

Chen Mo walked to Wushuang's sister and brother, hugging Wuming, and also holding Wushuang. This was the first time that he had no name. The little guy looked at him honestly, wondering if it was unfamiliar.

"Dad." Xiao Wuming shouted jerkyly.

"Well, really good." Chen Mo felt sour and felt extremely warm: "Did my sister bully you when Dad was not at home?"

"No, my sister hurts me, and grandpa and grandma, mother, Aunt Min and Aunt Mo all hurt me." Xiao Wuming said each one seriously.

"Daddy hurts you in the future, too." Chen Mo rubbed the little guy's head and kissed him on the forehead.

"Well, come down first, and let Dad hug later."

Xiaoyu took over Xiaoming, and Chen Mo also walked towards his parents.

"Dad, mom, I'm back."

Chen Mo looked at his parents and couldn't help getting jealous. Although the maintenance is good, the white hair on the parents' heads is still more than before.

"Look, I'm thin and tanned."

Mother Chen trembled and touched Chen Mo's face, tears could not stop. In recent years, if they were not accompanied by Xiaoyu and grandchildren, they would not know what to do.

At this time, Chen Mo's heart was stable, and the universe drifted for so long. At this moment, it was worth doing anything.

"Husband, you chat with your parents, let's cook."

Xiao Yu and Zhao Min gave the space to them, and the two headed for the kitchen, followed by a dinner full of joy and warmth. Do not leave for eight years, do not need too many tears and surprises, simple everything is enough to express.

That night.

The family fell asleep, Chen Mocai and Xiaoyu returned to the room.

I haven't seen it in eight years. At the moment when he entered the room, Xiaoyu couldn't help it anymore, holding Chen Mo tightly, his body trembling.

When Chen Mo first came back, she had to restrain her thoughts and leave Chen Mo's time with her family. Now she can't help but hold Chen Mo tightly. She is afraid she will leave again.

Chen Mo patted Xiaoyu's back gently: "It's okay, I won't leave in the future."

He didn't know how they came to support such a large group over the years, but it was not easy to know. About what they did, Mo Nu has told him in fifteen and ten.

They had a hard time, but they still insisted, waiting for him to come back.

Hearing Chen Mo's consolation, Xiaoyu couldn't hold back anymore, broke down and cried, releasing all the fatigue and shoulder burdens he had suffered for eight years.

Chen Mo held her and let her be released, stroking her back gently. If you are in your heart, something will happen sooner or later. About ten minutes later, Xiao Yu's tears were closed, and she calmed down in Chen Mo's arms.

When Chen Mo thought Xiaoyu was asleep, she found that the tender body in her arms had become hot, her ears were red, and her breathing was short.

Be emotional.

"Husband, love me."

The sound of a small fish like a mosquito fly in his arms made Chen Mo can't help laughing, and he cried recklessly the minute before.

"Shower first?"

Xiaoyu nodded gently, and suddenly felt light, and the whole person was already in his arms and headed for the bathroom.

For a time, the spring was infinitely good, Yingge Yanwu.

This is the most arrogant and craziest time since Xiao Yu followed Chen Mo. The bathroom to the room, unlimited collection, will release all the eight years of bitterness and waiting. Until the total loss of strength, Xiao Yu lay sweaty in Chen Mo's arms.

"Outside, are there any female aliens?" Xiaoyu lay in Chen Mo's arms, greedy with the familiar atmosphere in front of him, and allowed Chen Mo to caress the clean back.

"Yes, many."

Chen Mo laughed when he felt the weak flesh chasing the soul from the soft meat around his waist, and the sour taste.

"I lied to you, none at all. I have been thinking of a way to come back, without thinking of anything else."

"Is it hard these years?"

"It's not hard work. You work harder than me, but you're afraid. You're not waiting for me to come back, so you've been desperately coming back in time."

"We are afraid."

Xiaoyu snorted softly, and the two began to whisper a private room. About ten minutes later, they were quiet.

"Go to Sister Zhao Min."

"Uh?"

Chen Mo froze suddenly, a little surprised that the words came out of Xiaoyu mouth.

"Don't get cheap but sell well."

Xiaoyu stung on him and continued to lie quietly.

"I have clearly thought about it. The universe is so big that we are as small as dust. In recent years, Sister Zhao Min has been under pressure from all aspects, much larger than me. When you left, I was desperate. Now, I ca n’t carry on. This is what she deserves. If you can come back, nothing else matters. "

Chen Mo sighed in her heart and gently stroked Xiaoyu's back.

"Coax me to sleep, then hurry." Xiao Yu's voice was sour.

"Then come again."

Chen Mo whispered in Xiaoyu's ears, and the room became shy again. An hour later, until Xiaoyu was tired and fell asleep, Chen Mo didn't come out and walked towards Zhao Min's room.

chapters.title: Chapter 864: : We Have A Small Universe
chapters.body:
Chapter 864: : We Have A Small Universe

Chen Mo returns.

This news was released by the marching ant group, as if it had wings, spreading across the earth at an extremely fast speed.

Those who thought that the marching ant group lacked the backbone and would soon disintegrate were completely disappointed at this moment. Heads of states from all over the world sent congratulatory messages to the marching ant group.

Chen Mo was arrested by the aliens for eight years, and returned unharmed.

What has Chen Mo experienced in the alien world these years? What kind of world is the universe?

The topic became a curious question for countless people. It quickly entered the hot search list of the well-known social platforms on the planet. The Marching Ant Group did not give any response. Chen Mo himself did not appear in public. Short video speech.

When Chen Mo was on the earth, he was a legend. He has become a textbook legend of civilization. On human networks and books, the topic of Chen Mo has never stopped.

In the era of the star sea, the marching ant group monopolized the space jumping technology and became an unswerving interstellar group.

The human strength of the earth is not worth mentioning in front of the marching ant group.

Chen Mo is the founder of the marching ant group. Deserving of his control, his return means that the marching ant group once again has the backbone and forms a strong cohesion for the entire marching ant group.

The marching ant group was excited and heard the news, and their spirits were completely renewed.

...

"This is Jinge."

Chen Mo introduced to the three women that Jing Ge and her little beast suddenly found the headquarters of the Marching Ant Group, which surprised him a little.

All three women have seen aliens and are not surprised to see Jing Ge's appearance.

"Hello, I'm He Xiaoyu, Mo's wife. Like me, they are my sister Zhao Min and Mo Nu."

"Hello, this is Zhao Min."

"I'm Mo Nu and Mo Ge's assistant."

The three women have seen many aliens, the etiquette is in place, and the concise self-introduction makes people feel a lot closer and can not give up a sense of exclusion.

"Um." Jing Ge nodded to them coldly as before, but his eyes paused on Mo Nu, with confusion and doubt.

Chen Mo seems to be aware of Jing Ge's doubts: "Mu Nu is an intelligent life evolved from super artificial intelligence. Its consciousness is made by me and has a complete sense of life, but the body is still a machine."

"Momo wipe ~~"

When the beast on Jing Ge's shoulder saw that everyone ignored it, he immediately shouted and jumped to Chen Mo. The little claws moved, as if he was introducing himself to the three daughters of Xiaoyu.

"It's a small beast I picked up on Qing Mercury. It's a foodie." Chen Mo said.

"Mo Mo wi ~~" The beast called a few times, protesting Chen Mo said that he had picked it up, looking at the three women, his eyes were straight, and he stretched out his small paws to hug.

"What a cute little beast." Xiaoyu blinked in front of his eyes. "Does it let me hold it?"

Xiaoyu hesitated, stretched out his hand, and saw that the little beast did not hide, so he held it in his arms.

This little guy has never been afraid of life, and still picks people. At present, the life it is willing to approach, slaps it over, and occasionally it will find Lan to play, others will not approach it at all.

Now it is willing to let Xiao Yu hug, Chen Mo is also happy, and one more in the future.

"Contact the patriarch." Jing Ge said.

"it is good."

Chen Mo immediately turned on the quantum communicator and asked Mo Nu to connect to the quantum communicator of the small universe. The data of the communicator is connected. As soon as Chen Mo returned, she asked Mo Nu to take over all the previous artificial intelligence.

After a while, the quantum communicator was switched on.

Tuo Li and Tuo Shan appear in the holographic video, as well as people who manage the Shan people, such as 泷 玥, 尨, 尨, and Tenna.

Everyone was overjoyed when they saw Chen Mo and Jing Ge.

"Jing Ge, sir." Tuo Li had the joy on his face: "Are you back home? Sir."

"It took some time, now I'm back, and I will introduce some of my family to you." Chen Mo pulled Xiaoyu's three daughters to the camera: "Xiaoyu, Zhao Min and Mo Nu."

"Good for the three ladies." Takuya's eyes brightened and he said hello.

He was smart enough to guess the identities of the three daughters. The husband said he had a wife, and all three should be his wife.

From the perspective of Tuo Li, this is not unusual.

In the past, if you were strong enough, you could marry a few wives. In Takuri's opinion, a man as powerful as a husband, all this is taken for granted.

"Hello there."

Xiaoyu's three women smiled and looked at Tuo Li more. This little guy looks smart and knew it before he was introduced.

On the other side, 泷 玥, 苪 姒, and Tenna were all gloomy. Looking at Chen Mo's eyes, with some regret, they could only hide the sour heart in their hearts, pretending to be nothing.

"Mrs. Hello." Several people in Tuoshan also said hello.

"Now that I have arrived home, I will start to build the space connector and open the channel tomorrow. By then, you will be able to come out. It will take about three months."

"Is there anything at home?" Jing Ge interjected and asked.

Tuoshan thought for a moment and shook his head: "There is not much, but the management is not enough. Now Starcraft is developing, and the population in the clan is still too small. They are all developed and managed by robots."

"The population can't make up for it in a short time. First, let the robot manage it, and it will soon open up the space channel. Many people will manage it later." Chen Mo told him.

...

Area of Building One.

The freezer compartment was slowly unloaded and, under the capture of a robotic arm, was slowly sent into the life freezer. Lying in the freezer was a silver female life, with a sharp face and a similar appearance to Lan.

She was Lan's daughter and encountered an unexpected living dead.

Now transferred here for better protection just in case. It was Chen Mo's promise to Lan until she researched her technology and resurrected her.

Seeing her daughter's freezer compartment being sent into the freezer, Lan put down her heart and reluctantly left.

"Good for the three ladies."

Seeing Chen Mo, Xiao Yu and others, Lan performed a military salute, and looking at Chen Mo's eyes were somewhat meaningful. No wonder the boss is in a hurry to come back.

"Mr. Lan is good." The three daughters of Xiao Yu gave a gift to Lan.

Chen Mo returned to the business and said solemnly: "Lan, I am going to let you take over the defense of the group. Our marching ant group will focus on the Milky Way and build a large group to resist the crisis that may come."

His grievances with the Lagerstroemia civilization and the Dark Forest civilization have long been irrevocable. Chen Mo's identity is not exposed now, but it does not mean that he will not be exposed in the future.

If he was later discovered by two divine civilizations and they were not prepared, the consequences would be disastrous.

Lan's spirit shook, and her narrow eyes burst out into a terrifying light. Usually a bit unscrupulous, when it comes to professional fields, Lan has always been meticulous.

"What weapon technologies do we have now? Including strategic weapons."

"Speaking, don't conceal." Chen Mo said to Mo Nu.

"Strategic weapon technology, currently the most powerful is a space weapon: Ghostness."

Mo Nu released a specially designed weapon, which looked very sci-fi, but the cold gloom contained death.

"It is a weapon that I designed to create a" space earthquake ". When it is activated, it can cause intense space shocks, tearing the matter where the space shock waves pass into dust particles, including the planet. We do it in a lifeless star Weapon test. Its power depends on the amount of energy when it is started, and the maximum range of damage it can predict is two light years, which belongs to a star-level space weapon. "

Mo Nu releases the video. The entire galaxy is torn apart by space shocks, and finally becomes dust in the universe.

"This is the most basic space weapon."

Lan nodded with satisfaction. Even the most basic space weapons are still very powerful. Mastering space weapons has surpassed many top civilizations. They can face the top civilizations without fear.

"Are there any other special weapons?"

"Others are conventional weapons after all, and there is a superpower awakening and development technology mature." Mo Nu said.

"What technique?" Lan's body shook, her voice changed.

"Super-power awakening and development technology. This is the super-power development technology I researched based on the theory of super-power development technology left by Mo Ge."

A test video of a person with sand control ability appeared on the screen in front of everyone.

Volunteers are developing in isolation on Mars, and currently only three women know the development of the technology. Because of the cosmic news from Shi Ganxing, they have paid attention to knowing the influence of superpower and horror, and dare not be known by others.

Lan watched the video, her heart was shocked,

The development of superpower technology is the origin of the Shigan Star Wars. The seven god-level civilizations all want superpower awakening and development technology to ensure that their civilization's strength is above the others.

Until now, Shi Ganxing has been in a complete blockade. The life of the entire galaxy cannot jump in space, but can only be isolated in a separate galaxy.

He did not expect that this remote, unknown planet, had already mastered superpower development technology. If it spreads out, it will surely shock the whole universe, and here may be the second Shi Ganxing.

No wonder the boss is not interested in super-capacity development technology and does not hesitate to reject the idea of Tong Qing joining hands to acquire technology. They have mastered super-capacity development technology and have matured.

This means that they have the ability to make the entire civilization's life into a capable person.

Although in the era of the Warframe system, the role of superpowers and the improvement of strength are not great, but this is a symbol. And the development of superpowers is accompanied by the development of the brain, the developers will become smarter, which is a way of life evolution.

As a whole group, the wisdom has been elevated to the level of purple life. It can be imagined how terrible, and another protoss was born.

After calming down, Lan began to think about how to deal with superpower development technology. Without the ability to protect this technology, he will not expose it, otherwise they will have endless trouble.

"Are there other technologies?"

"Dark Matter Factory, Antimatter Factory, Space Port, Space Curvature Spacecraft, you should all know that other weapon technologies are currently being researched and have not yet been completed." Mo Nu said.

"We still have a hole card." Chen Mo interjected suddenly: "We have a small universe."

Ga!

Lan opened his mouth, like a chicken.

chapters.title: Chapter 865: : Deduction Of War
chapters.body:
Chapter 865: : Deduction Of War

Marching Ant Headquarters meeting room.

At this time, the meeting room was whispering, and everyone who was present was wearing a happy face.

This is the most solemn meeting of the Marching Ants Group in eight years. It was Chen Mo who just returned from the meeting.

Wang Hai, Black Eagle, Zhong Lei, Zhu He, Li Lingfeng, Julie, Li Danni, Wang Scarlett, Wei Zhe, Lin Shu and many other key cadres of the marching ant group sat in the seat.

They were the most important veterans of the marching ant group from its creation to the present. When Chen Mo was away, they were also silently managing the marching ant group.

The moment Chen Mo entered the meeting room, the entire meeting room stood up to greet. Everyone on the field was surprised to see the life coming in beside Chen Mo. To humans, they were all aliens.

They are high-level members of the marching ant group. Naturally, they know some news about the Universe and know that there are countless advanced civilizations in the universe. They also use virtual reality technology, and even some of them have encountered aliens in person.

But so many appear at the same time, this is the first time.

"Let's sit down."

Chen Mo sat down to the main seat, and the others took their places.

Zhao Min and Lan sat down on both sides of Chen Mo's left and right, and the meeting room quieted down.

Wat Mu, Red Crab, Poison Girl, Da Mazu, and Gray 21 are looking at Wang Hai and others, and Wang Hai and others are also looking at them. To each other, everything is strange.

"To convene this meeting today is to make arrangements for future development."

Chen Mo's voice was calm, more calm and confident than before.

The eight years of the universe ‘Wandering’ have given him too much experience. In the universe, there are so many advanced civilizations. Their solar system is just a poor village in the old forest of mountains.

The grievances of the two god-level civilizations hang on his head like a sword of Damocles. Only by establishing a force that can sufficiently compete with the top civilization in the universe, can we have a chance to survive in this universe. And accidentally, the entire human race will be destroyed.

"This is Lan." Chen Mo introduced the identity of Lan to everyone. "Next, I am going to hand over the armed part of the marching ant group to Lan, with Wang Hai as the deputy to assist Lan and reorganize the group's war department."

Chen Mo looked at Wang Hai and others.

In recent years, the armed group of the marching ant group of the earth has been maintained by Wang Hai. Wang Hai and others have reached the end of their military literacy and vision. However, the god-level civilization that may be faced next, Wang Hai ’s experience is not enough.

Everyone looked at Xiang Lan. Being in charge of the armed part of the marching ant group meant that he was already Chen Mo's right arm.

"Understand." Wang Hai nodded without hesitation. He knew where his weight was. Chen Mo's arrangement must have his reason: "Trouble Mr. Lan in the future."

"Next, let's introduce myself briefly."

Lan got up, and nodded gently to everyone.

"My name is Yang Skar Lan, you can call me Lan, I am honored to join this big family and work for the boss." Lan's voice is very gentle, giving a lot of intimacy, even Chen Mo was a bit surprised, before Lan But very proud.

Xiao Yu, who was sitting quietly beside Chen Mo, suddenly said, "Would you like a war deduction? It will help Mr. Lan understand Wang Hai's fighting style."

Everyone looked at Xiaoyu, and even Chen Mo was a little surprised. Xiaoyu's proposal is very good.

"I agree with his wife's proposal." Lan Chao Xiaoyu nodded with a smile.

"Yes." Wang Hai and others nodded.

Seeing everyone agree, Xiao Yu smiled softly, calmed down again, and gave Chen Mo the topic.

Xiaoyu knows that Lan joined the marching ant group halfway and suddenly became the commander in charge of the marching ant group. Even if Wang Hai and others didn't mind, others under his belt would definitely say something, and Lan was still an alien. The people under him are more or less mustard.

If this war is deduced, let them see Lan's strength, this will undoubtedly give Lan's prestige. In the future, the knife and layout will be much smoother.

Chen Mo didn't like to mention it, she suggested it best.

"Okay, just entertain."

Chen Mo made a final decision.

The war deduction attracted a lot of attention in the marching ant group combat department.

The news of Lan's entry into the main war department also spread. The aliens' entry into the main war department was a bit difficult for humans who have not yet fully integrated into the universe alliance system.

Wang Hai has been in charge of the War Department for so long. Over the years, the War Department has become larger and larger, and its achievements are obvious to all. The original people in the War Department more or less hoped that Wang Hai would win, but they never questioned Chen Mo's decision.

This war deduction, although nominally entertaining, is actually related to the prestige of the combat department after Lan.

Chen Mo set the rules and deduced into five war modes: star wars, galaxy wars, constellation wars, super galaxy wars and space wars, with five sets and three wins.

According to the existing cosmic alliance system, Mo Nu will give the two sides a sand table model. The other three models will simulate the existing cosmic civilization models and disputes, and provide information to both parties. Finally, Mo Nu will evaluate the winner of the war.

The next day.

The virtual sand table deduced from the five wars is ready.

The sand table is transformed in the quantum virtual reality world and the original virtual reality war deduction sand table of the Ministry of War, and it becomes a brand new war deduction game.

This virtual reality sandbox allows onlookers to visualize the real state of the war and see the combat strategies of both sides.

The virtual reality war sandbox is now a course for training professional military personnel. War deduction is the most important lesson. Here you can see the overall view of the commander, the overall planning ability, and the sense of war.

This is Chen Mo's return, the first large-scale event.

Chen Mo ordered that all high-level members of the Marching Ant Group join the watching process while allowing official personnel to watch the deduction of the war sandbox.

An unprecedented war.

Chen Mo put on a virtual reality device, sat in a virtual reality chair, closed her eyes, and felt only a flash of her brain. After a little weightlessness, she returned to the original state and looked up into a virtual reality world.

This is a technique developed by Wushuang and Mo Nu, and it has been applied to war deduction and armor training.

Entering the virtual reality world, a sandbox appeared in front of his eyes.

This is the first time he has seen such a huge war sandbox.

Star Wars is okay, with planetary terrain and cities. The most terrifying sandbox of super galaxy wars and space wars is a cosmic star map. The space sandboxes do not have the terrain in the traditional sense.

The systems of super galaxy wars and space wars are too large, and the planet is just dust on the battlefield. The spatial distribution of various black holes, pulsars, various super galaxy clusters, and turbulent cosmic space constitute the 'alpine' and 'river' of the cosmic sand table.

It's a huge game.

Chen Mo stood on a theme, and in front of him was an endless universe of starry sky. The stars are running at different speeds. It seems that they have traced in his eyes, and soon the 'topography' of the star map changes. Chen Mo breathed a sigh of relief, his eyes surrendered to the depths of the universe star map, and the black pupils became brighter and full of pride.

A kind of pride for chasing the stars and stars makes people feel very excited. No wonder the ancient people like to write poems or give right.

Tian Zuo Che Xing Zuo Zi said this kind of scene.

Chen Mo's emotions, other people have gradually entered the virtual reality world, the deduction is about to begin.

chapters.title: Chapter 866: : Playing Star Wars
chapters.body:
Chapter 866: : Playing Star Wars

Lan touched her sharp chin, and carefully examined the deduction model information provided by Mo Nu.

This design really made him shine.

Simulating and deducing wars in the form of games can greatly increase the excitement of participants. This virtual reality war sand table game integrates strategy, deduction, battle, operation and development into one, and there are multiple deduction methods.

There can be models that evolve from zero, there are ready-made cosmic alliance system deductions, and custom local battle designs. I have to say that Lan has a bright spot on this kind of war.

Well used, this war sandbox is a great way to announce military talent.

He has never been afraid of war deductions, and even if the opposite is the puppet of the black pupil civilization, or the thunder of the thunder civilization is opposite, he is not afraid of the other party.

As for Wang Hai and others, in his opinion, they are still a few good babies, especially in terms of cosmic strategy.

It's not that he underestimates the enemy, it's his confidence.

"Instructor Lan, ten minutes to go, please be prepared." The voice of Mo Nu came from her ear. Lan nodded slightly, withdrew her gaze from the data, and looked at the battlefield in the sand of the war.

It's been a long time since the sand table was deduced so seriously, I hope the lads won't let him down.

Lan's eyes were full of memories.

...

"Haige, is there any confidence to win?" Zhu He asked curiously.

All the staff of the entire War Department concentrated on their side was to be able to compare with Lan. Everyone has a good heart, let alone their armed men.

"Just go all out, don't you think the boss recommended Mr. Lan as a bishop, just by random mess?"

Wang Hai was calm.

As a former bishop of the Armed Forces, he knew some news about the Universe.

The stellar system that the boss developed in the Shigan Galaxy was traded at sky-high price with the black pupil civilization when he left. This has been reported in the news of the Universe. For the layout of the stellar system, he guessed that it was likely that Instructor Lan had written it.

He knew what he was doing, so that he could fight with ordinary civilization, because technology was crushed.

Once the other party is a top civilization and a large-scale constellation war is launched, they will be troublesome because the form of space war they have been exposed to is temporarily limited. Constellation warfare, even super galaxy warfare, or cosmic warfare are still blank for them.

The market is too large, and they do not yet have enough experience and means to lead such a huge war.

So Chen Mo said that when Lan was appointed bishop, he was relieved.

"Instructor Wang Hai, ten minutes to go. Please be prepared."

"To get started, we are commonly used in these sandboxes. Everyone has done a lot of wars, and we will follow the previous war deduction method." Wang Hai said to the staff team in front.

...

All the executives of the Marching Ant Group entered the virtual reality world.

This war deduction is the first appearance of Lan joined the marching ant group, and it is also a demonstration of the ability as the most important person of the marching ant group.

In the future, the marching ant group must grow. As the leader of the marching ant warfare department, it must use its strength to convince the public. To some extent, war deduction is a reflection of the strength of war operations and strategic layout.

As long as Lan demonstrates his strength and wins beauty in the deduction of this war, and proves that he is not stigmatized, the questioning of the bottom of the marching ant group will be much smaller.

It is precisely this point that after Xiao Yu proposed the war deduction, Lan did not hesitate to agree.

This is the easiest way for him to be accepted by the team.
