"Both sides have come in." Lin Shu blinked and looked at the sand table in front of him quietly. As third-party audiences, they are just outsiders from the perspective of God, and they can see the progress of the war very intuitively.

Li Lingfeng and others beside him did not speak, their eyes were on the sand table.

This war deduction caused a sensation at the high-level of the marching ant group, and now all the core high-level marching ant groups are present. Five wars were deduced. The Mexican Girl will use super quantum computers and unique war algorithms to simulate the power of weapons and restore the deduced war scene.

They even went to the scene of the war and chose to switch any angle.

Many of the onlookers on the field are technical personnel and senior management. They usually do not directly participate in the scene of the war. Today, such a formal war deduction, they rarely watch it on the spot.

In addition to the high-level marching ant group, this deduction also attracted the attention of official high-level officials, sending a team to watch the reference.

After the marching ant group grew, it was trained by Wushuang University's professional military command system. It can be said that the War Department concentrated the first-class think tank and combat command team on the planet.

This war deduction can intuitively study the views of both sides on the interstellar war play. Compared with interstellar wars, wars between nations on earth used to be like children.

It is rare to be able to watch the top think tank layout and war operations live.

Julie looks down at the sand table in front of her. The two sides have not yet officially opened, and the sand table remains the same. After Lan and Wang Hai's team entered the field, everyone was shocked.

The onlookers could not see the two parties involved, but the sandbox of the war suddenly became bright, indicating that both parties were in a state of preparation.

The show is about to begin!

...

"Chengzhi, who are you optimistic about?" An old man next to asked Li Chengzhi.

Many generals are beside the old man, like the stars and moons. The old man's expression was calm and calm, and his weather-beaten face was calm and calm, like a landslide. The vicissitudes of wise eyes, as the starry sky is deep, seem to be able to perceive everything, with the majesty of the superior.

"It's hard to say." Li Chengzhi shook his head after thinking for a while: "The performance of the Marching Ant Group's combat department over the years is obvious to all. Although there are technical and weapon advantages, the methods and style are also unique. At the core, that alien should not be an ordinary generation. "

A general next interjected: "The combat department of the marching ants is indeed very strong. They have contacted the civilization of the universe and referenced the case of the war of the universe civilization. In this regard, at least on Earth, other teams can't match.

Surrounded by top-notch think tanks, they have very in-depth research on war insights. If the world's top strategic team is drawn out for comparison, their top three positions will definitely have their place.

"The first game deduced by the two sides was Star Wars. Based on the Second World War, the super quantum computer accelerated the time course of the deduction. One minute is ten days. Wang Hai is an alliance, Lan is the axis. Technology, weapons As for the military, it also restored the original model of the time. "A think tank said the information received.

The model of the war came out, and the whole team was upset.

This historical event can be said to be a turning point for human beings, and it is also a conclusion. They are very curious, if Lan were to deduce the layout, what would be the end.

The onlookers of the onlookers all began to look forward to it.

At this point, the war deduction officially began.

In the war deduction of the sand table, every decision-making and construction is crucial.

The computing power of super quantum computers can well simulate the course of war, and can even calculate the impact of a small factor on the global situation, including money, population, technology, weapons, spies, weather, logistics, food, medical care, and so on.

The new development strategies and layout operations of both sides, as well as the commander's style of play, have an impact on the process of war simulation that cannot be ignored.

"Come here." Li Chengzhi exclaimed softly.

"Chengzhi, what's wrong?" The old man looked at Li Chengzhi.

Li Chengzhi stared at the sand table with a surprised look: "Familiar 'blitz', Lan has started working on that stupid donkey, and the history is surprisingly similar."

"It's not similar. The input of troops is different. Lan's input is greater than that of history. According to this speed of advancement, the stupid donkey will fall within five minutes. By two months, when the German side swallowed that stupid donkey, about eight months, Lan's advance was faster. His style was more fierce and decisive than that of that year. "

A staff officer beside him showed a solemn look, staring at the change in the color of the territory on the sand table and the advance of the army.

Suddenly, another exclaimed voice appeared: "The Pacific side has also moved."

chapters.title: Chapter 867: : War Is A Strategy Game
chapters.body:
Chapter 867: : War Is A Strategy Game

Lan's layout moves faster than imagined, surprises all the spectators. Many think tanks on the field have very in-depth research on World War II, and have done countless deductions at the same time.

This high-intensity blitz and desperate advance speed make people feel cold.

This kind of blitz, and reckless advance, without knowing the enemy's layout, will be dangerous if it is cut off and surrounded.

Compared to Lan, Wang Hai's layout is more stable. Su was developing, and the 'Eastern Front' was also established at the first time, constantly strengthening the defense, and laying out layers in the territory at the same time.

This is not a war to restore history. World War II is only the basic background structure of the war model. In the case where the two sides change their command, what will happen at the same beginning is the most important.

The differences in the use of different arms, money, population, weather, weapons and technology must be carefully considered in any aspect. Coordinators need to have a very deep understanding of their strength.

In order to take advantage of these factors, use strategies and tactics to operate their own situation, use their own conditions to carry out tactical layout, and make their own strength more powerful.

War is a game of operation and coordination.

The same arms, weapons, money, technology, population, and terrain can be prepared through different layouts to form completely different battle outcomes.

The layout speed that Lan showed at the beginning made the spectators astounded.

...

This is the first time that Lan has deduced this kind of star war. For him, this level of model is almost a primitive war model. After the establishment of the Universe, the war between civilizations is mostly a war between planets.

Even if the ordinary War Armor Division is wearing War Armor and has enough anti-material bombs, this primitive war can end in a few days.

But this kind of war is quite interesting.

He doesn't care about the historical positioning of both parties.

There is no right or wrong in the war, and the winner is the side of 'justice'.

This kind of 'primitive' war pays great attention to the use of strategy and tactics. For him, the war has become more delicate. Every detail must be noticed. It is too different from space warfare, but careful consideration is the same goal.

The art of war consists in controlling the overall situation.

Any layout and strategy may affect the overall development. War is a large-scale strategy game. The most tested strategy game is the strategy of the coordinator and the operation of the war. It is necessary to consume the power of the enemy according to the existing advantages of the side.

Lan constantly calculated the strength of various fields in his heart, including military strength, medical treatment, money, technology, weapons and equipment, population, logistics, spy, etc., and used these developments of strength to coordinate the layout of the war, and to deduce the process of war.

This layout is similar to Go strategy, but higher than Go. Go is within a limited 'head' and the rules are determined. The optimal solution can be calculated by computer at any step, but the war is different.

War is the contradiction field of human nature. The uncertainty of human nature is the biggest variable of war.

Therefore, Go can be calculated, and war cannot be calculated. It can only be simulated.

Lan needs to take into account various uncertain factors in the derivation process.

Since the start of the "Europe Blitz", all kinds of information obtained have been continuously scrolling in front of the screen, even if a soldier's accidental death appears in his message.

Horrible amount of information received.

Lan's brain is like a terrible computer chip, and various strategies are constantly flashing in his brain.

This is an unfair comparison. Lan has only one person, and Wang Hai is the think tank of the entire combat department, including combat personnel. There are thousands of people responsible for coordinating all kinds of information, and in the forces of both sides, all living forces Are not equal.

However, Lan never complained about what was unfair.

There is no fairness to war in reality. If he couldn't see through, he wouldn't have to sit here.

He can only use his strategy to make this match beautiful.

Except for victory, everything else is false.

Narrow eyes, sharp cheeks, and Lan in the state, like an arrogant wolf king, have become unprecedentedly dangerous. His eyes narrowed into a gap, and all information and intelligence, as well as the world situation deduced by the computer, flashed in his mind.

Each arsenal and military base is constantly taking shape.

Suddenly, his eyes were fixed in southeast Asia, and a line formed in his mind.

Here.

...

Chen Mo was somewhat surprised when he saw that Lan chose to go to the island country and go south.

Lan abandoned the seemingly weak Central Plains at that time and chose Southeast Asia and South Asia.

This choice decision was unexpected, and the picture was so familiar. This is the variable and familiar scene of the World War ten years ago. As a person familiar with history, he knew the world environment during World War II.

Any major decision will affect the changes in war.

Although Chen Mo has not systematically studied the deduction of war, he has also been exposed to it and has a very deep understanding of war.

And his brain calculations are terrifying, and he can calculate all kinds of possibilities at any time. The purpose of Lan's strategy also has a rough outline in his mind.

War is not uniform, and there can be no identical war in the world, just as there are no identical leaves. In the historical model of war, any decision-making is a butterfly effect, which will make subsequent development completely different.

Abandoning historical justice, this war can only be won or lost, and both sides can do whatever they can.

...

"Is there a sense of familiarity?" Li Chengzhi reminded.

All other think tanks on the field nodded, there were dignified expressions, tense, serious.

A decision by Lan made the next development completely different. Don't touch Northeast Asia, go south to Southeast Asia, completely different decisions. During the Anti-Japanese War, they dragged on the island nation's pace and became the key to victory.

This decision is completely different from history.

It can be said that the wings of the butterfly have been fanned in the war model.

Within the model of the war background,

"Similar to the war a decade ago, he chose to go south first. Southeast Asia and Oceania were his goals."

Under the background of the times, although the side controlled by Lan in the war model, although the country does not have an advantage in terms of number, science and technology and weapons are relatively advanced, and the pace is unified, and the goals are consistent. This is his greatest advantage.

Now that part of Asia has completely changed its offensive strategy, the scene has become confused.

"We were cowardly, with vast land and vast resources, and huge resources. They coveted for a long time. Why didn't he touch it?" A think tank was very puzzled.

From a development perspective, they are here to compete. Like a dying elephant, a bite of meat can be eaten.

"Civil war." The old man standing in the middle quietly opened his mouth and sighed: "He wants to continue the internal consumption here. In the civil war, they will not be attacked here.

Everyone settled on the sand table of war, all of a sudden silence, and their bodies became cold.

"Why not let North America join?"

It can be seen from the troop strength that North American strength is already very considerable. On the side of the alliance, there are North America, the Soviet Union, and Eastern Europe. In terms of strength, it can be said that the alliance has an advantage.

But the situation is very different.

"According to the historical background war setting, North America has not been attacked. They have not triggered the conditions for North America to fully participate in the Pacific battlefield. Before North America fully participated in the war, it only did defense and development. The force is currently not under the control and command of Wang Hai. Speak out possible guesses.

The others nodded, staring at the sand table motionlessly.

...

Wang Hai's team is extremely nervous now, and the opponent's movement is unexpected.

Lan chose to retreat from Northeast Asia, go straight to Southeast Asia, avoid the entanglement in the Asian battlefield, and consume internally. Now they cannot mobilize their forces to block, and do not trigger the necessary control conditions.

The same problem occurs in North America.

"This is a conditional war background to deduce war. We belong to passive defense. The trigger for North American participation in war should be attacked before the war is declared." A staff member said.

"Spy spies in disguise to actively destroy North American military bases."

The scale of the war in front of the war is very large, but there are many uncontrollable factors. There are many countries on their side. Theoretically, they have relatively large strengths, but there are many restrictions. The axis without the control of Lan has only a few national forces. Powerful, so different in combat effectiveness.

War is a game.

He must trigger the entry conditions for all his forces on his side. There are no restrictions on the attack, and the reasons can be unscrupulous.

Now is the war, and any decision is a variable.

The think tank team is using computers, including the data they have on hand, to make crazy predictions, hoping to analyze and calculate Lan's next step. It's just that the information held by both parties is definitely not symmetrical.

"Lan has moved again. Their goal this time is South Asia."

chapters.title: Chapter 868: : Europe Is Over
chapters.body:
Chapter 868: : Europe Is Over

The deduction speed of one minute and ten days makes the situation deduced by war very fast. After occupying Southeast Asia, Lan's footsteps did not stop, but he pointed to the South Asian subcontinent.

The speed of action is incredible.

The war situation deduced in Southeast Asia has not been fully stabilized, and it is waved to South Asia.

In addition, Lan's speed of reorganizing troops and preparing troops is extremely fast. Without thinking, it has been carefully calculated. After occupying important towns, start the next round of planning without giving it any respite.

The two teams, in Lan's hands, were as greedy and endless as the hungry wolf.

Computer calculations are fast, and the world map is turning blue at a speed that is visible to the naked eye. With brain control instructions, each instruction was continuously issued from Lan.

It has continued from the beginning to the present.

Horrible deduction speed.

As long as the strategy is published, Mo Nu's super quantum computer will be deduced according to the layout and strategy of both sides. The unique war algorithm created by Mo Nu will, on the data, try to simulate the occurrence of real war.

The think tank of the former combat department of the Marching Ant Group has never stopped its instructions. The progress of the war is too fast. The speed of deduction is one minute and ten days. They need to constantly determine the optimal strategy.

The conditions for North American participation in the war triggered that a large-scale North American army had joined the Pacific battlefield and was preparing to collide with the army controlled by Lan.

Next, the Western Pacific will be the main battlefield.

Wang Hai frowned.

He overestimated Lan's strength to the greatest extent, but still underestimated the opponent.

The speed of this terrible layout made him numb.

He didn't have any information about Lan, he didn't know about Lan, and Lan certainly didn't have their information. However, this layout of Lan is terrible. It almost aims at the bright side, and the strategic scope is too large. It goes west along the coast of Southeast Asia.

The other party seemed to know the weak positions in these areas in advance, and encountered little resistance.

The war in South Asia started.

South Asia, which had long been enslaved by the Commonwealth, was vulnerable to the division of tigers and wolves, and the Commonwealth was struggling to deal with the war in Europe at this time. In just ten minutes, the South Asian subcontinent turned blue on the sand of the war.

The converted real time is one hundred days, less than four months, and the entire South Asia fell.

They even have time to think about effective countermeasures.

Massacre, enslavement, reign, twenty minutes, South Asia, which had been colonized for a long time, fell under the control of Lan, and a large area began to change color and was spreading.

Very terrible means.

Lan grabbed the entire South Asia, but for South Asia, he just changed to a more brutal master.

At this moment, the spectators are all discolored, because in the region where South Asia is located, the number of soldiers and weapons controlled by Lan is rising wildly.

A deep chill swept across the sandbox of war.

"He wants to control the Middle East and surround Asia." Wang Hai was cold-hearted, lonely troops went deep, enslaved South Asia, and sought the Middle East. The other side almost had a fruitful strategic goal: "To mobilize the Soviet troops to stop him.

Once you let the other party control the Middle East, the consequences will be unimaginable.

...

The situation changed in an instant. Although there were small changes, in general, everyone can see that the area of blue is still expanding.

"Dangerous," Chen Mo said softly, her gaze still on the sand: "Asia is dangerous here."

"Why?" Xiaoyu asked curiously.

"You see the number of spies sent by Lan in Southeast Asia and the combat strength of the two sides. He did not control the area, all consumed internally in the civil war, making full use of the contradictions in his area, and the main coastal areas were controlled.

He is very reasonable in the overall planning of the population, soldiers, weapons and equipment, logistics and construction. In terms of money expenditure and scheduling, he has made reasonable preparations and has the fastest construction speed. In addition, he controlled the main island chain in the Western Pacific, and cut off North America's weaponry assistance channel to Asia. "

Chen Mo pointed to the sandbox and explained to Xiaoyu.

"This is a sand game of war, similar to the" red alert ", but the settings, rules and variables are tens of thousands of times higher than the difficulty level of the red alert, requiring a lot of strategy and coordination. Wang Hai let thousands of commanders enter Field, responsible for local war decision-making, while the War Department staff coordinated overall and general decision-making. And Lan, there is only one person. "

Everyone thought that this war was deduced between Lan and Wang Hai, but anyone who was interested could find that it was Lan alone, facing the entire staff of the marching ant group.

Other spectators felt that things were not right.

Although they do not understand war, they have heard it more or less. The war pays attention to the time, the place, and the people, and the time is unpredictable. The overall position is leaning towards Lan, not to mention, the major powers in Asia are all in the civil war.

On the other hand, almost every two minutes on Lan's side, it will advance slowly.

Boil the frog in warm water.

There are weird calculations in the sharp edge, and there is a degree of advancing and retreating, which makes people completely unpredictable.

"Europe is over."

Chen Mo looked at the other end of the sandbox of war. After a major battle, the European territory turned blue and the speed was accelerated. Only a few small places were lingering, and Europe was over.

At this time, the distance deduction started, but it was more than an hour, according to conversion, less than two years. In a short period of time, various advanced weapons and equipment appeared one after another.

There are now only three main battlefields left, North America, Western Europe and Asia.

...

Europe is over.

The spectator saw the blueness of Europe's territory turn blue, with a lingering chill in his heart. If Lan's war fought in the war of history, I am afraid that the history of the earth will be rewritten.

"What do you say he's going to do next?" The old man surrounded by the crowd suddenly said.

"Organize the team." Zuo Qian, who had been standing quietly beside the old man, finally said, "He is brewing a big battle, and the next thing is the key. It has a good show."

The left Qianyi opened, and many spectators on the field all turned their eyes to the sand table.

They saw that on the sandboxes of various battlefields, teams were gathering and reorganizing, Southeast Asia, South Asia, Northeast Asia, Western Pacific Island Countries, Europe, and the Mediterranean.

No one calmed down. The reorganization and scheduling of such a large-scale team is simply terrible. What a terrible overall planning ability is needed to calmly arrange all this.

Lan once again showed the spectators what co-ordination is.

Large-scale to terrible strategic scheduling and reorganization, the transfer of defensive positions between different branches of the army, the new layout of defense, so that everyone is chilling.

However, as everyone marveled at Lan's terrifying scheduling ability, they discovered a more terrifying fact.

Post-supply, weapons, equipment, and technology did not take long. Lan seems to have thought of all this in advance, and laid out everything that needs to be prepared in advance.

In just five minutes, the dispatch of millions of people, the schedule that originally made people unclear, slowly took shape under the eyes of everyone. The speed of team reorganization was incredible, and when the team reorganization was completed, the spectators were surprised.

Everything is natural, it seems that all of this is just trivial to Lan.

The sharp blade comes out of the sheath, as long as the team completes the reorganization, it is a battle between the two sides.

Arashi's tactical layout is not dragged.

Steel torrents, paratroopers, infantry, cavalry, air force, navy and artillery, arms are interspersed, and each region's team configuration has its own differences.

As the team reorganized, an extremely cold atmosphere permeated the audience. The sandbox of this war seemed to let them see another ending of history.

Secretly fortunate that this was not the end of the year, while looking forward to the next development.

A whole new situation.

When Lan reorganized the team, the world map was a completely different situational branch, and it was brightly colored and very conspicuous.

The darker the place, the stronger the troops. The peripheral observers can visually confirm the layout of the two sides. Only the participants in the war between the two sides can only judge the other party ’s deployment based on the information and predict the next step of the other party. Strategy.

This is an information asymmetry in war.

Information asymmetry is also a means in games, so intelligence is especially important.

Although this is a 'primitive' war model, the requirements for tactics and decision-making are very delicate. Without space war, a dozen is as crude as a galaxy.

The use of various tactics has made Lanle one of them, taking this deduction as an entertainment, and maintaining sensitivity to the details of the war, which is quite interesting.

Those warframe division head-to-head games are weak.

Only this strategy of war operation is a real game, a strategy game.

"This game, it's time to end." Lan glanced at the sandbox and the layout of the marked opponent, grinned, laughed, and dropped the last instruction.

chapters.title: Chapter 869: : It'S Such A Mess That You Can'T Lose
chapters.body:
Chapter 869: : It'S Such A Mess That You Can'T Lose

The assembled team starts slowly, just like one by one, precision parts, opening a little bit, driving the operation of the entire mechanical system. Everything seems to be in order.

The situation in the sandbox was still under discussion. The atmosphere became full and the discussion was getting quieter.

Overlooking from the sand table, Lan's command team is like a foraging marching ant, stepping towards Western Europe step by step, while on the South Asian side, it is also marching towards the hinterland of Asia.

The long snake, the torrent of steel, and the rigorous ranks revealed the killing power.

"It's very interesting." Lin Shu stared at the action team on the sand table. The color of the sand table changed, and it was very ornamental.

"It's not just fun, it's that simple." Li Lingfeng had a lot of dignity and his eyes were intent. Around him are the senior management of the marching ant group. During the growth of marching ants these years, they have been more or less exposed to war.

The killing power contained in them can be felt by them.

Zhao Min's expression was much calmer. Looking at the sand table occasionally, she was not a person who was good at war deduction, but the sand table deduction of the marching ant group's combat department, she had seen many times, but such a large-scale and complicated deduction Seen for the first time.

"It's over," Chen Mo said, "Wang Hai lost."

The speed of Lan's layout of the team accelerated, and soon the differences came out. The team's marching speed became different. The vanguard team accelerated and moved towards the weak defensive line. Like a sharp blade, the defense line was torn open. .

Wang Hai's seemingly complete defense instantly became leaky.

The forces of life are gathering, and large-scale battles are brewing.

In the eyes of the staff watching the war, his face changed suddenly.

Even the management of the marching ant group, who did not know much about the war's deductions, was aware of the changing situation at this moment. The blue of Arashi's side is rapidly expanding.

...

"Fifty major battles started at the same time, there were countless skirmishes, so terrible overall planning ability."

Zuo Qian's eyes stared at the sand table, almost fanatical, with admiration and awe in his eyes. It's hard to imagine what a terrible monster can do that. If it is an enemy, it is undoubtedly a nightmare.

The line of defense was torn open, and under the cutting of Lan's team, the battlefield was divided and became fragmented.

"It's impossible. Can the computing power of humans reach such a terrible level?" A staff officer muttered: "Can Chen Mo let artificial intelligence help him deduct?"

"I know Chen Mo, he won't do it." Li Chengzhi immediately shook his head.

"These two special teams, where are they going?" An abrupt voice interrupted their discussion, and along the Arctic Ocean where he pointed, two teams broke through the Western European defense line and marched towards the Soviet hinterland.

Everyone looked up.

I saw two teams. After breaking through the defense line, they went straight into the hinterland, and the two teams speeded up suddenly, like a torrent of dysfunction, as if they were in a state of no one.

The cold atmosphere permeated, and the spectators calmed down. Zuo Qian and the old people around him stared at the two moving teams and their direction, a terrible sense of danger.

From the setting of the war sandbox, that team is undoubtedly an elite special team that marches fast. The lone army advances at a high speed, and it is undoubtedly the most conspicuous in the battle situation opened on the whole line.

The sharp blue blade approached at an alarming speed.

In front of the sharp blade, all watchers' expressions changed, and in front of their eyes was the place where the Soviet command post was located.

...

"How does he know where the opposing command is?" Even Zhao Min was frightened by the amazing scene in front of him.

"It may have been comprehensively judged through some of the information obtained." Chen Mo replied.

It was a little surprising to find the opposing headquarters in this situation.

However, based on the information obtained during the battle, Lan judged that it was also possible to guess the approximate location of the opposing command.

"The intelligence is so huge and flowing so fast. How did he do it alone?"

"Yes, the brain structure of each life is different. I can write down all the intelligence information flowing at that speed. The key is how to analyze the information. Lan's brain structure is different from other life and has his unique thinking skills. In the universe, humans are still very weak. "Chen Mo said flatly.

To humans, this almost supercomputer power is incredible, but to the advanced life of the universe, it's nothing to worry about. The speed of thinking is fast enough and the layout and strategy are complete enough to do this.

Although Chen Mo has not studied sand table deduction professionally, she has seen pigs run. This strategy game is like Go. As long as you have talent, brain and layout, learning will be fast.

...

The war situation opened, and global war was fierce.

On the sand table of war, the war situation changes all the time. And all this is in Lan's grasp. The logistics, support, and medical treatment of battle situations are weightless.

The huge battle and meticulous command are incredible, and it is impossible to imagine what level of Lan's overall planning ability. As the two teams approached the Soviet headquarters, the atmosphere of watching the war became tense.

Lan narrowed his eyes, his narrow eyes constantly glanced at the sand table, occasionally raised his eyes and glanced at the information, and then dropped a command.

The scale of the war was getting larger and larger. The two teams that penetrated into the hinterland successfully avoided investigation and made rapid progress toward the headquarters.

After a while, the two teams rushed into the headquarters of the Soviet Union like barbaric hungry wolves and rammed. This turned out to be a war that was originally in a weak position and collapsed in an instant.

This war sand is chaotic.

Red is disappearing at a speed that is visible to the naked eye, and various base facilities and living forces are waning.

"Headquarters was terminated."

"The battle in the Asian plains is over."

"It's advancing fast. It's on the Siberian plain."

"The Far East is defeated, it's over."

The collapse of the entire Soviet Union left spectators stunned. The ending of Asia and Europe is no longer suspicious. Most of Europe and Asia fell into the hands of Lan.

On the current world power distribution map, the only remaining areas in eastern Asia and North America are conspicuous red.

The power comparison between the two sides has become very different at this moment.

In the arsenal of the sandbox of the North American war, the research and development of nuclear weapons had not yet been completed. The defeat of the Soviet Union caused the war balance to lose its last weight and tilted completely towards Lan.

Fifteen minutes later, the war deduction officially ended.

call!

Many spectators exhaled, and unknowingly, their hearts were full of fear.

If Lan had dominated that war a century ago, they could not imagine what the world is like now.

Too scary coordinator.

They suddenly understood why Chen Mo wanted Lan to dominate the combat department of the marching ant group.

"Lost."

Wang Hai looked at the end of the war, exhaled, and had mixed feelings.

He expected them to lose, but he didn't expect it to be so miserable. During the deduction, he felt like a newborn baby, led by his nose from beginning to end, with almost no resistance.

There was no sound around him, everyone was downcast. This is their worst defeat. Being alone, they abused their entire combat system team from beginning to end.

"Winning and losing is a routine thing for soldiers. We still have four games and a chance to win." Feeling the atmosphere was not right, Wang Haiti raised his spirit, and said loudly, "I can't lose so much.

In just one sentence, the morale of the war department was shocked, and the eyes of the people around him became sharpened.

chapters.title: Chapter 870: : The Earth Is Just A Small Puddle
chapters.body:
Chapter 870: : The Earth Is Just A Small Puddle

In the second galaxy battle, the War Department persisted for an hour and still lost!

The third constellation war ended in 30 minutes. The command center of the military operation was destroyed by space weapons, creating the shortest war sand table deduction record.

In the fourth super galaxy battle, the War Department learned some interstellar warfare skills from the constellation battle, but was defeated by Lan. The deduction ended in fifty minutes.

In the Fifth Universe War, the personnel of the War Department were still unable to fight back.

The four deductions took three hours to end, and a group of people in the combat department stood in sullen expression, with loneliness in their eyes.

Five defeats and five defeats.

It was faster than the first World War II failure. In the next four Star Wars, they had no power to fight.

What a terrifying co-ordination capability?

Defeated convincingly, one defeat can comfort yourself, but there are no excuses for the five major defeats without a fight. The instructor chosen by the boss is not generally powerful.

In the interstellar war, various novel tactics made them overwhelmed. The opponent's powerful overall planning and layout ability, even if they did their best, faced with the overwhelming overwhelming situation, I don't know how to deal with it.

I began to feel resistance to this airborne instructor, and these five deductions broke up all their resistance and became completely convinced.

The commanders and staff on the field have undergone orthodox combat education on the earth, but they are still powerless in the face of the interstellar warfare they are not familiar with. They were originally full of confidence and are now completely defeated.

"It's a good thing to be uplifted," Wang Haida said. "In the future, we may have to face the interstellar war, led by more powerful instructors, which is good for the marching ant group and for us."

Zhong Lei, Zhu He and others agreed to nod.

Although they failed, it was a good thing for the Marching Ants. This means that having a more powerful instructor to lead the war department, future coordination and layout will have endless benefits for the marching ant group.

Everyone else understands that they lost their psychological shadow just because the five wars were too bad.

...

This war deduction did not bring much waves to Chen Mo. Lan's deeds were specially sought out. This deduction was a piece of cake for him, and the victory was expected. The sand table of this war paved the way for Lan to enter the main combat department.

And Lan was not too excited about the victory of this war.

To him, this is just a simple level game. Even if he wins, he doesn't have the excitement of victory. His opponent is divine civilization, and fighting against divine civilization is the ultimate pursuit.

However, the war sandbox of virtual reality has added a means for him to select military personnel in the future. Complex rule design, using super quantum computers for deduction, and rules of uncertainty in warfare also help the cultivation of military personnel.

The reason why the original war department staff was so vulnerable was the lack of talents who could truly coordinate the overall trend of the war.

There will be only, but not handsome.

As soon as the deduction was over, Lan followed Wang Hai and others, went to the War Department, and began to really take over the command of the War Department.

The process was very smooth. One was Chen Mo's appointment. The other was that the five wars completely convinced the people in the war department. Even if he did not participate in the deduction, he watched the whole process, and no one dared to question Lan's ability.

Lan's entry into the main combat department was perfectly resolved in the war sandbox deduction.

...

"The marching ant group is unstoppable." Zuo Qian sighed, admiring in his voice.

They have witnessed five wars in person. Interstellar wars and wars on the planet are two different things. Although the strategy is the same, the tactics are more variable. The use of space 'topography', black holes, stellar explosions, space fortresses, space weapons, etc. This is an area that the Earth has never thought of.

No jealousy, only admiration.

Zuo Qianzi thought that the overall planning ability was better than others, but after seeing Lan's strength, he had to admire him.

That alien life does have great power.

The strength of the original marching ant group was very strong, with the support of Zhao Min and Mo Nu economically, and the development has been unprecedented. But in terms of armed, the original combat department of the Marching Ant Group had limited capabilities and felt like a small horse-drawn cart.

It is not that Wang Hai has insufficient capabilities, but the development level and weaponry of the marching ant group far exceed the imagination of the earth people. Even if the world's top strategists are concentrated, they are still small horses.

The appearance of Lan now supplements the last shortcomings of the marching ant group. It is hard to imagine how terrible the marching ant group will be in the future.

"Good things are good things for us and for human beings." The old man around Zuo Qian sighed, "For Chen Mo, the earth is really just a small puddle."

Everyone else nodded in agreement.

...

"Husband, what are you going to do next?"

When Chen Mo emerged from the virtual reality world, he saw Xiao Yu's eyes look somber, with Zhao Min and Mo Nu two women beside him. Chen Mo stretched a lazy waist and stroked Xiaoyu's hair.

"I just came back and took a break for a while to accompany you and make up for what I owe you over the years."

"Yay!"

Xiao Yu made a triumphant smile, and Zhao Min and Mo Nu beside him also showed happy smiles.

"Where do you want to go?"

"Shopping." The three women said in unison, and finally laughed cheerfully, and hurried back to change clothes.

Seeing the three women's elated looks, Chen Mo smiled warmly. This feeling is hard to come by. This is the feeling of home. He wandered in the universe for eight years for all of this.

After ten minutes, the three women changed their clothes and came out. The three wore sisters casual clothes, denim plus T-shirts, and the same clothes, wearing three different qualities on the three.

Xiaoyu is a kind of blue heart, with a gentle and elegant temperament. Zhao Min looks noble and cold, and Mo Girl is like the quiet girl next door.

"Husband, who are we the most beautiful?" Xiao Yu walked to Chen Mo and asked with a smile.

"Each has its own advantages." Chen Mo's dangerous smell from Xiao Yu's smile immediately became cautious and sweated.

"I knew you would say that, perfunctoryly." Xiao Yu said angrily.

"I'm serious." Chen Mo said solemnly.

"Let you go, let's go. The three are not enough. You only need to bring Mo Nu. I and Zhao Min." Xiao Yu kissed Chen Mo's face and walked in front with Zhao Min, leaving Mo Nu Chen Mo.

...

"Husband, I want this lipstick."

"Chen Mo, this shade is suitable for me. I want this."

"Mer, this."

In the Binhai Central Square, the three women were so excited that they saw Chen Mo in the store. They were several in a row, no matter they were expensive or cheap. When they liked it, they bought it. It was rude. Then Chen Mo paid the bill and left a group. Stunned man.

Seeing their happy smiles, Chen Mo felt a little sorry.

chapters.title: Chapter 871: : Four Items
chapters.body:
Chapter 871: : Four Items

Chen Mo was awakened by the sunlight sneaking in through the curtains in the morning, a little warm.

Taking a half-month vacation was another quiet morning.

After eight years in the universe, this warm morning is very rare.

On the previous planets, some days and nights were indistinguishable, and some days and nights were different from Earth. This kind of regular peace of mind is very rare.

The door opened, Xiaoyu walked in step by step, looked at Chen Mo, and smiled softly, "Husband, have breakfast."

Xiao Yu's green hair shawl, not long before getting up, no makeup, wearing a casual plain dress, a happy smile on his face, this moment is very charming. The strings in Chen Mo's heart seemed to be fiddled, and she was gently pulled into her arms, soft and comfortable.

"What's wrong?" Xiaoyu asked softly.

"Nothing, I just want to hug you."

"Ok."

Xiao Yu let Chen Mo hold it, and put his face on Chen Mo's body, very comfortable.

It took a long time for Chen Mo to let go and stroked Fu Xiaoyu's hair on his shoulders: "I'll wash first, wait for me."

Chen Mo sat at the table and ate breakfast seriously. He hasn't eaten Xiaoyu's breakfast for eight years, and now every meal is very delicious. The little mother beast was sitting on the table, waiting for the Mo Nu to peel eggs from it. The little claws were anxious, and she just grabbed a piece of bread and scooped up first.

Zhao Min and Wushuang were chatting with Chen's father and mother, chatting and laughing, the atmosphere was warm.

"Unknown, what do you want to be when you grow up?" Chen Mo asked.

"When I grow up, I want to be a soldier, a very powerful one." Xiao Wuming said while drinking the milk Zhao Min gave him.

"It's terrific. How terrible?"

"Just like a dad, my mother and auntie say you're very good, you can beat people and protect your mother and auntie."

Chen Mole was happy.

"It's very ambitious. Then you need to eat more. You need to be awesome."

"Dad, can you teach me to punch?" Xiao Wuming rubbed the milk in his mouth and asked hopefully.

"It's very hard to punch."

"I'm not afraid of hard work."

"Dad has a lot of things to do. If you can endure hardships, Dad can let Uncle Jing Ge teach you boxing, and Uncle Jing Ge is also very good." Chen Mowen said gently.

"Are there any dads?" Wuming asked seriously.

"Uncle Jing Ge beats his father better than his father." Chen Mo said.

"Okay, I learned from Uncle Jinge."

The atmosphere was very warm in the early morning. When he returned to Earth, Chen Mo gradually began to return to the life of the Earth, no longer as worried as when he was in an alien.

After breakfast, Xiaoyu helped Chen Mo organize his clothes and said with a smile, "Go to work with peace of mind."

"What gift do you want tonight? I'll buy it for you." Chen Mo asked.

"I like everything you give, leave some expectations and surprises, choose for yourself." Xiao Yu kissed Chen Mo's face and said, "I will give you the reward first."

A simple farewell, Chen Mo walked out of the house, and the Warframe appeared, covering him. Followed by him, Mo Nu and Zhao Min also covered their body armor, and the three flew towards the headquarters of the marching ant group.

Eight years after Chen Mo left, the earth has changed.

The previous environmental pollution has disappeared, garbage disposal is also very advanced, and the earth ’s ecology has been restored very well.

Binhai City has become the most typical representative of the world's metropolises. The construction ability of nano robots is used in the construction of Binhai City. Today's housing prices are no longer a problem for humans.

The development of artificial intelligence and various technologies, coupled with the marching ant group quietly connected to the Universe Alliance, some development models of the Universe Alliance have been used as reference by Huaxia officials, and cities have begun to develop into high-tech cities.

And Binhai is the first earth city to use the alien city model.

Smart cars, new energy completely replace fossil energy, all kinds of mecha and anti-gravity suspension vehicles can be seen in Binhai City.

Warframes are privatized and can be purchased by ordinary people as long as the money given is sufficient. Tens of millions of armors have become the top toys of the rich, and they are also a status symbol. In the sky of Binhai City, armors can occasionally be seen passing by.

Only the armors sold have security systems installed, and weapons cannot be installed or used for criminal activities. Otherwise, armors will automatically send users to police stations. The civilization of the earth has not yet reached the level where armors fly with weapons, inappropriate rules, excessive freedom is the way to hell.

If you don't realize the armor in reality, you can experience it in the virtual reality world, otherwise you will join the armed department of the marching ant group.

The marching ant group specially opened a school that teaches combat armor and mech driving. The current large-scale mech is mainly used for agricultural production and small buildings, and then the mech entertainment project.

Overlooking the scenery all the way, Chen Mo and his party landed in the area of Building 1 of the Marching Ant Group headquarters soon. Ten days off and enough time to reunite with his family, Chen Mo also returned to the daily state of the earth.

Zhao Min followed Chen Mo and entered the area of Building 1.

"There are four main projects next."

Back at work, Chen Mo began to take back her mind.

"The first two are relatively simple. One is to help Mo Nu create a human body, and then transfer Mo Nu's consciousness into that body. This involves biological and medical technology, and a consciousness transfer technique that transfers Mo Nu The consciousness is transferred to the technology of biological brain, and I will all these technologies, this issue is not a big problem. The second issue is the commitment to Lan, to revive his daughter. "

"What's wrong with his daughter?" Zhao Min asked curiously.

Chen Mo told her about Lan's joining.

"Living dead, there are some accidents, and the brain is half dead." Chen Mo said: "And the life of Lan, the brain structure is particularly complicated, so it is a little difficult, and the chance is only once, so be careful.

Chen Mo paused and continued to speak.

"Go to Earth, or even the life planet we occupy, and find some vegetative cases with brain damage. In the future, the technology on brain resurrection can start on human cases."

Zhao Min nodded gently: "What about the third issue?"

"Strategic deterrence weapons. They are mainly super-galactic space weapons and light-speed weapons, as well as related strategic equipment."

Even when he returned to the earth, he still felt a deep sense of crisis.

No one knows when the interstellar war will suddenly land on the earth, and Chen Mo is now offending two god-level civilizations. Once discovered, their consequences will be very serious.

Weapon technology as the protagonist of war is the foundation of a powerful civilization.

"The fourth topic is very troublesome. I won't say it now, you will know it later." Chen Mo said pretentiously.

The fourth is the god-level mission of the science and technology library: [quantum life].

To build himself into a quantum life, this task makes Chen Mo's head bigger. This task must be carried out by himself. Once it fails, it will become nothingness in an instant.

Until the technology is completely completed, Chen Mo will not try this experiment. Even if he is sure to be mature, Chen Mo will not try it easily, because his chance is only one time, there is a small mistake in this task, his life is gone.

Chen Mo speculated that the highest authority of the science and technology library is still one level behind, and there will be a final task at that time.

The task of inheriting technology in the science and technology library, the last task, even Chen Mo was scalp.

But after experiencing the rules of the extraterrestrial world, Chen Mo also knows that depending on the original life and technology of human beings, it will not be long before it will be captive or destroyed by advanced civilization.

Only strong is the eternal pursuit of the universe.

Regardless of primitive, present, or future, human beings want to be strong and strong if they want to survive. Primitive times were tools and firearms that made humans powerful, ancient times were cold weapons that made humans strong, and modern times were hot weapons that made humans strong. Now and in the future, we will use various technologies to arm ourselves.

The universe has given intelligent life a powerful brain, and they have to rely on wisdom to become powerful.

"Go to work. Contact me directly for anything."

"Okay, big boss." Zhao Min leaned to Chen Mo, kissed him arrogantly, and turned away with a smile.

Chen Mo wiped off the lipstick on her face and couldn't laugh or cry.

"The space connector is now under construction and can be completed in about four months. The production factory of the standard armor is under construction and can be completed soon. Moge, which of the four projects should we do first?" Mo Nu asked.

"Quantum life creation technology is a long-term main project. This is to be done, and the others are also very important. The four projects are carried out simultaneously. I will give you some weapon technical information. You develop weapons and related technologies. Weapons can enhance our Precaution and deterrence will be useful in the future. Resurrection Lan's daughter's medical technology is first tested on other vegetative volunteers. "

Chen Mo paused.

"Now make your human body first."

chapters.title: Chapter 872: : Announcing The Truth To The Universe
chapters.body:
Chapter 872: : Announcing The Truth To The Universe

On the laboratory bench in the biological laboratory, the modules of various gene chains are slowly rotating.

The central image is the holographic body of Mo Nu.

The first problem that must be faced to make Mo Nu's body is genes. Any life has genes, which envelop god-like life. Particles constitute a special cell structure and are genes.

Now Mo Nu is facing the same problem, what gene should be used to create Mo Nu.

"Mr. Brother, use Sister Xiaoyu and Sister Zhao Min. My current appearance is optimized based on their looks. By choosing their genetic combination, the natural appearance may not look like the current one, but it will not be too different. Big. "Mo Nu said," Sister Xiao Yu and Sister Zhao Min agreed. "

"Ok."

Chen Mo answered.

That's what he meant.

Precision gene editing technology makes everything possible.

Today's gene technology, with the help of supercomputers, the control gene chain of human body traits is no longer a secret, so the use of gene combinations may not be exactly the same in appearance, but the gap will not be very different.

Determined to use the genes of the two women, Chen Mo transferred the genetic data of Xiao Yu and Zhao Min and set out to determine the genes of Mo Nu. It is mainly the genes in the external form and appearance. If the appearance is close, it will look familiar and comfortable.

"Sister Zhao Min's height frame, Xiao Yu's face gene, eyes and nose ..."

Mo Nu starts to pick genes.

For each gene, there is specific data for the gene chain module. With the selection of Mo Nu, each gene module is filling a blank gene chain module. Soon, the gene chain required by Mo Nu is completed.

"Test it again, and if there are no problems, start synthesizing the genes."

"The test is complete, no problem." Mo Nu said.

"That started to synthesize genes, then injected them into artificial egg cells and cultivated them with artificial uterus."

Artificial people are not accepted by the moral standards of the earth sciences, but Chen Mo uses the universal standards. The universe has no moral standards. As long as you can make yourself strong, you can do whatever you can. The winner and the winner are the choice of the universe. Divine civilization and top civilization emerge in this cruel competition.

The strong make the rules, and the weak follow the rules.

In the past, he was afraid of too much things on the earth, all development was too slow, and fell to the end of being captured by the three-eyed civilization.

In order to find him, the three women began to develop recklessly, so the technology of the earth broke out in just a few years, surpassing advanced civilization. After eight years of cosmic journey, witnessing the cruelty of the universe's competitive environment, Chen Mo's mentality has changed.

...

On the other side, Zhao Min, Mo Nu and Lan are discussing development strategies of the marching ant group. Zhao Min and Lan are real people in the conference room, and Mo Nu is a holographic projection at the scene.

"Our current technology is approaching the level of top civilization, but the population and development have not been reached. It is necessary to grow, otherwise we cannot fight against god-level civilization. We can hide for a while now, but God-level civilization will find out sooner or later, unless He will not develop in his lifetime and he will not be connected with the Universe. "

Lan's words made Zhao Min deeply agree.

"Is there any serious xenophobia here on Earth?" Lan said again.

"Serious."

Zhao Min didn't think about it.

"Earth has a specific moral standard for a long time. In the era of cosmicization, the earth is now just beginning to contact, and there are certain restrictions. People on the earth know that aliens exist but do not know that there is a cosmic alliance. Chen Mo was arrested and left the earth Yes, that alien disaster gave the earth people a shadow, and they had some alertness to the aliens in their hearts.

At the top of the company, there is contact with the Universe, which does not exclude alien life, but the entire human system may be a little troublesome. There is also a situation where the human beings on the earth, which are equivalent to the standard red-level intelligent life of the Universe, cannot become senior armored divisions. Before our development, we replaced war soldiers with war robots. "

"What is happening in the universe?" Lan asked Mo Nu.

"There are not many lives in the small universe. Jing Ge's clan is now less than 600,000. According to the standards of the Universe, their clan has 150,000 senior warframe divisions."

"600,000 people, 150,000 senior armour divisions?"

Lan's eyelids were jumping, what kind of abnormal group was it?

"Before opening the channel of the small universe, we mainly focused on low-key development. The earth is the boss's home and ethnic group, and here must grow. What is your opinion on the civilization of the earth?"

"We have a high degree of identification with the civilization of the country in which we live. Other countries do not matter." Zhao Min said.

"I read the history of the development of the civilization of the earth. To the extent of the rules of civilization, the earth is not behind advanced civilization. It can be said to be excellent and very unique. It is just that some rules have not kept up with the technological level of the group and can be perfected. What's the relationship? "

"Our group belongs to a special group, similar to the special zone. Outside the earth, we can develop freely according to our own rules without any restrictions, and we can feed back when necessary." Zhao Min said.

Hearing Te. District, Lan immediately understood the current situation of the marching ant group.

"Now it may be necessary to publish the truth about the universe to human beings. The earth will always develop and cannot be protected in the ivory tower. Human beings are red-level intelligent life. According to the natural evolution of the universe, it may take tens or even hundreds of thousands of years The standard of green civilization. If we continue to follow the rules of the earth, human constitution will not evolve in a short time. "

"Did the truth be announced?" Zhao Min paused. "The high level of our country has received a lot of information about the Universe from us. Other countries will be relatively small, and the impact on humanity will be great."

"The impact must also be announced. If even the truth is unwilling to accept, humans ca n’t see hope." Lan firmly said, "After the situation opens, we can gradually popularize constitutional drugs and superpower development technology. Our opponent is a god-level civilization. , You must be strong as soon as possible, otherwise you will perish. "

"Mo girl, contact the official."

Mo Nu confirms the contact. After a while, a holographic projection of an old man appears in the conference room. When the old man appeared, he also took a special look at Lan and nodded his head slightly.

After Lan explained the situation, the old man nodded for a while.

"Yes, according to Mr. Lan's meaning, it is time to make the announcement. The development of science and technology has made life better and human beings more comfortable. If there is no external pressure and shock, this ease will bring great trouble in the future. . "

...

Cao Long turned on the holographic TV as usual, and various technological developments of the Marching Ant Group became popular, making his life more comfortable. He also enjoyed the sci-fi life he dreamed of as a child.

The high level of technology and the need to worry about house prices no longer allow them to work just five or six hours a day and live the lives they want. The rest of the time is fun, games, entertainment, movies, travel, etc., so comfortable that I don't want to struggle.

In addition to the marching ant group, the entertainment, film, gaming and tourism industries have developed unprecedentedly and are also the most profitable industries.

Lying on the sofa, Cao Long asked the robot to go to the refrigerator to get some snacks to open and eat slowly. At this moment, the TV screen jumped to the CCTV news channel.

"Is it malfunctioning?" Cao Long said, "Little Butterfly, change channels."

The holographic TV changed to another channel, and the same news channel.

Not only Cao Long's TV, but also the entire China Huaxia and African continent, all holographic projection screens and holographic TVs, including social platforms, have the picture of the news channel.

"Urgent news: a news jointly released by the official and the marching ant group, please see the scene below."

Related to Marching Ant Group.

Seeing the old man and Chen Mo in the news footage, Cao Long no longer changed channels, and his body paralyzed on the sofa also sat upright. The two released the news together for the first time in history, and there is no doubt that it will be very terrifying news.

The current marching ant group is the most powerful group in the history of mankind, and its significance has surpassed the traditional enterprises. Chen Mo's status has been a god-like existence throughout the history of human development.

"Friends of all mankind, comrades. Today is a turning point in history. Human history will remember today as a special day. Today, Comrade Chen Mo and I announced the following news together.

The development of human science and technology has reached an unprecedented height. Humans have already begun deep space exploration of the universe and entered the era of stars and seas. In the past ten years, we have confirmed that human beings are not alone in the universe, there are various other lives outside the earth, and there are countless higher intelligent civilizations.

The higher intelligent life in the universe is as common as the animals in the forest, and civilizations form an alliance system like the United Nations on the earth. The level of development of extraterrestrial civilization far exceeds human imagination.

In the future development, the Chinese civilization will access some rules of the universe alliance system, and the monetary and financial system will be linked with the universe alliance star currency system. In the future, with the assistance of Marching Ant Group, we will seek a larger open system to the universe. We will start the Warframe Academy system. In addition, we will gradually popularize drugs that increase life expectancy and enhance human physique, so that human beings have stronger physique and wisdom, and welcome the coming of the cosmic era. This is the best time, and the sea of stars is full of possibilities. "

Seeing the news, Cao Long was stunned.

chapters.title: Chapter 873: : Directional Super Capability Development Technology
chapters.body:
Chapter 873: : Directional Super Capability Development Technology

The most shocking news in human history so far has been released.

The suddenness of this news caught countless people by surprise. Excited, panic, confused, pessimistic, joyful, all kinds of people.

The Universe became the most interesting thing for human beings.

At the same time, the marching ant group began to gradually put the encyclopedia and related news about the Universe on the Internet of the Earth.

The three perspectives of human beings began to subvert at the moment the truth was announced.

The world they knew was confined to the earth. At this moment, they suddenly jumped out of the wellhead, only to find that they used to be a frog sitting in a well watching the sky.

Human beings in the universe are as small as bacteria, not to mention. Looking at the sky again, it is no longer the beauty of Xinghe, but rather small and extremely fearful.

Countless people began to get confused, panic, and even some extreme humans became mentally disordered the moment they learned the news.

The news was like a catfish.

The original technology was highly developed, becoming comfortable, pursuing enjoyment, and calming the human society like a lake, which caused a stir. The whole human society became alive in various news and farce, like sardines in boxes.

The unknown fear, the expectation of the star sea, and the pressure of extraterrestrial life will rejuvenate the human social system, and new natural choices will begin. Humans who cannot adapt to the new rule system will be eliminated.

At present, the news is still in a one-way infiltration state. The Cosmic Alliance's Warframe system and various rules and news have begun to spread to the human society on earth.

...

Human society fluctuates in shock, and Chen Mo is not idle.

Mo Nu's body embryo was successfully cultured and growing in an artificial uterus. Chen Mo started empty-handed and began research on super-power development technology.

In the cosmic alliance system, human physique belongs to the fragile class. The red-level intelligent life is the lowest level. At present, it cannot be separated from food and the atmosphere needed, and life is fragile.

According to the standards of the Universe Alliance, the human body cannot meet the standard requirements of a high-level armored division. Wearing armor, even war robots cannot win. The three million lives that followed him to the galaxy were all blue-class life, and his physique could not be compared with the life of the top civilization and the life of the god-level civilization.

In terms of innate conditions, human beings are much weaker than the life of a large civilization. Only by fundamentally changing will the armor be able to play a stronger combat effectiveness.

Their opponent is a god-level civilization.

This is a serious problem.

If human beings do not evolve themselves, they will be eliminated in the era of cosmicization, and now there is no time for humans to comfortably evolve, which is his hunch.

The conflict of god-level civilizations is likely to trigger a large-scale cosmic war. Even if a little aftermath is spread, humanity will become extinct.

The fastest way to quickly change the physique and brain of humans is to accelerate the evolution of humans by means of life technology.

Super ability development technology.

This special technology has the effect of letting life's brain and body evolve.

With ready-made technical theories that also meet the requirements of evolution, Chen Mo set out to solve this short-term and most urgently needed technology and first created a group of top-level experts.

Mars, Stunning City.

Wang Hai, Black Eagle, Anan, White Pearl, Zhu He, Zhong Lei, Taishan, Luo Yu, and others, as well as Wat Mu, Red Crab, Poison Girl, and Da Mazu, a dozen people were in the laboratory.

Everyone stood upright and meticulous.

They are high-level members of the marching ant armed team and the mainstay of the marching ant group's future war department.

If you want to be a top power, top masters are a must. Even if the war does not rely on top masters, it is still necessary. This is a deterrent to status and has a good effect on management and foreign affairs.

The future opponents of the marching ant group are the god-level civilization and god-level life of the universe alliance, and the top masters and god-level life are indispensable.

Now is the time to create God.

"Are you ready?" Chen Mo glanced at the faces of a dozen people in the field.

"Decided."

A dozen people spoke in unison, with determination.

Wat Mu, the poisonous female four do not say that they are growing in the universe system, as long as they can become strong, they can accept any technology, not to mention super potion, the technology that this god-level civilization has snatched.

When they heard the boss wanted them to use superpower development technology, four people were shocked.

The disaster of Shi Ganxing was caused by super-capacity development technology, which caused thousands of lives. At present, the boss told them that they have already mastered more powerful super-capacity development technology.

The difference between levels of life is the speed at which the brain processes information. The hallmark difference between life at various levels and life at God's level is, in addition to the speed of the brain's reaction, superpowers.

The development of super powers means the development of the brain, they can evolve into god-level life, and become the top Warframe Division in one fell swoop.

For them in pursuit of strength, this is an irresistible temptation.

Wang Hai and others are not exclusive to various technologies. They are senior members of the marching ant group's combat department. They have been in contact with the universe alliance system for a long time. They have also used potential development reagents. They have opened up some new technologies, so they need to They did not hesitate to agree when developing superpowers.

They are the earliest people following Chen Mo. Only the most trusted people have this kind of treatment. There is no reason why they should not cherish this opportunity.

"What you are using is to develop [Liancheng www.wsx5.cn] technology to superpowers."

This is Chen Mo's superpower technology that was optimized based on Mo Nu's original mature technology based on the "Technology Theory of Directed Superpower Development" of the Science and Technology Library. Currently, there are not many types of superpowers for directed development.

"At present, there are four more practical choices. Jing Ge's [combat consciousness]; Gray twenty-one [instantaneous movement]; researched from the uncle's body, similar to Wolverine's [immortal body], but destroyed The brain is mortal; a "crazy" similar to the dark forest civilization, with increased reaction speed and physical strength. You choose, there is currently no technology that has both abilities. "

Some superpowers have little effect in the actual combat of the Warframe system, and many superpowers have not yet been matured.

It is necessary to consider the practicability of superpowers in the Cosmic Alliance Warframe system, otherwise some superpowers will not increase their own strength even if they have them.

Chen Mo tried to develop the superpower of his own [object control]. During the development process, he added his cells and genes, but it didn't work at all. All the experiments failed, and finally he had to give up the idea of direct development of his own object control. .

"I choose [moment move]." The poison skin girl did not hesitate to choose, she is the Assassin Warframe Division, of these four, this is her best choice.

"Me too." Zhu He and Luo Yu answered.

"I choose [battle awareness]."

Wang Hai, Wat Mu, Black Eagle, Red Crab chose [Battle Consciousness], but they knew Jinge's abnormality, and they had a ready-made top teacher, and they were combat department personnel. This special combat ability was undoubtedly for them The best choice has the most direct effect of improving combat effectiveness.

Two muscular men, Taishan and Da Mazu, chose Madness, while Anan and White Pearl chose [Undead].

After determining their respective choices, everyone lay on the experimental table and fixed it.

As soon as Chen Mo ordered, the experimental platform slowly moved everyone into the development cabin, and the men and women were separated. The cabin is filled with four transparent liquids that emit special fluorescence, similar to the blood of a god-like life.

"During the development process, the body and brain are a bit painful. The entire process cannot be anesthetized. You must be mentally prepared," Mo Nu reminded.

The hatch was closed and the laboratory was quiet.

The holographic light curtain shows the life characteristics and status of everyone. If a danger signal appears, the laboratory will immediately interrupt development and rescue.

The waiting time seemed long.

In addition to previous volunteer experiments, they were the first to formally use this technology. Success is the key to future supercapacity-oriented development.

Create gods in batches.

This is the charm of technology.

If the development is successful, the marching ant group will officially have the background of being among the gods.

chapters.title: Chapter 874: : Superpower Source: Multidimensional Universe Life Hypothesis
chapters.body:
Chapter 874: : Superpower Source: Multidimensional Universe Life Hypothesis

Superpower, this special ability of life, even the god-level civilization of the universe, has not given a completely reasonable theoretical explanation, it just means that consciousness affects material realization.

However, after researching superpower development technology, Chen Mo learned many possibilities from the books of science and technology libraries.

One of the more interesting is the hypothesis involving a multidimensional universe.

The hypothesis of the existence of superpowers in the science and technology library is the hypothesis of life consciousness left in the multidimensional universe.

Hypothesis conjecture that the multidimensional universe life has incredible consciousness and ability, which is quite similar to the omnipotent 'God' that the universe understands. The multi-dimensional universe collapses and degrades like a star, and the life of the multi-dimensional universe also dies. The universe is the remains of life after the death of ‘God’. The galaxy is just a cell, and the planet is just a humble atom on the cell. Even the universe of life cognition is just a cell.

The energy of the 'unbelievable substance' remaining after the death of multi-dimensional life has prompted the birth of life in the present universe, like bacterial viruses on corpses.

There is still the incredible power and subconscious mind of the "God" in the universe. The super power is that the incredible power of the "God" happens by chance in the life of the present universe.

The problem of the multidimensional universe is possible according to mathematical models and universe theory. As for whether the multidimensional universe has an imaginary special life form, that is another problem.

All this is hypothetical, and no one can be sure of its authenticity.

Chao Chao did not know the obscurity, I do not know the spring and autumn.

Without being able to confirm the existence of multi-dimensional cosmic life, Chen Mo simply cannot imagine the ability of multi-dimensional life, just as bacteria cannot imagine what kind of ability humans have.

The hypothesis of multi-dimensional universe life, even simple thinking, makes people shudder.

Chen Mo now only needs to understand and use superpower, and will not seek its essence. For many things, too much pursuit of the essence often results in disappointment and even panic.

Chen Mo in the laboratory is still waiting quietly.

Each instrument is operating normally, and everyone is in good condition. Through the life monitoring equipment in the laboratory, the physical condition of everyone in the development cabin was well known.

Development is accompanied by intense pain, similar to Chen Mo's evolution of the brain domain in a science library.

From the level of genetic structure, it is impossible to be comfortable.

Through the glass, Chen Mo can see the painful expression of everyone in the capacity development cabin. However, everyone's psychological qualities are excellent, and they have not given up because of severe pain.

Two hours later, there was movement in the laboratory.

Da Mazu and Tai Shan took the lead in completing the process. The machine sent the two out of the development cabin to remove the remaining medicinal solution from their bodies.

The appearance of Taishan and Da Mazu has changed slightly, and Taishan's appearance is a little more obvious. There is red fluorescence on the skin, which is the color of the developed drug, and now it is the luster of the blood. Today, Taishan has just completed its development and its characteristics are still obvious. After a period of adaptation, it will gradually fade away and restore its original appearance.

"Boss, I ... I seem to be stronger." Taishan was obviously extremely excited, his fists clenched.

"Um." Chen Mo responded heavily, glancing at him and Red Crab: "Use your power."

"Ok."

The two went to the open space in the laboratory and listened to only two beeps. Their bodies were raised and their muscles became bloated. The bones of the red crabs have become more red and gorgeous, and they are completely cooked crabs, and their body proportions have become stronger. The Taishan on the side is a red giant with a height of more than three meters.

"Do you two **** look good? There is a psychological shadow, go and wear pants."

Lan covered her face and didn't look at the two, her voice became weird.

Chen Mo glanced, his face twitched, and wanted to laugh but didn't dare to laugh: "You get dressed first, get used to it, and start training the day after tomorrow how to use your abilities with the armor."

"Yes." The two of them agreed, and excitedly picked up the clothes that the robot had brought over.

Chen Mo and Lan were both very surprised by their success.

This means that this kind of directed superpower development technology is mature, they will be able to continue to train top masters, the strength of the marching ant group will be formed in a short time, and their growth space is infinite.

Ordinary Warframe Divisions only need to adapt to their changes and abilities after a period of ability development to become senior Warframe Divisions, and future top Warframe Divisions can be expected.

Mass production masters, no wonder god-level civilization, but also coveted this technology.

Since then, others have completed development. After simply testing the abilities of everyone, Chen Mo let them go to rest.

"Mer, Shi Ganxing has news."

Mo Nu starts to tune up the news channel of the Universe.

On the news screen, an orc-like female anchor is using the universal language of the Universe to report the event.

"More than three months ago, after the pupil of the black pupil civilization used the space agitator to make the Shigan galaxy completely reduce to an isolated island in the universe, today big news came from the Shigan galaxy. It is understood that the space agitator in the Shigan galaxy It has already stopped, and the space connector successfully connected outside the Shigan galaxy today. We can see that there is a large-scale life of the Shigan galaxy on the edge of the stone galaxy. "

The female anchor's picture was put into space. It was full of various spaceships, which was where Chen Mo left last time.

Not long after, the fleet of Lagerstroemia civilization, the messenger of the corpse civilization, and the remaining Warframe Division of the Dark Forest civilization all appeared near the space jumping point at the edge of the stone pattern galaxy.

The emergence of a fleet of several god-level civilizations immediately attracted the attention of all lives. In particular, the reporters of the various news platforms of the Cosmos Alliance immediately took the spacecraft and quickly approached the fleet of the god-level civilization, enclosing them.

"Excuse me, what happened inside Shi Ganxing?"

"Convenient to disclose the news in the Shigan galaxy?"

"..."

Almost all the life of the universe news platform asked similar questions. On the public channel, it was occupied by the voice of various news platforms. All lives are waiting for the answers of several great civilizations.

"We did not participate in the internal battles, we did not know the specific situation, and could not tell." Ming Yan opened the public channel and gave a painless and itchy answer.

On various cosmic news channels, the appearance of the dark-white orc-like beasts appeared. The fur-faced Lei Gong mouth, the fur is gray-white, and the eyes are gray-white, which is a typical characteristic of the main life of the ghost civilization.

The Ziwei civilization's fleet did not pay attention to these issues, and the messenger of Ziwei civilization did not appear from beginning to end. As for the dark forest civilization, the spaceship collapsed, leaving the stone galaxy dingy.
