It didn't take long for a black-pupil civilization to appear in space on the edge of a stellar galaxy. In the space full of spaceships, the giant spaceship of the black pupil civilization and strange signs are particularly conspicuous.

Seeing the appearance of the black pupil civilization, the anchors of all the universe news platforms surrounded the spacecraft of the black pupil civilization. In this battle, Tong Qing used the military weapon space agitator to completely disrupt the space near the main star of Shi Ganxing and cut off the last space channel of the Shi Gan galaxy.

It can be said that the black pupil civilization is one of the protagonists of this battle, and the other two are the Thor civilization and the White Star civilization where Dan is located.

The emergence of the black pupil civilization, without the fleet of the Baixing civilization and the Thor civilization, the answer is obvious.

Tong Qing won.

"Trouble."

Chen Mo and Lan stared at each other, and a little stunned in their hearts, their expressions became dignified. Seeing this, they suddenly had a bad feeling. Frowning, both continued to look at each other in tacit understanding.

The sorceress's holographic projection appeared in the public channel, and it was not a solemn expression in the past, it was much more solemn.

"Master Tong Qing said that Mr. Dan is a very good Warframe Division and his most respected opponent. It is his greatest honor to fight against Mr. Dan. Master Tong Qing entrusted me with an apology to Thor civilization. Regrettably, Mr. Dan's body was not preserved in the battle, and he could not get his leaves back to the roots. "

chapters.title: Chapter 875: : Storm
chapters.body:
Chapter 875: : Storm

Dead silence! Shocked!

Originally noisy public channels were instantly silent. The entire Universe was dead in front of the live broadcast screen.

In a few words, Wu Wu announced a big news.

Dan, the first heir of the thunder civilization, died.

Countless lives heard the news, and their hearts were cold. They know what this news means, and the Thor civilization will officially fight the black pupil civilization, and there will be no room for relaxation.

Two divine civilizations went to war.

The full-scale war of god-level civilization will undoubtedly affect the entire universe.

A few years ago, Prince Dark Dragon was killed on his way back to the Endless Sea. Neither the Dark Forest Civilization nor the Endless Sea Civilization started a full-scale war, only a partial confrontation.

Because the dark forest civilization is not sure whether the endless sea is doing or not, no evidence can be given. Although it is not pleasing to the opponent, it will not start a full-scale war. Today, the war between the Thor culture and the black pupil civilization is clearly inevitable.

"Master, what exactly is Hitomi Qing thinking about?" Zi Mu whispered, beside her was Zi Yun, the legendary woman in the Ziwei civilization. Thinking of Hitomi's figure, Zimu felt a kind of shudder.

"I don't know," Ziyun said coldly, still no mood swings in her voice.

Zi Yun nodded the instruments around her, and Chen Mo appeared on the light curtain in disguise, and appeared together with Chen Mo's original appearance. After investigating during this time, many things became clear.

The first encounter was in the three-eyed civilization of Qing Mercury, at that time Chen Mo looked just an ordinary humanoid life. After the suspected turbulent disappearance of the space, he suddenly appeared in Shi Ganxing, snatched super power technology, killed Zeqi, and later made a deal with Tong Qing, all of the same life.

Ordinary life, senior warframe division, top warframe division, each identity is different, master the top technology of the top civilization, and get along with the endless sea and Yunzhou civilization, Ziyun suddenly felt that this man's identity became deep Unpredictable.

"Have you found the ink-dust fleet?"

"No." Zimu shook his head: "After leaving Stonehenge, their whereabouts are unknown, they have not been found on a bustling planet, and they have not received any news about them."

"Continue to search for his news, and report to me immediately when there is news." Zi Yun looked at Chen Mo's portrait and stunned: "Go back."

The Lagerstroemia civilization's fleet started space folding, and it didn't take long before it disappeared into the space on the edge of the stone galaxy.

The bustling scene, Tong Qing did not show up from beginning to end.

"Trouble."

The news screen is closed, Lan touches his sharp chin, and his narrow eyes reveal his thoughts.

"The Ziwei civilization is declining. Both the Thor and Black pupil civilizations want to replace them and become the boss. Now Dan is killed by Tong Qing and loses the opportunity to become the boss. Dan died in the Shigan galaxy, and the Thor culture may be going crazy. We will also go crazy Hated by the thunder **** civilization, although it has nothing to do with us, we have made a deal with Tong Qing in the Shigan galaxy. "

"Three divine civilizations."

Not even the Baixing civilization, the seven god-level civilizations that did not discover his identity, half offended him. Chen Mo was very speechless about this kind of trouble.

"You humans have a word, there are more lice, and it doesn't itch." Lan also became bachelor: "Anyway, there is a small universe, as long as you enter the small universe, even if it offends the seven god-level civilizations, they can do nothing about us."

In just a few words, Wu Wu caused a stir in the universe.

Wu Wu is also one of the future high-level heirs of the black pupil civilization, and no one doubts the truth of his words.

Almost on the day the thunder **** civilization got the news, thunder king thunder star was furious and issued a obituary to the black pupil civilization, asking the black pupil civilization to submit the pupil Qing to the thunder **** civilization for trial, otherwise it would officially launch a war against the black pupil civilization.

The news attracted the shock of the Universe Alliance.

But interested people quickly understand the concerns of the thunder civilization civilization thunder star.

With hundreds of millions of years of development, the life of Thor's civilization is too comfortable. There are many factions within the high-level civilization and the class is solidified. This is a very serious problem.

The thunder civilization seems to be powerful, but there is a serious trouble, there is no suitable successor. Between factions, no one is convinced. If the future heirs do not agree, they may cause divisions within the divine civilization and severely weaken their strength. Then it may become the second Lagerstroemia civilization, and fall into a deadlock.

Dan is the most suitable heir, with enough prestige and courage. Dan will take over the Thor civilization in the future, and the Thor civilization will definitely go further. Now that Dan is dead, the other heirs of Thor's civilization can hardly be convinced.

Thor Star civilization and Chen Bing civilization bordered by the black pupil civilization, the full-scale war seems to be imminent.

Venus.

Venus has been transformed by Momo to become a planet suitable for life. Today, as the location of the marching ant group's alien corps, the general headquarters was moved here after Lan entered the main combat department.

Gravity training ground.

This is a large gravity training field that can accommodate 100,000 soldiers to perform gravity training at the same time. It is also the largest gravity training field in the solar system.

There are ten similar training grounds.

After millions of soldiers returned to the solar system, they stationed in Venus for closed training.

On the gravity training ground, the crows and birds were silent, and many soldiers were doing basic combat training in the field.

Whenever there are players on the field who are physically weak, a medical robot will lift them out of the gravity field, enter the medical cabin for treatment, and then return to the gravity training field after recovery.

The terrible degree makes the players on the field sorrow.

Under the five-fold gravity field, there are no warframes, and some boring basic combat actions are repeated again and again, making the soldiers on the field anxious, but dare not be lazy.

There was a Warframe Division who was lazy, and was pulled out by Lan for a special ‘fighting’ training. The voice of the team was turned on during ‘training’. They still remembered the screaming heartbreak. With negative textbooks, no one else dares to mess around again.

In addition, heads such as Wat Mu and Da Mazu are trained in a ten-fold gravity field, which is much more abnormal than them.

Every soldier has an instrument.

When they train, they use a computer's posture calculation model to determine whether their movements are in place. Strictly to the extreme, even if a combat action is not in place, they have to come again.

"This day is really old, I don't know when it will come to an end." A human life couldn't help muttering, but he didn't dare to relax.

"This is the most perverted training I have ever encountered. It is simply a torture of both physical and mental. We are all used to fighting in armor. As a result, the instructor actually refuses to wear armor. Is training for wearing armor not good? The next player answered.

"Do you say that the bishop has a tendency to abuse people?" Another team member spoke.

The players around him all agreed.

"Do you know the origin of the training standard for the bishop?" A team member who had been making serious moves beside him said coldly: "We are now conducting the training standards for the top civilized military."

"Come on, the standard of the top civilized military? The top civilized military trained these useless things and died long ago." A member of the team did not dare to make mistakes, but his mouth was refuting.

"Ah!"

The side that made everyone disapprove sneered.

"Do n’t take ignorance as a meal. This is the most basic standard of top civilized soldiers. The raw reactions and brain reactions of the armored division are the most essential things. Otherwise, war robots can already be used instead of soldiers.

Do you know what's in the recovery kit in the medical cabin? In addition to healing fluids, there are potions that stimulate the body's potential. You compare your strength when you started training, and then compare your current strength. The technique of grown-ups is not inferior to the top civilization. "

The players on the field are silent. Now thinking about it, it seems that what Bian Yan said is the same.

"Training is over now, all are there, and we will gather at the point in five minutes."

Before the end of the training, a sudden notice made everyone stunned.

The five-fold gravity field slowly disappeared, leaving everyone almost paralyzed to the ground, but did not dare to rest, summoned the battle armor, all gathered, and quickly flew in a square array in the direction of the spot.

chapters.title: Chapter 876: : Science Maniac
chapters.body:
Chapter 876: : Science Maniac

At the military field, two million soldiers lined up neatly, overlooking from the air, and the team was strict. This is composed of two million senior warframe divisions recruited from the Shigan galaxy.

One million senior armour divisions and one million young armour divisions.

The two million Warframe Division is divided into two parts, the War Department and the Assassin Department. The War Department also has a guard group and a large magic group.

The large demon group's warriors are composed of high-level armour divisions, the wooden guard group is composed of young armour divisions, and the assassin group is selected by the poison skin girl from two teams to train 200,000 people suitable for assassins.

This is the first time that two million soldiers have gathered on the spot.

The painting style of the big magic group is a black marching ant logo; the wood guard group is a red marching ant logo; while the assassin group does not have any obvious signs, and the atmosphere is cold.

Every life on the field didn't know what was about to happen, but just stood still.

Lan stood on the high platform of the soldiers' field, overlooking the soldiers below, and nodded with satisfaction. Although it was only a few months of training, it was not bad.

"it has started."

As Lan's words fell, a 500-meter holographic light curtain hangs down in the sky. On the military ground, the picture of the holographic light curtain can be seen very clearly. Lan's figure appeared on the light curtain, and the atmosphere of the team was serious at once.

Mainly, Lan was impressed by them. The silver rotten old man, tortured by their training, can be described by metamorphosis.

"Your final assessment results came out, everyone passed, and the basic training was over."

This remark made the atmosphere on the court loose, and there was a feeling of collective heart landing. During this time of hell-like training, if they failed, they would simply die here.

"Don't be happy if you pass the basic training. This is just the beginning. It means that you are eligible for the second training session."

Lan's words made the atmosphere serious again.

"Now it's time for you to make your final choice. You can choose to leave or stay."

In the military ground, everyone did not understand why Lan came to such a sentence. But no one dared to move, let alone speak, waiting for the following.

"In the Shigan galaxy, your choice to join us may have been a forced decision under the crisis. Joining us at the time will give you the opportunity to escape the Shigan galaxy, and now give you a chance to choose again. Leave, or stay."

Lan emphasized again, asking them to confirm that they heard right.

"The former guys were a bit gifted and turbulent. They are the **** in the universe. During this time, I saw your changes and I saw your efforts. If you choose to leave, I will not blame you. It is you who pursue freedom Everyone's rights.

You can continue to be a cosmic bastard. If you want a different life, stay. You know the technical skills of your boss, which is on par with top civilizations and even divine civilizations.

In the future, the future of marching ants is limitless, and it is possible to achieve the next top civilization and god-level civilization. By then, you, your family, will be the core citizens of top civilization and even divine civilization. "

Lan's words made everyone look good in the eyes.

The core citizen of the top civilization and even the divine civilization, this is the identity that countless lives dream of. Having the identity of a core citizen of such a large civilization, the residents of the country's capital, even the second-generation official of the large civilization, have a naturally superior status and excellent resource conditions.

"If you choose to leave, we will use technology to wash away your memory for these months, send you to any of the cosmic alliances to join the galaxy, and compensate you for the living expenses of five million stars.

If you choose to stay, you will become a member of the marching ants. Thirty years later, you can choose to retire. We will compensate you for a set of advanced battle armor, 20 million star coins, and a potion to increase the life span of 50 years. Your children's families will receive top education. If the battle dies, those compensations will be paid to your loved ones. Choose it now. "

Lan's voice stopped abruptly.

There was a commotion on the ground and many players looked at each other. The area where the Assassin Regiment is located is the quietest, and all the players remain motionless. Loyalty is the top priority of the Assassin.

"Noord, what do you think?" Willis asked the Warframe Division beside him.

The Warrior Division known as Nord had no expression: "The fool just left, the home of the Shigan galaxy was gone, and everywhere he went, he was so busy and incapable of traveling the universe. The group is only just starting now and has a spatial connection. Technology, can develop top-level battle armor, the boss has the courage and ability, the ability of the instructor is undoubted, do you think its future will be worse than the top civilization? And although this period of hard training, but more interesting than before. "

With that said, Jed stopped talking. Willis agreed to nod and stood still.

Two million people, everyone was there, and no one chose to leave.

Full answer sheet.

Even when Lan saw this scene, she was very satisfied, and a rare smile appeared.

"I can win the adult‘ beauty smile ’, this time it ’s worth it.” Da Mazu grinned.

The nearby Wat Mu and red crab looked at Da Mazu strangely, and moved his body silently, his eyes full of pity. The always indifferent poison skin girl couldn't help moving to the side, trying to stay away from Da Mazu.

I saw Lan smile with a smirk at Da Mazu, only for a moment, Da Mazu's heart froze, his body cold.

Mouthful and finished.

Looking back, Lan stopped paying attention to the big matsu who wanted to cry without tears.

"You will be proud of this correctness in the future. The team will popularize the top-level standard armor, and the second phase of training will be based on the basic tactical training of the armor. In each subsequent assessment, the team will be ranked as the top team. The collective has a chance to develop its potential. Every time, ten players with the best overall performance will be selected for special rewards, and the content of the special rewards will be kept secret for the time being. "

All the players looked at each other and were curious about this special reward.

However, the opportunities for potential development are also very attractive to them. The potential development of advanced life is owned by top civilizations.

Biomedical laboratory.

In the training room, various instruments and experiment cabins are stacked, and everything is neat and orderly.

The experimental chamber placed in the center of the laboratory is particularly conspicuous. Inside it is an artificial uterus with a baby girl in it. This is a baby cultivated by gene editing technology and somatic cell cloning technology.

Mo woman's body.

This technique is unacceptable in earth science morals.

Before the change, Chen Mo was a scientific lunatic in the eyes of mankind.

But in the age of cosmicization, the scientific morality of the earth is not cosmic dogma, and everything can be done as long as it does not exceed the limits stipulated by the rules of the Universe Alliance. Even if it exceeds, the Universe will not be sanctioned if it is not found.

The amniotic fluid of artificial uterus is specially prepared.

The amniotic fluid contains medicaments and other special ingredients that accelerate the growth rate of larvae. This is to allow the larvae to grow quickly into the required mature individuals.

To have Mo Nu have a human body is not to let her grow up from a baby, otherwise she will be confused. Mo Nu's body will grow to full adulthood in the artificial womb before being used to contain Mo Nu's consciousness.

As for the consciousness in the new body, before it really woke up, it was a chaotic consciousness of life. It was not a real sense of life. It was quite a blank piece of paper, which could well carry Mo Nu's thinking consciousness.

Now the baby girl in the artificial womb is thirty-eight weeks old under the action of the accelerating agent.

Chen Mo asked Mo Nu to recall the life characteristics of the cloned body. All indicators are stable, within the predetermined value, that is, Mo Nu's body is now growing fast and healthy.

"Body organs and brains have taken shape." Mo Nu said.

"Um." Chen Mo responded, "It is possible to increase the amount of growth medicinal solution. Add 12% of the concentration, nutrients and other required substances, and calculate the maintenance according to the formula of the growth agent that increases the concentration by 12%, so your body It will take shape soon. "

The body and organs and brain are fully formed, and the subsequent growth can be fast without worrying about other birth defects. This is just the beginning. When the body is about three, ten and thirteen years old, there is another growth acceleration, which helps accelerate the rapid growth of the body until it becomes an adult body.

chapters.title: Chapter 877: : Ziyun'S New Task
chapters.body:
Chapter 877: : Ziyun'S New Task

"such……"

On the training ground, Jing Ge and the robot demonstrated the action of fighting, over and over again, tirelessly.

Next to him is a little boy, about eight years old, with a little face similar to Chen Mo, that is, Xiao Wuming.

He likes to practice martial arts, and Chen Mo asked Jinge to teach him. In terms of battle, Jing Ge is better than him. It is undoubtedly best to let Jing Ge be an unknown teacher.

Fighting Xiaoming is a robot that is about the same height as him, and a child his age can be less powerful as his sparring.

Because of his special constitution, he has natural advantages, physical strength and strength, much larger than his peers, and he is also very smart.

Wuming is born to be a technician, because he has a powerful brain, but his passion for technology is not as high as Wushuang, so Chen Mo and Xiaoyu did not force him.

Xiaoyu did not object to writing anything with his sister.

Woo ...

Two sets of battle armor came from the sky, appeared over the training ground, and slowly landed. The armor was opened, and Chen Mo and Mo Nu came out of it.

Both Jinge and Anonymous stopped.

"Dad." Seeing Chen Mo, wiped the sweat from his forehead anonymously, shouted blushingly at Chen Mo, a little happy.

"Well, is training hard?" Chen Mo asked, touching his wet hair and smiling.

"Not hard." Anonymous shook his head firmly.

Chen Mo gave him a thumbs up and expressed his appreciation: "That's awesome."

It's not hard to be able to hold Jing Ge's training, Chen Mo has to wonder if this little guy is lying, or Jing Ge's training is too loose for him.

"He works very hard and has talent." Jing Ge glanced at the namelessly, apparently acknowledging the student: "What's wrong with you?"

"The space connector is almost complete, and the space connector is complete, and you can connect the wild mountain star of the small universe."

"Um." Jing Ge nodded slightly. "Come a fight."

As he said, Jing Ge tore off his shirt and loosened his neck. Let Mo Nu take the nameless to rest, Chen Mo took off her coat, exposing the muscles with perfect lines.

Huh!

Chen Mo disappeared in place and led the attack.

An hour later, Chen Mo was lying on the training ground, panting heavily, feeling hearty.

When he came back to Earth, he was in the laboratory. He hadn't fought so easily for a long time. Only when training with Jing Ge, he could use super powers unscrupulously.

...

Lagerstroemia civilization, Lagerstroemia star.

This is one of the seven god-level civilizations in the universe, the star of Ziwei civilization. The high-rise and main figures of the Lagerstroemia civilization live on this huge and incomparable purple planet.

Ziweixing, a majestic building is the most prominent. The whole body is purple, engraved with ancient totems and inscriptions, as well as the Lagerstroemia flower symbol which is clearly visible in Lagerstroemia indica.

The plants around the building are mainly purple flowers, and the purple fluorescence on the leaves and petals exhales and breathes, surrounding the surroundings into a fantastic fairyland. The peculiar fragrance in the atmosphere is very good.

Inside the building, an old Ziwei star looks a little embarrassed. In front of him is Ziyun, a big fat man playing a strategy development game, and a sleepy young man.

The old Lagerstroemia is the owner of Lagerstroemia, and the ruler of Lagerstroemia civilization, Zijunzhi.

"Why not fight?" Zi Junzhi hated iron and steel.

Ziyun's expression was cold and did not fluctuate because of Zijunzhi's puppet. He took up the Lagerstroemia flower tea next to him and took a sip, and the purple eyes remained calm.

"Can't compete." Finally, Ziyun said lightly.

"why?"

Zijunzhi has a headache for Ziyun's cold character.

"Tong Qing and Dan both arranged the means in advance. The struggle was just futile, and they might die in it." Zi Yun put down the tea cup, and her voice was still cold, even when facing the star master.

"And kill Zech's life? How about the investigation?"

"The investigation revealed that it was the life of Tong Qing, and he fled." Zi Yun projected two photos of Chen Mo: "Ze Qi will die. He should have recognized him in Shi Ganxing and was discovered by him."

Seeing Chen Mo's photo, Zi Junzhi was a little surprised.

"What do you mean?"

"The first time we saw him was in an experimental star of the Three-Eyed Civilization. At that time you asked us to go to the origin city galaxy to find a small universe." Zi Yun released Chen Mo's video from Qingshuiren, which is Chen Mo wearing [ Liberty Black Ants] Warframe Battle.

"A senior Warframe Division?" Zi Junzhi looked at Chen Mo's battle video.

"He's not a senior armored division, or rather, not just a senior armored division. The first thing we saw him was on Qing Mercury. He looked like an ordinary life, but it felt strange to me."

Zi Yun recalled the scene where she first met Chen Mo.

This time, the fat man on the side of the hill stopped the game in his hand, looked at Ziyun in surprise, and the sleepy-eyed youth became more energetic.

For the first time, they knew Ziyun's ability and made Ziyun feel special.

"He is like a red-level intelligent life, but it gives me a feeling of the same level."

Ziyun continued to pour a cup of Lagerstroemia tea.

"The suit of armor on him is similar to the cat-head man who closed the entrance to the cosmic universe with red matter. Before entering the black hole, Zeqi used this video to let me explain to you and reduce the punishment."

"Why not explain?"

"No need, mission failure is failure, there is no excuse and reason." Zi Yun said lightly.

Zijun Zhi rubbed his temples with a headache.

Ziyun is all good there, but her character is too cold and not cruel enough. This character is very troublesome for the superiors. The big fat man who played the game and the sleepy-eyed young man twitched their lips, afraid to talk. Admire Zi Yun tightly, and face the star master with this cold attitude.

"He may have superpowers to develop technology."

Ziyun released two other video clips, one of which was Chen Mo's rescue twenty-one video clip, which included Jinge's battle armor. The other is the video of Jing Ge killing the dark forest civilization Ode.

Jing Ge's armor is identical except for its color.

"Give you a new task. The Ziwei Civilization's Intelligence Department will dispatch you to find that life and return with superpower development technology. You can use any method, including recruiting him in." Zijun sighed.

"Okay." Ziyun nodded faintly, lowered her tea cup, and got up to leave.

Seeing Ziyun leave, Zijun shook his head and sighed.

The Zidi incident that year revealed the deteriorating reality of the Ziwei civilization. The talents of the Ziwei civilization are dying, and the number of awakening of superpowers is decreasing year by year. Lagerstroemia civilization is in recession, even if they are unwilling to admit it, this is true.

The Lagerstroemia civilization, which once created the Warframe system, is the most powerful of the seven god-level civilizations. Everyone is in awe. Now it is more like an old man.

Ziyun's talent is enough to convince the public, smart and intelligent. If she takes over Ziwei civilization, Ziwei civilization will have no problems at least for a short time, but Ziyun's temperament is too cold and not suitable for the higher ranks.

After thinking about the mission of the small universe, let her accumulate enough prestige, and then give way to her, but in the end, something changed, the small universe was lost, and various troubles were caused.

A glance at the big fat man and the sleepy young man who played the game, Zi Junzhi got a headache and turned to leave.

There are only a few talents, one of which gives him headaches.

Until Zijun disappeared, the sleepy youth was still a look of 'Beijing paralysis', listless: "Do you say there is any chance for Ziyun this time?"

"It's hard to say, that male person doesn't look simple." The fat man playing the game shook his head: "Ziyun's personality needs to change, it's too cold, otherwise it won't work."

"I think she doesn't want to change." The sleepy young man muttered lazily.

The fat man who played the game paused, nodded slightly, and some agreed with the words of the sleepy young man. The mess of a decaying empire rests on a girl, and he is unwilling to take over.

"Go mermaid fishing in Mermaid in the afternoon?"

Hearing the mermaid fishing, the big fat man became instantly energetic: "Last time I caught the mermaid princess and was chased by nine horoscopes by the mermaid tribe, I still want to go? A little exciting, but I like it.

chapters.title: Chapter 878: : Connecting The Universe
chapters.body:
Chapter 878: : Connecting The Universe

When Xiaoyu was sleeping, when he heard someone shouting his name, he opened his eyes and saw Chen Mo's familiar face.

"Lazy fish, get up."

"It's okay today, let me sleep a little longer."

Chen Moli took care of Li Xiaoyu's scattered hair: "The sun is still asleep after getting **** out of the sun, getting up for breakfast, today's breakfast made by Mo Nu."

"You hold me up."

"Have someone hold you? How old?"

"18 years old."

"?????"

Chen Mo almost didn't laugh, but helplessly, she could only hold her up.

"How's the progress of Mo Nu's body?" Xiao Yu asked at the dining table, holding a porridge.

"The progress is within the plan, and it won't be long before it is completed. Now we are preparing the consciousness transfer technology, and when Mo's body matures, I can start the consciousness transfer." Chen Mo said.

"At that time, Mo Nu is the real life, and you can taste the taste of breakfast." Zhao Min slowly ate the bread at hand.

"Um." Mo Mo laughed at the dining table with a little mother beast and answered.

"After breakfast, go to Mars together."

"What to do on Mars?" Xiao Yu and Zhao Min stopped at the same time, looking at Chen Mo curiously.

"Last night the space connector test was completed, and the channel with the small universe was about to be opened. Let's take a look together." Chen Mo said.

Mars outer space.

A ring of forty kilometers in diameter floats in space.

This is the third space connector manufactured by Chen Mo.

A space connector made from nano-robots using asteroids from the solar system asteroid belt as materials. There is sufficient material in the asteroid belt, so the construction speed is not slow.

Back in the past few months on Earth, the work of space connectors has never stopped.

It's finished today.

Chen Mo was inside the spacecraft, watching the spacecraft outside space, Jing Ge, Lan and others were beside Chen Mo.

It was a ritual.

They rite a new little universe.

At present, there are only seven small universes. In the hands of the seven god-level civilizations, there is a small universe, which means a safe space for development, and there is no fear of civilization destruction in the middle of development.

"Are you all ready?" Chen Mo asked the holographic projection in front of him, Tuo Li, Tuo Shan and Xun were all there.

"Sir, you are ready." He nodded.

After confirming, Chen Mo pressed the button in his hand. In the next second, an invisible ripple ripples in the space connector, which is particularly obvious under the space detection instrument.

The spatial frequency inside the ring is changing, that is, the spatial frequency inside the small universe.

Within an hour, the fluctuation of the spatial frequency gradually stabilized. On the computer modeled image, it can be clearly found that the inside of the ring of the space connector is completely different from the space outside the ring.

"The spatial volatility is determined. The stability is 100% and the completion is 100%. The space connection is successful." Mo Nu turned her head to Chen Mo.

Buzz ...

Inside the space ring, an invisible space ripple rippled open, and a spaceship appeared from the ring.

At this moment, cheering and joy.

The door to the space between the solar system and the small universe was officially announced. For humans, this is a destiny-changing event.

The Red Crab watched the spaceship appearing from the space ring shocked, and was recruited by Lan, half because it was leaving the Shigan galaxy, and the other half was because of the superior conditions. But when Chen Mo gave him superpower development technology to use, he was so confused, he decided to follow Chen Mo in the future. He saw the potential of his boss and possessed terrible technology.

To this day, he knows that the boss owns a small universe.

This does not mean ...

"It's crazy." The red crab knocked on his crab shell and said with admiration.

Watmu's eyes are red and extremely excited. Humans on Earth may not yet know what this simple connection means, but as the life of the cosmic alliance system grows, he is very clear that another terrible power is about to rise.

The boss masters the technology of space curvature engine, super ability development technology, top warframe technology, dark matter and anti-matter extraction technology, etc., and develops strategic space weapons in the future, even if they lay the foundation of great power.

"I feel bloody, little universe." Wat Mu said to the big Mazu beside him.

Da Mazu also had a shocked expression: "Who isn't? It would be scary if God-level civilization was discovered."

The expression of the poisoned skin girl does not fluctuate greatly, but her heart is shocked, which is even more shocking than the last time she knew that the boss has super ability to develop technology. The amount of information today is a bit scary. Their boss has an untapped small universe, which is enough to make any big civilization in the universe crazy.

Compared to them, Wang Hai and Black Eagle were relatively calm.

When they contacted the information of the Universe Alliance, they heard about the small universe and knew that this was a very important thing, but they were not deeply affected by the system of the Universe, and they were not so shocked by the small universe.

In their opinion, no matter how strong the boss is, it makes sense.

"With this little universe, what about offending divine civilization?"

Even if Lan knew in advance that there was a small universe, she couldn't help being excited at the moment when she got through.

During the period of cosmic war, god-level civilization also relied on small universes to avoid refuge and destruction in the flames of war. A secure and stable development environment is the foundation of civilization.

With this small universe, they can develop unbridled without fear of being noticed by top civilizations, and then kill them.

Watching the rise of a god-level civilization, this moment, Lan's heart was filled with lofty aspirations. When he was young, he also had the dream of hegemonizing the universe, but then he fell silent, and now that mentality erupts again.

Lan's narrow eyes became sharper than ever and extremely aggressive.

If anyone who knew him was here, I must know that the spirited Lan was back.

"Sir, I can finally meet you."

Tuo Li saw Chen Mo and ran towards him quickly, giving Chen Mo a standard salute. Now Tuo Li, looking at growing up a lot, is more spiritual than before.

"Hello sir." Tuoshan and Muyao and other senior management of the Shan people paid tribute to Chen Mo.

If it weren't for Chen Mo, they would still be 'geeks' hiding in the mountains and forests, or they might have died in that disaster. Now the Shan people not only have a stable life that they never dared to imagine, they have become stronger than before.

Chen Mo is the **** in the Manshan clan.

"Hello sir."

Chen, Chen, and Tenna looked at Chen Mo with scorching eyes.

Xiaoyu and Zhao Min next to each other looked at Chen Mo with a smile, eyes were scary enough. Chen Mo just felt chills in his spine. When he met Xiao Yu and Zhao Min's eyes, he knew where the chill was coming.

"Sir, we can finally look at your hometown."

Tuo Li is extremely excited. Chen Mo is his most admired person and can be regarded as his half teacher. He wants to know everything about Chen Mo, like the eager star chaser.

"Check the training."

Jing Ge Leng Buding stood up from behind Chen Mo.

Hearing Jing Ge's voice, Tuo Li's smiling face came to an abrupt halt, and the eggplant frosted like frost.

Every time Jing Ge sees him, he trains, or hell, who can stand it.

"Mrs. Hello." Tuo Shan and Mu Yan saluted Xiao Yu and others, and Yan He and others also stepped forward to salute. This is the hostess.

"Hello."

Xiaoyu smiled and nodded, Zhao Min and Mo Nu also greeted everyone from the Shan people.

chapters.title: Chapter 879: : Space Dimension Reduction
chapters.body:
Chapter 879: : Space Dimension Reduction

The Shigan Galaxy space blockade was lifted.

The news swept across the Universe like a storm.

The space blockade and solidification of the Shigan galaxy, tacitly unlocked the blockade of the galaxy. However, shortly after the space blockade and space solidification were lifted, crazy news came out.

The star galaxy's main star, as well as nearby galaxies, were broken into pieces of paper.

Space reduction!

Some people use space dimensionality reduction weapons to reduce the dimension of the star system where the main star of Shigan is located. The life of Shi Ganxing's main star and those galaxies is still there, and countless dead lives.

The scope of dimensionalization is still expanding. According to the detection of top civilizations, it is confirmed that the scope of space reduction weapons is one hundred light years.

Centered on the main star of Shigan Star, the range of about one hundred light years will be dimensionalized. This is just the beginning. Dimensionalization will not end until 100 years later.

Stellar systems are dimensionalized, and matter in space is like paper, condensed and not scattered, like a huge scroll hanging in space, like an abstract starry fantasy sky, under the beauty of endless terror.

Space dimensionality reduction. This is a space weapon used only by the god-level civilized military.

This destructive space weapon is generally not allowed to be used randomly during non-war times. Today, Tong Qing uses this weapon in a star that is only considered a high civilization.

The horrific sight of Shi Ganxing's main star caused an uproar in the Universe.

The black pupil civilization inherited the pressure of public opinion from the Universe Alliance, and Tong Qing became the first sinner.

"Did they find them?"

Tong Qing stared at Chen Mo's holographic image, with a dull expression, obsidian-like eyes, as if blinking. Since Chen Mo left Shigan Galaxy, he has been watching Chen Mo's images from time to time.

Even the staff are wondering why Master Tong Qing cares so much about this unknown life.

"No, they haven't been found since they left the Shigan Galaxy." Tara responded respectfully, and hesitated before continuing to ask, "Master, why do you care so much about his whereabouts? He is just a small character."

"He's not a small character."

Tara was not entangled in Chen Mo's topic. In her opinion, Chen Mo was just a small character: "Sir, I heard that the Speaker is very angry, I'm afraid this time the trouble is not small."

"Ok."

Tong Qing's attention was still in Chen Mo's image, his eyes were deep, and he did not take Tara's words to heart, thinking about his own affairs, until a briefing interrupted his thoughts.

"Sir, the speaker asked you to come over."

"Come on, it's really troublesome."

Tara's expression changed, and she looked nervously at Tong Qing, only to see that Tong Qing was still calm and did not react.

...

In the main star of the black pupil civilization little universe, an old man with black pupil sits in a sitting position, and the colored magic pattern skin on his body is already dull and a bit twilight. This old-fashioned dragon bell, the majestic black pupil, is the speaker of the black pupil civilization, Hei Weifu Luoyun.

At this time, Wife Luoyun was very distressed.

The first heir of the black pupil civilization, the proudest man of heaven, did such irrational things at such a critical moment.

He was not distressed that Tong Qing destroyed Shi Ganxing. That life, for the holder of the god-level civilization, is just a bombardment of a humble village. He was distressed that Tong Qing bypassed the speaker of this black pupil council and used military forces.

This has reached the bottom line, committing a taboo of a rule of civilization.

"Why did you do this?" Viveroyun asked angrily.

Hitomi was silent.

Seeing that Tong Qing hadn't spoken, Weifu Luoyun was even more angry: "Do you know the consequences of using military power without permission? Do you know how much trouble civilized by killing Dan?"

"know."

"Know you still do this?" Wivro was suffocated enough, disappointed with Tong Qing, waved his hand, and led him away: "Exile to black hole prison, no one can let him out without my order."

Tong Qing looked indifferent, slowly stood up, and left behind the **** soldiers.

After the news that Shi Ganxing's main star was reduced by the use of space weapons by Tong Qing, Thor and Baixing civilization declared war on Black pupil civilization.

Universe turmoil.

The war of divine civilization officially broke out.

...

In the battle room, there was a spirit of killing. I saw Wang Haimu and others sitting side by side, wearing the latest uniforms of the marching ant group, and everyone was meticulous and sitting tightly.

On the huge sand table is the star map of the small universe. The density of the galaxy is in sharp contrast to the main universe.

"The small universe with a radius of 100 million light years is not small or small, and it is really a good thing."

Lan touched his chin and followed the star map of the small universe.

The amount of star coefficients of the small universe is much less than that of the main universe. People on the field are the first to see the legendary small universe. The laws of physics are the same as the main universe, here is the space behind the main universe.

The number and density of life is much lower than the main universe, and even lower than the Lanya Kea Super Galaxy, a place known as the life desert of the main universe.

Within the scope of their exploration, no advanced civilization was found.

The reason why the universe alliance system is so large and developed is mainly the space war hundreds of millions of years ago, which promoted the integration of the universe's life and the exchange and development of science and technology civilization, and then developed in continuous cooperation and competition.

This development model is similar to that of World War I and World War II. The alternation of war and peace is the driving force for the development of civilization.

Before leaving the small universe, Chen Mo made the Manshan tribe and artificial intelligence carry out a preliminary exploration of the small universe, and left a stationed planet in some galaxies, and then the artificial intelligence continued to develop the galaxy in which it is located.

At present, no advanced civilization capable of interstellar navigation is found in the small universe, and civilization in the small universe cannot develop too quickly. There are also unknown reasons that make the density of life here much smaller than the main universe.

However, without wearing armor, the life, strength and vitality here are generally higher than the main universe.

The Manshan clan is a good example.

"The war between god-level civilizations has begun, the balance is broken, and the cosmic alliance will not be very peaceful. We also need to strengthen ourselves to confirm that we can survive in the future troubled times."

Lan gave the star map below to Wang Hai and Wat Mu and others.

In the main universe expansion, once it exceeds the constellation level, it is easy to attract the vigilance of nearby constellation civilizations, either to cooperate, to curb your development, or to destroy.

And if you want to expand even more, the resistance will become greater.

If there is a small universe as the foundation, let this be the ‘tree root’. When they expand in the future, they do n’t have to worry about their strength and development not keeping up.

"Now acting as planned, Poison Girl and Ash Twenty-one are left, and the others are meeting."

Poison skin girl and Grey Twenty are sitting at one end. Poison skin girl is indifferent and ruthless. Grey Twenty-one is better, but after Jing Ge's training, her expression is also a bit cold and dangerous.

"Your training is over. Next, you have to travel to other parts of the Universe to build an intelligence system and assassin organization that will act as the eyes and ears of marching ants."

Lan was very serious.

"Your first stop is also the most important battle, a place of chaos."

Lan pointed to the location in the main universe star map.

Poison skin female pupils shrink, slightly moving.

The place of chaos, as the name suggests, is the place of chaos and the most complicated place in the universe.

"Why is it here?" The poison skin girl was puzzled.

"This is the largest talent gathering place in the universe, and there are talents everywhere." Lan smiled slyly: "Interstellar exiles, warmongers, crooks, conspirators, adventurers, killers, etc., there is nothing more perfect for the dark world than here Place. Do you dare to go? "

"Don't you dare?" Poison Girl immediately agreed.

When Arashi arranged the mission, a fleet of tens of thousands of spacecraft suddenly appeared in the distorted space in Orion's space.

chapters.title: Chapter 880: : The Gate Of Eternal Life: Technology Of Life Consciousness Transfer
chapters.body:
Chapter 880: : The Gate Of Eternal Life: Technology Of Life Consciousness Transfer

"It seems to fly over, where is this?"

The black bear man headed by the fleet looked at the star map around hesitantly, and it took a while to react, swearing in his mouth.

"Pulsar markings indicate that this is within the Rania Kea Super Galaxy Cluster." A humanoid reported.

"This sour puppet has few hairs." The black werewolf expression became depressed: "Turn on the radar and go to Perseus. Perseus is our target."

"Sir, are we really okay with the Perseid civilization this time?" A strangely looking man asked hesitantly.

"What can be the problem? A high-level civilization, even if they are a high-level civilization, but also a high-level civilization in the mountains and forests, with limited strength. Nothing terrible, it's done." The bearman shouted.

"Sir, the nearby galaxy, the local life seems to be called the fairy galaxy. Is there a fairy in it? All kinds of beautiful female life." An unknown black orc grinned slightly, a bit wretched.

"Are you **** stupid? Does your wife have your wife in the galaxy?" The Bearman gave a shudder to the unknown orc: "Rania Kea super galaxy here, there are few intelligent lives and many barren galaxies. Got a fairy wheel to get you? "

"A lot of diamonds in the Diamond Galaxy."

"Your mother, the diamond is a stone. Which galaxy doesn't have that kind of stone? Still talking back." The black bear shouted with a paw, and his pouting man shut up immediately.

"Sir, the radar found that there are traces of advanced civilization in this galaxy, and many planets are being developed." The person in charge of the radar shouted immediately.

The ability to independently develop the planets in the galaxy, this level of ability is generally advanced civilization.

"There is still a high level of civilization in this ghost place? A little interesting."

Hearing the report, the bear man froze for a moment, and immediately came to his interest: "Send a scout boat to check to see if there are any valuable things. Although it is very poor and remote here, there must be principles for robbery. This is for backward civilization Basic respect. "

"Sir, can there really be fairies?" The unknown orc got up, excited.

"Your family roars." The irritable bearman shot him on the floor again.

A 500-meter-diameter shuttle-type reconnaissance ship detached from the stern of the ship, and according to the radar, it approached the quadrant where the most recently developed planet was located.

Didi ...

Almost at the same time as the fleet appeared, the Venus Warfare Department had a big alarm.

"Orion finds an unknown fleet."

Mo Nu gave the image of the quantum detection radar to Arashi.

The development of the Milky Way by the Marching Ant Group showed an exponential explosion under the arrangement of Mo Nu.

The living planet is left to be developed into the army stationed planet, the inanimate desolate planet is developed into the machine factory, antimatter factory and dark matter factory, in addition to the radar planet and the mine star.

Miner is not too particular about it. It only needs to continue mining on the desolate planet, producing robots, armors and spaceships, etc., and then continue to develop as a springboard.

The location of the radar planet is sophisticated, and they are in some important positions. Then, using intelligent machinery, the entire planet is transformed into a quantum detection radar, a planet-sized quantum detection radar that is used to monitor the space around the planet.

With the solar system as the center, the number of radar planets has grown wildly from the original foundation. Today, the number of radar planets with the solar system as the center reaches 300,000.

This number may seem large, but it is not enough for a hundred billion galaxy planets.

These radar planets are centered on the solar system. One radar planet is transformed every ten stellar galaxies and jointly detected by a quantum matrix. Today's quantum detection radars are sufficient to monitor the range of 40,000 light years centered on the solar system.

Before long, the entire galaxy will be under their surveillance.

Fearing exposure, they did not allow Mo Nu to arbitrarily extend the development beyond the Milky Way.

"Check this sign."

Lan Yan enlarged the bear head logo of [笔 趣 阁 www.bequge.xyz] on their hull.

On the quantum network of the Universe Alliance, Mo Nu quickly found relevant information.

"Bearwind Battle Group."

"A bunch of interstellar bandits, kind of interesting."

Seeing the information of the Bear Wind Battle Group, Lan touched his chin, his smile was a bit sinister.

The Cosmic Alliance system and the Warframe system are well developed. Many Warframe divisions have long ventured in the universe, and these teams are called Warframe Regiments, similar to mercenary regiments.

The Space Alliance has a regular Warframe regiment registration mechanism. Half of the Warframe regiments have a fixed headquarters planet, and there are base planets that provide Warframe regiments for issuing commissioned missions.

However, some of the Warrior Groups have unsatisfactory mental skills, relying on interstellar plunder to survive, robbing low-level star stars, or caravans traveling through space. Those Warframe regiments are quite interstellar bandits, but their names are still the same.

"Will you throw a space weapon in the past?" Mo Nu asked.

"No, use space weapons. The civilizations of Perseus and Pisces next to us will find our existence and arouse their vigilance. It is not the time to low-key develop a small universe." Lan shook her head.

"How far are we from our nearest station in Orion?"

"Fifteen light days, Orion 9A, Orion 9B, Orion 9C, three stars, and 31 light day Orion 6H."

"They should have discovered that these planets have traces of civilization. Their detectors entered the defensive range of the planet and immediately attacked, destroying their detectors."

Lan checked the weapon status of the four planets, and his eyes were insidious.

"This is a good training opportunity, Da Mazu, to pull your big devil."

...

Nervous Awareness Lab.

Chen Mo and Wushuang are discussing the technology of neural conscious connection.

In front of them is a neuroconscious connection device.

Since virtual reality technology involves neural conscious connection technology, Wushuang has information and experiments on neural conscious connection as early as the beginning.

Now Chen Mo is making the equipment of wisdom life consciousness transfer technology and the unparalleled research materials, which is very helpful to the project of "Mo Girl's Body".

To transfer Mo Nu's consciousness into the human body requires a bridge between the biological brain and quantum consciousness.

Virtual reality technology temporarily connects human consciousness to virtual cyberspace, while consciousness transfer technology, in turn, permanently implants quantum consciousness into the biological brain.

"There are similarities in this technology."

Wushuang told Chen Mo his own opinions. Unexpectedly, one day, Dad would use her research materials to make her flattered.

"At present, humans enter the virtual reality world by controlling the nerve conduction and cortical activity of the brain, so that the brain appears in the virtual reality world. It is similar to dreams and imaginations. It is a fantasy.

The technology of consciousness transfer also controls the thinking mode of the brain, so that it produces a consciousness that is the same as quantum consciousness. Both are achieved by affecting the cells and cortex of the brain, the latter being more complicated. It's just the commonality between quantum consciousness and biological brain consciousness.

Quantum consciousness is a combination of quantum uncertain activities, which results in quantum consciousness. Human consciousness is generated by the neural activity of the brain, the brain's reflection on the objective material world, and the sum of various psychological processes such as feeling and thinking.

From a physical perspective, the number of calculations involved in both consciousness activities is unlimited.

Dad, you use consciousness simulation technology to let Aunt Mo simulate the feelings, thoughts, and other psychological activities of the mother ’s brain, so that the chaotic quantum consciousness slowly has the feeling, thinking, and various psychological activities of the objective physical world. Complete body of consciousness. Theoretically, it is possible for Aunt Mo's body brain to simulate Aunt Mo's quantum consciousness.

However, the most important question is: how to solve the problem of Aunt Mo's consciousness, not the second consciousness. Otherwise, when you wake up, you do n’t have the same consciousness, and you have an auntie. Mom and Aunt Zhao Min are desperately looking for you. "

In the end, Wushuang laughed badly and looked at Chen Mo ridiculously.

"The wings are stiff, even me?" Chen Mo tapped gently on Wushuang's head, very satisfied with Wushuang's opinion.

Now Mo Nu's body is growing rapidly, or it will be an adult body in a short time. At that time, the instruments of consciousness transfer technology will come out, which can directly transfer Mo Nu's consciousness.

"Dad, if the technology of life consciousness transfer is successful, it will open the door to eternal life." Wushuang realized a very terrible problem.

"Um." Chen nodded in the same way.

Once the life consciousness transfer technology is successful, as long as the organism is old, it is quite immortal to transfer consciousness to the new biological body.

"The purpose of our research on this technology is not immortality, it is just a derivative of the application of the technology."

chapters.title: Chapter 881: : War Is Tide
chapters.body:
Chapter 881: : War Is Tide

"Sir, it seems like a big guy."

The shuttle-type reconnaissance spacecraft is hovering in a star system, not far away is the planet being developed by the Marching Ant Group, Orion 9B.

It can be seen inside the reconnaissance ship that the planet is full of mechanical cities, and all the planets become, all intelligent machine production factories, and no intelligent life is stationed.

"The detector showed a concentrated reaction of dark matter and antimatter, and a suspected dark matter and antimatter warehouse."

"A warehouse of dark and antimatter?"

The black bear glared with small eyes and licked his tongue, showing a greedy smile. Dark matter and antimatter react collectively, which means that the planet has a large stock of dark matter and antimatter.

These two special substances are hard currencies in the Cosmic Alliance, and they need to be used too much.

Energy and materials.

The first-class prey is right in front of it. Radar shows that there is a lot of anti-matter on the planet. This ticket is done, and they can live for hundreds of days.

Now the black bear people see the image of the planet passed back, just like the fat lamb.

"Sir, not good, there is an ambush here."

Just at this moment, a panic sound came back from the reconnaissance ship, and then looking at the picture returned by the reconnaissance ship, I saw that a dense number of war robots were approaching the spacecraft and a space-based laser weapon was activated. The moment the laser lighted up, the picture of the reconnaissance ship disappeared.

The black bear man who was still surprised was instantly murderous and cruel.

For a moment, six Warframe Divisions popped out of the spacecraft's holographic light curtain. The six Warframe Divisions were all orcs, or looked cold or cruel. But there is one thing in common, the six of them all have unsightly eyes, and at a glance they know that they are extremely vicious.

The captains of the six branches of the Bear Wind Battle Group, all here. Each of the six team members is a carefully selected murderer and a senior armored division. The strength of each team is comparable to that of an ordinary advanced civilized army.

The entire Warframe Regiment appeared, and even high-level advanced civilizations were afraid of two points.

This is a battle group that licks blood in the universe all the year round. It is extremely fierce. Generally, advanced civilization is targeted and can only consider itself unlucky.

"Continue to launch reconnaissance ships and detectors to other life planets, check their civilization headquarters, I would like to see what kind of civilization is, and dare to fight back. When will our bear wind battle armour be in this kind of backward corner? Here, he will be beaten. "

The Black Bears are angry.

There is a dark matter and antimatter warehouse in the planet. This is a giant fat sheep. How can you miss it?

If those anti-matter and dark matter are won, the Bear Wind Battlegear Regiment can at least spend a short period of time without worrying about financial problems, and can comfortably live for a while, instead of rushing to find a civilized start.

This is just one planet, what about other planets?

Thinking of this, the bear bear's eyes glowed with greed.

"Kill it now and occupy this planet first."

...

"Hurry up for Lao Tzu, don't fret."

Da Mazu's loud voice exploded in the ears of each team member, and no one dared hesitate. One million soldiers entered the warship neatly, and no one dared to snub.

Nowadays, Matsu is depressed. She said something like "beauty smile" last time, but she was trained by the instructor for ten days, and her bones almost fell apart.

He was anxious about a place to vent his suffocation. Now it's better to come to a bandit. If he doesn't shine them well, he will be sorry for the 'special' training that has been taken care of these days.

In one hour, one million soldiers entered all twenty warships and slowly took off.

In a galaxy in the small universe, Wat Mu led the fleet floating in space.

"There is a Warframe coming out, should we help in the past?" The teammates couldn't help asking.

"No, the instructor has arrangements."

Wat Mu's eyes were staring at the galaxy in front of him. Radar detection showed that this galaxy has a relatively rich life planet. In a small universe, galaxies so rich in life are rare.

He is leading the youth reserve team. This team is more growth-oriented than the Warframe Division of the Great Devil's Troupe. However, it hasn't really taken shape.

The instructor meant to let them develop in the small universe,

After a while, the beep of the display appears, and the radar entering the galaxy sends back information about the planet of life.

Seeing the feedback, Wang Hai's expression was quite serious: "According to the planned development plan."

Around him, everyone nodded in unison.

"Unfortunately I can't participate in the battle. It's a bit upset."

"What's so bad about us is that we are not strong enough right now. Although we don't want to admit it, that's the truth."

"The standard armor is in hand. As long as we polish our training, we are not a dream to surpass those old fritters of the Big Devil."

"I love to hear these words. There is a saying in my boss's hometown: Don't bully the young. Wait until you've hone them in the future, and let the old guys see how powerful our handguards are."

The competition between the handguard group and the big devil group has begun to take shape, because when the instructor trains, he compares the two teams to let them unknowingly win each other as competitors.

As soon as this word came out, the guard group agreed.

The big magic group is stronger than them. They are often pointed at his nose by Lord Lan, and can hold his breath in his heart.

Perceiving the team's emotions, the corner of Wat Mu's mouth showed a touch of joy. They all knew that the instructors deliberately created a competitive relationship to stimulate the two teams. Looking at the effect now, it does have a lot of usefulness.

The team's public channel quieted down, and the attention of many players was placed on the video that appeared in their armor.

The galaxies they are going to develop are rosy and look pretty. I just don't know what kind of life is in this galaxy.

The team was over and the spacecraft quickly disappeared.

...

Various explosions and lasers are rampant in space, and war robots and various war machines encounter one another like tides.

The Black Bears don't look good. In this space battlefield, so far, they have not even broken through the defense lines of space-based weapons and war robots placed in space by each other.

As soon as the laser of space-based weapons came over, even their warships had to turn on the energy shield. There is also the rain-like intensity of antimatter bullets, which makes life see the scalp tingle.

Antimatter bombs in space, like festive fireworks, are not just brilliant.

What makes him even more desperate is that there are a steady stream of war robots being transported to their space battlefield by transport ships. The dense number of war robots, like marching ants out of their nests, is several times as many as the war machines on their side, and not only is it a large number, it seems that the combat effectiveness is not weak. The strength of almost every war robot is equivalent to intermediate war Division A.

The war robots carried by their spaceships collided with each other's war machines, and they simply killed themselves.

The Bear Wind Battle Group has invaded many advanced civilizations, but the level of war robots is limited, and it is difficult to create so many war robots at one time.

"Is there a way to get rid of each other's war robot?"

"For the time being, it is useful in addition to the large-speed killing of the light-speed weapon, but if we cast it, our robot will also suffer." The staff around him opened his mouth carefully, for fear of annoying the hot-tempered master again.

Things now seem to be moving in a direction beyond their control.

This unknown civilization is so powerful.

Data show that around the Pisces-Cetacean super galaxy cluster, there are three advanced civilizations, namely the Immortal civilization, the Whale civilization and the Pisces civilization, and he knows those three civilizations well, but there is no such terrifying war robot team.

The Rania Kea Super Galaxy does not belong to the territory of the three civilizations. It belongs to a land without owners. There are some low-level life, but I have not heard that there is any higher power than the three civilizations.

Is it a recent rise that has not been discovered by the three?

None of the first planets came down, they were stiffly blocked from the stellar line of defense. They can't afford it this way.

Cosmic robbers are never good at fighting attrition.

"Head, what do you do now?" The holographic projection of the captains of the six units of the Bearfight Regiment appeared on the side of the Black Bear and asked.

War robots are a real annoyance.

The dreadful eyes of the black bear man flashed insidious light.

"Wait for the feedback from the detectors and reconnaissance ships to see where their life headquarters are, and destroy their headquarters and Wenxing Ball with light-speed weapons. Everything will break."

"Don't ruin it, boss. Maybe their civilization has fairy life."

The insignificant werewolf grinned, seeing the black bear glaring at him, and hurriedly turned.

"Maybe there is ... what other antimatter and dark matter production technology, otherwise it would not be possible to raise so many powerful war robots and space-based weapons."

"Yeah." The black bear patted his head.

A word awakened the dreamer.

The prices of antimatter and dark matter are not low, and the cost of the two materials is too high. To maintain the operation of such a large number of war robots, only top civilizations with independent production of dark matter and antimatter technology dare to play like this.

Maybe in this civilization, anti-matter and dark matter production technology has been researched, but it has not been discovered yet.

This kind of thing in the universe is not absent. Several top civilizations are known to have unintentionally discovered that lower civilizations have anti-matter and dark matter production technologies. When the other party did not apply the technology, they grabbed the technology to rise.

He had a hunch that maybe this civilization might have anti-matter and dark matter production technology, otherwise it would not be possible to 'support' so many war robots.

If he masters this technology, it will not be a dream to become the top Warframe Regiment in the future.

Think of it and excite the bear.

The black bear licked his tongue, his eyes full of greed.

Didi ...

Not long after, the information from the probe appeared on the screen, and six solitary galaxies appeared in front of him.

chapters.title: Chapter 882: : Shoot For Lao Tzu
chapters.body:
Chapter 882: : Shoot For Lao Tzu

Zhao Min looked at the gorgeous space battlefield through the holographic video, with some admiration.

"Unconsciously, our group is so powerful. Now that our technology can cope with advanced civilization, it continues to develop. I am afraid that we will become a vassal in the future.

Xiao Yu said softly: "Now you are quite a prince."

"That's right." Zhao Min nodded for a moment.

Now the marching ant group is almost the same as a vassal in the space alliance.

Now that there is a small universe, the group can develop unscrupulously. Chen Mo returned to the earth and brought back a million alien researchers. Now he is fully assisting the research. As the research progresses, they are more and more horrified by Chen Mo.

Chen Mo's research and development capabilities are recognized on the planet. No matter what technology Chen Mo brings out, everyone will not be surprised, this is the most normal.

Marching Ant Group technology continues to explode, especially in weapon technology. In the galaxy, the stars developed by them are under the management of artificial intelligence and are spread across various war machines. Unless they are light-speed weapons, it is not easy to break through.

At present, hundreds of millions of war robots in the Bear Wind Battle Group are attacking in Orion, while Orion 9B is still like a rock in the strong wind, not moving like a mountain.

The two women did not worry about the safety of the earth, not only them, but the senior members of the entire marching ant group did not worry about it. They only watched the excitement through holographic video, which was their rare interstellar war.

Even if a light-speed weapon strikes, there is a certain time buffer. If they need to retreat, they can easily enter the small universe.

The stars around the solar system are scattered and belong to the local interstellar cloud. This hourglass-shaped local galaxy bubble region is dense in gas and scarce in stars. It has an interstellar medium with a diameter of about 300 light years, and the solar system is hidden in it.

No one could have imagined that the planet of their headquarters is in such a small humble corner.

Moreover, at the beginning, Zhao Min asked Mo Nu to design a lot of camouflaged life headquarters in the galaxy, so that when they came over to a high-level civilization, they would not easily find them and give them some time to retreat.

...

The images of the six planets appeared in front of the black bear people. The bustling planet was like a young girl, and appeared unsuspectingly in front of the black bear people.

Seeing this, the black bear was ecstatic, and his impatient expression became more impatient.

"Kill it."

Order, the fleet in space quickly disengaged from the team, the space folded and opened, and passed towards the quadrant where the six planets appeared.

The life of the Bear Wind Battle Group was as excited as the blood of chickens, and it seemed likely that the next moment would be a victory.

In the space where Orion is located, the fleet has long been scattered. Only the home team led by the Black Bears is here. The six teams are in various quadrants, and they are thinking of directly capturing the planet of Life Headquarters.

The rich and prosperous planet is in front of them, and the lives of all the bear wind and armor groups are extremely exciting. If they looted these planets, and their bear wind and battle armies salvaged again, they would become more powerful.

The six teams entered the stellar system where they went so smoothly that they did not even encounter any resistance.

No, there is no weapon.

Something is wrong.

Seeing the galaxies returned by the six teams, the black bear people's faces were all black hair.

If it were the planet of the headquarters of life, it would not be possible to take no precautions.

Too much.

The Black Bear Man almost shouted.

Just at this moment, there was a change in the images returned by the six units, which made him slightly surprised. Taking a closer look, he changed his expression instantly, and the madness in his eyes faded away, leaving only fear.

In other words, a bee colony of war robots surrounds them. Objects suspected of meteorites in space are all war robots.

The illuminated laser, like the light from hell, is particularly dazzling.

Everything was silent, like a long sword, the purple laser pointed directly at the spaceships of the six detachments.

The captains of the six teams were frightened when they saw the warning from the quantum radar. Now I want to urge the spaceship to fold and escape, but it is too late and not enough time to activate the energy shield.

Almost at the same time that the energy shield was activated, the space-based laser irradiated the energy shield.

The slower spacecraft was directly burned through by the laser and exploded in space.

Gorgeous light exploded in space. Members of the Bear Wind Warframe Regiment inside the spacecraft, wearing battle armor, scattered in space with the spacecraft fragments. The remaining space-based lasers are still firing. Many Warframe divisions' laser armors are cut by lasers like tofu. The limbs fly in space and then become nothingness in high temperature.

In the team channel of the Bear Wind Battle Group, you can even hear the screams coming back, and then be silent.

Boom boom!

Several other teams, the same happened, the ship was swept by laser.

The blue-scale armor of the Warframe Division was soft like tofu in front of the ultra-high-energy space-based laser, and it was instantly shredded and smashed into space. In less than ten seconds, tens of thousands of Bear Wind Battlegear Warframe Divisions were shredded by lasers.

The fleet was in a short mess.

The opponent's laser, like a sharp blade, cuts into the cream and crosses the fleet. A dozen spacecraft disappeared in the first round of attacks, and tens of thousands of members died in space.

Seeing the entire process of the black bear man, his round eyes became blood red, full of wickedness, and boundless anger.

"Kill them."

The Black Bear Man has completely turned into a runaway black bear, pressing the button of the speed of light weapon. The captains of the other six quadrants roared at the same time, turning on the button of the Lightspeed Particle weapon.

At the same time, the spaceship's energy shield level is set to the highest.

Chaotic space battlefield.

At seven locations, the detector can find a sudden high-energy response, a devastating weapon is brewing, and almost all war robots stop to open the energy shield to the highest level.

Fifteen minutes later, a light spot was radiated from the spacecraft. It can be found through the detector that the light spot contains a terrifying energy group.

The next moment, the light spot exploded in space, and the light dazzled billions of times brighter than the sun exploded in space. If the sun exploded, a stream of horrible particles would rag throughout space.

Wherever they go, the energy shield of ordinary war robots can't resist the flow of horrible high-energy particles at all, burns in the particle flow, evaporates, and turns into nothingness.

In just ten minutes, the entire stellar galaxy passed by has become red, and the oxygen-rich life planet has become a piece of scorched earth.

A large number of war robots in space were burned in a stream of high-energy particles.

Seeing this scene, Lan was somewhat surprised.

When Damazu saw the information returned, his expression changed, but he did not expect that a group of robbers actually had weapons of light speed, but it was unexpected to him.

Fortunately, they lost war robots, and the other war machine was not lost.

It was quite reluctant, knowing that the war machine could not fight, and it was destroyed with weapons.

"Just now, jump over."

Da Mazu ordered that the spacecraft jump directly to the space where the battlefield is.

Light speed weapons are different from ordinary antimatter bullets. They are not tens of thousands of rounds per second, and it takes a certain amount of time to prepare and launch. It is now in neutral.

In other directions, Da Mazu did not care.

All developed stars are like a fortress. Without completely destroying the stars in the stars, it is impossible to capture the stars. At that time, the god-level civilization did not dare to attack the star fortresses arranged by Lan. Even if many stars in the Milky Way are not as scary as the star fortress of Shi Ganxing, a cosmic band wants to attack their star system, and it is simply death.

If the resurgence occurs, the planets in the other six stars, a continuous stream of war robots are emerging, and the space-based fortresses that survived the particle weapons have also revived.

On the other side, the Fleet of Great Devil successfully jumped to the space battlefield where Orion 9B was located, just like a long-awaited tiger and wolf appeared in the space battlefield.

The bear wind battle group who had not had time to be happy, seeing this scene, his face changed greatly.

Da Mazu's speed is extremely fast. They are the first high-level armored division of the marching ant group, and their responsiveness and mobility are compulsory.

The advantage of top-level battle armor is that it can resist the attack of high-energy particle weapons, and even if they can cause damage to them, they will not be too much.

This is their first battle and must be beautiful.

The war robots were the pioneers. The belly of the fleet, a steady stream of war machines were launched again, swarming towards the fleet of the Bear Wind Battle Group. Of the other six stars, a steady stream of war machines has emerged and is rapidly approaching the fleet.

"Line up."

As soon as Da Mazu ordered, the entire Devil's fleet, all the soldiers trained as usual, will open the array.

"Ready to attack."

The results of the training of the Big Devil were revealed this time. The whole team was like a wolf group showing its fangs, and the position was set apart, relying on the space battleship, pointing directly at the Bear Wind Battle Group.

Various weapons exploded.

"Legion? Is this the legion?"

The moment the Black Bear Man saw the big devil, his eyes were bloodshot and shocked.

They flow through the interstellar universe, and naturally know what forces civilization they can provoke, and what forces can't provoke them. A civilized army is not so provocative. Some powerful advanced civilized army can make them lose a lot.

It seems to have hit the iron plate this time.

Fortunately, the number of opponents was not large, only one million.

What can a million soldiers do?

His Bear Wind War Armor Regiment, 10,000 spaceships, 50 million War Armor Division, even if divided into a main six vice seven team, each team has a lot of people. And he is now leading the home team, with as many as 10 million Warframe Divisions, ten times the opponent.

The distance between the two sides is only 20,000 kilometers, and the distance is not too long. They can be reached very quickly. The speed of light weapons cannot be activated, and the sea-ocean tactics can kill the opposite.

Warframe divisions are different from war robots, each of which has sufficient ammunition, and war robots are too severely consumed. The military of top-level civilization and god-level civilization has a lot of weapons and means to deal with war robots, and can even control war robots for their own use.

There are many other reasons, such as the limited number of ammunitions, so many forces are tacitly afraid to let war robots carry full-scale weapons, otherwise if a war comes down, once the other party has weapons to control war robots, the losses will be great.

The combat effectiveness of the 10 million Warframe Division is much stronger than that of the 10 million war robots, and the two are not comparable at all.

The Black Bear did not hesitate to order to open the spacecraft cabin door, and the members inside appeared like locusts. The team lacked command and there was no formation at all. They swarmed like a bee and walked towards the big demon group. The space was instantly robbery.

"Hey, a bunch of idiots."

Da Mazu smiled coldly when he saw the members of the Bear Wind Battle Armor rushing over.
