"Be prepared for violence, shoot Lao Tzu."

chapters.title: Chapter 883: : Lan'S Red Date Wolfberry Tea
chapters.body:
Chapter 883: : Lan'S Red Date Wolfberry Tea

Countless antimatter has popped up into space, densely packed, and the position of the launch can be seen on the radar screen, showing a fierce red reaction. The number of bullets is like an endless bee colony.

The Warframe Division of the Bear Wind Battlegear Group was instantly dumbfounded.

Isn't such a terrible antimatter bullet cost money? When is an antimatter bullet like a stone that doesn't need money?

There is not much room for thinking, and the horrible anti-material bullet rain makes the armour divisions of the Bear Wind Armor Group cold. Now it was their Xiaomi plus rifle, and they encountered a gatling shot across from him.

Just firepower, the two sides are not on the same level.

The turbulent team of Bear Wind Warframe Divisions, under the rapid warning of Warframes, was uniform. The first reaction of all Warframe Divisions was to escape from their location.

At least 100,000 soldiers fired in a volley, and antimatter bullets of such intensity and density would have no bones if submerged.

When the cosmic robbers were so long, they had plundered many high-level civilizations. Even the stronger high-level civilizations, they also stabbed peaches. No high-level civilization has had such terrible firepower.

Panic, fear occupies the bear wind armor division,

In the large devil group, there are 200,000 soldiers equipped with [violent madness], the first round of volley is 100,000 [violent madness], one [violent madness] 10,000 anti-material bullets in two seconds, one round volley, one billion Antimatter bullet.

One billion anti-material bullets, what a terrible number.

This is the first battle of [violent madness]. Lan means to let the bear wind armor group try the sharpness of the standard armor.

The radar screen is full of alarm sounds, a whole large area, all of which are antimatter bullets in an activated state.

This time I really mentioned the iron plate.

The black bear was cold, his firepower exceeded his imagination.

A round of volleys of one billion anti-material bullets, one billion, not one hundred thousand, is such a tyrant in top civilization? What if these antimatter bullets exploded between their teams? ?

The black bear shivered.

"Fire a high-temperature particle bomb."

Want to destroy large-scale antimatter bullets, high-temperature particle bombs.

The surface of the antimatter bullet does not have the protection of an energy shield. The excited antimatter bullet can be destroyed on a large scale. This is a very effective way to face this kind of antimatter bullet rain, otherwise it can only escape.

Two thousand spaceships were instructed by the Black Bear. If they woke up at first, they hurriedly opened the high-temperature particle bombs and volleyed in a round towards the area where the antimatter bullets were located.

Buzz ...

The silent 'fireworks' exploded in the space area between the two teams. The light was ten thousand times brighter than the sun. The horrible radiation caused all the public channels of electromagnetic communication to fail, and dialogue was only possible through quantum communication.

Stopped the terrible anti-material bullets, but the Warframe Division was not happy.

"Everyone be careful, there are still many bullets."

The shout was still echoing in the Warframe Channel.

The range of high-temperature particle bombs did not completely cover the area of the antimatter bullets, and there were still countless bullets flying towards them. They looked dignified one by one, frantically firing and detonating the antimatter bullets where they hit them, trying to cut a high-temperature line of defense to block the antimatter bullets.

As long as the antimatter bullets do not hit them directly, the plasma cannot penetrate their energy shields.

The Bear Wind Warfare Cluster is also a little famous in the Pisces-Whales Super Galaxy cluster. Tens of millions of members, and several advanced civilizations want to destroy them, they are also worried.

Over the years, the fierce reputation of the Bear Wind Battle Group has accumulated a little bit. I have experienced many battles and know how to deal with various weapons.

To marching ants, they are afraid of the unknown.

They have been licking blood at the blade for many years, and they all know what forces can provoke them and what forces can't provoke them.

This unknown force is just the firepower just demonstrated, and it is the one who is not easy to provoke.

Gorgeous explosions illuminate in space, flooding the entire space, no sound transmission, but under the devastation, it is a danger of terror. Even if the explosion range and power of this type of antimatter bullet is not large, there are too many.

The Warframe Division who rushed to the front was beaten.

He was hit directly by antimatter bullets, and the armor was not discussed. Normal materials could not be prevented.

The death of nearly 100,000 Warframe Divisions has made the scene even more chaotic.

They have plundered all the year round and experienced countless actual battles, but this does not mean that they are not afraid of death, but they are more aware of death. So their sense of panic, under this horrible fire, started to get out of control.

Dodge where the team members gather and dodge towards other parts of space. Once close to the gathering area, it will become the preferred target for bullet rain attacks.

The continuous flow of anti-material bullets flickered happily on the radar display screen, and the kind of alarm echoed in the ears was like a life-giving sign of death.

Explosion, fear, death!

The battlefield in space makes the members of the Bear Wind Battle Group like headless flies.

[Violent Frenzy] The first battle opened the curtain of massacre.

...

"It's really wasteful." Lan sat in the battle room and watched the chin with a laziness. "But the low utilization rate of war bullets is understandable."

He murmured, but there was no sign of worry on his face.

Orion is their place, and the Big Devil is equipped with top-level armor, and has received professional space combat training. If he loses to a group of black people, he does not need to speak, and Da Mazu takes off his armor and jumps to the sun.

However, this group of interstellar gangsters who are not too strong and not weak are good targets for sharpening.

Get the new recruits familiar with the Legion mode of space wars.

"Xiao Xun, come and bring me a cup of tea." After being bored, Lan commanded him: "The planet of the boss, life is not advanced, but there are many tricks for those who eat and drink."

The cricket behind him heard the name ‘little cricket’, smiled slightly, and made a cup of tea and handed it to Lan.

Jujube wolfberry tea! This is Lan's favorite.

After the small universe was connected, Xun was usually bored and didn't want to be in charge. Then he came to Lan as an assistant. Don't think too much about it, just give him bubble tea, hit him, and learn something by the way.

In Orion's space battlefield, the Bear Wind Warfare Regiment has suffered millions of casualties under the unreasonable bombing of anti-material bullet rain. Even with high-temperature particle bombs and other high-temperature isolation, there is still no way to completely destroy the endless bullet rain and fish that leak through the net.

Missing a bullet is a threat.

The battlefield in space has become purgatory, and the life that you see has no mood and pity the life inside. Either comrades-in-arms or enemies were present. Facing the enemy, they will not sympathize with a touch of compassion.

But the scene in front of them still made them feel the terrible war. Within the battlefield, the despair, fear, and dust of those bearbearer divisions disappeared into space like dust, and that feeling was not friendly.

For a long time, after the first round of antimatter bullet rain exploded, the space battlefield was re-opened after the light had dissipated in space. The sight in front of us let all the life we saw breathe in.

Nearly 10 million members of the Bear Wind Battle Group were beaten up in the explosion.

Under the radar detection, many of the images they retrieved were stumps and limbs scattered in space, and there were even Warframe Divisions who had not completely died and struggled in space.

It is roughly estimated that the armor divisions of the Million Bear Wind War Armor Regiment were directly hit by antimatter bullets in a round of salvo, and turned into nothingness energy particles in the horrible explosion.

call! The soldiers of the Big Devil whispered. They can even hear the whispers of their comrades in the team channel, and some incredible mutters.

They were a little surprised by their attack.

When training, do not dare to use all anti-material bullets to train and shoot, otherwise the solar system will be scorched by them. They were also the first time they saw the volley scene.

"Top Standard Warframe."

The black bear who came back was cold in his hands and feet.

He realized a very serious matter. This unknown force is not equipped with ordinary armor, but with standard armor, or top-level armor.

This is beyond the scope of his cognition.

The first round of bullet rain covered the armour divisions of the Bear Wind War Armor Group, and they wanted to escape, but couldn't escape. In space, there is no speed of light flight and space folding, and flying away wearing a armor is dead in space.

If you retreat, the commander in the spacecraft will kill them directly. Fleeing or fighting has become their biggest contradiction.

Just as they panicked, the next attack quietly began.

Didi ...

The Quantum Radar of the Warframe suddenly alarmed, and super high energy was appearing at various locations in space. This is a cue signal for ultra-high energy pulsed laser activation.

This reminder means that the laser attack is coming.

A little bit of light suddenly appeared in their field of vision. A series of purple lasers across space fell into the battlefield, like a chain of death, coming to seduce.

Ultra-high energy purple pulsed laser.

There are tens of thousands of roads, up, down, left and right, front and back, and from all directions. In space, there is no southeast or northwest at all.

【marksman】

In the first round of attacks, the 50,000 Sniper Warframe Divisions of the Great Devil had already searched for the best attack location on the battlefield.

The energy level of nine hundred terawatts in milliseconds allows [Shooter] to directly burn through the energy shields of ordinary high-level armors. Even if the top warrior comes over, he is also afraid of joint attacks from [Shooter].

In space, silent killings are going on, and time seems to be slowing down. The body of the Warframe Division in the laser spot of the "Shooter" was burned through, and some screams were too late. He lost his voice and consciousness, floated in the universe, and maintained inertia.

The screams in the team channel became the last straw that crushed the Bear Wind Warframe Division. Their fears were frozen on their faces, and only the screams in their ears disappeared one by one.

The vast space seemed a bit scary.

It's over!

Despair was in the eyes of the black bear.

chapters.title: Chapter 884: : Kill Everything
chapters.body:
Chapter 884: : Kill Everything

Longka feels terrible. The opponent's war robots are constantly flowing, and the number is beyond imagination. Looking at space now, it is a wave of robots.

There are big and small robots, the big ones are normal humanoid machines, the small ones are only the size of a fist, and the structure is very simple.

A thruster with a laser pulse or a small antimatter bullet.

The number of these machines is too large and the threat to the spacecraft is too great. Unless a large-scale weapon is used, it is a headache. But large-scale weapons cannot be used indiscriminately. Now these robots are not far away from them, and accidentally even affect themselves.

The space around the spacecraft is a tide of robots, even if it is scalp at first glance.

This means that the entire stellar system is under the control of the other side. Unless the stellar system is completely destroyed with weapons, it is impossible to capture and occupy the stellar system.

Only then did Longka find them naive.

Their so-called force is a joke against this horrible defense. He wasn't sure how long the 7 million Warframe Division in his team could resist.

As the Armored Regiment, they are not as powerful as this unknown civilization. There are countless various weapons, and their weapons are limited.

Now Longka wonders how long they can last. There have been casualties in the team, and once the weapons are exhausted by the robot, the consequences are unimaginable.

He began to win the confidence of this unknown force. At this time, it had already disappeared. Now he can escape without any problems, and he is very satisfied.

The best way to deal with this tide of machines is to use a large range of anti-matter bombers, because only part of them have energy shields, and those without energy shields can be destroyed in the bombing.

The problem is that their anti-matter bombs are limited and will spread to their spacecraft as the tide approaches. It was too late to escape, they were surrounded.

"Put a dense metal," Longka ordered.

There is another way to deal with the sea tactics of the machine, and it is to hit hard. The collision of dense metals and machines can instantly destroy them, which is also a weapon for them.

Dense metal is a dense structure of particles. There are no gaps between the nucleus of the atom. It is extremely hard. This is what they accidentally grabbed from a caravan.

Dense metal has become an important means for them, but unfortunately not many, only they have a team. Usually rarely used, because this thing is used once less.

Rhombus-shaped smooth metals emerged from the fleet, with hundreds of thousands of them. This is all of their dense metal, with thrusters installed at the rear for acceleration.

Didi ...

Just at that moment, a loud notification sound came from Longkaer.

The next moment, Longka was still thinking about how to deal with the Longcha of the machine. His expression changed, her face was incredible, and there was fear.

"retreat."

Ronka shouted almost hysterically, with panic in her voice.

This is the first time he has been so gaffe. Before, the Bear Wind and Battlegear regiment licked blood at the blade and encountered various troubles. He would never be so panic. The news just made him completely lose his place.

This unknown force, like an abyss beast, is opening its mouth and biting at him.

Boom boom! !! !!

Silent explosions are blooming in space. Crazy machine waves and dense metal meet together. This is the most primitive collision. The fragments are flying in space.

The retreat and offensive instructions were handed over, leaving the players in the Bear Wind Battle Group in a dilemma, for a moment they messed up.

On the battlefield, this is deadly.

The Sea of Machines approached the first spacecraft and blasted off the spacecraft's energy shield.

Getting the Sea of Machines close to a spacecraft is deadly in war.

The space around the spaceship has turned into a sea of fire, and even with a powerful shield of energy, it has an impact in the face of a crazy explosion. The magnetic field on the explosive field affects the magnetic field of the energy shield, allowing some machines to pass through the energy shield smoothly.

Boom boom! !!

The hull of the several-kilometre spacecraft began to be destroyed during the explosion, and the energy shield was eventually broken under multiple attacks. The spaceship protected by the energy shield is like a girl without clothes, and is thrown into a group of big men.

The surging sea of machines shattered the spacecraft in an instant. The first spacecraft disintegrated, and the tide of the machine flew towards the other.

It's over.

Seeing the raging tide of machines, Lonka looked stunned, and finally turned into an unruly giggle.

boom!

...

escape!

The six units of the Bear Wind Battle Group were destroyed, two of them were destroyed, and the remaining four units, like dogs of the family, were completely unruly and arrogant when they came.

The destruction of the two main forces made them completely trembling.

I thought this was a group of fat lambs, but now they found out that this was a group of hungry wolves in lambskin. This is a trap, everything is a trap.

The Bear Wind Battle Group is over!

The Pisces-Whale Bear Wind Battlegear Regiment is destroyed in this humble corner of Pisces-Whales.

The goal of the marching ants is clear, destroying the spacecraft.

Space war is the most important.

In the interstellar war, the most foolish thing is to launch the spaceships and warships into the enemy's attack range, or the defense lines laid out by others, and stop without leaving immediately.

Destroy the spacecraft. In the space of light-years, these Warframe Divisions have to wait for death and become as powerful as they are.

Kill everything!

The idea of unknown civilization made the captains of the few remaining units in the Bear Wind Battle Group reckless.

Fear spreads.

Some Warframe Divisions refused to get on the spacecraft, and fled in space while wearing warframes, because they knew that they would definitely not be able to escape in the spaceship. They could only die faster, and the fear in front of them made them forget that without a spacecraft, they could not fly out of it. Piece of space.

...

Perseid galaxy group.

It is 250 million light-years away from the Milky Way. The galaxy cluster is composed of more than 1,000 galaxies. The Perseid galaxy group covers about 15 million light-years.

In the Pisces-Cetacean super galaxy complex, Perseus is one of the three advanced civilizations.

It is also known for its Pisces Pisces civilization and Whale Whale civilization. The remaining strong civilizations are the Jade civilization and the Pegasus civilization.

In this remote corner of the universe, the advanced civilization here is like a tyrant in the countryside. There is less competition for advanced civilization, so the space territory will be large.

If it is located in the center of the universe civilization, it is unlikely that an advanced civilization wants to monopolize a 13 million light-year group of galaxies.

Yingxian civilization is a humanoid dynasty civilization.

The hero of the imperial civilization, the royal building group, a naked man sitting on the throne, with strong bronze muscles, hair as thick as fingers, and there are colored lines on it, like small snakes hanging on the shoulders , Beard, gray eyes.

He is the king of the immortal civilization: Bor Hughes.

"Bearwind Battle Group is destroyed?" Bolhus was very surprised to hear the report.

The Bear Wind Battle Group is in Pisces-Cetus, which is a troublesome group of interstellar bandits.

The Pisces-Cetacean complex is located in a remote part of the universe, almost half enclosed in the KBC void.

Kibokao's void range is nearly 2 billion light-years, making it the largest void in the universe. The galaxy in the hollow is extremely scarce and life is extinct, so the Rania Kea Super Galaxy, surrounded by the hollow center, is known as the paradise of life and also called the **** of life.

The Pisces-Cetacean civilization is not well developed and was discovered by the Universe, so they are invited to join the Universe. For the Universe, there are quite a few towns here. The civilization and forces here need to develop, and it is necessary to transport anti-material energy and various other products from the prosperous region of the universe.

The Bear Wind War Armor Group often fights against the caravans that transport all kinds of goods and materials, and the strength is not weak. The members are as many as 50 million. Civilizations also need a lot of energy to destroy the Bear Wind War Armor Group, and their counterparts are uncertain Make the civilization here very uncomfortable.

"When did this happen?"

"Just a few days ago, the exact time was not determined."

"Who destroyed them? Pisces civilization or whale civilization?" Bolhous asked.

The report's subordinates shook their heads: "I don't know. I only know that they were destroyed, as if they were on the Virgo side, not in the Pisces civilization and the Whale civilization."

"Not in Pisces civilization or Whale civilization? Is it because they found the bear's nest and quietly destroyed them?"

Borthus was extremely skeptical. If one of the two had the strength to quietly destroy the Bear Wind Warframe, Yingxian Civilization, as a civilization that has long complained with them, had to guard against it.

"Are there any recent developments in the two corps?"

"The intelligence officer responded, no." The reporting subordinates shook his head with certainty.

Bolhus tightened the sword in his hand and thought for a moment: "Send someone to the Virgo to find out where the bear wind destroyed, and determine which one destroyed them."

...

Within the marching ant group, only a small-scale training exercise on the destruction of the Bear Wind Warfare Regiment was followed by a brief attention, and everything returned to normal. This victory is nothing to celebrate.

The strength of the two is inherently asymmetric, and there is nothing to be pleased with. On the contrary, it was a big magic group, with more than a dozen wounded people, washed by head to toe by Lan's spitting star, and then facing more brutal training.

In Lan's words, fighting with a child with a big sword can be injured, and it will be shamed to his hometown.

The normal operation of the former marching ant group resumed.

In Chen Mo's laboratory, the research also went further, and Mo's body matured.

chapters.title: Chapter 885: : This Time It ’S True.
chapters.body:
Chapter 885: : This Time It ’S True.

In the laboratory, Mo Nu's body was pinched inside the artificial uterus.

Gene editing, cloning technology, in vitro embryo culture of artificial uterus, and growth catalysis, a variety of technologies are combined to complete the body of Mo Nu.

Now mature.

The body functions and physiological characteristics are all mature. The body catalyzes the rapid growth of the body through the medicament, but the physical characteristics of the body are intact.

Through artificial amniotic fluid, we can see that Mo Nu's body has baby-like skin, perfect peaks and peaks, and long hair drenched in amniotic fluid, which is enough to make every woman jealous.

The face is similar to Mo Nu's current appearance. The physical appearance is not the same as that of the current country, but it still belongs to the flawless level. It looks sweet and soft, and has a little baby fat.

Before the body awakens, the body's consciousness is still in a state of chaos. Once the body is awakened from the artificial womb, the baby will be born, and the brain will instantly generate another complete consciousness. It will be very troublesome for the Mo woman to shift in.

When the consciousness transfer technology is completed and Mo Nu's quantum consciousness is transferred into the body, Mo Nu will become a real living body.

Intelligence is aware of the transformation between life, which is unprecedented.

Chen Mo switched off the instrumental data of the artificial uterus, and he now has the vital signs of Mo's body. The brain and body are fully developed and very healthy.

"The body's sexual characteristics have matured, and the growth has stopped accelerating."

"Okay, Mo brother." Mo Nu nodded, looking at the body inside, with some expectation.

Make sure that Mo Nu's body is mature. To truly create Mo Nu's body, only the most critical technology remains: consciousness transfer technology.

...

On the two main lab benches of the consciousness shift laboratory, two monkeys were lying.

One is a living experimental clone monkey, and the other monkey is still lying in the artificial womb. The monkey was artificially accelerated and used for experiments.

Before the consciousness transfer technology matures, it must undergo a large number of tests to minimize the chance of failure, because it is related to Mo's consciousness.

This kind of experiment, Chen Mo did not choose humans and intelligent alien life to conduct, but chose primate monkeys. It was a bit inhuman to choose humans for the experiment. Chen Mo was arrested and used to be a mouse.

And this technology is too special, Chen Mo did not choose volunteers to do it.

A complex instrument is connected between the two main laboratory benches. Two instruments are connected to a super-quantum computer to calculate the effect. Only a superquantum computer can afford the amount of calculations between the two brains, even if it is just an animal without intelligence.

The instrument has a neural connection system, which can connect the brains of two bodies. By stimulating the nerves of the experimental monkey, it stimulates the memory of the experimental monkey. Through the neural connection, the memory is written into the brain containing the pen body Inside.

Mo Nu's quantum consciousness can inscribe the memory and thinking consciousness into the new body directly through the neural connection system.

The instrument is very complicated. This is not as simple as virtual reality technology, but involves the most mysterious organization of the brain. The god-level connection system uses artificial nerve fibers to conduct electrical signals from human nerves. There are dense artificial nerve fibers on both instruments, each of which is only tens of microns in size.

These artificial nerve fibers can enter the cerebral cortex and then connect to the god-level in the brain. Here, the help of nano robots is also needed to accurately locate the god-level of the cerebral cortex.

"It's started." After Chen Mo watched the condition of the experimental monkey's cerebral cortex, she let Mo Nu start.

The precise connection of each area of the brain is an extremely cumbersome task.

According to Chen Mo's instructions, the artificial nerve fibers that are indistinguishable to the naked eye slowly dangled in the cerebral cortex of two monkeys that had been craniotomy.

One, two, four, eight ...

Everything is in order.

Hundreds of thousands of artificial nerve fibers were all connected to the cerebral cortex of the experimental monkeys in accordance with the location confirmed in advance.

"Ready, Mo Ge." Mo Nu said.

"Well, start to stimulate the cerebral cortex." Chen Mo nodded gently.

A little bit of weak current starts to stimulate the cerebral cortex. This kind of weak current stimulation can activate cellular memory and let the organism ring out certain pictures, even the forgotten pictures you think.

Memory is the most important part of thinking.

Chen Mo, Mo Nu and Wushuang watched quietly.

Wushuang participated in this research, because Wushuang has a deep understanding of neural consciousness connection and can keep up with Chen Mo's research, so Chen Mo asked her to participate in the research and teach her by the way.

"Dad, Aunt Mo is quantum consciousness. Now experimenting with biological brain consciousness, will there be too much error at that time? After all, the nature of the two is very different." Wushuang has understood Aunt Mo's consciousness generation Can't help but be a little confused.

Quantum consciousness is a combination of quantum entangled states, while biological consciousness is a combination of neural conduction and brain memory in cells. The two are similar in some cases, but strictly speaking, they are two different properties.

"Memory, emotions, desires and thinking are the same, and consciousness is the same person." Chen Mo said: "Consciousness is the same, but the material carrying consciousness is different. The two are different in essence but have the same things."

"What's the same?"

"Electrical signals." Chen Mo pointed to the instrument's nerve electrical signal fluctuations.

...

Xiao Yupan was sitting on the sofa, Chen Mo was holding a hair dryer to blow her hair, and the family was in the hall, but Wushuang and Wuming were brothers and sisters who were playing chess.

"Are you in trouble?" Seeing Xiaoyu looking at Wushuang's sister and thinking, Chen Mo asked.

On the other side, Zhao Min, who was leisurely watching various reports of the group, also stopped and looked at Xiaoyu.

"Wushuang is too clever, the junior high school knowledge is over, the school teacher can't teach it. He was too young to be sent to high school, he is not his peers, he is not growing up properly, he is easy to be proud or precocious, and develops an extreme personality." Xiao Yu said.

"So you think?"

"I'm thinking that since no one doesn't like studying and studying, and martial arts, I'll give you a guide and change the way of education. After all, this is not the previous global environment."

Xiaoyu looked at his sister and brother who were playing Go.

"You said."

Chen Mo and Zhao Min both listened.

The education of the family and children was the responsibility of Xiaoyu, and Wushuang was brought out by Xiaoyu. Chen Mo and Zhao Min only coached them, and the decision is still with Xiaoyu.

"Before his personality is set, he must have the environment for his peers to grow up and develop a complete mind. Now he is studying about knowledge, and he is not in a hurry to send him to high school. Let him stay in the current school first, and follow him after class. Jing Ge learns martial arts, or goes to interest classes, learns other interests with his peers, grows knowledge. Then guides some of his martial arts hobbies. "

"How to guide?" Zhao Min asked.

"I like martial arts, but I cannot become a reckless husband. Every family has a great career. So I want to guide him. If he likes martial arts, let him develop martial arts. Wushuang and Mo Nu taught him Go, and when he got older, sent him to the military academy for further studies, and then thought of ways to get Lan to accept him as a student. "

"Lan's requirements on the students are not low. Don't look at him sometimes, he's very strict on important matters."

"There will be a solution at that time." After that, Xiaoyu was distressed. "Except for my parents, I'm the stupidest person in the family now."

"You are not stupid. You are the master of the family. We are all in charge of you. Chen Mo, a clever guy who goes to the sky, is obedient to you." Zhao Min laughed and said, "Your name is 'Da Zhi Ruo Yu' Small fisherman. "

"My husband said I was stupid."

"That's stupid stupid, I can't hear it."

Chen Mo rolled her eyes.

Xiao Yu smiled and looked at the ink girl who was watching Wushuang's sister and chess: "How is the experiment today?"

"It's going well. It won't be long before she can transfer her consciousness. By then she will have her own body."

"This time is really 'realistic'." Xiao Yu said sourly.

"Hahahahahaha ..."

"..."

Zhao Minle was crazy, and Chen Mo was messy in the wind.

...

Little universe.

Gorgeous galaxy in space.

Wang Hai ’s fleet was suspended, and he was responsible for the development of the first quadrant of the small universe.

The pace of developing a small universe is accelerating, and every time a galaxy arrives, the spacecraft will probe. In order to confirm whether there is civilization in the small universe galaxy and conquer development.

This small universe will be built into the private territory of the marching ant group.

"Wang Hai instructor, it has been detected clearly that this galaxy has twenty planets of life."

"Go to A1 first." Wang Hai pointed at the nearest life planet to him.

The fleet started and disappeared into space instantly.

chapters.title: Chapter 886: : Super Special Connection
chapters.body:
Chapter 886: : Super Special Connection

One hundred light years away from the Shigan galaxy, a spacecraft suddenly appeared on the main star of the Shihe galaxy.

The spaceship is very ordinary, not a warship, but an ordinary space curvature spaceship. However, one sign is particularly obvious. The sign of the Shigan galaxy is on the ship.

This is a spaceship from the Shigan galaxy.

A man walked out of the spacecraft, the armor was a little ragged, the position of the mark was severely worn, and the seam of the entire armor was very embarrassed. The purple-blue skin above the neck seemed to have thunder and lightning flashing, and the light in the pupil flashed, making people dare not look at each other.

Men are not others. They are the messengers that the Thunder God civilization once sent to the Shigan galaxy, and the thunder that disappeared in the Shigan galaxy.

Thunder, as one of the high-level successors of Thor's civilization, is also a rare genius of Thor's civilization, but Dan's light masks the light of everyone else, so his reputation is not widely known.

There was an accident in the Shigan system. Because Dan's death has attracted the attention of the entire universe, the news of other Warframe divisions of Thor's civilization in Shiganxing has not been noticed.

Thunder's disappearance also makes people think that he and Dan died in Shi Ganxing.

It was taken for granted that Thunder was killed by Shi Qing by Tong Qing along with the team of Thor civilization.

Thunder at this time, a little more strong on his face, Lei Guang flashing in his eyes looked very strong, the pride that had once disappeared from his body, and became much calmer.

Thunder holds a microcomputer in his hand, and is broadcasting news that Dan was killed by Tong Qing. Glancing dumbly for a long time, Thunder's strong face shed tears of silence.

"Brother Dan, the black pupil civilization will pay the price."

Shut down the microcomputer and close it. Thunder raised his head and resumed his calm look.

"What the **** are you talking to here? Don't get in the way." An unfriendly voice sounded.

Thunder turned his head, the life that just wanted to get angry, met Thunder's gaze, and the male duck who wanted to be pinched on his neck, instantly dumb, stiffened. The Thunder ignored him and walked away.

"Do you feel like that humanoid was terrible just now?" It took a while for the man who was being watched to return to his thoughts, and he was a little scared looking at the back of Thunder.

The Thunder returned.

The news caused a little uproar.

Shortly afterwards, a shocking news spread the waves of the All-Cosmic Alliance.

The old king of thunder civilization, who has been in charge of thunder civilization for 50,000 years, announced his abdication and passed the throne to thunder. The substitution of the god-level civilization's ruler is of great significance to the Universe.

The character, style and means of the new superiors are all related to the future situation of the Universe Alliance, especially in this particular air port.

The Thor and Baixing civilizations are fighting the black pupil civilization, and the war has affected several constellations. The new superiors are also the survivors of the Shigan galaxy. This has to make people doubt that there will be a full-scale war between Thor and Black pupil civilization.

Thunder came to the fore, and among the folks of the Thor culture, controversy also emerged. Some people of the thunder civilization began to attack the thunder and became deserters in the battle of Shi Ganxing, so they left Shi Ganxing in good health. This kind of person is not worthy of being the new king of thunder civilization.

In this regard, the Thunder did not publicly have any response.

The ascension ceremony was just ten days after the old King of Thor's civilization announced his abdication.

The ceremony went smoothly.

In front of the cameras of the universe's major platforms, Thunder took over the Thor's Warframe, which symbolizes the supreme power of Thor's civilization, and officially took over the Thor's civilization. As the general staff officer of the thunder **** civilization, the first time Thunder thundered the throne, on behalf of all the soldiers of the thunder **** civilization army, said that he would obey thunder's command.

The position of the thunderous civilization's military has become the last reassurance, meaning that even if the thunder takes the controversial position, the power is still solid.

Soon after the Thunder took office, the first decision was issued with the attention of the All-Cosmic Alliance.

A battle post.

The Thunder posted a battle post to the speaker of the black pupil civilization, Hei Weifu Luoyun, to challenge him. If Vivo Luoyun does not accept the challenge, the Thor civilization will fight against the black pupil civilization in all directions. Ruowei Luoyun accepted the challenge, defeated the Thunder, and the grudges in the Shigan galaxy were cancelled.

This is undoubtedly a shocking bomb to the already smashing Space Alliance.

This is the first time in the history of the Universe that a single challenge post among the leaders of a divine civilization. The battles between the heads of civilization in the past were either in the game of war or in the battle of the legions.

There has never been a one-on-one battle between two god-level civilization leaders.

Even if there was a single challenge example that shook the history of the Universe Alliance, the Black Stone War between Zijun and Thunderfire, they were not the highest leaders of their respective civilizations.

The position of the leader of the divine civilization is crucial, and if something goes wrong, it may lead to chaos in the entire civilization.

Many people have begun to guess what the Thunder did.

It is clear to the outside world that before the appearance of Tong Qing, Weifu Luoyun was the strongest armoured division of the black pupil civilization, almost at the level of the legendary armoured division. In the entire universe, it can be compared with only a few Each.

The Thunder is just an outstanding genius of the Thor civilization. Although it is a top armor division, it is still a certain distance from the legendary armor division.

Vive Luoyun's winning side is large, and he is also a loser. The outside world thinks that it is the step that Thunder gave to the black pupil civilization. Once Thunder loses, the black pupil civilization can rightly end the war with Thor civilization.

Within the thunder civilization, the thunder's prestige was not high at all. This command spread, and the thunder civilization's insults and questions from thunder civilization became even more frightening.

Wivroun took the post.

...

Squeak!

In two separate laboratories, the two monkeys were screaming, looking at the object in front of them, a little alarmed.

This is the monkey of the consciousness transfer experiment.

Both monkeys are very healthy. One is the body of consciousness, and the other is the carrier of consciousness.

It is now testing conditioned reflections.

Monkeys are not intelligent beings. They cannot tell whether they have successfully transferred their consciousness, so they set up a conditioned reflex before the experiment. Just like some people are afraid of bugs, so the conscious transfer body is also afraid of bugs, because consciousness and thinking are the same.

They tested ten conditioned reflexes that require monkeys to learn the day after tomorrow, and the carrier monkeys of consciousness transfer made the same conditioned reflexes as the ontology.

It is now determined that the transfer of consciousness was successful.

"Mer, there is a very special place." Mo Nu suddenly said, pulling Chen Mo's thoughts back from the monkey.

"special?"

As soon as Chen Mo's eyes were fixed, this experiment, in order to ensure the success rate, would not allow a formal experiment to be performed without questions. This is about Mo Nu.

"Monitoring of brain waves shows that the brain waves of the two monkeys are often the same, almost identical."

"Oh?"

Chen Mo's eyes were fixed on the brain waves of the two monkeys.

After the transfer of consciousness, the two monkeys are regarded as two individuals. They used to have the same memory and thinking, but the laboratory environment they are in now is different. After that, they will develop like a fork in the next minute of life. Different lives have different consciousness, like two people in a parallel world.

Are the brain waves of the two individuals the same today?

Will this special phenomenon occur during the study of consciousness transfer? Or is there a difference between experiment and theory? Suddenly, Chen Mo raised an eyebrow, and he thought of a very special possibility.

"Mo girl, stimulate the body monkey with electricity." Chen Mo said.

In the laboratory, the electrically stimulated robot is approaching the monkey, but Mo Nu is puzzled: "Mer, why?"

"Remember that you and Xiaoyu used to have the same dream without a neuroconscious connector?" Chen Mo said, "This consciousness transfer experiment may have some kind of super special connection between the ontology and the carrier. . "

"telepathy?"

Squeak!

Squeak!

Mo Nu's doubts just fell, and two exclamation screams sounded in the two laboratories.

chapters.title: Chapter 887: : Transfer Of Consciousness
chapters.body:
Chapter 887: : Transfer Of Consciousness

Xiao Yu and Zhao Min were present in the consciousness transfer laboratory, which was very important for them.

In this special 'surgery', once the surgery is successful, Mo Nu will become a real life, and they will welcome a real new family member.

With the exception of the two, only Wushuang was present, and no one else had access to the technology of consciousness transfer.

Wushuang is right. In a sense, the technology of consciousness transfer is like the key to the door of eternal life, which is a very scary technology. Once leaked, the marching ant group may face any kind of trouble.

Because eternal life is the temptation that most life can't refuse. Even the life of god-level civilization with tens of thousands of years of life, it is definitely a huge temptation to transfer this consciousness to eternal life.

Xiaoyu and Zhao Min both looked at Mo Nu's body carefully, and were curious.

At present, Mo Nu's body is still in the artificial uterus, and the position of her skull has been treated, exposed outside the artificial uterus, and exposed to the instruments of consciousness transfer. She cannot wake up until the consciousness shift 'surgery' is completed.

Through the amniotic fluid, we can see that Mo Nu's body looks similar to what she is now. She is still very beautiful.

In the future, the baby fat on the face will be removed, the skin will change, and a little makeup will not be much different from now. This precise appearance gene control is incredible.

This body was completed using the most advanced medical and biotechnologies of Marching Ants.

"Chen Mo, how sure?" Zhao Min couldn't help asking.

Chen Mo shook his head.

"Uncertain. Involving the 'major operation' of the brain, especially this particular special operation, everything is unknown and uncertain. However, in the monkey's consciousness transfer experiment, seven cases succeeded and one case failed.

One of the failures was the third. During the experiment, the brain of the carrier monkey was found to be dysplastic, with congenital problems, and failed. The experiment of carrier maturity has a high success rate. Mo Nu's body has undergone a comprehensive examination. All physiological characteristics and functions are mature. In theory, there will be no major problems. "

The two women nodded gently, and continued to look back at Mo Nu's body without disturbing Chen Mo.

It's almost time now.

"Start surgery."

Through the glass windows, they could clearly see what was going on inside the operating room. This technique is not something that a simple surgeon can do, and the artificial nerve fibers used for consciousness transfer are only a few tens of micrometers, which is beyond human control.

The whole process must rely on the machine to operate through the data fed back by the machine.

Anesthesia, craniotomy.

The machine completes these steps quickly.

Soon, the brain was exposed to instruments of conscious transfer.

Under the control of the machine, everything is methodically connected to the conscious connection instrument of the core of Mo Nu's quantum supercomputer. Slowly near the brain, hundreds of thousands of artificial nerve fibers land on Mo Nu's brain.

There is something special about Mo Nu's consciousness transfer surgery. Mo Nu is quantum consciousness. Artificial nerve fibers do not need strict connection of brain regions to regions. They can plan the determined location according to the connection of artificial fibers.

And even if the consciousness transfer operation fails, there is no impact on Mo's consciousness because of her special reproducibility. Unless the super quantum chip that contains the core of her quantum consciousness is completely destroyed, her consciousness will always exist and can be copied Come out and shut down.

"Mer, the connection is complete."

Hundreds of thousands of artificial nerve fibers were successfully connected to the nerve fibers of the brain according to the predetermined location of the brain region.

At present, the neural electrical signals of the body of Mo Nu's body are very primitive. Except for the natural non-conditional reflections of the living body, the other conditional reflections are blank.

"The transfer started." Chen Mo said to Mo Nu.

On the instrument, the data is beating wildly. The memory of Mo Nu begins to enter the hippocampus of the brain through electrical signals. With the stimulation of these electrical signals, the brain stores these memories with specific cell groups and chemical components.

Once the brain's electrical signals stimulate this group of cells and secrete specific chemical components, the memory of the cell group will emerge.

Massive electrical signals are continuously stimulating the brain of Mo woman's body. Instrument data shows that the consumption of nutrients in Mo's body is being consumed at a rate three times higher than usual.

These data include sensory cognition such as smell, feeling, vision, and touch, as well as advanced psychological activities such as thinking and imagination, as well as daily behavioral activities such as work, study, and life.

Smell, vision, feeling and touch, Mo Nu's current body does not exist, but when consciousness was established, Mo Nu passed through Xiaoyu's 'bridge' to simulate cognition.

After consciousness, Mo Nu's thinking and imagination of these advanced psychological activities, all other activities are like humans, except for eating.

Since Chen Mo, Mo Nu has produced a large amount of memory data.

These data will become electrical signal data to stimulate nerve cells in the biological brain, just like computer program code, into video and audio.

Chen Mo is still calm, always watching the changes of several important data.

"Increase the supply of nutrients."

The weight of the brain is only 2% of the body's weight, but it needs to consume 20% of the total body energy. Now it is a large amount of data input, and the energy consumed is much higher than usual.

"Husband, how long does the operation take?" Xiao Yu walked to Chen Mo and asked in a low voice.

"About fourteen hours, what I have to do now is to wait, as long as there is no problem with the data transmission, it is smooth." Chen Mo touched Xiaoyu's hair: "You sit and wait first, this process is a bit long, if you can go out first deal with."

"I'll wait here. I'm fine. Sister Zhao Min has a little more business. I can handle it. I'll tell you to come over soon." Xiao Yu said to Zhao Min.

The two women were communicating, and Chen Mo continued to focus on the data.

...

"The life planet of a star-level scientific civilization."

In the first quadrant of the small universe, Wang Hai, who was sitting in the seat of the commander, saw the condition of the life planet not far away, and was instantly shaken.

Stellar science and technology civilization lives.

This is the most civilized planet they have encountered since they explored the universe.

Most of the lives they have found in the small universe are in the nascent stage of life or non-intelligent life. Even in the case of intelligent life, civilization is underdeveloped, and the highest civilization they have seen has only reached the shape of the earth two hundred years ago.

The discovery of a stellar civilization now means that their technological civilization has reached a certain level, and they can sail between stars.

This is the initial stage of cosmic exploration. The science and technology of the earth can develop leaps and bounds because the space curvature engine developed by the boss has inadvertently docked with the universe alliance system.

"Send the detector over." Wang Hai ordered immediately.

This time they came to develop the universe, just to control the universe.

Lan's instructions were very clear. When he discovered the intelligent life, he tried to subdue it for his own use. Destroy those who cannot overcome or bear resistance. All they need now is a loyal, intelligent life and Warframe Division, and then take complete control of the Universe, making this their back garden.

This small universe is the foundation for preserving human existence, and it is also the foundation for their defense against god-level civilization.

Ten probes left the spacecraft and headed towards the locked life planet.

chapters.title: Chapter 888: : Mo Girl Waking Up
chapters.body:
Chapter 888: : Mo Girl Waking Up

The star of the life planet is three times larger than the sun. The fourth planet on the star is the Wenxing ball detected by the probe.

An orc-like civilization.

The characteristics of the beast-like life are the appearance of beasts, just walking upright and possessing wisdom.

There are dozens of national symbols on this orc-like life planet. The symbols of these kingdoms are all specific patterns: the heads of certain beasts, some beasts are not named, they look strange, but they have fur and are easy to recognize.

Each kind of symbol represents the kingdom of the orcs.

In those kingdoms, the main intelligent life and inhabitants are the beast-like lives that mark their own kingdom. Beasts are different from beasts. The appearance of beasts is human-defined beasts, but the claws of beasts are not the claws of beasts, but have flexible fingers like humans.

Only with flexible hands can the wisdom of the brain be realized, otherwise tools and technological civilization cannot be produced.

In the universe, every planet of life has experienced natural selection for countless years since its evolution. These common characteristics are the result of universal selection.

"Instructor Wang Hai, this is the situation of another life planet, also ruled by this orc-like civilization."

He He organized the information and passed it to Wang Hai.

Four light years away from this star system, there is another star's life planet.

Seeing the information, Wang Hai frowned.

"This planet has a kind of human race. After the planet was discovered by this beast-like planet, it sent troops to occupy it. The human-like intelligent civilization there was destroyed and the human beings were treated as food for livestock." Hega said, feeling a bit heavy.

"Captive wisdom life as food?" Wang Hai stared at the information returned by the detector, his expression was relatively stable, but his heart was a little uncomfortable.

As a human being, eating meat to kill is normal, and he doesn't think there is anything wrong with it.

However, the Universe has regulations. Non-intelligent life can be eaten, but intelligent civilization cannot be regarded as food. Even if it is kept in captivity as an experimental body for life evolution research, it must also provide a complete social system and guarantee for intelligent life.

Now that he heard that the life of intelligent civilization was kept in captivity as food, he saw the life and death habitually, and he was a bit resistant to this situation.

"Also, wearing human skin and feeding milk is like humans raising cattle and sheep and milking skins."

Hearing these messages, Wang Hai was unmoved, and the other way around, it is not surprising that beast-like civilizations in the universe eat humanoids of non-intelligent life: "For those humans, where does civilization develop?"

"It seems to be a totem tribe that has been enslaved for more than two hundred years."

"Send people in contact with this beastly planet, point directly, surrender or destroy, and give them a day to choose from."

...

"It has been confirmed that the approximate location of the destruction of the Bear Wind Battle Group is in the Milky Way."

His men wanted to report the latest intelligence situation.

"We found that the troops of Pisces and Whale civilizations did not enter the vicinity of the Milky Way. The old nest of the Bear Wind Warframe was also not in the Milky Way. The remnants of their old nest were civil strife, and the Warframe Division escaped to confirm that their old nest was in Sagittarius. It is the looting of our civilization, but it was accidentally destroyed in the galaxy. "

"The Milky Way? Where is the Milky Way?" Bolhus kept thinking about the information about the Milky Way.

"The Andromeda galaxy is next to the Andromeda galaxy, with a distance of 2.5 million light-years and a relatively remote location." His men reported truthfully.

"That position? Is there a high-level civilization in that position? What forces have the ability to easily destroy the Bear Wind Warframe?"

For the first time Bolheus felt incredible.

The Pisces-Cereus complex is so large, with only a few advanced civilizations and advanced lives. In addition, the Kibokau hollow next to the Rania Kea super galaxy is an inanimate zone, and the sparse galaxy also leads to scarce life there.

I have never heard that there is a high-level civilization in that position, or a high-level force that can compete with a high-level civilization.

"Is the force in the galaxy clear?" Bolhus took it seriously.

"It's a bit frowning. After investigation, we found that there are indeed traces of high-level civilized activities, but we haven't probed deeply."

If advanced civilization and advanced forces are located, that galaxy is a private domain. They rushed to detect, and once found, it was a manifestation of hostility. Detective personnel need high-level instructions before they dare to enter other people's territory to detect.

"Go look it up," Bolhus said for a moment.

Pisces-Cygnus comes with a high-level force, and it is still unknown to them, which can cause some worry. Even if they are advanced civilization, they must always be embankment.

...

"Is there an unknown force by the fairy star?"

Under a giant Mercury whale in the whale underground, in an extremely luxurious building, the giant mermaid, the king whale civilization of the whale civilization, is equally confused.

The whale civilization is a sea-like civilization. As one of the three major civilizations of the Pisces-Cereus complex, they have an undisputed right to speak in this region.

There are only a few civilizations here, many galaxy areas are divided up, but one area is special, is the Rania Kea Super Galaxy Cluster.

It is remote, there are few intelligent lives, and the space is complicated. Their antimatter is limited, the development value there is not too high, and they are stared at by several civilizations, and other civilizations dare not rashly develop.

It is strange that an unknown force suddenly appeared at that position.

They don't even know where this unknown strength came from, and how long it was there. There is an unknown civilization on the side, which is very bad.

"Let the detectives contact them and ask them where they came from." The fisherman waved at the Bosai Dynasty, signalling that he could leave.

The palace quieted down before Bosai thought about it.

...

The data is still beating wildly. The amount of calculations of quantum supercomputers is huge every second.

This situation is due to human memory and thinking.

Even if human beings just perform a simple blinking reflex, the data and calculation involved in it are beyond horror. Now Mo Nu's body is receiving all the memories since Mo Nu's consciousness. Such data and calculation amount can be imagined.

Nowadays, the shift in consciousness is at a critical moment.

Once successful, it is the true creation of human beings, and Mo Nu will also become the first human being in the history of the earth, and consciousness is created from nothing. This is a fabulous ability, and it is achieved with technology.

Xiaoyu and Zhao Min were in a quiet war, both hands clenched, waiting anxiously. Their eyes did not leave the data of the instrument. Although they could not understand the usefulness of the data, they were also afraid of problems.

Now they dare not disturb Chen Mo, for fear of any sudden problems.

Towards the end, the two became more nervous.

Wushuang was waiting beside the two women, always waiting quietly, checking the data of the instrument from time to time.

Chen Mo's expression was calm, but she was not so calm on the surface. This is the last step of Mo Nu becoming a human being. It is very special and of great significance. For a long time, there has been no such kind of excitement after the results of research and development. With the results of previous research and development, Chen Mo will be particularly excited to celebrate, and now he is numb.

As for Mo Nu, she was standing beside Chen Mo, looking quietly at the body in the glass window, and looking at Chen Mo from time to time, her eyes were exactly the same as Xiao Yu's eyes looking at Chen Mo.

Half an hour later, the transfer of Mo Nu's consciousness was completed and getting closer.

"Dididi ..."

The cue made Chen Mo and others in the 'operating room' instantly shake.

"Mo Ge, it was successful." Mo Nu smiled.

Mo Nu's tips made several people ecstatic. Xiao Yu, Zhao Min and Wushuang had jumped with joy, Chen Mo smiled relaxedly and watched a few of them cheering and celebrating.

"Wake up the body." Chen Mo said immediately.

I saw the outer skin of the artificial uterus was cut, and the artificial amniotic fluid inside it all flowed out. After the skull operation, with the help of nano-robots and medical fluids, the wound healed at a speed visible to the naked eye and recovered as before.

Immediately afterwards, Mo Nu's supercomputer loaded with the core of quantum consciousness stopped the operation of quantum consciousness and fixed the thinking consciousness and memory in this second.

Unless that special situation occurs, after her 'body' wakes up, her quantum consciousness is still working, and then it will split into two different consciousness bodies, 'biological consciousness' and 'quantum consciousness', which is quite equivalent. Two people, Mo Nu and Chen Mo, didn't want that situation.

The amniotic fluid ran out, and the Mo girl lying on the operating table had a violent chest undulation.

Wow!

A crisp cry sounded through the operating room.

chapters.title: Chapter 889: : New Life Of Mo Nu
chapters.body:
Chapter 889: : New Life Of Mo Nu

Crying with heart and lung awakening, this is the instinct of new life. With the appearance of crying, Mo Nu officially became a flesh and blood.

The cry stopped.

Mo Nu is inhaling and exhaling, her chest is undulating and her heart and lungs are completely awake. Her eyes were half-squinted, and she had just woke up, and the light had a great irritation to her eyes.

Half-squint eyes could not stop her curiosity about the world.

For a long time, Mo Nu, who was accustomed to the light, lay on the experimental table, and slowly opened her eyes.

A pair of ink-black pupils flashed a little bit of luster, as pure as obsidian, and under the long eyelashes, it was extremely flexible and flawless. Mo Nu's eyes rolled around and she looked around. For her, everything now feels completely different from looking at the world through sensors, radar, and cameras.

Chen Mo, Xiao Yu, and Zhao Min were both in her field of vision.

"Ah ah?"

Mo Nu made a jerky voice and seemed to be trying to learn to speak. The language control of the living body's brain is different from that of the machine body. Just entering this body, Mo Nu has not yet mastered fluent language functions.

"Mum ... Mum."

"Success."

Xiao Yu laughed excitedly when Mo Nu shouted Chen Mo's name clearly, and she seemed to see something remarkable.

However, they watched the Mo Nu change from an artificial intelligence program to an intelligent life, and now to a real life form. Chen Mo created a complete life form out of nothing, which is simply incredible.

"What does it feel like?" Chen Mo asked.

The prepared nano robot covers Mo Nu's body, and a set of clothes is formed to outline the curve of Mo Nu's body, covering the landscape exposed to the air.

"Very ... magical, very special." Mo Nu slowly raised her hand, looked at her palm, and shook it.

For her, the world now gives her a completely new feeling, which is completely different from the time of intelligent consciousness. In her previous knowledge, everything was cold and temperatureless, now everything is true.

With the help of Xiaoyu and Zhao Min, Mo Nu was sitting on the experimental bench, and was somewhat unstable, leaning on Xiaoyu.

The current Mo girl is like a newborn. In addition to mature thinking and physical control, she is still in the newborn period. She needs to learn and adapt through the brain to fully control her body.

"Yes ... the mind ... the telepathy."

Mo Nu's eyes flickered, very pure, and she tried to spit out the words clearly.

She turned to look at the computer screen in the laboratory.

Chen Mo also followed her sight. The quantum consciousness that the core of the super quantum computer has just stopped running, beating again, massive amounts of data are being crammed into the intelligent core.

The amount of these horrible data is the current mental consciousness data of Mo Nu.

"Can you sense the core of quantum consciousness?" Chen Mo asked.

"Yes." Mo Nu nodded slightly.

Telepathy was discovered in a monkey's consciousness transfer experiment. After that, each pair has telepathy. That connection is very special, and Chen Mo can't understand it, and can only be classified as a superpower that has not been fully interpreted.

"Awareness ... thinking ... same." Mo Nu tried hard to clarify her words slowly, intermittently.

"Same consciousness?"

"Um." Mo Nu nodded slightly, her eyes did not leave Chen Mo's body for a moment, with attachment in her eyes.

Understand clearly, Chen Mo was a little surprised, telepathy existed in the experimental stage, and the experimental monkeys had telepathy. Chen Mo could not explain it thoroughly, but only classified it into mysterious superpowers.

I did not expect that quantum consciousness and biological consciousness now have telepathy, and they are still the same thinking, which is more magical.

But it will not be able to be interpreted at 1:30 now.

Now the most important thing is to make Mo Nu adapt, not to discuss the research issues. After Mo Nu fully adapts, then research and exchange will be much better.

Zhao Min and Xiaoyu also held Mo Nu's hand, kneaded curiously, and turned to ask Chen Mo: "Don't worry about this. Mo Mo now has a successful operation. Is she going home to adjust to the body or to observe in the laboratory?

"Let's go home, now you are in stable condition." Chen Mo said, looking at the data of the instrument.

...

"According to information, the approximate location of the destruction of the Bear Wind Warframe is here, the Milky Way."

Reporting news from his men, Popovich stared at the surrounding star map, thoughtfully.

At the order, the Quantum Life Quantum Detector turned on, and the distribution of life stars across the galaxy appeared on the map and was marked.

The detection range of the Xinghe detector is one million light-years. It belongs to the middle and lower level detectors, which is used to detect the life of galaxies. But in Pisces and Whale, it is already a better life detector. Here in a small corner of the universe, the civilization system is not as rich as those of the top civilizations and the centers of the universe.

More advanced detectors require a large amount of star coins to be purchased, and the imperial civilization cannot afford a large number of star coins.

"Captain, we entered the galaxy without saying hello. Will it annoy them once this is their territory?" One of the men asked carefully.

"Just rest assured, Pisces-Cygnus, our fairy civilization is not something they can provoke."

Popovich was a little careless and didn't take his words to heart. Although they are not as rich as those advanced civilizations in the center of the universe, in this little corner, they also have a bit of right to speak, just like the village tyrants.

"Captain, there is a spaceship approaching."

An exclamation rang through the entire control center of the probe ship, and also interrupted Popovich's thinking. All the players' expressions froze on their faces, staring in horror at the fleet appearing on the screen.

...

"The life of that planet refused to communicate with our team members and attacked us as intruders." The command center of the Wang Hai Fleet received a reply from the team members.

In their communication with the beast-like star ball of the small universe, they were attacked as intruders.

The opponent rejected the option of surrender.

As expected.

In the development of interstellar, this beastly civilization chose to slaughter, enslave, and captivate the life of another planet, and it will be thought that that situation fell on them.

They are also afraid of being enslaved and kept in captivity.

"Confirm the language, do they understand?" Wang Hai asked.

"Confirm that we entered the twelve beastly languages of their planet with a translator and then communicated with them. But they refused to communicate with me, attacked us with missiles and lasers, and claimed to use nuclear bombs to kill us.

"Destroy the intelligent life of this planet." Wang Hai gave a cold order.

"Everything?" Asked He He beside him.

"All."

"Understood." He congratulated, leaving the spacecraft at the command center.

Disobedience is destruction.

This is the most efficient method in small universe development.

They need to take complete control of this small universe, tolerate no accidents, and no threats are allowed in the small universe. This is their most important core territory.

As the order was issued, several spacecraft disappeared in place, appeared in the stellar system where the beastlike planet was located, and a steady stream of war robots landed towards the beastly planet.

Along with it are nanobots.

A cold massacre is being staged on the beast-like planet of the small universe.

chapters.title: Chapter 890: : Bitter And God
chapters.body:
Chapter 890: : Bitter And God

The probe of the imperial civilization.

Lan, the combat headquarters of the solar system, quickly determined that the spacecraft entering the galaxy for exploration were the surveyors from the British civilization.

"It looks like the Immortal civilization knows something."

Lan put out the materials and star maps of the civilization of the immortal, looked at the holographic star map, thought for a moment, then put away the star map. There is not much mood swing.

"So what do we do now? Would you like to kill them?" Da Mazu grinned.

Now Wat Mu, Wang Hai, and others are developing the small universe. The big demon group he led is responsible for the galaxy's mobile defense and battle, plus a militant, it is a bit impatient to hear the Yingxian civilization.

Lan shook her head and directly broke Da Mazu's fantasy: "Don't worry, the destruction of the Bear Wind War Armor Group may make Pisces-Whale civilization aware of our existence. When it is time to start the war, we can start the war. The longer the quiet The better for us. "

They offended several god-level civilizations, and once the location was not completed, the trouble would continue after they were exposed.

As Lan wanted to drink tea, I put down the communicator in my hand and interrupted him: "Instructor, Instructor Wang Hai came to the news, there was a major discovery in the universe."

"What did you find?"

...

Lan overlooked the life of this fuchsia planet, and was extremely surprised.

This is a humanoid who is captive in captivity by the beastlike planet. His skin is indigo blue, slender and slender, with a small tentacle on his head, but he has no clothes on his body and looks dirty, like a savage.

The name of their ethnic group is ‘bitter people’. This is what the beasts call them, because the soil of this planet has a bitter taste, and the soil contains a bitter microbe. This planet is also called bitter star.

"Top life."

Arashi was surprised because the "bitter man" on this planet is top life.

This is a higher level of life than a higher life, closer to a divine life.

Top life in the main universe, belongs to the 'middle class' life, there are a large number of top civilizations and some powerful large force groups, born senior warframe divisions, have the potential of top warframe divisions, and have top order life , Will be recruited and cultivated by the great forces.

This is undoubtedly a huge gain.

Humans on Earth need large-scale use of superpowers to develop medicaments in order to evolve to god-level life. At present, human beings still have scientific and moral restrictions, which are not suitable for large-scale use of superpowers to transform into war soldiers.

In space warfare, a large number of advanced armour divisions are needed. The top life on this planet is undoubtedly the pillows sent by the marching ant group when they dozed off.

"There are about 5.2 billion bitter people in captivity in the life of orcs, and there are 3,000 large communities in all corners of the planet, just like sheep. Orcs will regularly grab some as food. According to the description of orcs, their meat taste Good, so I like to eat very much. It is also cultivated in Beast-like Stars and is a high-end ingredient. "

Wang Hai reported the numbers to Lan.

Listening to Wang Hai's report, Lan's gaze swept over the human being, not knowing what he was thinking. Before long, Lan said, "Well, contact the boss."

At present, the development of the small universe is at a feverish stage. The defense of the entire marching ant group is deployed by Lan, and Chen Mo is rarely disturbed.

The planet in front of them was a dense, horrifying humanoid.

This scene made Chen Mo a little confused.

"what's wrong?"

"The top living communities are still civilizations."

Lan gave the humanoid information to Chen Mo.

"According to the records of the beastly planet, such bitter people are very clever, but they have been enslaved for too long. The embryonic civilization has just been locked up and destroyed, and their wisdom is still in the tribal era."

"you think?"

"Incorporate the people of bitter people." Lan explained: "They are top-level life, the brain responds quickly, and is a natural senior armor division. And the bitter people are slender and sturdy, they are agile, and they are born with the embryo of warriors."

"You should be able to decide on this matter, and tell me not to say it, right?" Chen Mo asked.

"We need ways to make bitter people willing to be loyal to us."

Chen Mo suddenly became curious: "What method?"

"Boss, what do you think is the most effective way to subdue a life group?" Lan looked at Chen Mo seriously, looking forward to his answer.

"Technology can control it?"

"That's slavery and control. They can't make them feel convincing and useless. We need to make them loyal to us mentally and consciously. Instead of using technology, it can be achieved only by monitoring and oppression. Sometimes it can be counterproductive."

Chen Mo thought for a moment, and said with some uncertainty: "belief?"

"Yes, faith."

"Is this related to me?"

Seeing Lan's smile, Chen Mo knew he was right.

There are many beliefs, and the civilization of the free growth of the entire universe has beliefs. Someone, fictional god, ethnic ruler, some kind of totem or something of special significance.

"Civilization and forces without faith, without long-term development foundation, are easy to collapse. On the contrary, having faith can increase cohesion. The country where the boss is located, Earth China, is a civilization-level belief.

In the whole country, all people do not believe in a certain deity or someone, but in the cultural will of the entire civilization. It is a kind of cultural cohesion. That kind of civilization-level belief is the highest-level belief of the universe. For those who have a civilization-level belief, as long as they have a platform, their development will not be too bad. "

Said, Lan looked at the bitter people who were captive on the planet by orcs.

"The bitter people's ethnic civilization has not yet taken shape, and the ethnic ideology has not yet taken shape. It is quite an excellent embryo. They have not yet developed civilization-level beliefs. As long as we guide their beliefs and manage them with their own beliefs, they are easy For our use. "

"How to guide?"

"Build the boss into the **** they believe in."

Chen Mo hesitated, he never expected that he would become a belief in other life.

"I'm not god?"

"The word" God "is a vague concept. As far as I know, the God understood by the earth can call the wind and rain, move mountains and fill the sea, fly around the earth, live forever, create the world, etc. Boss, these conditions, you It can be done now. What is the difference between you and God? "

Lan pointed at the bitter man below.

"For these bitter people, the boss you killed the animal-like civilization that enslaved them, rescued them from the fire and water, and you are their savior. Give them a good living environment, help and education, and make their lives more and more OK, you are their 'God'. "

"..."

Chen Mo looked at Lan, and for a moment did not know how to answer, as if it was justified.

"I asked the three ladies, and they agreed with me."

"Then what am I going to do now?"

"Kill some beasts, and then make a handsome and majestic image, I pick some bitter people to let them spread your achievements in the bitter people group, then do some incredible things, and then build your deities and idols for them believe."

"How do I feel like a **** stick." Chen Mo laughed.

"The method is useful, regardless of his black cat and white cat. And we can be a god-level civilization in the future. They are also citizens of the god-level civilization. They have infinite benefits to their ethnic group."

Chen Mo made no comment.

At the same time, a news that shook the Universe Alliance appeared. The challenge between the new king of the thunder civilization, Thunder, and the speaker of the black pupil civilization, Vivro Yun, was divided.

The Thunder defeated Wavroyun and cut off one arm of Wavroyun in the battle.

The news spread that the Universe shook up and down.

chapters.title: Chapter 891: : Hitomi Reappearance
chapters.body:
Chapter 891: : Hitomi Reappearance

The victory and defeat of the Thunder and Wivroun's appointment has an impact on the Universe beyond the imagination.

The Thunder's strength is close to the legendary Warframe Division, and this news is one of them. There is also one of the biggest doubts, the Thunder did not choose to kill Vivo Royun, but sent him away after the victory, which caused the puzzle of the entire universe.

Hitomi, a black pupil civilization, killed Dan, the first heir of the thunder civilization, in Shi Ganxing. If Thunder kills the speaker of the black pupil civilization, there is nothing wrong, and it is still bright in the contract, but Thunder did not do so. Let the outside world be puzzled.

Soon, some strategists commented on speculation in the cosmos news platform.

The reason why Thunder did this was because he was worried that he would attract reckless revenge from the black pupil civilization.

Once Vivo Luoyun is killed, then the Thor civilization will face the anger of the black pupil civilization, the two sides will fall into an endless situation, and they are still attacking the white star civilization of the black pupil civilization. They will happily withdraw from the attack on the black pupil civilization, letting both of you die.

If you choose to let go of Vive Royun, there will be far fewer such concerns.

The most important thing is that it has hit the morale of the black pupil civilization and the prestige of Vivero Yun in the black pupil civilization.

really!

The impact soon appeared, and within the black pupil civilization, because of the failure of Vivoroyun, morale was hit as never before, and the entire civilization fell into a depression of failure. This failure is unacceptable.

It was at this time that the situation of the Universe Alliance changed again.

The Baixing civilization chose to attack the black pupil civilization strongly and expand the battle against the black pupil civilization. The panic in the cosmic alliance intensified. When the outside world thought that the black pupil civilization would fight back against the white star civilization, another unexpected news appeared.

The thunder civilization chose to join forces with the white star civilization to launch a violent attack on the black pupil civilization.

It was originally thought that after the Thunder and Vivro Yun contracted the war, the grievances between the two sides were cancelled, but obviously, the Thor civilization did not intend to stop there. Now that the morale of the black pupil civilization is low, Vivo's prestige is greatly damaged, and the prestige of the Thunder in the thunder civilization is soaring. Now it is undoubtedly the best time to start with the black pupil civilization.

Both Baixing civilization and Thor civilization have an unprecedented toughness towards the black pupil civilization.

The two parties joined forces to expand the war, making the situation of the black pupil civilization extremely passive.

What Heitong Civilization did in Shi Ganxing greatly reduced its popularity in the Universe. No civilization will help Heitong Civilization at this time. In addition, the black pupil civilization is facing the cooperation of two god-level civilizations. When other forces participate in the war, they push themselves into the fire pit.

As the battle expanded, the General Staff of the First Army of Civilizations asked for leave, disappeared in front of the top of the Middle Army of Civilizations, and did not take up the post of the General Director of the Middle Army of Civilizations, while the famous general of the Third Army of Civilizations, Black Star, was ordered to die , To take over the post of Chief of Operations Command.
