Soon, the front line of the Pygmy Super Galaxy was breached, and Hei Ling, the general staff of the frontline of the black pupil civilization, was assassinated, and there was no chance of escape. This news, if the weather is thunderous, hits every heart of the black pupil civilization.

Under the combined attack of the Thor and Baixing civilizations, the defense line of the black pupil civilization is fragile, and the army and space battleship of the two parties are approaching the main constellation of the black pupil civilization.

In the past, the black pupil civilization, like the sun and the sky, became turbulent.

Some vassals of life and power groups in the field of black pupil civilization are already thinking about the way out, and some lives are planning to leave the field of black pupil civilization.

The man turned back to stare at the black hole in space. He was a little tired in his spirits, and took care of himself to organize his clothes. It was the pupil Qing who was ordered to enter the black hole by Vfro Yun.

"grown ups."

"How's it going?"

"The black deer super galaxy fell, Black Zero died, two siege, and the black pupil civilization was in a messy position." Tara responded truthfully, and handed him the information during the time that Tong Qing was locked in the black hole.

"Ha ha."

Tong Qing smiled coldly, but just glanced at the data randomly.

"Sir, what shall we do now?" Tara asked.

"Where is the old speaker?" Hitomi asked.

"Now the old speaker is holding an emergency meeting at Heitongxing, but the old speaker lost the Thunder to the Thunder, and now his reputation is lost." Tara said.

"Is it Thunder?"

"Sir, what's it like inside the black hole?" Tara just followed Tong Qing, her face full of colorful lines was curious.

Tong Qing didn't care much about Tara's words, but just smiled slightly.

"In a black hole, time and space are twisted so much that it only takes a few seconds. But it is very uncomfortable. The body ca n’t bear it and is torn into atoms by the black hole. In just a few seconds, the pain felt is a superposition of hundreds of years stand up."

"Sir, where are you going now?"

"Black pupil star." Tong Qing paused for a moment before heading towards the command room of the spacecraft.

The members of the Black Pupil Council are all there, reading the battle reports from the front. The front line is very tense, but they can't realize it. In the small universe, they are safe, and they don't need to worry about the spread of the war to the small universe.

They read the war reports, more concerned about where the war spread. The families, forces and parties behind them all have a lot of interests in the corner of the black pupil civilization. If they fall, they will lose a lot.

"What about you? Why didn't you come back?"

"He asked for leave some time ago and can't be reached now."

"Will he still like the Chief of Staff of the First Army? During the war, a Chief of Staff was on vacation and could not be contacted? He was funny and we were funny? I did n’t know he thought he was dead. Hades fell, Was he content to wait for Capricorn to fall? "

"If you don't want to be the chief of staff of the First Army, some people want to be."

"..."

Vivero Yun sat in the speaker's position, his eyes filled with despair. These greedy pigs still do not forget to support their own people and take care of their own interests.

His speaker, after losing defeat in the Thunder, lost all his prestige. Now the members on the court accompany him on the surface, but he dismissed him in the heart, and he could not wait for him to step down and replace him.

If the black pupil civilization perishes in his own hands, he will be nailed to the pillar of shame in the history of the universe.

"Speaker, you have to choose a new commander. I can't get in touch. We don't have time to wait." A member of the assembly said.

Wivroyun gave him a slight look, expressionless: "What good candidates do you have?"

"Oh yes."

"Tong Qi is also good."

"Paracic's ability is also very good. The General Staff of the Fourth Army is also a member of the Strategic General Staff. I think he can."

"..."

A group of lawmakers quarreled again. When it came to war, no one was nervous. Now, for the benefit of their factions, it is even more terrifying than the battlefield. Wivroyun looked desperate.

"The commander-in-chief position, I think it's still good for me."

A thick voice appeared, interrupting the debate at the parliamentary scene. So the members looked at the door, and saw the retro heavy mechanical door open, and a smiling figure appeared in front of everyone.

chapters.title: Chapter 892: : Usurp
chapters.body:
Chapter 892: : Usurp

The appearance of Hitomi Qing made the Hitomi Council shocked and fell into silence. Tong Qing, who was sent to the black hole prison, appeared to them at this moment.

All eyes were on Vive Luoyun, only he had the right to release Tong Qing from the black hole prison. At this time, Vivo Luoyun's face was ugly. Obviously, the appearance of Tong Qing was not his order.

"Who released you without permission?" Vivroyun snapped.

Tong Qing stepped on the podium of the parliament and glanced at the members of the scene. In the sharp eyes, no one dared to look at him, and finally looked at Vivoroyun: "Is this important?"

"This is not where you should come, sentry, take Tong Qing down."

Vivero Yun's face was deep and his tone was extremely bad.

It was only his order that went on, the Sentry of the council did not move, and Mu Na stood in place without listening to the words of Viverovun.

"sentinel."

"Don't call it." Hitomi interrupted Vive Luoyun's words: "Speaker, do you think the black pupil assembly here is a sinner exiled into a black hole prison?"

Hearing this, Vivero Yun's black eyes contracted and expanded, and his heart had a bad feeling.

"What do you mean?"

"The meaning is obvious." Tong Qing and Vive Luoyun stared at each other with sharp eyes: "Speaker, you are old, it is time to abdicate."

"You want to usurp?"

Wivroyun was furious, and all other members of Parliament were shocked.

In any civilization, usurping is a taboo. Even if it is a non-intelligent animal world, it takes a price to challenge the position of the leader.

The reason why Tong Qing will be exiled to black hole prison is that Tong Qing bypasses Vive Luoyun and uses military weapons to Shi Ganxing privately, otherwise he will not be exiled to black hole prison even if he kills Dan.

"Wrong, it is peaceful abdication, which is good for the entire black pupil civilization."

Wivro smiled angrily, but he did not expect that one day he would be usurped, or he was the heir he once promoted.

"If the state of the black pupil civilization does not change, it will take too long, it will be the next Lagerstroemia civilization, even worse than the Lagerstroemia civilization. Without civilization, it can be glorious forever. I am for the goodness of the black pupil civilization. The corpse-eating pig, the so-called nobleman, occupies resources but is useless. What is the status quo, you know better than me. "Tong Qing said lightly.

At this moment, Viveroyun was silent, and it took a long time to speak.

"I do know better than you, but this is not an excuse for your coup d'état. I want to sit in this position, but it is not me who abdicates. Your position is so simple."

"What happened to me after that? That's not your concern."

Vivero Yun and Tong Qing stared at each other, almost staring at fire.

Tong Qing gave Tala a signal. I saw twelve black pupils at the scene of the parliament. Each of them was wearing the same standard armor, with a smart face and sharp eyes.

Seeing these twelve people, Vivero Yun and the members of the court, his face changed.

The head of the ten military groups of the Black Hitomi Civilization, the director of the Security Intelligence Department of the Black Hitomi Civilization, and the chief of staff of the First Army.

They are the twelve people with the highest power, except for the minority, including the Speaker, including the Speaker, including the army leader Chi Jun, the first legion of the army who is responsible for the security of the Black pupil, which is Vfroyun's most trusted legion leader. There is also the Minister of Intelligence, Heidi, almost his left and right arms.

The appearance of the twelve has already made Weifu Luoyun guess something.

No wonder I suddenly took a leave of absence some time ago and did not want to take over the post of Chief Commander just for today.

"Did you release Tong Qing privately?" Viveroyun looked hopeless.

"Master Tong Qing was not released by us." The Red Army of the First Army said, "Master Tong Qing is right, you are old, you have lost your vigor and blood, you should abdicate, and civilization needs to change. Mr. Tong Qing is for the goodness of the black pupil. After discussion, our ten army commanders decided to support Mr. Tong Qing as the new speaker. "

As soon as the words came down, Weifu Luoyun seemed to be hundreds of years old and developed the black pupil civilization in his lifetime. He did not expect to end in this way.

This is a deliberately arranged aberration. The entire decision-making layer of the black pupil civilization, the black pupil council, was hit by the pupil. The head of the legion and the staff of the Intelligence Department have long been pupils of Tong Qing.

Tong Qing sorted out her clothes and walked to Vive Luoyun to stop.

"President, the times have changed. If we do not change, the foundation will decay. Sooner or later, the black pupil civilization eating the old one will fall away. You can rest assured." Tong Qing reached out to Vivero Yun, looking indifferent, slightly Smile.

Weifu Luoyun took a deep look at Tong Qing, his eyes were exhausted, as if he suddenly became wind-candle, and slowly took out a box and handed it to Tong Qing.

This is the parliamentary token of the black pupil civilization, the key of the space connector of the small universe, which is the foundation of the god-level civilization.

...

"Wang, all the probes to the Milky Way have lost contact."

"Missed?"

"Yes, the final picture returned by the spacecraft was attacked."

His men were reporting to Borghese the King of the Immortals, and Borghese stared ugly at the holographic image returned by the spacecraft, which was the fleet appearing in space.

"In addition, the Intelligence Department received a special intelligence from the old department of the Bear Wind Warframe. According to the news that the Bear Wind Warframe was destroyed before returning to the old nest, the Milky Way planet has a large amount of dark matter and antimatter gathered, such as a warehouse of dark matter and antimatter. possible……"

"What else is possible?"

"It may also be a dark matter and antimatter production technology factory in the Milky Way."

"what?"

Bolhus started the shooting, his hair like a snake dancing in the air, his eyes full of greed.

The importance of antimatter and dark matter is self-evident. One is the necessary energy material for space navigation, and the other is the necessary material for spacecraft and various top technology materials.

In the universe trade, there is no trade in minerals, because minerals are not lacking in every galaxy. In space trade, anti-material trade and dark matter trade occupy the main market of trade, followed by various armors, spacecraft, high-tech products and the like.

Mastering the groups and forces that produce dark matter and antimatter, all of them are well-known top power groups in the universe.

Antimatter and dark matter production technology is like an extremely fat piece of meat. Most of the forces in the Universe want to obtain these two materials.

The production technology of these two materials has been monopolized by large forces. Mastering the production technology of these two materials means a steady stream of wealth.

Therefore, Bolhus was so disoriented when he heard that the galaxy may have antimatter and dark matter production technologies.

"Is the message ok?" Bolhus tried to suppress his excitement.

"The old part of the Bear Wind Warfare regiment said that before the fleet was destroyed, the distress message was returned through quantum communication. They only fought each other in order to **** each other's antimatter and dark matter. I heard that the antimatter and dark matter inventory in the galaxy is very large. There may be production technologies for the production of antimatter and dark matter. Even if there is no production technology, it is certain that they have a lot of antimatter and dark matter. "

"Is this news known to any other life?"

"Absolutely." The intelligence personnel replied: "The rest of the Bear Wind Warframe Regiment posted a discussion post on the Space Alliance Warframe Regiment Forum. There must be many other Warframe Regiments or forces concerned."

Bolhus licked his lips: "Immediately order the army to go to the galaxy, and start with the best."

chapters.title: Chapter 893: : [Space Blisters] And [Space Clouds]
chapters.body:
Chapter 893: : [Space Blisters] And [Space Clouds]

Chen Mo was sitting on the ground in the training ground, breathing heavily. Next to him was Jinge, still a cold look. The training of the two people stopped, and the little mother animal jumped out of Mo Nu's arms, holding the biscuit and blinking at the cute big eyes and looked at the two. Mo Nu also came over, holding a towel in her hand to help Chen Mo wipe sweat.

Chen Mo took the towel in Mo Nu's hand and carried the little mother animal in her hand.

From the universe back to Earth, Chen Mo clearly realized that personal strength is sometimes very important. Every time, Chen Mo will train with Jing Ge to maintain his strength and develop his own super powers.

"Fortunately, there is no regression."

"You progress quickly, you are talented, and you have more time to train, you can be stronger." Jing Ge said lightly.

Chen Mo's time is devoted to research, and only a little time is spent on training. Even so, Chen Mo's progress is fast, but it is a pity for Jing Ge.

"I'm afraid there won't be much free during this time." Chen Mo responded.

Now the marching ant group is in the critical period of interstellarization, the development of the small universe is also in the white-hot phase, the expansion has just begun, and the development of various technologies is in an explosive phase. Weighing the pros and cons, Chen Mo simply couldn't spend too much time on personal force training.

"How is your body adapting?" Chen Mo looked at the Mo girl beside her when she went to the training room's bathroom.

Mo Nu's skin is red and white, and her baby is fat, her eyes are pure, and there are no impurities. When she looks at Chen Mo, she will bend into a crescent, full of attachment.

This is the new life of Mo Nu, a life with flesh and blood.

During this time, Xiao Yu was teaching Mo Nu to learn to walk, to teach Mo Nu to adapt to her new body and perception, and to teach her various human behaviors and etiquette to adapt to the environment.

"feels good."

Even with her new life, Mo Nu is quietly following Chen Mo, which is already a habit.

Regardless of her quietness, her intelligence is quite scary. She is connected with quantum consciousness. The brain is blessed by a quantum supercomputer. Now the company's research and development, Mo Nu's ability is not inferior to Chen Mo, and in some aspects, it is even better than Chen Mo.

"Yesterday, Xiaoyu took me out to play. It was completely different from watching the world before. It is very real. I like it with temperature." Mo Nu smiled, her words filled with joy.

"Just like it." Mo Nu became a flesh-and-blood person, Chen Mo also had a mind: "When I have time, I will take you out to play."

"Eh."

Mo Nu narrowed her eyes and laughed, then narrowed.

"Mer, Mr. Lan contact us."

Chen Mo, who had just arrived at the bathroom door, paused.

...

The destruction of the Bear Wind Battle Group in the galaxy was still announced.

In the Cosmic Alliance, the Bear Wind Warframe Regiment is just an inconspicuous Warframe Regiment. It is a bully in the corner of Pisces-Cetacea. The destruction of this Warframe Regiment will not attract attention. But this time it was different. The rest of the old nest of the Bear Wind Warfare Regiment exposed the suspected dark matter and antimatter factories in the galaxy.

For some advanced civilizations and Warframes, dark matter and anti-matter factory technology has irresistible temptation, which is endless wealth.

"Next, we might have a lot of trouble coming. The dark matter and antimatter factories are too tempting." Lan also got the news. Now some Warframe regiments have noticed this inconspicuous corner of them, which is very dangerous. .

"What are the arrangements?" Chen Mo asked.

"It's best to need a special space assist technology. This space assist technology can make space jump into the spacecraft in the galaxy and jump to a specific space location."

"What are the characteristics and principles of this technology?"

Lan thought about it, touched his sharp chin, and sorted out his thoughts before introducing.

"This space assist technology is similar to the cosmic port, but it is much higher than the cosmic port. It is said that the space coordinates of the entire galaxy are isolated. After this space technology isolates the galaxy, it will force the spaceship that wants to jump to the coordinates in the galaxy's isolation layer to send Go to a fixed place outside the galaxy. The spaceship can enter the galaxy through the space isolation layer before it can make a space jump again.

This technology can prevent hostile civilizations from using the convenience of space jumping and striking with space weapons. Most of this space technology appears in the hands of god-level civilizations and a few top civilization forces. "

After speaking, Lan looked at Chen Mo, waiting for Chen Mo's thoughts.

If dozens of hundreds of Warframe regiments and advanced civilizations use space to jump and jump into the galaxy, their defense will be a headache. And once the outside world finds their coordinates, it is a disaster.

"Don't sell this space technology equipment?" Chen Mo asked.

Lan shook his head. Although the economy and technology are now universal, there are also technical barriers between civilizations.

"No, there are god-level civilizations and top-level civilizations. In order to maintain the advancement and security of technology, some technologies will not be open to lower-level civilizations. We know that among friends, there are endless sea civilizations and Yunzhou civilizations. Endless Hai called this technology [space blisters], and Yunzhou civilization called it [space clouds]. Their technical characteristics are the same, but they do n’t know if they would sell them to us.

"How much time do we have now?"

"May not be able to come. The Yingxian civilization sent people to investigate. The whale civilization also sent people to contact us. I could not confirm the purpose of the other party. I was perfunctory. Now, the Pisces civilization, the whale civilization, and the fairy civilization. Are likely to follow us.

With that kind of space technology, we can have more controllable defensive factors, but we can also prevent it, but it is only a bit more troublesome. We must guard against the use of space jump airdrops to destroy weapons without appearing in the solar system. "

Space weapons plus the destructive bombing of 'airdrops' such as space jumps cannot be resisted by ordinary civilizations.

If the enemy knows the coordinates of their solar system headquarters, they only need to use a space curvature spacecraft to drop a star-shaped space weapon to strike it accurately, and the entire solar system will be destroyed.

"We are a little far away from the endless sea civilization and the Yunzhou civilization. They are willing to sell, and they will not be able to deploy the Milky Way for a while. You must arrange the defense of the Milky Way for one or two months. I will get the space technology equipment. That's fine. You need other special defense techniques. You can make a list for me, and I'll give it to you later. "

Hearing this, Lan nodded, then nodded.

Farewell to Lan, Chen Mo took the space curvature spacecraft to the laboratory in the small universe.

Now their defense has risen to the level of galaxies or even constellations, and there will be small universes in the future. Their opponent is a god-level civilization, and many technologies need to be developed.

Although there are some technologies that have not been stopped, they are not enough for their leapfrog development.

"Mo Girl, wait for you to record the technical information I gave, and then develop the relevant technology." Chen Mo lay down on the seat and put the neural connector on her head.

"Okay, Mo brother." Mo Nu went to Chen Mo and nodded gently.

Science and technology library, Chen Mo appeared again.

chapters.title: Chapter 894: : Space Wave Technology
chapters.body:
Chapter 894: : Space Wave Technology

When the attention of the forces around the major leagues of the Universe Alliance and the Pisces-Cetacea super galaxy complex was focused on the origin of the unknown force of the Milky Way, as the protagonist, the marching ant group's transformation of the Milky Way entered the race against time. Incandescence.

With the lesson of the destruction of the Bear Wind War Armor Group, large-scale War Armor Group did not dare to easily enter the Milky Way. However, many forces have dropped their own detectors into the Milky Way through space jumping, and it seems a lot more cautious.

It is this prudence that has given Lan a lot of time for layout.

Soon, various forces in the Milky Way Galaxy were surprised to discover that the density of the life planet in the entire Milky Way galaxy reached an astonishing level.

The Milky Way was originally in the heart of the Rania Kea Super Galaxy, where the number of life planets is scarce. Many life science expeditions have come in the past. However, I don't know when the density of the life planet here will increase thousands of times.

Detectors have even detected pictures of a planet being extensively transformed.

This change clearly reminds them that the Milky Way is undergoing a large-scale transformation by that unknown force.

The Milky Way is indeed being transformed.

This is where they settled down. After Chen Mo returned, they began to transform the Milky Way at any cost. Lan Lan wanted to transform it into the oasis of life paradise of the Rania Kea Super Galaxy.

The planets being transformed are the stronghold planets built by Arashi.

In this remote corner, it is obviously unrealistic to buy all kinds of high-tech equipment of the Universe, and the transportation cost is enough, so Chen Mo chose to do all the research by himself.

From quantum detection radar, various defense weapons, to super-light speed spacecraft, etc., all adopt the technology of the science and technology library.

In the science and technology library, various technologies are inexhaustible, including various space weapons and planet transformation technologies abound. For Chen Mo, who has divine authority in science and technology libraries, all technology is not a problem.

In addition, the monetization ability of the intelligent machine controlled by Mo Nu allows Chen Mo's brain technology to obtain the highest realization speed, which is almost changing with each passing day.

With regard to the survival of the earth, Chen Mo didn't want to be suddenly destroyed by a force in the solar system. Having learned the lesson of three eyes civilization, Chen Mo will not allow another mistake to be made.

Regarding Lan's "space water bubble" and "space cloud layer" technology, Chen Mo also found many similar space technologies in the science and technology library, called "space wave theory".

When he got "The Theory of Space Waves", Chen Mo determined that this was the technique Lan said. A god-level technology theory, very special technology.

After studying, Chen Mo determined what was happening with this technology, which was a kind of barrier for space jumping.

When the galaxy is wrapped by such waves, the outer spaceship wants to jump into the galaxy through space folding, and the spacecraft will naturally stay at a specific space point outside the space waves. Then the speed of light passes through this level of space waves and enters the space surrounded by the waves, in order to continue the space jump.

This is the method used by many top civilizations to control the major galaxies in the realm, for fear that unknown enemies can sneak into the galaxy without their knowledge.

After thoroughly understanding the theory, Chen Mo asked Mo Nu and the R & D team to start manufacturing related equipment and technologies.

Bringing back a million technical lives from Shi Ganxing, and the talents cultivated by Wushuang University over the years, are sufficient to support the current development speed of the marching ant group.

Everyone at the Marching Ant Group knows that time is not waiting for them, and beyond the Milky Way, I don't know how many eyes are paying attention to them.

Because of this pressure, Chen Mo temporarily gave up other technology research and development, and convened a team of space technology experts to develop "Space Waves". Regarding the theory of space wave technology, Chen Mo sent it directly to each researcher, one copy each.

This trick works surprisingly fast.

Most of the space R & D team with thousands of people are senior life recruited from Shi Ganxing, and the rest are talented R & D personnel trained by Wushuang University. They think quickly. In addition, Chen Mo and Mo Nu did not reserve them in terms of the technical understanding of the waves, and showed them the relevant technical principles.

The research of various spatial fluctuation theories has improved the knowledge of the space technology R & D team.

Chen Mo is very clear that if he alone develops the space wave technology, it may take several months. Time did not allow him to develop independently, so Chen Mo adjusted the space research genius of the earth and the space technology experts brought back by Shi Ganxing to establish a space wave technology research and development team.

Gather everyone's strength and develop space wave technology. Joint research and development is an old topic in any civilization, so there is nothing strange about it.

Chen Mo carefully explained the "space wave theory" and related technical principles that he understood to the R & D staff, after everyone thoroughly digested. Mo Nu separated each technology module and sent it to the team's group, a group of people specializing in part of the technology.

Under the auspices of Mo Nu, the development of "Space Waves" technology was several times faster than Chen Mo's independent research and development.

The three tanners beat Zhuge Liang, and Chen Mo led a group of extremely smart space technology researchers.

The space wave technology team has demonstrated unprecedented efficiency, and each technology module group will report the development progress in detail. Whenever an unsolvable technical problem is found, they will be fed back to Chen Mo and Mo Nu, who will solve and explain these problems.

On the fourth day of the formation of the technical team, several important technical problems were jointly solved by Chen Mo and Mo Nu.

Fifth day!

Sixth day!

On the tenth and twenty days ...

In one month, the basic problems of the space wave technology were thoroughly understood. At this speed, even Chen Mo was somewhat surprised.

He also realized that these R & D personnel at his disposal should not be underestimated, but just lacked a leader who allowed them to cooperate sincerely. "The Theory of Space Waves" was thoroughly understood, one by one, the basic principles and techniques were analyzed, and the explanation was concise.

For a long time, Chen Mo mostly researched in the laboratory alone because the technologies he studied were very sensitive. There are very few opportunities to go to the R & D base of the Marching Ant Group. What kind of information or instructions are needed are all through the ink girl or holographic video, which saves time and effort.

Now he finds that he has underestimated the capabilities of these R & D personnel, as long as they are brought in the door and then guided, these teams are a R & D assistance comparable to Momo.

"Space Waves" technology is thoroughly understood, design and manufacturing is much simpler.

No matter how complicated the machine equipment and technology, in the face of Mo Nu's unlimited capabilities, they have become extremely simple.

...

"The quantum detection radar detected a total of 780 detection spacecraft entering the Milky Way, distributed in all corners of the Milky Way, the nearest Orion." Mo Nu reported the data to Lan.

The shape and painting of each exploration spacecraft are different, and there are many overcoming forces, more than a hundred.

Here comes the trouble.

These greedy guys.

There are countless cosmic alliance warriors and advanced civilizations, and how much anti-matter and dark matter power can be imagined.

Even if they are not sure that there are antimatter and dark matter factories in the galaxy, but the huge amount of antimatter and dark matter hidden here revealed by the Bear Wind Battle Group, the temptation is enough.

The detection spacecraft is used to detect the precise information and deployment in the galaxy for the large troops behind.

This is the defense difficulty of open galaxies.

For galaxies with a range of 100,000 light years, there is no interference from space technology, and external spacecraft can directly jump into the galaxy. For the defense, this form of defense is passive and cumbersome.

If the other party detects the solar system headquarters where they are stationed, the other party will directly attack the solar system and pose a threat to the earth.

"Principle of proximity, send war planets of the stronghold to destroy those detectors, activate the dam system of the Milky Way, turn on all war robots, and enter war mode."

Confirming the news, Lan's instructions were transmitted to all corners of the galaxy through the quantum communication system.

In order not to turn the Milky Way into an iron bucket, Lan reconstructed the planet on the planet of five million stars in the Milky Way, and deployed war robots and space ship manufacturing plants.

These five million galaxies act as network nodes, radiating the surrounding star area. Deploy a quantum radar system on stars in the radiation area.

The radiation area connected by all the stellar network nodes covers the Milky Way's 200 billion stars.

Lan is to keep all the movements of the galaxy in his hands and take full control of the galaxy, so that he can use this as a foundation to resist the revenge of the god-level civilization.

Each node is equivalent to a disguised headquarters, which can better cover the headquarters of the earth. Even if the god-level civilization wants to chase them down, they cannot achieve precise strike, and they have enough time to withdraw into the small universe.

It can be said that, in addition to around the perverted black hole in the center of the galaxy, the Milky Way now has some extremely bad corners. Other places have fallen into the control of the marching ant group.

"Instructor Lan, the boss is here to talk." I gave Lan the holographic communicator.

"Oh?"

Lan lowered the tea cup in her hand, and her waist plate instantly straightened.

chapters.title: Chapter 895: : Medusa Legion
chapters.body:
Chapter 895: : Medusa Legion

Chen Mo stood in front of the laboratory platform and pressed on the remote control of the holographic device with a relaxed expression.

Then, the holographic projection appeared on the experimental table.

A barren planet.

At the moment when the nano-robot was put into the planet, countless instruments and equipment emerged from the ground and gathered frantically at a speed visible to the naked eye. For a long time, a planet covered by the machine appeared in front of Lan.

The surface of a mechanical planet is a ring with a diameter of hundreds of kilometers, attached to the surface of the planet like suction cups.

Planetary machinery and equipment may be a bit hard to imagine outside, but in the age of cosmology, this machinery is the most common tool. The span of the universe is too large. The planet is just a basic unit in the universe.

The mechanical planet was formed, and a layer of space ripples simulated by holographic images spread in the mechanical ring.

The ripples of space are very special. Just like a transparent plate, the ripples at the end will disappear. Such fluctuations are invisible in reality and are simulated through holography.

"This is what you say is similar to 'space blisters' and 'space clouds'."

Chen Mo took out the laser pointer and pointed at the holographic image to introduce to Lan. During this period, Chen Mo also pressed the remote control to control the range of space ripples and extended quadrants.

After the simple demonstration, Chen Mo pressed the pause button.

"It's called [Space Waves]. This technology works in the same way as [Space Traps]. But it's a little different from [Space Traps]. Space traps lock up the entire space randomly. Space waves lock up the space regularly. It's controllable, it's fluctuating in space, and it doesn't act on the entire galaxy, it's just a layer of space curtain that covers the galaxy. "

At the edge of the galaxy, select the stellar chain marker, and then change the planet into a transmitter of [space waves]. As the planet rotates and adjust the direction of the space waves intelligently, the space waves will extend like a 'space plane'.

When all the waves in [Space Waves] are connected together, the entire galaxy is like being wrapped in a 'space bubble'. Through the bubble, the inner space is still the same as the outer space.

"Technology is ready. You only need to find a suitable star system to form a star chain on the periphery of the Milky Way and transform it into a space wave launch system to isolate the Milky Way. The space coordinates of the space waves can be set to any of the stars in the star chain. Coordinates, you can turn this into a galaxy entrance. "

Lan is still a little hesitant. How long has it passed? The boss got this technology, which is a bit incredible.

"Boss, where does this technology come from?"

"I and the space technology research team studied it out." Chen Mo understood Lan's surprise and did not hide it.

"We researched it? Do we have such a great researcher?"

It is incredible that Lan has successfully developed space wave technology for more than a month. We must know that similar technologies are god-level civilization and top-level civilization. After tens of thousands of years of development, countless developers have succeeded.

"Moge led the research, it's very simple." Mo Nu interjected.

Aryan twitched her face.

If it is easy for other civilizations to hear the wave technology of research space, I am afraid those researchers will be furious.

But thinking of Chen Mo's deeds, he was relieved.

After he came to earth, he already knew the deeds of Chen Mo.

The pioneer of civilization, in just 20 years, he simply pulled the low-level civilization of the earth into the era of cosmicization, and the development speed was extremely horrible. This is the fastest-developed civilization development he has ever seen, and it is almost a leap development.

Even more frightening is that Mo Nu changed from artificial intelligence to a living life. These are technologies that the god-level civilization does not have. After understanding Chen Mo, we all know that this is a bottomless technology. No matter what technology, there are no barriers in Chen Mo's eyes.

"The Milky Way? Oh."

Outside the Milky Way space, the army of the civilization of the immortals has already gathered here, and Boldo repaired his eyes narrowed to reveal a cruel smile. Naturally belligerent, looking at the Milky Way at this time is like looking at a delicious prey, and his eyes are full of the desire to kill.

This time the King of the Immortals can be said to have laid down the blood, sending three elite army of the Yingxian civilization to this, which is half of the military power of the fairy.

In space, hundreds of thousands of space warships are floating, like a dormant steel giant, the dead space seems to be full of killing gas.

Led by Medusa.

The Pisces-Cetacean Super Galaxy Cluster complex is a well-known legion, and it is also the most elite army of the Immortal civilization. In the Pisces-Whale area, there is awe for the name of the Medusa Legion of the Immortal Civilization.

This legion inherited the character of Boldo, cruel and ruthless, and had a powerful fighting force.

In addition to the Medusa Legion, there are the Cassiopeia Legion and the Snake-Eye Legion, which are the most elite Legion of the British civilization.

According to Boldoux, the action of the King of the Immortals was completely unnecessary.

In his opinion, the unknown civilization of the galaxy is only a little stronger than the Bear Wind Battle Group. As for the Bear Wind Battle Group, the inaccessible cosmic gangsters could not be eliminated, but they were wandering around and found their nests.

I heard that there are huge amounts of antimatter and dark matter in the galaxy. This is a rare opportunity. How can they miss it.

If they win the Milky Way and get a huge amount of antimatter and dark matter or antimatter factory technology, the strength of their immortal civilization will grow wildly, and it will be a must for Pisces-Whales to become the strongest civilization.

As for the Pisces civilization and the Whale civilization, they can't stop them either.

Soon after, the fat in the galaxy belonged to their immortal civilization.

"General, all the detection spacecraft that were dropped into the Milky Way were destroyed, but some intelligence data of the Milky Way have been returned." An intelligence department reported.

Seeing the data returned, Boldo's eyes skyrocketed.

The data show that the density of the galactic life planet has increased several times. The most important thing is that the concentration of antimatter and dark matter is particularly high. Some planets do store huge amounts of antimatter and dark matter, and not one or two planets, but tens of thousands.

What a crazy reserve.

Only top civilizations have so many antimatter and dark matter, right?

Bordius now believes in the unknown forces inside, and has mastered anti-matter and dark matter extraction techniques, otherwise he cannot explain such a large reserve.

The Milky Way is located in a remote corner of the Rania Kea Super Galaxy Cluster. It is unrealistic to use spacecraft to transport so much dark matter and antimatter here. The only explanation is the extraction technology of antimatter and dark matter.

The degree of greed in Bordux's expression became more obvious, and he screamed, "Kill in!"

The icy space battleship was started, and the faint blue light of the space curvature engine was awake like a dormant beast, and the fleet's killing gas was stronger. The space folded at the end of the curvature engine, and for a long time, the entire fleet disappeared into space towards the quadrant where the Milky Way was located.

chapters.title: Chapter 896: : People Of God?
chapters.body:
Chapter 896: : People Of God?

"They leave it to you."

Lan stared at the image on the screen and said to Da Mazu, with a smile, but this smile was very insidious, even when Da Mazu and others who knew Lan, were shivering when they saw the smile.

Da Mazu rubbed his hands and grinned. "Instructor, would you be better if you went up in person? With your genius command, those magpies are a dish."

Da Mazu quietly patted the fart, causing Yan and others to roll their eyes. Da Mazu seems to be three big and five thick, but his mind is thick and thin, and he doesn't want to look so honest and honest.

"You know it's Xiaoyao, do you still use me? If you can't figure out even these Xiaoyao, you know the consequences." Lan grinned and smiled at Da Mazu.

Grunt ...

Da Mazu's throat moved and his body shook.

The pervert of the instructor, who has been taught, definitely does not want to be targeted again.

"Can you do it?"

"Guaranteed to complete the task." Da Mazu saluted, leaving the war room.

Outside space is like a red-burning stove, filled with gorgeous explosions. The radiation range here, in the absence of armor protection, the radiation energy at that location can instantly kill ordinary life.

Li Yao's face was extremely ugly, just like outer space.

So far, he has organized three attacks, but he has not yet captured one of the other's galaxies.

There are so many war machines and weapons in the stellar system. The number of war robots, anti-material weapons, ultra-high-energy laser pulse weapons, space-based weapons, and space weapons has reached an abnormal level.

Any of his offenses will be annihilated in this star system, like bubbles one by one near the flames.

Even more numb his scalp, this is just one of the galaxies, not the other's headquarters. Not the star of the other party's headquarters, the defense forces are so horrible. They have detected that there are millions of such life-reactive star systems in the Milky Way.

Even if it is an immortal civilization, it has not been so horrible to prepare for its long-term operation and deployment here in Pisces-Whale.

If it is consumed in this way, the war robots of their fleet will not be able to break through the defense of the opponent at all. If the war power is exhausted, they will be passive.

He a little regretted accepting this vanguard mission.

Bortosh's holographic video has arrived, obviously a little impatient: "How long will it take?"

Li Yao moved his throat hard: "It's unclear for the moment, the opponent's defense is very strong. This star system is like a fortress. War machines are constantly being transported from the planet, and the defense is carefully deployed. Kind of deployment ... "

Bordo's expression was gloomy.

The whole team is paying attention to the situation of the battle. Continue this, it will be a blow to their morale, and the situation will be passive. If he goes back this time, his status will plummet in Yingxian civilization, and he may face ridicule from other opponents.

"Is it impossible to attack?"

"No, throw in a stellar destruction weapon, destroy the entire stellar system, and you can take it down," Li said hesitantly.

"Destroy the galaxy, I use you to say? What about the antimatter and dark matter inside it? Destroy the galaxy, and it makes sense to us to come over?" Boldo's holographic video roared at Liou if it was a real person In front of him, he would immediately swipe across.

After snarling, Bordius turned his attention to the space battlefield and immediately ordered: "You back, I will go up in person and prepare to storm."

Suddenly the surrounding minions suddenly sounded.

Numerous battleships appeared around the Lisong fleet. Each fleet was separated by thousands of miles, and the battleships opened. The war robots gathered in space like a bee colony breaking the nest.

The stellar galaxy is very strong. It takes a lot of time to break through, but what they lack now is time. Many external forces are staring at the unknown force of the galaxy, and the galaxy has detected a lot of similar stars, which takes a long time Attack, I don't know when it will be big.

So the easiest way to break the defense is to attack. As long as the weapons and equipment are large enough, the number of war machines is enough to completely break this stellar fortress.

In a short time, war machines staying out of space swarmed into the galaxy.

...

Bitter Star.

The bitter sky and bitter dragon looked up at the four high-meter statues on the square, their expressions were full of reverence and fascination.

Headed by the statue of Chen Mo, wearing a battle armor, carrying a big sword, looks smart and handsome. The other three are the statues of the three daughters of Xiao Yu. Behind the statue of Chen Mo, they have different looks and temperaments, all of which are like fairies.

That is the King of God and the Queen of God.

They are all God's [rural novels www.xiangcun7.com] people.

Around the two, the eyes of each bitter man, and the statue of Chen Mo, were revered.

The civilization of Bitter Star has not taken shape. In order to conquer these bitter people as quickly as possible, Lan brought faith into the bitter stars, and shaped the gods and saviors in the early stages of civilization, which is Chen Mo.

Because of changes in life, they live in warm buildings that they have never seen before, wear good-looking clothes, and have a variety of previously unimaginable aircraft, and they can learn all kinds of knowledge. They even saw with their own eyes a huge city that quickly took shape under their noses.

To the bitter man, all this is a miracle.

Coupled with the promotion of holographic images, the construction of the belief of the bitter people is very smooth. After propaganda and popularization of stories, today Chen Mo is the **** in the eyes of the bitter people.

And this image is ingrained.

About Chen Mo's deeds, as well as the various legendary stories of Chen Mo and the three daughters, are deeply imprinted in the foundation of the culture and civilization that the bitter man has just taken shape.

God King Chen Mo sent soldiers to kill the devil who enslaved them, saved them from fire and water, built culture for them, developed wisdom, built cities, and gave them their present lives.

Chen Mo knew that when he became a **** stick, he couldn't laugh or cry. However, Lan's method is really easy to use. The cohesiveness and centripetal force of the bitters are formed in a short time, allowing them to quickly recruit bitters.

These bitter people are also very smart. They are quick to develop literacy and instill instrumental knowledge. Now they are accepting the new world they know.

Today is a special day. The ‘God King’ recruits soldiers. Those who are selected will become war soldiers to enter the starry sky, open up territory for the God King, and defend against foreign enemies.

This opportunity is very rare. Almost every young and bitter man signed up for the selection. If they were selected, it would be an honor to be loyal to the King of God.

Gu Yao glanced at the crowd below, with a very serious look. He is a leader of the bitter tribe, witnessing the Warframe Division killing the orcs who enslaved them and releasing them from captivity.

He was fortunate to be chosen to learn knowledge and writing and to be one of the messengers of the King of God. This time, through selection, he became an ambassador. In the future, he will lead a army of bitter soldiers and loyal to the King of God.

This glory fell on him, making him happy and worried, worrying that he would not do well in the future with the God King.

Now selecting soldiers, he has made sufficient preparations with the help of artificial intelligence and Wang Hai and others.

"Now everyone is standing up, and the selection rules are clear to everyone, right?"

"Clear."

All the bitter people in the square nodded together.

"Can you be selected? It depends on everyone's luck. If you are not selected, don't be discouraged and try to be selected next time. In addition to becoming a soldier, you can also learn about knowledge and become a researcher to work for the King of God. Select now Start."

This selection was transferred to all corners of Kuxing through a live video, in order to increase the Kuxing people's sense of honor for this selection.

With the announcement of Kuyao, countless cabins landed from the high-altitude spacecraft to the square.

chapters.title: Chapter 897: : War Violence
chapters.body:
Chapter 897: : War Violence

The space battlefield is a silent silent film. There were no sharp breaking sounds, no screaming screams were heard, and a gorgeous explosion depicting the prelude to death.

The collision faced by the war robots, like two waves colliding, suddenly broke out.

Countless machines, like swarms of ants and bees, have stirred up in space one after another.

Seeing this scene through the video on the spaceship, the immortal civilization battle armor division was shocked, and opened his mouth wondering how to describe his mood. Even if they were on the front line for a long time, this crazy collision scene was the first time they saw it.

Even Boldo, when he saw this scene, was secretly surprised that this unknown civilization is really not as simple as they imagined, and it is no wonder that repeated attacks failed.

Wow!

In the video footage, an anti-material weapon exploded. Within hundreds of kilometers of the explosion, the war robots were flooded with horrific energy and radiation. A large number of war machines failed, exploded, and disintegrated. The remains were imaginary. The rate of each fragment is extremely high, and its power is thousands of times higher than that of a bullet.

Even if the war robot is cannon fodder on the battlefield, this scene is still very visually striking.

Some extremely high-speed debris hit other war robots, and some robots were knocked up and even damaged during the impact. This high-speed impact in space has horrific kinetic energy.

Almost instantly, hundreds of thousands of war robots destroyed and exploded during the collision.

The battle in space has become more chaotic. The defensive robots in the galaxy, like turtle shells, blocked the war robots of the imperial civilization from the periphery of the galaxy.

"Second Eye Column, put the machine and increase the offensive intensity."

Bordosu continued to order, always watching the situation detected by the detector, looking for the deployment of the stellar system.

A column of the Cassiopeia, to the third quadrant, attack from the third quadrant:

Four columns of Snake-Eye Army, attacking from the negative axis of X;

The Cassiopeia Columns cut into the pinch from the seventh quadrant.

Boldo was ordered, and the standby fleet was activated and disappeared into space. War machines, fierce battles, explosions, radiation and lasers became the main theme of space.

In the chaotic battlefield, anti-material bombs explode from time to time, just like the sun suddenly appearing in space. The burst of energy and radiation pulses can completely destroy the robot as long as the protection of the war robot is slightly wrong.

In the third quadrant of the stellar system, after a column of the Cassiopeia Army entered the predetermined position, a steady stream of war robots were dropped from the fleet into the stellar system.

X negative axis ...

The seventh quadrant ...

The offensive around the galaxy was launched.

The large-scale attack has encouraged the warriors of the Yingxian civilization. The strong fortress just now saw the dawn of being broken at this moment.

The number of war machines in the space battlefield is declining. Four teams, like four sharp swords, pierce the first wave of robots in the galaxy. Spaceships and battleships follow, as four torrents merge into the galaxy.

broken.

The fleet of the civilization of immortals cheered.

"Li Li, open the way." Bordius seems that the galaxy is already in the bag.

"Yes, general."

Li Ye was overjoyed, but didn't think about it, letting the fleet enter the stellar system. The initial battle failed to win the stellar system, and now he can only perform as well as possible, otherwise his status will plummet after returning.

"Let them in, don't worry."

The Black Eagle is watching the direction of the battle. He is the commander of the Orion A4493 stellar war. Through the virtual reality scenes, the war scene is simulated in real time. In the solar system, the stellar war is remotely commanded.

"Let the war violently prepare."

The black hawk ordered artificial intelligence. The war violent mania is the war robot form of the warfare [violent mania]. In the case of insufficient personnel strength, Lan chose the war machine form [war violent maniac] to station in various galaxies.

It's just that these are elite war robots, which are not the same as those that consume cannon fodder.

The unconditional obedience advantage of the war robot was revealed at this moment. The warship over the planet Orion A4493 started, and opened its eyes like a sleeping beast and disappeared in place.

Where to go first?

Li stared at the light curtain. This star system has five terrestrial planets, one with life, but all are plants and animals, and there is no civilization. One planet has a strong antimatter and dark matter response. There is also a mechanical city above it, which is obviously the production of war robots, and three planets can see large-scale defensive equipment.

Hesitate, Li Ming chose the fifth planet, and the antimatter response here is strong.

I have never seen so many antimatter planets. They won the antimatter planet, and their contributions are not small, let alone worry in the future.

Didi ...

The rapid alarm suddenly sounded, letting the excited Li Min be shocked. The reason for the alarm has jumped out on the holographic light curtain. A spaceship suddenly appeared thousands of kilometers away from the fourth quadrant of their side. A continuous stream of war robots was appearing There are only a few million arrays.

"So small?" Li Chen smiled cheerfully. "Destroy them."

Ordered, the war robots that followed the fleet into the stellar system quickly stormed away in the direction of the enemy.

"moron."

Seeing Li Yun's unthinkable action, Boldu Xiu yelled.

From the appearance of these robots, they are not cannon fodder robots. They wanted to make Li Yu make up for it. Now it seems that Li Ye is just a idiot with no courage, and sending him in is a huge mistake.

Although he was swearing, Boldoux didn't move. The opponent's batch of war machines has only come out now, and it must be the hole card. From beginning to end, he did not see a decent team on the other side. The current team should be a special means for the other party to station in this stellar system.

You can tell from the opponent's arming that the opponent's strength is certainly not weak. He wanted to learn about the opponent's means, so the next war in other galaxies will be much easier.

As for Li Ye's life and death, it is not very useful anyway, and the issue of war damage is beyond his consideration.

When he reached the Milky Way, he discovered that the antimatter stored here was too horrible. If the Milky Way was taken down, any war damage would not matter.

The other party didn't seem to be in a hurry, the strange war robots formed in the array of space, spreading like a net. It's definitely not easy to see each other's actions. It took a short time from the appearance of the robot to the completion of the formation. Obviously, the opponent had already prepared.

In a blink of an eye, Li Yao's vanguard, all the war machines, flocked to each other, and there were not many war machines left to defend.

I saw the war robot formed by the other side, suddenly extended two large gun barrels, aiming at the tide of war robots that flew past.

Bordo Xiu frowns outside the stellar system, full of doubts, but has a lot of bad premonitions. Soon, Bordo's expression went wild.

Didi ...

Crazy sirens, warnings of anti-matter activation, are on that special group of robots.

"Retreat, idiot." Boldo shouted at the communicator.

In the stellar system, Li Ye also heard the alarm, and his expression changed tragically, but in his field of view, the opponent's firepower had been turned on. Countless antimatter bullets are overtaking their place.

Li Yao shivered. He had never seen so many, so many activated antimatter bullets. What kind of force is the other party, the firepower of the top civilization, but that's it?

This unknown force is certainly not as simple as they think.

Boldo was suddenly a little panicked.

The warship started quickly and accelerated to the speed of sub-light, hoping to reach the battlefield inside the star at the fastest speed. Even so, it took ten minutes to arrive, too late.

Antimatter bullets sank into the vanguard fleet.

In time, the space is full of light, and countless dazzling light clusters drown space, like countless suns appearing at the same time. If you look directly without machine assistance, no life can stand it.

Li Ling felt as if he was between countless stars, the endless rays of pain stabbed his eyes, and the swift alert of the spacecraft made him oblivious.

It's over.

The last two words emerged from Li Yao's mind, ashamed.

boom!

The warships hit by antimatter bullets exploded in space. Thousands of warships and hundreds of millions of war robots were all in the center of firepower.

Explosion, disintegration, collapse.

The sparks are gorgeous, but they make everyone cold.

Boldo repaired the scene from the radar, fell silent, and the rest of the command room were quiet. This is in stark contrast to what the Milky Way began to think of as something in its sac.

When everyone was watching the explosion in the galaxy, the warship's alarm sounded again, and behind their fleet, a fleet suddenly appeared in space outside the galaxy.

chapters.title: Chapter 898: : Vulnerable
chapters.body:
Chapter 898: : Vulnerable

When the fleet appeared, it bit the tail of the Fleet of Civilization.

Da Mazu's rough face with a treacherous smile, this timing was just right.

In ordinary training, Lan Ke not only requires them to train their personal strength, but also war deduction and command.

The peace period is an era of individual heroism, and personal strength is very important. In wartime, war is the most important talent. Under the crushing of the war machine, any individual heroism is useless.

Lan knew this very well, so after arriving in the galaxy, he began to train combat personnel.

A qualified warrior needs to have a pattern view and strategic judgment. These Da Mazu were not lacking. He had received Lan's guidance, coupled with Da Mazu's superficial and dark-hearted personality, he soon had his own personal fighting style.

Insignificant.

This is the evaluation given to him by Da Mazu.

He is most adept at sneak attacks and is extremely insignificant. When Wang Hai and Wat Mu and others deal with him, they have a headache. In Lan's words, as long as you can win your opponent, you can do whatever you want.

At the beginning of the battle, Da Mazu did not choose to enter the stellar system defense for the first time, but instead paid attention to the movement of the main fleet of the civilization of the immortal, looking for the most suitable time to enter the field, giving the opponent a surprise and the biggest victory.

Big Mazu saw an opportunity when Boldo's main fleet entered the galaxy's support.

The spaceship and the elite carrying the war machine are at the forefront. Da Mazu knows that the opportunity is coming. So without hesitation, the space jump appeared behind the forward of the main fleet of the civilization.

Under normal war conditions, the stellar systems are in a state of preparedness. At regular intervals, equipment and obstacles are specially arranged to limit the enemy fleet's flight within the stellar system, so the other party has to slow down.

Otherwise, the fleet hits obstacles at the speed of light and stays here forever without them.

"Fire cover, Assassin's Battlegear, come on."

Da Mazu showed a treacherous smile, letting the artificial intelligence send commands to all Assassin Warframe Divisions.

The firepower of the battleship was activated, and countless missiles and lasers whistled out, like black and white impermanent ropes, pounced on the fleet of the immortal civilization. War robots accelerated, surging in waves like missiles and lasers.

The laser, like a life-threatening haunting rope, plunged into the fleet of the civilization of the fairy. The activation of the Fleet Energy Shield also restricted the opponent's use of laser strikes.

Missiles ensued and sank into the fleet at a rapid rate. The missile passed through the energy shield, suddenly exploded, turned into a huge fire group, and quickly engulfed the two nearby warships. A steady stream of explosions shrouded hundreds of thousands of kilometers, and nearly half of the fleet was shrouded.

The sudden appearance of Da Mazu caused chaos in the immortal civilization fleet preparing to attack the galaxy.

Through the dazzling fireball, Boldo was a little scared.

The insidious guy actually carried out a sneak attack. The only possibility of such a sneak attack was that the other party had already laid an ambush, sighted that they had entered the nodes of the stellar system, and then jumped the sneak attack.

"Turn on the defense system and release the war robot." Bordo Xiu yelled on the full channel call.

Bordo's eyes were a bit scary. The opponent's missiles were numerous and dense, but in the galaxy, there were too many obstacles and weapons deployed by the opponent, and their speed was not fast.

There was a steady stream of anti-matter bombers behind, with varying degrees of power.

He could feel the nervousness of the surrounding combatants looking at him. The strength of the opponent is unknown, the unknown danger is the most terrible.

The anti-material bombs and robots in the rear chased after the team, and the menace was enough to make people frightening.

They are now in each other's territory, and to them, more or less passive. Hundreds of thousands of warships, as the order fell, immediately slowed down, pouring hundreds of millions of war robots into space.

Although they had more war robots, Bordius did not have much sense of security.

Now he has no idea of just beginning to conquer the Milky Way. In this situation, he has determined that Yingxian civilization is going to kick the iron plate this time. Just a stellar system has such a horrible defense, and even an imperial civilization cannot do this.

Suddenly, a huge light group came from distant space, and the diameter of the light group reached millions of kilometers, quickly covering the space battlefield. The dazzling light is a hundred times higher than the star and is unusually conspicuous.

The sirens of the spacecraft have been rushing, and all this has not attracted attention. The energy density of space is at an extremely high level, and energy radiation can turn a planet into scorched earth.

The spirits of all Warframe Divisions are tense, and the operation of quantum radar is non-stop, always paying attention to the war robots close to the fleet. However, in the space battlefield, there are too many debris directly broken. Without quantum radar, it is impossible to distinguish between the debris and the enemy.

Soon, Boldo was feeling wrong.

The next moment, Bordo's face changed greatly.

In the radar display, their number of warships is decreasing. Fairly calm, Bordo repair, eyes began to appear a little flustered, eyes like snake eyes, with deep fear.

A sneak attack.

He is also a general with enough time in the space battlefield. Through radar feedback, he has a complete outline of the changes in the battlefield.

This is impossible.

Bordosu's breathing was quick, and his fists were unconsciously clenched.

As one of the generals of the Yingxian civilization, he is facing a whale civilization and a Pisces civilization, and his status today was fought out by World War I. Now their battleships are decreasing.

It was such a little time, tens of thousands of ships were lost, and the staff was reduced by one-tenth.

Why is this happening?

He was extremely confused.

The subordinates on each battleship were lifted from the battlefield by one hand, and their capabilities were sufficient, it was impossible to be mutiny, and it was impossible to be attacked silently.

Suddenly, Boldo was thinking of life, hurried to the spacecraft console, and called up radar detection information.

still none.

The battleship cannot be destroyed for no reason.

Just then, the alarm sounded harsh, the radar screen jumped off, the frigate next to the main ship exploded in the alarm, turned into a huge light group, and countless wrecks flew over to other warships around it.

"Assassin's Battlegear. Impossible, why isn't the quantum radar showing?"

Bortosh confirmed through the optical radar that a Warframe Division had emerged from the wreckage and screamed in an instant.

The captains of other warships were tense, but the wreckage of countless spaceships numbed their scalp. For a time, the warship commander was at a loss.

The explosion of light clusters is increasing in space. Once a warship explodes, its antimatter energy explodes. Even a planet must be fragmented. The armored divisions and war robots inside it can only be reduced to space debris.

The feet are in chaos.

"Watch out for the lidar alert."

"My lord, the explosive light group on the battlefield is too bright, the other party deliberately covered it, the optical radar's role is not great, the quantum radar cannot detect it, they may be quantum stealth armors." The subordinates responsible for optical radar reported nervously.

More and more warships exploded, leaving Boldo repaired with despair.

Quantum Stealth Battlegear.

This is the technology that only the most advanced civilizations have.

Make sure that the other party has a quantum stealth armor. Bordo Xiu knows that this battle is completely over and there is no fighting back. The funny thing is that they still want to conquer the other party.

The bleak smile dispelled the fear, and he heard the rapid sirens. Bordo's eyes were full of relief. The only regret was that until now, he hadn't even seen the other person's life.

confusion!

The team of the Yingxian civilization is as scattered as sand, without order. Originally coming to the galaxy with lofty ambitions, but did not expect that the other party could not even hold one round, but now he lost his helmet and armor.

The armored divisions of the Immortal Civilization are all in fear.

They came from the Medusa, Cassiopeia and Snake-Eyed Corps. They are one of the top three fighting forces of the centuries-old civilization. They are also famous here in Pisces-Whale.

Now coming to the Milky Way, they didn't even see what the enemy looked like, they were destroyed.

The battleship of the civilization of immortals completely lost its backbone, and fear spread to the minds of every Warframe Division. They now have only one idea.

escape!

The warship started and desperately flew away from the galaxy.

And all this has led to the idea of the Black Hawk, and the order of interception was directly issued. The stellar system did not know the obstacles and war machines, and flew over the escape route of the other warship.

Explosions in the space of the galaxy are like gorgeous fireworks.

...

In the galaxy's space, I watched the message coming back with a serious look.

The war had begun, and Qi Erbo next to him looked awkwardly: "The spies who settled in the Yingxian civilization team lost contact. Fortunately, we did not enter, this unknown force is a bit powerful."

I was silent for a while and did not answer. They placed intelligence personnel in the team of the civilization of the immortals, and the news just returned by the intelligence personnel was frightening.

They knew the fighting power of the three major armies of the Yingxian civilization, and it was precisely because they knew that I was so worried.

chapters.title: Chapter 899: : Land Debt Compensation
chapters.body:
Chapter 899: : Land Debt Compensation

"What? Doxiu's fleet is annihilated?" Borghius heard the news, unbelievable, sitting on the throne, his snake-like hair looking a little messy.

The three elite army of the Yingxian civilization, hundreds of thousands of super-light warships, carrying billions of war robots, and star destruction weapons.

They prepared for this expedition for several months.

It wasn't long before the news was returned and the entire army was annihilated.

Half of the elite army of Yingxian civilization is gone, and it has hurt the root.

Borseus's emotions were almost out of control. He did not doubt Boldo's ability. Dudo came from the battlefield step by step. He has rich experience in war and is the best general in the civilization of the immortals. In that unknown corner.

"How could this be?"

"This is an image from a Galactic battleship."

The intelligence agency released the images of the war, and the one-sided killings made people shudder.

"Master Du Xiu returned the news before his death. The other party has a large number of quantum stealth armors, which may belong to the top civilization."

Snapped!

Borghius heard the last sentence, paralyzed in the throne, eyes blinded.

He is very clear about the concept of top civilization. Compared with top civilizations, they are the difference between ants and giant elephants. If the other party kills them, they can easily clean them up.

In the universe, there may be billions and tens of billions of advanced civilizations. Any civilization with a life above green level can be said to be its own advanced civilization.

However, the number of top-level civilizations is very small. Every force that can reach top-level civilizations already has part of the potential of god-level civilizations, but it lacks the foundation of a small universe, and there are some powerful enough science and technology.

Is the other party a top civilization?

Bite it on the iron plate.

"Report, Wang, there is an emergency military situation."

A hurried report interrupted Bolhus's thoughts. Seeing the anxiety of the intelligence officer, his emotions became tense and there was a bad hunch.

"Say."

"Wang, the forces of the galaxy openly declared war on us, is a force called the marching ant group. The other party's fleet has entered Cassiopeia, and FD473 red scorpion galaxy occupied 12 important stars."

"what?"

Bolhous screamed in disbelief.

They have just received the news of Boldo's defeat. It didn't take long before 12 stars fell.

The stellar battle video is clearly displayed, and Bolhous' body is shaking. The opponent's war robot is far more advanced than them, and there are many other weapon technologies. The most important thing is that the massive anti-material bullets are much stronger than them.

Marching Ant Group?

Before that, he had never heard of such a force.

"It's over." Bolhus' eyes were darkened. "Send a messenger immediately and ask them to make peace."

Knowing that the other party had a quantum stealth armor and a powerful war robot, Bolhus had no intention of resisting. Now, summing up and compensating the other party is their best ending.

"Summary? Compensation? Hehe."

Sitting firmly on the lan of the Solar System Warfare Department, a smiley expression appeared.

Headed to the fleet of the Immortal Civilization, led by Da Mazu and the Black Eagle, he does not take action. This level of civilization can be practiced for them.

The imperial civilization admits defeat and peace, in his expectation.

"Promise their peace, demand war compensation of ten trillion stars, and cede the fairy galaxy."

Lan sent a message to Black Eagle and Da Mazu. After that, he took up the tea and drank quietly. The tea drink of the earth was in line with his taste and temperament, so he liked this thing.

...

Boom boom!

A series of explosions, horrific explosion scenes, battleships fragmented, war robots disintegrated and engulfed by light, and planets and even stars disintegrated and destroyed during the war.

Shocking images appeared overnight on Earth's major news channels.

All humans who saw this scene fell into silence.

In addition to playing games and sci-fi movies, the first real Star Wars pictures appeared in the vision of all humankind. The war on the earth, compared to it, is simply a house for children.

Too much panic, terror is spreading among humans on Earth.

The peaceful earth has never thought that one day they will face such a terrible cosmic war.

When the marching ant group released the video, it was very clear that this was a high-level alien civilization entering the galaxy, and the war with the marching ant group was in the galaxy.

This has brought a huge impact on the earth. Even if they knew the existence of aliens, this war of destroying stars and blasting the planet was the first time they saw it, making people panic.

"Isn't this good?" Julie asked, watching the video.

"No, we have to tell humans that the universe is cruel. When we enter the interstellar era, we will face cosmic civilization. If humans are still living in the ivory tower, they will be eliminated by the universe." Zhao Min's voice was extremely serious.

Star Wars video is she let people release to earth.

No matter how strong the marching ant group grows, they have an affection for humans and the earth. If human beings do not want to be eliminated, they must quickly adapt to the universe. The marching ant group can protect the growth of human beings on the earth, but it cannot be protected unconditionally forever.

...

The war between the marching ant group and the Yingxian civilization ended with the Yingxian civilization admitting defeat.

Bolhous was very clear that the strength of the marching ant group has surpassed the civilization of the immortal, and to resist the end will only send the life of the entire civilization of the immortal into the abyss of destruction.

Lan was not polite to the other side, took ten trillion star coins of war compensation, and took control of the Andromeda galaxy.

Lan did not choose to destroy the civilization of the immortal. In the universe, it is not difficult to destroy a civilization, but it is only the territory of the other party. Having a superlight ship to escape the galaxy, it is easy to take root in other corners of the universe.

The last thing in the universe is the planet.

And if they force the other party to die, and throw space weapons into the galaxy, it will not be good for them. The Milky Way is their home base, and has just started, and has not completely consolidated stability.

Settling down to win development time is their current priority.

The war in the Milky Way galvanized the advanced civilization forces of the Pisces-Cetacea super galaxy complex. The three elite legionaries of the Yingxian civilization were buried in the galaxy with no resistance, which shocked the other major forces.

Especially in the Pisces-Whale complex, all those forces who are jealous of the galaxy have stopped, and they dare not easily provoke new forces of unknown origin in the galaxy.

The marching ant group that defeated the immortal civilization instantly became one of the great forces of the Pisces-Cetacea complex, with great prestige.

...

As always in the earth, there is still a peaceful scene of [biquge www.biquku.biz].

Regarding the war in the galaxy, the marching ant group directly notified the countries of the earth and chose to announce it to humans.

The universe today is not peaceful. Human beings must have a strong sense of crisis. Otherwise, when the crisis really comes, the entire humanity will not accept the reality and collapse. Give them a warning and a sense of crisis. the behavior of.

This kind of war involving galaxies is almost unimaginable news on Earth.

The scene of the space war spread, it was almost a magnitude 10 earthquake, and the whole human race was shocked by the horrific interstellar war.

Marching Ant Group is still busy.

There was no suspense in the war, but their situation in the galaxy was finally understood by the outside world.

Although they severely damaged the civilization of the immortal, and some major forces were discouraged, there were still forces that did not give up. They were still secretly stunned, and sent exploration spacecraft into the Milky Way in an attempt to find out where their main star was.

The seductive power of huge amounts of antimatter and dark matter is too great, it is the strangest not to be stabbed.

After dealing with the war, the marching ant group's attention returned to strengthening the galaxy's defense again. If the defense of the Milky Way is broken, if the opponent's air-dropped space-saving weapons can destroy the entire galaxy, this is also why Lan has not chosen to press the civilization of the immortal and accept the compensation of the other party.

In the dark space, Chen Mo stood on the space of a lonely planet, overlooking the planet below, and a pride was floating in his heart.

Suddenly, Chen Mo reached out and nodded on the machine beside her.

Dozens of machines were started, blasting down towards the planet beneath them, and when they approached the dark planet surface, they were instantly anchored, and the gray nano robot was dropped into the planet surface.

Chen Mo's expression remained unchanged, and a command was launched in the armor. Hundreds of satellites were seen entering the orbit of the barren planet, and the signals were connected to form a satellite network.

The command signal passed through the satellite and fell into the barren planet.

The nano-robot slowly creeps, and the gray mist cluster grows at a speed visible to the naked eye, devouring the entire planet, floating quietly in it, or tumbling. Then, hundreds of kilometers of mechanical structures were formed on the surface of the planet and connected to each other.

In two hours, a huge mechanical planet was formed, all of which consisted of mechanical structures and huge equipment.

"Enable." Chen Mo gave an instruction to Mo Nu.

Invisible waves of space emerge from the planet, like ripples, spreading at the speed of light.

The space waves have a specific wave amplitude. In the field of vision of the Warframe, it can clearly restore the space wave amplitude. With the planet as the center, the space vibration film shifts with the rotation and revolution of the planet, and spreads to a fixed cosmic quadrant.

Chen Mo looked at the amplitude parameters of the space to determine the correctness of the data.

At the same time, other selected corners of the Milky Way are also undergoing transformation. The outermost star chain of the Milky Way, consisting of nearly 10 million stars, is a huge project.

The thickness of "Space Waves" will slowly increase to one light year. Once "Space Waves" is formed, the Milky Way will be wrapped in a light-year-thick space bubble. The spacecraft of outer space curvature wants to jump into the Milky Way and will jump to them. The set space points can only enter the galaxy's interior after being inspected by them. Otherwise, they need to fly at the speed of light for one light year and penetrate the waves of space. They cannot be found halfway through.

This will greatly reduce the difficulty of arming the galaxy.

Divine civilization and some powerful top civilizations also use this technology to protect the main star and main star domain.

After opening a head, what Chen Mo left to do was to let the space waves spread until they merged with other space waves.
