According to Chen Mo's prior calculations, it will take four months for the "Space Waves" of tens of millions of planets to completely envelop the Milky Way.

The wave of space is complete. If the enemy wants to destroy the galaxy, it needs to start from the edge of the galaxy.

Even if a space-curvature spacecraft is used to drop space-dimensioned weapons and start an explosion at the edge of the Milky Way, it will take tens of thousands of years to reach Earth. Chen Mo has enough time to eliminate the proliferation of space-dimensioned weapons or retreat calmly into the small universe.

The Milky Way is their old nest, no matter how much effort it takes to transform, Chen Mo is also willing to spare.

chapters.title: Chapter 900: : Xiaoyu Develops Super Powers
chapters.body:
Chapter 900: : Xiaoyu Develops Super Powers

Kuyao wore a black armor and a solemn expression. On the square behind him, 200,000 bitter men stood. After several months of selection and training, this batch of the most elite of the bitter soldiers was selected from the bitter.

The bitter sky and bitter dragon are at the forefront of the team, beside them, there is a female bitter person, she is called bitter thousand fantasy, is also the leader in this training, and also has a special super ability.

A deformation ability that can transform itself into any shape.

That form is different from the effect of changing the appearance of the nano-robot. The nano-robot can change the appearance, and it can be distinguished by the detector.

Everyone is full of energy today because they have completed their training and the next step is to leave the bitter star.

During the waiting period, a buzzing sound suddenly appeared, and a behemoth in the sky was landing towards the square, and soon suspended above the square, covering the sky. Several battle-armor figures shot down from the spacecraft.

In the blink of an eye, the radiating figure was suspended on the high platform of the square.

It is Lan.

Two hundred thousand bitter people paid their respects together in a uniform manner.

At the first glance of the team, Lan nodded with satisfaction. The innate advantage makes the suffering people's physical quality very good. In addition to suffering, the suffering people can be said to be the best candidates for the Warframe Division.

Now seeing the training results, Lan is very satisfied.

This is a guard for Chen Mo, which must be the most powerful.

After undergoing the initial selection, Lan used superpowers to develop technology for the selected bitter people.

200,000 suffering people are awakened with super powers.

Looking at the Universe Alliance, this team is absolutely shocking. As long as it is properly trained, it will be an army of 200,000 top warframe divisions. It is self-evident.

Earthling

"Your training at Bitter Star is over. Next, you will leave Bitter Star and go to other planets outside the starry sky to train, follow the God King, open up territory, and protect your homeland."

"understand."

The voice was like Hong Lei. All bitter people heard the title of "God King", their eyes showed reverence and excitement. It is their highest ideal to follow God King.

Lan nodded with satisfaction.

The naturalization of the bitter people is very smooth. Now that they have established a sense of identity and cohesion, it is much simpler. In the future, there will be a continuous flow of bitter people into the team, and their team strength will become stronger and stronger, it is not a matter of course to build top-level forces.

"From today, your team has a new name: Shenwei. It is the guard of the King of Gods. In the future, you will follow the King of God and protect the King of God."

call!

The breathing in the square became sharp.

They believe in God King, who rescued them, gave them a good life, gave them knowledge, technology, and even gave them super powers. Now it is a great gift to follow the King of God.

There is also the name of "Shenwei", which is a glory to them.

...

Inside an underground city.

The venomous girl was sitting at the top of the conference table, her face was covered by a mask, only her cold eyes. Gray Twenty-one is beside her, just like the poison skin girl, only showing a pair of gray eyes, which makes people not see what he looks like.

In front of the two are ten intelligent beings of various shapes.

The venomous skin girl moved her fingers and several small robots delivered syringes to ten people.

"What is this?" Zhi asked, looking puzzled at the syringe.

"This is not what you should ask." The black Liuli voice that spoke was cold and without a trace of emotion.

"No question? Dead ice."

Wipe out your mouth and insert the syringe into your arm.

Heliu, who was called 'Ice Cube', ignored the others, followed by inserting the syringe into his arm and throwing the empty syringe aside. The other eight lives did not hesitate and raised their hands to insert the syringe into the body.

Ten people were taken into the cabin behind them by the robot, and the quiet hall of the underground city recovered.

"Sister, everything is ready." Gray Twenty-one said.

"Um." Poison Skin nodded gently. "Let's get started."

...

"Husband, play a game with you." Xiao Yu lay on Chen Mo's back and said in his ear.

"Well, say." Chen Mo's attention is still on the holographic experimental platform in front of her, and she is designing complex instruments. This instrument is related to his mission in the science and technology library.

"We play the hardest game in the universe: rock-paper-scissors. You can only make stones. Whoever loses promises to do one thing for the other.

"You hooligan?"

"Just playing hooligan, can't you play?"

"Okay, female hooligan." Chen Mo made a symbolic stone, and saw Xiaoyu with a smile on her face, helpless and funny: "Say, what can you do to me hooligan?"

"I want to develop superpowers."

"Eh?" Chen Mo paused and stopped working: "Why do you suddenly want this?"

"I want to help you, but I ca n’t help. In case I develop superpowers, my abilities can help you! Can you? Wushuang they are all grown up, I am sometimes boring and ca n’t help you . "

Xiao Yu's beautiful eyes looked at Chen Mo hopefully, it was unbearable.

"Actually, you are the one who helps me the most. You are well organized in your home and it is my strongest backing and support."

"I think like Mo Nu and Sister Zhao Min, they can help you a little bit more, and they are so powerful."

"Aren't you afraid that after development, the superpower will become an ugly monster, such as a toad star?"

"Don't mention the toad, you just become the toad." Xiaoyu heard the toad, like a cat with a tail on it, blew instantly, scratched Chen Mo's ears, and looked like his teeth danced.

"Okay, don't change toad, change to fairy, it hurts!"

Mo Nu laughed and looked at them.

"How do you say toad, you react so much?" Chen Mo rubbed her ears and asked curiously.

Mo Nu interjected with a smile: "When Brother Mo disappeared, Xiao Yu's dream dreamed that you and a group of female aliens were getting better. There were more than one female aliens like toads, and Xiao Yu's sister cried."

"Hahahaha ... Don't shout, I don't laugh anymore ... hahahaha ..."

"You promised just now."

Xiaoyu flattened his mouth. If Chen Mu did not agree, he would be angry.

"Okay, promise, there are development techniques that don't change the appearance, don't worry about the appearance change." Chen Mo habitually touched her head.

Seeing that Chen Mo nodded, Xiaoyu's eyes bent into a crescent.

For a long time, Xiao Yu went out to take care of his family, and other things couldn't help, especially Chen Mo's. Zhao Min is in the management group. Not to mention Mo Nu, she is the only one who can take care of Chen Mo's home and other households. There are few other things that can help Chen Mo. Now that they are both grown up, if Chen Mo is studying, she can only be bored by herself.

"What ability do you want?" Chen Mo asked.

"I do n’t like those kinds of abilities that can be directedly developed. So many people have nothing special. Develop them with non-directional abilities. Everything happens. If my abilities can help you, I'm like Mo Nu and sister Zhao Min. In the same way, if I can't help you, I will confess my fate, be quiet behind you and not disturb you. "

"Fool." Chen Mo shaved her nose lightly.

"When does it begin?"

Chen Mo thought for a while and said, "Three days later, I will personally prepare the developed medicine for you."

After all, it is Xiaoyu who wants to develop super powers. As for Xiao Yu's ability, respect her ideas and follow her. Anyway, in Chen Mo's opinion, Xiaoyu is the goddess of fortune. Since she met Xiaoyu, her luck has been very good.

"Thanks husband."

Xiao Yu kissed Chen Mo's face heavily, happy as a child getting a toy.

"Let's play again?"

"Come back? Hooligans in the end? Don't play."

"I'm only going to produce scissors this time."

"Closing!"

chapters.title: Chapter 901: :Truman?
chapters.body:
Chapter 901: :Truman?

"Will it be too risky?" Zhao Min asked on the way to the laboratory.

Developing superpowers is no trivial matter.

They have been very cautious in the development of super-powerful awakening, especially in non-directional awakening development. Uncertain abilities are all components of gambling and can develop unique abilities. That is lucky, but there are very few lucky ones.

As far as the current Alliance Alliance's Warframe system is concerned, unless there are special superpowers, many superpowers can only be used in daily life, and they are not very useful in combat.

Once useless superpowers are developed, they are wasted, and each person has only one chance.

Xiaoyu looked down at the scenery below.

The city below, the flight of the armor, the holographic change, the traffic jam, the perfect city of science fiction, and the former completely look like two.

The change of the entire earth was led by Chen Mo, and Xiao Yu's pride has never weakened.

Hearing Zhao Min's concerns, Xiao Yu was very relaxed.

"It's good to take an occasional adventure, development ability. In the future, I can have more ability, give him a little more help, if I don't develop, I will have less ability."

The problem of developing superpowers was carefully considered by Xiaoyu.

After all, it is to develop your own body. If you still stay on the earth, you will not be willing to accept it, but this is not the time of the earth.

In the universe, human beings are humble like dust, and if they do not make themselves stronger, they will eventually be eliminated.

What she wants most is to have one more ability to bring as much help to Chen Mo as possible.

"I said I want to develop." Zhao Min laughed.

She had to admit that in some things, Xiaoyu was more decisive and braver than her.

"He is at the center of my world, but of the three of us, I gave him the least help, and I was very anxious, so I will make this decision."

"It's not something he can hear, or he's going to enforce family law."

Xiaoyu spat out his tongue.

Zhao Min laughed: "Of the three of us, Mo Nu is special, but you are the most important and help him the most. Without me, other people can manage the company. Without you, the family may not be so happy and stable. Yes For him, is family or company important? "

During the conversation, the two's armor reached over the marching ant group headquarters.

Without any obstruction, the two men's armors landed towards the area of Building No. 1. When the lab door was reached, Mo Nu waited at the door.

"Go in, Mo is waiting for us."

"The content of the chat between Sister Zhao Min and I just now can't be told to her husband." Xiao Yu whispered to Mo Mo.

Since having the human body, Mo Nu is now a complete life. Although she is still the most typical thinking of science and technology in daily life, she is also the human way of thinking.

Mo Nu is a bit special. She figured out the quantum consciousness in the quantum supercomputer. Even the living body, her consciousness still controls all the intelligence of the marching ant group.

So no matter what, you can't hide Mo Nu.

"Okay, I won't say." Mo Nu smiled slightly and nodded hurriedly.

Chen Mo, in a superpower development room, wearing a white coat, is carefully examining the data of the development capsule.

This time, it is a small fish development capability, which is sloppy. Seeing the three women come in, Chen Mo closed the data page.

"Thinking?"

"Think about it!" Xiao Yu focused his head.

Chen Mo transferred out the cabins that Xiaoyu needed for capacity development. The platform and injection solution were all preset. These are all customized by Chen Mo for Xiaoyu, and everything is best used.

"Hair smashed into balls, and my clothes were off."

"Oh." Xiao Yu answered.

Only Chen Mo, Zhao Min, and Mo Nu were in the superpower development room. Xiao Yu didn't hesitate. He took off his clothes and lay down quietly.

Xiaoyu's skin is crystal clear and her body lines are perfect, which can make every woman envious.

Even Chen Mo couldn't help but look at it every time.

"Look?" Zhao Min teased.

Chen Mo touched her nose awkwardly.

"I use the highest purity non-directional superpower awakening potion, the highest success rate for one awakening, the lowest discomfort and pain, the ability to awaken is arbitrary, is it right? Really using this random?"

"Um." Xiaoyu nodded surely.

"During the development process, the body may be a little uncomfortable and a little painful. You have to bear it. You will be fine when you sleep."

"I'm not afraid."

"Waiting for your good news." Chen Mo kissed Xiaoyu's forehead and closed the door of the development cabin.

The ventilator covers Xiaoyu's nose and mouth, other sensors are attached to Xiaoyu's body, and the liquid in the medical cabin starts to rise slowly until it floods Xiaoyu's body.

Development has begun.

I saw the small fish in the development cabin, and his body began to tremble unnaturally, obviously a little uncomfortable.

The superpower development room becomes quiet.

Next, Chen Mo didn't need to intervene much. He only needed to pay attention to the changes in the data and wait for Xiaoyu to come out.

This capability development has certain risks, but the risks are controllable and the medical cabin is ready. Even if an accident occurs, it can be treated as long as it is not immediately brain death.

The main danger is that after the ability is developed, it is beyond its control.

Whether it's waiting for Chen Mo and others, or Xiaoyu inside, it is a long process.

"Do you want to develop?" Chen Mo looked at Zhao Min.

"I'm not in a hurry," Zhao Min said, shaking his head.

...

From the beginning of development, Xiaoyu felt unwell.

Every cell in the body is faintly painful. It is not particularly painful, but it is uncomfortable. It is more painful than the birth of a baby. The discomfort does not disappear until after sleeping.

Xiaoyu had a long dream.

In the dream, the black hole exploded, the universe changed, the stars and galaxies changed, life appeared, and everything recovered. Then there is the four seasons change of the planet, life and death, and evolution and succession.

From the atomic world, genes, cells, life forms, to nature, planets, stars, the Milky Way, Virgo, supercluster, universe stars ...

And the universe is like a cell, outside the universe, reciprocating ...

All these links form a complete closed loop.

This perspective of God is terrifying.

People feel the small and humble life, feel that everything is meaningless, and people are at a loss.

In the dream, the solar system is like an atom, the galaxy is like a cell, and the universe is a complete life. Outside the universe, the universe is like an atom, until the infinite loop, and finally faster and faster, until the consciousness is gone.

If you can't quit, you may sink forever.

Suddenly thought of Chen Mo, Xiaoyu broke out of that terrible cycle subconsciously.

Xiaoyu stood in place, surrounded by all kinds of life.

From Xiaoyu's perspective, life is no longer life. Inside the body, there are still a lot of blue unknown substances tangling around.

That is the consciousness of life ...

For a while, Xiao Yu woke up quietly.

As she awoke, the development medicament in the development capsule slowly landed, and the sensors attached to each part of her body also retracted. Opening his eyes, Chen Mo's slightly worried face appeared in his vision.

"Husband."

Xiaoyu smiled with a bent eye, hugged Chen Mo, felt the temperature from Chen Mo's body, and the feeling of helplessness and loneliness in his dream disappeared, and everything felt real.

"Well, how do you feel?"

When Chen Mo saw Xiaoyu talking, her anxiety disappeared halfway, and she took over the clothes that Mo Nu handed over and wrapped Xiaoyu, covering her body scenery, and hugging her to the chair.

"It was a bit uncomfortable at first, but then we had a strange dream."

"What did you dream?"

"I dreamed of the Big Bang, the stars are like atoms, the Milky Way is like cells, and the universe is a living body, and then enters a very strange circular space, which makes people feel infinitely lonely. It feels like everything is false, life is meaningless, very Horror. It feels like Chumen's world. "

Xiaoyu described the dream world as much as possible, and found that he could not find the words that could be described.

"I had a similar dream." Chen Mo recalled the scene that the Science Library saw when he developed his brain domain, similar to what Xiao Yu described: "How do you feel now? Is there any discomfort in your body?"

"Nothing." Xiaoyu felt a shake and shook his head.

"Look at what awakened?"

Zhao Min spoke, with a look of curiosity, even Mo Nu and Chen Mo were no exception.

chapters.title: Chapter 902: : Special Ability Of Xiaoyu
chapters.body:
Chapter 902: : Special Ability Of Xiaoyu

Xiao Yu froze for a moment and began to think carefully.

She wasn't sure what kind of ability she was. The focus just now has been in that strange dream. Now Zhao Min asked, she focused on her ability to develop.

Chen Mo, Zhao Min, and Mo Nu were all around them, and the armor appeared around them, wrapping their bodies.

Xiaoyu looked puzzled with his full-armed appearance.

"What are you doing?"

"Afraid of the novice female driver on the road." Chen Mo laughed and laughed.

Zhao Min and Mo Nu next nodded slightly, agreeing with Chen Mo's statement.

Developed a super-powered life. At first, I did n’t know how to control it, and then it was n’t without losing control. They are not sure if Xiaoyu will be a novice female driver.

Safety first.

Seeing the appearance of the three, Xiao Yuqi laughed.

"Smelly man, go home and find your account."

"Hey." Chen Mo smiled cheerfully, not caring at all: "Look at what capabilities?"

Xiao Yu paused and said, "I don't know."

"Uh?"

All three were puzzled, all puzzled. In principle, there is no reason not to know what ability [the eighth area www.yeyin8.com] is right. Because the brain is sensitive and knows changes in the body.

"Has it not been successfully developed, or do you not know what the ability is called?"

"Successful, I don't know what the name should be." Xiaoyu was sure that she already had the ability, but she didn't know how to describe it.

"Are capabilities dangerous?"

"There should be no danger."

"Then you release it to us." Chen Mo was more puzzled.

Xiaoyu took a deep breath, closed his eyes to adjust his state, and activated the abilities in his body according to the brain's induction.

The moment he opened his eyes, Xiaoyu froze.

The world in her vision changed completely. The same scene she saw at the end of her dream.

"what's wrong?"

"I sense something weird, like your body of consciousness." Xiaoyu's expression glanced over the three of them.

"Sense of consciousness?"

This time it was Chen Mo's turn to choke.

Is there a specific substance to consciousness? What kind of ability is this ability? What special effect does it have? Is it good or bad?

Countless questions appeared in their minds in an instant, and at last they just looked at Xiaoyu dumbfounded. They are not small fishers and cannot see the world from a small fisherman's perspective.

"What is the conscious body?" Chen Mo asked.

"A lot of tiny blue fireflies are entangled around a light point, flying extremely fast, like a planet flying around the sun. A virtual body can only be sensed and cannot be touched. Your consciousness is different, your husband and Mo Nu's is special. "

Xiaoyu was surprised when he saw Chen Mo.

She saw that Chen Mo's body of consciousness was larger and brighter than imaginary.

The light spot in the middle of Zhao Min's body of consciousness is only the size of a nail, while the light spot in the middle of Chen Mo's body of consciousness is as big as a fist, and the light is dozens of times brighter than Zhao Min. Numerous times more, densely packed.

However, Mo Nu's conscious body is attracted and rotated by two fluorescent dots, and then entangles and flies around the light spot in the middle. The light spot in the middle is also two marble-sized light spots that attract each other and rotate.

This is not the most special. The most special is that Xiao Yu saw that in the core of the laboratory's super quantum computer chip, there is also a body of consciousness, which is the same as Mo Yu ’s body of consciousness, no matter the speed of the blue light point, The entanglement trajectories are all exactly the same.

It is no wonder that Mo Nu can resemble a quantum supercomputer, because the two conscious bodies are exactly the same, so the spiritual connection will occur.

"Can you still play like this?"

Chen Mo was surprised by the consciousness described by Xiaoyu. He had a scientific library in his mind, but this was the first time he heard such a description. He is not sure whether he will find the existence of such knowledge as the conscious body after he has obtained all the rights of the science and technology library.

No wonder the existence of super powers, even the science and technology library can not give a specific explanation, it is indeed mysterious, and it is almost the same as the existence of life.

"It's amazing."

Xiaoyu stared blankly at the three conscious bodies.

Suddenly, Xiao Yu felt hesitant and hesitated.

"Mo girl, come over here."

Seeing Xiaoyu beckoning, Mo Nu's face leaned on Xiaoyu's hand, wondering what she wanted to do. The moment Mo Xiaoyu's hand touched her face, Mo Nu widened her eyes and was surprised.

And Xiao Yu, who was sitting on a chair, also widened his eyes and hurriedly retracted his hands. It was incredible.

"What's wrong?" Chen Mo looked at the two in doubt.

"Telepathic? Or telepathic?"

Xiao Yu looked at her palm dullly. The moment she met Mo Nu, the pictures in Mo Nu's mind all appeared in her mind. For the first time, she saw the way of thinking of Mo Nu, the amount of horrible data calculation and information processing, which she never dared to imagine.

For the first time, Xiaoyu experienced the power of quantum consciousness.

"So amazing? I'll try it." Zhao Min came over in surprise.

The moment Zhao Xiao's palm touched her face, Zhao Min was also stunned.

At that moment, the two were in communication.

And she had the feeling that Xiao Yu could establish a one-way reading of her consciousness. Sure enough, Xiao Yu confirmed her idea the next moment, the picture in Xiao Yu's mind disappeared in her mind.

"Read it?" Zhao Min hesitated.

"It doesn't look like it should be more than that. I feel that this ability, apart from reading the mind, definitely has other special uses, but it has not been found for the time being." Xiao Yu smiled with surprise, she succeeded in adventure, she could feel this ability The particularity of this will definitely help Chen Mo in the future.

"I'll give it a try, and let me see the world in your eyes." Chen Mo also came over.

"Ok."

Xiaoyu nodded gently and reached out to Chen Mo's face.

Chen Mo paused. When he saw the picture in Xiaoyu's mind, he did sense the existence of the conscious body. This special existence was first seen by Chen Mo.

He wasn't sure if the conscious body he saw was a special substance.

Suddenly, Chen Mo's expression was strange, he felt a kind of sinking addiction.

In his sight, Xiaoyu's eyes blurred.

"Xiao Yu?" Chen Mo gritted her teeth and called out, "It's all right."

"I'm fine."

Xiaoyu hardly loosened his hand on Chen Mo's face, and the feeling of **** disappeared. Xiao Yu, sitting in a chair, breathed slightly. She was so involved just now that she got stuck in it.

The kind of mind-to-body communication and the unsuspecting touch of both sides made her fascinated.

Unleash the special ability, that special feeling disappears.

She didn't know if it was because of Chen Mo's consciousness, or whether Chen Mo had a special place in her heart. Xiao Yu now looks at Chen Mo's eyes and becomes more attached.

"Your ability is very special. There should be other usages that have not been discovered. During this time, I will accompany you to develop its usefulness."

"Ok."

Xiaoyu returned to the original surprise.

At least now she has a little more ability. She can help Chen Mo more in the future. She is very satisfied now.

"No wonder Chen Mo would say you are his lucky goddess." Zhao Min smiled with envy.

She is also happy for Xiaoyu, developing non-directionally, and awakening a special ability. Now she has a knot in Xiaoyu. At the same time, she also had to lament that Xiao Yu's luck was really better than anyone else.

"Go home first, other things, wait for Xiaoyu to rest before discussing."

Chen Mo held Xiaoyu: "Okay, go home first."

chapters.title: Chapter 903: : Hitomi'S Means
chapters.body:
Chapter 903: : Hitomi'S Means

Boom boom! !! !!

A life planet exploded and shattered, numerous flying stones blasted, mechanical debris in space floated into piles, and battleships were fighting, making space look messy.

Suddenly, a spacecraft jumped in space and appeared in a broken star system.

The next moment, the buzz and waves of space came from the spacecraft.

The terrifying space fluctuations centered on the spacecraft, and the speed of light exploded around.

The spacecraft instantly turned into nothingness, and the space of the galaxy, like a collapsed building block, was squeezed into a thin piece of paper in an instant. Countless fragments, flowing stones, have been compressed into atoms by space, as if a picture was rolled out in the galaxy.

When the star in the center of the stellar system encounters spatial fluctuations, such as a ping-pong ball that has been crushed by a bulldozer, it turns from a sphere into a two-dimensional circle. The beautiful scrolls are in danger.

The star system is destroyed, and space fluctuations are still spreading.

The spacecraft flying in the stellar system, at the moment when the space destruction alarm appeared, had already started the space curvature engine, hurriedly fled the stellar system, and the slow-moving, under space weapons, was compressed into atomic paper.

The war of the Hades super galaxy has entered a white-hot stage.

Jie He looked at her in shock, as a military member, she was no stranger to her legendary experience.

A small, thin man with chaotic colored lines on his body and dark eyes without much gloss. In the culture of the Warframe system, especially in the black pupil civilization, his life without physical force is not taken seriously.

Because I can't fight on the battlefield, I can't fight with others.

However, it was such a weak man with a weak combat ability. At that time, he was a black horse as a student of an ordinary college in the Black Star Civilization Classic Star Competition, which defeated the top famous schools and military generals of the Black Brain civilization. Encircle, win the classic championship and become the new star.

The emergence of crickets has attracted countless lives.

At that time, the military system of the black pupil civilization was solidified, and no military staff was willing to accept such a genius to come in and take its place.

In the end, Tong was recommended to the First Army by Tong Qing. With strong wisdom and strategy, I sang all the way in the staff of the First Army, and soon became the youngest general staff in the history of the First Army.

After four hundred years in a row, Badu occupied the position of No. 1 in the star ranking of Heitong Civilization, and the points far exceeded other stars.

However, even if the force is not strong, it has also become a military legend.

I have always been so confident that when commanding a war, I am calm. It's hard for outsiders to imagine that such a black-eyed person with an ordinary appearance hides an intelligent brain and has extremely decisive means and decision-making.

"Sir, would you like to rest?" Jiehe asked, leaning over.

"No need to."

The cricket's voice was dull, and his gaze did not leave the screen for the moment.

Decided to counterattack the Super Deer Super Galaxy, the black pupil civilization mobilized the fleet to enter the Super Deer Super Galaxy. In this battle, they have a reason to have to win.

琰 Taking over as commander of the military, the military confidence of the black pupil civilization has greatly increased.

In the face of the combination of Thor and Baixing civilization, Wu Yiran, who is in control of power, is not afraid to continue interspersing attacks in the battlefield, and quickly tears a hole in the battlefield of the Pluto Super Galaxy, quickly gaining a foothold in the Pluto Super Galaxy.

In just one battle, the major civilizations of the universe have learned the strategies and layout of top stars.

The strong black pupil civilization and white star civilization originally in the Super Deer Super Galaxy had their momentum stagnated, and the two legions were drawn into the confusing battlefield.

Heitong Civilization is now taking the initiative in the battlefield of the Super Deer Galaxy. The Thor civilization and the White Star civilization, the strategic control of the Pygmy Super Galaxy, are fading.

"News of the Sixth War Department: They encountered the main force of the third wing of the Fourth Army of the Thor civilization in the Swordfish galaxy. They had space weapons, and the war department suffered heavy losses. They asked for support." The command post's artificial intelligence reported frontline intelligence without emotion.

The staff around were tense, and began to calculate the possible impact of this intelligence.

Hearing the information on the state of the swordfish galaxy, the spirit trembled. The sailfish galaxy is a strategically important location, and the position of the main force of the other Fifth Legion's flanks is exposed, which is good news.

Entering into the state of shame, his thinking is very clear. The whole situation is in his mind. Almost as soon as the information is determined, he gives a decisive command.

"Fate, the fifth war department, and the eleventh war department went to support. At any cost, the main force of the three wings of the fourth leg of the thunder civilization of the sailfish galaxy was held for three days. Tree galaxy gathers to launch the fifth plan. "

It's time to counterattack.

琰 With a confident smile, she took a deep breath and watched the change in the defense of the star map like an outsider.

Four days later, the Thor and Baixing civilizations retreated in the Super Deer Super Galaxy, and the black pupil civilization announced the successful acceptance of the Super Deer Super Galaxy.

It was Tong Qing who announced the news.

After being imprisoned for the Shigan system, Tong Qing disappeared. The Super Deer galaxy won, and Tong Qing appeared again as the Speaker of the Civilization of Black Hitomi in front of the Universe.

The people in the black pupil civilization did not care about Hitomi's killing Dan in the Shigan galaxy. To the people of the black pupil civilization, Tong Qing's ability to kill Dan just shows that he is a powerful man.

Hitomi's popularity reached its highest value as the Hades super galaxy recovered.

Tong Qing, who is in power, immediately announced a change to the black pupil civilization.

Vigorously eliminate hidden rules such as aristocratic status and bloodline status restrictions in the military talent selection system, and open up talent selection and top warframes. Anyone who has the ability and strength will have the opportunity to enter the high-level of the black pupil civilization.

Under the supervision of the military, the largest corruption investigation was conducted among all administrative personnel, the ability was re-evaluated, the incompetent who had a vegetarian meal at the corpse were eliminated, and the able ones were supported. This measure has released the vitality of the black pupil civilization, and also eliminated the deadly administrative organ of the black pupil civilization. Countless young capable people have begun fierce struggle and competition.

In the end, Hitomi announced the abolition of the parliamentary system that had maintained the Hitomi civilization for hundreds of millions of years and a centralized system.

This move shocked the world.

The drastic measures vowed to break the reorganization spirit of the black pupil civilization and make people shudder. Hitomi's popularity in the Hitomi civilization, in the shortest possible time, is close to the strongest legend in the history of Hitomi civilization, the founder of Hitomi civilization: The Black God.

In particular, the abolition of the parliamentary system makes people see Tong Qing's ambition and courage.

The outside world is cautious about Tong Qing's changes, and it is too crazy. Especially the abolition of the parliamentary system rooted in all corners of the black pupil civilization. This system has been maintained for hundreds of millions of years. This change has touched the interests of major nobles and senior officials.

Sure enough, Tong Qing's changes inevitably met with opposition from major factions and aristocracy, and jointly put pressure on Tong Qing.

Just when everyone thought they would compromise the Hitomi Youth Association, the military announced that it would take over the Martial Star Galaxy martial law, a cleansing operation in the small universe of the Hitomi civilization.

Hundreds of nobles of the black pupil civilization were attacked during the purge, and tens of millions of members of the noble family were arrested. Whenever resistance appeared, it was destroyed together with the galaxy territory, and the property was confiscated.

Tong Qing's big movements and fierce wrists caused a stir in the entire Universe.

Countless people believe that immediately after taking office, Tong Qing made a lot of noise and instability, offending so many nobles and factions. It didn't take long for the chaos in the black pupil civilization to occur.

However, the outcome was greatly unexpected.

The cleansing of Tong Qing, instead of attracting the strong resistance of the nobles and members of the parliamentarians within the black pupil civilization, strongly matched Tong Qing's actions. In the black pupil civilization controlled by Tong Qing in the top ten legions, any voice against Tong Qing is trying to die.

Even if the power in hand is gone, Xiao Ming is still blessed. The nobles have accumulated wealth for hundreds of millions of years. Although they lost a little, they are still enough for their families to live comfortably. As long as they do not oppose Tong Qing, they will be fine.

It wasn't until this moment that the outside world felt wrong.

From regaining the superstar galaxy and laying the foundation of prestige, to a series of centralization, transformation, and cleaning.

All these are premeditated and prepared.

With such a high-intensity change, the black pupil civilization has not weakened, but has become more powerful. All rights are concentrated in Tong Qing's own hands.

The completed black pupil civilization has successfully become the strongest of the seven god-level civilizations.

chapters.title: Chapter 904: : Brain Surgery
chapters.body:
Chapter 904: : Brain Surgery

The war conflict between god-level civilizations seems to come to an end after the black pupil civilization has regained the Pygmy Super Galaxy.

Thunder God civilization does not seem to retaliate against the black pupil civilization again. Bai Xing civilization chose to return to a low-key defense. Black pupil civilization is undergoing large-scale reforms due to internal changes. Various rules need to be improved and there is no intention to continue.

The grievances of several civilizations seem to come to an end.

After a war with each other, they seemed to be in peace.

Five years.

In the past five years, what happened in the Shigan galaxy; the death of Dan; the thunder civilization joined forces with the white star civilization and the war between the black pupil civilization; Tong Qing's reformation of the black pupil civilization; these have become the lives of many cosmic alliances Nothing to talk about.

The ordinary life of the universe will not pay attention to the unknown force that took the lead from Shi Ganxing, and the Universe did not pay attention to this extra corner in the remote corner of the Rania Kea Super Galaxy.

Chen Mo flew towards the No. 1 Hospital of Wushuang University and landed in the hospital while listening to the report of Mo Nu. When they arrived at the operating room, a group of brain specialists were gathered around the operating table.

On the operating table lies a patient who has just thawed from the freezer.

Since Lan followed Chen Mo's return to the earth, medical technology research in the brain field has always been the most important direction. Because Lan's daughter, the brain is half dead, Chen Mo promised to have Lan to heal his daughter.

Chen Mo has never forgotten this.

From the beginning, Chen Mo asked Zhao Min to collect brain injury, brain death, and vegetative cases from all corners of the earth for treatment research. He also found a large number of medical methods on biological brain damage and partial brain death in the science and technology library to tackle some brain death treatment options.

In the past five years, in addition to preparing the [quantum life] plan, Chen Mo spent the rest of his time researching and treating cases of 'partial brain death'.

The patients on the operating table were part of the brain death caused by the car accident, which is very similar to the situation of Lan's daughter.

In the past five years, the staff of the brain medicine team have performed a large number of similar cases, with success and failure.

"Are you ready?" Chen Mo asked wearing a mask.

"All right." A doctor wearing goggles next nodded, judging from his figure and white hair at the corners, he was an older professor.

Yang Donghe, professor of brain medicine at Wushuang University, belongs to the top human brain experts on earth.

Chen Mo taught this brain medical team the medical technology used to treat some brain death and brain injuries in the science and technology library without any reservation. After clinical research during this time, the brain medical technology that their team has mastered, even in the universe The league also belongs to the top level.

"I'm coming for the operation."

All doctors looked at Chen Mo in surprise.

Since the clinical period of this time, Chen Mo's main operation is not much, but the success rate is the highest. Many times they wanted Chen Mo to perform the surgery, but Chen Mo was sometimes too busy to have surgery at all.

Now Chen Mo is in charge, they are very happy.

Chen Mo's medical skills are not bad. He once hosted the development of Reedman virus vaccines that endangered humans, and also developed various drugs and biomedical technologies, which gave them far more brain surgical theories they understood.

It is just that Chen Mo's radiance in many fields, including medical field, is obscured by his ray in the field of physics, not being noticed by the outside world.

Over the years, he has focused on the field of brain science and clinical surgery, and has studied the brains of various organisms in the universe. Today, Chen Mo is already the top brain surgery expert.

This operation is very important, and they are verifying their latest surgical plan.

For the treatment of some cases of brain death, the best clinical method currently found is: partly replace the brain, remove the part of the patient's brain, and then replace it with cultured brain cells.

It sounds simple, but the surgery is extremely difficult.

The brain is the most complicated part of life, and the nerves are extremely complicated. Especially the race in which Lan is located. The brain is developed and the difficulty of surgery is greatly increased. This is one of the reasons why Lan has not been able to find a cure for so long.

Partial brain replacement surgery requires the removal of the cell death cortex of the patient's brain. Cell culture technology is used to prepare the living brain cell tissue in advance, and then the brain is filled and surgically implanted into the living body's brain.

This treatment is very difficult. They need to identify the area of the dead cortex of the brain, confirm the brain function and cell type of the resection.

This will improve the success rate of the program.

In the past few years, the medical team has used this method to perform thousands of operations, with successes and failures.

The more complicated the brain structure is, the lower the success rate is. This is why Chen Mo has been afraid to perform surgery on Lan's daughter. There is only one chance. Chen Mo must raise the success rate to the highest level.

With the improvement of technology for a long time and the increased accuracy of robotic surgery, the success rate is now rising.

"Began dormant living dormancy." Chen Mo said.

"Ok."

The robot inserts a fine needle into the patient's blood vessel and begins to inject the dormant agent. Living dormancy is different from freezing chamber dormancy. Active dormancy can ensure the activity of each cell and is better for living organisms.

"Beginning of nerve block and deep brain dormancy."

Chen Mo clicked a few times on the nearby instrument, and the area data of the patient's brain all appeared on the nearby holographic screen.

The anesthesiologist successfully performed brain dormancy and anesthesia.

The machine on the operating table immediately performed craniotomy.

Surgery is mainly controlled by machines, robotic scalpels are much more precise than humans, and complex tissue removal surgery is performed with a particularly high success rate.

On-site brain experts mainly provide unexpected solutions and perform some operations that robots cannot perform, as well as temporary changes.

"Identified areas of cerebral cortex."

Artificial intelligence reminds the brain that a red marker appears on the holographic screen.

"Put a nanobot to mark nerve cells."

"Sampling and culturing cerebral cortex cells."

"No. 3 cell scalpel, began to remove dead tissue."

Chen Mo gave two instructions to artificial intelligence.

Cell scalpel is a special kind of scalpel, this kind of fine scalpel made of special nano materials. Under the control of the machine, extremely accurate surgery can be performed, and it is very efficient.

Such complicated brain surgery, once mistakes are more trouble, can not tolerate sloppy.

Within three hours, all dead cerebral cortex tissues were removed.

The structure of the brain is too complicated. The entire surgical procedure seems simple. In fact, every second is dancing on the blade. The nanorobot marks the dead cortex area and provides a precise surgical area for the cell scalpel.

Every **** must be very careful, even if a few nerves are incomplete, it may cause physical problems in patients, and the brain has countless tiny nerves.

"The patient's brain cells are stable," the physician next to reports.

"Cerebrocortical cell culture is complete." The physician responsible for printing of the cerebral cortex followed the report.

The faster the brain cells are implanted, the higher the success rate. Therefore, cells in the cerebral cortex use cell culture agents to accelerate cell division. All of this needs to be completed within ten hours. After this time, the brain is always in danger.

"Identify the location of the dead nerve cells."

"Prepare a cell division agent at a concentration of 0.0026."

"Prepare to fill the cerebral cortex."

chapters.title: Chapter 905: : No One Is Sure Which Of Tomorrow And Doomsday Comes First
chapters.body:
Chapter 905: : No One Is Sure Which Of Tomorrow And Doomsday Comes First

Luo Yang felt himself sinking into endless darkness, wandering in the unconscious void. As if seeing a ray of dawn, consciousness gradually awakened from the darkness.

Suddenly, Luo Yang saw a large truck bumping towards him.

The body seemed to be hit hard, and Luo Yang opened his eyes suddenly from the bed.

A dream.

Ringing in the dream scene, Luo Yang was in fear.

He remembered that he had a car accident before he was unconscious.

Suddenly surprised, Luo Yang looked around, and sure enough he saw a group of people around him, wearing white coats, more like doctors.

He did not die.

Making sure he wasn't dead, Luo Yang exhaled.

"Ahhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhh?" Luo Yang, who just wanted to speak, had a strange sound in his throat, like a babbling talking.

"It goes without saying that your brain's speech cortex and motor cortex are damaged. You have just completed the surgery, and you will need to learn to talk and walk again later. Before that, speak with a conscious translator." Chen Mo gave a conscious translator to Luo Yang put it on.

"Where is this?"

Luo Yang looked familiar at the man in front of him.

"Here is the brain department of the First Affiliated Hospital of Wushuang University. You have an accident and your brain is damaged. Fortunately, your operation was successful." Chen Mo said.

"Are you Chen Mo? The operation you gave me?" Luo Yang suddenly rang out who was the man in front of him, Chen Mo, the strongest super genius in human history. The legendary man, who was beside him, gave him treatment, which was incredible.

"Your family agrees to your participation in my medical research project, so our team performed a partial brain exchange operation for you. The operation was successful. It seems that your memory function is OK."

After confirming the data, Chen Mo passed the tablet to the medical specialist next to her.

From the words of Chen Mo, Luo Yang knew what was going on.

After his car accident, his brain was damaged and other hospitals could not treat it. In the end, the family pinned their last hope on Chen Mo's medical research project. Then the operation was successful and he was saved.

"Thank you."

"You're welcome." Chen Mo smiled slightly. "Take a break and wait to see your family."

...

"This is the latest operation on some cases of brain death. The operation was successful."

Chen Mo handed Luo Yang's case to Lan.

Lan, who is still watching the layout of the defense lines of the Milky Way and the Fairy, has her eyes fixed on her medical records and reaches up. Her wise eyes rarely flash other emotions.

"Brain medical technology is mature."

"Really?" Lan's eyes skyrocketed, his voice a little excited.

"I have been studying this for five years. A total of 4926 operations were performed this year, and the overall success rate was 78%, while a total of 683 operations were performed in the last two months, the success rate was 98.4%." Chen Mo said: "The first year The failure of the operation has reduced the data. You should know that this complicated brain surgery cannot guarantee a 100% success rate. "

There is no perfect technology in the world. At present, the development of this technology is unknown. It may take more than ten years, even decades, or longer to increase the last 1%.

Lan looked at the data, and some brain death surgery can reach a 98% success rate, which is already terrifying.

Even the medicine of the top civilization in the universe, in this field, has a 70% success rate, which is very powerful. At that time, it was because his success rate was too low that he dared not perform surgery on his daughter.

"I came here to tell you that if surgery is needed, it can be done at any time. But your brain is too developed, surgery is more complicated than other lives, and the risk will be relatively high." Chen Mo said.

Chen Mo has learned that although Lan's ethnic group is small in number, his brain is very developed, and Lan is the best in the ethnic group. His brain is more complicated. As Lan's daughter, her superiority is affirmed.

"How high is the risk?"

"Probably only 70% to 80% of them succeed."

Hearing this success rate, Lan became silent, and then calmly said, "If the operation fails, I'm afraid I can't work for you."

"You are a father, and so do I. I understand your mood. I cannot wait for a hundred years to treat your daughter because of these concerns. No one is sure which one will come first on the last day or tomorrow. The universe is so big, we Whether we can survive for a hundred years is uncertain, after all, we have offended several god-level civilizations. "

Lan looked at Chen Mo seriously, his expression eased a lot.

His daughter has always been his biggest heartache and concern.

There is an agreement between him and Chen Mo, and he will serve Chen Mo. Once he cannot treat his daughter, he does not know what he will do in the future. But Chen Mo used the fastest speed to develop technology to rescue his daughter.

He does not believe that technology is false. In recent years, he has contacted almost all the core technologies of the marching ant group. He knows how big the marching ant group is and how scary Chen Mo's research and development capabilities are.

"Surgery," Lan said, taking a deep breath.

Lan thought of her daughter lying in the freezer, her heart tingling. He didn't have much hope before. He didn't dare let his daughter have surgery. Now Chen Mo gives him such a big success rate that he can't refuse.

"If the operation is successful, I will work for you all my life, if ..."

"After the operation is completed, you should make a decision and don't be too pessimistic." If Chen Mo interrupts Lan, even if he is a god, in the face of this half-step step into the ghost gate, it is impossible to guarantee 100% success rate.

...

In a freezer compartment of the freezer, a woman with silver skin lies, similar to Lan, with the softness of female life on her face, her narrow eyes closed and very quiet.

She is Lan's daughter, Yang Sikal Qingyue.

There was an accident in the spaceship and it became a living dead with local brain death.

Half of the body stepped into the ghost door and closed.

Lan calmly looked at the daughter in the cabin, with sadness in her expression. Every once in a while, he would come to the area of Building No. 1 to see his daughter once.

His daughter is now his only concern.

Originally desperate, but Chen Mo gave him hope.

In the past, he would never believe that he could develop a technique to treat his daughter within a short period of time, and that it was still 80% certain. So when he agreed to serve Chen Mo, he gave Chen Mo a 100-year term.

But when he returned to Earth and saw Chen Mo's horror, he changed his mind.

Over the years, the Earth's brain medical technology is climbing wildly. They deliberately treated various brain patients and encountered various cases, including some brain death.

The case of some brain-dead patients being rescued gave him great confidence.

Although some patients may be accompanied by sequelae and amnesia after being treated, sequelae can be treated and amnesia does not matter. As long as his daughter is alive, it is more important than others.

He believes that what Chen Mo said is true, he has 80% certainty to cure.

Bacheng's grasp is already very high, and the medical technology of god-level civilization may not be able to achieve this level.

"Yueer, the boss said that the technology for healing you is mature, and I will be able to perform surgery on you tomorrow. If the surgery is successful, you will be awake ..." Then, I saw tears in Lan's eyes, I don't know if it was sad or happy.

After spending an hour in the freezer, Lan was able to sort out his emotions, and Lan was reluctant to leave the freezing laboratory.

chapters.title: Chapter 906: : Yang Sikar Qingyue
chapters.body:
Chapter 906: : Yang Sikar Qingyue

The next day, Department of Brain, First Affiliated Hospital of Wushuang University.

On today's earth, medical technology has reached its extreme. Unless it is about brain and neurosurgery related to life and death, other diseases will no longer be hospitalized.

Even the injuries of missing arms and legs can be treated with recovery fluids to regenerate the limbs.

Today there is only one operation in the hospital, all emergency resources are fully prepared, and all brain experts are waiting at the door of operating room 1.

A freezer was held by the machine and appeared outside the operating room.

Followed by them were Chen Mo, Mo Nu and Lan. The brain expert, who was already waiting, immediately went up and followed the freezer into the operating room, and Lan stopped outside the operating room door.

"It's over to you, boss." Lan's voice was a little hoarse, as if begging.

"Yes, wait for my good news." Chen Mo said solemnly, turned and entered the operating room. Lan didn't move, his eyes staring at the operation door were dull.

"Mr. Lan, go sit for a while. The operation will take a long time." He hesitated and whispered.

"Thank you, no need, I'll wait here." Lan shook her head slightly, keeping her eyes open for a moment.

His voice was clearly depressed and worried, and his back was a bit slumped. I didn't bother Lan any more, at this time, it was out of place to say anything.

Operating room.

Chen Mo pressed the thawing button of the freezer, and the frost covering Qingyue's body slowly faded, revealing a slender silver body. The skin is as smooth and smooth as mercury, and there is no extra cellulite. The closed eyes only have a long and narrow gap. With the aesthetics of the silver moon, this is an uncompromising beauty.

The reason why patients choose to freeze is because patients with this major disease are not suitable for dormancy, but only suitable for freezing. Freezing also ensures that dead cells in the brain do not spread.

"All physical functions are restored." After the thawing is completed, Mo Nu reports the physical function of the body again.

Chen Mo reached out and touched Qingyue's skin. She was very soft and could feel the temperature in the skin. Chen Mo was the first silver-moon person to touch a woman, similar to a human being, except that her skin color and body were different.

"Open the life support system."

"Starting neuroanaesthesia and dormant brain."

Chen Mo checked the data again, and after confirming that there was no problem, he gave instructions and the anaesthetist next to him meticulously began to inject the dormant agent and anesthetic agent.

Every expert on the field knows the importance of this female life form.

As early as five years ago, they joined the project team and got the condition information of this female life form. Five years of research and development of brain medical technology, all cases of treatment and research are for the life of this woman.

Experts involved in the project have privately guessed the identity of this woman's life, and everyone began to think of it as the boss's woman, and this idea has remained to this day.

It wasn't until they saw Lan before entering the operating room that they really knew that this female life was the daughter of the chief instructor.

The cranium was cut perfectly with a short-pulse laser, and the brain was clearly visible in front of everyone.

The brain structure of humans in silver moons is different from that of humans. The brains are transparently colored and crystal clear, like star maps in the universe.

The brain experts who were present got information about Qingyue a few years ago and have seen the hologram of this brain, but they really shocked when they saw it.

The brain is faintly fluorescent and colorful, like the galaxy in the universe, extremely mysterious.

The universe has evolved such a complex and wonderful brain, and everyone has to admire the magic of life.

"Mark areas of brain necrosis," Chen Mo said.

Nano-robots are put into the brain, and living organisms dormant, don't worry about their body's rejection reaction to nano-robots. In the brain in the hologram, two finger-sized areas are marked and pass directly to the area inside the brain, which is why the treatment is difficult.

A coarse salt-sized piece penetrated the skull and entered the brain.

And because the first time can not be frozen treatment, brain necrosis area spread. It is certain that as long as one hour later, people cannot be saved.

In space accidents, the speed of the debris is not as large as [笔 趣 阁 www.baquku.com]. This small debris has not completely destroyed the brain, which is already a lucky thing.

The optimal time for surgery is 20 hours. Once 20 hours have passed, the necrotic brain cells deteriorate again, and the risk factor will increase.

"Mark the damaged nerve."

"Sampling cultures of brain and plasma cells."

"Scan your brain and build a holographic brain."

Qingyue's surgery is troublesome, and another reason is the problem of brain cell culture and cloning.

The higher the level of life, the more difficult it is to clone cells, which is confirmed. Because the higher the level of life, the more complex the genetic code and structure, any problem in any link will lead to failure.

Silver Moon humans are the top intelligent life groups. The genetic code and structure are much more complicated than humans, making cell culture and cloning difficult.

In order to overcome this problem, Chen Mo specially went to the science and technology library and took a variety of related technologies such as "Theory of Advanced Intelligent Life Cell Cloning Technology" and "Theory of Advanced Intelligent Life Cell Tissue Culture Technology" for the development of human cells Cultivate and clone.

It took more than a year to solve the problem of Qingyue's cell culture and cloning, and produced a medicine specifically used to culture humans of Yinyue.

"Marking of damaged areas is complete."

Mo Nu ordered a holographic projection. On the colored holographic brain, a gray area appeared, which was a necrotic brain area. The gray area is divided into 12 parts along a neurally dense network.

Within the marked area, all brain cells have died.

The hardest part is in the middle of the brain, around the debris, where brain cells die quickly, forming a gourd-shaped necrotic area, which is the hardest part of the operation.

After necrotic areas need to be excised, brain cells cultured with nanorobot handlers are used to fill and repair.

"Began to remove necrotic brain tissue."

"No. 5 scalpel, remove the marked part A." Chen Mo magnified the holographic brain.

...

Time passed little by little.

The corridor of the hospital was always deadly silent. There is only Arashi and Aya, and Arashi's bodyguard red crab. No one speaks, all waiting quietly.

Every hour passed, the air was heavy.

Lan had been standing outside the door of the operating room, the slender back was a little thin, Xiao Suo.

The cricket and the red crab saw it for a long time. Normally, Lan gave them the impression of being insignificant, cruel, and rigorous. But today, they also see the most vulnerable side of instructors.

For three hundred years, Lan has been waiting for the arrival of today.

The accident made him completely decadent at the peak of his time. He chose to escape, unwilling to face the reality, and numbed himself with a paralyzed drink every day.

He escaped for more than 300 years.

He has dreamed countless times that he has the skills to resurrect his daughter, and he hoped that he would be pregnant for more than 300 years.

But this day came, and he was a little scared.

Xiao Suo's back hides his unknown fear, fearing that the operation will fail.

If the operation fails, he doesn't know what to do, he never thought about this day. If a **** exists, he is willing to kneel down and ask the **** at this moment.

Every second is a torment to Lan.

Eighteen hours of non-stop, when the lights outside the operating room door went out, Lan's body trembled slightly, her palms unconsciously tightened.

The moment the door of the operating room opened, Lan's body shuddered slightly, her eyes closed tightly, and she dared not open for a long time.

He saw Chen Mo, but did not see joy in Chen Mo's eyes.

It took a long time for Lan to open his eyes in exchange for Newton's eye-like pupils, with despair, and seemed ready to accept reality.

"The operation was not completely successful."

Hearing this sentence, Lan's despair was pulled out, and a heart hung up at the same time.

Partial success means part of it, and his daughter has hope.

Qingyue lying on the hospital bed was pushed out of the operating room, her face was still quiet, and the surgical incision on the skull was restored by the recovery fluid.

"Her brain damage was theoretically repaired, but she didn't wake up."

"When can I wake up that month?" Lan stared at her daughter, her voice shaking.

Chen Mo sighed.

"She has been frozen for more than 300 years, and in the case of severe brain damage, it may be a deep conscious problem. Similar to a vegetative, I ca n’t determine the time of waking. I used a method of treating vegetatives to stimulate her with nerve currents. I did n’t wake up, she wanted to deep consciousness, she needed to find other ways to wake her up. "

Lan touched Qingyue's hand, a little tight, felt the temperature of the palm, and tears appeared in her eyes: "At least better than letting her lie in the freezer, she now has the hope of waking up."

"Mr. Brother, if it is really a matter of consciousness, there may be a way for her to wake her up." When everyone's mood was low, Mo Nu's pleasing voice broke the low atmosphere. For a moment, Mo Nu attracted everyone's attention .

"Who has a solution?" Chen Mo asked in surprise.

"Sister Xiaoyu."

chapters.title: Chapter 907: : Xiao Yu'S Attempt
chapters.body:
Chapter 907: : Xiao Yu'S Attempt

Two sets of warframes landed on the warframe platform of the First Affiliated Hospital.

Xiaoyu and Zhao Min came out of the armor.

His face was fair, his body was perfect, and his appearance had not changed. But Xiaoyu's temperament changed a lot. He was more confident and more attractive than before.

This is a psychological change.

After the successful development of superpowers, a confident change.

Zhao Min around was still the same as before, the figure and eyebrow exuded the unique charm and charm of intellectual women, as well as the dignity and ability of a senior manager for a long time.

Just received the contact from Chen Mo, the two rushed over as soon as possible.

In the intensive care unit, Chen Mo and Mo Nu were wearing white coats, and Lan was sitting next to her. The eyes were on the moon in the bed, and the red crab and the cricket stood in the corner. The room was silent.

Xiaoyu stopped next to Chen Mo: "My husband, what's wrong?"

"Use your ability to help. Qingyue's surgery is half done, and some of her brain's necrotic tissue has been successfully repaired, but she hasn't woken up yet. I can't find the specific cause for the time being. I guess it's a deep conscious sleep problem. You use your power to try to wake her up. "

Chen Mo gave Xiaoyu a simple explanation.

Xiaoyu's ability is very special and it is related to consciousness. For five years, Chen Mo has not completely figured out the use of this particular superpower.

Like Dr. X's mind reading, but Xiao Yu's ability is not limited to mind reading.

After digging and exploring during this time, Chen Mo found that Xiaoyu can also tamper with, peep at other people's memories, communicate with each other, and see emptiness of consciousness, as well as understand the language of small animals.

Chen Mo also believes that many uses of small fishing capacity have not been discovered.

So when Mo Nu mentioned Xiaoyu just now, Chen Mo immediately agreed with her idea. Because of the use of awakening vegetatives, Xiaoyu might not have tried it, it might be useful, at least one hope.

"I haven't tried this."

Xiaoyu didn't know the specific situation of Qingyue. She hadn't tried this usage, so she couldn't guarantee that she would wake up Qingyue. In case of failure, it would be bad.

"It's okay, just go all out." Chen Mo set his sights on Lan, and needed his permission, Xiao Yu could only try.

"Please, Madam."

Lan Chao Xiaoyu saluted, with hope in his eyes, and now Xiaoyu is his last hope.

"Mr. Lan is polite, let me try."

Xiaoyu nodded slightly, held the little mother animal on his shoulders, put it in Zhao Min's arms, and walked to the bed. Since Xiaoyuhui communicates with small animals, this little female animal likes Xiaoyu and follows her every day.

Everyone else stood up and gave the space to Xiaoyu.

Taking a deep breath, Xiaoyu slowly opened his eyes and entered a super state.

Superstate was taught by Chen Mo. In recent years, Chen Mo has taught her how to use her abilities as she wants.

In the superstate, the world becomes different.

In Xiaoyu's eyes, each person's brain area on the field was beating a mass of consciousness. Qingyue lying on the bed, the conscious body beat much slower than others.

The light spot at the center of the faint blue conscious body is very faint. The blue fluorescent spots around it are extremely slow, almost stagnant, as slow as a snail.

For the first time, Xiaoyu saw such a slow-moving consciousness.

Fingertips crossed Qingyue's cheek, and after touching her ear, Xiaoyu felt a delicate and soft touch, accompanied by a touch of coolness. This is the feel of the skin of a silver-moon female, whose temperature is slightly lower than that of a human.

After entering Qingyue's body of consciousness, Xiaoyu was in a state of chaos. Everything in front of him was nothing but darkness. No glory was seen, as if time had stopped.

The scene seen by Xiaoyu is the current state of Qingyue.

This kind of deep consciousness of ignorance of time and nothingness.

If you don't interfere, no one knows when she will wake up.

"Qingyue." Xiaoyu tried to shout with consciousness, hoping to get a little response, but let her down, without any response.

"Qingyue?"

Try to call a few times, but still no response.

Withdrawing from Qingyue's consciousness, Xiaoyu's gaze fell on the faint blue conscious body. This is the first time she has awakened a vegetative with her ability, and has not been exposed to this usage before.

The small fish with a feeling in his heart gently touched the blue conscious body of Qingyue You.

This action, like knocking down the first domino, instantly caused a chain reaction, and the almost stagnant conscious body accelerated with the orbital movement of the blue fluorescent dots, and the surrounding fluorescent dots were also collided and started to accelerate.

...

"Will there be a problem [笔 趣 阁 5200www.bqg5200.me]?" Zhao Min asked in a low voice beside Chen Mo.

For Qingyue, she hasn't seen many times. She had seen it before entering the freezer and knew that Qingyue was Lan's daughter. Because she wanted to treat her daughter, Lan joined their team.

In recent years, Chen Mo has been immersed in the research and development of brain medical technology in order to treat this woman.

If there is a problem with Qingyue, Lan may also quit their team.

Lan's ability is obvious to all. If Lan leaves, it will be a big loss for the marching ant group.

"I don't know." Chen Mo shook his head, his expression calm: "Sleeping in consciousness is just a possibility, and I'm just guessing. The consciousness is too mysterious, I can't be sure. Xiao Yu's super power is special, and it is related to consciousness, but I Not sure if it will work. "

Zhao Min no longer asked, standing quietly beside Chen Mo. Knowing Xiaoyu's special ability is special, but Zhao Min rarely sees Xiaoyu using this ability.

In daily life, Xiao Yu does not use her abilities at all.

The ward was quiet and everyone's attention was on Xiaoyu and Qingyue in the hospital bed. I hope Xiaoyu's ability can create surprises.

Suddenly, Chen Mo stared.

He saw Qingyue in his bed, his eyelids moved.

Not only Chen Mo noticed, Lan also noticed that he was instantly ecstatic. As soon as I wanted to shout, I was stopped by Chen Mo. Seeing that Xiao Yu was still there, Lan could not hold back the excitement and stood aside, anxious and surprised.

...

Xiaoyu didn't expect that her whim was actually useful.

She just tried to control the other's consciousness to speed up. She didn't expect it to be true. Xiaoyu could feel that Qingyue's consciousness was awakening.

The faint blue light dots she moved formed the current chain reaction.

The faint blue light spots of each conscious body are irregular, uncertain orbits, and now slowly take shape. When the last faint blue light spot was also brought up, Xiaoyu could feel the difference of the conscious body.

Without her interference, the faint blue light dots of the conscious body are completely autonomous. She saw different pictures. It was Qingyue's conscious memory, and she could feel the emotions in the memory.

"Qingyue." Xiaoyu called again with consciousness.

As soon as the sound fell, Qingyue's silver eyelashes trembled gently, and her eyes slowly opened. Her eyes are like silver rings inlaid on obsidian, like silver Newton rings in the night, layers of reincarnation, mysterious and deep.

For a moment, the silver-faced face gradually became angry.

Even different life groups can see that the indescribable unique temperament on this face makes people glance deeply into their minds and make them unforgettable.

"My name is Yang Siqingyue." Yang Siqingyue's voice was uncertain.

chapters.title: Chapter 908: : Jingruo Youlan
chapters.body:
Chapter 908: : Jingruo Youlan

"Yueer!" Lan's eyes only left her daughter's shadow, and she looked excited, seeing a hand that grabbed Qingyue, holding it tightly, dare not relax any more.

Yang Siqing Yue looked back, her silver reincarnation-like eyes were deep and calm, glanced around, and finally her eyes fell on Xiaoyu. The voice she heard just now should be this woman's. Looking at Xiaoyu at this moment was a little more kind.

The two looked at each other and nodded their heads to pay tribute.

"Father." Yang Siqingyue's voice was soft, like Konggu Youlan.

"Yueer, you're really good, you're really good." Lan's voice was trembling. This decisive and intelligent man was at a loss for the first time.

"This sister saved me?" Yang Siqingyue asked softly, her tone was kind, she seemed to be closer to Xiaoyu.

Xiaoyu nodded and smiled. She knew that Yang Siqingyue had been frozen for more than 300 years. In theory, she was more than 300 years old. She called her elder sister, and she didn't know how to describe her mood.

"This is the wife, this is the boss. The operation the boss gave you, the wife wakes you up." Lan introduced in a hurry, can't help but, after a brief introduction, looked back at Yang Siqingyue again.

"Boss, Madam, thank you." Yang Siqingyue glanced at Chen Mo and Xiaoyu and said quietly.

"You're welcome."

Chen Mo also looked at Yang Siqingyue. Those silver-like revolving eyes were very special, and her temperament was somewhat intelligent and mysterious.

"She was injured this time due to necrosis of the visceral regulatory functional area of the limbic system of the brain, as well as necrosis of some of the motor god-level tissues. Fortunately, the hippocampus memory tissue was not injured. Next, her brain needs to readjust to the visceral regulatory functions and need to recuperate. Recovery, and part of her exokinetic tissue regenerates, and her body's motor system needs to learn and adapt again. "

Now that Yang Siqing is awake, Chen Mo can be regarded as a promise to Lan.

Seeing Lan's changes, Chen Mo was also happy for him.

"Xiao Yu and I go home to rest first." Chen Mo and Lan greeted each other, both of them are smart people, so long together, naturally know each other's thoughts.

Yang Siqingyue has been frozen for more than three hundred years. Lan must have a belly now, and they are inconvenient.

"Father, aren't you in the Black Maple Warframe?" Yang Siqingyue asked softly.

"You have been frozen for 300 years, and many things have happened in these years. After your accident, your father will quit the black maple leaf and look for healing technology for you in the whole universe. Until I met the boss a few years ago, he said that there is a way to heal You. I promised him that he would heal you and I would serve him for a hundred years. "

Lan pettingly watched Yang Siqingyue drunkenly. For more than 300 years, he has never been so happy as he is today.

Yang Siqing was clear.

"Look at it just now, he's not ordinary life."

"Yue'er's vision is still so accurate. He is really not ordinary. It can be said that Tianzhuang Wizards." Lan said sincerely.

"It was the first time I heard my father boast such a life."

"The medical technology of god-level civilization cannot guarantee that you can cure your injury. I waited for 300 years. The boss spent five years researching and developed the technology to cure your injury. He is a pioneer of civilization Is the smartest life I have ever seen. "

"Pioneer." Yang Siqingyue was slightly surprised.

The pioneer of civilization, she knows, a civilization's guide, only the lower civilizations have pioneers, she has only heard of it, never seen it. Unexpectedly Chen Mo would be a pioneer of civilization.

...

On the way, Xiaoyu's face was slightly tired, which was the price of using ability. The use of super power requires a lot of physical strength. Although tired, Xiao Yu's expression is very happy.

She seems to have found a domain role in her special abilities. Chen Mo said that her ability to use can also be tapped. She can touch or even change the operation of others' consciousness. This is a new discovery. Touch-type bypass can extend many uses.

"Lan's daughter is a bit special." Zhao Min said.

She had been paying attention to Lan's daughter, the woman, just now. Especially those double-layered silver reincarnation eyes are very stunning and make people look impressed.

"Jingruo Youlan." Chen Mo nodded in agreement.

He has seen a life similar to Yang Siqingyue, the purple rhyme of Ziwei civilization. That female life felt to him mysterious, intelligent, calm, and a pair of purple star pupils penetrated the heart.

The two women are similar but different.

Yang Siqingyue's stillness is a weak stillness, as he said, stillness is quiet. And the calmness of that god-level civilized woman is cold stillness and indifference, which makes Chen Mo feel very strong and has no feelings.

Two extreme roles.

"That sister, it feels very close, very nice." Xiao Yu interrupted.

Chen Mo hesitated and laughed, "You are called a sister? In theory, she is more than 300 years old. Could you be the legendary millennium old monster?"

As soon as the words fell, Xiao Yumao was blown up, holding the soft flesh around Chen Mo's waist, his eyes were full of threats: "What did you say I was? The millennium old monster?"

"A fairy never seen in a thousand years." Chen Mo said solemnly, sweating inside.

"Isn't it a millennium old demon?" Xiao Yu's expression of disappointment did not give up without explanation.

"You heard it wrong, absolutely you heard it wrong." Chen Moyi was right.

"Then you mean I'm deaf?"

"No."

"Is that deaf, or are you wrong?"

"..."

The two women next to them watched them make trouble. They had never seen such a strong desire for survival, but they were used to it. After the joke, Xiaoyu still held Chen Mo's arm. The murderous look just disappeared completely and he returned to his usual softness.

"Lan's daughter was successfully treated. What are you going to do next?"

"Temporary confidentiality," Chen Mo said.

In the past five years, in addition to medical technology, Chen Mo is still preparing his most important project-the [quantum life plan].

This is the task of the science and technology library, and Chen Mo cannot give up. The top secret of the science and technology library has always made him tickle, anxious to reveal it immediately.

Because the existence of science and technology libraries is too mysterious. Without the technology library, there would be no him now.

The content of the Quantum Life Plan cannot be known to Xiao Yu for the time being, otherwise she won't let herself risk it. Because everything is unknown, the uncertainty is too great.

Once the quantum life plan is successfully carried out, Chen Mo will unlock the highest authority of the science and technology library. He will get the secrets that the science and technology library has inherited to this day, and can unravel the supreme task of the science and technology library.

At the beginning, when he got the primary authority of management, the last door of the science and technology library in his mind had been mysterious.

"I can't know either?"

"You'll know by then."

Xiaoyu no longer asks. She knows that Chen Mo doesn't tell her, naturally she doesn't tell her, she never pursues it.

chapters.title: Chapter 909: : Quantum Life Ball
chapters.body:
Chapter 909: : Quantum Life Ball

Chen Mo only knows some of the characteristics of quantum life through the science and technology library. The quantum-structured life can be said to surpass the current life form that Chen has known.

That life form is only introduced in the book, and has the ability to surpass everything, but the specific ability, Chen Mo is not clear.

In the dark space, a giant device comparable to the planet floats. Each ring structure is stacked and rotated, the middle is hollow, and the layer-by-layer structure is connected to the central two-meter transparent platform.

Chen Mo gave this machine a name—the Quantum Life Ball, also called the “God's womb”, where God was created.

This quantum life ball is constructed in the virtual reality world using a super quantum computer and is used as the main device of the [quantum life plan]. In reality, there are the same quantum life spheres that are built in the galaxy.

For five years, the quantum life ball has been continuously improved, and now in the final stage, Mo Nu is debugging based on experimental test data in virtual reality.

This is a huge project, and it is also the most complicated and sophisticated machine built by Chen Mo, which uses tens of thousands of new materials and thousands of technologies in science and technology libraries.

The data confirmed that Chen Mo entered the platform in the middle of the instrument and stood up, all his clothes disappeared.

In virtual reality, no matter how you test, the problem is not big.

This kind of experiment has only one chance.
