Chen Mo must ensure that the technology is mature and that risks are minimized.

"Beginning the 193023th simulation test." Chen Mo gave an instruction to Mo Nu.

The planet's large mechanical layers are activated, emitting a faint blue light in space, slowly turning. Each layer of ring structure is filled with anti-matter energy, using the energy of anti-matter combustion to maintain the machine's operation and provide the energy to develop quantum life.

All the machines start up, and Chen Mo at the central platform will bear enough energy to destroy the galaxy.

Complete the evolution of quantum life in a flash.

Eternal or eternal.

...

When Chen Mo focused on the [quantum life] plan, in the center of the Perseus skull system, a celestial body shaped like a glowing donut was suspended, the middle was dark and the surrounding light was surrounded by vortices.

This is a black hole with millions of times the mass of the sun, and is the source of gravity for the skeleton system.

In the middle of the gravitational source, a little luminescent substance is suspended, the light of the luminescent substance is locked by the horrible gravitational force, and a steady stream of particles are sucked into the luminescent substance.

Suddenly, the luminescent substance suddenly disappeared, and the black hole exploded in the middle.

Time and space are penetrated at the moment when the luminous matter disappears, a peculiar crack spreads in space and time, and dark matter scattered in the void and space is attracted and poured into the crack. At the other end of the universe, a white hole exploded, and horrific energy poured out, like Optimus Prime, into space.

For a long time, the energy from the white hole was exhausted, and a strange space hole with a diameter of nearly one billion kilometers floated in space.

...

Lan looked intently at Yang Siqingyue, with the assistance of the machine, doing a recovery exercise. This time is the most satisfying and happiest day for hundreds of years.

Suddenly, the rapid sound of the communication instrument on his wrist interrupted his silence.

Superlative emergency signal.

Lan's face sank suddenly.

"Father, what's wrong?" Yang Siqingyue noticed Lan's expression change.

She knew the communicator in her father's hand, which was connected to the Supreme War Department. The signal sounds, meaning there is an emergency military situation. In her impression, her father rarely had such an ugly expression.

Seeing Yang Siqingyue noticed that Lan took a deep breath and his face recovered as before.

"The War Department has emergency information. I want to leave first."

"Go." Yang Siqingyue nodded lightly: "I can be alone, your military situation is important, don't make mistakes."

"Father goes first. If you have any questions, please contact me. If I don't have time, you can contact the boss or his wife." Lan Yu said with a long heart that the armor had covered his whole body. .

As the chief commander, in the face of emergency military conditions, he must not have a hint of muddling, even if his daughter is around, this is a principle.

During this time, he spent a lot of time with his daughter. Chen Mo handed over the armed forces of the marching ant group to his daughter and rescued his daughter. All he could not let the marching ant group have problems, otherwise he would not be at ease in his life. .

Yang Siqingyue looked up at the disappearing spacecraft, her eyes slightly fluctuated.

She rarely saw her father so anxious.

Is something wrong with the group?

This possibility appeared in her mind, and a little worry appeared on her face. In her impressions, her father was never in danger when facing major events. The things that can make his father so anxious are certainly not small, and may involve the safety and security of the marching ant group.

When she woke up, she had a thorough understanding of the marching ant group, and also the human beings of the earth.

She still likes it a bit.

From her conversation with her father, she knew that their group's enemies were god-level civilizations, because the boss had offended several god-level civilizations before and after. If it was attacked by a god-level civilization, it is really possible for his father to be so anxious.

God-level civilization can destroy the Milky Way with one finger without much thought.

...

When the last point of the body reorganized, Chen Mo descended from the platform. The glowing body gradually recovered without seeing anything unusual. The data of the virtual model appears to be much better than the last time.

However, after all, the virtual data is an experimental model. It still needs to be repeatedly verified, and the experiments and data must be improved a little to ensure that no major problems will occur in practice.

Once the plan is successful, the future is unimaginable.

Chen Mo is very confident in completing the tasks of the science and technology library.

Dididi! !! !!

A swift alarm sound appeared in the ear, which surprised Chen Mo, and then Mo Nu appeared beside Chen Mo.

"Mermo, the quantum detector has monitored the movement of the Perseid skull galaxy."

Mo Nu released the picture, a luminous hole of hundreds of millions of kilometers appeared in the middle of the skull galaxy. The quantum detector showed that it was a stable space hole.

"what happened?"

"For unknown reasons, the gravitational source of the skull galaxy suddenly disappeared, and at the position of the gravitational source, time and space were penetrated, leaving a space opening, and the spatial fluctuation of the opening was stable, not a space vortex."

Mo Nu releases the simulated picture of the black hole of the skull galaxy suddenly disappearing.

The gravitational orbit around the black hole disappears, and the entire galaxy's stars will become stray stars. Losing track constraints will be a disaster. But I didn't feel it at once. This is a process. In the next millions of years, there will be more and more 'crash' incidents in the skull galaxy.

Chen Mo was also somewhat surprised.

It is strange that a galaxy's source of gravity suddenly disappeared.

Research on black holes is still early.

For them, the black hole is still in a state of half-face, and the mysterious veil has not been unveiled, but Chen Mo never thought that the black hole would suddenly appear such a change, and it is not clear why.

Leaving the virtual world, Mo Nu is next to him, and the holographic conversations of Lan, Zhao Min, Wang Hai and others also pop up on the screen, and everyone's expression is difficult to hide.

What happened to the Skeleton Galaxy?

chapters.title: Chapter 910: : Einstein-Rosen Bridge
chapters.body:
Chapter 910: : Einstein-Rosen Bridge

The gravitational source of the skull galaxy suddenly disappeared, and this weird phenomenon caused the panic of all civilizations around the Pisces-Cetacea complex. They have never seen this phenomenon since life has a history of observations in the universe.

The disappearance of the source of gravity is like an end to the galaxy.

It is not clear to all life what causes this phenomenon.

The major advanced civilizations have begun to find the reason for them. In the skull galaxy, many black holes and space research experts from civilizations are gathered. Go and see what's going on in that space hole.

Some people say that this is the cause of the sudden death of the universe. Others say that the space-time of the universe is accelerating. Some people say that the opening of space is the door to another universe.

Various rumors spread.

And when many black holes and space research experts are ready to send detectors into the space hole to find out.

However, the danger came when so many lives were about to enter it.

A fleet suddenly emerged from the hole in the space, with millions of warships carrying a steady stream of war machines and anti-material weapons. The scientific research fleet gathered outside the opening of the space was completely destroyed. The few green-level civilizations affiliated with the Immortal Civilization closest to the entrance to the space were all destroyed in a day.

This news immediately triggered a huge earthquake.

After that, what team attacked at a horrible speed and quickly occupied the entire skeleton galaxy.

The life of Pisces-Cerus was only understood. The fleet that emerged from the entrance of the space was an advanced Warframe regiment from a dark forest.

The universe is divided into seven domains, twelve lands, and 108 cities according to the fields controlled by the seven god-level civilizations.

The Seven Realms is the territory of seven god-level civilizations and their affiliated fields; the 108 cities of the twelve places are the territories and cities that are not controlled by the god-level civilization, including the chaotic land.

The dark forest area is 30 billion light years away from Pisces-Cetus, how could it suddenly appear. Many lives thought the news was false, but after the battle spread, many lives calmed down.

The armor group of the orc life is indeed the armor style of the dark forest civilization.

The sudden appearance of the Orc Warfare Group's combat style was fierce, quickly marching through 50 galaxies, destroying hundreds of major galaxies, sweeping all the way, like a bamboo shoot, pointing directly at the main star of Perseus.

In front of this mysterious Warframe Regiment, Perseus's legion was as fragile as a scout and had no way to fight it. Encountering space weapons, the mysterious Orc Warframe flees from its place and continues to attack other galaxies.

Not long ago, the three major legions were terminated by the marching ant group, and now they have been hit hard again.

The entire Perseus is in crisis.

Later, the King of Immortals gave up resistance, led the royal family and the rest of the army, and fled from the Perseus in a spaceship.

The mysterious Warframe regiment occupying Perseus did not stop. Based on Perseus and integrating resources for five days, it led the fleet to Pisces and Whale.

They are too powerful, like a sharp knife, rushing left and right.

In ten days, the mysterious warframe group burst into 200 million light-years, and the civilizations and life galaxies along the way were all under their butcher blades and turned into cosmic dust.

In just one month, the situation in the Pisces and Whales complex changed dramatically.

With the defeat of the Pisces and Whale civilizations, countless lives have begun to escape from Pisces and whale. But more terrifying news spread, leaving countless lives in despair and fear.

In many galaxies throughout the universe, similar spatio-temporal openings suddenly appeared. Civilizations separated by billions or even tens of billions of light years were like neighbors overnight. Unknown to each other, troops were sent into each other's territory, and war broke out.

No one knows why the space-time hole appeared, but no one has the energy to explore.

Countless lives are aware of a horrible fact.

The universe is in chaos.

Large and small wars between universe civilizations have never ceased, and even recently wars between god-level civilizations broke out. However, under the system of the Universe Alliance, most civilizations live in peace, and war is just a matter of talking before and after meals. It is very far away from most lives.

Now, a sudden hole in space and time connects the space and time of the entire universe, as if put into a giant mixer in the clear water.

The change is so fast that Chen Mo and others are dizzying.

After experiencing the war of the Shigan galaxy and the development of the small universe, they know what this war means. Not only Chen Mo, Lan, Zhao Min, Wang Hai, Wat Mu and others received these news and were shocked.

The needle was heard in the battle room, everyone looked very dignified, and his eyes were focused on Chen Mo, who was in the first seat.

"Boss, have you confirmed the reasons for the formation of the unknown space holes?" Lan spoke first and asked solemnly.

"The Einstein-Rosen Bridge, also known as the Wormhole, is the definition of the Universe: Hongqiao. The quantum entanglement between the black hole singularity and the white hole singularity makes the space and time of the singularity form string induction. Channel, connecting the white hole space points, and then adsorbing dark matter in space to keep the space-time channel stable. "

"Why are black holes suddenly quantum entangled with white holes hundreds of millions of light years away?" Zhao Min asked.

"There may be some connection between the black hole and the white hole. I guess the connection is Hawking radiation, which is the black hole radiation defined by the Universe. Common sense thinks that any substance that can enter the black hole cannot escape, including light, But there are doubts in the scientific community, and black holes also emit energy.

It turns out that the temperature of a black hole is not zero, and even higher than its surrounding environment. According to the principles of physics, all objects with a temperature higher than their surroundings release heat, and black holes are no exception. This theory was put forward by Hawking on Earth, also called Hawking radiation. Until his death, Hawking radiation was not proven, and he was not eligible for the Nobel Prize in Physics.

But where is the heat released by the black hole? It has always been a problem for scientists to explore and prove. It seems that the heat released by the black hole may be in the white hole.

The space-time compressed by a black hole, forming a space-time string, appears in space coordinates somewhere in the universe, just as the curvature of space jumps. The energy radiated by a black hole erupts at that point in space through a string of space. Eventually, a special celestial body that only emits energy and does not absorb matter, a white hole, appears opposite to the nature of a black hole.

It may be an unknown cause. The quantum entanglement between the gravitational singularity of the black hole and the white hole is formed, and the string collapse is induced by the space. Eventually, the Einstein-Rossen bridge is formed. . As for why Hongqiao suddenly appeared on a large scale, I don't know. "

Chen Mo finally shook her head.

It all came too suddenly.

The universe is too mysterious to use science to fully explain all the singularities.

"How to arrange next?" Wang Hai asked.

Chen Mo sighed with relief for a long time.

"Check if there is an Einstein-Rosen bridge in our small universe. In theory, a black hole compressed to the extreme space-time string can break through the barriers of time and space and allow white holes to connect parallel or small universes. The wormhole appeared to connect the main universe, was discovered by other top civilizations, and copied the back garden, then we were passive.

It is useless for us to leave the Milky Way now. The whole universe is wormholes. There may be many wormholes that have not been found. The galaxy has more defenses that we spend a lot of effort on, but it is safer. Now we are ready to send the Earth into the small universe. There is nothing terrible about the coming of the Orc Warframe. We are not weak. "

The morale in the battle room surged, and the haze of everyone's heart was swept away.

Over the years, they have exhausted all efforts to develop technology to open up a small universe, and their strength is not weak. Their goal is to defend against god-level civilization. An orc warframe is really nothing.

"Fuck him, hehe." Da Mazu shouted in excitement, his voice shook his ears, attracting everyone else's eyes.

"Idiot," said Red Crab scornfully.

"Hard-shell monster, isn't it a fight?" Da Mazu heard the scorn of the red crab, and he was calm.

"Hit, hit, little monster."

Everyone was too lazy to pay attention to these two goods, and they had been used to arguing about them. In the presence of adults and instructors, they could just stir their mouths and dare not really do it. Chen Mo looked at Lan, and in Lan's eyes, he saw the flickering lights, not knowing what to calculate.

"Boss, instructor, I'm going to fight." Wat Mu, who sat firmly aside, suddenly said, either in developing a small universe or training these years, he is getting bored and sick, this is an opportunity.

"No, I have someone to choose. You are responsible for exploring whether there is a Hongqiao in the universe." Lan immediately refused.

The battle was left to Lan, and the entire marching ant group began to operate. In recent years, they have fully developed and controlled the small universe, countless technologies and technologies, and they have a wealthy family. They do not need to worry about the strength of the military.

With all the teams assembled, the marching ant group began to operate like a sophisticated giant machine.

chapters.title: Chapter 911: : Store 100 Billion Lives
chapters.body:
Chapter 911: : Store 100 Billion Lives

"Does the marching ant group really plan to leave?" He Shang was hesitant when he saw the message. Today, the civilizations and forces around the Pisces Whale complex are preparing to flee here.

However, some people have found that the Milky Way and the fairy system have no large-scale escape, but also strengthen the defense.

The original He Shang still had some unbelief, but the information obtained showed that the Milky Way really did not mean to escape on a large scale. Although there are spaceships in and out of the Milky Way and the fairy system, they are all warships and are not ordinary transportation ships.

Various indications indicate that this group of marching ants are ready to fight the Orcish Armor Group.

He Shang really believed this possibility.

"Both Pisces civilization and Whale civilization can't do that mysterious armored regiment. Are the marching ant groups looking for death?" Friends around them shook their heads, not at all optimistic that the marching ant group could deal with that armored regiment.

The Pisces civilization and the Whale civilization are, after all, two of the three strongest civilizations in the Pisces-Whales complex. Even two of them have been beaten down. They ca n’t think of anyone else in Pisces and Whales who can win that battle group. .

"Not necessarily."

He Shang denies his friend's point of view.

The origin of the marching ant group is mysterious. It is like a sudden emergence of a big force. When the first battle appeared, it easily destroyed the Xiongfeng Armored Corps, and then slaughtered the three major legions of the Immortal Civilization.

If it were not for the destruction of the three elite legions, the Immortal Civilization would not retreat so quickly in this battle.

For so long, although Pisces and Whales are concerned about the mysterious power of the Milky Way, they have never dared to do it. But they all know that this team of the Milky Way is not a fuel-efficient lamp.

Today, all civilizations and forces in Pisces and Whales are fleeing, and they have no courage to resist that orcish armor group. The only hope is the marching ant group that sits on the Milky Way and the Fairy.

Hurd has received news that there are many kinds of mysterious space openings in the universe, the universe is in chaos, and there is a lot of flames, and there is no absolute security to escape to any place.

Unless in a secluded and isolated corner.

However, the corner of the Lania Kea super-galaxy, known as the "paradise of life", is now in chaos, and in a more remote place than here, either hide to a low-level smart planet, or go to the universe's hollow with few galaxies.

"Where are you going next?" Asked the friends around.

Hurd did not reply immediately, but looked at the holographic star map of the Milky Way. The battleships of the Milky Way were still flying out. It seemed that he was determined to make Hud open.

"I intend to join the marching ant group in the Milky Way."

"Are you crazy?" The friends with green skin around them exclaimed incredulously.

"Where can we escape? Now the universe is in chaos, and there are wars everywhere, or escape to the cosmic voids where galaxies are scarce. There is hardly any interest in advanced civilizations, and there are wars in other regions," Hurd sighed.

"It's okay to hide on a low-level life planet. We have spaceships and armor. It is very easy to conquer a low-level life planet. We are also rulers." Green-skinned friends said.

Hurd shook his head.

Friends' current thinking is tantamount to returning to the primitive society as a tribe master in a technological civilization, and then staying safe and secure for a lifetime.

But for Hurd, such survival is meaningless.

"I will not hide on a low-level planet. If you want to be with me, we will go by. If you want to leave, I hope we will have a chance to see you in the future." Hurd said suddenly.

"Everyone has their own ambitions, and good luck." Friends shook their heads and sighed, and turned to leave.

The marching ant group was not prepared to flee. The news spread throughout the Pisces and the constellation Pisces. It was noticed by many lives and shocked.

Noting the life of this news, it was still fleeing. No one thought that the marching ant group could resist the mysterious armored regiment. Many of them did not flee. They were the originals of Pisces and Pisces, in addition to those who saw through the situation.

Now that the universe is in chaos, everything is the same.

Life that was not going to escape, heard that the marching ant group did not evacuate, and immediately began to gather towards the Milky Way and the fairy system. Hundreds of billions of lives began to gather outside the Milky Way and the fairy system.

This situation has been fed back to the earth.

If this situation is left unattended, it is obviously impossible, and if it is used by intentional people, it is also a big trouble for them. But accepting them to the earth or entering the small universe is temporarily impossible.

"Boss, how do you decide?" Lan asked.

Chen Mo thought for a while.

The arrival of those lives is not entirely a bad thing. The galaxy lacks intelligent life, especially advanced life. They are currently on the line of elite soldiers, and the soldiers are very strong, but for the space war, the number is not large.

There are high-level life in the small universe, but except for the bitter star, other high-level life has already formed a civilization and cannot be used for its own purposes. Therefore, in the process of developing the small universe, Lan slaughtered all the life of civilization in the small universe.

The addition of those lives in Pisces Whale can infuse them with fresh blood. In the future, if there is a loss of staff, more reserve personnel can be added.

The appearance of the Einstein-Rosen bridge disrupted the situation in the universe. After deduction of the war model, it is basically confirmed that it has just begun, and there will be many battles in the future.

Without the addition of senior armored divisions, after a large-scale war broke out, they would be fatal to them.

"Let them come in, and the warships and spaceships are all under control." After Chen Mo thought, he made a decision: "Arrange them uniformly on the black Saturn, Neptune, and Meteor stars of the arm of the shield. Black Hawk, you are responsible for recruiting advanced warfare Division A, form the Kunpeng War Department. Ling Feng and Julie, you two will manage the lives that have moved in. "

"understand."

The three nodded.

It's just that Li Lingfeng and Julie looked at each other, and their faces were bitter.

For the first time managing hundreds of billions of lives.

Now the boss has given them an order and they can only stand on their heads. The marching ant group will grow in the future, and there will only be more and more people. They can do it if they ca n’t.

Zhao Min saw the embarrassment of the two.

"You only need to select the life in them and let them manage the area where they live. The division of life groups and areas should pay attention to disperse their lives in the same civilization, the same force, and the same ethnic group, and dilute their original. The imprint of power and civilization, so that it will not focus on trouble and resistance.

Don't divide by the same kind of life groups, otherwise it will easily cause discrimination and contradictions among the groups. The person responsible for management is first and foremost loyalty, followed by ability. "

"understood."

The two eyes flashed and nodded quickly.

They were the veterans who founded the march ant group at the beginning. Needless to say, their abilities are also very smart. After Zhao Min's reminder, they immediately knew what to do.

...

Xi Xian looked up at the galaxy flowing on the holographic screen, fascinated. The galaxy picture is from the Milky Way. After learning that the Milky Way has not escaped, many lives are coming towards the Milky Way. He is one of them.

When you come here to live, there is no way to leave Pisces constellation Cebu, or you don't want to leave, and you just see the situation of the universe.

As the natives of Pisces and Whales, they naturally do not want to fall here and become a garden in the dark forest. It is also clear that today the universe is in chaos, and the situation in other places may not be better than here.

Today, outside the Milky Way, tens of millions of large and small spaceships are waiting for orders from marching ant groups.

It seems that this situation has been foreseen in advance, and the marching ant group warned externally that any spacecraft, without permission, must not enter the galaxy, otherwise the consequences will be at your own risk.

Various detection jammers interfere with the quantum detection of the Milky Way. Today, this spiral galaxy has a mysterious veil in the eyes of many lives.

Lifeless dare to enter, thinking that the first line of defense outside the galaxy deploys countless space-based weapons, and even transforms the planet into weapons. Even if the warship detects this weapon density, it does not dare to rush in.

"Cut, a little force, still put on the score?"

"Anyone who has entered the galaxy with me, I don't believe it. It's an honor for him, such a small force, to bring us together here."

"It is true that this marching ant group really takes itself seriously."

Some dissatisfied voices have appeared on public channels.

Spaceships staying in the outer space of the Milky Way are a little impatient. Many of them are from a small armored regiment or a remnant force of the big forces. They are not awesome about the sudden emergence of the marching ant group.

call!

Suddenly, there was a cry of exclamation in his ear, waking up Xi Xi in his thoughts.

"A spaceship wants to break into the galaxy."

I saw dozens of spaceships appear on the holographic screen and jumped to the space port of the Milky Way. Before the spacecraft reacted, they were hit by weapons in the space port. Dozens of huge fireballs exploded in space, as if dozens of large fireworks were placed, under the magnificent beauty, with a deadly atmosphere.

In this scene, a pot of cold water was poured into the life of impatience, thanking that there was no rash action just now.

The marching ant group's attack without hesitation still stimulated a part of life. Then, hundreds of spaceships jumped in space in an attempt to break into the galaxy.

In the same location, the same space port, the spacecraft exploded again, and no one was spared.

Strange scenes make all life shudder. With the first lesson, the second batch could not jump to that position, but it was there, under the galaxy's muzzle.

Xi Xian looked surprised, this situation is a bit familiar, he seems to have heard of where. Suddenly, Xi Gen's pupils shrank and shouted: "It's a space bubble, the Milky Way is wrapped in space bubbles."

His voice alarmed the life around him.

Space bubbles.

Public channels are uploaded, and breathing of countless lives becomes rapid.

This kind of conditional blockade technology is only available at the top civilization.

At the beginning, they all thought that the march ant group was just a mysterious high-level force, a technologically advanced desperate, and the three major civilizations of Pisces and Whale did not provoke it.

After the waves of space were recognized, many lives discovered that it was not the three civilizations who were afraid of trouble, but the courage to provoke them.

No life dares to continue trying to jump into the galaxy.

The marching ant group is definitely not as simple as imagined. The confirmation of the space bubble makes the life that had no confidence in the marching ant group begin to change.

If they defeat that orcish armor group, then the Pisces Whale will change.

Xi Xian secretly surprised.

As everyone was shocked, a spaceship painted with the marching ant group logo appeared on the battlefield of the port. Under the lock of many detectors, this solitary spaceship is particularly conspicuous.

Densely packed soldiers and war robots came out of the spaceship, neat and capable movements, wearing a dangerous top-level armor, and at this moment, the onlookers shuddered.

The public communication channel instantly became silent.

Black Hawk looked at the data returned by the eye detector. Tens of millions of spaceships gathered, hundreds of billions of lives, and many senior armor divisions. If they were all turned into the power of the group, their strength could grow a lot.

"Adults have orders to form the Kunpeng War Department, and senior armored divisions can sign up. The galaxy can accept all life, but the spaceships that want to enter the galaxy must temporarily hand over control of the spaceship. All lives follow the management arrangements, otherwise the consequences will be at your own risk.

Formation of Kunpeng War Department? Xi Jian was immediately overjoyed.

He was the life on the battlefield, and he could see the horror of the war department. Space bubble technology, coupled with the well-trained warheads in front of you, the marching ant group is definitely a low-key force.

"Now, if you want to enter the spacecraft and life of the galaxy, stay where you are, waiting for instructions, do not want to enter the spacecraft and life of the galaxy, please leave immediately."

Some people who are not optimistic start the space engine of the spacecraft and jump away, while the life of the marching ant group stays in place. The fleeing and the defenders exchange a "silly force" with each other and then pass by.

chapters.title: Chapter 912: : In The Name Of God King
chapters.body:
Chapter 912: : In The Name Of God King

"What other forces are there in Pisces-Whale?" On the battleship, the owl looked cold.

"Yes, a force called the marching ant group. In the galaxy and the fairy system, they once destroyed the elite legion of Perseus. The strength of Perseus was greatly damaged, which made our initial journey so easy. At present, Pisces-Whale The remaining forces and refugees are gathering towards them. "The adjutant said with a blank expression.

"Oh." Xiao Li said: "The next target, let's take the galaxy."

"Understood." The adjutant nodded coldly, opened the holographic video, and sent instructions to the fleet without any doubts about the order of the owlet.

The owl is an ancient sword owl family. The sword owl family is known as the living fossil of the universe civilization. The owl has the most perfect characteristics of the sword owl, slender lips, blade-like sharp eyes, long body, black lines on the skin, sapphire blue eye pupil, crystal clear, cool personality.

Behind his armor, there was a long sickle with a blade 1.5 meters long and a handle three meters long. The sickle was dark red, and it was very aggressive.

Although the Daoxiao tribe has evolved for more than 4 billion years, it is still only a high-level life, and the limit of life class has allowed the Daoxiao tribe to never appear as a top armored division in more than 4 billion years. Now that the Daoya tribe is declining, the remaining life is only a few million, which is considered an endangered civilization for the universe civilization population.

Lord Xiaoli is currently the most outstanding armored division and general star of the Daoxiao tribe. He follows the adults. They all believe that the future of the adults belongs to the broader universe.

"Send the detector past."

...

Massive lives converge towards the fairy system and the Milky Way, and these two obscure galaxies suddenly become the center of Pisces-Cetacean. Especially after the space waves were exposed, more and more lives were confident that the marching ant group would defeat the mysterious armored regiment.

With the powerful armored armor and the stability of weapons, the Milky Way is in order.

Many of the life and armored divisions in the galaxy come from **** generations and elite armored divisions from other civilizations and forces.

These armored divisions are reluctant to flee, and their civilization and forces choose to escape, so they choose to break away from their original forces. Many of them are senior armored divisions and are not weak.

The march ant group also took this opportunity to start absorbing these fresh blood.

The formation of Kunpeng War Department immediately attracted senior war armor divisions who entered the galaxy.

The advanced war armor division is the threshold condition to enter Kunpeng War Department. This requirement makes countless lives stunned. At first, some senior armored divisions were not hopeful about the march ant group's technology. They came here, they just didn't want to escape from their hometown.

After entering the Kunpeng War Department through selection, many armored divisions were shocked by the scientific and technological strength of marching ants.

As long as you join the armor division of Kunpeng War Department, you can get a set of top-level armor. Top armor, this is the dream equipment of countless armor divisions.

The top-level combat armor also shows many problems. The march ant group has the strength comparable to the top civilization.

This low-key force is a giant tiger in pigskin.

Black Hawk is the head of a war department for the first time, so the implementation is very strict, because in the march ant group, no war department is weak, with such good conditions, if his war department is the weakest, then it is unreasonable.

Although within a short period of time, Kunpeng Warhead will not form too strong combat power, but he hopes that in the future, Kunpeng Warhead's combat power will not be weaker than the other four warheads.

The Kunpeng War Department is being organized fiercely.

...

"Along, talk about how to fight?" Ku Yao threw the strategic question to Ku Tian.

Although Ku Yao is the commander-in-chief of Shenwei, he is not good at planning. His prestige and calm character are the reason for his commanding the guardian. Just give the plan to smart people.

Ku Tian is the smartest in Shenwei. In the Military Strategy Academy, Ku Tian ’s strategy lessons and virtual reality sand table deductions have always been the best among them, and they are also ranked in the entire army ant group combat department. Named, so now in Shenwei, Ku Tian serves as a deputy and think tank.

A slender body is thinner than other bitter people, and its skin is indigo blue and purplish.

"We are not afraid to kill hard, but it is not suitable, because it may cause a lot of casualties." Ku Tian stared at the star map.

For them, they really did not pay attention to the orc armor.

They are Shenwei, and Lan positioned them as Chen Mo's close guard, and Shenwang's close guard.

All of their team members have developed super powers.

At present, they have the same level as them, only the wood guard warlord commanded by Wat Mu, the big demon warhead led by Da Mazu, and the sea king war head commanded by Wang Hai.

But regardless of their innate physical conditions or their significance, they are a little higher than the other three war departments, so their requirements and training are stricter than other war departments.

Since leaving Bitter Star, they have joined the team to develop the small universe.

In the battle, Lan demanded the most from them.

In the battle with the small cosmic civilization, they were even asked by Lan to remove their armor, bare-handed fist, and the cold weapon civilization and zerg battles in the small universe.

Injuries are commonplace. It is normal to break your hands and feet. After repeated battles, as long as the brain is not dead, you will be repaired by the medical cabin and then re-entered the battlefield.

After more than five years of hard work, they have experienced life and death, and their will and fighting consciousness are hovering over the edge of death time and time again, and the development of superpowers is becoming stronger and stronger. Today, nearly one-fifth of the team members have entered the second stage of combat consciousness, possessing the strength of a top-level armored division, and the other team members are on the verge of superpower advancement.

In the current four major war departments, they are the strongest team.

"How to do that?" Kulong asked curiously.

Unlike Bitter Sky, Bitter Dragon is the other extreme. His single-player combat strength is the strongest among the Bitter Men. Even their perverted fighting coach Jing Ge has praised the fighting talent of Bitter Dragon.

On the arm of the bitter dragon, a dragon tattoo spread all the way to the face, fluorescent and restrained. Because of the worship of Chen Mo, Kulong specially studied the Chinese civilization of the earth, and then tattooed the dragon on his body.

"Master Lan said, this is the final test of our guardian. As long as this battle is completed, we will be officially titled by the **** king and become the true guardian."

Speaking of Ku Tian, all the guards on the field looked wildly.

In the eyes of their bitter people, Chen Mo is supreme. For this belief, they have been fighting desperately for five years in order to become stronger. In their view, the weak are not worthy of being the guards of the **** king.

"It's tough, although we are confident to win, but if the opponent is hysterical, the process is definitely not easy. We must win beautiful in this battle and win with the smallest cost, so as to prove the strength of our Divine Guardian."

All the guardians agree to nod, and only a big victory can prove their strength.

"Now that the orc war armor group definitely thinks that we are weak. And they have won the three major civilizations of Pisces and Whale, and their confidence has expanded. For us, this is a good thing. Using their overconfidence, we come Play pig eat tiger."

The guards around watched and listened attentively, his face flashing with excitement.

As Ku Tian said, in the eyes of the outside world, the marching ant groups now only occupy a small force in the Milky Way and the fairy system. Like an iceberg in the sea, what the outside world sees is just a little bit above the water.

Only they know that they have the backing of a small universe.

"This wormhole shock changed, shortening the distance between the territories of the universe, which will usher in a big reshuffle of the universe pattern. Lord Lan must be very clear, so we not only have to win the orc war armor group, but also Wormhole. With that orc warrior group down, our marching ant group will be able to take control of the entire Pisces Whale, which can be the starting point of the king of the universe. "

All guards, with longing in their eyes, vaguely contained a violent fighting intention. Their guardian guards the **** king and opens up territory for the **** king. For this belief, they can abandon everything.

"In this battle, we need to start from two directions. Use one team to attract their main force, fight them head-on, and drag the other's main force. The other team sneaks into the wormhole, controls the wormhole, and cuts off their retreat.

Ku Yao looked at the sand table in Ku Tian's plan and thought about the omissions. After confirming that the problem was not serious, he began to order: "Okay, just use this decision, in the name of God King."

"In the name of God King, kill."

All the guardians shouted and the fighting spirit was heated.

chapters.title: Chapter 913: :Fighting
chapters.body:
Chapter 913: :Fighting

"Sir, the spacecraft has got the latest information, and the Milky Way dispatched the fleet to come out, and the quadrant to us disappeared." The adjutant gave the latest news to Xiao Li: "I'm afraid the other party has confirmed our location."

"Huh." Xiao Li responded coldly, watching the star chart of the Milky Way unchanged, and her sapphire blue eyes as deep as space.

"I am afraid that the other party's technical level is not low." The adjutant reminded: "According to the known information uploaded by the Pisces and the constellation Pisces, they have space bubble technology and also possess a large amount of antimatter and dark matter."

"Ok?"

There were two gleams of light suddenly blooming in the eyes of Luli.

The adjutant saw the situation and continued: "The Milky Way and the fairy system where they are located are wrapped in space bubbles. This was spread in the life they fled not long ago. The immortal civilization attacked the Milky Way because they discovered the Milky Way and the fairy system. There are a lot of antimatter and dark matter in storage. "

"It seems this galaxy is not simple." Lu Li murmured, his emotions fluctuated for the first time.

Antimatter and dark matter are the most important energy and rare material resources in the universe.

Without antimatter, the spacecraft has no energy; without dark matter, the hull material of the spacecraft is simply impossible to fly at the speed of light and jump in space, and the material of the armor is vulnerable to combat in combat.

These are two essential substances.

In order to master the initiative, when Hongqiao appeared, he urgently summoned the War Group to enter the wormhole to explore. No one expected to appear here in Pisces Whale. In a hurry, they have no time to prepare more antimatter energy and dark matter.

So now they are facing a very serious problem.

Antimatter is limited, and dark matter is scarce.

Without two substances, he could not make new spaceships and armor.

This is why he frantically pushed the team forward to conquer Pisces Whale. Once reacted by the civilization of Pisces and Whale, they lack two substances, I am afraid they will fall into a passive situation.

"We found the battle video frequency of the Milky Way and the immortal civilization." The adjutant opened a holographic video frequency and handed it to Xiao Li: "Their combat power should not be underestimated."

"Let Red Hibiscus pay more attention, Hongqiao must be optimistic. Energy supplies, accelerate transportation."

"Sir Hibiscus just came to the news that there is now a chaos in the universe, the prices of anti-matter and dark matter are soaring, and many forces are reluctant to sell, and the risk of transportation is high, so there is not much anti-matter and dark matter that can be bought."

"Oh." Xiao Li responded.

The emergence of Hongqiao, the astronomical flames of the universe, the transportation of anti-matter and dark matter is dangerous, and the probability of being snatched during transportation is greatly increased. Moreover, the two substances are strategic materials, and the major forces are not willing to sell too much.

At present, space-based defense lines cannot escape dark matter and antimatter.

The current universe war is to fight anti-matter and dark matter.

Without enough antimatter, they will not have enough energy. This means that spaceships, armor, intelligent machinery, and space-based weapons are all turned into scrap iron, lying dead, etc.

Without dark matter materials, the spacecraft cannot withstand the squeeze of space when flying at the speed of light and jumping in space. A spaceship without flying at the speed of light and jumping in space is similar to a bicycle traveling galaxy in the universe.

The most important thing is that the energy furnace of the battle armor needs to be made of safe dark matter materials, otherwise it cannot withstand the combustion of antimatter, and the material strength of the intelligent machinery will be greatly weakened.

When entering Pisces Whale, they caught the civilization here by surprise, they came all the way, like a broken bamboo.

But when they learned the location here, Xiaoli discovered the clue.

The Pisces Cetaceans supercluster complex is remotely located in a barren area of the universe, including the Rania Kea super galaxy, and is adjacent to the inanimate zone such as Kiboka Cave.

This kind of corner lacks powerful civilization, antimatter and dark matter are scarce, and the immortal civilization has been wiped out by the galaxy.

The journey along the way made Xiao Li not much victorious.

Now that I hear a lot of antimatter and dark matter stored in the galaxy, the owl suddenly became interested.

If there is a large amount of anti-matter and dark matter in storage, it is undoubtedly great news for them. To solve the problem of scarcity of anti-matter and dark matter, their strength can undoubtedly go to a higher level.

Even if he knows that the other party has technology such as space bubbles, he does not care.

In such a remote and barren place, he did not believe in any particularly powerful top-level civilization. He would rather believe the technology developed by the other party's **** luck. If the other party is really a top-level civilization, Pisces and Whale are already in the galaxy.

As Xiaoli thought, suddenly, the sound of a message sounded and a holographic video popped up.

In the video frequency, it is a fleet.

The owl pupil shrinks.

...

"Ten thousand light-years away is the wormhole."

The fleet led by Bitter Dragon appeared in the space where the wormhole was 10,000 light years away. Quantum detection radar constructs all the information around the wormhole.

The attacking strategy is formulated by Ku Tian, and the task of Ku Long is to control the wormhole.

Although they are anxious to be recognized by the King of God, at this time, they all know that they must not be taken lightly.

"Adult Ku Tian said, they have already started on our side, we can attack at any time here." A guard said solemnly.

"Okay." Bitter Dragon's spirit shocked: "Are you sure about the jumping space?"

"confirmed."

"jump."

The space curvature engines of the spacecraft started one by one, and a long, faint blue light illuminated, and the fleet disappeared into space.

10,000 light years later, the fleet suddenly appeared.

Here, the spacecraft can not detect the existence of the planet, because this was the area where the gravity of the black hole was located. All the surrounding planets have already been torn into atoms and fell into the black hole.

In front of space, there is a huge wormhole, the middle space is twisted, surrounded by colored light, like a colored donut.

Through the detector's display screen, the dense fleet in space can be found, there are tens of millions of ships, as well as countless space-based weapons and intelligent machinery, which have long been deployed around the wormhole.

"Put smart machinery."

...

The red hibiscus looks very ordinary, with red and blue skin, golden lines on the face, and a red ring outside the black eye pupil. He came from a very small orc-like group, without a strong group and talent.

There is no advantage in military force, but he has excellent EQ and talent, and then he has a firm foothold in the Warriors. The staff and logistics of the War Group is a very rare position for his ethnic group.

"Where is Lord Lili?" Chi Hien asked the adjutant around him.

"Siraga, the fleet of the Milky Way has just appeared in the constellation Serpent, Lord Olivia has already run into each other."

Chi Hi nodded, no surprise. In his view, there was no accident in the war, after all, they belonged to the invaders.

"Always pay attention to the news on the front line and prepare for the support of Lord Luli at any time. We must also be vigilant here. Hongqiao is our back path. Also, all anti-matter and dark matter are brought together and distributed uniformly to supplement the armor at any time."

"What about smart machines?" The adjutant frowned.

"The amount of antimatter and dark matter is not much. If it is used to supplement intelligent machinery and consumes too quickly, we must give priority to the replenishment of armor and weapons. I heard that there are many antimatter and dark matter in the galaxy. When this battle wins, everything will be assured." Hibiscus said, but there was a trace of worry in his expression.

"Understood, sir." The adjutant said respectfully.

Suddenly, the sharp alarm sounded without warning, awakening all the warships.

Chi Hi's face changed suddenly.

Enemy attack!

...

Yang Siqing Yue is here!

Chen Mo, who was in the laboratory, was suddenly reminded by Mo Nu that Yang Siqing came to him and surprised him.

This is a rare guest.

After waking up, Yang Siqingyue has been recovering and adapting. Chen Mo has seen her not many times, but she has only been seen twice in the middle. Chen Mo was very impressed with Yang Siqingyue.

Jing Ruo You Lan!

This is the best description.

Yang Siqingyue gives people a sense of collapse of the Taishan Mountain, and his behavior is not slow. He feels very comfortable with words and deeds, and is very smart. He inherits Lan ’s brain as a demon.

Yang Siqingyue wore a normal dress, snow white, unstained, with gold rims, sleeves and eye patterns unique to the Yinyue tribe, representing wisdom.

This is the unique clothing of the Yinyue tribe, called Huifu, especially the women's Huifu. It outlines the slender body of the Yinyue tribe. Even though different life races, Chen Mo still feels very comfortable when he sees it.

"Boss, Mrs. Mo."

Yang Siqingyue greeted Chen Mo and Mo Nu softly, and her eyes were agile.

Chen Mo was a little surprised because Yang Siqingyue was not talking about universal language, but Chinese. Hearing Chinese, Chen Mo felt a little kind, but did not expect Yang Siqing to master it in such a short time.

"Sit." Chen Mo nodded slightly to Yang Siqingyue, motioning her to sit down and talk.

Yang Siqing looked around Chen Mo's laboratory and sat down on the chair opposite Chen Mo.

"Father said that if he came to the laboratory to find a boss, he would definitely find it. This was the case. This time Qingyue came over. First, he thanked the boss for his kindness, and second came to the boss for something.

Chen Mo was a little surprised: "You just say."

"That Qingyue said that." Yang Siqingyue looked at Chen Mo and smiled slightly: "I want to develop super powers."

chapters.title: Chapter 914: : Bee Eye
chapters.body:
Chapter 914: : Bee Eye

"Does your father know?"

"do not know."

"If something goes wrong, your father will be desperate with me, do you want to ask?"

"Boss, I am not a primary school student calling my parents, and I am not a child." Yang Siqingyue chuckled lightly, keeping his expression calm, as if the eyes of Yinhuan were as mysterious as ever, with a difficult temperament.

Seeing Yang Siqingyue insist, Chen Mo thought for a while and led her to the Super Ability Development Laboratory.

On the way, Yang Siqingyue also followed Chen Mo's left hand step by step. His eyes have always been large in the laboratory, and from time to time he has set his eyes on Chen Mo.

"No wonder my father is willing to follow you." The faint voice accompanied Chen Mo's ear with a hint of fragrance.

Chen Mo was stunned and somewhat puzzled: "How to say?"

"You are very courageous and have a convincing temperament." Yang Siqingyue said without thinking: "Otherwise, my father will not entrust you to me, which is not necessarily cured by god-level civilization."

"I think you're praising me."

Yang Siqingyue smiled and looked at Chen Mo's eyes with more curiosity.

She has seen the scene of Chen Mo fighting in the Shigan galaxy. She has offended several great god-level civilizations in a row. She has powerful skills and courage, and she also has the coveted technology of god-level civilizations.

A red-level life has gradually grown into a top-level armored division, and it has created such a foundation. Looking at the most talented genius in the universe civilization for billions of years, it can't be reached.

When we arrived at the Super Ability Development Laboratory, all the medicines were ready. Chen Mo also did a simple allergic reaction test to Yang Siqingyue, and confirmed that there was no problem.

"Want to develop randomly or directed development?" Chen Mo asked.

"Can it be directed to develop?" Yang Siqing's quiet face was obviously surprised.

"Yes, there are not many directional development capabilities at present." Chen Mo said to Yang Siqingyue that directional development capabilities were available, and she gave her choice.

"Random, give your destiny to the unknown, I like to be different." Yang Siqing said calmly.

"Take off your clothes and go in."

Yang Siqingyue didn't have any more words, and she didn't shy away from Chen Mo's eyes. She released her clothes and exposed her body to the air.

The silvery skin looks delicate and smooth, taller and slimmer than humans, without any trace of fat, and has evolved a perfect golden ratio. It is as graceful as an artwork.

Entering the Super Capability Development Module, Yang Siqing Yue Chao nodded slightly.

"The development process may be a little uncomfortable, you have to bear with it." Chen Mo clicked on the console a few times, the hatch of the development cabin slowly closed, and the liquid medicine started from the bottom and was slowly injected into the development cabin.

...

In the sky, the intelligent machines on both sides raged like locusts. At the moment of collision, the flame of explosion exploded in space.

In the war between civilizations of the same level, the role of intelligent machinery is mainly consumption.

In cosmic warfare, ordinary ammunition has little effect, fighting for antimatter and dark matter. Antimatter is limited. As long as the opponent's antimatter weapons can be consumed in the frontal collision field, the probability of victory of one of the parties will greatly increase.

The detection radar determined that there were no weapons of light destruction and weapons of space destruction in this area. In the absence of weapons of light and space weapons, space position warfare is necessary.

The scene in front of me was obviously unexpected, and Ku Tian was surprised by the other party's reaction, and the strain was much faster than expected.

And here is the opponent's home field, the opponent's intelligent machinery is thousands of times more than they are, and there are countless space-based weapons. If you want a positive breakthrough, you must spend a lot of effort.

"Toss [Biquge 5200www.bqg5200.xyz] to put the assassin robot." Ku Tian ordered immediately.

In an instant, a steady stream of assassin robots were released inside each warship.

These assassin robots are different from intelligent machines. They use materials of similar strength to armor, are equipped with extremely complete combat data, and are equipped with anti-matter bombs. Their combat power cannot be underestimated.

Most importantly, assassin robots use quantum stealth materials to avoid detection by quantum detectors. In the encounter, this quantum stealth function can make the enemy very headache.

After being dropped, the assassin robot quickly spread out and skimmed towards the battlefield ahead.

"Light cover."

As soon as the bitter dragon command fell, the space-based weapon suspended in the battlefield was activated, the thick anti-matter bomb of the arm slowly rose, and a faint blue tail flame appeared.

After flying at speed for twenty minutes, a fire group suddenly appeared in the space battlefield.

The fire mass grew at a terrifying rate, comparable to the size of a planet, like a huge star burst, and the fire engulfed all the intelligent machinery around it. The vision of all optical radars is white.

The explosion of this antimatter bomb attracted the attention of the entire battlefield.

Under the cover of horror light, the Assassin Robot starts quantum stealth and approaches the enemy's space-based weapon defense line at the fastest speed.

From throwing assassin robots to covering, all in one go.

Successive light clusters flooded space, and the horror energy was enough to turn a planet into a sea of fire. The optical radar facing the battlefield is always in a state of whiteness.

This is the most typical method of cover in space.

Bitter Dragon has experienced a lot of space warfare while developing the small universe. This basic cover tactic has come hand in hand.

No matter how tragic the battlefield is, no trace of sound can be heard in space.

Suddenly, several more light clusters suddenly lit up. This time it was not caused by an antimatter, but the assassin robot destroyed the space-based weapons in the defense line, and the debris of the explosion suddenly flew away.

All actions are interlinked.

The assassin robot that entered the enemy position is like a fish. However, space-based weapons, including spaceships, are too far in space, and even if the assassin robot is fast enough, it will take a long time.

...

Chi Hi's handling of the action was calm enough. This unhurried calmness gave the subordinates a little more confidence.

However, the subordinates see all appearances.

His attention was all in the radar and the information returned, and he was full of thoughts and shocked.

How did the other party break through their defenses and attack space-based weapons? And the quantum radar that made space-based weapons was not found. Obviously, the other party has the technology to avoid quantum radar.

Now that the other party enters their position easily, if they cannot find the enemy, they are in danger.

Depending on the situation, not one or two infiltrated their positions, but many.

Chi Jin thought of the huge anti-matter bomb explosion just now. At that moment, the optical radar facing the warships in the galaxy all failed, but the quantum radar did not fail.

Is the quantum stealth assassin's armor?

Chi Hi burst out of his mind.

This is the only explanation.

Quantum stealth armor is not a common technology. Only top-level civilizations possess that kind of quantum stealth technology. Moreover, the preparation of quantum stealth materials requires massive amounts of dark matter. Ordinary advanced civilizations do not have the financial resources to mass produce large quantities Invisible Warframe.

Space bubble technology, a lot of anti-matter and dark matter, and now quantum stealth armor.

Are they facing a top civilization?

"The enemy assassins infiltrated, dropped bee eyes, and the spacecraft started the engine, ready to avoid at any time, and all the armored divisions went to the outer space of the spacecraft to stand by."

With a single order, a large number of small bee-like robots were dropped from the spacecraft and space-based weapons, spread all over the space around the spacecraft and space-based weapons, three layers in and three layers out, with a density of 100 meters apart. Space-based weapon package.

This bee-eye, built-in small optical radar, can detect the surrounding situation, which has a structure to prevent electromagnetic pulses, which can resist the terrible electromagnetic pulses after the explosion in the space battlefield.

The role of the bee eye is only one, is to find an assassin war armor division trying to approach the spaceship or space-based weapons.

Once the assassin's armor is discovered by the bee's eye, the bee-eye robot will attach to the assassin's armor to reveal the position of the assassin's armor division. This is a simple and effective way to deal with assassin's armor in space warfare.

"An enemy was found around Wuluo 39824."

The holographic video frequency dropped, and I saw a war robot covered in black. After crushing a bee eye, he quickly approached a space-based weapon. There is no shadow of war robots on quantum radar.

really!

Make sure that the other party has quantum stealth technology, and Red Hibiscus sinks in one heart.

chapters.title: Chapter 915: : Preparation For The Decisive Battle
chapters.body:
Chapter 915: : Preparation For The Decisive Battle

The owl stared blankly at the hologram, letting the anti-matter explosion of fire reflected in the sapphire blue pupil.

This is a space encounter. Judging from the various actions of the opponent, it is prepared.

Massive intelligent machinery collided in space, extremely tragic.

This kind of battle scene is commonplace in owls.

He has been in charge of the Battle Armor for so many years, he licks blood on the blade almost every day. Now the collision between intelligent machines is just the prelude to a space encounter.

There are many intelligent machines, and the best materials are impossible to use, because too much dark matter is consumed. Intelligent machines are mainly cannon fodder and consume enemy fire ammunition. After so many years in the space battlefield, he has confidence in his intelligent machinery.

However, the situation does not seem to be developing in the direction he expected.

Ten times when intelligent machines collided, they lost hundreds of millions of intelligent machines. Even the battlefield-heavy, he felt that the situation was wrong. The battle damage of the intelligent machinery on both sides is 20 to 1.

The intelligent machinery of the Milky Way is far more powerful than their intelligent machinery.

Suddenly he remembered the information he got, the battle between the galaxy and the immortal civilization, and the elite legion of the immortal civilization, was also vulnerable.

At first I thought it was a problem of commanders and offensive and defensive trends, but now I am afraid that it is not that simple.

Thinking of this, Xiao Li's sapphire blue eyes seemed to be frozen with a layer of frost. Under the ice, the fighting intentions were brewing.

This little corner actually hides such a powerful force.

It was at this time that the adjutant's expression around Xiaoli suddenly changed, and the information from the Hongqiao front exceeded his imagination.

"Sir, there is news from Lord Red Hibiscus that an enemy has attacked Hongqiao."

From the beginning, I guessed that the Milky Way would choose to attack Hongqiao. It was not surprising that the owl was just the look of the adjutant, which puzzled him. "Is there any special information?"

"Sir Hibiscus said they have quantum stealth robots."

Lu Libao's blue eyes shrank and turned dark blue.

He could remain calm, but the adjutant couldn't calm down.

When Hongqiao first appeared, they risked the destruction of the whole group and entered the unknown space world. When it was determined that the Hongqiao side was the other end of the universe, they pulled out the butcher knife the first time.

At first it was unknown to all of this, and as the war continued to advance, they soon learned the intelligence of this corner of Pisces.

Supported by three high-level civilizations, others are small and medium-sized civilizations. In this barren corner, there are no powerful weapons. The immortal civilization has not even launched space weapons. Fleeing.

All information shows that the forces here are not strong, but now there is a strong force.

Now even quantum stealth robots are out.

The top technology that only the top civilization forces have.

The owl's expression is cold, and now the two sides have started fighting, and then it is meaningless to dispute whether the other party is a top civilization. There is no life or death, and there is no escape route.

"Adult, do you want to go back and support Master Red Hibiscus?" The adjutant asked in surprise.

"No." Xiao Li didn't think about it, and her cold eyes fell on the front of the battle line: "Prepare an anti-matter bomb and destroy all intelligent machinery."

"Yes." The adjutant responded quickly.

The owlet takes off the long sickle behind it, activates the short pulse laser, and the armor on his body changes, covering all his head. The sickle mark of the sword owl family appears cold in the low light.

The blue light of the eyes is like frost, and the cold light is exposed.

The long sickle blade shone with the light of death in the light of the short pulse laser, and the fierce fighting spirit burst forth from the body of the owl.

...

"coming."

Ku Yao didn't expect the other party to fight like this.

Although they have the advantage of intelligent machinery, but the number is not dominant. It is beneficial for the other party to drag on, but he did not expect the other party to choose a tough game.

It seems that the battle on the side of Hongqiao made the other party choose quick battle and quick decision.

There is no warning that the other party uses large-scale antimatter bombs to make indiscriminate attacks, and the smart machines put in are too late to be recovered, and among them, the smart machines of their side.

decisive!

Ku Yao gives the first impression of the other general.

The enemy armoured regiment did not intend to fight for a protracted period, and the attack was decisively unexpected. The opponent did not choose to go back to support the Hongqiao battlefield, but opened the prelude to the war with them.

In addition to confidence in the battlefield of Hongqiao, there is also confidence in his own strength.

If the opponent can win the battle here, then the next step must be the Milky Way and the fairy system. Bringing the other party closer to the galaxy is a failure for Ku Yao.

The Milky Way and the Fairy Department have space waves, but if the other side throws light speed destruction weapons and space destruction weapons, they will also have a lot of trouble, and to eliminate the effects of the two weapons, they also have to pay some effort.

If the galaxy is destroyed, they have no face in front of many war departments, calling them **** guards.

But it was a decisive battle, and there was nothing terrible.

As for the battlefield of Hongqiao, they do n’t have to worry about it. They are prepared with sufficient guards. They are confident not to lose to any war department. For the title of God King, this is a war that has to be won for Shenwei.

Ku Yao's expression is serious, the black armor covers the whole body, and the air of killing permeates.

"Ready for the decisive battle."

...

Xi Jian collapsed on the training ground, the training was too heavy, and now every combat armour division on the field is supported by will. Almost in the second announcing the break, all the armored divisions sat on the ground together, gasping for breath.

Hell training.

At first I thought that the marching ant group was only strict in selecting people. After entering the senior armor division, they could be integrated into the team without too many requirements.

Now they found out that it was ridiculously wrong.

However, the treatment here really does not have to say that every time you are injured in training, there is also a professional medical cabin, as long as you do not die, you can repair the injury. This kind of welfare is something that the civilization in the past did not dare to think about.

But the medical cabin is also a kind of torture, which means that you can't even rely on the laziness of the injury.

This is an independent high-gravity planet, and they dare not even appear to run away. Because there is no spaceship, there is no way to escape from this barren planet, which is to find your own death.

As for some senior armor divisions who think that their strength is strong and do not need training, it is to find guilt.

They saw with their own eyes that the adults of Blackhawk and Taishan took the spikes out and took turns to "single pick". The wailing screams were amplified by the loudspeaker, the whole training field could be heard, and the holographic pictures of the battle Projected, the kind of naked, naked and naked abuse made their scalp numb.

After seeing it, all lives are obedient, and no one dares to question the strength of Blackhawks and others.

"I don't know how the battle is going."

Xi Xian wiped the sweat on his forehead and exhaled.

The news that the fighting started was spread among them, and they would discuss it involuntarily during the rest of training.

"I heard that the guard camp came on, but I don't know how strong they are?" A leopard-headed orc-like creature next to him interjected, full of doubts. His name is Leopard Chen, and he is known for his speed in the team.

"The guard camp is an adult's guard, and its strength will not be weak." Xi Yun said.

"Grandma, we came here like a war, and the result was that we sent this bird to no **** planet for training, and the thief was uncomfortable." A humanoid mumbled, his mouth wide, and he talked, so the team gave him a nickname Big mouth.

"We have just formed. In front of us, there are the guard camp, the seafood warfare department, the big silly warfare department and the wood warfare department. Not afraid to say, at present, our warfare department seems to be at the bottom." Bao Chen said.

After joining the team, they all nicknamed their war departments.

The **** guard is the guard camp, the sea king war department is the seafood war department, the big devil war department is the big silly war department, and the wood guard war department commanded by Wat Mu is the wood war department, as for the Kunpeng war department, it is kind to other war departments. It's called the Bird War Department.

The topic brought up, and a few players with some strength around them all joined together to join the group chat.

"What do you think is the strongest war department?"

A member of the team suddenly chimed in. All of a sudden, everyone was in deep thought. They hadn't really thought about the problem.

"It's hard to say." Xi Jian shook his head.

The Neptune War Department is dominated by human armor divisions. In terms of the innate conditions of the War Armor Division, there is a gap between the Neptune War Departments, but none of them have seen the Neptune War Department. The other war departments are mainly armor divisions other than humans. I have never seen the strength of other war departments.

"However, judging from the positioning of the war department, the guard of the Shenwei is more likely to be stronger, because they are the guards of the adults, and they have been personally tuned by the adults."

Xi's remarks attracted the unanimous approval of others.

"The other war departments have also been tuned by Master Lan, but I heard that the four war departments are in no particular order in the group, because of the virtual reality exercises, each has its own wins and losses." Bao Chen added.

"Whichever comes first, waits for our war department to take shape, as long as it is not at the bottom of the group, otherwise it will be a bit shameful."

Everyone, you talked about me and discussed the situation of the war department and the front line. Now everything is speculation. The front line situation has not been transmitted to them.

Suddenly, a loud voice pulled everyone back from the discussion, and Taishan looked ruthless: "After the break, continue training."

Everyone jumped like a scorched buttocks, and began to enter the training state.

Black Hawk is in charge of Kunpeng War Department, Taishan is the deputy. As a new war department, combat power and discipline, it is different from the other war departments. Now it can only be done step by step. It takes some time. Combat power can be formed.

Taishan overlooked the desperately trained team members in the training ground: "Black Hawk, do you think there will be any problems with this frontline battle situation?"

"It shouldn't be so. Instructor Lan's decision is okay. Let the guardian go up and there must be his reason." Black Eagle said: "Our current task is to train this rookie into a soldier, otherwise we will be at the bottom. Shameful. "

chapters.title: Chapter 916: : The Top Civilization To Escape?
chapters.body:
Chapter 916: : The Top Civilization To Escape?

In the eyes of the armored division of the Armored Regiment, Chi Jin is not eye-catching, because his background is ordinary, his force is not strong, and he has no particularly outstanding advantages. Lord Li has the longest time.

But only a few people knew that it was not luck that Red Hibiscus could become the deputy of the Warframe.

Red Hibiscus is no stranger to space warfare, and his military strength is not strong, because during the academy period, he chose to study as a star, not a war armor division.

In the dark forest area, due to the influence of the dark forest civilization, it is mostly dominated by orc-like civilizations. The orcs in the dark forest domain are the strongest in the seven domains of the universe.

Fighting is common in the dark forest, from small individuals to large civilizations. The universal law of weak meat and strong food is particularly profound in the dark forest.

Therefore, in the dark forest area that advocates military force, the proportion of life of the star alone is very small.

Stars are scarce. It stands to reason that after the graduation of the academy, Red Hibiscus is not a problem to enter the Legion of Civilization, but now, many Legion of Civilizations, first of all see their race and force, and their strategy is not obvious when selecting soldiers.

The regular legion could not be reused, so Hibiscus chose to leave the civilization legion and join the war armor.

Even so, he has touched the wall many times, until he met the owl, he did not feel that the hero has a place. In the battles again and again, Xiaoli will discuss the combat strategy with Chi Hibiscus, and only a few senior members of the War Armor Group know.

While at the academy, Chi Hi's simulated sand table scores are not low and are of an excellent level. In addition to these years, following the owl to go south and north, he has already mastered the application of various tactics.

So when he found that the enemy was not weak, Hibiscus still responded calmly.

The battlefield is constantly changing, and thousands of information are gathered at any time. He needs to extract the information to develop the battle situation and prepare for contingency at any time.

Despite the influence of miscellaneous thoughts, Hibiscus scanned the latest data, including the location of their warships, as well as the number and location of assassin robot invasions.

Various deductions have evolved in Chi Hi's mind, and he will give orders as soon as the situation changes.

It ’s been a long time since I ’ve been on the battlefield, and I ’ve been quiet for so many years. When I was in the academy, the enthusiasm for deducing the sand table was activated, and the whole person began to enter a state of tension.

"The third quadrant, continue to put in intelligent machinery. The war armor division goes out and removes the assassin robot."

...

"It's pretty good." In the war room, Lan's narrow and long eyes narrowed into a slit, with a hidden expression of appreciation.

Zhao Min was also sitting in the war room, paying attention to the direction of the war.

"Will something go wrong?"

"No." Lan shook his head directly, and there was a certainty and self-confidence in his voice: "Their leaders made a decisive decision and knew that they did not have the advantage, they wanted to draw Ku Yao into a decisive battle and destroy the living power, but this is what What Ku Yao wants. "

Lan touched his chin and smiled at the corner of his mouth.

Since the development of the small universe, Shenwei has been trained in combat skills.

It can be said that Shenwei is by far his most satisfying team.

"The guardians are all superpowers and have a unified combat consciousness ability. One-fifth guard guard enters the second stage of combat consciousness, has the strength of ordinary top armor division, and cooperates with the top standard armor. I ca n’t think of any odds for this armored regiment in the Dark Forest. "

There is no space to destroy weapons, there is no encounter with the speed of light destroying weapons, the combat effectiveness and armor of the armored division is the greatest guarantee.

As for the Hongqiao battlefield, Lan is even less worried.

The opponent's powerful main force is in the long snake constellation, the limited defense power of the Hongqiao in the skeleton galaxy, and the scarce anti-matter and dark matter resources of the armored regiment are a common phenomenon. They cannot be killed if consumed.

...

The light dissipated, and the owlet body slowly appeared outside the spaceship, with a long sickle clenched in his hand.

In space, all the armored divisions of the entire armored regiment appeared, scattered throughout the space, the armor was uniformly painted, and the weapons of the armor were all ready to start. In the space 50 million kilometers away in front of them, a team hovered there quietly.

The long sickle in the hands of the owl is activated, his eyes are cold, and the blue and black tiger-painted armor starts, flying towards the front of the team.

In space, countless pieces of debris float and wreak havoc, wreckage of intelligent machinery, wreckage of space-based weapons, and wreckage of huge spaceships, and still struggling with robots that have not been completely destroyed.

There is no smoke.

The killing air raged in the dead space.

Suddenly accelerating, the momentum is no longer reserved, the owl is like a sharp blade with the same sheath, and blazes towards the **** guard quickly.

Ku Yao's eyes brightened when he saw the other party coming.

Do you want to fight bayonet?

He admired each other a little bit and found his short board was caught by someone. Without a trace of muddy water, he started bombing mode, released all the intelligent machinery to attack, consumed their ammunition, and then pulled them into the decisive moment.

If they retreat, the other party will jump to the Milky Way without hesitation, straight to the Huanglong.

Although it is certain that the galaxy will be fine, being attacked by the opponent is a failure for him. With this move, they had to face a decisive battle with each other.

This is their battle for honor.

Under the battle armor, Ku Yao's eyes were sullen, and the spear in his hand was clenched, pointing far ahead.

"kill!"

...

The long knife in Dong Likai's hands implied the light of death. The knife was two meters long. The back of the knife was straight and slender, like a Tang knife. The blade was covered with countless high-energy short pulses.

Slashing into the air, Dong Likai's battle armour burst out and bullied himself and appeared beside the assassin robot.

The melee combat anti-matter bullets that the armor can carry are limited, and the armor of the advanced armor division can avoid the attack of the anti-matter bullets, so the bayonet is very common in the space battlefield.
