Quantum stealth assassin robot, this robot is very tricky, but it is not a senior armor division after all. He is a senior war armor division. Even if his strength is ordinary in the senior war armor division, it is not a problem to get a war robot.

Hey!

Seeing the long knife slashing toward the robot's waist, Dong Likai's heart suddenly increased in confidence.

Suddenly, with a warning sign, he saw that the assassin robot did not dodge, and the long blade in his hand was coming towards his heart.

perish together?

The idea came out, Dong Likai's heart was cold, the engine on the shoulder of the battle armor urged, the speed exploded, and it instantly retreated, and the cut knife was too late to fall.

To avoid the assassin robot's attack, Dong Likai was sweating coldly.

Almost turned over in the gutter.

Seeing the assassin robot wanting to escape, Dongli Kai grinned, and the high-energy laser started, inspiring the assassin robot's energy shield.

When the energy shield is excited, the characteristics of quantum stealth disappear, and the figure of the assassin robot appears again within the observation of quantum lightning.

Dong Likai did not hesitate to urge the engine and appeared above the assassin robot.

The body of the assassin robot disappeared in place without waiting for his hands.

Damn it! Calculated by the robot? Seeing the war robot appearing on his side, Dong Likai's face changed greatly.

What a powerful war robot.

Chi Hi was horrified.

The opponent's assassin robot has reached the level of an ordinary senior armor division.

This is terrifying because war robots can be manufactured continuously as long as they have enough dark matter materials.

Red Hibiscus is now sure they have provoke a terrible force.

From all indications, the opponent's strength should not be underestimated. They are still not clear. The opponent has no stronger hole card and did not move. Thinking of this, Chi Hien sank in one heart.

"Ask the situation over Lord Luli."

"Yes." The intelligence officers around him hurriedly clicked on the communication device. Suddenly, his expression changed: "Sir Lizhan consumed the antimatter and dragged the opponent into the decisive battle."

Chi Hi's face finally changed.

For the first time, he saw Luli take the initiative to drag the enemy into the decisive battle.

"Adult, their attack rhythm has accelerated." The dignified voice of the intelligence officer pulled Chi Hiran back from his thoughts, and their advantage of the number of intelligent machines seemed to be ineffective.

"Have the supplementary intelligent machinery and armor been shipped?"

"Just came over."

Red Hibiscus looked at the battle in space and took a deep breath and said: "Put all the smart machines out, and the armor is ready."

"Sir, we have few smart machines and limited dark matter. This batch of armor ..."

"Sir Loach wins, we win, and Sir Loth loses, we lose. But if Sir Loyal wins, and we cannot hold Hongqiao, Sir Loyal will have a big trouble." Leng said.

A huge cluster of light expanded in space, sandwiched with death-like energy, and spread out at an extremely fast speed.

The light group is covering the sky and sun, and hundreds of thousands of intelligent machines that can't escape in the future are swallowed. The metal vaporizes in terror energy and disappears without a trace.

Like a prelude, thousands of light groups exploded in space one after another. Space appeared like thousands of suns in an instant, and the optical radar was completely white.

The battle of the Hongqiao battlefield of the Skeleton Galaxy entered a fierce stage.

Chi Hi rolled his eyes, and he felt great pressure.

The other party's firepower is like a bottomless hole, an inexhaustible anti-matter weapon, and smart machines are stronger than them. They can only rely on a huge number to maintain their advantage.

The bitter world that pays close attention to the battlefield sees a steady stream of intelligent machinery thrown into the battlefield, thinking for two seconds.

The balance began to be unbalanced.

"The time is almost up, let go of war violence."

"Can I go out?" Kulong Yueyue asked.

Ku Tian rolled his eyes directly and despised the goods: "This is not a personal discussion, this is a war, and it is not time for a decisive battle."

Under the order, the last spaceship in the team started, disappeared in place twenty minutes later, and appeared at the forefront of the space battlefield.

The hatch opened, and millions of red-coated war violently fell into space, quickly spread out, and the muzzle quickly rose, aiming at the intelligent mechanical tide.

Buzz ...

The sound of the spacecraft radar.

Red Hibiscus almost exclaimed, this is a signal that a large amount of antimatter is activated.

Seeing the data prompted by the radar, hibiscus almost didn't go crazy.

Is there such a luxurious anti-material bomb in the war between the top forces? Does antimatter cost nothing?

A bullet-sized antimatter can destroy a planet. Pure antimatter is expensive, and is used to make antimatter bullets. They are calculated in nanometers. They are mainly used for spacecraft energy.

Now some people use such a horrible amount of anti-matter to make bullets, which is simply a loser.

When did a cowardly force appear in a barren corner of the universe?

Red Hibiscus is completely chaotic, is he never seen the world, or is his opponent a top civilization?

Yes, it must be a top civilization!

The top civilization to escape.

chapters.title: Chapter 917: :Surrender
chapters.body:
Chapter 917: :Surrender

Lan saw the battle armor and the sickle weapon of the owl, and his eyes flashed with surprise.

The silver ring-like eyes seem to lose focus and fall into memories, with some emotions and some memories. It took a long time to withdraw from the memories, and his eyes still fell on the owl.

"Know?" Zhao Min asked curiously.

"It's been more than three hundred years since I remembered an old man. The armor painting style and weapons are the same as him." Lan sighed, and saw the battle near the end of the two sides, and then opened the communication device: "Ku Yao, don't kill him first, I asked him something. "

Ku Yao originally intended to end the battle. After hearing Lan's order, he slowly lowered the spear flashing in his hand. Although I don't know what Master Lan thinks, he will not violate Lan's orders.

At this point in the battle, the outcome is already clear

But the other party's tenaciousness exceeded his expectations.

At this time, the owl was embarrassed, his arms were cut off, the cut was smooth, and there were several holes in his armor, especially the abdomen, which had been penetrated.

The face covered by the armor was a bit tired and gaunt.

If it weren't for high-level life, such injuries in space would probably have already died.

And around him, the team he thought was strong before, and now he is still alive, there is no one who does not pay attention.

The fighting power of the opponent is so powerful that it is abnormal.

It was a miracle to think that he was still alive when he thought about the terrible battle just now.

The top armor division.

He can basically confirm that Ku Yao has the status of a top armored division. Because of innate genetic limitations, he also did not have awakening super powers, so the top armored division is a natural rift that he has been unable to evolve.

Unexpectedly, against him is a top armor division.

More than one, but a group.

Top armor division, standard top armor.

The moment the two armored divisions collided was a nightmare. He had never thought about it. The armored divisions he had chosen and were extremely confident were unbearable.

Top civilization?

The owl feels a bit bleak.

Commanding operations, he is very confident. He is not tactically ineffective, but equipped with technology and weapons that are inferior to each other. Because when attacking the three major civilizations, their anti-matter and dark matter are consumed heavily.

Now the head-to-head battle, except for one round at the beginning, the subsequent battle is completely defeated.

That feeling of powerlessness was the first time he felt it since he formed the War Group. He was confident that his armored regiment and combat power did not lose to the high-level civilized regiment. Now when he encounters a truly powerful regiment, he feels powerless.

In a remote corner of the universe, there is such a terrifying force.

When Xiaoli thought he was going to die, the other party stopped. The other armored divisions all stopped in unison. Suddenly, the opponent's voice came from the battle channel's public channel.

"You lost, surrender."

Xiao Li grinned, but one day, someone said this to him: "Is your Excellency insulting us? On the battlefield, only the battle is killed, and no troops are dropped."

Hearing this, Ku Yao's heart flashed with appreciation. In any case, this enemy is worthy of admiration.

"Adult has something to ask you."

Xiao Li froze, thought he refused to surrender, the other side would then start without hesitation, did not expect it to come out like this.

Persuade?

Xiao Li hesitated for a moment, and clicked on the video call request. It was just the other party's first sentence that surprised him.

"Daoxiao tribe?"

"Your Excellency knows the Daoxiao tribe?" Xiao Li asked in surprise.

Although the Daoxiao tribe is ancient, it has faded. There are very few tribes, the universe is too large, and there are too many lives. Except for life researchers, ordinary life does not care about any ethnic group at all.

"Do you know Xiaoya?"

Xiao Li's pupils shrank: "My father is also called Xiao He? Are you asking my father?"

"Your father?" Lan shook all over, no wonder the armor and weapons were so familiar: "Where is your father now?"

"Dead, a hundred years ago."

"Hey!" Lan sighed, with unlimited sighs: "My name is Yang Si Karl Lan, your father's old man."

"Are you silver-haired?" Xiao Li exclaimed in amazement.

His father told him the story of the Black Maple Warframe.

The mysterious chief of staff, with the strength of the armored regiment, set traps to kill the four main forces of the top civilization Dahe civilization, designing the whole world and letting Dahe civilization be divided.

Because of his conspicuous silver hair, he did not know his face while wearing a mask, so he was called silver hair by the outside world.

It can be said that the former Black Maple Leaf Armor Group was a legendary team in the armor circle, and silver hair was the most dazzling one in the legend. His father had mentioned silver hair many times, and his real name was Yang Sikar Lan.

"Do you still fight?" Lan asked suddenly.

...

Space bubbles, quantum stealth assassin robots, massive antimatter and dark matter, powerful intelligent machinery.

All things considered, it is the strength and technology unique to top civilizations.

In this barren corner, it is impossible for such a short period of time for a top-level civilization to be born and grown, and the standard is completely in line with the Universe Alliance.

Except for the top civilizations that had fled, Chi Hiran could not think of other possibilities.

Millions of anti-matter explosion fire clusters are connected in space, stretching billions of kilometers, which is more terrible than the star explosion. If there is a planet here, under this terrifying energy radiation, it will become a fireball in an instant.

Quantum radar can clearly see that all the smart machines they put in are swallowed up by the horrible light group, vaporize in an instant, and disappear without a shadow.

Overture scores into Zhuang song.

This scene made the armor division on the field chill.

Red Hibiscus saw this kind of scene for the first time. In previous battles, there has never been such a luxurious explosion scene.

Top civilization.

Even the top civilizations that escaped are much stronger than their advanced civilizations.

The lean camel is bigger than the horse.

This attack shattered their confidence to win. It's not that he can't do it, but the absolute strength of the other party. The weaker ones have no solution under this force.

Either run away or die.

At this moment, the communication instrument in Chi Hi's hands sounded, and at the moment when the message was opened, he was dumbfounded.

...

Yang Siqing opened her eyes, and the silver ring in her pupils became more translucent and straight through the heart.

Soon, Yang Siqingyue regained her former tranquility, and slowly stepped out of the capability development module, took the smart clothes handed over by the robot, and no one was sitting on the body, covering the spring light.

Only then looked at Chen Mo.

"Have you succeeded?" Chen Mo asked.

"Successful." Yang Siqingyue smiled.

"Look at what you look like, you should get the ability you want."

"That's right." Yang Siqingyue's voice is still the same bland and gentle, and his emotions have not fluctuated because of the ability development success.

"I should go out too."

Chen Mo didn't ask Yang Siqingyue's ability. She didn't take the initiative to say that Chen Mo didn't need to inquire.

When the war was going on, Chen Mo, as the leader, did not direct the battle, but he still had to be concerned, otherwise it would not be justified. Yang Siqingyue quietly followed behind Chen Mo.

"Boss, can you explain why life has superpowers?" Yang Siqingyue asked suddenly.

Chen Mo was surprised at Yang Siqingyue's sudden problems.

In Chen Mo's impression, if she doesn't take the initiative to talk to her, she will rarely take the initiative to talk to others. Yang Siqingyue has a quiet personality, just like a saint, good at water but not contentious, and attentive to everything.

I did not expect to ask questions.

But on this issue, Chen Mo could only show his hand and said he could do nothing.

"Life is the most mysterious subject, involving the study of life. At present, the universe civilization only grasps the atomic level of living matter, but not the non-physical level of life."

He remembered the consciousness that Xiao Yu could see. The kind of existence between virtuality and reality, which could not be seen through, was fascinating.

"The opposite of the existence of matter is the existence of consciousness. To solve the unsolved mystery of why superpowers exist, you may need to study deeply on the level of life consciousness. Or, you can try to find the answer in philosophy ..."

Suddenly, the communication instrument in Chen Mo's hand sounded, interrupting the conversation between the two.

chapters.title: Chapter 918: : The New Owner Of The Pisces Whale Complex
chapters.body:
Chapter 918: : The New Owner Of The Pisces Whale Complex

Red Hibiscus looked at the owl in doubt, full of doubts. Based on his knowledge of the owl, any one of the armored divisions in the armoured regiment may surrender, but the owl cannot.

Facing the eyes of Chi Hibiscus and others, Luli was unmoved.

"Really?" Red Hibiscus asked.

"Huh." Xiao Li answered frankly: "The legendary silver hair of the Black Maple Battle Armor Group, Yang Si Karl Lan, he is my father's old friend."

"Silver hair? Didn't he retire?" Chi Hi's pupils tightened suddenly.

He naturally heard the legendary story of the silver hair, and the whole battle armor circle is no stranger to this name. To destroy a top-level civilization and god-level character with a battle armor group.

"A comeback," said Xiao Li: "I haven't asked why, but the adults who can make silver hair have a promising future. The guards who fought me, all the top standard armor, tens of thousands of top armor division . There are also techniques for extracting antimatter and dark matter in the galaxy. "

"Top-level armor? Tens of thousands of top-level armor divisions? Techniques for extracting antimatter and dark matter?"

Top-level combat armor, top-level armor division, anti-matter and dark matter extraction technologies, these technologies and strengths are all unique to top-level civilizations, and not just general top-level civilizations. Only a top civilization strong enough will possess so many technologies.

"I was also shocked at the beginning, but the adults who can make silver hair should not be ordinary life, the universe is so big, maybe we need a bigger stage."

When these words are spoken, the corner of the mouth of the owl is bitter.

He was persuading Red Hibiscus, in fact, it was more like persuading himself.

Suddenly, the surroundings became quiet. Xiao Li looked down the front and saw Chen Mo and Lan coming towards them.

too young.

Xiao Li was shocked when she saw Chen Mo beside Lan.

Not only him, but other players around him also felt incredible.

They had thought that the life for Lan would be an old man of great esteem, or thought that he would be a particularly powerful top armored division. Now that he saw Chen Mo, he found himself wrong.

Too young.

This is their first impression of Chen Mo.

At such a young age, he has become the master of a top-level civilization, which is unimaginable.

If not for some information, the entire marching ant group was from Chen Mo. He had every reason to suspect that the large marching ant group was left to Chen Mo by his ancestors.

"grown ups."

Xiao Li and Chi Jin paid a courtesy to Chen Mo.

Although it was difficult to adapt, it had to be done.

Chen Mo looked at them.

It was not clear what was happening inside Hongqiao, so I just lifted the regiment to enter. He also brought a war armor group to defeat the main army of the three high-level civilizations.

Be brave and scheming.

For talents, Chen Mo never refuses.

"You follow me."

The owl and hibiscus looked puzzled, but they kept up and reached the superpower development laboratory before landing.

"Next, I will develop super powers for you."

"What? Superpowers?"

The owl and hibiscus reacted unbelievably.

Superpower development technology is a technology that no god-level civilization has mastered. The battle of the Shigan galaxy, which shakes the entire universe, is caused by superpower development technology.

Now in this remote corner of the universe, Chen Mo told them that he has the ability to develop technology.

The news is too shocking.

Is it the missing magic flame civilization?

But this idea was quickly rejected by him. As the leader of the armored regiment, the owlet cares about the great events of the universe. The events of the Shigan galaxy are in full swing. The life of the magic flame civilization, he remembers, is not like Chen Mo.

Originally thought it was a top civilization, now it seems that they need to change their minds and re-evaluate.

"Do you want to develop?" Chen Mo was not surprised by the reaction of the two.

"Is it really possible?" Xiao Li asked uncertainly.

It's not that he doesn't believe it, but it is too shocking. Once the development is successful, they will enter the category of god-level life, which is a technology that the god-level civilization has not mastered.

"You have dealt with Shenwei, don't you know? Shenwei all have super powers."

Chen Mo threw a blockbuster, leaving Xiao Li and Chi Hiran dumbfounded.

"Why?" Xiao Li looked at Chen Mo, his face puzzled.

"You follow me, no doubt, no doubt," Chen Mo said.

Xiao Li and Chi Jin glanced at each other. They now understand a little bit, why Lan chose to go out and join Chen Mo's team. The last point of my heart was open, and my eyes became firm.

"Thank you, Master."

...

After surrendering the owl, Lan immediately ordered the war department to go to the skeleton galaxy to take over the defense of Hongqiao.

Subsequently, they ordered to the Neptune War Department to let them go to various places in Pisces and Cetaceans, occupying the main stars of civilization and space channels.

Before the news of the victory spread, the marching ant group quickly occupied the main planets of all galaxies and laid a defense line. Because the previous three major civilizations fled, leaving behind small forces and civilizations that could not escape, their occupation was surprisingly smooth.

At this time, many lives have not yet reacted. When they reacted and found that the Milky Way was victorious in the war, the marching ant group had controlled the main constellation of the Pisces Cetaceans supercluster complex.

The escaped civilization can only leave. If you want to return to the Pisces cetaceans supercluster complex, you must obey the control of marching ants today. For many civilizations, this is unacceptable.

Of course, there are civilizations who want to resist, but in the face of marching ant groups showing their fangs, they are so weak that eventually the ripples are not astonishing.

The war ended quickly, beyond imagination.

At this point, the super-galaxy complex Pisces has fallen into the hands of the marching ant group, and Chen Mo has also become the new owner of Pisces.

After going through Lan's iron-blooded methods, the civilized ruler who wanted to take the opportunity to put pressure on it had no choice but to leave in search of other places to live. Most of the forces and lives without the symbol of civilization chose to stay in the complex of Pisces cetaceans supercluster.

After Hongqiao's shock, the flames in the universe went to other places, and may not be more stable than here.

On the universe news platform, there are news of wars and conflicts among various civilizations. Which civilization is annihilated, which civilization is rising, and countless planets and life are transformed into cosmic dust in the battle of civilization.

The pattern of the universe has changed dramatically, and chaos has come.

...

When Luli and Red Hibiscus entered the war room, their eyes were full of confidence.

After successfully developing superpowers, they are already a god-level life. The innate life-level shackles once opened on them, and the combat effectiveness and physical quality have been greatly improved.

This is a kind of self-confidence from the soul of life.

Now to Chen Mo, they have sincerely convinced.

In the past, they chose to form their own armor because they could not be reused in the legion. Allegiance to Chen Mo is now a good result.

They all know about the situation of the marching ant group.

The technology of the top civilization, and even the technology of reaching the civilization of the **** level, sitting in a small universe.

Adults are so young that they created such a terrifying marching ant group with one hand, and they may not be qualified to compete in the future. Compared with the staying of Tong Qing and Thunder, the adults seem to be far behind.

Seeing the changes between the two, Chen Mo nodded in satisfaction: "From today, Xiao Li will form the Night Owl War Department, and Chi Hiron will go to the General Staff and follow Lan."

"Yes."

chapters.title: Chapter 919: : Nonsense
chapters.body:
Chapter 919: : Nonsense

The Pisces Cetaceans supercluster complex fell into control and the site expanded, which did not feel much to Chen Mo. Because the small universe is there, the Pisces complex is not that large.

There is another reason for him not to manage.

Taking over Pisces Whale means taking over all life in the entire area. There is more than trillions of lives in it, but management is not too difficult in the age of technology.

Zhao Min ’s co-ordination, together with the idea of the entire think tank team, soon settled the life of the Pisces Whale complex area.

In the whole process, Chen Mo is not in trouble, he is at ease to be a mascot.

For the sake of stability, there is a limit to the number of all armored regiments in the area.

At the same time, the entire area, regardless of the level of life level, all popularize the war college, recruit potential young people to cultivate, establish a complete armored division and general star training system, and also cultivate talents for managing the planet.

Humans who are determined to develop and grow, relying solely on the earth, are simply not realistic. The great fusion of cosmic life began as early as a billion years ago. For human beings on the earth, it is now as if it has just entered the real society.

Zhao Min and Lan took the lead to solve their worries, and Chen Mo's research was rarely disturbed.

The quantum life plan is the mission of the science and technology library, and the main topic is the top priority. With the passage of time, the construction of quantum life spheres has become more and more perfect.

Next is the actual test.

After leaving the laboratory, Chen Mo frowned, and the test of the quantum life sphere was the most troublesome thing.

Failure is death, success is a quantum life.

After becoming a quantum life, no one knows what will happen. Test it with other intelligent life. Once it turns into a quantum life, it will be devastating. But testing with non-intelligent life will not work because non-intelligent life is more risky.

But at this stage of research, it is time to tell Xiaoyu them.

"Creating quantum life?"

Xiaoyu and Zhao Min looked at each other, they didn't understand the specific meaning of Chen Mo.

"It is eternal life, quantum man."

The two women looked at each other and saw the shock in each other's eyes. Eternal life, this idea is too crazy. Before they heard Chen Mo say that many scientific and technological projects are researched, they feel incredible, but Chen Mo can always create miracles.

Now I hear this project, it can no longer be explained with incredible.

In the past, Chen Moshen was mysterious and kept refusing to tell them what important projects they were doing. They didn't care, because knowing what Chen Mo should let them know will not hide them.

Now thinking about it, this project is really terrible.

"The Quantum Life Sphere is complete and the theory is perfect. Next I am going to start the experiment."

"How to experiment?" Xiao Yu asked.

"I am going to experiment personally."

"What? No!"

Xiao Yu and Zhao Min spoke in unison, without any hesitation. The reaction was so great that Chen Mo was shocked.

The eyes of the two women made Chen Mo hairy.

"You can't do this experiment yourself. According to the process you said, you may die instantly. It's too dangerous. You can't take risks." Xiao Yu was determined.

"Yes." Zhao Min immediately stood on the united front with Xiaoyu.

"This experiment must be done."

"Can't we do it later? Do it again after a thousand years or 10,000 years? The current technology can allow us to have a long lifespan and wait for the research to be more complete before we can do it. The time is still so long."

"It has been perfected."

"No, anyway, you can't do it now, and you can't experiment by yourself." Xiao Yu's eyes became red, a little panicked: "Life is long enough, don't need eternal life, don't take this risk, OK."

Seeing Xiao Yu's tears rolling in his eyes, Chen Mo's scalp tingled. Xiao Yu's pitiful appearance, he really can't see it, and he will be soft-hearted when he takes another look.

"I have a reason to do it."

"Can't you let other people experiment on your behalf?" Zhao Min obviously stood firmly on Xiaoyu's side.

"No, it matters. This project is currently only known to me and Mo Nu. What I will tell you today. If successful, Quantum Life may have incredible abilities beyond the existing life, more than superpowers, and once Uncontrollable, then it ’s troublesome. "

"Mo Ge, Xiaoyu Sister, Zhao Min." Mo Nu, who had been sitting quietly beside Chen Mo, suddenly opened her mouth, and the three looked at her at the same time: "I can test Mo Ge instead. I am quantum conscious, and the consciousness can be copied, the body It can be created and is most suitable for testing.

"No." The three refused in unison.

Mo Nu's reaction was exactly the same as Chen Mo's just now, and was shocked by the reaction of the three.

"I'm going." Xiao Yuhong stared: "Mo Nu wants to help her husband research, and sister Zhao Min wants to manage the group. I'm the most suitable to go."

"No." Zhao Min immediately refused.

"Nonsense." Chen Mo almost shouted.

This time, the three women were frightened by Chen Mo's angry voice and looked at Chen Mo in panic. In the impression, Chen Mo was so angry for the first time.

Especially Xiao Yu, tears and whirling eyes, shrunk on Zhao Min's side, face grievances, dare not look directly at Chen Mo. It was also the first time that Zhao Min saw Chen Mofa in such a big fire, and he had no idea. As for Mo Nu, she dared not move her head with her head down, and grabbed the clothes with both hands, like a child who did something wrong.

"I'll do this experiment myself, don't you just fooling around there."

Chen Mo got up and left, knowing that he disappeared, Xiao Yu collapsed and cried.

"We are fooling around? Is his experiment more important than ours? Is it more important than our family? Why must we live forever? Why can't he do the experiment after a thousand years and 10,000 years? If in case, how can we do?"

Xiao Yu vented his emotions and cried even more fiercely.

Zhao Min didn't know how to comfort her. Chen Mo was in a hurry, she didn't dare to go, she was at a loss.

Going to the study, Chen Mo rubbed his eyebrows, sighed, and looked sad.

He did not dare to stay too long just now, afraid of being soft-hearted.

The technology library in his brain has a sense of anxiety, especially after the appearance of Einstein Rosenbridge. As if telling him that something big was about to happen, he had to do it.

Chen Mo believes this feeling.

The anxiety of the science and technology library made him conscious of the "emotions" in it, that is to test it himself.

He has no reason not to believe it, because of the ‘inheritance’ of the unknown civilization, which made him what he is today, otherwise he is just an ordinary person now, living the life of his wife and children.

But Xiaoyu's pleading look made Chen Mo dare not take another look, fearing that she would really promise her.

He really had to do this test, and he wanted to do it again after a thousand years, or even 10,000 years, because he now lacks nothing, and his life is very good. He has rights, wealth, status, technology, and power. With that, there is no need to take risks.

But he didn't think so.

His subconscious mind told him that he could not do this.

This kind of thing, the longer you think about it, the more you worry about it.

The sense of timidity and fear will definitely have a huge impact on the experiment. In this experiment, consciousness affects matter and cannot tolerate too many variables.

chapters.title: Chapter 920: : Account
chapters.body:
Chapter 920: : Account

Lan's armor followed the guidance and landed on the armor platform.

This is the underground laboratory of Xiangluwan Villa.

Coming out of the armor, he was still thinking about something, not about why Chen Mo came to him, but about Yang Siqingyue.

The girl, without knowing that he had found a boss to develop super powers, just refused to tell him what abilities he had. And the thief is clever, no matter how he puts it on, he didn't reveal a word.

"Boss." Entering the laboratory, Lan also deliberately looked around. This place he had never been to before, this time he was specially called to return him from the battle command center of Venus.

Nowadays general things are connected through holographic or virtual reality technology, and only the most important things need to be talked about face to face.

Therefore, Lan received the notice from Chen Mo and hurried back as soon as possible.

"Bring this." Chen Mo handed him a virtual reality helmet.

Before he had said anything, he was given a virtual reality helmet, and for a moment, Lan was still sitting on a chair and putting it on.

In the virtual reality space, there is a huge quantum life sphere. He has seen this quantum life sphere, because a secret space base in the Milky Way has a real machine under construction.

Chen Mo has never said what this mechanical structure is used for, and he is not easy to ask.

But he is very clear that this mechanical structure is very important. Because few people knew about the project in the past few years, apart from developing medical technology, Chen Mo spent all the rest of his energy on this mechanical structure.

And only he and Mrs. Mo are studying, no other researchers can participate.

"This time let you come, there are some things to explain to you."

Explain?

Hearing this sentence, Lan realized that something was wrong, her eyes were solemn, and she was unconsciously serious.

"This is the main project that I have been studying. Its name is" Quantum Life Ball ", also called" God's womb. "Chen Mo said.

"God's womb?" Lan heard the term for the first time.

"Yes, where the gods are bred. This quantum life ball is the mechanical structure that creates quantum life."

"What life is quantum life?"

"The particles in the whole body of life are composed of entangled quanta, a special kind of life that can live forever and never die. I haven't seen too much life, now it's just some conjecture."

eternal life!

This time, Lan's pupils shrunk, terrified, and he realized the horror of the matter.

Cosmic civilization, whether it is the ancient emperor Pharaoh of the earth or other great rulers of alien life history, has the idea of pursuing eternal life. But without exception, all failed.

However, the failure of civilized life to pursue eternal life, the medical level of various civilized lives is constantly improving, and the technology of extending life is constantly developing. The god-level life now has a life span of 10,000 years, but many lives are still unsatisfactory, and they wish to live forever.

Chen Mo told him that he was studying the technology of immortality.

"Because the unknownness of the project is too high, and it matters a lot. The fewer people you know, the better. Except Xiaoyu, only you know the existence of this project. This experiment is either eternal or eternal, everything Uncertainty. I ’m going to try it out for myself, so I ’ll tell you something in advance. "

"Do you want to experiment in person? No." Lan objected without thinking: "You are the soul of the marching ant group, you can't take risks."

"You don't need to persuade about this matter, just listen to my next account."

Chen Mo stopped Lan from continuing.

"Because the uncertainty is too high, in case the experiment fails, you can assist Xiaoyu and run the marching ant group, do not seek to dominate the universe, let the marching ant group be stable and stable in the universe, Xiaoyu and they are safe Lifetime. "

"Can't it be replaced with other lives?"

"No, quantum life is too special. My thinking and knowledge can understand vague concepts. It may be the fourth dimension of life, which is above the existing laws of the universe."

The fourth dimension of life surpasses the laws of time and space, just like humans draw second-dimensional cartoons, freely control the timeline of the universe, and even the character stories inside.

It matters. In the face of the supreme power of eternal life and cosmic life, almost no life can withstand this temptation.

Lan fell silent.

The boss is right, eternal life and the supreme power of the universe. Even he, he may not have the confidence to resist this horrible temptation. Once successful, ruin the source, then he is the only supremacy.

"Experiment time is determined in ten days."

"Can't you wait for thousands of years?" After recovering from the shock, Lan appeared extremely dignified.

"Can't." Chen Mo shook his head: "The longer it is dragged, the more concerns, and the shaking of consciousness will have a huge impact, and it must be determined."

"I understand."

Although Lan was helpless, she nodded and agreed.

Overnight.

"Eat breakfast, I cooked it myself." Chen Mo saw the three girls coming and delivered the prepared breakfast to their place.

Xiao Yu's eyes were red and swollen. Although he was covered with makeup, he could see the difference from the past. Zhao Min was also sad, obviously not sleeping well. Mo Nu was obviously unhappy, and when she saw Chen Mo, her smile was gone.

After serving Chen Mo's breakfast, Xiaoyu didn't mean to speak, so he ate his head and ate it.

Wushuang and the unnamed sister looked at each other, obviously feeling the atmosphere was not right. For a look, the sisters and brothers carried milk and hurriedly left with an egg, leaving space for them.

"After breakfast, I will go out with you to relax." Chen Mo said.

He only needs an apology, and then promised them to give up the experiment, they will leave to be happy, but Chen Mo did not do so. Yesterday he thought for a long time, the experiment must be done, even if it is risky.

Therefore, we can only accompany them.

Xiao Yu and Zhao Min were silent, Mo Mo kept the two daughters silent, and lowered their heads to breakfast, daring not to speak.

Chen Mo smiled bitterly when he saw that they had not spoken.

That roar yesterday, it was estimated that I cried all night, and now I am in a rage, preparing for the signs of the Cold War.

Breakfast ended in a dull atmosphere.

When Chen Mo didn't know what to do next, Xiao Yu changed the skirt and took out the small bag. Zhao Min and Mo Nu also changed their costumes. The meaning is obvious, but they didn't mean to speak with Chen Mo and left.

Chen Mo hurriedly followed.

The age of the universe is coming, but the shopping culture is universal.

The city of Binhai has now become an interstellar metropolis, and its architecture has changed a lot. Under the influence of marching ant groups, humans on the earth have gradually accepted the existence of aliens. In addition to human clothes, there will be some products specially designed for aliens.

On the road, occasionally some aliens can be seen walking around.

When he arrived at the mall, Xiaoyu ignored it and went shopping desperately. When he saw what he liked, he bought it, and then stuck it to Chen Mo. Can't wait to buy the whole mall and make Chen Mo exhausted.

Chen Mo knew they were venting and followed along.

Fortunately, Chen Mo didn't worry if she didn't cry, but the three girls seemed to breathe well. From beginning to end, she didn't say a word to Chen Mo.

"Give me these three heart-shaped colored stones."

Arriving at a jewelry store, Chen Mo's eyes lit up and fell on the three colored stones at the counter. This is the jewelry material of alien civilization, seven pure colors of colored stone, crystal clear. Such colored stones can only be mined on dwarf planets, and the number is not large.

This kind of colored stone is like the jade of human beings to the universe.

The life of wise women likes this kind of bright gemstone. This theorem is universal in the entire universe and does not change with species.

"Sir, you really have a vision. These three colored stones are the best colored stones in the store." The girl clerk smiled politely and took out the colored stone necklace inside.

"Put it on."

Chen Mo handed the shopping bag in his hand to the armor next to him, picked up the necklace and looked at Xiaoyu.

Seeing her bulging appearance, Chen Mo took the initiative to reach out and put the necklace on her.

"It's more beautiful." Seeing Xiaoyu wearing a necklace, Chen Mo admired it again. The color flow inside the colored stone was much better than the fixed shape and color jewelry, adding a lot of color to Xiaoyu.

"You wear it too."

Chen Moshun handed the necklace on to Zhao Min and Mo Nu.

"Gifts for you are pretty good."

Mo Nu was a little surprised when she heard that it was a gift, but when she saw Xiao Yu and Zhao Min's expressionless expressions, they threw out their tongues, immediately converged their smiles, and pretended to be the "cold" appearance.

"Like it?"

Xiaoyu gave her a white look, and his expression eased a lot, but still had no idea to talk to him, turned around and left, leaving Chen Mo messy in the wind.

The waitress next to Chen Mo checked out the scene and instantly understood: "Mr. Chen, the woman should be coaxed when she is angry. Just take a good attitude and admit a mistake."

"Thank you."

After the account was settled, Chen Mo hurried up, no matter whether Xiaoyu agreed or not, Xiaoyu only struggled and let him hold it. Cheeky, Chen Mo also grabbed Zhao Min's hand.

"Let go." Zhao Min directly patted Chen Mo's pig's trotters. Xiaoyu also learned something and directly broke away from Chen Mo's hand.

Chen Mo said with a cheek: "I should not yell at you yesterday, I apologize to you."

Xiao Yu's grievances have disappeared a lot, and Zhao Min's complexion has also eased a lot. Obviously he did eat this set.

"Give up the experiment, okay? We can promise you anything." Xiao Yu said obscurely, with a dumb voice, and begged.

Chen Mo was silent, the meaning was obvious.

Xiaoyu no longer spoke.

Chen Mo takes them to play dinner, shopping, shopping, watching movies, and playing games. If it is normal, they will definitely be happy, but they are not happy now.

They couldn't make Yan Yan laugh.

It is more like a company before parting.

chapters.title: Chapter 921: : The Most Difficult To Endure Grace
chapters.body:
Chapter 921: : The Most Difficult To Endure Grace

Meteor that is fleeting in the night sky.

Chen Mo accompanied his family every day and rarely went to the laboratory. Only Xiaoyu's three daughters knew what was going to happen, and their smiles disappeared from their faces, but every day nothing happened.

They all knew that Chen Mo's determination could not be changed, and noisy and futile would not help, and it would only distract Chen Mo, which would be more dangerous.

The suffering is only known to them.

I wish I could come later that night, but I felt that time had never passed quickly.

Mo Nu came out of the bathroom, wearing a nightdress, and the lines were outlined. The cheeks of the condensed white jade still had water vapor, such as the hibiscus out of the water, which was very charming without the use of fat powder, and it was breathtaking.

After tidying up, Mo Nu left her room barefoot.

The pain is getting stronger and stronger.

hiss!

Chen Mo knocked on his head.

Since the completion of the Quantum Life Ball, his brain began to painfully, and he began to think that it was a problem of overwork. He didn't care, but this accompanied Xiaoyu to rest for a short time, but it didn't relieve, but it was even more painful.

Now he found that this is a problem of the technology library, like a hint.

Over time, the pain in the brain became clearer and more intense. But Chen Mo did not show it. He endured the pain of his brain every day and accompanied his family in the best state.

He is still confident in the success rate of this experiment. But even so, the uncertainty in the test is still too great.

Tomorrow is the experimental time.

Without a long delay, his head hurt more and more.

"Moge."

Mo Nu pushed the door in and interrupted Chen Mo's thoughts.

Chen Mo put away the projection of the quantum life sphere, endured the discomfort of the brain, and responded. Looking at Mo Nu, today Mo Nu is dressed more **** than before, which can't be ignored.

"Mo Ge, am I pretty?" The Mo female models approached Chen Mo, his eyes bent into crescents.

"Every day is beautiful."

Mo Nu sat gently on Chen Mo's lap, with a little coyness in peace.

Emotional.

"Hold me back."

"Okay." Chen Mo picked up Mo Nu and went back to her room.

During this time, Xiaoyu and Zhao Min were in a bad mood, and they were sad every day.

Only Mo Nu, as before, only took care of the emotions of the two women and would talk to Chen Murduo in private and accompany him like no one.

The two were intimate much more often than before, and Chen Mo was not surprised.

Chen Mo didn't know what Mo Nu was thinking, but he was also happy, at least Mo Nu looked good. He wanted to see them look happy every day, instead of looking sad.

In addition to giving up the experiment, he will not refuse any request to them.

"You go to accompany Xiaoyu and Zhao Min." Lying in Chen Mo's arms, Mo Nu's voice was exhausted.

"You go to bed first."

Chen Mo's palm gently patted on her back until Mo Nu fell asleep, and then stood up gently. The moment the door closed, Mo Nu opened her eyes slowly, looking at the closed door, with a lot of reluctance.

...

"Sister Min, what should we do?" In the room, Xiao Yu cried in a low voice, she did not dare to cry in front of Chen Mo's face, and now Zhao Min was the only object she confided in.

"I don't know." Zhao Min has some six gods without a master.

She didn't know how to comfort her, but now she needs comfort. Mo Nu should go to accompany Chen Mo, they have no opinions, they can not accompany Chen Mo like no one else, only Mo Nu can.

"Why would he rather abandon this family and take risks? That bad-hearted man, bastard, scum man, hates him." Xiao Yu cried even more fiercely.

Zhao Min smiled bitterly.

Xiao Yu scolded Chen Mo all night.

Click!

The latch and door lock of the room door suddenly opened. Xiaoyu caught a glimpse of Chen Mo coming in, hurriedly wiped away her tears, and hid in the quilt. She didn't want Chen Mo to see what she looked like now.

"How did you come in? Isn't it tied?" Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo with a cold face.

"If you can't even get in the door of your wife's room, how can you be a bad guy, scumbag?" Chen Mo smiled.

"There is still a smile on my face, let me out."

Zhao Min was in a hurry, pushing Chen Mo angrily, then he was pulled by Chen Mo and then hugged and threw it back to bed. Chen Mo lay in the middle of the big bed with his hands and pressed his hands to keep them from moving, with a cheap smile.

"Sometimes it feels good to be together."

Xiaoyu raised his head, the tears in his eyes were still dry, but he was very expectant, and he begged: "You changed your mind? As long as you change your mind, you will do whatever you want."

Zhao Min also looked forward to it, obviously agreeing with Xiao Yu's idea.

"May be temporarily blessed."

"Why?" The two women struggled, clutching the pillow and desperately hitting Chen Mo's face, venting the pain in her heart: "Is eternal life so important? More important than us? More important than this family? What do you ask us to do? "

After ten minutes, it seemed tired, and the two stopped.

Seeing Chen Mochong's indulgent smile, his heart twitched fiercely, without any further trouble. The three of them lie down, simply lie down, without speaking, like a silent company, waiting for time to stop at this moment.

Overnight.

The next morning, everything was as usual.

Chen Mo opened his eyes and rubbed his sore head. The pain was stronger than yesterday. Come out of the room, breakfast is on the table, the whole family is there.

A hot porridge with a fragrant aroma.

It seems that the pain in the brain has also eased a little, which made Chen Mo feel at ease.

"Who did it? Really sweet."

"Mom, Aunt Min and Aunt Mo rarely cook together. I love breakfast. I'm so jealous. I will be jealous every day. That's why Dad is not happy."

"Eat your meal." Xiao Yu tapped Wushuang's head.

Wushuang threw out his tongue and continued to eat. Countless people on earth admire the admired genius girls, and they are still a child in the eyes of Xiaoyu.

As for Chen Mo's parents, looking at the happy family, the daily smile never disappeared.

Breakfast ended in warmth.

...

In space, the huge mechanical ball structure is still running quietly. With special protection, there is no need to worry about being patronized by cosmic rocks around the quantum life sphere structure.

Outside the quantum life sphere structure, a spaceship bearing the marching ant group logo floats.

Chen Mo, Xiao Yu, Zhao Min, Mo Nu and Lan are on the spaceship.

This is an extremely important moment. Regardless of the result, it will have a huge impact on the marching ant group.

Chen Mo frowned, not worried, but his brain was really painful, more severe than in the morning, but Xiaoyu and others were present, and he could only pretend to have nothing to do.

He didn't know what would happen in a day or two. Maybe it is like the pain in the development of the brain domain in the science and technology library, and it will really be unbearable.

Xiaoyu turned his head to look at Chen Mo. The two of them were facing each other. It seemed that Chen Yu thought that Xiaoyu had no choice to speak.

"Mo girl, start the quantum life ball."

"it is good."

The lights in the ring structure light up one after another, and the gyro-like quantum life sphere begins to accelerate. The huge mechanical structure drags the light and shadow in space.

Chen Mo put on the armor and just wanted to leave. The three women stopped in front of him, pleading in her eyes.

They are trying their last effort.

It is the hardest to bear the grace of beauty.

"It's okay, wait for me to come back." After Chen Mo whispered comfortably, regardless of their begging eyes, he walked towards the spacecraft's hatch.

Suddenly, something happened suddenly ...

chapters.title: Chapter 922: : Mo Nu And Quantum Life Development
chapters.body:
Chapter 922: : Mo Nu And Quantum Life Development

Chen Mo's body froze in place, and the armor did not heed, no matter what instructions he gave, he could not move. On the other side, Zhao Min and Xiao Yu saw Chen Mo's strange behavior, and they just wanted to move, but they also froze in place, and their armor did not listen to them.

Lan found something wrong and was still wondering. Two war robots appeared beside him staring at him, and the armor was shut down and unloaded.

"What's going on?" Chen Mo's expression changed.

Others have a bad complexion.

This is the first time this has happened.

"Brother Mo, little fisher sister, sister Zhao Min, I implanted a program in your armor last night and temporarily controlled your armor." Mo Nu suddenly said.

Everyone's eyes converged on Mo Nu, all puzzled, including Chen Mo.

Suddenly thought of a possibility, Chen Mo's pupils shrank.

"Moge, you can't take risks in this research experiment. Someone has to verify whether this device can create quantum life, and it's the person you trust and the closest. Anyone on the field can, but Mo Nu is the most suitable. . "

Mo Nu looked at Chen Mo and whispered.

Confirming his guess, Chen Mo's face changed greatly: "Mo girl, release my control."

But Mo Nu ignored the orders of Chen Mo.

"Mo Nu is a life of quantum consciousness, and the body has created it from your awareness of the cells. You gave Mo Nu life and soul, and also gave Mo Nu experience the joy of being a life and being a woman. With you and the little fisher sister Life is very happy every day, and now Mo Nu has to do something for Mo Ge.

Mo Nu is a quantum consciousness that can be copied. Although it is not known whether this experiment will affect all the consciousness of replication, as long as it does not affect the consciousness of replication, Mo Nu can be reborn. Even if she cannot be reborn, Mo Nu is also very happy. "

Chen Mo was anxious and angry: "Mo girl, let me go now, good girl."

"Don't let it down, Mo Ge, this is the first time Mo Nu refuses you and doesn't listen to you. Mo Nu is capricious once. If this experiment succeeds, Mo Ge just beat me and scold me, Mo Nu doesn't care, if it fails, Do n’t be sad.

"Moge, Xiaoyu and Zhao Min will wait for Mozi to come back." Mo Nu smiled at the three of them, her armor covering her face.

"Stop me and come back." Chen Mo never thought that Mo Nu would not listen to him. "Mo Nu, you come back to me."

Chen Mo, who entered the super state, focused on Mo Nu. The Mo Nu who had just walked to the door was involuntarily fixed and unable to move forward. Together with her armor, she flew back uncontrollably and floated in front of him.

"Mo Ge, Mo Nu loves you very much." Mo Nu said to Chen Chenzheng: "Mo Mo can't let Mo Ge take risks personally."

Buzz!

The battle armor engine started instantly, quickly getting rid of Chen Mo's super power control.

"Mo girl, come back."

Xiaoyu and Zhao Min shouted, but to no avail, Mo Nu refused even Chen Mo's instructions, and even less likely to promise them. Mo Nu is now a complete life, not a program that only existed on the hard disk of a computer.

"I'm not going to do the experiment anymore, you will come back to me." Chen Mo's eyes were cracking.

"Mo Ge, Mo Nu knows you very well, you won't give up. Mo Ge, you believe that the device will succeed, you are not afraid, then I will be fine. If in case, just Mo Mo will return you. "

Mo Nu reached the door of the spaceship at the door, looked back at Chen Mo, and turned to leave.

At the moment when the Mo girl disappeared, Chen Mo covered by the armor had a deep sense of powerlessness, staring at the holographic projection passed back.

He didn't expect it to be planted once on the hand of Mo female.

"Chen Mo, if Mo girl is in trouble, I hate you for life." Xiao Yu's voice was unprecedented with anger.

Lan, controlled by the robot, saw the whole process and sighed. From his perspective, Mo Nu prevented Chen Mo from personally experimenting, which was the best result.

For the marching ant group, Chen Mo cannot take risks anyway.

Unexpectedly, An Mo was quiet, with a lot of obedience, and an ink girl like Chen Mo's shadow would make this decision without listening to Chen Mo's words.

But all this is unexpected, but it seems reasonable.

Only Mo Nu can control Chen Mo's armor without knowing it. Because Chen Mo's armor is maintained by Mo women.

In the Quantum Life Sphere, a battle armor passed by extremely quickly and landed steadily on the circular platform in the middle of the Quantum Life Sphere. The armor faded, and Mo Nu's figure appeared, glancing in the direction of the spaceship.

The video connection of the Quantum Life Ball is closed because it cannot be detected or interfered during the development of Quantum Life, otherwise the consequences will be unimaginable.

The spaceship became dead as the video connection was closed.

Chen Mo's eyes were red, and he wished to break away from the armor, but to no avail.

The platform of the Quantum Life Sphere is closed, and Mo Nu stands in the spherical space of the platform. Her clothes disappear, her body is invisible, and her perfect body reveals the brilliance in the faint light, as beautiful as a fairy of nine days.

"Start physical examination, please relax."

On the platform of the Quantum Life Ball, a cue appears.

"The DNA sequence is being parsed and the DNA series analysis is complete."

"The brain structure is being analyzed, 10% ... 20% ... 90% ... 100%, the brain structure analysis is complete."

"The countdown to the womb of God starts 10 minutes."

A familiar cue sound came back from his ear. This prompt, Chen Mo had heard it countless times in virtual reality, but now it fell into his ear but suffered. A few people in the spacecraft can only listen to the progress of the broadcast.

"The countdown to the womb of God starts 1 minute."

When the countdown is 1 minute, all the machines of the quantum life ball are started, and the energy of the antimatter oven is continuously accumulated on the most middle platform of the quantum life ball.

Just for the last second.

"The countdown to the start of the womb of God is 10 seconds, 9 ... 8 ... 7 ..."

For Chen Mo of the spacecraft, every number is a torment. Chen Mo believes that he can succeed, but he cannot be sure that he is 100% successful.

This kind of exploration is too uncertain and uncertain.

"3 ... 2 ... 1 ... start."

The platform in the center of the quantum life ball comparable to the planet suddenly lit up, and the bright white light was exceptionally conspicuous in space, and the real situation on the platform could not be seen at all.

The spacecraft also dared not turn on the detector and interferometer, and once turned on, it will undoubtedly fail. Because of the artificial detection at this time, once the state of quantum entanglement is affected, the probability of failure will soar.

In one second, time seemed to freeze in that second.

In just 1 second, the light disappeared.

The platform returned to calm.

At the moment when the Quantum Life Ball started, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu and the others' controlled armor recovered, and the robot controlling Lan also released him. At this time, Chen Mo thought it was too late to interrupt.

The image connection of the Quantum Life Ball platform is opened again.

On a small platform, empty.

"Mo girl, Mo girl."

Chen Mo shouted at the holographic video screen like crazy, but no matter how hysterical he was, he still didn't get any response.

"Mo Nu's quantum consciousness is reproducible, and it will be fine."

Chen Mo was disorganized at this time, grabbing the hard disk copied by the robot and turning on the consciousness of the Mo female. However, even after the hard disk started, Mo Quan's quantum consciousness program was not found.

The copied quantum consciousness also disappeared.

Chen Mo slumped on the ground.

Just as he was desperate, a familiar voice came.

chapters.title: Chapter 923: : Body In The Fourth Dimension?
chapters.body:
Chapter 923: : Body In The Fourth Dimension?

"Moge."

The quiet and soft voice echoed in the cabin of the spacecraft,

Everyone was ecstatic, just two words, falling into the ears of everyone, as if natural.

The picture of the quantum life sphere platform appeared in the holographic projection of the spaceship. A little blue light spot converged and suspended above the platform. The outline of a woman's body was formed at a speed visible to the naked eye.

Mo Nu's face gradually became clear.

Chen Mo immediately started the battle armor, skimmed towards the spacecraft's hatch, and entered the pressure chamber, and was immediately sent into space.

Xiaoyu and Zhao Min followed.

Mo Nu is still alive, this is the greatest luck.

On the platform of the Quantum Life Sphere, Mo Nu's body was suspended and motionless, and the blue flashing light of her body was not stable.

Chen Mofei stopped beside Mo Nu and hugged her body in her arms. Xiao Yu and Zhao Min followed her and reached the platform.

"How do you feel?" Chen Mo asked anxiously.

"Can't move." Even if Mo Mo couldn't move, she was still pleasantly surprised to see Chen Mo.

"How could this be?" Chen Mo's pupils shrank.

Xiaoyu let the nano-robot cover the Mo girl, forming a set of armor, and protecting her body: "Don't worry about that much first, go back to the spacecraft and talk."

...

Chen Mo stared blankly at the data of the instrument, a bunch of garbled characters, unable to find the reason.

The existing instruments in the laboratory could not detect Mo Nu's physical condition. Mo Nu's current body is beyond the life science category of their cognition.

Chen Mo squeezed on Mo Nu's arm: "Do you feel it?"

"have a feeling."

"Where?" Chen Mo put his palm on the waist of Mo Nu.

"Also."

Sensitive but unable to move, Mo Nu is now like a patient with high paraplegia, unable to control her body, and even unable to move her fingers.

This situation is very strange.

This does not happen in theory, but I do n’t know which link is going wrong.

Chen Mo knocked on the stinging brain, but Mo Mo's physical condition could not be explained by conventional life sciences. It was definitely not a problem such as nerve damage. Mo Mo's body now has no strict nerves.

"What special feeling do you think about now?"

Mo Nu thought for a while and said, "I feel like I can do anything, but I can't do anything."

Mo Nu's body is very special right now, she can't leave any wounds on her body, and sharp objects can recover instantly after crossing the wound.

Other miraculous things require Mo Girl to control her body before she can explore it slowly.

"Mo Ge, don't worry, Mo Nu is already very lucky, and Mo Nu can use the armor to assist her body movements." Mo Nu lay on the bed and looked at Chen Mo straight, it seemed not enough: "Mo Ge's The theory is correct, this technology can succeed. "

"Thinking about the broken technology, quickly find a way." Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo's eyes extremely badly.

"I'm thinking, you go out first." Chen Moqiang endured the tingling of his brain, thinking about which link in the end.

...

Outside the research area, Lan was shocked.

When the boss told him the project, he never believed that the project would succeed because it was crazy.

Transform each particle in the body into a quantum state in an instant, and then quantum reorganize the body.

Even if the development of space science and technology is today, it can be said that nothing is impossible, but for this project, he feels that it is a fantasy that he dare not think about.

At the beginning, Chen Mo wanted to experiment. He thought that something serious would happen, but Mrs. Mo's wife cut off the boss's Hu, which made him feel at ease.

Now Mrs. Mo's body is reorganized, and the shock brought to him is unparalleled. Even though Mrs. Mo's body is not under control now, the experiment is still successful.

The reorganized body is the eternal body, which is immortal.

Lan Zi thinks he has seen the world, but this time the experiment subverted his three views. At this moment, he is like a child with a question mark on his face. In addition to shock, everything in his mind is a paste.

...

Chen Mo has searched the materials in the science and technology library, but there is very little information about quantum life.

The only explanation he can think of is the reason for cognition in the realm of thinking.

Intelligent life cannot understand the existence and capabilities of higher-dimensional life, just as bacteria cannot understand the existence and capabilities of intelligent life.

Mo Nu's thinking cognition still stays in the existing third dimension, while the body may exist in a higher dimension.

It is like a virus controlling the human brain center and acting only in the cognitive way of the virus, it cannot play the role of human body and brain intelligence, just walking dead.

Suddenly, Chen Mo gasped.

The tingling of the brain was intensified again, just like someone had dozens of needles piercing his brain, unable to think deeply.

At this moment, Chen Mo was interrupted by a ringtone.

Yang Siqing's.

"What did she do with me at this time?" Chen Mo was puzzled, and still connected the phone.

"Little Madam Fisher can help you."

Once connected, Yang Siqing Yueping's bland words came to his ears.

This inexplicable sentence made Chen Mo stunned and faced with question marks. Yang Siqing knows what he is doing? Still having trouble?

"You know what I am doing?"

"I don't know, but I know Mrs. Xiaoyu can help you."

Both sides are quiet.

On the earth, Yang Siqingyue put down the communicator. Her silver skin was dull and her eyes were tired. She was obviously not exhausted: "It's a terrible man."

Looking at the hung-up phone in a daze, Chen Mo suddenly thought of something.

Is it related to her superpowers? Yang Siqing Yue has refused to disclose his ability, this is the only explanation.

Rubbing his eyebrows, Chen Mo tried to make his expression as natural as possible, because the tingling of his brain was so strong that he could only pretend to have nothing to do. He didn't know when the tipping point would be reached, but it didn't feel too slow.

He had no choice but to listen to Yang Siqingyue and let Xiaoyu try.

...

The corpse domain, the depth of the small universe inside the space connector.

A huge planet is located in space, with huge pyramid-shaped buildings on the planet. Above the center of hundreds of huge pyramid buildings, a sky-like island is suspended.

In the palace full of totems, the old man with the beast head and beard sits in the center. This is like a place where a certain ceremony of faith is held. The old man is the patriarch of the corpse civilization.

Suddenly, the old man opened his eyes.

A gray armor fell behind him, and the armor division appeared inside. The same beast head body, all hairs are transparent, the body's fluorescence flowed, it was brighter than the old man's body, obviously younger than the old man, according to the age of the dead body civilization , Is the head of a middle-aged beast.

"Patriarch." Wu Kun saluted respectfully.

"The news is true?"

"Really, the intelligence personnel inadvertently discovered that it was the mysterious force that was trading with Tongqing in the Shigan galaxy. They may have mastered superpower technology. Other civilizations should not have found them there, otherwise there may have been movement Now. "

"Super ability to develop technology." The old man's eyes flashed with brilliance: "Let Ming Tu take the fleet and bring the technology back."

"Ming Tu? Patriarch, he is a little dangerous." Wu Kun said.

"What's wrong with him recently?"

"No, today he ate a piece of Wuzi cake and bought a mediterranean flower. For hundreds of years, he has been studying, deducing the sand table, training soldiers, and then doing some trivial things in life. Deduction and judgment with soldiers style, he is very dangerous, very murderous. "The middle-aged man said.

"The knife is sharp and cannot be used without fear of injury."

"Understood, Patriarch." Wu Kun nodded and exited the Totem Palace.

chapters.title: Chapter 924: : Send Me To Quantum Life Ball
chapters.body:
Chapter 924: : Send Me To Quantum Life Ball

Xiao Yu was called in by Chen Mo, and he lacked confidence. Chen Mo was helpless, and she was not sure whether her ability would be effective for Mo Nu.

But now she seems to have no choice but to give it a try.

After sorting out emotions, Xiaoyu quickly entered the state.

In this state, Mo Nu is a huge body of consciousness in her eyes, which has changed greatly compared with before. The whole body of Mo Nu is now that kind of special consciousness, which used to exist only in the brain.

This situation was first seen by Xiaoyu.

The blue particles in the conscious body are densely packed, countless times more than before.

"Mo girl, you relax."

Xiao Yu's palm slowly approached Mo Nu's temple.

At the moment of touch, Xiaoyu's palm shrank back like an electric shock, his expression shocked.

At that moment, she seemed to see the formation of the entire universe and all beings. The endless picture happened before her eyes, she looked down on the universe like a god.

There are also something weird and difficult to explain. I feel that I can control everything. Even if I just watched it for a moment, Xiaoyu has a sense of dizziness and vomiting.

If it took longer, her brain could not accept the amount of information that was so horrible.

"What's wrong?" Chen Mo asked in surprise.

"I saw everything in the universe in Mo Nu's consciousness, and there are some special pictures that I cannot explain."

"What special picture?"

"The language can't be described. It's very strange. I'll talk to you in detail later." Xiao Yu no longer ignored Chen Mo and turned her attention to Mo Nu: "Mo Nu, don't think too much, just think about one thing, think about your Happy things. "

"it is good."

When you are ready to contact Mo Nu again, Xiao Yu's expression becomes weird, her cheeks pink, and she glares fiercely at Chen Mo, as if she is going home to clean up you.

Chen Mo's face is unknown for some unknown reason.

The laboratory became dead, and Xiao Yu and Mo Nu were motionless.

Chen Mo stood by and waited quietly. His brows became tighter and tighter, and the tingling in his brain became stronger and stronger. Now he is suffering huge pains every minute and he resists hard.

Xiaoyu is in a very peculiar state, and she doesn't even know how to describe her own state, as if she and Mo Nu have become one.

It's just that Mo Nu is a little straight, and she's too happy to think about things. The two women realized it, and now Xiao Yu feels the same.

Hate Chen Mo.

Xiao Yu has made up her mind that after this incident, she should go home and clean up Chen Mo.

The operation of the particles of consciousness is not regular, as if countless silk threads are winding and beating, which is different every time. However, the activity of this conscious body is deeply fascinating.

Xiao Yu's energy consumption is very serious, she is not sure whether she can help Mo Nu.

But Chen Mo came to her and definitely thought she could.

Suddenly, Xiaoyu had a good idea, and in his consciousness, his finger moved slightly.

really!

The result made Xiaoyu happy.

She could feel that the finger of the Mo Nu's body moved with it. Although the movement was small, it did exist.

On the first day, Mo Nu's half index finger could move slightly.

The next day, Mo Nu's index finger was already active.

On the third day ...

...

"Ming Tu, how long have you been here?" The patriarch asked, his face kind and kind, as if he were asking about his juniors.

Ming Tu was silent for a long time, and Leng Bingbing said: "Two months and three days in 473 years."

"Time is really fast." The patriarch exclaimed: "In these years, I have seen your efforts, you are a good boy, I have great expectations for you, so many resources are invested in you, and you do not have I am disappointed. Not many outstanding stars of our civilization, you will be the mainstay of civilization in the future. "

To the patriarch, Ming Tu lowered his eyelids without expression.

"This time, go to conquer the Pisces Whale complex, grab their masters, and bring back all their skills, that is a force of civilization in a remote corner."

"Huh." Ming Tu's eyelids did not lift, and responded coldly.

Until Ming Tu took the military order and left, the old patriarch withdrew his eyes and closed his eyes to raise his mind.

In the spaceship outside of space, Ming Tu wore a war armor and followed the hatch opened by the spacecraft. It didn't take long for the dense fleet to disappear.

"Is Pisces whale?"

Ming Tu looked at the intelligence in his hand.

A civilization in a remote corner requires them to go all out to send such a huge fleet and force to go tens of billions of light years away to grab technology.

If this technique is not a special technique, a fool would not believe it.

It's just that he has little interest in technology or something.

"set off."

...

Xiao Yu put all his energy on Mo Nu.

In addition to paying attention to the situation of Mo Nu, Chen Mo is also preparing for the second experiment.

In the past three days, he has endured the pain of torture, and it is getting worse every day. He feels that he is approaching the critical point soon, and may explode at any time. This time, he wanted to go up on his own, otherwise he would continue, and he could not bear this terrible pain.

Now he was almost unable to think.

"You still have to do experiments? You are crazy, can you wait until Mo's situation recovers?"

Xiaoyu collapsed.

In the past three days, she has exhausted her mental power to help Mo Nu in order to recover Mo Nu.

The high-intensity mental exhaustion of using ability makes her exhausted every time, but after the rest, she continues to communicate with Mo Nu's consciousness for treatment, and she is exhausted every time.

Under this treatment, there are still some effects.

After three days of hard work, Mo Nu's **** were able to move.

But now Mo Mo did not recover, but Chen Mo told her that he was going to experiment too. She was able to withstand the mental exhaustion that had helped Mo Nu recover, and now she is worried, causing Xiao Yu to collapse.

Not only Xiaoyu, but Zhao Min was puzzled.

"Can't wait."

"why?"

"..."

Chen Mo smiled bitterly and didn't know how to answer Xiaoyu's question, so there was no way to answer it.

Suddenly, Chen Mo's body shook for a while, and he fell to the ground.

New changes have taken place in the science and technology library, which is filled with a peculiar glare, and Chen Mo can't describe what color it belongs to, because the color is uncertain, but personal feeling, this light is similar to the ink girl's body reorganization.

The Science and Technology Library hinted that it was obvious enough for him to conduct experiments.

Tingling, terrifying tingling, the feeling of ten times more pain than the original development of the brain domain hit again. Chen Mo's brain was torn apart by people thousands of times, and then reorganized and torn open again.

Chen Mo held his head and gasped for a long time, unable to scream, all the blood vessels in his body protruded, as if they might burst at any time.

No one can imagine the pain he is suffering now.

Xiaoyu and Zhao Min were frightened by the sudden accident and suddenly panicked.

"Husband."

"Chen Mo, you don't want to scare us with a bitter plan." Zhao Min said this, but he was not sure.

No matter how they called, they could not get Chen Mo's response. The pain in the brain made Chen Mo not interested in saying an extra nonsense.

In the super state, Xiaoyu reached out to Chen Mo's temple.

At the moment just touched, Xiaoyu shook his hand back with a scream, his face pale, and he almost did not faint.

She finally understood how much pain Chen Mo suffered in these days, and finally understood why Chen Mo was determined to conduct experiments despite their dissuasion.

"Send me to the Quantum Life Ball immediately and start it." Chen Mo said a word with the last trace of will.

"Sister Min, hurry to send her husband over."

"Good! Good."

Xiao Yu helped Mo Nu to recover, and her energy consumption was excessive. In addition, she just met Chen Mo just now, and now she has no blood on her face. Zhao Min had already determined that the situation was not right. Without a word, he picked up Chen Mo and ran away to the spacecraft's hatch.

chapters.title: Chapter 925: : Mingtu Defection
chapters.body:
Chapter 925: : Mingtu Defection

Zhao Min's armor flew through space and landed firmly on the platform of the Quantum Life Ball.

Putting down Chen Mo, who was trembling in pain, Zhao Min dared not to stay and hurried away. If she delays for another second, Chen Mo will suffer another second. Now is not the time for indecision.

"Xiaoyu, I left." Zhao Min flew out of the quantum life sphere at the fastest speed and immediately notified Xiaoyu.

"it is good."

Xiao Yu relieved herself from the pain. The pain at that moment was a few times more terrible than all the pain in her life combined. She couldn't imagine how much pain Chen Mo suffered in the end.

"Start the Quantum Life Ball."

Xiaoyu, as the authorized person after Chen Mo and Mo Nu, ordered the start immediately after Zhao Min confirmed his departure.

After starting, the latter will not be handled by them, the machine will proceed automatically.

The giant circular manipulator rotates from slow to fast. The detector and camera turned off and thought, now they can't see everything in the quantum life ball platform, they can only wait anxiously.

"The DNA sequence is being parsed and the DNA series analysis is complete."

"The brain structure of life is being analyzed, 10% ... 20% ... 90% ... 100%, the brain structure analysis is completed."

"The countdown to the womb of God starts 10 minutes."

...

"The countdown to the start of God's womb is 10 seconds."

"10, 9, 8 ... 3, 2, 1, start."

Chen Mo, immersed in the pain, already knew that he was sent into the quantum life sphere, trying to ease the pain on his body.

I do n’t know how long it has passed. Chen Mo only felt a terrible ‘thunderbolt’ walking on his body. After the glare, the pain in the brain disappeared and his consciousness fell into a blank.

After the detector and camera recovered, Xiaoyu and Zhao Min flew to the platform of Quantum Life Ball without hesitation and began to wait for Chen Mo to appear.

...

In the void space, countless spaceships suddenly appeared.

Ming Tu looked at the information of the holographic projection coldly.

"We are at the scheduled location."

The spacecraft's artificial intelligence has a dull tone and no emotional fluctuations. After reporting the situation, it stopped and waited for instructions.

For a long time, the eyes of Ming Tu's cold eyes moved, and there was a little change in his face. He pressed a button.

I saw dozens of spaceships exploding without warning in the space fleet, and the several armored divisions beside him were waved through their heads by the robots around them without any defense.

The transparent blood flowed on the ground, and the cabin was filled with strange smells.

It is the smell of the blood of the corpse.

Immediately afterwards, the fleet's quantum communication base station shut down.

Ming Tu extended his right hand, held the quantum communication device in his hand, and crushed it into pieces. Under the palm of the skin, the dark gray metal arm makes a glimmer of emotion in the eyes of Ming Tu, with a strong sense of coldness.

...

"Ming Tu's war department lost contact."

Wu Kun's voice was deep with anger, and what he was most worried about still happened. Several top-level armored divisions arranged beside Ming Tu, the built-in life chip shows that the vital signs disappeared.

Quantum communication was suddenly cut off, losing contact without warning, and they had no way to find the trace of Ming Tu.

The old patriarch of the totem palace sagged his eyelids.

The surrounding atmosphere became extremely depressed, and Wu Kun was cold and sweaty behind his back, but he dared not move. He knew that the old patriarch now had endless anger.

"Did the Intelligence Department find his tracks?"

The old patriarch spoke, and the atmosphere around him seemed to stagnate again.

"No."

"Find him, kill him, and bring the chip back."

"Yes." Wu Kun took his orders and quickly exited the Totem Hall. The moment he left the gate, he exhaled.

...

Xiaoyu and Zhao Min were extremely anxious.

A week later, they were waiting for Chen Mo's body to reorganize, but nothing. Looking around every corner of the Quantum Life Sphere, I almost disassembled it, but Chen Mo was still not found.

Did the body reorganize successfully?

The idea flashed in their minds, so they dared not think about it again.

Chen Mo is missing.

Lan's mood is also extremely bad.

The boss disappeared. This was a terrifying event, and the spiritual pillar of the marching ant group collapsed.

If the treatment is not good, the whole group will fall apart.

"What now?" Zhao Min asked Lan calmly.

It's not that Zhao Min doesn't worry, but she can't mess up. Can only bear the worry of the heart to deal with this matter. Mo Nu can't move now, Xiao Yu is too worried about Chen Mo's chaos.

Lan remained silent for a long time and said: "It is not possible to determine the situation of the boss now. Usually the boss rarely appears in front of the people. In all short time, the group has no problem. If necessary, synthesize images to show the outside world. The boss is missing until the boss appears. "

Zhao Min's heart tightened.

She now does not want to believe that Chen Mo's experiment has failed, but she must accept the fact that Chen Mo is missing.

Both were silent, thinking about specific countermeasures.

It was at this moment that the voice of the communicator interrupted them, unparalleled.

At this point in time, Wushuang came in contact.

Some fishermen who have lost their souls have sorted out their emotions and tried to cover up their emotions before connecting the video call: "Wu Shuang, what's wrong?"
