"Mom, you and your dad are not in these days, the little potato has been busy, I don't know what it is going to do, but it seems to be looking for you." Wushuang held the little mother beast in front of the video.

The little mother beast has been keeping it at home since following Chen Mo's understanding of the earth. Usually, except Chen Mo, she is closest to Xiao Yu. Especially after Xiao Yu's super power is sure to understand the animal's language, the little mother beast sticks to Xiao Yu.

"Momo wipe ..."

After seeing Xiaoyu, the little mother began to raise her small claws in excitement, and the movement was very human. Others looked puzzled, and only Xiaoyu showed surprise when she heard it.

"What's the matter?" Zhao Min hurriedly asked, at this time, there were not many things that could surprise Xiao Yu.

"Little Potato said that it could find Mogo."

Lan and Zhao Min rose up and looked at each other and found surprise in each other's eyes. Lan looked surprised: "Really?"

"It should be true, Mo Ge told me." Xiao Yu said surely. Chen Mo told her that the little mother is very magical, it seems that she can find some good things, and helped Chen Mo twice.

Although I have never seen the magic of the little mother, Xiao Yu never doubted Chen Mo's words.

"Mom, what's wrong with Dad?" Wushuang finally realized that Xiaoyu was wrong.

"Your dad secretly ran out to play alone, left us alone, and now I don't know where in the universe and the female aliens are chic." Xiao Yu said immediately.

"Uh?" Wushuang looked at the question mark.

But I can be sure that my dad is not at home now and asks them to go out and find it.

"I'm going to find Mo Ge." Xiaoyu said firmly after hanging up with Wushuang's communication.

In the past few days, in order to wait for Chen Mo to appear, Xiaoyu couldn't eat or sleep, and was overly worried. Now that there is news from Chen Mo, she wants to go out immediately.

"Will it be too risky, what the little potato said is true?"

Lan doubted the letter. The news here didn't spread, and Little Potato said that he knew Chen Mo's news.

But Xiaoyu is the only one who understands the words of Xiao Tudou, and Lan is afraid that Xiao Yu is worried about excessive nonsense.

"Small potatoes do have magical abilities, Chen Mo also told me." Zhao Min confirmed Xiaoyu's statement, Chen Mo did say that small potatoes are amazing, like there is a special superpower: "Xiaoyu can send people Take the small potatoes out, you are at home. "

"No, I'm going to find him personally [豆豆 小说 www.thedu.cc]."

Mo Nu's situation is in the front, and now Chen Mo must be somewhere in the universe, and his body cannot move. Although Chen Mo's life is not in danger, let Xiaoyu sit and wait, she can't sit still.

chapters.title: Chapter 926: : Unlucky Eggs And Lucky People
chapters.body:
Chapter 926: : Unlucky Eggs And Lucky People

At the command center of the spaceship, Xiaoyu was sitting with a small mother beast on her hand, and was nibbling with a snack.

Xiaoyu came out this time and Lan dispatched the marching ant group to accompany him with almost the highest combat strength. Jing Ge came out, followed by the top one million guards of the Ministry of Health.

In order not to attract attention, they disguised the battleship as a large commercial transport spaceship, which made it easier to jump between the super-galaxies. Ten spaceships make up the most common transport ship. This small-scale transport fleet is everywhere in the universe.

But the armored division and war robots in these ten spaceships can easily destroy a high-level civilization.

"Momo Momo ..." The little mother beast eating snacks suddenly felt something, and pointed to Xiaoyu in one direction.

"Jump to the fourth quadrant." Xiao Yu ordered immediately.

"Yes, the queen."

Ku Yao, who was in charge of life, immediately prepared to make a space jump in the direction of the fourth quadrant.

...

Dead and cold space, there is no day and night floating.

Chen Mo dared to swear that this was the most boring day of his life. In front of him there was only the starry sky, and the dazzling star in the distance. This loneliness is powerful enough without driving him crazy.

The body regroups in this strange starry sky.

When Chen Mo regained consciousness, he knew that he was in a space other than the Milky Way, and he did n’t know which one of the universe was the one.

However, he could clearly feel the terrifying ability in his body.

He can even listen to the voice of all things, there is a sense of omnipotence, but he can't help him, he finally understands the situation Mo Mo is facing.

No need to eat, no sleep, tireless.

In a month, Chen Mo was so bored that he even started to count stars or chat with stars. Although stars can't speak, he counted himself asking and answering questions.

Chen Mo dare to guarantee that this time is the most talked time in his life.

If the body cannot move, it can only be allowed to float.

Several times, it was hit by a small streamer in the universe. Chen Mo ’s body now has speed in space, but one time he was almost captured by the star. It would be uncomfortable to fall into a star, although Chen Mo felt that his body was not afraid of high temperatures.

He is a little better than Mo Nu, just developed successfully, and has **** to move.

The body's strength and abilities cannot be controlled, and there are no armor and robots around. When it was really unbearable, Chen Mo ran into the science and technology library to read books.

After the development of quantum life, the science and technology library has not changed much. The suffix of ‘God’ is still there. He has not yet obtained the next authority of the technology library.

Chen Mo judges that it may be that he needs full control of his body before he can open the next authority and give him the final task.

"I don't know if Xiaoyu thought they were dead." Chen Mo bored his thoughts: "If you think I'm dead, no one will come to me. I don't know if the year of the monkey will be discovered. If you drop a civilized planet , And there is hope for help. It ’s even more lucky to encounter spaceships. "

"It's been a month, and I haven't seen the two hairs. It's so silent that it makes people crazy."

In the boring time, I spent another month.

Suddenly, Chen Mo saw that a spaceship appeared tens of thousands of kilometers away, which made Chen Mo excited as if he had hit the chicken blood. After the development of quantum life, he can even see the small stones in the planet, let alone the spaceship.

"Discover me, discover me, discover me." Chen Mo prayed in his heart, but unfortunately there was no radio on his body, and regarded his broken thoughts as radio.

"I said there was a strange life here."

The two warframes flew to Chen Mo and stopped.

Seeing the armor, Chen Mo was overjoyed. Now he can't move his body, as long as he is saved back to the Alliance Civilization, he has a way to pass his position back to the galaxy through the universe quantum Internet.

"I can't move, can you take me back." Chen Mo spoke in universal language, trying to make the sentence clear.

No sound could be transmitted from space, and a war armor hung the instrument to Chen Mo's ear.

"Uh, I can't move, can you take me back?"

"It looks like a bad luck, but it floated in space for so long, but it didn't die." The life that spoke, the voice was like a starling, with a surprised tone: "This bad luck should be a space battle, let him Injured and immobile, floating here. "

"Advanced life can only survive in space for a period of time, indigo life and above, can it survive in space for a long time?"

The two armours were sturdy, twice as tall as Chen Mo, and had strange sounds. He had never seen the texture on the armor, but the shape of the armor looked like an orc.

A crocodile-like orc, a bird-like orc.

"Two brothers, can you take me."

"There are no areas where spaceships and fleets are fighting around here, and there is no advanced civilization. How did he appear here?" The crocodile orc-like orcs are a little strange, and they are also alert to look around. of?"

"Cosmic travel encountered space turbulence, was brought here, the armor was gone, and my body was injured. I floated for two months, and I was crazy." Chen Mo said half-truly.

"Two months?" Bird-like orcs wondered: "It's terrible to be able to float sober for two months in space, and to endure this kind of loneliness. But it's really a bad luck to encounter turbulence in space."

The turbulence in space is logically reasonable, and with Chen Mo ’s poor physical condition, the doubts of the two lives disappear.

"Take him back and do good deeds." The crocodile beast carried Chen Mo and flew back towards the spaceship: "He didn't die in the turbulence of space. We are still found to be so big in space. He is also a lucky man."

"Two brothers, where is this place?"

Chen Mo couldn't move, he floated in space for two months, and finally found his life.

"Xiaohe Galaxy." The bird-like beast said.

"Which domain is the Xiaohe Galaxy in?"

"Not in the territory, in Gimhae City, one of 108 cities, Wanhe Super Galaxy Cluster." Bird-like beasts said truthfully.

"..."

Chen Mo quickly searched for information about the Wanhe Supercluster in his mind, but found nothing. He has seen the map of the distribution of cosmic forces. Gimhae City is 60 billion light-years away from the Milky Way.

Because the city in the center is full of gold, it is named Gimhae City after seeing a piece of gold shining from space.

Doing an experiment to reorganize the body of a galaxy beyond 60 billion light years, Chen Mo is now speechless.

"You said to save this unlucky egg, where to put it?" The bird-like animal asked.

"Let's live with us first, this lucky guy, anyway, only the two of us live in the house, there is a lot of space. Wait for him to recover, and then let him go." Crocodile said carelessly.

When Chen Mo was taken to the spacecraft, Chen Mo discovered that it was a small transport spaceship with a cruising range of about ten light years. Generally, it is used by individuals and small groups for short-distance transportation, and the price is about several million stars.

When a space jumps, a small spaceship will appear in another space, in front of which is the star of life, Blue River Star.

On the way, I met several small transport ships of the same kind. I said hello to each other. It can be seen that water lizards and bird-like beasts are in this small circle.

Like Chen Mo's imagination, Blue River Star does not inhabit a single life group, but a typical oxygen-enriched mixed planet. There are many kinds of orcs, including humanoid and sealike, and the life level ranges from red to blue. There are levels.

From the information given to him by crocodiles and bird heads, Blue River Star's specialty is fruit-rich.

Blue River Star has a good climate and good soil. The river fruit and sea fruit here taste very good, suitable for the taste of most life, so it will be exported to the surrounding life planets and galaxies.

Blue River's economy cannot be ranked high in the Xiaohe Galaxy.

But for the life of Blue River Star, life here is very calm and very happy.

During the conversation, Chen Mo knew the names of water lizards and bird heads.

Alligator and Sylvan.

It was transported and exported on the Blue River Star and several life planets around it. Although Crocodile and Sylvan do n’t look good, and sometimes they do n’t speak well, but the tofu with a knife mouth likes to help people, so the popularity is good.

chapters.title: Chapter 927: : An'S Supercluster
chapters.body:
Chapter 927: : An'S Supercluster

"Uncle Crocodile, Uncle Siran, are you back?"

On the way home, they met a lot of life greetings. Alligator and Sylvan also waved hello.

In the small town where they live, the two uncles are still a little famous, because they run transportation to the surrounding galaxies, have their own spaceships and advanced armor, and are rich in the town. There are many lives in the town, and if they want specialty snacks from a planet around, they will find them to bring back some.

Many young people in the town regard them as role models.

"Akers, the sulfur liquor you want to buy. I bought it for you. You usually drink less."

"Oh, thank you."

"Uncle Birdhead, who is the life you are carrying? New man?"

"Survivor of the plane crash, the bad luck we picked up." Sylvan said with a starling voice.

"Hello, unlucky brother."

"... Hello." Chen Mo's head was full of black lines.

"Bald scalp skin, you bought the majestic engine, these small engines are also expensive, plus a total of 130 thousand transportation costs, and also left me 50,000 tail money." Crocodile's flying car stopped at the door of a small shop, and a The small box was thrown to the bald boss.

"Thank you, save me another 30,000. Xiao Zizi is going to learn war armor at school. A better armor will be good for him in the future. He can't be sloppy." The bald boss handed Crocodile a star coin card.

The two uncles also worked part-time as purchasing agents, and all the things were sent along the way before driving back to their house in a flying car.

Alligator and Sylvan live together and the house is large enough.

They are single and are currently in the entrepreneurial stage, so they are the two at home. Chen Mo was taken back to the house by two people, and was carried to the sofa by the robot.

"What do you do? Do you want treatment? Recovery fluid treatment, the cost is not low. For the treatment fee, I can help you advance, wait for your family to come, and then give me." Crocodile asked.

"It should not be cured." Chen Mo said.

"There are also injuries that are not cured by the recovery fluid?" Sylvan said in surprise. "What should I do?"

"The injury is special." Chen Mo smiled bitterly.

"Then do you remember the home phone number? Contact your family to pick you up."

"Remember, my home is in Whale Pisces, as if it is 60 billion light years away."

"I go, so far, ultra-long-distance quantum communications, expensive thieves, although we want to help you, but there is no hope."

Syl's starling's voice is regretful.

"Sometimes ago, our extra-heavy quantum communication base station of our Xiaohe galaxy broke down. Quantum communication can't get out of the Xiaohe galaxy now. We have to wait for the engineers of the headquarters of the Universe Communications Group to repair it. I heard that it will take a while.

"..." Wait and wait, Chen Mo can only admit his fate.

"Don't know your name yet?"

"My name is Chen Mo."

"It's still hapless."

"I think" Lucky "is a little nicer."

"..."

Both Crocodile and Sylvan have broken mouths, but they are very nice and take good care of Chen Mo. He also bought a smart wheelchair for Chen Mo, and Chen Mo settled down temporarily.

There are several robots in the homes of Crocodile and Sylvan, but they can help him move.

But sitting in a smart wheelchair is still quite comfortable.

"Kittens, you can't fight with cuteness. Pay attention to your straightforward position. The armored division not only has ground stations, but also air combat and space warfare. Space can't go up and down.

"Little giant, your strength is very strong, but you can't rely on the strength. You can't beat your armor with your strong fist. The weapon is pierced at once, and you must use all the weapons in your hand proficiently. kitchen knife."

"There are also little fishmen, whose actions are not in place, and the fighting basics need to be retrained.

Chen Mo sat in a wheelchair and watched a group of young men's armor training, breaking his mouth from time to time.

At first, the teenager didn't care about the paralyzed uncle, but after Chen Mo taught a teenager to defeat them, a group of teenagers scrambled to find Chen Mo for teaching.

Chen Mo also enjoys it.

In space, a person has been floating for a few months, he is so bored that he is almost crazy, and now he does not want to be alone in the room. Consciousness can't control the armor, his mouth can talk.

It is possible to teach these little boys to learn the basics of combat armor.

Chen Mo is very knowledgeable, proficient in all kinds of knowledge, and even proficient in armor technology and armor combat. The basics of teaching are very practical, so that those young men ’s armor battles can be quickly improved. In just two weeks, he has become a cult of small boys aims.

Coupled with Sylvan's cheap mouth, now his unlucky paralyzed uncle is famous in the town.

Chen Mo is thinking of ways to control his body every day, but little progress has been made.

He didn't find out the thinking mode of the fourth dimension for the time being, and there is no content about the fourth dimension in the science and technology library, only some uncertain theoretical research.

Read more books and read more newspapers. Chen Mo, the soul chicken soup, has also read a lot, and even started to think about life.

After learning a lot of life principles and philosophy, he finally found a little use. His third finger moved.

Afterwards, Chen Mo chose philosophy exclusively. That thing is mysterious and mysterious, but the thinking mode and logic can open a different perspective.

"Xiaowu has a good foundation."

Chen Mo looked at a hard-working orc boy in the field. He was a leopard. A slender black panther tail was particularly conspicuous. In the training of many teenagers, his fighting level was significantly higher.

"Xiaowu is making rapid progress, and your armor will be stronger when you modify it. Come here, I will give you the idea of modifying your armor, and go back and let your parents find someone to modify it for you."

The orc boy named Xiaowu was very excited when he heard Chen Mo's words, and quickly fell to Chen Mo. He seriously sounded and attracted the envious eyes of other friends.

After recording, Xiao Udaoxie hurriedly left to find his parents to modify his armor.

...

"Sir, my subordinates suggest extending my tentacles into the dark forest." Xiao Li said to Lan Dao.

"How to say?" Lan froze.

"Dark forest civilization seems to be powerful, but there is serious internal fighting among the factions. They also want to end this situation. But there are no powerful characters to convince the crowd. It is rumored that the various factions inside are supporting their own forces. Now the Hongqiao in the dark forest area is causing chaos The battle is more serious and may be split in the future.

The An's super galaxy cluster is located in a remote area of the dark forest civilization. There is no strong civilization. We can occupy the An's super galaxy cluster as the depth of Hongqiao. If the dark forest civilization changes in the future, we can have the initiative on the battlefield. "

"It is said that the death of the dark dragon prince in the endless sea was done by the dark forest civilization. The stronger heirs who succeeded in succession were all secretly cleaned up. The remaining few heirs in succession are all puppets of the faction, The dark forest civilization is very unstable now. "

This time it was Red Hibiscus.

Lan nodded.

Not only the dark forest civilization, but several other god-level civilizations. After hundreds of millions of years of development, there are all kinds of open struggles inside. Only a strong character, such as Tong Qing, strongly squeezed the black pupil civilization into a ball and reduced the dead leaves.

The dark forest civilization is not arrogant, and naturally cannot suppress some old factions. The struggle between factions can easily be taken advantage of by the outside world.

The rainbow bridge of the Skeleton Galaxy is a passageway leading to the dark forest area, bringing the space of the universe closer to tens of billions of light years. This passageway must be firmly in their hands.

There is nothing wrong with the development strategy in depth.

"I just need to lead the Night Owl War Department, and I can win the An's Super Galaxy Cluster." O Li is confident and full of desire to fight.

Don't worry about antimatter energy and dark matter, his war department is much stronger than before. He was originally very confident in his tactical command. With the teaching and polishing of Lan during this time, his tactical command has now been taken to a higher level.

Super Awakening, added a batch of top armored divisions to his war department, plus their rich battlefield experience, the combat effectiveness of the night owl war department has long been different.

Lan immediately had a decision.

"Okay, Luli led the Night Owl War Department into the An's Supercluster, Red Hibiscus assisted with tactical decision-making, and Hongqiao's defense was handed over to the Guardian War Department."

The owl is well-known in the An's supergalaxy cluster, and now he sweeps the An's constellation, and the resistance of the internal life will not be too great. If other foreign enemies invade, it will arouse the enemy of the An's supercluster, and then the resistance will be great.

The owl was pleased to take orders.

Now in a special period, they joined the march ant group halfway. Even if the adults trust them, the life underneath will be more or less a must.

To better integrate into this group, they need a big victory to prove their value and status in the marching ant group.

As for the big victory?

The Ans supercluster is taken down by an entire supercluster, becoming their focus in the dark forest in the future.

Lan ’s orders were sent to the various war departments as soon as possible.

The rainbow bridge of the Skeleton Galaxy completes the change of defense in a short time.

The night owl warhead led by the owlet quietly entered the An's supercluster.

chapters.title: Chapter 928: : The Star Monument
chapters.body:
Chapter 928: : The Star Monument

"Uncle Lion, the star-studded grand event seems to be about to begin." The fox girl smiled and handed the information in her hand to Lion.

"Yes madam, there is another month." Shi Yan took the information and said seriously.

"How old is this?" Asked the Fox Girl.

"130 million years, the 2734902 session." Shi Yan sighed, his eyes flickering, as if recalling.

"We are about to leave." The fox girl smiled and said, "You can't miss the grand event in 50 years."

"Madam, you like this lively personality is very dangerous. Last time you almost had an accident in the Shigan Galaxy. Now that the universe is in chaos, this time the stars will not be too peaceful." Shi Yan smiled bitterly and asked helplessly for the fox girl.

"If I don't even have this courage, I might as well go home to farm." Fox Girl said: "If you can gather a few geniuses, it will also be good for the White Star civilization."

After the Hongqiao panic, the universe was full of space wormholes, pulling the forces that were originally separated by tens of billions of light years closer together. The layout of the universe has become more complicated, the traditional buffer space has become useless, and the situation has completely changed.

The struggle between cosmic civilizations is intensifying, and the traditional cosmic alliance does not act and does not intervene. By default, the war is opened, and the cosmic war is unstoppable.

The Hongqiao Passage has become particularly important, and it has become a battleground for military strategists. In particular, the forces that Hongqiao appeared on the main galaxy were attacked by the enemy, which is the headquarters of civilization.

In the small universe of god-level civilization, Hongqiao was also found.

This means that the small universe of god-level civilization is no longer absolutely safe, and one can imagine how terrible the pressure will be.

Many powerful top civilizations are eyeing the god-level civilization and want to replace it, or become the eighth god-level civilization. However, because there is no absolute security field of the god-level civilization small universe, many top civilizations can only wait for the opportunity.

Going to the Star Monument, the Fox Girl has her thoughts.

The Baixing civilization has been comfortable for too long, lacking external struggle pressure, and top talent is scarce, especially the top general.

If they have top stars, when they team up with Thor Civilization to siege the Black Eye Civilization, the Black Eye Civilization will not get out so easily, and it will definitely cost a lot.

So Fox Girl knows how important top stars and strategists are in the chaotic era.

The 50-year-old star and star event is a gathering of talents.

Strategists, generals, armored divisions, armored designers, armored regiment leaders, civilized royal family, various top researchers, etc., are the smartest bunch of life in the universe.

If they can incorporate part of their lives into the White Star civilization, they can alleviate their talent shortage. And in the heaven and earth monument, there might be a genius leader in the next rising era.

...

Temporarily unable to contact Xiaoyu and others, Chen Mo didn't know what they were doing now, and could not do anything. He simply stayed at Blue River Star, and waited for the Xiaohe Galaxy's external quantum communication to reopen.

At this point in time, the total base station of quantum communication was damaged. Chen Mo wondered whether it was related to him.

Now Chen Mo is comfortable every day, thinking about how to control the body.

As for why Mo Nu reorganized her body in place, but he reorganized her body 60 billion light years away, Chen Mo also thought about it. The final answer is the special ability of this special body.

During this time, he often sees some strange pictures, pictures of other life in the universe, like hallucinations, somehow, but Chen Mo can feel real, he looks down on all beings like a god.

Chen Mo is not too worried about the safety of the Milky Way. There are Lan and Mo Nu, as well as Zhao Min. He has been away for a year and a half and has no problems. Anyway, usually, he did not participate in the affairs of the group management, mainly set the direction.

Alligator and Sylvan went out early to run goods. Chen Mo was still the same, sitting next to the training ground of the town school, watching the young armor training.

Warframe is a required course starting from elementary school.

For senior armor, this kind of juvenile armor is a toy, but so did the advanced armor division.

The popularization of the war armor system is one of the ways to make life stronger.

When the earth civilization was ancient, primitive people used tools and stone tools to survive against the laws of nature. That was the crystallization of primitive people's wisdom. Similarly, cosmic life uses war armor, weapons and spaceships to fight against the cosmic environment, which is also the crystallization of the wisdom of life now.

The evolutionary history of life and the history of civilization development is the process of the brain becoming smarter and the tools becoming stronger. This is also natural selection.

Today, the youth's enthusiasm for training seems not as great as before.

Even Chen Mo's nagging was not as high as before.

Soon, Chen Mo discovered that it was wrong, and today the most lively kittens are missing.

An orc-like little female cat, usually active, flexible, meowy, and very curious about everything, is very curious about everything, and will chat with Chen Mo every day after training.

Chen Mo also liked the little female cat.

"How about kittens?" Chen Mo asked after seeing several teenagers stop for advice.

"She was comatose."

"Coma?" Chen Mo was stunned. He was still alive and kicking yesterday, and said that he would bring seafood to him today to eat. Why was he comatose?

"Yes, I heard that the kitten was curious last night. After watching the graphic inscriptions on the Star Monument, he was comatose." Xiao Yuren said a little sadly. Although usually the little fish man and the kitten are the opposites of the enemy, the feelings of the little partner are still there.

"What graphic inscriptions can make life see a coma?"

"The inscription on the Star Monument."

"Did the kitten recover?" Chen Mo asked.

"No, I listened to the gossip gossip at home. My mother said that after seeing the life of the coma in the graphic inscription, it is difficult to wake up. But every waking life will be very powerful and very smart."

"Uh? Take me to see the kittens." Chen Mosi thought for a moment, and said to Xiao Wu: "By the way, tell me the story about the graphic inscriptions on the Tianxingbei."

"My mother said that the inscriptions have existed for more than 100 million years, and they are particularly mysterious. They are the most engraved inscriptions by the most intelligent mathematicians, physicists, life science scientists, philosophers, thinkers, and Mushitianxing of the Universe Alliance. "

Chen Mo listened carefully, without interrupting Xiaowu.

"My mother said that every 50 years, on the day when Mu's Star is to be annihilated, the Star Monument will open a cosmic-level event, and the innumerable life geniuses of the universe will gather in the Star Monument. Then, various debates and armored parties will be held in the Star Monument All kinds of geniuses and prestigious characters will engrave their perceptions of the original inscriptions on the newly-built stone tablets and continue to pass on. "

"My mother also said that after seeing the life of the inscription, nothing might happen, or it might be comatose or awakening superpowers. Many outstanding geniuses in history have read the inscriptions on the Star Star, awakening superpowers, or participating in Become famous after the event. "

"My mother said that you can't read the inscription until I grow up, otherwise you might be unconscious like a kitten. My mother said that if the kitten wakes up, it may have super powers, if it does not wake up, it may wake up for life. not coming."

Chen Mo listened to Xiaowu's "Mom Saying" all the way, frowning and thinking.

From the description of only a few words, Chen Mo can hear the special features of the graphic inscriptions on the Tianxing Tablet. It ’s so magical that it might be helpful to your status quo.

Before long, Chen Mo was taken to the kitten's house.

"Xiaowu."

"What's the matter? Unlucky uncle."

"Don't say" Mom said "in the future, otherwise you won't be able to marry your wife." Chen Moyu taught carefully.

Seeing Chen Mo coming, the kitten's parents just said hello politely, the sadness on his face did not fade away, and there was not much thought to warmly entertain. Everyone in the town knows that Chen Mo, the unlucky uncle, also knows that their children have a better relationship with Chen Mo.

The kitten was lying on the bed, motionless, very quiet, as if she were asleep.

But no matter what they call, they can't wake up.

"I have studied a little medicine, can you show me her case?" Chen Mo said to the kitten's parents.

"Yes."

The kitten's parents handed the kitten's case to Xiaowu and asked him to read it to Chen Mo.

At present, professional doctors are helpless. They are only Chen Mo's concern, not hope.

I heard that some top-level civilizations and god-level civilizations can be healed, but they can't even buy spaceship tickets to the field of god-level civilizations, let alone pay for medical expenses.

"There is no damage to the brain, alienation of cell structures, gene mutations, and deep sleep in consciousness."

Chen Mo was astonished at the kitten's case.

He has seen this situation.

A precursor to superpower awakening.

When he researched superpower technology, he was very familiar with the process of life awakening superpower, and these symptoms were consistent. If the role of the Star Inscription is magical.

"I heard that the kitten read the inscription coma, can I see it?" Chen Mo asked Xiaowu to put down the case and said to the kitten's parents.

"Yes, this is the changing frequency of some graphic inscriptions on the Star Obelisk." The father of the kitten clicked on the screen of the communicator and released a video frequency, which was a peculiar graphic changing image.

The zero-dimensional point moves into a one-dimensional line, the one-dimensional line moves into a two-dimensional surface, and the two-dimensional surface moves into a three-dimensional body ...

What about three-dimensional body movement?

When all kinds of peculiar figures change rapidly, Chen Mo's pupils contract. If he understands, his consciousness and thinking keep following the changes of figures, and his concentration is unprecedented.

In only an instant, everything in the universe seemed to flash away in his mind, and he seemed as if there was no sorrow and joy.

Chen Mo's consciousness gradually became more and more pressured. At the threshold, consciousness resisted instinctively, pulling him out of the immersion state.

Chen Mo, who had returned to God, was shocked.

One of his arms was moving.

Just looked at a video.

It seems that he needs to go to the Star Monument, and Chen Mo is very eager.

"I may have a cure for the kitten's illness." Chen Mo said.

"Really?" The kitten's parents were ecstatic, shaking Chen Mo's hand and shaking with hope in his eyes.

"But if I can contact my wife, she may have a way." Chen Mo thought of Xiaoyu's ability to act on consciousness: "You tell me something about the stars and earth."

chapters.title: Chapter 929: :Fighting
chapters.body:
Chapter 929: :Fighting

Xiao Yu, who Chen Chen was thinking, was in trouble at this time.

Not far from space, more than two hundred medium-sized warships stared at their fleet.

An interstellar pirate group.

The War Armor Regiment earns commissions by accepting various commissioned missions, protecting caravans, and exploring galaxy planets. Although the Interstellar Pirate Group is also a War Armor Regiment, it mainly lives on looting.

The headed life is warning on the public communication channel: "The red python war armor blocking the road adheres to the principle of not more than half a robbery. Forty percent of the goods and forty percent of the star coins are handed over, and I will let you go the way. Otherwise, the consequences will be cruel You want to cry. "

Xiao Yu has little experience in traveling around the universe. Before that, she had also visited the origin city once to find Chen Mo, but this was the first time she encountered an interstellar pirate group. Can not help looking at Ku Yao, his face puzzled.

Ku Yao calmed a lot.

Their **** guards have undergone professional space warfare training and have also fought in space warfare. Although the Interstellar Pirates encountered it for the first time, it seems to be no different from fighting space encounters.

"After reporting to God, we met the Interstellar Pirates, who lived by plundering caravans and transport ships."

"How did our spacecraft stop and were they intercepted?" Xiao Yu asked.

"Behind the gods, it was the interference machines of space jumps." Ku Tian respectfully said: "Space jumps, there are cosmic space lane coordinates specially developed between the stars, the space where the curvature engine is folded, and space sub-quadrant vector coordinates. Set up the jammer in the position between the two spatial coordinates, and once a spacecraft's jumping coordinate passes this vector coordinate, it will be stopped by the interference. This is a means to set up ambush and trap during war. "

"It must stop the spaceship?"

"No, Queen." Kutian meticulously puzzled Xiaoyu. He also knew that Queen didn't know much about space warfare: "It's quite a fishing net set in the sea, the fish hit it, that fish It ’s bad luck. The space is huge, as long as it does n’t pass through this coordinate vector, it wo n’t stop. ”

Xiaoyu nodded: "It's yours."

"Shenwei leads the life." Ku Yao responded solemnly.

Since Chen Mo rescued their ethnic group, their loyalty to Chen Mo was unparalleled. Every bitter star who joined the Divine Guardian was a fanatic who had been selected one after another.

After the patron saint, the king became their faith for life.

After they learned that the **** king was missing, they were more nervous than anyone. When they received the task of finding the king, they did not hesitate to pick the most elite guard into the team.

Each one has been developed with super powers, and the combat effectiveness of the top armored division is not comparable to that of ordinary teams. Even if the number is not large, the fighting power is terrible.

"They are indifferent and seem to want to resist."

"Rebel? A few transport ships want to rebel? They don't know why the stars are so brilliant?" The headed bandit smiled angrily.

"Do you want to destroy them directly?"

"Destroy your mother." The bandit slapped his head on the subordinate's head: "We are interstellar pirates, robbed, ruined the spaceship and cargo, we rob hairs? There is no hair."

With a big wave of the bandit, the intelligent machinery poured out of space and came towards the fleet.

Ku Yao's expression didn't move, his armor was covered, his spear was out of the sheath, mixed with the light of death.

Beside him, many armor of the guards covered the whole body, the weapon in his hand seemed to be excited, and the bloodthirsty desire filled the atmosphere.

Their entire ethnic group was given rebirth by the **** king, and even if they sacrifice their lives for the king, they will not hesitate. When Master Lan teaches them war tactics, they do every homework in double according to Master Lan ’s requirements.

According to the standards of the armed department of the marching ant group, their training volume has reached an extremely demanding level.

However, the boring training does not make them feel bored and uncomfortable. Compared with the days in captivity, their ethnic groups now live free and happy, knowledgeable, and able to eat, and now they are simply paradise.

As long as they are in training camps and bases, their guardians are either training or on the road to training.

Their fighting training instructor is Jing Ge, and every movement is strictly required and in place. They are not clear about the other war departments. Ku Yao ’s request to the guard must be 100%.

Even the strictest Jing Ge and Lan are very satisfied with the training of their guardians.

Under strict standards, the advantages of close combat are obvious.

In addition to the five thousand guardians guarding the gods, the other guardians left the spacecraft in an orderly manner, and the whole process was silent and murderous. Along with it, there are countless intelligent machines and war robots.

The whole process takes less than ten seconds.

The movement of one million guardians did not even have any delay.

Before the interplanetary pirates start, they have already moved.

To the enemy, they don't want to talk a little more nonsense. This is what Instructor Lan said. In one sentence, the enemy can be killed ten times.

"kill."

The first column of intelligent machinery, and the second column of war robots, followed closely by Shenwei. At the forefront are densely packed antimatter bullets.

"Courage."

The gangster was shocked and angry. This was the most wonderful time since he entered the field of Star Pirates. The fleet robbed by him did not escape, but also took the lead in attacking them.

The speed of the **** guard was extremely fast, and the tail of light was raised in space. When the anti-matter warning of the spacecraft radar sounded, they woke up like a dream and the war armor division hurriedly left the cabin.

Antimatter bullets are like raindrops, the radar shows dense warnings, as well as elite war robots and armor, which makes the head of the bandit cool.

The silent explosion exploded in space, and the intelligent machinery and spacecraft submerged by the antimatter bomb energy turned into debris in space.

Countless debris flying across.

The interstellar pirates robbed were stunned.

The armor's radar showed that dense anti-matter bullets warned.

The originally weak space in the light was instantly submerged by the light at the moment when the antimatter bullet exploded. The rapid alarm sounded the fear deep inside them.

Since they were interplanetary pirates, they have never encountered such a battle.

Who is an interplanetary pirate?

This time it seemed to kick the iron plate. The five spacecraft did not open the physical protection and turned into space debris. The terrorist attack speed and means reminded them that the other party was not easy to mess with.

"Why are you so weak?"

I don't know which **** guard said on the public channel, the tone was full of disappointment. They played against the Warrior Regiment of the Zhili, thinking that the Warrior Regiment was at the level of the Warrior, and the result was so weak.

The whispered tone became the last straw that crushed the camel. The Star Pirate heard this sentence and almost didn't cry. They had robbed before, and it was not the other party's panic that time. Now it is their turn.

Domineering and fierce.

The strong fighting style of Shenwei gives a great visual impact, like a brutal beast, showing fangs.

Whether they are strong or weak, they use their strongest level in every battle. A medium-sized interstellar pirate group is in their hands, as pitiful and helpless as a baby.

"So strong." Xiao Yu's eyes lit up.

She didn't care much about interstellar warfare, but the strength shown by Shenwei surprised her.

Jing Ge was expressionless, as if the one-sided slaughter was taken for granted.

In order to find the God King faster, Ku Yao just wanted to end the battle with the fastest speed.

In less than half an hour, the battle was over and a spaceship started to run away. Ku Yao was too lazy to chase. This battle was not challenging. The purpose of their trip is not to fight.

...

Ming Ah looked at the battlefield in the shadow frequency with some pity.

The battlefield of the constellation ahead has already become purgatory. Tens of thousands of space destruction weapons surround the entire constellation, and all the main galaxies are targeted by space weapons. The life of the constellation, like ants, is crushed into cosmic dust by space destruction weapons.

If you can be above the battlefield, you will be able to see a beautiful picture, a beautiful hell.

Ming Ah didn't expect this to be the end of the war. Even if he commanded the most elite legion of the civilization, he still had some pity. Under destruction, there are countless ordinary lives, but this is war.

Under the butcher's knife, he will not be soft-hearted, otherwise he will be cruel to himself.

Cosmic warfare generally does not use space weapons until a special moment. Once used, there is no turning back. Accurate space weapon throwing [Biquger www.biquger.vip] can quickly wipe out the enemy ’s living power.

"The third brigade, supporting the number 0004 stellar battlefield, the remnants were killed, and no prisoners were left."

In several battlefields of encounters in space, the confrontation between the two sides was very tragic.

The other side is desperate.

The planet near the battlefield has already been burned into the sea of fire by the terrifying energy of the battlefield, and the debris of the planet also floats in space.

It was the end of the attack.

"It seems to have won."

The female life beside Ming Ah has her hands wrapped around her chest, and the two groups in front are squeezed into a gully. This is a fatal temptation for the corpses, but Ming A is unmoved and has no choice but to help the female lives around her.

Her name is Mingyue Liuhua, she is the tactical staff of the war department, and her deputy. When she was in the military academy, she was already the sister of Ming Ah. Ming Ah also had a headache for this little sister. Finally, she directly salted fish.

"This is the first city in the bag." Female Life smiled happily, but with a disdain in her smile: "This time the old guy will be very happy."

Ming A shook his head: "Ming Tu defected and disappeared, I am afraid this anger is not so easy to dispel."

"I quite understand Ming Tu."

Mingyue Liuhua sneered, her body close to Ming Ah rubbed, making people fiery.

"Forming and growing in that environment, even if it is a tool, has a bit of conscious wisdom, it can't stand it. This time I heard that it was sent to a remote corner called Pisces Cetacean, and there is the Rania Kea Super Galaxy. I am actually very Curious, what's in that corner, so that the old guy values it so much, and send the dangerous guy over. "

"Now the trouble is not small." Ming A sighed.

"Trouble does not accumulate in a day or two. Someone always has to pay for the decadent dynasty."

Mingyue Liuhua smiled a little cold. She didn't have much affection for the civilization of the corpse. Her sober life knows that the roots are rotten. If it wasn't for Ming, she would not be here.

"Are you saying that Ming Tu will go to the Star Monument? The event is about to begin, and the group will gather, and he is not likely to go there."

"We're afraid we can't go."

Ming Awei sighed that he also wanted to go to the Star Monument and talk to the heroes of the universe, but now Ming Tu has defected, and the body area of the Ming has become chaotic due to the shock of Hongqiao, so he can't pull away.

"Regardless of this, send the battle report back first."

chapters.title: Chapter 930: : Legendary Mushitian Star
chapters.body:
Chapter 930: : Legendary Mushitian Star

Underworld civilization captured Black Rose City.

News spread through the universe alliance through the universe news platform. The original chaotic situation in the universe has become even more chaotic.

The galaxy where the Black Rose City is located is shaped like a black rose, hence its name, and is also a top civilization. I thought that top-level civilization is not so easy to destroy, but the corpse civilization told them that top-level civilization can also be destroyed.

The Black Rose City is one of the 108 cities. After the Hongqiao panic, the situation in the universe is chaotic. Twelve places that do not belong to the seven god-level civilization control areas, 108 cities have become the first target of the god-level civilization.

The corpse civilization suddenly announced that it had captured the city of Black Rose and won the first prize in this war.

As commander-in-chief, Xing Ming Ah, became famous, and became the hottest top star after Yan and Lei Yu.

...

After reading the information sent back, Lan fell into thought, and it didn't take long to recover. The eyes of Yinhuan were gleaming, looking radiant, and there was a smile on the corner of his mouth.

There are many rainbow bridges in the corpse domain, and some of them are in the small universe of the corpse civilization.

Although the civilization of the underworld conceals the news, the top civilization can still find out that the reason why the Black Rose City was first destroyed is that within the super galaxy cluster where the Black Rose City area is located, there is a rainbow bridge leading to the small universe of the underworld civilization.

On several battlefields, I also found the Hongqiao leading to the small universe of the corpse civilization, but the civilization around the Hongqiao is weak, so the war is not as tragic as the Black Rose City.

In addition, there is another unknown news.

Ming Tu, one of the star geniuses of the corpse civilization, led the rebellion of the beast war department of the corpse domain. With such big news, the corpse civilization can deceive some small civilizations and small forces, but it cannot conceal the top civilizations and the god-level civilizations.

A large number of Hongqiao wormholes and elite war departments defected.

The corpse civilization is now in trouble.

Not only the corpse civilization, but also the small universe of several god-level civilizations, Hongqiao was also discovered.

This shocking change has caused a mess in the entire universe. The original maps and layouts are all broken, and everything has to be restarted.

I don't know how the boss is now.

Lan sighed. He hoped that what his wife said was true. The boss was all right, and the entire army of ant groups would be all right.

...

"This is the fifth time I have met the Interstellar Pirates." Xiao Yu frowned as he looked at the spaceship and warframe wreckage out of space.

Since the first encounter with the Red Python Battlegear Regiment, intermittent encounters with interstellar pirates later, the space battle just ended is the fifth interstellar pirate.

The density of this interstellar pirate group is a bit high.

"Queen, the universe is in chaos nowadays. Many armored regiments have not commissioned missions and it is difficult to survive. Some regular armored regiments have begun to switch careers in order to survive in troubled times. Therefore, in the troubled times, there will be more interstellar pirates than during the Taiping period A lot. "Ku Tian explained.

"Ok."

Xiaoyu expressed her understanding and placed the little mother beast eating the cookies in her hands.

"Little potatoes, where are you going now?"

This little mother is her hope to find Chen Mo.

Chen Mo has been missing for almost three months. Although according to the logic, the body will not die, but if it floats in the dead space for a long time, there is no sound, no companionship, that terrible loneliness will destroy the will and make people crazy.

Xiao Yu is also anxious to find Chen Mo now, but can't soon.

The little mother's head was crooked, as if thinking, and it took a moment to move, drawing in the hologram in front of it.

"Momo wipe ... Momo ..."

"Second quadrant." Xiaoyu followed the direction described by the little mother and used the holographic image to determine the direction of the vector and gave the order to Ku Yao.

"The second quadrant sits in Jinhai City, which is one of 108 cities." Ku Yao checked the star map of the universe to determine the space coordinate point of the next jump: "Ready to sail."

Ku Yao ordered immediately.

The space curvature engine of the spacecraft started, and two hours later, ten spacecraft disappeared.

When it appeared again, it was in another starry sky.

"Queen of God, we have entered the range of stars in Gimhae City. Gimhae City is composed of five Benchao galaxy clusters, 1.1 billion light years long and 140 million light years wide." In front of Xiaoyu.

"Little potatoes, which way should I go now?"

"Momo ... Momo ..." The small potato's paws again gestured.

"In the seventh quadrant, we skipped the head."

Xiaoyu Yixi.

Originally too far away, the little mother can only sense the approximate direction. They need to keep approaching, re-confirm the direction, and then continue to narrow the search area according to the original coordinates.

"Now confirm that the husband is in the direction of the seventh quadrant in the area between us and the last jump point."

Xiaoyu called up the holographic star map, and made the space quadrant coordinate map with the previous jumping point as the center, and made the space quadrant coordinate map with the current position as the origin.

The intersection space between the seventh quadrant and the previous space jump point may be where Chen Mo is.

"There are 1,300 galaxies in this star field and two trillion stars."

"Take the middle position to jump, this is the easiest and fastest." Xiao Yu said.

"Yes, the queen." Ku Yao took orders and hurriedly issued a space jump instruction.

...

After the initial freshness, Chen Mo's days began to become monotonous.

Since watching a video of the star map stele, Chen Mo's arm moved. So during this time, I was looking for the related images and video frequency of the star map.

However, apart from seeing a bit of change in graphics for the first time, it won't do much to look at it now.

The kitten's parents told him something about the Stars and Tombs, and he also found some information about the Stars and Tombs on the Internet himself.

The Star Monument is one of the twelve places, the only permanent neutral place in the universe, created by the legendary Mu Shi Tianxing, and is not subject to any jurisdiction.

Mushi Tianxing is hailed as one of the smartest life in the history of the universe alliance, is the greatest mathematician, physicist, life science scientist, philosopher, educator and thinker.

In his legend, he created super-dimensional equations, spatial dimensional calculus, and used space mathematics to establish a hypothetical model of higher dimensional existence; improved the space curvature engine to make the spaceship's space jump more stable and safe;

At the same time, in just a few thousand years, he has evolved from advanced life to god-level life and awakened superpowered life.

He put forward the theory that superpower awakening is a shortcut to life evolution. In addition, the conjecture theory of superpower awakening technology has also been collated to become a reference theory for the study of superpower in cosmic civilization.

The cosmic existence theory of Mushitianxing still affects the existing cosmic civilization system, and demonstrates that the fourth dimension and even higher dimensions actually exist.

These are all part of his legendary career.

The most legendary is the study of philosophical consciousness in the fourth dimension. The special graphic changes Chen Mo saw at the beginning are part of it.

Mu's celestial star studies the existence of the fourth-dimensional consciousness for most of his life. He firmly believes that his research can open the door to the fourth dimension of the universe's life consciousness and let life be beyond the universe.

Many lives have seen that part of the study of the fourth dimension of philosophical consciousness, awakening superpowers in the heavenly star monument and becoming a god-level life, among which there are many leaders and figures of the times.

Therefore, the Star Monument has become the most respected place in the universe. No matter which life is, they consciously maintain the sky and earth monument, and they will not dare to destroy the stone monument in the battle, otherwise it will lead to the spur and chase and killing of the entire universe.

Over time, the Star Monument became a permanent neutral place in the universe, and no life is tacitly aware of the use of destructive weapons in this place, or even bring it in.

Chen Mo could not admire the existence of this kind of life, this model is the prototype of the science and technology library.

In the middle age of Mu Shi Tian Xing, he created the star stele and engraved his research knowledge on the forest of steles to expose the life of the universe. In his later years, he expanded the stele forest again, engraving all the knowledge he had studied throughout his life in the stele.

Until Mu Shi Tianxing passed away, the stele forest he created stretched 200,000 square kilometers.

Later, when coming to watch the Stele Forest, some personal views and gains will be left. After many later generations of celestial geniuses were named, this habit developed into a culture.

In addition to the part left by Mu Shi Tianxing, there are also research papers left by other geniuses. There are more and more stele forests, and after more than 100 million years of development, the stele forests on the Starfield are covered with hundreds of planets.

For example, today, the star-studded event is held once every 50 years, bringing together talents from the universe and becoming the most famous event in the universe alliance system. And every time there is a grand meeting of stars and monuments, there will be genius characters here to awaken super powers and become god-level life.

It's less than a month before the next star-studded grand event begins.

Chen Mo would love to visit this legendary place and see the grand gathering of cosmic talents. It's just that his body can't move. If he can't reach the galaxy before the event, he can't go anywhere.

As for the kitten's illness, he needs to recover, use super power to develop technology, or Xiaoyu comes over to wake up the kitten's consciousness, then it is possible to wake up.

Chen Mo stared blankly at the little guys training on the training ground: "When is this day?"

chapters.title: Chapter 931: : Give A Face
chapters.body:
Chapter 931: : Give A Face

With multiple jumps, the reduced scope is now getting smaller and smaller. For Gimhae City, they have applied for friendly visits, so do n’t worry about being attacked by surrounding civilizations.

Fortunately, these times they did not encounter interstellar pirates.

The spaceship jumped to the center of the galaxy space in which the little mother beast sensed the direction. According to the intersection of the intervals, they could quickly narrow down the search range.

From more than 1,300 galaxies, they locked the Xiaohe Galaxy. The Xiaohe Galaxy recorded a total of 210 billion stars with a diameter of 90,000 light years.

Now they are in the Xiaohe Galaxy. They are not sure whether Chen Mo is on the planet or floating in space, so they cannot search according to the planet. Space is also the scope of their search. It may also fall into the star, or some low density Inside the liquid planet.

According to Mo Nu's physical condition, as long as Chen Mo reorganizes her body, she will not be killed by the harsh environment of space. The only worry is the loneliness in space for a long time, which makes people mentally breakdown.

Now the scope of the search is getting smaller and smaller, there are 3,000 light-years, and after a few more jumps, the approximate location is basically determined.

"Small potatoes, in which direction?"

Xiaoyu asked her mother.

"Momomo ..." The little mother beast pointed to a brighter star in space, her big eyes looking at Xiaoyu with joy, as if inviting credit.

"That's the number 3920, the direction of the colorful cloud star." Xiaoyu looked surprised: "Ready to jump."

"Observe the order." Ku Yao quickly hurried to order and ordered the fleet to jump.

Twenty minutes later, ten spacecraft disappeared into space.

...

"Unlucky, you really have a way to treat the little one?"

Sylvan ’s starling is very curious, and even Uncle Crocodile is curious. Now everyone in the town knows that Chen Mo said that there is a way to treat kittens, and the kitten parents are too happy to talk about things.

Chen Mo is now a celebrity in the town.

The paralyzed uncle, who experienced an air crash, is well-informed, proficient in armor, and now still has medicine. This is a legend in a small town.

"It should be cured." Chen Mo said.

"It's so powerful? Isn't it that only the medical technology of the top civilization or the **** level civilization can be treated?" Siran asked in surprise: "Are you the life of the top civilization?"

"I said yes, not sure." Chen Mo said: "I haven't recovered my body."

"Okay, wouldn't you just blow cannons with others?" Sylon questioned.

Chen Mo was speechless: "I have no money to cheat them."

"It seems that too," Sylvan muttered.

"It seems that it is right to save the lucky one. At first, when I saw him, he was not an ordinary person." Uncle Crocodile was very happy.

"After the gun."

"... Dead bird, I will die if you don't take it through." Crocodile didn't breathe.

The two started fighting again, but Chen Mo was used to it, and the way they got along was like this.

The kitten ’s father has come over, carrying various gifts in his hand. Since Chen Mo said that he may have a way to treat the kitten, his couple treat Chen Mo with respect. He visits Chen Mo once a day, hoping to wait for him to recover completely , Almost did not take Chen Mo to stay at home.

"Mr. Chen Mo, let's take you to see the kitten." The kitten's father said.

"Take me there to see what I'm doing now, but I can't help it for the time being." Chen Mo smiled bitterly, and now he can only move with one hand, he has no special control over this body, and there is no laboratory for the marching ant group. He can do nothing. .

"It's okay, just have a look." The kitten's father hoped.

Only when Chen Mo has a look will they feel at ease.

"Uh. Then go." Chen Mo thought for a while, but it's fine here anyway.

"Let's go check it out, too." Crocodile and Sylvan also hurriedly spoke. The kitten's lively girl, they still liked it. They couldn't think of going back for a trip and it became like this.

The kitten's father pushed Chen Mo's wheelchair, and Alligator and Sylvan followed behind.

Soon after leaving the house, suddenly, there was a lot of exclamation.

When everyone looked up, they saw more than ten huge shadows in the sky and ten huge fleets.

"Wow, how come this spaceship came here," Sylvan muttered, "Crocodile, if you said that if we had such a fleet running, how much would we earn on that trip?"

"Beauty dies to you, you can't afford to buy one all your life." Crocodile's eyes were full of envy.

"Can this spaceship fly to the top civilized star field?" The kitten's father was also eager in the eyes, hoping to have such a space ship to send his daughter to the top star field for treatment.

All three were envious, but they didn't notice Chen Mo's happy expression.

Found it.

"It's here." Xiaoyu came along in the direction of the little mother beast. The fleet jumped a dozen times and flew at the speed of light for several hours before finally finding it here.

"After reporting to God, I found it."

Ku Tian shouted excitedly, the picture taken by the detector was enlarged, and with the help of artificial intelligence, the location of the **** king was determined.

The **** king is sitting in a wheelchair, and there are three orcs.

At this time, Chen Mo looked at the spaceship with a relaxed smile.

"This bastard."

Seeing Chen Mo's smile, Xiao Yu couldn't get angry, but wept with joy, and rushed towards the spacecraft's hatch. Ku Yao and Jing Ge were not slow either, and left the spaceship behind Xiao Yu.

Dense black dots poured out from the spaceship.

This scene caused the residents of the town to panic. They have never seen such a big battle on this asteroid.

Even Crocodile and Sylvan, who had run the goods, changed their faces greatly when they saw this kind of scene.

A war armor group.

They have never seen such a big posture, heard that the universe is now in chaos, and there is a lot of war. What if they came to attack their asteroid? Is it a force of civilization or an interstellar pirate group?

If the forces of civilization take over, for their planets, they only change the rules of power and rules, and life will not have much impact. The takeover of planets by civilizations can only explain the defeat of the last civilization that manages their planets.

And if it is an interstellar pirate group, then the trouble will be bigger. It is not uncommon for an interstellar pirate group that lives on plunder, plunders the wealth of planets, and kills life.

Judging from the experiences of Crocodile and Sylvan, the War Department that appeared was absolutely well-trained. When millions of armor flew down, the formation remained unprecedentedly tight. It can be seen from the details that this is a war armor group with terrifying combat power.

The speed of the War Armor Regiment is not fast. From the supersonic speed at the beginning, to the reduction of the subsonic speed later, the gas field brought everyone in the town panic, like the palm of death choked on the neck and covered with hair. cool.

No one dared to resist, if the interstellar pirate group, once the resistance angered them, the entire planet would be slaughtered.

The children on the roadside were crying.

The armoured regiment came towards them. Uncle Crocodile's throat kept creeping, his hands were clenched clenchedly, his spine became cold, and a sonic boom came over like a cry of death.

Suddenly, his eyes inadvertently glanced at Chen Mo's face, and he was instantly stunned.

Chen Mo was laughing.

Yes, Chen Mo was laughing, he was right.

Is this battle armor group ...

A ridiculous idea came out of his mind.

boom!

The war armor froze, the sonic boom exploded, the doors and windows buzzed, and the eardrums tingled.

Until the sonic boom disappeared, the town's life had not responded.

Crocodile, Sylvan and others just thought they were finished, and now their hands and feet are still cold, and the head of the Warframe is less than ten meters from them.

"Jian God King, the guard is here."

The voices of Ku Yao and the guards of the gods were unprecedentedly inspiring, and his eyes were full of reverence and faith on Chen Mo. They finally found the King of God, and settled all their hearts.

"Son of a bitch."

Xiao Yu's voice interrupted the serious atmosphere. Coming out of the battle armor, directly grabbing Chen Mo's ear, very angry.

Quack!

Crocodile and others around Chen Mo were stunned. Originally they felt repressed by terror, and now the style of painting is abrupt.

For a time, the atmosphere on the field was very strange.

Shenwei saw Chen Mo being pinched by Xiaoyu's ear, but his mouth was torn, not daring to laugh. In their view, this is the show of love between the **** king and the queen, and the couple's family affairs, they dare not manage.

"Give me a face." Chen Mo looked guilty.

"You still know face, do you know how worried we are? Do you know how we got here? You stinky man." As he said, Xiaoyu's worries and grievances broke out these days, lying in Chen Mo's arms Cry.

Feeling the temperature on Xiao Yu's body, Chen Mo's heart swept warmly.

"I'm a little thirsty." Hillan's starling murmured and hurriedly stepped back, leaving space for the two.

The crocodile and the kitten's father also stepped back a bit.

It seems to be clear now that this is Chen Mo's people, and the group of soldiers is watching, they are afraid that the other party thinks they are not good for Chen Mo, then they are out of luck.

But the shock of their hearts has not dissipated.

chapters.title: Chapter 932: : Chen Mo'S Ambition
chapters.body:
Chapter 932: : Chen Mo'S Ambition

"Please come in, please come in."

The kitten's father led Chen Mo and Xiao Yu into the house.

Knowing Xiaoyu's identity, the kitten's father was surprised and happy. Chen Mo said that his wife might have a way to treat his daughter. Now, Xiaoyu is here.

"Children, dad, are they?" As soon as he entered, the kitten's mother was a little nervous looking at the strange fishermen and Jing Ge. The life of the spaceship they just saw was wearing these armor.

"This is Mr. Chen Mo's wife, come to Abao." The kitten's father introduced quickly.

"Hello."

Looking at Xiaoyu and others again, the alert in the eyes of the kitten's mother disappeared, leaving only surprises and hopes.

"Is it really possible?" Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo uncertainly.

Chen Mo nodded: "Her consciousness fell into a deep sleep, and her body's genetic mutation should be caused by the stagnation in the body's evolution. We only need to develop her superpowers to catalyze her body to continue to evolve, awaken her consciousness, and should be able to wake Come."

"Then I try."

Chen Mo told his kitten's parents his thoughts.

In this kind of treatment, they must respect the choice of parents, and no one knows what will happen. Although it is possible to wake the kitten, it is not certain.

After seeing the star map stele, there are many awakening superpowers. The kitten was met by him. He also likes this little female cat, just as her luck, just like when she met Siran and Uncle Crocodile.

The kitten's parents were shocked when they learned that the kitten could awaken superpowers. Superpower has always been the standard configuration of God-level life. Even if superpower has little effect on the armor, the brain has evolved and will become more full and strengthened.

Siran and Uncle Croven listened beside, and stood there instantly.

Super ability development!

Uncle Crocodile's mouth, can swallow an ostrich egg, shocked. It took a long time for them to recover and calm down their shocking mood. They determined that they seemed to have saved a terrific character in space.

Superpowers, god-level life, they can know what this means.

"Lucky, are you sure this method will work?" Crocodile asked solemnly.

They also like kittens. Naturally they don't want kittens to have trouble.

"Not sure, but the best way I can think of is this. Her body and brain cells are structurally mutated, genetically mutated, that is, evolution has not been completed. If only consciousness wakes up, no one knows whether it is because of physical problems If something goes wrong, the decision is in your hands. "

Chen Mo looked at the kitten's parents. Since this time, the kitten's parents still take care of him, so he doesn't want to keep the kitten asleep.

After a moment, the kitten's parents whispered to discuss and made a decision.

The kitten father took a deep breath and firmly said: "Sir, we agree."

Airships in the air and rigorous soldiers have already explained the problem. Chen Mo is not the life of ordinary civilization. Medical technology is definitely stronger than their asteroid. This is their last hope.

And this is an opportunity for kittens to become excellent. They also want their children to become smarter and better god-level life.

When the kitten's parents left, the medical cabin brought about quickly changed, and a medical bed appeared in the room. After injecting the cat with superpower development medicaments, Xiaoyu took a deep breath to sit down, entered the superstate, and reached for the cat's brain.

...

"The boss found it."

Lan received a message from Ku Yao, and his narrow and long mouth bent, making the whole person a lot easier. The boss found that their worries disappeared, according to the current situation, they can calmly layout.

Quantum life.

More advanced than God-level life, extremely mysterious.

Eternal life is immortal, immortal, this is the supreme pursuit of life, he is shocked by the boss's courage and fleeing.

"What's so special about the Tianxing Monument?" Zhao Min asked a question about escape. Because Chen Mo and Xiao Yu will not come back directly, but will go to the Tianxing Monument.

"The Sky Star Monument is the most talented event in the universe. The heroes gather to gather the smartest bunch of life in the universe. The main star of the star monument has a map engraving the knowledge and ideas of Mu Shi Tianxing ’s life. Has his plans. "

To Chen Mo's going to the Star Monument, he was not surprised. Any clever life would go to the Star Monument at least once in his life. Lan had also been there when he was young, and was there. When he met his former head, he joined Black Maple Leaf Armor Group.

"President, I have always been curious. Has the boss ever said, what is his ambition?"

"Ambition and ambition? His ambitions are all in the research. From the time I met him, it was a messy study, but every time it was a surprise." Zhao Min's face was a little more relaxed, and she was uneasy during this time Now, learning that Chen Mo is safe, let go of it completely.

"Have you ever thought about chasing the deer?" Lan looked at the sparkle in her eyes, not knowing what she was thinking.

Zhao Min was shocked and looked at Lan in surprise: "I haven't heard him say that he has always been asking, and the marching ant group will survive."

"To live, this is very demanding. Perhaps, we need a goal."

Seeming to understand Lan's thoughts, Zhao Min became extremely serious: "You mean ..."

"What is wrong, we are now full of technology, talents, pattern, and geographical conditions, and the right place is harmonious, just the last thing."

"what?"

"The boss' ambition."

In Lan's eyes, the light bursts out, and the fighting spirit is high. If you can reach that step, what a brilliant achievement the boss will be. And they will be famous forever.

"The boss is very good. It is the best life I have ever seen. It is not inferior to the talented leaders such as Tongqing and Dan, and even surpasses them. But the boss does not have their ambitions, otherwise he can meet Tongqing in the Shigan Galaxy. , Dan contention.

Now that the troubled world is coming, if the boss has no ambition, we will be very passive in the future. There is no airtight wall in the world, and our mature super-capacity development technology will certainly not be hidden for too long. Our opponent is a god-level civilization. If we want to live, we must kill all the lives and forces that are eyeing us, and we are not passively beaten. "

Lan ’s idea is very simple. Chen Mo is the leader of the marching ant group. Chen Mo ’s ambition is the direction and goal of the marching ant group. Now the direction of the marching ant group is very uncertain. He is just studying technology. This is very dangerous for the chaotic world.

Zhao Min looked energetic.

"Prepare the layout according to your ideas, and I will tell him when he comes back. His man is very smart, and his mind knows better than anyone, that is, sometimes he has to push him before he moves, otherwise he will think about his technical research. . "

When Zhao Min and Lan's instructions continued, the entire marching ant group seemed to be activated and rejuvenated. A huge machine was running. Only the upper layers could feel that the marching ant group's direction was more clear and firmer. Just wait for the right opportunity. They It will be a blockbuster.

Even the people at the bottom of the marching ant group can feel a positive change in spirit.

The outside world does not know that in the remote corner of the universe [Biquge www.bequgex.com], a giant beast is awakening.

...

Chen Mo was right, the kitten's consciousness fell into a deep sleep.

The operation of her conscious body is extremely slow and almost stagnant. As for the reason, it should be that the cells and structure of the brain changed during the evolution process, causing her weak consciousness to keep up with the changes.

After getting familiar with the car, Xiao Yu entered the kitten's consciousness and gently touched her consciousness.

Slowly, the movement of the conscious body became a bit faster, and the fingers of the kitten also moved with the movement of the conscious body.

effective.

Chen Mo quietly looked at the data of the instrument.

The data shows that the kitten's physical evolution is returning to the right track.

This is a good thing.

The whole town is very quiet, ten giant spaceships in the sky are so cool, and there are millions of elite warriors. The residents of the town have spread that the unlucky uncle, the leader of these soldiers, is a big figure.

The unlucky uncle who has been sitting in a wheelchair and guiding children's armor training is a leader of the top forces.

This brings great shock to the life of the town.

The kitten's house cannot be close, but there are many lives watching.

They had all heard that the unlucky uncle ’s wife had a way to treat the kitten ’s disease, and now it seems that the unlucky uncle ’s wife has come to him.

Sirian and Uncle Crocodile are okay and immersed in shock. The amount of information received today is a bit large, and they haven't slowed down yet. The kitten's parents are more anxious. The kitten is their lifeblood. If the treatment fails, they don't know what to do.

Four hours later, when the kitten's parents panicked, the door of the house opened.

"The kitten really woke up."

"It's amazing. Unlucky Uncle is not a cannon, it's really powerful."

"Hey, don't call unlucky uncle again, or uncle is angry, you're done."

"That's the uncle's wife and humanoid. The humanoid looks good."

The life from far away is amazing and joyful, sincerely waking up and happy for the kitten.

The kitten's parents saw the kitten coming out, weeping with joy, and stepped forward to hold her in her arms. Syllian and Uncle Crocodile smiled pleasantly, at least the bad luck was not a lie, it really treated the kitten.

"Just enter the room and talk." Uncle Crocodile looked around and whispered.

If the kitten develops super powers, it will be sensational to the town and the entire Blue River Star. God-level life, even in Gimhae City, is the top layer of life. If the kitten has super powers, the town must not be fried.

The kitten's parents were stunned, and soon relieved, saying hello to the neighbors and life, and brought the kitten back to the house.

"Kitty, look at your abilities." Chen Mo said.

The kitten's big eyes were still turning on Xiaoyu, and she felt a sense of intimacy. After hearing Chen Mo's words, she nodded dumbly: "Oh, okay, but how to use it?"

"Let me do it."

Xiaoyu smiled softly and stretched his finger on the kitten's head.

I saw the hair on the kitten, which exploded in an instant, the eyes turned red, the small body was slowly pulled up, a little beautiful cat was formed, and the milk was fierce.

【Crazy】

The most classic ability awakening of the orc, the strength and reaction speed have been greatly increased. Whether it is wearing a battle armor or bare hand, the strength has been greatly improved.

The kitten ’s parents are ecstatic, and the kitten is really capable, which means that the kitten will be a god-level life in the future, and may become the top armor division in the future.

Sylvan and Crocodile looked dull. Even if they were prepared, it was the first time they saw it.

Xiao Yu once again clicked on the kitten's forehead.

I saw her body slowly shrinking back to her petite and exquisite appearance, her big eyes still looking at Xiaoyu curiously.

"The promise is completed, and I'm almost gone. Siran, Uncle Crocodile, and the kitten, do you want to follow us and move to us?" Chen Mo smiled and asked several people.

Several people in the room looked at each other.

chapters.title: Chapter 933: : Was Stopped
chapters.body:
Chapter 933: : Was Stopped

The poisonous skin girl sits on the first seat of the hall, in front of the conference table, suspended the star map of the chaotic land. Gray twenty-one is beside, the mask covers the face, and the real appearance is not seen, but the body grows and is much stronger than before.

Behind the poison skin girl stands a life blocked under the cloak. Black Liuli, if you do not look closely, it is hard to believe that this is a life standing there.

Next to it is Zhi, a life with thin skin, skin like dead bark, and huge eyes.

The life of the Luosui tribe is like a demon.

"Now, how many chess pieces are there?"

"Thirty-seven." Zhi's finger a little, the mark of the holographic star chart appeared, scattered in all corners of the chaotic land.

"The speed is quicker." The poison skin girl's voice was cold: "The situation changes too fast, it is not good to drag on."

"Understood." Zhidang said immediately.

"Tomorrow a new batch of pharmacy will come over and select the best subordinates to come out and prepare for development."

As soon as the poisonous female story fell, all the lives and spirits on the field shook, and they knew what the potion said.

As one of the twelve places, the chaotic land is also the most chaotic area in the universe.

There are murderers, civilized fugitives, conspirators, interstellar exiles, war dealers, scammers, conspirators, adventurers, killers, etc., as well as a variety of fierce generations. From another perspective, this is also considered here Talented people.
