Four of the top ten killer organizations in the universe are in this chaotic place, showing the great competition.

There is also the largest black market in the universe, the underground trading market. There is nothing that you dare not sell here, even if it is a god-level civilization. The hands of the god-level civilization did not reach here, and even dared not attack here.

The most ruthless murderers in the universe are concentrated here. If you poke the horse honeycomb, the god-level civilization will also lose a piece of meat.

Their organization has been able to rise and grow rapidly in the chaotic land over the years, and a steady stream of masters have emerged. It is through the development of super powers of pharmacy to train the top armored divisions.

Their senior leaders knew that there was great power behind the organization, but they never dared to ask which power was the head.

They asked what they shouldn't ask, but they suffered.

However, super-power development technology is a technology that has no mature civilization, and they have a lot of information.

...

Chen Mo looked at Xiaoyu humbly. Now he was on the spaceship, but no outsiders were present. Xiaoyu's eyes seemed to be eating him.

He asked Xiaoyu how to find it, knowing that it was the little mother beast who brought them. Xiaoyu also told him his experience during this period. During the experiment, he didn't provoke Xiaoyu, and now he feels he has to settle the accounts after the autumn.

"Xiao Yu, what do you want to do?"

"What do you say?" The small fisherman walked to Chen Mo: "I want to strangle you now."

"Murder a pro-husband, okay."

"Do you know that you are wrong?" Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo threateningly, as if he didn't say one thing, he would suffer.

"I know I was wrong."

"What's wrong?"

"Everything is wrong, you shouldn't experiment without permission, and it also makes you worry." Chen Mo directly admits to counseling, the big husband, can bend and stretch.

"Wang Ba Dan, stinky man."

Xiao Yu finally couldn't help but lie in Chen Mo's arms, feeling very at ease. In the Blue River Star, there are many lives, she is not good for you, and I am now on the spaceship, it is her and Chen Mo's time alone.

Touching Xiaoyu's back with only one movable hand, feeling the temperature on Xiaoyu's body, Chen Mo felt a warmth.

"Momo wipe ..." The little mother covered her eyes, and the small paws quietly released a gap, and she looked so cute that Chen Mo and Xiaoyu were happy.

After Wen Cun, Xiao Yu pushed Chen Mo to the command center of the spacecraft.

The star festival will definitely be very lively this time. The troubled world is coming, which is when heroes come out. The moment when the stars will gather talents from all over the world and grab talent, this time it will definitely not be peaceful.

Shenwei is not weak, and can even be said to be one of the top teams in the universe.

Today, more than half of the guards of this team are top-level armored divisions, and the rest are elite senior armored divisions. Weapons and equipment, except space weapons and light-speed destruction weapons, are all top-notch.

In the event of an encounter, the Divine Guard is not afraid of any civilized equivalent team.

The discipline and killing intensity of Shenwei is the highest among the marching ant groups, enough to protect Chen Mo's safety on the Star Monument. With Chen Mo's current body, even if there is no guard, he does not care.

"Destination star and monument, start."

The cosmic route determined by the star map is very clear. The star monument is not far from the space where Gimhae is located. It is not as far as they are from the Lania Kea super galaxy. It is only 10 billion light years and can jump over in about seven days.

The celestial monument is close to the central zone of the universe, permanently neutral.

The seven god-level civilizations and their affiliated civilizations control the seven realms. In addition, the twelve places, 108 cities, and many top civilizations control the rest of the star domain.

The Star Monument is a permanent neutral place, so there is no civilization to declare ownership. It belongs to the life of the entire universe. Security is the responsibility of an independent department of the Universe Alliance Security Department, and it is not even interfered by the Universe Alliance Council.

From the Gimhae City to the sky and star monuments, tens of billions of years ago, various high-level civilizations and top-level civilizations have been intertwined, and the space between the spheres of influence belongs to the public space sea.

If you want to jump into the space of other people's forces, you must report in advance, otherwise they will be discovered by the detector and they will be attacked as an intruder. And this application process is very troublesome, and may even need to pay taxes or tolls, so Chen Mo chose to jump in public space coordinates, saving a lot of things.

The public space sea has no processes and is free, but it has its own risks, such as unreported space turbulence and interstellar pirates.

In cosmic public space channels not guarded by the Legion of Civilization, interstellar pirates will use space jamming equipment to pull spacecraft passing from space out of the space direction vector coordinates for space hijacking.

They have met many times before.

During the first long-distance space travel, Sirian and Uncle Crowen were very nervous. Now they are no longer a tens of light-years away, but a journey of tens of billions of light-years.

But the two of them looked embarrassed when they saw that the kitten next to them was not nervous. They have also seen the world, and now the little female cats are calmer than them.

As the countdown ended, everyone felt a dizziness in front of their eyes, and their minds were blank, unable to think.

In just an instant, the feeling of turning around disappeared, and the kitten parents who couldn't bear it were retching next to them.

When the physical sensation recovered, Chen Mo took a deep breath and opened his eyes.

Dididi ...

The spacecraft's squeaky siren sound pulled everyone out of the trance.

Ku Yao's face changed slightly, and he hurriedly checked the cause of the alarm. The other guards, the helmets of the battle armor instantly covered. Chen Mo's armor is no exception. Even if he can't control it, artificial intelligence automatically controls the armor to cover his body, and several guards quickly protect him in the middle.

"What's going on?" Chen Mo said in a deep voice.

"We didn't reach our destination, and encountered space coordinate vector interference and were stopped." Ku Yao said.

The atmosphere suddenly became tense, and all the eyes of life fell on the pop-up holographic video frequency.

chapters.title: Chapter 934: : Knife Out Of Sheath
chapters.body:
Chapter 934: : Knife Out Of Sheath

Zhu He quickly moved towards the War Department, and now she is in charge of the Intelligence Department of the Marching Ant Group.

As the eyes of marching ant groups, their functions are extremely important. Any major news, they must do their best to detect and clear, the first time to submit intelligence to the War Department.

This is the first major meeting of the War Department after the new strategy is arranged.

Entering the conference room of the war department, you see the first Lan, the others are just arrived, and other high-level leaders come behind Zhu He. Even those who traveled outside, such as Wat Mu, were seated by holographic projection.

Seeing the crowd arrive, Lan stopped to think: "Huo Furong, talk about the latest information."

"We launched the entire intelligence system to check out the surrounding wormholes." Zhu He stood up and went to the holographic projection in the center of the meeting room. He dragged the star map projection with both hands: "Including the skull galaxy, a total of Four. "

The holographic projection puts out the star map of Pisces and its surroundings, which is huge.

Others on the field heard meticulously. This meeting is about the deployment issues behind.

"Pisces constellation-Skeleton galaxy, giant large quasar cluster-Gulu galaxy, Sloan Great Wall-White Mist galaxy, Hercules hollow-Muwu galaxy."

No one interrupted Zhu He on the pitch.

"It's needless to say that the Skeleton Galaxy connects the An's supercluster in the dark forest; the wormhole of the Gulu galaxy connects the white star civilization, the giant quasar cluster Tianlu City, is one of the 108 cities, the top civilization, Tianlu City occupied Half of the star field of the giant quasar cluster has eight legions, and the forces cannot be underestimated. "

Zhu He introduced it very carefully and clearly. She is more afraid of information problems than anyone. A problem with intelligence is fatal to war.

"The white fog galaxy of the Sloan Great Wall is connected to the corpse domain controlled by the corpse civilization. Some time ago, the meditation of the corpus civilization had brought the war department through the white fog wormhole with an unknown intention. But his disappearance in space in the Sloan Wall , Whereabouts are unknown, reliable news is that Ming Tu defected with the War Department. Because of Ming Tu defected, Baiwu hollow appeared defensive empty window, now it is controlled by Sloan civilization.

The last is the Muwu galaxy, which is empty in Shepherds. It belongs to the city of Shepherds in 108 cities. The galaxies in the caves of Shepherds are scarce, and life is scarce. The entire caves in and around the constellations are controlled by shepherd civilization. Although it is a top civilization, but his strength is weak. Muwu Wormhole also leads to the dark forest. "

"First deal with the Sloane civilization and the shepherd civilization." Lan eyes flashed a gleam.

Lan asked Zhu He to sit down and glanced at the others on the field. Everyone was awed and straightened.

"It's a chaotic world. We have to live. It's very passive to stay close to the defense, so we need to change our strategy."

Lan looked calm and stood up. He and Zhao Min contacted Chen Mo. Chen Mo agreed with their ideas.

"The emergence of wormholes has brought the distance between civilizations closer to 10 billion light-years, which has greatly accelerated the complexity of war. Wormholes are already a battleground for military strategists, and control of wormholes can master the initiative of war."

Speaking of which, Lan Yinhuan's eyes burst into fierce heat, and there was a hint of madness in his voice, and instead he smiled and became calm again.

"Our opponents are god-level civilizations, and there are more than one, but we can't wait for god-level civilizations to come to the door, otherwise we will suffer. Before they look for the door, we need more strength, more resources and star fields. We There are also small universes, why can't we be god-level civilizations? "

At the end of the last sentence, the atmosphere on the field became extremely fanatical, and the fighting was ignited until it went crazy.

The angle of Lan Yang's mouth was sharp as a knife, and the fire flashed in his long and narrow eyes.

"It's time for our knife to come out of the sheath."

...

The journey of the An's supercluster is progressing very quickly, but Lan decides to speed up again and make the owl's scalp numb.

But he only needs to execute.

With a steady supply of weapons and technology, the owl becomes extremely confident.

In Lan, the pressure is low, and the owlet shows an unprecedented commanding ability. He himself is a powerful general, because he did not enter the An's Civilization Legion system, so he chose to form his own armored regiment.

With his outstanding talents, he is also well-known in the An's Super Galaxy Cluster. Based on the strength of the War Armor Regiment, when the Hongqiao Bridge was discovered, it was enough to show his ability by lifting the regiment to enter and attacking the three high-level civilizations with lightning speed.

Now attributed to the marching ant group, he has received Lan ’s systematic tactical teaching and developed superpowers. He is more confident in his own strength.

Facing the stormy offensive of the owl, the An's civilization and the surrounding civilizations are in a daze. Some armored regiments and advanced civilizations have surrendered to prevent their extinction.

Those civilizations that once rejected the owl are even more shocked and regretful.

However, did not get a soft hand for the owl.

The owls that have won a great victory have a faster journey. They have recruited elite soldiers from the famous armored regiments of the An's supercluster and the advanced civilization corps, and joined the night owl war department.

All life is clear. There is no life in the An's super galaxy cluster to fully unfold the owl, and the suspense of this war is not much.

After this battle, the Night Warrior Warriors had many excellent soldiers.

Although there is no break-in, Xiao Li believes that when the newly recruited staff breaks in with the old department, the combat effectiveness of the Night War Department will rise to a higher level.

...

There is a battle ahead.

The light in space is bright, there is no sound, and each light ball is like the fire of hell, covering the entire space.

Debris and debris raged in space.

One side is an interstellar pirate, and the other side is a fleet pulled out by space interference. The battle between the two sides is intensified.

Obviously, Chen Mo and they are the second fleet to be pulled out of space by space jamming equipment. The first fleet to be pulled out has already fought against the Star Pirates.

Chen Mo and others are ignorant.

The battle between the two sides is in the fierce stage. The wreckage of the spacecraft and the remains of the armor are all telling the tragic battle.

Not only Chen Mo's circle, but also the two sides of the battle were very aggressive. Unexpectedly, when they were fighting the most fiercely, a fleet would suddenly appear, but when they saw that it was not a battleship, they were relieved and not afraid of being the other's reinforcements.

It is not easy to participate in the battle between the two sides now.

In this case, they are not wise to participate in the battle. Work with the first batch of life to solve the interstellar pirates? Impossible, they do not know the first fleet to arrive, and naturally will not be a bad guy to help each other.

"Leave here first." Chen Mo ordered, not intending to watch.

The engine of the fleet started again, ready to leave.

Now the battle in space has shown a slight tilt. Depending on the situation, interstellar pirates are beginning to gain the upper hand. Chen Mo does n’t want them to come to trouble after they end the battle.

"Friend, I'm Joel Nanro, please help us, thank you." When the spacecraft was about to start and leave, a distress signal appeared on the public communication channel.

"Jiao Nanluo?"

Chen Mo and everyone on the spaceship were shocked.

chapters.title: Chapter 935: : You Dead Vampire
chapters.body:
Chapter 935: : You Dead Vampire

"Jiao Nanluo? Do you know?" Chen Mo looked at everyone around him.

Generally speaking, the rescuer will not say his name, and then ask others to save him, unless the other party is really famous, he will declare his identity.

"Jing God King, his subordinates don't know." Ku Yao shook his head.

"Dont look at me."

Jing Ge said coldly, caring for his bone carving, as if everything around him had nothing to do with him.

"Report to the King of God, I don't know." Ku Tian reluctantly said: "But you can use the universe search engine to check it. If he is really famous and has a high status, there should be records on the interstellar network."

Chen Mo's eyes lit up, and he pronounced Joel Nanro's name pronunciation to the spacecraft's artificial intelligence.

Sure enough, a piece of identity information popped up.

Joel Nanluo, a humanoid of Nansui, a famous life science scientist in the universe, a famous scholar, a god-level life, and a special superpower, the blood has a chance to wake up the superpower of life.

So far, Joel Nanro's blood has created 27,000 top armor divisions, including the King of the Wuxian Dynasty in the Land of Wuxian, the star of the black pupil, the star of the black civilization ...

The famous paper "Exploring the Factor of Superpower Awakening in Nan Luo's Blood" "On the Hidden Effect of Life Consciousness on Superpower Awakening" ...

Chen Mo glanced at his information carefully and understood the purpose of the group of interstellar pirates.

I am afraid that it is not so simple to plunder supplies. Even this person, they also want it.

This Joel Nanro is baby everywhere.

This time I should go to the grand event of the Star Monument, and then I was pulled out by the interstellar pirates, and then I have the present situation.

Chen Mo is not interested in him, but he is very interested in his research projects and his blood.

"Why thank you?" Chen Mo said on the public channel.

...

"Professor, do you say they will shoot?" Aoki Luo said. He is the leader of the Guards' Armored Regiment. Next to him is Joel Nanro, a skin-gully vertical and horizontal face of the surviving human life of the South.

The armored divisions around them all protect Jor Nanluo in the middle, and there is an unexpected situation. They can protect Jorge Nanluo's safety for the first time.

Now that they are in trouble, the gang of interstellar pirates learns that there is a professor in their fleet, and then starts an abacus to prepare to catch the professor alive.

If it were not the idea of the other party to play the professor, their current situation would be more passive and may have been wiped out.

"Not clear."

Joel Nanro shook his head.

In this case, he could not judge that, in terms of the nature of intelligent life seeking benefits and avoiding harm, they are not close to each other and the other party is more likely to choose to leave. Even if they see a similar situation, they will choose to leave.

He just saw the other party's spaceship launching and was about to leave, so he chose to self-report, hoping the other party would help.

From his judgment, the other party should also be a fleet pulled by space interference, but they are one step ahead of the other.

"Now it can't last too long, the intelligent machinery is exhausted. The next is the battle of the armored division. The number of opponents is more than us, and the masters are not less than us. This is the most troublesome."

Aoki Luo was worried between his eyebrows.

"It will take at least two days for the reinforcements to reach us, and we will have been arrested by then. If we know, we will bring more guards and we are not afraid of encountering these interstellar pirates."

"It's your destiny." Gior Nanro glanced at Chen Mo's fleet: "Looking at their spaceship like a caravan of the caravan, they may not have many guards, and even if they do, they may not be useful."

As soon as the words fell, public channels heard sounds.

"Thank you?"

The exchange between Joel Nanro and Aoki Luo paused, and after looking at each other, they found surprise in each other's eyes. Gior Nanro immediately said: "Friends, if you open it, as long as we can do it."

"Refreshing." Chen Mo immediately said: "I want all your research data and half a liter of blood."

Ga? ?

The public communication channel can be heard by all life who opens the channel. Chen Mo's words naturally fall into the ears of other life.

Joel Nanro was petrified immediately, and Aoki Luo was extremely angry, and on the public communication channel, there was a scream.

"Is this friend too much?"

"Do you know the value of the professor's book research and blood? What do you count?"

"Vampire is not a one-time clean."

"You dead vampire."

"Why don't you die?"

"..."

"The professor gave us half, we only need half, and immediately withdrew."

"This is more robber than our robber."

Feeling excited.

Even interstellar pirates couldn't help swearing. If Joel Nanro could give him half of his papers and research data, they would retreat without hesitation and then **** them away all the way.

Because they knew the value of Professor Joel Nanro ’s research, which was sold on the black market, and the money they received was enough for their war armor to grow several times.

"I don't want the exclusive ownership of these research projects, nor let him give me a lifetime effect, and I don't want the signature of the paper. Just take a look at the paper. If you come to another ruthless group, these conditions are not limited. With a little blood, I do n’t think about it, I do n’t think it ’s more valuable than your life. ”

Chen Mo's words made the screams of public channels stop abruptly.

Immediately, a more terrifying scolding broke out.

"Professor's thesis and blood, don't put it in your eyes? If you don't put it in your eyes, you still want it, why don't you go to heaven?"

"I'm so angry, I want to slap this vampire."

"Lao Tzu now suspects that they are interstellar pirates, and the two teams sing the oboe."

"..."

"Fuck your family, the professor gave us half of the research data, and half of the blood, we immediately retired."

"..."

Not only in the space battlefield, but in the public channel, the war of words between the two sides also scolded.

On the contrary, Chen Mo's spaceship was very quiet, and some guardians took it for granted.

Their **** king has countless research and super-powered development technology leading the entire universe alliance. In Shenwei's view, the **** king asked Joel Nanro's paper to be worthy of the other party.

But no one speaks, the team is disciplined, they cannot speak.

Aoki Luo's face is extremely ugly. When were they traded under such domineering conditions?

"Professor, don't promise him, I will think of a way."

"General Aoki Luo, I see your ability, but this time the protection is not enough, you are also a clever woman who can't cook without rice." Gior Nanro sighed, his voice was helpless.

Aoki squeezed the weapon in his hand, resentful.

"Give these conditions to the interstellar pirates, we can still be safe."

"The meaning is different. For Star Pirates, we are forced to compromise and sum up. For them, we are equal deals. Although I am not capable, I still have the strength and dignity. As he said, maybe I have something like this to others. In terms of, it is nothing. "

Aoki Luo's face was tense, and his face was not convinced. He hated his incompetence. He knew that the professor was right, even if it was a transaction, they could not compromise with the interstellar pirates.

And here, Joel Nanro has said: "Friend, as long as you agree, my research projects and data, you will not publish it to the outside world, and will not sell it to third parties. I promise your terms."

"Yes." Chen Mo agreed without hesitation.

He is also a researcher. He naturally knows what a research project thinks of a researcher. Some researchers think that their project is more important than life. It is not easy to compromise this step.

"It's a word." Joel Nanro's affirmative voice came.

"Ready for battle." Chen Mo ordered.

After the disguised spaceship, fangs were exposed.

chapters.title: Chapter 936: :Massacre
chapters.body:
Chapter 936: :Massacre

The ultra-high-energy laser cannon, antimatter, and energy shield are all ready, and the seemingly docile and harmless transport spaceship becomes a fierce beast at this moment.

Intelligent machines and violent warfare continue to fall into space, and Shenwei is closely followed, falling into space in an orderly manner.

The situation was tense, and all the violent violent wars passed over the battlefield.

Everything was silent, but fierce.

The seemingly docile transport spaceship turned into a fierce beast, and life on the field changed greatly.

Elite Legion!

Formally the first word that came out of their heads.

A strong legion, even a top-level civilization, cannot be so strict.

Whether it is an interstellar pirate, or Aoki Luo's **** group, can not help but a chill. Murderous, murderous and oppressive that can be felt across space.

"Let your armored division retreat." Chen Mo said in an overbearing way on the public channel, no doubt.

Aoki Luo wakes up like a dream.

"All retreat and leave the battlefield."

He was still angry at Chen Mo's request just now, and now he completely forgot.

A terrorist army that has reached this point may not have even the top civilization, and the most terrifying thing is the anti-matter energy response.

Only in an instant, the anti-matter energy reaction reached an unprecedented level.

The densely activated anti-matter bombs, as if they don't want money, are coming towards the battlefield. If you do n’t flee here, there is only one consequence, which is death.

Is this the Legion of Civilization?

This legion surpassed his knowledge of the legion.

"Damn."

Gilam was chilling, and he was still angry about the intervention of this fleet of unknown transporters. Now, it seems that he poured a pot of ice water on his angry head.

Terrorist large warships, ultra-high-energy pulsed lasers, dense anti-matter bombs, and powerful intelligent machinery, strict to terrible armored divisions.

The top legion?

Gilam's scalp is numb.

As interstellar pirates, they have never seen such a densely activated anti-matter bomb, this is a top regular army.

He suddenly remembered a video frequency circulating in the interstellar pirate circle some time ago, a video frequency of a medium-sized interstellar pirate group being instantly destroyed by an unknown war armor group.

Each light group exploded like a star, and the fire group flooded the intelligent machinery and the battlefield.

In the wide space, Ji Lam suddenly felt a little small, terrifyingly small, they had nowhere to escape, too late to think, he was overwhelmed by the light of the light group. More and more light clusters are splitting, occupying space, fear, death, explosion, and light become the main melody, playing the prelude from hell.

The light was gone, and the status of the battlefield was once again exposed to everyone's eyes.

Intelligent machinery is like fallen leaves that have been swept away. The few remaining wreckages float in space, emitting a little spark from time to time. The spaceship shattered, and the flying debris was like sand in the wind.

The only armored division of the interstellar pirate is sparsely scattered in space, and there is still the fear of a terrorist explosion.

Their armor has an energy shield that can withstand ultra-high-energy explosive energy. Except for the armored divisions hit by antimatter bullets, the rest are safe.

Damn it.

Gilam's eyes shattered.

Seeing the fast guardian flying, Jilam's anger overwhelmed his fear, and he was furious.

He worked so hard to manage the pirate regiment for half his life, and destroyed most of them. Now it is almost time to seize Joel Nanro, they can get unimaginable wealth and expand the team.

Now, because of the intervention of this unknown force, everything about him is gone.

"Kill me." Gilam urged the armor and rushed toward Ku Yao, headed.

Big charge.

The sound of the big charge, all pirates flew to the nearest guardian. Even though the pirates still have the fear of just exploding, they can't help themselves.

The regiment ’s armor has the highest temporary control of all armor, which is the same in each armor and regiment. This command can only be used once.

The command of the big charge sounded, and the built-in artificial intelligence of the war armor did not allow them to stand back, otherwise they would be judged to be deserters, and the armor intelligence abolished the power of human control, controlled by artificial intelligence.

Aimed by the anti-matter bullet, Ku Yao is not afraid, avoiding a laser attack, and immediately starting the laser of the war armor.

In just an instant, the giant light ball in space lights up.

The light shrouded in a day, and the picture synthesized by quantum radar was faithfully displayed in front of Ku Yao.

Facing Ji Lam rushing over at a high speed, Ku Yao looked at him and his speed became faster.

puff!

At the moment of the collision, Kuyao's spear pierced his head straight into Jiram's head, as if a long needle pierced the tofu, and hung his body and armor on top of the spear.

The curtain of the massacre opened.

There is no sound, only pulse lasers that appear from time to time, and the light masses of antimatter bombs, the dead space is like a deep hell, and the distant planets are like the quiet pupils overlooking the death.

From start to finish, no more than two hours.

More than two million interstellar pirates, all buried in this icy space.

Gilam died, and the elite senior armor division did not even take a round in the opponent's hands. The scared pirates can't even lift a trace of resistance, no matter how big the space is, they flee desperately from the battlefield.

Aoki Luo is cold all over.

The shot that Ku Yao killed Ji Lam just now, he can see clearly, it is too fast, it is completely like pre-judging the movement of Ji Lam, he solves it with one shot, there is no muddy water, no more gorgeous movements, It's all killing skills.

The top armor division.

He also paid attention to the actions of other **** guards, which were also one or two moves. There is absolutely no second time to kill an opponent with one move.

The interstellar pirate who had just dealt with him just now and made him die hard was slaughtered like a pig at this moment.

Because even for him, in the face of such unreasonable absolute power crushing, he could n’t think of any way to deal with it. It was unreasonable, just like a person was killed by someone with money, they did n’t even resist at all ability.

All-in-one top armor division, top war robot.

The identity of this battle armored fleet is infinitely elevated here in Aoki Luo.

Divine civilization? It seems that without this team, it is not this sign.

Top civilization?

Aoki Luo used the method of elimination to think of all the top civilizations he could think of, but in the end he couldn't think of any top civilization with such a terrible army.

What if this team wants to fight their idea?

He could not think of any possible way to escape safely.

"What do you think?" Joel Nanro changed from a shock at the beginning to a marvel.

"The teacher of a hundred battles." Aoki Luo smiled bitterly.

"Do you know which forces?"

"It's not clear, compared to the Black Eyed Legion of the Black Eyed Civilization, the Thor Thundered Legion of the Thunder God Civilization, but they are not god-level civilizations. [新 笔 趣 阁 www.xxbiquge.xyz]" Aoki Luo definitely said.

"Not a god-level civilization, but a team comparable to the god-level civilization legion."

Just now I was still angry at the Warrior Division of the Guard Group. This time no one abused it. The Guard Group murmured collectively and dared not yell again.

The number of their armored divisions was originally small, and the Interstellar Pirates can force them to step backwards, not to mention the unknown forces that slaughtered the Interstellar Pirates in these two hours. Annoying each other, even killing them, and then grabbing the professor is very simple.

"Professor, the goods have arrived, let's pay." Chen Mo's bland voice came from the Universe Public Communication Channel.

Joel Nanro is now very curious about Chen Mo's identity: "Friends, would you like to see me, thank you in person."

"can."

chapters.title: Chapter 937: : Peer
chapters.body:
Chapter 937: : Peer

Joel Nanro looked at Chen Mo, who was too young in a wheelchair, looking moved. He thought about many possibilities, but did not expect to be a young humanoid.

The heir of a top civilization?

The top prince of civilization?

Or is it the heir to a higher family of god-level civilization?

Aoki Luo around him, his expression moved.

A humanoid young man in a wheelchair is the leader of this top legion, and he is a bit incredible. But no matter how he looked at it, he didn't see anything special about Chen Mo.

Joel Nanro was thinking about Chen Mo's name. He hadn't heard of it. There were countless lives in the Universe Alliance. He had never heard of the name. He thought it was normal. Aoki Luo is also thinking that he is searching for Chen Mo's ethnic group. This kind of person is still a top-level life or even a god-level life. He has never seen it.

The forces of this kind of legion are comparable to the god-level civilization. There are not many in the universe alliance. Many of them have a little impression. There is no similar humanoid life.

Chen Mo's identity became mysterious in Aoki Luo.

"Hello, I'm Joel Nanro. How do you call him? Where are you from?" Joel Nanro said with a smile, and he was happy about the condition Chen Mo wanted. If the Star Pirates took him away, he would end. It will be worse.

"Chen Mo." Chen Mo nodded to the other party. As for the last question, he should not have heard it.

Joel Nanro's reservation about Chen Mo was still expected, and he still laughed and said: "Mr. Chen Mo's men are really capable people, all are top-level armored divisions. In the future, it can be compared with Tong Qing and Thunder."

Aoki Luo's expression changed slightly, yes, this kind of person is too young, but he leads a legion of the top armored division. Dan is a loser, not to mention, Tong Qing and Thunder, at this age, I am afraid that it is just an ordinary armored division.

Although it is not ruled out which heir of the top power, but the heir has this power, the future achievements will not be low.

He is only shoulder to shoulder with Tongqing and Thunder. He does not agree. At present, the two god-level civilizations are the top civilizations in the Universe Alliance. Tongqing and Thunder are also the leaders of the two civilizations.

Unlike Aoki Luo, Kuyao and Kutian, who are nearby, agree with the old man very much.

In their view, the Divine King is the best life in the universe, and no one is too close to the shoulders. Even in their hearts, the pupils of Qing Qing and Thunder are much worse than the Divine King.

Looking at this old man now, it looks a lot better.

"You're welcome." Chen Mo said.

"This is your project data and information, as well as blood." Joel Nanro took out a storage hard drive, and a volume tube with blood frozen.

Ku Tian took over the hard disk and opened it, and all the materials were displayed in front of Chen Mo through the holographic video frequency.

Dense formulas, various graphics, chemical molecules, and general life will be dizzy. Chen Mo glanced at it, all the data and graphics were gathered in his mind, and the content was clear, even if one of the formulas was wrong, he could find it.

Seeing some of these arguments, Chen Mo can understand the meaning without thinking at all.

"Open the" Exploratory Research on the Commonality of the Four-dimensional Consciousness and Superpower of Mu Shi Tianxing "here."

"Yes."

Ku Tian opened one of the papers according to Chen Mo's words.

Pieces of fragments gathered in Chen Mo's mind, and the ideas in it inspired him a little. Gior Nanro ’s research is similar to some of his views.

There is a connection between superpower and higher-dimensional consciousness.

However, no one can explain clearly what a higher dimension is. Now in space, it is obviously not the time to study higher-dimensional consciousness.

"keep it."

"Yes." He was ordered to take the storage hard drive.

"Mr. is also a researcher?" Joel's eyes lit up.

From Chen Mo's thinking of looking at the data in the paper, it can be determined that 90% are researchers, if that is the case, why a top legion guards guard him.

Chen Mo should be the top researcher of a certain god-level civilization or top-level civilization, and it is particularly valuable, so he will be protected in this way.

"That's right."

"I don't know Mr., where do you come from?" Joel Nanro looked friendly. A smile is a uniform expression of humanoid life expressing goodwill in the universe.

"A very distant planet." Chen Mo thought not to think of it. He naturally knew that Joel Nanro wanted to inquire about his origins: "If the professor wants to join us, I can visit you to see my hometown."

"Mr. laughed." Gior Nanluo laughed. Obviously, the possibility was not high. Instead of digging into this issue, he put the topic on the other side: "Is this time Mr. Going to participate in the Tianxingbeidi event?"

"Well." There is no need to hide this Chen Mo.

"Let's go along the way, why not be together? There is also companionship and care." Gior Nanro said.

"The control of your spaceship is given to us, and we must listen to us along the way." Chen Mo looked at Gior Nanro.

"professor……"

Aoki Luo was a little anxious. When he wanted to speak up, he was interrupted by Joel Nanro: "Yes, give a gentleman to command. I will stay here to talk about the research with the gentleman. I believe the gentleman."

Chen Mo took a deep look at Joel Nanro.

...

The shepherd is empty.

Since entering the empty cave, the Sea King War Department led by Wang Hai has been on the road like a bamboo shoot. Now he meets the first strong opponent, the Legion of Shepherd City.

The strength of this legion is not particularly strong, but it is not weak. After all, it is a top civilized legion with space destruction weapons and light speed destruction weapons.

The other party seems to know that they are not good, so they used space weapons and light speed weapons to threaten them from the beginning.

Space weapon bombing was launched in twelve galaxies in an attempt to suppress their warheads into molecules. The most dangerous one was that space weapons exploded at a distance of thirty light points from them. Space weapons are atomized.

Wang Hai did not hesitate to counterattack each other, because the Pandora's box of space weapons was opened, so there was no need to worry about human nature.

After the big deal, use instruments to stop the space diffusion of space weapons. There is enough time, and after the war, a galaxy will only destroy a few stars.

Three hundred space-dimensional weapons were dropped into the Muwu Galaxy.

Among the legionary resident planets they identified, fifteen resident planets were destroyed. Ten million senior soldiers, together with three logistic planets and energy storage planets, were crushed into cosmic debris. Ordinary lives died tens of billions.

Each time he jumped, Wang Hai chose to jump without the threat of space weapons.

The senior army of the Shepherd City, under the full development of the superpower Neptune War Department, did not resist for too long.

Until I met this legion.

In space.

Wang Hai was looking at the legion and played for four days, giving him a better understanding of the tenacity of the legion. If you can't fight, you can run, or call for legions to support.

All the senior armor divisions are commanded by the top armor divisions. For them, the opponent's strength is not strong. The troublesome part is that the opponent's tactics are flexible and difficult to entangle. If you can't fight, you can run away. If you look back, you will feel nauseous or attack you.

Knowing that their strength is invincible, they do not choose a frontal battlefield.

The opponent's tactical choice is very correct.

This is the strongest legion encountered since Wang Hai led the War Department. After searching for a long time, I finally confirmed the position of the opponent's main army.

Carrie looked at the suddenly appearing legion.

As a female star, she is famous in the constellation of Orioles. After the appearance of Hongqiao, she was ordered to protect Hongqiao.

At the beginning, news came from the intelligence department that a legion suddenly invaded the wrangler. She thought that the other party was not strong, but did not expect that the other party did not spend much effort to destroy the other five legions, and came to the Muwu galaxy.

The other party's purpose is a wormhole.

With the images returned by the various legions, she determined that the strength of the opposing soldiers was so abnormal that she was decisive.

So she did not dare to use a hard way, but chose not to fight head-on.

However, the other party did not suffer much from her various sneak attacks. Instead, thousands of space destruction weapons were thrown into the galaxy in the Capricorn system, and countless lives died.

Now, when the other party finds her command post, it is unavoidable that she can't escape.

With the terrible fighting power of the other party, she is basically certain that she has lost.

Tactically, the opponent may not be able to win her, but the opponent's soldiers are powerful, and they will definitely lose in a space encounter, but they have no way back.

surrender? Not possible with her.

"Ready to fight ..."

Suddenly, a rapid communication came, interrupting her instructions. Seeing the communication display, Carrie shuddered and hurriedly connected.

chapters.title: Chapter 938: : Dark Turmoil
chapters.body:
Chapter 938: : Dark Turmoil

In a mansion, the armor lands on the armor platform.

Kirton came out of the armor and, as usual, walked towards his room.

This planet is the base of the Wild Beast Battle Group. As the deputy commander of the Battle Group, he has his own residence. Just back from training, Kirton's eyes were slightly tired, and there was a trace of sorrow.

When the war broke out, the chaotic land became more chaotic, and now the entire chaotic land is undercurrent. He felt that it would not be long before it would be chaotic, and the land of chaos would be shuffled.

As soon as he entered the door, Kirton's pupils shrank, and a stranger was in his mansion.

"Who are you?" Curton frowned at each other, looking alert, wondering why he was in his home.

"The ant nest is calling, the plan is ready to start." The stranger passed a video frequency to Kirton.

Kirton's expression changed slightly.

Hearing the call from the ant nest, he knew what was going on.

After planning for so many years, he joined the Wild Beast Warrior Regiment, from the silent to the top, all the way to the top, he knew that organized assistance in secret. But the organization has never asked him to do anything in particular. He only needs him to stay quiet in the armored regiment, to do things normally, and to perform tasks normally.

His way of ascending is also very smooth, almost integrating himself into the wild beast battle group, and his prestige is getting higher and higher.

Now, he knew that his seed was going to germinate.

...

Hekins flies in the cold and dark space, hoping to escape this disaster.

Assassin's armor division.

He is most familiar with the armor division.

Unexpectedly, he will also become the target of the Assassin Warrior Division today. The blow just now almost killed him.

He was exposed.

In the dark world, identity exposure means that you are not far from death. Not only was he exposed, he just called a few supporters, and none of them responded.

Which organization is dealing with them?

He couldn't think of it at all.

For killer organizations, all other organizations are their enemies, and sometimes even their teammates are their enemies.

boom!

A corrosive mist exploded in front of him.

"Damn."

Hekins' expression changed slightly, and he hurriedly reduced the speed of the armor, daring not to approach.

boom!

Sonic boom came, a pure black armored division suddenly stopped beside him.

Hekins's expression changed greatly, and he did not show it on the quantum radar of his armor. The opponent's armor was displayed on the optical radar.

Hekins, who is used to watching quantum stealth radar, thought of a possibility: quantum stealth battle armor.

Thinking of this, Hekins was cold all over, and they were stared at by the top forces, still the top handful.

Is the land of confusion going to change?

This is the last thought of Higgins.

...

"The head of the wild beast armor regiment was ambushed by unknown forces and died of misfortune"

"All members of the" Blood "organization were assassinated overnight and uprooted"

"Golden Scissors Battle Group Declares War Against the Hornets"

"Jiuhua denied that the assassination was theirs"

...

In a chaotic place, darkness is turbulent.

In a day, as if the gunpowder exploded, dozens of high-level armored regiments were attacked, assassinated, and the armored regiments attacked each other. Even the organized and armored regiments were destroyed overnight.

It's going to change.

The chaotic land where fish and dragons are mixed has become unprecedentedly turbulent.

The conspiracy is flying, and it is constantly revealed which is doing what, the turbulent situation is intensifying. No one who survived in a chaotic place was a good stubble, but now a pot of cold water is poured on the rolling oil.

An invisible hand, tossing the splash in the chaotic land.

Life with a little pattern is clear, the universe is in chaos, and the land of chaos has begun to shuffle.

...

Carrie was sullen and in a bad mood.

She came back from the battlefield alive, but she was removed.

At the last moment, the city host sent a message to negotiate with the other party.

She opposed peace talks and had a quarrel with the city owner, but it was useless, she was powerless. No peace talks is destruction, and the city owner cannot want the shepherd city to be destroyed and annexed.

At the end of the peace talks, the master of the shepherd city promised to abandon the Hongqiao and cede the two constellations in order to preserve the shepherd civilization.

When she led the team back, she was removed from the position of head of the army.

Now she was alone.

Somewhat ironically, they summed up the ground.

But Carrie knew that the city lord's decision was right. Between the land severance and destruction, the city lord chose to sever the land.

She didn't know how to describe her mood.

It can be seen that the forces that suddenly emerged are very powerful, and they penetrated the Shepherd City and destroyed their living power. The unknown force is very powerful, but she has never heard of it. It can be seen how long the other party's tolerance and ambition are.

Now it is basically certain that the Shepherd City has been abolished, and the Shepherd City with its palms abolished, if the other party wants to annex, it is effortless. Although she knew that even the rebellion would perish, only one stood dead, and the other died on knees. The method of death was different, and the time of death was different.

"After so many years in the army, it's time to enjoy life." Carrie laughed at herself, and dropped her armor and put on a long-dusted skirt in the wardrobe.

...

Chen Mo was sitting in a wheelchair, curiously looking at various materials on the Star Monument.

After this period of Xiaoyu's conscious treatment, Chen Mo can now move his two arms. As for other places, he can't move, and the armor cannot be controlled. Chen Mo wanted to move around and could only rely on intelligence to control his movements. Chen Mo was simply comfortable in a wheelchair. After all, his body was not well controlled by the armor.

In the past, the information on the Star Monument was complete.

Hundreds of thousands of civilizations have come to participate in this grand gathering of stars and monuments, where real genius gathers.

He also checked the materials of the previous star and star event. It can be said that this event is the top of almost all fields in the field of physics, mathematics, chemistry, medicine, biology, computer science, military, etc. Scientists, gathered together.

It can really be said that talents are everywhere.

If the space destruction weapons destroy the sky and earth during the grand meeting, the historical development and scientific development of cosmic life will go back more than a thousand years.

Therefore, any type of war department, legion, and armored regiment is strictly prohibited to enter the Star Monument, and it is not allowed to enter with destruction weapons.

Once it is found that there is a legion or life entering with a weapon of destruction, he will become the public enemy of the entire universe of science and civilization, and will also ushered in the pursuit and revenge of the Space Alliance Security Agency.

Ten spaceships, plus twenty of the Jor Nero frigates, although thirty spaceships are large, they are almost negligible in the boundless space.

Aoki Luo looked around and didn't know how to describe it.

The professor stayed on the spaceship. As a guard, he naturally had no reason to leave.

These days, through dialogue with each other, he can still see some information.

Chen Mo, sitting in a wheelchair, is called the God King by many armored divisions.

The opponent is not the heir to a top civilization he suspected, but is already the king. Chen Mo is looking at the map stele of the Star Monument every day, and he has seen it very carefully, as if he has never seen it. Sometimes he communicates with the professor and talks about things he does not understand.

The woman who always guards Chen Mo is called the queen by those armored divisions, and Chen Mo is the king of the gods, the two husband and wife. A cute little animal, especially smart, this woman called the queen, can understand the little animal.

There is also a ruthless man with a bone carving. He was glanced at by the ruthless man, as if stared at by a horrible beast, and he was chilled.

These guards are the most shocking guards that Aoki Luo has seen. They are guarded in their positions from beginning to end. They are truly meticulous, strict and terrible, and usually do not speak, like sculptures.

Aoki Luo couldn't think of any forces that cultivated such a legion, and the discipline was terrifying. Especially when they watched Chen Mo, they were worshipping heroes, sincerely and purely.

He couldn't think of any kind of legion that could defeat this team in battle, perhaps only a god-level civilization.

Suddenly, the scene that appeared on the video frequency made Aoki Luo look shocked.

"The star field is here."

Everyone looked up at the holographic screen, a solitary giant planet appeared on the holographic screen, and the huge universal universal pictograph was printed on the surface of the planet.

Star sign.

chapters.title: Chapter 939: : Qunying Gathering
chapters.body:
Chapter 939: : Qunying Gathering

"This time, it seems more lively than before."

Tong Qing's expression fell into memory and emotion.

He used to rise up here, blockbuster, and become a generation of genius war armor division. Now comes again, but the identity is no longer the same.

"Tara, do you know who is coming?" Tong Qing looked at the female assistant beside him.

"Thunder will come; the representative of the White Star Civilization will also come, the mysterious lady; the corpse civilization talents are dying, and now the corpuscles are in chaos. Dinnamiro will come over.

Ziwei civilization is not clear for the time being. When the maid of Shi Ganxing disappeared after returning home, Zijun will not come, Luo Fatzi ignores the world, other people ca n’t see hope. As for Zidi, without his news, it ’s not Ziwei The representative of civilization. "

Tara said the news she got.

Hitomi Qinglu pondered the color.

Suddenly he remembered a person, Chen Mo, who had traded with him on Shi Ganxing, who had been looking for news of the team all these years, but disappeared.

The forces that can make space connectors, dark matter and anti-matter extraction equipment should not be anonymous.

When meeting at that time, Chen Mo gave him a very strange feeling, as if it was a potential threat.

"Is there any news about Shi Ganxing's ink?"

"No, after the Shiganxing incident, they are missing and the universe is too big." Tara did not know why Master Tongqing cares so much about that life, but in her view, except for the other six god-level civilizations, other civilizations are not theirs. opponent.

"Ok."

Tong Qing nodded slightly and looked at the huge planet ahead.

"go in."

...

"It's finally here." The fox girl smiled and looked around.

Star Monument, a holy place for cosmic wise men and powerful men.

"Uncle Lion, do you say it will be particularly lively this time?" The fox girl looked at the next Lion, exposing her rare daughter.

Lion is very helpless to her, but helpless.

"Information news, Tong Qing, Thunder, and Shui Ling have all come, and several other representatives have come, as well as other top civilizations, all have sent elites, and even the king came. The special period of the universe is now lively. inevitable."

"So we are right." The fox girl said looking at the deep space in the direction of the star monument.

"Huh." Lions did not object to her words: "But this time you can't run around everywhere, otherwise it will be very troublesome in case of chaos."

The Fox Girl didn't refute, and apparently agreed with Lion's words.

In Shi Ganxing, she had a loss.

"I'm looking forward to it now, what will happen to this event."

...

Joel Nanro and others needed to meet up with other friends and enter the outer space of the Star Monument, the two teams parted ways.

Chen Mo's spacecraft followed the guidance and flew into the gravitational field of a terrestrial planet outside the Star Monument.

The outer space of terrestrial planets is very lively. As a space port, there are spaceships parked from all corners of the universe.

All giant private spaceships cannot enter the Starfield and can only be stationed outside the Starfield.

The terrestrial planets at the foot are oxygen-enriched planets. They are beautiful, surrounded by white clouds and green. They look better than the earth and are slightly larger than the earth. Looking down from space, the scenery is not bad.

There are anti-matter supplement bases on it, as well as special cities for stayers to play.

In the distance is a star, which looks larger than the sun.

They can see that every time, a fleet will appear in the space port. Obviously, there are a lot of lives coming here to participate in the star festival.

Stop the spaceship, and place long-range weapons and laser gain media in accordance with the regulations of the Star Monument.

It is now outside the Starfield, just a port.

The span of the Star Monument is only 500 million light-years, which is the smallest of the twelve places.

The place they want is the main star of the celestial monument, Mu Shi Tian Xing, a planet named after Mu Shi Tian Xing.

During the event, all long-range thermal weapons can not be brought into the sky, even if equipped with high-energy pulsed laser armor, the laser gain medium needs to be removed to enter, and anti-matter bombs are not allowed.

Prevent the entry of long-range weapons and high-energy weapons to ensure the safety of the participants during the grand ceremony.

The Universe Alliance also has regulations on the use of force in the Starfield. It is not allowed to use thermal weapons and weapons of mass destruction. It must also use force in the prescribed areas, and it must not affect others.

Chen Mo brought 500 guards into Mu Shi Tianxing. The other guards were managed by Ku Tian and were stationed on the outer planets. When Siran and Uncle Crohn knew about the event, Chen Mo might not be able to take care of them, so they decided to go with their kitten parents. They stay on the periphery.

As he was about to set off, a small solo spacecraft appeared in front of the door of their spacecraft and stopped about two hundred meters away.

An orc-like creature with gray-brown fur, white eyebrows above the eyes, and black eyes that look smart.

The small spacecraft stopped and sent a video message to Chen Mo's spacecraft.

"Welcome adults to visit the Star Monument, I'm Xiong Ming. I don't know if I need a guide. I will be a guide for ten years. I am familiar with the prosperous planets of the Star Monument and the contents of the forests to ensure you have a pleasant journey.

"Guide?" Chen Mo understood, thinking and asking, "How much does it cost?"

"Not expensive, 10,000 star coins a day. During the event, the guides all increased their prices. For 15,000, I did not increase the price. I have a guide license." Xiong Ming also passed the guide license information.

"Then follow it."

Chen Mo motioned for the spacecraft to leave the cabin, followed by two small spaceships behind him, and all the guards were on alert for twelve points.

Xiong Ming's expression was slightly overjoyed, and his heart was relieved. This single business was completed. After requesting permission, he piloted the single spacecraft and disappeared into the leading spaceship that appeared.

"I am honored to serve you adults, I do not know what to call the adults?"

After seeing Chen Mo, Xiong Ming was awe-inspiring. The tall guard guard gave him a great sense of oppression, and he became cautious when speaking.

He knew that most of the people who came to the Star Monument this time were big names.

"My surname is Chen." Chen Mo pointed to several introductions around him: "She is my wife and his surname is Jing."

"Momo wipe ..." Seeing Chen Mo didn't introduce himself, the little mother jumped on Chen Mo and protested.

Chen Mo smiled: "This is a small potato."

Seeing Chen Mo introduce it, the little mother was satisfied with Chen Mo's arm, crawled into Xiao Yu's arms, and continued to nibble on snacks.

"Master Chen, Madam, Lord Jing, Lord Little Potato, everybody guarding Master."

Xiong Ming greeted each other with courtesy and respect. From the opponent's spaceship and armor, it was not the life of ordinary civilization. The ten transport ships were disguised and looked like merchants.

"Masters, are you here to attend the Star Festival? Or come to do business? Or travel?" Xiong Ming asked Chen Mo, his eyesight, naturally can see that Chen Mo is the person in charge of this team.

"Star Festival."

really!

Xiong Ming said secretly, his expression was more respectful.

"Sir, the Star Festival has not officially started, but many representatives of civilizations have come, including the god-level civilizations and the top civilizations. They are all gathered in Mu Shi Tianxing. Master, if you need information about the civilizations involved, I can also find it for you. "

"Give me a copy." Chen Mo said.

"This information costs 20,000 star coins." Xiong Ming said with a smile.

Chen Mo waved his hand, and Ku Yao took out a star coin card: "This is one hundred thousand, along with your guide fee for the next eight days."

"Thank you, this is the representative of civilization that has arrived."

Xiong Ming took the star card naturally and took out a hard disk and handed it to Ku Yao.

"The Star Earth Monument, which our locals call the Star Festival, has been held every 50 years. So far, it has been held for more than 2 million sessions, and it has been inherited for 130 million years. Each time, it will gather the brightest life from the entire universe, The most powerful civilization. The life that can participate in the event is the elite of the elite. "

Xiong Mingshun patted a small flatter.

Chen Mo was expressionless and did not interrupt him. Let him introduce him. He checked the information of the civilizations who came to the meeting.

"The Star Festival, a two-month event focused on the lives of millions of civilizations, will come here and participate in life reaching trillions or even more. This year, there are many more lives involved than in previous years, and There are also many more big figures coming than in previous years. It is rumored that the high-level leaders of the seven god-level civilizations are coming, with Tong Qing and Thunder among them. "

Chen Mo stopped reading the information and asked strangely: "Wouldn't the high-level civilizations of the past come?"

"No." Xiong Ming shook his head: "Except for occasional high-level civilizations, but not as many as this year. This year, it seems that Tong Qing and Thunder have come by themselves, as have other top civilization rulers. The Star Festival is a gathering of great talents. All civilizations want to come here to recruit talents and create various superior conditions. In the past, some civilizations even wanted to marry the princess in order to obtain talents. "

"That's good, maybe I can marry a princess back." Chen Mo quipped.

When the words fell, Chen Mo felt a cold back.

chapters.title: Chapter 940: : Mushi Tianxing
chapters.body:
Chapter 940: : Mushi Tianxing

The Ziyun model walks on the streets of the Star City, surrounded by high-rise buildings, but she is very comfortable and calm. On her face, she can't see a little mood swings, and the cold, noble, independent of her life.

Here is her favorite. You don't have to wear the armor at all times to relax and enjoy life.

Dididi ...

The sound of the communicator made her footsteps pause. Seeing the caller ID, Zi Yun hesitated and connected.

"Ziyun, where are you?" Zimu's holographic video was cast out.

"what's wrong?"

"The Star Lord asks you to represent you to participate in the grand event of the Star Monument."

"I'm looking for super power to develop technology, and I don't have time." Zi Yun said coldly.

"Zi Yun, you can't do this."

Zimu was a little helpless to hear her answer. He knew that Ziyun was in the sky and star monument, and he never went to find the life of 'Chen Mo' because there was no way to start. The universe is too big and there are countless lives. Needle in a haystack.

So he also understands Zi Yun, he is avoiding, in fact, it is more like escaping.

"The star owner knows that you are in the Star Monument, so you are allowed to participate. Some time ago, the technology at home seemed to be a bit breakthrough. The problem of super-power development technology is not so urgent." Zimu said.

Both sides fell silent.

After a while, Zi Yun sighed.

"I'm on the nightless street in the city of stars. Give me your address. I will find you tomorrow."

Hanging up the communication, Zi Yun's expression returned to a cold, speechless for a long time.

...

Xiong Ming was very excited along the way, and determined that Chen Mo was not an ordinary identity. His attitude became more respectful, and he seriously introduced the events of the Star Festival to Chen Mo and others.

If you can make a single order, the income will be better than his previous hard year.

"The lives of top-level civilizations and god-level civilizations will go to the main star to converge and wait for the event to begin. Teams like adults can rent a manor to settle in."

Chen Mo immediately became interested: "It's okay, what manor is recommended?"

"Yes." Xiong Ming was overjoyed, and brought out the holographic picture to introduce it carefully: "Does Mr. prefer that kind of manor? Relying on mountains? Relying on water? Or grassland?"

"Prairie." Chen Mo said.

"A manor like thousands of people living under a thousand lives is a medium-sized group. According to the environment, decoration and specifications, only a medium-sized manor is needed. Now the main star and the surrounding planets, and the manor, if it is on the main star In other words, the price of the manor is ten times more expensive, because many top civilizations and god-level civilizations will choose the main star, other civilizations and individuals, prefer to live on the planet around the main star. "

"What's the price?" Chen Mo thought and asked, "The main star."

Xiong Ming was overjoyed and expressed a bit in his face: "Medium-sized manor, 10 million star coins a day, the star festival is a total of two months, plus now there are a few days before the start of the star festival, all need at least 200 million. "

"It seems not cheap." Chen Mo was also a little surprised at the price.

"Usually only one million is needed, but during the Star Festival, there are many foreign civilizations on the main star, and the demand for the manor is very large. If it is a few days later, it may not even have medium-sized ones. "

Chen Mo didn't care, looking up at Xiaoyu: "Xiaoyu, is the money enough?"

"enough."

"Then go to the main star, and I also want to see what this legendary planet looks like."

Xiong Ming was ecstatic, and this commission was enough for the income he had worked for half a year.

With the input of space coordinates, the people began to fix their bodies, and then, the spaceship jumped and appeared in a new space.

Based on the images displayed by the radar, it is determined that they have reached the outer periphery of the star system where Mushitian star is located.

A spaceship quickly flew over and stopped in front of Chen Mo's spacecraft. Various instruments began to scan Chen Mo's spacecraft to check whether anti-material bombs and other weapons of mass destruction were found.

Any life that wants to enter Mu Shi Tian Xing needs to go through inspections, especially during the star festival, this inspection is more stringent.

A war armor division entered through the hatch and glanced at Chen Mo and others with a stern expression. From the life he has seen, this group of life is definitely a life of great civilization.

"This is your identity card on Mu Shi Tianxing. You can enter your pupil information, face information and fingerprint information into your ID card to facilitate your actions on Mu Shi Tian."

The armored division handed the small box to a guard.

The Xiong Ming around me hurriedly explained: "Every life that enters Mu's Star needs this, and the life of the god-level civilization is no exception. This is to facilitate the administration of the Security Department to prevent life from chaos on the planet and cannot be traced. After the event, the Security Department will delete all the information and will not stay. "

Chen Mo felt the strictness of the Star Festival for the first time, and he signaled that many guards sent down to enter identity information, and he was no exception.

After entering the information, Chen Mo's spacecraft passed the inspection smoothly.

Mushitian star is not large, only five Earths in size, gravity is three times that of the Earth, in the universe, it belongs to an asteroid. Blue, green and purple, there are various other colors, together with white clouds wiped, overlooking in space, very beautiful.

Under the guidance of Xiong Ming, the spacecraft went to the manor where they were stationed.

A manor built on flat grass has a broad view.

The other **** guards were stationed and resting in the manor, while Chen Mo, Xiaoyu, Jing Ge and Ku Yao led the five best guards to leave the manor.

In Mu Shi Tianxing, there are no weapons of mass destruction, no laser weapons, fighting armor with bare hands and ‘cold weapons’ fighting. They are not afraid of anyone, and there are no security issues.

"The city of the star is the most prosperous city of the main star and the largest city, covering an area of 5 million square kilometers. The entire city is owned by the descendant family of Mushitianxing.

The descendant family of Mushi Tianxing is the most prestigious family in the Tianxing monument. They obey the legacy of Mu Shi Tianxing, are permanently neutral, and permanently open all the monuments to the life of the universe. They will not be biased towards any party. Each Star Festival is hosted by their family. "Xiong Mingdao.

Chen Zhenzhen really listened to the news about Mushi Tianxing.

"Every event, they will invite the top civilization and god-level civilization representatives who come to Mu Shi Tianxing to go to the manor of Mu Shi Tianxing family to participate in a banquet."

Xiong Ming could see that Chen Mo was very interested in the news in this regard, so he continued to introduce it.

"They can make friends extensively, gain friendship of great civilizations, and provide a platform for communication. However, that requires a sufficiently high status, a life with enough reputation, or a great civilization to be invited by them."

What he said was very detailed, and Chen Mo was listening carefully.

Soon, the party entered the range of the Star City, a magnificent city in front of them.

"This is the nightless street of the Star City. It is a pedestrian street without war armor. No life can enter it through the armor. It is a special place here." Xiong Ming pointed to the huge commercial city and the aircraft docking station at the top of the building. .

"Then go into the countryside and follow the customs."

A group of people landed from the sky to the aircraft dock.

Entering the City of Stars, all kinds of life are strange, no matter which rare race, many lives are accustomed to, so Chen Mo and his party are not abrupt.

Jing Ge's face was cold, and no one was close to him. He looked like a tall cold man. However, she encountered several humanoid female lives on the road and was very interested in Jing Ge. He followed the party and looked back from time to time, watching Jing Ge whispering and discussing.

Jing Ge's ruthless face also became stiff, and a few female humans beside him began to have fun.

Chen Mo sat in a wheelchair, looked up at Jing Ge, and couldn't help showing a smile on his face. This ten thousand-year-old ruthless man, with a fierce style and looking cold and ruthless, Jing Ge, will be laughed at by several female classmates with unnatural expression.

For a moment, a petite female ran with courage and stopped beside Jing Ge with her big eyes.

"Brother, what is your name?" The female voice is delicate and sweet.

Jing Ge's expression stiffened and he was at a loss.

Chen Mohe laughed and laughed, Xiao Yu pursed his lips and chuckled.

Ku Yao and several **** guards have smiles on their faces, but they dare not laugh. They are professionally trained and generally do n’t laugh unless ...

Several females not far away saw this, all laughed loudly.

Jing Ge heard laughter, a few black lines appeared in his forehead, and he was still at a loss when faced with this petite female.

Seeing Jing Ge not speaking, the female class blinked and blinked her big eyes, stretched out a palm like a beluga skin, and continued to speak: "Brother, my name is Bai Yun, I want to make a friend with you."

At this moment, Jing Ge panicked, and the palm of his hand did not know where to put it, and the whole person became unnatural.

"Hahahahaha ..."

Chen Mo was sitting in a wheelchair, laughing unscrupulously.

"Brother, are you shy? You are so handsome and so shy." The female stared at Jing Ge with a happy face.

Seeing Jing Ge, who hadn't dodged by the top armored division, he didn't dare to look directly at the petite female person in front of him.

"Little sister, my friend is shy, he is not very good at communication, he is single, I give you his phone number and address, you remember to come and play often." Chen Mo passed Jing Ge's phone number and address to the female class The communication device ignored Jing Ge's murderous gaze.

After all, the head of the Manshan clan was also very worried about Jing Ge ’s family, and Chen Mo smiled.

"Thank you." After getting Jing Ge's communication number, the female face was surprised: "Brother, I'm going to go shopping with some sisters. I'll contact you again when I get home. Don't ignore me."

The female person waved at Jing Ge, excitedly running back towards several sisters.

Chen Mo concealed his face and laughed uncontrollably. In the past, when facing the beast with bare hands, even the siege of several top armored divisions did not make Jing Ge so disoriented.

"Jing Ge, seriously I think that girl is good, active and lively, enthusiastic and cheerful, with a personality complementary to you and suitable for you."

Jing Ge gave Chen Mo a blind eye.

chapters.title: Chapter 941: :Meet
chapters.body:
Chapter 941: :Meet

Star City Never Sleeps Street, a bit similar to the shopping malls of Earth City on weekends.

In a manned armor, a jump of an aircraft is tens of millions of light years or even hundreds of millions of light years. This kind of shopping-style life has no fun.

Chen Mo also felt kind.

Here, there is no tension in the other interstellar cities wearing the armor, the picture is harmonious, prosperous and lively.

"This is Nebula Street's largest jewelry city-Nebula Tower. Many lives come to the main star to travel or watch the monuments. They will buy a little souvenirs. Jewelry is a choice for many lives."

Xiong Ming led Chen Mo and his party and stopped in front of a building.

The whole building is crystal and gorgeous, the wall is a transparent crystal brick, the exterior decoration is magnificent, the fluorescence is flowing, under the light, the color is overflowing, and the embellishment of the holographic projection is like a dream.

Each design is just the right golden ratio and looks extremely comfortable. Among the many shops on the Night Street, it is also abrupt and unique. I am afraid that this building will not be cheap to build.

Chen Mo has seen many buildings, but this is the first time he has seen such a dreamy building.

Cosmic life has a natural inclination for brilliant gems. Whether it is primitive intelligent life or present intelligent life, it does not change for the type of life, especially women.

Xiaoyu looked at the Nebula Tower in front of him, his eyes were all shining.

Without waiting for Chen Mo to speak, he pushed his wheelchair in.

Xiong Ming covered up the ecstasy, followed by Fart Bound, and introduced Chen Mo and Xiao Yu.

"The Nebula Tower is the most famous jewelry building in the main star. It has shops in every city of the main star. The boss behind it is also from the Mu Family Star family. Here is a collection of rare and peculiar gemstones from all over the universe, and they are all The highest gem. "

Entering the Nebula Tower, Chen Mo secretly stunned.

The crystal-paved floor, the gold alloy door frame, and even the chairs are all top-quality leather. Under the lights, the interior of the Nebula Tower appears to be dotted under the stars.

On the earth, this kind of decoration can't be imagined, it is extremely extravagant, and it is simply an upstart face.

The interior of Xingyun Building is much larger than Chen Mo imagined. On each counter, gems of different colors are displayed, all kinds of strange and colorful.

A humanoid waitress greeted her with an enthusiastic smile, and led everyone to walk inside: "Welcome to Xingyun Tower, I am very happy to serve you. What do you need to help?"

The waitress glanced at Xiong Ming, and naturally knew he was a guide. They cooperated with many guides, and the guides were divided. Xiong Ming was not the first to bring people into the Nebula Tower.

There are countless different gems, some of which are introverted, some of them can shine by themselves, like breathing. At a glance, there are 99% of gems that Chen Mo can't call the name.

Although Chen Mo has extensive knowledge, he doesn't know much about the gem of the universe.

He was a little amazed, but the others were expressionless and unmoved by the jewels in front of him.

Jing Ge-Leng is like an ice cube, ignoring the world, any gemstones before him, in his opinion, are stones. Including Kuyao, a few guardians, he does not have a cold for these gorgeous stones.

"Is there any special gemstone of Mu Shi Tianxing?" Xiao Yu asked curiously.

"Yes, ma'am, you are right. We have the best gemstone of Mushi Tianxing, Tianxing jade. This kind of jade, which has been mined in Mushitianxing for many years, is extremely scarce. It has beauty skin care for humans. The anti-aging effects in our store are the best Tianxingyu. "

The waitress led Xiaoyu and Chen Mo, and walked over to the counter, pointing to the colorful fluorescent stones, rings, pendants, bracelets on the counter.

"The most distinctive feature is this jade brand, which is designed to imitate the star map stele and engraved with some famous quotes from Mu Shi Tianxing."

Chen Mo held the jade hand in his hand, and the touch was cold, delicate, and slightly heavier than earth jade.

"Buy a few, go back and give the parents and Mo Nu as gifts for them." Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo.

"Well, you just pick it." Chen Mo handed the jade card back to the waitress.

"Hole."

Xiao Yu was immediately polite, carefully selected his favorite gems on the counter, a shopaholic gesture.

...

"Miss Ziyun, what a coincidence, we meet again."

A humanoid walked far to Ziyun, with an elegant and confident smile on his face. Seeing someone coming, Zi Yun's cold face flashed a little helpless. He responded softly, and walked on his own, seeming not to bother him.

Mu's longevity, the heir to Mu's star. Half a year ago, she saw Mu Shi Tianxing's super-powered research and development manuscript in the Star Forest, and encountered Mu Shi Changsheng. Then he was chased and swayed, and he couldn't get rid of it. Over time, Ziyun will follow its natural course.

But for the cheeky face of Mu Shi's longevity, Zi Yun was helpless.

Mu's longevity didn't care, and a familiar look followed her: "How is your research?"

"No progress." Zi Yun's face was indifferent, his voice cold.

"That kind of technology is really troublesome. I will lend you the draft notes of my ancestors' research someday." Mu Shi Changsheng said: "Is it helpful to you?"

"No, there is on the map." Zi Yun remained unmoved.

"It's a little bit different."

"It's almost the same." Zi Yun glanced at Mu Shi Changsheng: "What are you looking for me for?"

"It's really something." Mu's longevity brought out an exquisite invitation. The size of the palm, the pattern is very complicated, and the universal hieroglyphic calligraphy looks very beautiful: "Your representative of the Lagerstroemia civilization should be the main star. Here you are, I hope you can represent Ziwei civilization at the banquet. "

Ziyun took a look at the delicate invitations and put them away, admiring the scenery of the nightless street.

"Shall I go shopping with you? I'm very familiar here." Mu's longevity kept up with it again, still with an elegant smile on his face, and was already accustomed to Ziyun's coldness.

"No need to."

"I'm the landlord here, and I should do my best." Mu Shichangsheng didn't seem to hear Ziyun's rejection. Changsheng pointed to the Nebula Tower not far away: "The front is the Nebula Street, and I'll show you over Well, just choose some jewelry for the banquet. "

Zi Yun Mei Dai twitched slightly, paused, or walked towards the Xingyun Tower.

Seeing Zi Yun's past, Mu's longevity looked slightly happy.

"I tell you, there are rare gemstones from all civilizations in the universe in the Nebula Tower, which is very rare ..."

Nagging along the way, Zi Yun is very helpless, but Mu Shi Tian Xing is the site of the descendants of Mu Shi Tian Xing family.

"What kind of life will come for this banquet?" I can't stand the nagging of Mu's longevity, Zi Yun opened his mouth and might as well let him talk about some useful information.

"There are many, and nothing can't be disclosed." Mu's longevity saw Zi Yun talking to him, and he was immediately overjoyed: "Tuqing, Thunder, Baixing Civilization's Hu Bingxin, Water Ling, Dinan Miró, and a corpse civilization High-level Ming Qiyu.
