There are many top-level civilizations. This year's banquet is larger than in previous years. Famous scholars in various fields are also invited. "

Between the two, the two went to the door of Xingyun Tower.

At the moment of entering the gate, Ziyun's pupils contracted, his expression stunned, and he settled in place. Mu Shitian stared for a moment, followed her gaze to the Nebula Hall.

Chen Mo was waiting for Xiao Yu to choose jewelry. Suddenly, he felt something and turned to look at the door.

The two are facing each other.

The air seemed heavy.

chapters.title: Chapter 942: : A Long Time Ago
chapters.body:
Chapter 942: : A Long Time Ago

In the Xingyun Building, other customers did not find anything strange, but the air between Chen Mo and Zi Yun became very quiet. Jing Ge and Ku Yao also found the appearance of Zi Yun.

Xiao Yu, who was still choosing jewelry, felt wrong, and found Chen Mo's attention at the door, and stopped to look at the past.

Xiong Ming was the most shocked. He was a guide and was well informed. Mu's longevity is present, and there is a life of crape myrtle civilization. The crape myrtle flower logo on Zi Yun's clothes can never be wrong.

It is the representative of the Ziwei civilization who will be able to accompany Mu's longevity.

This big man seems to know the man around him.

Xiong Ming swallowed saliva, dared not speak, and moved without leaving any traces, retreating to an inconspicuous position.

Chen Mo and Zi Yun faced each other, they watched quietly, and recognized each other's identity.

Chen Mo is no stranger to this female life.

For a moment, Zi Yun took a step forward, and the models passed towards Chen Mo. The atmosphere instantly became more tense, and Ku Yao moved his feet and stood in front of Chen Mo, preparing to summon the Warframe, when Chen Mo reached out and stopped.

"long time no see."

Zi Yun stopped two meters in front of Chen Mo and spoke coldly. He greeted him simply, but it seemed as if he had n’t seen his friend for years.

"Long time no see." Chen Mo replied.

Xiao Yu seemed to know that something was wrong, and stood quietly behind Chen Mo, looking at Zi Yun.

"Who is he?" Mu's longevity looked at Chen Mo doubtfully and asked Zi Yun in a low voice.

"A long-time friend."

Zi Yun's gaze is still on Chen Mo, wondering why he is sitting in a wheelchair. At the current medical level of the universe, there are not many diseases and injuries that can make life sit in a wheelchair.

"Hello, my name is Mu's Changsheng, Ziyun's friend." Mu's Changsheng introduced himself humbly and reached out to Chen Mo.

"Chen Mo." Chen Mo reached out and shook his hand briefly.

"Can you chat?" Zi Yun spoke again.

Chen Mo thought for a while: "Yes."

In the VIP room of Xingyun Building, Chen Mo and Zi Yun sat opposite each other, and the others were outside. The two met only in a hurry when they were in Qingshuixing. They were not officially known, but they knew each other.

"My name is Ziyun." Ziyun spoke first.

"Chen Mo." Chen Mo said.

Both were looking at each other, Zi Yun's deep purple pupil flashed, and finally gave Chen Mo a deep look. Chen Mo also gave her a deep look. Just now he felt that his heart was being peeped, but it was useless to him.

Chen Mo didn't speak until Ziyun's following.

"In the origin city, are you not with the cat?" Zi Yun stared at Chen Mo, hoping to find the answer from his face.

"Cat?" Chen Mo immediately thought of the orc-like life of that suit: "No."

"Are you interested in joining Ziwei civilization."

"No interest." Chen Mo refused without hesitation.

"You can get everything you want." Zi Yun hesitated and said: "In the future, you can even inherit the position of the star owner."

"Star Master?"

"Yes, you are good enough and have this ability, we can find a way to cure your disease." Zi Yun said.

Chen Mo shook his head and smiled: "I'm not ill, you can't be cured, and I'm not interested in the position of your star master. If you want to say this, then it's unnecessary."

"Why?" Zi Yun asked.

The Ziwei civilization is the oldest god-level civilization and belongs to one of the cosmic overlords. Countless life dreams of joining, but the Ziwei civilization is extremely harsh on the conditions for accepting foreign life.

But now, Chen Mo refused her without hesitation, and even released the conditions of the star owner, as well as herself, still refused, making her wonder.

"Do you need a reason?" Chen Mo asked back.

Both were silent, and the atmosphere in the VIP room fell silent. Chen Mo was very relaxed, Zi Yun didn't know what he was thinking.

"Make a deal and sell me super-powered development technology, you can open the terms."

"Who told you that I have the ability to develop technology?" Chen Mo stared straight at Ziyun, jokingly said: "Are you looking for the wrong person?"

Zi Yun and Chen Mo stared at each other

"We want you, not just the problem of killing Zeqi. To save the experimenter of the Demon Flame Civilization, their superpower potion should also have a copy in your hands."

"Check it very clearly"

Chen Mo did not deny it. Both of them are clever people, and traces of it can be found. It is not uncommon for Zi Yun to confirm that Ash 21 is in his hand.

"Any conditions you say, including yourself?"

Zi Yun paused without changing his face: "If you want, you can."

Chen Mo was stunned. He didn't expect that this woman's life promised to be so refreshing. She couldn't help but glance at her more. At the expense of his own body, it is an insult to the proud god-level women, especially the important senior leaders of the Ziwei civilization.

But this woman was just hesitating for a moment, showing how high she desires to develop technology for superpowers.

"I am not interested in you."

"You think about it, my communication number is for you, you can contact me under any conditions, as long as I can do it. And the conditions I just said, also count, as long as you can join the Ziwei civilization, the future star master, The probability is yours. "

Zi Yun handed her communication number to Chen Mo.

Everyone outside the VIP room was waiting quietly. Especially Shenwei, who fixed his eyes on the door without moving, if he felt wrong, he rushed in as soon as possible.

The door opened, and everyone immediately came to the spirit.

Zi Yun came out from inside, his expression was as cold as ever, as if nothing had happened.

Chen Mo sat in a wheelchair and came out automatically from there. There was nothing special about it. Xiaoyu and Shenwei, who were anxiously waiting, were relieved. They were really afraid that Zi Yun was in the VIP room.

"Zi Yun, how do you talk about things?" Mu Shichangsheng walked to Zi Yun and asked curiously.

"Good," Zi Yun said.

"That's good, since it's Ziyun's friend, Mr. Chen Mo is definitely not an ordinary life. Please accept this invitation and welcome to our family's manor for the banquet."

Mu's longevity took out an invitation from his body and handed it to Chen Mo modestly.

"Thank you." Chen Mo took it without hesitation.

Until Chen Mo and others left from Xingyun Tower, Zi Yun looked at Chen Mo's back and pondered.

"Who are they? Unlike your friends." Mu's longevity asked curiously.

"Really not a friend, remember the Shigan galaxy event?"

"Remember, was he there at the time?"

The big civilizations and big groups of the universe know very well about the battle of the Shigan Galaxy. That is the origin of the chaos in the universe.

When Dan was killed, the first heir to Thor's civilization lost its best candidate, or Thunder's sudden rise, defeating the Speaker of Black Hitomi Civilization, and accepting the throne of Thor's civilization, only stabilized Thor's civilization.

"It's still the protagonist, the endless sea of the alliance, killing the Ode in the dark forest, and selling the space connector to Tong Qing's life. That transaction allowed Tong Qing to master the space connector and send the military's space weapons into the Shigan Galaxy Finally, Dan was killed by Tong Qing. He offended three god-level civilizations, to be precise, four. "

"Not two?"

"He is also the murderer who killed Zeqi, the wanted criminal of Ziwei civilization." As for Chen Mo's stealing of the experimental body of Moyan civilization from Baixing civilization, Ziyun didn't say.

Mushi Changsheng's pupils shrink.

...

"That woman is very dangerous." Jing Ge said abruptly when he left the Nebula Tower.

"If you have the ability, I just wanted to spy on me in the VIP room. It should be similar to mind reading." Chen Mo said. His current body can clearly feel Ziyun's peeping, but the other party's ability does not work for him.

"Who is she?" Xiaoyu still puzzled.

"Ziwei Civilization, Ziwei Civilization wanted me, the probability is related to her." Chen Mo said.

"So what did you say just now?"

"She invited me to join Ziwei Civilization, and said that I can be a star host in the future, but I didn't agree. She asked me to sell her super power technology to her, so that she would be willing to change her body for anything."

Chen Mo looked up and saw Xiaoyu's terrible look, his eyelids jumped, realizing that he had said the wrong thing.

"Let her exchange with the body?"

"I'm kidding." Chen Mo immediately counseled.

"Just kidding?" Xiao Yu's face had a "gentle" smile: "Then did you agree? Dear husband."

chapters.title: Chapter 943: : Star Forest
chapters.body:
Chapter 943: : Star Forest

"Master Mingyue, the patriarch has something to tell you." A messenger took a secret communication device and handed it to Mingyue Liuhua.

Seeing someone coming, Mingyue Liuhua's eyes flashed with disgust. She is not an abhorrence of messengers, but all other official personnel who are abhorrent to the corpus. But at this time, she had a bad attack and took over the communicator.

When the messenger left the room, the secret communication device in the hands of Mingyue Liuhua sounded.

Seeing the old patriarch appearing in the holographic projection, Mingyue Liuhua was expressionless and extremely cold, even if the other party was the supreme ruler of the corpse civilization, she did not catch a cold.

"what's up?"

"Mingyue, you go to take the Sloan Great Wall." There was a trace of tiredness in the voice of the old patriarch, and there was sorrow hidden in his eyes. Obviously, the situation of the corpse civilization is not good now.

"Are you crazy, then go to attack the Sloan Great Wall." Mingyue Liuhua sneered unabashedly.

"The Hongqiao of the Sloan Great Wall is very sensitive and cannot be controlled by the Sloan Civilization, otherwise the future will be even greater." The patriarch's tone was slightly solemn: "If we don't deal with the Hongqiao, we will be handcuffed.

"It's impossible, I'm not interested."

"Take down the Sloane Great Wall, and I pass the position of the patriarch to Ming A." The old patriarch threw his condition.

"A mess, do you want to harm Young Brother Aung? He is not interested in inheriting the mess you left behind, a group of wine bags and rice bags, occupying the pits without shit." Mingyue Liuhua mocked.

"I will clean up before I abdicate."

Mingyue Liuhua was silent, her eyes flashing constantly, and she admitted that she was persuaded.

"At that time, I hope you can fulfill your promise, otherwise, I will work hard with you." After that, Mingyue Liuhua cut off the communication in his hand, sorted his emotions, and got up and left.

"Now Muwu Hongqiao controls, 1.3 million space interferometers have been arranged around the Hongqiao, within a light-year range, there is no need to worry about being bombed by space-destroying weapons."

Wang Hai reported the news to Lan.

A spatial interferometer is an instrument that interferes with space. Its role is only one, to maintain the stability of the spatial amplitude state. This instrument is just the opposite of space destruction weapons, it can prevent the spread of space destruction weapons to space dimensionality reduction.

This is a machine used to eliminate space dimensionality reduction and restore space stability after the war. It can also prevent the spread of space dimensionality reduction.

"Good." Lan heard the news and was shocked.

With Muwu Hongqiao in their hands, they have one more strategic choice. Without space weapon bombing, it is purely a war of the war department. In this case, they have a sufficiently strong war department and are not afraid of any civilization.

"Next is the Sloan Great Wall ..."

Dididi ...

The war department's screen suddenly jumped, and a hundred thousand hot news appeared on the screen. Seeing the news, everyone in the War Department was shocked.

The corpses of civilized forces converge towards Baiwu Hongqiao.

The light in Lan's eyes skyrocketed.

This news was undoubtedly when someone was over when they were sleepy.

"Wu Mu, you prepare for the guardian warfare, and choose an opportunity to attack the Sloan civilization. You cannot let the Sloan Great Wall fall into the hands of the corpse civilization. The location of the Baiwu Hongqiao is a key position in the corpse civilization. The corpse civilization is restless. If they take the Sloan Wall, they will be threatened here. "

"Yes, sir." Wat Mu was pleasantly surprised and immediately ordered his life.

After the establishment of the war department, he was more responsible for the affairs in the small universe. He has not been fighting very well, and has been training tactics in the virtual reality world. The wars of the backward civilization of the small universe can no longer satisfy his ability. He now urgently needs more powerful opponents to hone.

...

"Adult, thirty-seven chess pieces, nineteen successful, destroying two opponent organizations, but now we are facing a situation." Zhi looked at the distribution of power in the chaotic land and fell into contemplation.

Everyone looked at Zhi.

Wisdom is the brain of the core team. The dark turmoil in the chaotic land is the situation in which he activates the **** and pushes with one hand.

Thirty-seven chess pieces, nineteen successful, more than half the success rate, this is already a very good result. In their hands, they now control the 19 forces in the Land of Chaos.

"What's the situation?" The poison skin girl asked coldly.

"Big but not strong." Zhi said.

Everyone else was puzzled, waiting for Zhi's answer.

"We control nineteen forces now, but they do n’t know each other ’s enemies and friends, and they have no alliances and unified control. The nineteen forces, without special formal training, have insufficient cohesion and combat effectiveness compared to the Legion of Civilization. Insufficient, it is quite a mess. We lack generals of strategy. If we want to unify the chaotic land, we must have a general who is good at commanding and planning, and commanding the layout of their 19 forces to become a fire. "

Chi sends the puzzle back to the poison skin girl.

"Aren't you okay?" The poison skin girl asked.

"I'm good at conspiracy, but I'm not good at Yangmou, and I don't know how to lead soldiers to fight." Zhi spread his hands, expressing powerlessness.

The poisoned skin woman pondered and spoke for a long time: "I'll find a way."

...

"Do you really plan to go to the banquet of the Mu Family Star Family?" Xiao Yu's voice was deeply worried.

She couldn't help worrying about it. Chen Mo offended several god-level civilizations on the Shigan Galaxy. It can be said that the chaos in the Shigan Galaxy was created by Chen Mo.

Ziwei civilization does not say, knowing that they have super ability to develop technology in their hands, will certainly not be willing to give up.

Chen Mo disrupted the layout of the White Star civilization, causing the White Star civilization to fail against the Mo Yan civilization. The dark forest civilization has a grudge against Chen Mo. The death of Raytheon Civilization Pill is also indirectly related to Chen Mo.

If at the banquet, Chen Mo was attacked by the group, she would be extremely troublesome.

"Go and meet the world." Chen Mo didn't care.

"You are broad-minded, and I find that you can cause trouble." Xiao Yu said.

Offending the four god-level civilizations at once, no life has this honor.

"Okay, hehe." Chen Mo smiled awkwardly.

"Sir, the Star Forest is here." Ku Yao opened his mouth and interrupted Chen Mo's conversation with Xiaoyu.

The battle armor floats in front of them, and it is an endless figure.

Chen Mo was attracted by the sight in front of him. Towering into the clouds, the monument is engraved with clear text, and the material of the monument is unknown, even after 100 million years of wind and rain, it is still intact.

The text with big fingers is covered with figure steles, and some of them have dense formulas and graphics.

This is the map stele left by Mu Shi Tianxing, the Tianxing Stele Forest.

Chen Mo can see that on each tablet, there are many lives watching and even recording. The life that can come here is mostly high-level life above green level, and there is no lack of top-level life of indigo level.

The Star Monument Forest stretches over 200,000 square kilometers, and the contribution of these monuments to the cosmic civilization is enormous. Even Chen Mo, who saw such a huge forest of monuments, admired Mu Shixing very much.

Engrave the research achievements of lifelong life on the stone tablet without reservation, and expose it to the life of the whole universe, so that the whole life and civilization can be transcribed and learned, and use this to develop science and technology, promote the progress of civilization, and even guide the evolution of life awakening superpowers.

This bold and selfless mind can fully bear the greatest life in the universe.

The style of this pioneer of civilization is unprecedented.

In front of Chen Mo's eyes, the Stele Forest towering into the clouds became taller.

chapters.title: Chapter 944: : Universe Ontology And Parity Not Conserved
chapters.body:
Chapter 944: : Universe Ontology And Parity Not Conserved

Chen Mo's goal is very obvious, that is, the study of the philosophical consciousness of the fourth dimension of Mu Shi Tianxing, the theory of the universe, and the mathematical model of the existence of higher dimensions.

This is the main research of Mushi Tianxing on the fourth dimension.

In the science and technology library, he has read about the study of the fourth dimension consciousness. Now that he can have the stone of other mountains, he is definitely not willing to miss it.

Chen Mo is not very interested in other technical map monuments and math and physics research map monuments. He has mastered these techniques long ago, and he is more complete and complete than Mu Shi Tianxing.

There are more than 20 map steles in the cosmological ontology. The map steles where this part of the content is located have fewer lives than other map steles.

When Chen Mo and his party arrived, they had enough space for them to read.

The thumb-sized word and twenty towering monuments record a lot of content.

The first chapter of the universe's ontology is the parity-non-conservation law.

Among the basic particles of the universe, there are three ways of symmetry, namely charge symmetry, space reflection symmetry, and time inversion symmetry. However, microscopic particle experiments prove that the three symmetry methods do not exist.

The behavior of particles and antiparticles is not the same. Due to the slightly different physical laws, the charge of the particles is asymmetric.

At the beginning of the Big Bang, there was a little more positive matter than antimatter. After the annihilation of positive matter and antimatter, the remaining positive matter formed the universe we know today. If the matter is strictly symmetrical, the universe should not exist after the Big Bang.

It is the difference between the particles that, after interaction, has created this wonderful and varied universe today.

Regarding the law of asymmetry of electric charges, Mu's celestial star guessed the existence of the antimatter universe.

In a certain time and space they didn't know, after the universe exploded, the remaining amount of antimatter was more than that of positive matter, forming a universe that was completely different from their current cosmic laws.

The most interesting third type of time inversion is asymmetry.

It is the same as the earth's parity non-conservation law, and the study of Mu's celestial star is also not conserved. It is the directionality of time, and time is directional.

The conversion process between the two particles requires different time for reversal. This is the law.

And Mu Shixing guessed the possibility of space-time travel, and each time-space travel, whether willing or not, will create a space-time parallel universe.

Because when the time traveler returns to the past world, even if he breathes a breath of air, he will interfere with the particles of the original universe. The universe particles are no longer the same state as in the past. The existence of the butterfly effect makes the two no longer the same universe.

And the life that can change this parallel universe state is the fourth dimension life. Life in the fourth dimension can control all matter in the universe. Life interference in the fourth dimension can twist the time axis and particles of the two universes back to the original trajectory.

Very mysterious conjecture.

As for the second chapter of the universe's ontology, Mu's star is another guess: the universe is the corpse of life in the fourth dimension.

A terrible guess.

The Big Bang is the moment of death in the fourth dimension.

All life and matter in the universe are ‘bacteria’ on the corpse of life in the fourth dimension. If life consciousness in the universe breaks through the fourth dimension, everything in the ‘body’ can be controlled.

There are five kinds of conjectures set up by Mushitianxing about the existence of the universe. No matter what kind of situation, the conjectures have a common feature.

The fourth dimension of life belongs to detachment. He is everywhere and can control all matter in the universe, including the time axis, space axis and particle trajectory, and even control the parallel universe.

Chen Mo thoughtfully.

These remarks, like the last atom in communicating thoughts, opened up Chen Mo's original thoughts.

All research and materials about the fourth dimension of life in the science and technology library are combined and evolved in Chen Mo's brain.

Chen Mo seemed to be enchanted, staring blankly at the monument.

Xiao Yuxin felt a little bit, and let everyone back away slightly, so that they would not be close to Chen Mo.

She has been with Chen Mo all the year round, and naturally knows that this inspiration is fleeting. Sometimes there are countless technical accumulations, and all research is done step by step, but the last point of inspiration does not appear, and it will always be stuck there.

Xiaoyu has seen a lot about what happened to research technology. Sometimes, a technological breakthrough that has not progressed for a long time may just be heard on the road. Not how powerful that sentence was, but the domino that touched the researcher's mind at that moment.

Jing Ge and Ku Yao and others backed away a little and surrounded Chen Mo in mid-air, preventing other lives from approaching.

Each life has a different consciousness of looking at the monument, and the things it sees are naturally different, because the world is different between life. If Chen Mo can gain something here, it will be a surprise to them.

"This life seems to be capable of awakening."

"Look, it looks like."

"Wait and see."

"Unlike the pretended ones, look at the judgment of the life spectrum camera."

Next to the stele, a few lives looked at Chen Mo, motionless, whispering and discussing. According to past life awakening super powers, similar situations will occur.

Suddenly, the onlookers increased their lives.

"Holographic video frequency."

A low cry of exclamation sounded, and Chen Mo was floating on the map stele. He was captured by the camera and sent to the holographic video frequency of the Star Forest.

This scene is seen throughout the Star Forest.

The life spectrum is different and was captured by Beilin's camera. Chen Mo's body is indeed changing.

The life spectrum camera is specially prepared for the evolving life. It can monitor the changes of life cells and body tissue structure. The level of life will be expressed through the spectrum.

In the Star Forest, it is through this method to determine whether life is rapidly evolving.

"His life spectrum is curious, have you seen it?"

"Not seen, see you for the first time."

"Is another god-level life born?"

"Why am I not so lucky?"

"Remember the map stele of his position, wait a moment to see it."

"..."

Endless streams of life gathered at Chen Mo's location, and looked at him from afar, no one dared to step forward to disturb, this is already the rule of the Star Forest.

Disturbing others when they are awakening ability will attract siege from other lives, which is directly a life and death feud. Afterwards, they will also be wanted by the Security Department, and the consequences will naturally be punished.

Without the knowledge of both parties, no one wants to have another enemy, let alone go to live in a free room, unless psychologically distorted life.

"This should attract the attention of the great civilization?"

"Absolutely, joining a big civilization is a matter of hard work."

"I don't know which great civilization will be taken away."

"The first genius figure at the Star Festival is here."

"..."

There was endless discussion.

The shadow frequency is spread all over the Star Forest and the life of the Star Forest is paying attention to Chen Mo.

At the beginning of the Star Festival, is there a life awakening ability?

The video frequency spreads throughout Mu Shi Tianxing through the news live channel. Two months without life, he awakened superpowers in the Star Forest, and countless eyes stared at Chen Mo's holographic video frequency enviously.

At the beginning, it is necessary to push the celestial event to a climax.

"It's him." Zi Yun looked up at the video frequency of the tall building, and his cold expression changed.

Chen Mo and her were only a few hours apart, and now there is such a big noise in the Star Forest.

The spectrum of life is indeed changing drastically. Although this kind of spectrum, they don't understand what it means, only think that this is the spectrum where special superpowers appear.

Does she know that Chen Mo has the ability to develop superpowers, is it the second superpower now?

"It seems that Zi Yun is right, he is really not ordinary." Mu's longevity looked at the video frequency in amazement.

How many lives have been spent in the Star Forest, and the gains are not big, but Chen Mo just passed by, and made such a big noise, envying countless lives, it seems that the invitation was sent right.

chapters.title: Chapter 945: : Just Have Fun
chapters.body:
Chapter 945: : Just Have Fun

"It's him."

Joel Nanro looked at Chen Mo in the video frequency with shock.

Chen Mo came along with him, he had more or less been in contact with Chen Mo for some time.

A very mysterious youth.

When discussing the research with Chen Mo, he could clearly feel his shortcomings. Chen Mo's knowledge, like a bottomless hole, involves all aspects. When discussing with Chen Mo, he couldn't even keep up with the other party, and the other party could even make a difference.

However, from beginning to end, he did not see which side Chen Mo belonged to.

Aoki Luo was equally shocked. At the beginning, the transaction between Gior Nanro and Chen Mo made him very uncomfortable. However, it was later discovered that Chen Mo's ability in scientific research did not seem to be inferior to that of Joel Nanro, so he gradually relieved.

Now seeing Chen Mo appearing on the holographic video frequency of the Star Forest, he was shocked.

He knows what the holographic video frequency of that stele forest means, it is possible to awaken the ability and become a god-level life.

And he, will become the genius character that countless top civilizations compete for, and may even be regarded by god-level civilization.

"Professor, do you say he will be selected by the seven god-level civilizations?" Aoki Luo turned to Joel Nanro.

"It's hard to say, but the first genius figure to appear in this star event will definitely be noticed by the major civilizations, and even release the conditions as their own." Gior Nanro said.

The existence of the Star Monument has become a cradle of cosmic talents.

The major civilizations have institutions or offices stationed in the Tianxingbei site, just to gather the genius characters who appear in the Tianxingbei Forest and to continuously input blood for their civilization.

"However, it's too much attention, it's out of the limelight, I'm afraid it will cause a lot of trouble." Aoki Luo said.

...

Chen Mo is immersed in the harvest. He is exploring the existence of the fourth dimension.

Even recalling the momentary feeling in the quantum life sphere.

In Chen Mo's thinking, many things have a common point in common, but he feels that he only sees the appearance. Like two-dimensional life, thinking about the height of the two-dimensional world.

His body is a special existence, but his consciousness has not yet reached the step of special existence.

The obvious point is the technology library.

The Quantum Life Sphere experiment was a success, but after [Technology Manager · God], the Science and Technology Library did not give the next task, nor did it give the authority for the next step.

Until now, he has not completely controlled the technology library.

Obviously, it is only when he becomes a quantum life that he can give the answer to the last step.

The ability to manipulate the consciousness of matter particles, space, time, and even all life in the universe, this trembling ability is the creator in the definition.

It can be determined from the research of Mu Shi Tianxing that he is also looking for himself to break through the divine life and evolve into an incredible state of life.

It was just that he failed and did not find a door into the fourth dimension.

Mushi Tianxing left these monument forests with only one purpose, so that younger generations of the universe can explore the existence of higher dimensions on the basis of his research.

Chen Mo can't understand what a high dimension is like now.

If he could understand the consciousness and law of that dimension, he would not need to watch the theory of Mu Shi Tian now.

Withdrawing from his thoughts, Chen Mo looked around, stunned.

"What's wrong? Why are you all watching me?"

"You are on TV."

Xiao Yu pointed to the holographic video frequency in the air, and was very helpless. No matter where he went, Chen Mo could always make a little movement.

"It seems that you are thinking about something and your body has changed. The artificial intelligence of Tianxing Stele Forest thinks that your ability to awaken and broadcast the picture should be a means to build momentum for the Star Stele Forest."

Chen Mo understood.

As Xiaoyu said, the birth of a god-level life in the Star Forest is the best advertisement. With this miraculous effect, there will be an endless stream of life, coming here to make a pilgrimage.

In addition to the Star Forest, other studies of the monuments left by countless predecessors are masterpieces of pilgrims.

"What's the harvest?" Xiao Yu asked.

"The harvest is a little bit, and there is a blurry outline. I feel that I can control my body after crossing the threshold." Chen Mo said.

"Go back first." Xiaoyu was a bit uncomfortable with the onlookers. Jing Ge and Shen Wei are very nervous, and are alert to the dangers that may arise around them.

...

"Friend, stay." A life came out of the crowd, and the armor was suspended ten meters away from Chen Mo: ""

Ku Yao and the two **** guards stood in front of Chen Mo and watched the comers vigilantly.

"Who are you?" Chen Mo asked with a frown, obviously looking for fault.

"Under Wan'an, I want to discuss the armor with my friends," Wan An said proudly.

Wanan is a typical humanoid life. It is 300 years old. It is a young and middle-aged man. He has a sturdy body, very even muscles, sharp eyes, and a sharp smile on the corner of his mouth.

"Famous teacher Wanan? He is a famous teacher Wanan."

"There is a good show."

"It's not just that the drama is so simple, Wan'an is a famous teacher of Mu Shi Tianxing, a famous top armor division, not an ordinary top armor division."

"..."

There were exclamations among the onlookers, the discussion was endless, and countless lives were looking forward to, exactly like watching a play. Before the start of the Star Festival, what kind of life was in the Star Forest.

Now the camera is still on Chen Mo, a well-known opportunity, some lives will not be so easily let go.

"I haven't heard of it and I'm not interested." Chen Mo said lightly.

Not to mention that he is currently out of control and unable to control the armor, even if his body is now under control, he is not interested in such discussions. Just come alone and want to fight him, it is not a bargain.

Quack! !

The discussion stopped abruptly, and they did not expect that they would get such an answer.

Have n’t heard of the famous teacher Wan An, and are not interested in playing against each other? How arrogant would you say such a thing?

Wan An, who stood in front of Chen Mo, twitched with embarrassment. He never thought of being rejected without hesitation, still in full view.

"Are you afraid of your friends? It's not like a coward who can gain a life under the monument of Master Mu's Celestial Star." Wan An still kept a sharp smile.

"Go."

Chen Mo no longer ignored Wan An, called Xiaoyu, and was about to leave. It was the mentally handicapped that was such an inferior radical. The opponent apparently regarded him as a tool for fame, using his much-anticipated situation to challenge him, and winning him would make him famous.

"Friend, let's discuss and go before."

Wan An apparently didn't let Chen Mo mean, the war armor engine at his feet broke out and rushed towards Chen Mo.

Suddenly, Wan'an was alert, and his life was fixed in the air. The strong contrast caused the onlookers to vomit blood. And one meter in front of Wanan, a spear appeared, forcing his face to come.

Wan An shook his heart and quickly backed away.

Standing in shape, he saw Ku Yao holding a spear and blocking him and Chen Mo.

Wan An's heart stirred up the turbulent waves, just now he noticed that it was not correct, and he had to close it quickly, otherwise he would hit the muzzle of the other guard.

Coincidence or strength? Wan An was uncertain.

Chen Mo stopped, and the opponent turned provocatively three or four times, and then walked a little bit to escape. It seems that here, kindness will be regarded as weak, and anyone will challenge mocking, and I am afraid I don't know how many flies there are next.

"Do you want to learn?"

"Yes, friend." Wan An put down the suspicion just now, staring at Chen Mo with a smile.

"Ku Yao, give him a profound lesson, let's have fun and have fun." Chen Mo turned to Ku Yao, his voice a little bland.

"Yes, God ... adult."

Ku Yao immediately took his orders, and his eyes were cold.

"Just looking for fun? Take the challenge of a famous teacher as fun?"

"Enough crazy, but I like it."

"I haven't heard such domineering words in a long time. I don't know if it is ignorance or true domineering."

"It's not domineering, it's unknowingly high. The teacher is having fun? I'm afraid I haven't experienced social beatings."

Chen Mo's words were shocked.

Wan'an is Mu Shi Tianxing's long-established top armored division, also considered a genius figure and has a lot of life knowledge.

Now his challenge is regarded as fun.

The onlookers immediately became excited, and the Star Festival was about to begin. This was the appetizer. Famed teacher Wan An discussed with an unnamed guard, and was regarded as having fun by the other party.

A little funny, Wan'an is looked down upon.

As the famous teacher of Mu Shi Tianxing, Wan'an's name is played out, and he consults with various top armor divisions. If Wanan wants to join a certain force, even the god-level civilization will open the door for him.

It is now looked down upon by the life of a newcomer Mu Shi Tianxing.

Chen Mo's contempt made Wan An extremely uncomfortable, and the ferocity of his heart was inspired. Where is he not tall, never looked down upon by a fledgling kid,

"I hope your strength is worthy of your arrogance." The smile on Wanan's mouth grinned and became cold.

...

The dialogue between Wan An and Chen Mo spreads throughout Mu Shi Tian through holographic video frequency.

Nowadays, the Star Festival is about to start, and the attention of many lives is at the Star Festival. The Mushi Star has settled down for too long, and there has been no battle between life and death for a long time.

"It's kind of interesting, it starts so soon."

Hu Bingxin looked at Chen Mo's news with surprise and was very interested. Before the start of the star festival, there was such an episode that attracted the attention of the entire Mushi star.

"Uncle Lion, go and see the excitement." Hu Bingxin smiled.

"Ma'am, it's hilarious ..."

Shi Yan was speechless, and his wife liked to join in the excitement, only she could follow her and walk towards the direction of the Star Forest.

chapters.title: Chapter 946: : Jump! A Momentary Stop!
chapters.body:
Chapter 946: : Jump! A Momentary Stop!

The Star City Challenge Field is full of people and people, and a continuous stream of life is coming from all directions. The open-air challenge field is more than enough to accommodate millions of people.

It has been a long time since the battle of famous teachers.

The battle of the top armor division can be used as a battle reference for other armor divisions.

Chen Mo didn't want to be so troublesome, but the Star Forest was not allowed to do anything, so he came to challenge the field. The scene was onlookers, with a taste of the ancient Colosseum.

Chen Mo stood on the sidelines, and in his field of vision, Ku Yao was standing behind his gun. The sound at the scene was a bit noisy, and the atmosphere gradually rose.

"Who do you gamble to win?"

"Nonsense, of course, Wan'an, the top armored division, a famous division."

"But what is that guy's identity? It's so crazy, let the guards and the famous teacher discuss, and said to have fun."

"Who knows?"

"However, Wan'an's approach is a bit inappropriate. Others have just been promoted to God-level life. It is normal to ignore his discussion. After all, he can't beat him, but he still gets entangled, which is boring."

"Wan'an has a great desire for fame, don't you know? Only in these years have you challenged the top armored divisions just for fame, now it's before the star event, once it's successful, everyone's attention, who doesn't want that kind of vanity?"

"However, Wan'an is estimated to be angered this time, despised, and regarded as having fun, hahahaha."

The crowds were crowded with discussions, and more people regarded it as an entertainment bureau. Most people did not think that the guards of this unknown generation could win Wan'an. In every Star Festival, there are many young people who are arrogant to the point of having a little achievement, and finally have to experience beatings from society.

"Wan An, kill him, I love you."

The onlookers screamed through public communication channels.

The fan community appeared.

"Wan An, give him a good lesson, you are the most handsome, I love you."

"Wow wow wow, Brother Wan'an is so handsome, he's going to die, he's going to die."

"Come on, kill him with one stroke."

"Brother Wanan, let them know what is high and thick, and teach them hard."

"..."

Hearing the female fan's voice, Wanan's somber complexion only recovered. She packed her mood and laughed long. Her voice was quite confident, just like a master.

The onlookers were even more screaming and crazier.

"This is the style and confidence of a famous teacher."

"Yes, it seems that Wan'an didn't take the opponent's contempt seriously."

"Isn't this normal? Wang An is a famous teacher. How can he care about this kind of ignorant young man. It is an honor to challenge him."

The onlookers were warm again, and they were almost certain that there was almost no suspense in Wan's victory. It's a pity that it didn't open, otherwise you can press some chips and win a little money.

"Uncle Lion, who said you can win?" Hu Bing looked at the scene curiously, her eyes blinking.

"According to the superficial news, Wanan's chance of victory crushed the other party. But the mysterious origins of these people are probably not as simple as the superficial." Lion's eyes swept across Chen Mo and others.

He couldn't see through Chen Mo's group. From the perspective of his reading, the other party did not show arrogance and pride, but a kind of self-confidence and calmness.

On the contrary, this battle was initiated by Wan An, and they were forced to face it.

"It seems that Uncle Lion is very optimistic about them, but I don't know their origin, can they be used for their own purposes." Hu Bingxin's beautiful eyes are curious.

"It's difficult." Shi Xuan said without any taboo: "Ma'am, do you feel that that young man is different?"

"What's different?"

"The temperament of the superior."

The temperament of Chen Mo is obviously the temperament of the superior who has been in a high position for a long time. Obviously the other party has power and is not weak. Otherwise, no matter how stupid, it is impossible to send an **** to play against a famous teacher.

He has confidence in his bodyguard, indicating that the bodyguard is at least the top armored division.

"Superior? More interesting." Hu Bingxin's attention fell on Chen Mo.

...

Wan'an is thinking now, how can he win the battle with the most handsome posture?

The other party was the first genius to appear before the star event, and now it is the focus of Mu Shi Tianxing. Winning the other party is a good time to gain a higher reputation.

But thinking of Chen Mo letting a **** fight him, his mood is not good, which is simply an insult to him.

Thinking of this, the anger on Wan'an's face flashed away, and under the cover of the war armor, he was not known to outsiders.

He has been famous for a long time. He has studied with dozens of top armor divisions and won few. When he has never been so scorned by others, he still endured in order to get a name in this star event.

Waiting to win the opponent's bodyguard, he has to see what reason the opponent has refused.

But to win is to win, he wants to win beautiful.

Looking at Ku Yao, I saw that the other party was looking at him meticulously, the short pulse laser of the long gun in his hand was activated, and the dangerous light flashed at the tip of the gun.

Wanan's eyelids jumped.

Ku Yao was looking at him with firm eyes and indifferent indifference. His strong momentum seemed to burst out of him and entered a super state. Ku Yao was like a dangerous beast, with a fierce outbreak.

It was obvious that something was wrong in the air.

The noisy crowd watched from the beginning, the sarcasm in his mouth disappeared, and he quieted down unconsciously.

Top armor division.

Wan'an was shocked.

He can guess that the opponent is the top armor division. After all, the opponent dares to challenge and the armor is not weak. I thought it was similar to the top armored division he had challenged before. Compared with the other side, it was only a guard, and no matter how strong it was, it was only a coincidence.

And at the beginning of the Star Festival, the god-level life and the top armored division are not uncommon here.

However, feeling the momentum of Ku Yao, he had an improper hunch.

"Fight it."

When the words fell, Ku Yao bowed, and the armored engine on his body suddenly rose to the highest power.

boom!

The sonic boom exploded at the instant the armor broke out, shaking the heart of every life, Ku Yao's body disappeared, dragging the residual image in the air and appeared two meters in front of Wanan.

The sharp point of the gun, shining with a little light, the air waves visible to the naked eye in the punctured space, quietly silent, but with infinite kills, stab Wanan's chest straight.

Experienced the standard of Lan more fierce than the devil, trained by Jing Ge as perverted strength, fought with bare hands in the small universe to the planet, and also participated in the civilized battlefield. Although the growth time is short, the actual combat experience is the most necessary A ring.

His conviction tells him that every battle must use up twelve points of strength without reservation.

Wanan's expression changed suddenly, and there was a panic shrouded in death.

This shot seemed to predict his retreat, avoiding inevitable.

The situation was critical, Wan An screamed, urged the body's armor to lean back, and looked into the palm, a three-meter-long electric cable appeared in the hand. Flashing blue electrical pulses are extremely dangerous.

I saw that the electric cable waved, and the electric awn twisted the air, entangled the long gun in Ku Yao's hands like a long snake.

Entangled by electric cables, basically declared the end of the battle.

When Wan An thought he succeeded, Ku Yao twisted his spear and made an incredible dodge above the challenge field. Like completely predicting the trajectory of the electric cable, the spear is perfectly avoided and the castration is not reduced.

Wanan's pupils squeezed suddenly, his face changed drastically, he ignored the attack, and urged the armor to retreat.

boom! boom!

Two consecutive sound bursts, exploding in the eardrums of all life in the challenge field.

Blink! Instantaneous stop!

Double top combat skills in one go.

The spear came out again, pointing at Wanan's chest at a faster speed, and the trend was unprecedented.

This is Jing Ge's tempered skill, which is trained again and again in the battlefield.

On the combat talent, Ku Yao is not the strongest. In order to practice the top skills required by Jing Ge, Ku Yao himself does not know how many times he has trained, how many times he has fainted in the training field, and even used it again and again in combat. Only by tempering can we have today's proficiency.

All this is for faith, deeply into the consciousness and faith in the bones.

Every time he falls down in battle or training, he is admonishing himself that he is the commander of the guardian. He must convince all guardians to have the strength to match this position.

Tired again and again, standing up again and again, he is extremely harsh on his own standards, even Jing Ge is very satisfied with his training.

The terrible amount of battle made him successfully enter the second stage of super power under heavy pressure. At this stage, the combat consciousness can detect the imminent danger and see through the opponent's next movement trajectory.

On the practicality of combat skills, all of Ku Yao's combat skills have experienced the baptism of war.

"Instant step! Instant stop! Double top fighting skills." Sudden changes on the field made Lion's pupils contract tightly, staring at the ghostly figure on the field with a serious expression.

The crowded life did not have his calmness, seeing Ku Yao's movements, burst into exclaimation, and there was an uproar.

chapters.title: Chapter 947: : Aspirations, No Death
chapters.body:
Chapter 947: : Aspirations, No Death

Blink! Instantaneous stop!

It is to urge the armored engine to the highest, burst out to accelerate instantly, and the moment of reaching the opponent, put the armor back to the highest.

This ability has a very heavy load on the body. It requires a strong physical fitness of the armor division. It must have a physical strength of more than high life to make this action in front of it, otherwise it will be directly impacted by the impact of the moment of starting and stopping dead.

The difficulty of one skill is large enough, and the combination of two top skills is already terrifying.

Even the top armor division, not everyone will have this skill, because the process of training is too hard.

Those who can make these two skills in succession are all famous teachers.

For hundreds of millions of years, this skill has been baptized by various legendary battles, not only with excellent viewing, but also with excellent practicality.

However, Wan'an doesn't think it has any beauty.

The spear came towards him like a viper, but just after the retreat, he felt like he was struggling, and his heartbeat continued to accelerate. Even if he is usually in danger in battle, he is now in a mess.

He can feel that the other party's momentum is getting stronger and stronger, causing a lot of pressure on his will and spirit.

With this shot, Wanan had a feeling of nowhere to escape.

After retreating just now, the front-end engine just broke out, and it is now in a momentary pause. It is obviously too late to dodge backwards, and the danger makes him have to make a choice immediately.

The engine on the side of the armor was started and urged with full force.

boom!

Side step!

The sonic boom exploded, and when Wanan thought he could escape, he regenerated.

I saw Ku Yao's gunpoint. When he started the side engine, it was strangely folded. It seemed to see through his movements, and turned to the right of his dodge.

The tip of the gun was a bit cold, drawing a beautiful arc in the air, like a poisonous snake smelling its prey.

All this slowed down in Wanan's eyes, just like the original spear was about to stab there, and he dodged himself by hitting the muzzle.

puff!

The sound is very thin in the cover of the detonation sound, and it falls in Wan'an ear, but it is very clear. The expression under Wanan's armor solidified, and all voices stopped abruptly.

...

The spear penetrated the armor, leaving a hole in the chest.

The armor power was destroyed, Wan An was lying on the floor of the challenge field, staring blankly at the sky, the blue and purple blood soaked through the floor, and there was still incredible on his face.

He did not understand how Ku Yao saw through his movements and predicted in advance.

He didn't die. The vitality of the god-level life is amazing. Unless the brain is destroyed by a shot, it won't die immediately. It only needs to be sent to the medical cabin for treatment, and it can be recovered quickly.

But the lesson is enough, as for the psychological shadow, outsiders will not know.

Ku Yao only needs to light the gun again, and he will challenge the field.

There was no more voice on the field. The sound of discussion and ridicule just now became so harsh.

I was optimistic about Wan'an's life just now, and all were silent at this time.

Double top fighting skills.

This fighting method and skill, which have particularly high requirements on the physical quality, reaction ability and performance of the armor division, are indispensable. In general, this super-difficult skill only appears on the elite top-level armored division. It may be used by such famous teachers as Wan'an, but Wan'an underestimates the enemy.

"God ... Master, fortunately, it's not humiliating." Ku Yao's spear stubbornly stopped before Chen Mo.

Just now he did use twelve points of strength. In addition, the opponent is lighter than the enemy. His fighting consciousness is also strong, so he easily grasps the opponent's flaws and ends the battle in the shortest time.

"Let's go." Chen Mo glanced at the challenge field and several people flew away.

Wow ...

It wasn't until Chen Mo disappeared from the video frequency and the challenge field that the challenge field exploded.

They all watched on the spot, the shock felt through the soul. This is the battle of the top armored division.

What is the origin of Chen Mo? A guard can defeat a famous teacher. How terrifying is this force?

No one dared to laugh at Chen Mo's words about having fun just now. They just felt arrogant. Now they are sure that Chen Mo is not arrogant. In terms of the other party, he is looking for fun.

"too strong."

"What kind of demeanor? The top armor division, no wonder it is the highest pursuit of all armor divisions, chic battles, no trace of extra action."

"What a handsome life, so strong, which civilization is that male?"

"..."

Not only the challenge scene was being discussed, but also the life of the challenge live broadcast, they were all shot down by Ku Yao. They were all wondering if they could avoid that shot if they were in Wan'an.

Obviously, the answer is no.

Some famous armoured teachers were amazed by the shot.

In Wan'an's retreating neutral gear, when he was powerless, that shot blocked all of Wan's retreat and went straight through his chest, destroying the core energy of the Warframe.

In addition to combat skills, the timing is perfect.

That situation only appeared in an instant, and the other party grasped that moment accurately.

As for the origin of Chen Mo, it has become mysterious in the eyes of countless civilizations. An **** has the ability to kill the famous armored division. How terrifying is he the master? How strong are the real masters?

Hu Bingxin's beautiful eyes looked at Chen Mo's disappearing direction, flashing with splendor: "Uncle Lion, what did you see?"

Lion ’s face was very serious. Just now, Yao Yao ’s shot was replayed in his holographic video. Hearing the question from Hu Bingxin, he recovered slightly: “Madam, that guard has been on the battlefield and is a top soldier.”

"Battlefield?" Hu Bing's mind and body shook.

Although the armor division and the soldiers are the same, sometimes they are even confused. Because they are both armor divisions, there are some differences, just like the difference between martial artists in the society and soldiers on the battlefield.

The soldiers are trained in homicide. Every soldier is crawled out of the dead, and he is better at fighting on the edge of life and death.

The Warframe Division will be one point worse in psychological quality.

"Resolute, fierce, no trace of extra action, every action is a homicide technique. If it was in the real battlefield just now, Wan'an may die faster." Lion's face dignified.

"Can it be faster?"

"Yes, on the first blow, as long as the opponent does not dodge, Wan'an will also lose, but his weapon will be damaged, or he will get some injuries." Shi Yan recalled the process just now: "There is a momentum in that guard."

"Possibility?"

Hu Bingxin heard this for the first time.

"Yes, it's the momentum. The ambition is to die, there is no life."

...

On the table, the video of Ku Yao ’s fight was played back, and on the other side, Chen Mo was standing on the sidelines of the challenge.

Tong Qing is knocking on the book, looking at the video frequency where Chen Mo is.

I don't know what I want to write.

"Speaker, do you want to invite them to join our civilization." Tara looked at the holographic video solemnly.

Master Tong Qing has watched this video many times and keeps playing it back. Tara was also shocked by the blow against Ku Yao.

"Invite them?" Tong Qing looked back, and the dark eyes of the pupil showed a focal length of light, with a gentle smile on his face: "Tara, you still have a lot of things to study seriously."

"Speaker, the subordinates don't understand very well." Tara looked confused, why Tong Qing said such a word.

"This is a soldier."

"War soldier?"

"Well, this soldier has an imposing body and belongs to the best soldier."

Hitomi looked at the holographic video frequency.

"Only a strong civilization and a firm belief, or a deceased, can cultivate such an outstanding soldier. Obviously this is not a deceased. So this is a top-level civilized soldier, plus the temperament of this young humanoid, that is The superior, do you think a top power leader will join our civilization? "

Tara suddenly understood.

"Other than that, don't you think they are familiar?" Tong Qing continued.

"Speaker, if you say that, you are familiar with it, as if ..."

Tara thought about it, his pupils shrunk, and two pictures were released, just like Chen Mo's deity and his pseudonym ink dust in the Shigan Galaxy.

It's him.

The one who traded with them in the Shigan Galaxy offended the Lagerstroemia civilization and disrupted the life of the White Star civilization project. The Speaker wanted to find his news many times, but he had been missing. He didn't expect to encounter it here.

"They are here."

"This star event has become very interesting." Tong Qing said with a smile.

...

Mingyue Liuhua suddenly left and went to the Hongqiao of the Sloan Great Wall. Ming Ah is not worried about the command and tactics of Mingyue Liuhua. She never wants to do what she wants to do. He never stops.

However, the location of the Sloan Great Wall is special. Since it was controlled by the Sloan Great Wall, it has become a thorn and has kept them hand-to-hand.

"Ming Chang, you lead a million soldiers in the past to support Sister Ming Yue." Ming A said to the star around him.

Ming Chang is more with him for a long time, with sufficient abilities and a stable style, which can be used if necessary. The situation today is changing rapidly, war is expanding, and no one knows what will happen.

"Yes." Ming Chang led the order, took the soldier symbol and turned to leave.

Hundreds of warships set sail and followed the Hongqiao where the Sloan Great Wall was located just after the moon and flowers.

Mingyue Liuhua didn't know that Ming Apa sent people to support him. After several energy storage jumps, the holographic radar of the battleship suddenly jumped out of the picture.

A huge colorful vortex with dramatic spatial fluctuations.

That is the wormhole leading to the Sloan Great Wall.

chapters.title: Chapter 948: : Battle Of Sloan Great Wall
chapters.body:
Chapter 948: : Battle Of Sloan Great Wall

The defeat of Wan An, a famous teacher in the armor, caused a sensation.

In recent years, the chaos in the universe has become more and more serious. The main news on the universe news is the situation of the universe war, discussing the next trend of the war.

The coming of the Star Monument is to let Mu Shixing slowly turn the topic back to the Star Event.

But even if the Star Festival is coming, many lives have not turned their attention back to the Star Festival. Although there are many lives to participate in this time, the atmosphere is not as eager as the previous carnival. Worrying.

The change of Chen Mo in the Star Forest and the battle between Ku Yao and Wan An have gradually heated up the atmosphere of the Star Festival.

This is the first master teacher to be defeated by the new star before the star event, strictly speaking, the master teacher who was defeated by the guard of the new star.

A famous teacher defeated by guards.

News gimmicks are enough, and the viewing and technicality of battle scenes are enough, and they are quickly spread all over the planet.

Chen Mo's phrase "Finding Fun" quickly became popular among Mu Shi Tianxing. Wan'an, a famous teacher who challenged Chen Mo, although he was treated and did not die, but also became a joke and talk in Mu Shi Tianxing.

Ku Yao's shot shocked countless lives.

Many famous teachers are frankly confessing in the face of that shot, and they are not sure to hide.

That trick was imitated by various masters. Although the instantaneous step and instantaneous stop were released, it always lacked the feeling of Ku Yao and could be easily hidden by opponents at the same level.

With such a strong escort, Chen Mo's identity has become the subject of investigation by major groups and civilizations.

In the beginning, no information about Chen Mo was found.

But it didn't take long for news that Chen Mo was wanted by Ziwei civilization was dug up.

This news shocked countless lives.

Following the news of the wanted criminals of the Ziwei civilization, Chen Mo was excavated in the Shigan Galaxy to kill Zeqi.

Killing the messenger of the crape myrtle civilization in the Shigan galaxy was wanted by the crape myrtle civilization and was safe and sound. Now he is swaying to come to the star festival. Chen Mo's courage makes many countless lives admire.

As for wanting to solicit Chen Mo's great civilization and life, it is not so good not to dare to shoot, otherwise it will attract the hatred of Ziwei civilization.

There are hot news stimuli, and the atmosphere of the Star Monument is being activated.

...

"This is how many years it has grown to this point." Tu Yun looked at Ku Yao's battle scene and admired it.

"It's really fast." Shui Ling also admired her heart.

When Cheng Zai and Chen Mo came into contact with Shi Gan, Chen Mo was just a cosmic adventurer trapped in Shi Gan, forced by the situation, occupying the stellar system [Eighth District www.yeyin8.com] as the king, and then built a space connector to leave .

At that time, the top armored division beside Chen Mo had only a ruthless man and a thin humanoid. The other armored divisions were not strong.

Today, Chen Mo's guards have been able to defeat the Warriors.

Even if they were, they would be dreaded by the shot of Ku Yao.

"It seems that we still underestimated him." Shui Ling said.

"It's not just underestimation." Tu Yun smirked: "Your teacher really doesn't have to say anything about people."

What Tuyun saw was not so simple.

The top armor division is not lacking in all kinds of great civilizations, especially Mu Shi Tianxing during the star festival.

What he saw was Chen Mo's potential and the power behind it.

At the beginning, he introduced Lan to Chen Mo. Over the years, Lan had never mentioned his position when talking to him, let alone his current development, but from the perspective of Lan's changes, the development was not small.

He knows Lan's ability. In addition to the guards in front of him, Chen Mo is probably not weak, but he has not yet been recognized by the outside world.

And Chen Mo has mastered all kinds of incredible technology.

"Uncle Tuyun, where do you say he is developing now?" Shui Ling asked curiously.

"I asked Lan, but Lan did not say, would you like to ask him in person?" Tu Yun said with a smile.

"..."

...

Kong Fan's brows were screwed together and it didn't take a long time to unfold. There were two generals, Groth and Qu Shu.

Three Sloan stars.

As the three major stars of Sloan civilization, the prestige is outstanding. With their superior tactical ability, Sloan Great Wall became the most powerful civilization around.

The three major war departments of Sloan Civilization are well-known.

"This time the visitor is not good." Kong Fan Ningzhong said.

When the White Mist Rainbow Bridge was controlled by the Ming civilization, the Ming Tu led soldiers appeared on the Hong Bridge. At that time, the Shilong Civilization was terribly nervous. Fortunately, Ming Tu rebelled. They found a neutral gear and occupied Baiwu Hongqiao at the minimum cost.

Now the corpse civilization is back.

Baiwu Hongqiao is not only a thorn in the flesh for the corpse civilization, but also for the Sloan Great Wall, both of which are in important positions. Once Hongqiao is lost, it means that the situation is passive.

"Next, Qu Shu prepares for the rear, ready to evacuate at any time, and retain the fire of civilization. You are in the middle of Groth, ready to support at any time." Kong Fan said.

Kong Fan is the leader of Shilong's three generals. Since he became a general, he has not lost a single defeat. He is the best tactical commander among the three generals and the big brother's existence among the three.

As if this is the best arrangement at present, neither Gros nor Qu Shu objected.

At this moment, the alarm sounded loud.

The three of them tightened their minds, and the news of the war alert reached them.

Underworld civilization started!

...

Wat Mu has been waiting. In order to avoid being discovered by the Sloan Great Wall, they are prepared for them in advance, so he has been indifferent.

After the establishment of the handguard group, it has been committed to the development of the small universe.

Within the small universe, there are high-level civilizations to primitive civilizations, and even the era of Zerg and wild beasts that have not yet formed civilizations, and civilizations that have not reached the universe travel.

At the moment of wasteland development, war is essential.

However, Lan did not let them directly destroy the civilization of the small universe by means of dimensionality reduction, but chose to send troops and conquer those civilizations with the armored division.

Scary with high fighting intensity, sometimes Lan ordered them to fight with the Zerg with bare hands, and there were various advanced weapons left unused. This was a **** operation they could not understand, but it appeared in Lan's order.

Not one war department, but all war departments.

Although there is a medical cabin, it can be recovered as long as it does not die, but only the soldiers know the pain.

After the small universe opened the wasteland, they only knew the instructors' good intentions.

Fighting personally for a long time on the edge of high pressure and death, so that their strength growth and actual combat experience soared rapidly, and the psychological quality of combat has become stronger and stronger.

In addition to the pioneering battles, there are several war games and war exercises in the virtual reality of the war department, and the last one is dull.

Therefore, although there are few wars with the main cosmic civilization in the marching ant groups, the actual combat experience is not weaker than any civilized legion in the universe.

All of their stars have gone through systematic combat teaching, or Lan personally went to the field to teach. During training, they still have virtual reality combat every day, and they are not weak in tactical command.

After a long period of training and teaching by Lan, coupled with actual combat and combat training, several major war departments of the marching ants have developed their own style.

Wat Mu is surprisingly successful and has a strange style; Wang Hai ’s Neptune War Department has a stable combat style, neutrality and peace; the Black Eagle ’s Kunpeng War Department wins with speed and fast pace; The style is insignificant and the tactics are insidious; while the night owl war department, the owl style is fierce and weird.

As for the guardian, it is abnormal, a group of lifeless lunatics, when several major war departments are fictitiously fighting, no war department is willing to play a confrontational battle with the guard.

Wat Mu felt that he was very lucky. The instructor gave him the order to attack the Sloan Great Wall. The other few were envious.

This battle is very important, it must be played beautifully, let the underworld civilization control Hongqiao, that is not a good thing.

Wat Mu can't wait any longer, but he hasn't got the best time to fight. When the best time comes, they can win the Baiwu Hongqiao at the lowest price in exchange for the highest profit.

Suddenly, a piece of news appeared in the sand table in front of Wat Mu.

Wat Mu's eyes were soaring, his mouth wide open.

chapters.title: Chapter 949: : The Movement Path Of Life In The Fourth Dimension
chapters.body:
Chapter 949: : The Movement Path Of Life In The Fourth Dimension

The role of the space interferometer protects the surrounding Hongqiao from being bombarded by space weapons.

In this position, both sides need to start a positional battle, facing head-on.

Even so, the offensive of the corpse civilization is still fierce.

Kongfan is not naive enough to think that their war department can beat the war department of the corpse civilization. Although they are top-level civilizations, the quality of combat soldiers and machine technology cannot be compared with those of god-level civilizations.

It is undoubtedly the best strategy to choose the sea of people tactics around Hongqiao. At all costs, we must also guard the Hongqiao, and we should not allow the corpse civilization to enter the Sloan Great Wall.

The means of the god-level civilization, they are very clear, once the other party enters the Sloan Great Wall, the Sloan civilization will become a ruin of the universe.

Fortunately, with home court advantage, the entire Sloane civilization arsenal is working hard to deliver intelligent machinery and war robots to Baiwu Hongqiao.

Kong Fan glanced at the holographic video on the battlefield. Various data flashed on it constantly, and the pressure on the battlefield was not small.

The opponent's intelligent machinery and war robots are too strong, and the anti-material ammunition is sufficient. The war robots on their side are very depleted.

The soldiers are the last line of defense, and they cannot go up easily.

"Is the smart machine delivered?"

"Just over here." The subordinate answered immediately, his expression dignified.

"All up."

...

Mingyue Liuhua's expression is not too good, the tenacity of Sloan Great Wall is beyond her expectation.

But think about it, this is also normal.

The Sloan Great Wall is considered to be the top civilization in the middle of the universe. It is not surprising that it has such strength.

The other party is obviously at any cost.

But after fully understanding the strength of Sloan Wall, she was not worried. The opponent ’s war robots and anti-material ammunition are not as abundant as they are. Not to mention the war department, the ordinary war department of the corpse civilization is not weaker than the war department of the top civilization.

The background of the god-level civilization is not comparable to other civilizations. Even if the Sloan Great Wall is the top civilization, in the eyes of Mingyue Liuhua, it is only a relatively large prey.

It's only a matter of time to capture Hongqiao.

Suddenly, the Mingyue Liuhua expression appeared, and on the battlefield, a steady stream of intelligent machinery was sent in again. She is also the star of the corpse civilization, this situation naturally understands the meaning of life.

"Is the battle of attrition?" Mingyue Liuhua sneered a little, and the battle of attrition that took advantage of home court, in his view, was just dying.

There is no essential difference between fast death and slow death. She is bound to win the Sloan Great Wall. Nothing else, just for the position of Patriarch of the Ming Ah. For her sake, she can do it at all costs.

"Increase the offensive and let them see that bugs are always bugs. Struggling for a while will not change fate."

...

"Mingtu, all the top civilizations participating in the Star Festival are confirmed." Lin Zhug passed the video of a list to the men around him.

If the life of the corpse civilization is here, we can certainly recognize that the man is the meditation that disappeared from the Sloan Great Wall.

The holographic list flashed in front of Ming Tu, and a piece of information was remembered in his mind.

"Ming Tu, why don't we find a god-level civilization?" Lin Zhu asked.

"Can't find it, except for the endless sea of god-level civilization, everything else is all the way." Ming Tu shook his head slightly, his face expressionless, as if endless indifference.

"Top-level civilization, may not be willing to offend the corpse civilization." Lin Zhu dignified expression.

His friend was a bit miserable. When Lin Zhu was just contacted, he was also full of indignation.

Ming Tu is a robot.

Yes, Ming Tu, known as the top star of the Ming Dynasty civilization, is a robot. The worst thing is that the consciousness of Ming Tu was originally the consciousness of humanoid.

A living body consciousness that was once flesh and blood was imprisoned in a body with no sense and no temperature, how terrible that kind of suffering.

But Ming Tu can persist in it for hundreds of years. This will can already be described in horror.

In order to explore the model of artificial intelligence consciousness and life immortality, the corpse civilization uses the living body to experiment, kill the living body, and use the fear of the moment of life and death to make the consciousness reach the most active and try to enter the quantum chip of the machine.

Countless lives were killed by the corpse civilization in the experiment, and Ming Tu was the only lucky one, which preserved the consciousness in its entirety, and the others were either dead, or partly entered the quantum chip, and then went crazy, losing consciousness and controlled by the program.

Now the meditation consciousness is trapped in the quantum chip, there is no temperature of the original living body, no sense of touch, no consciousness.

After suffering for hundreds of years, it is conceivable how high the hatred of Ming Tu for the civilization of the corpse is now. In the civilized civilization, Ming Tu did not dare to show it. Whenever there was a chance to come out, Ming Tu chose to defect.

But destroying the body and the chip, and dying like that, Ming Tu was not reconciled.

Underworld civilization has not yet been destroyed.

Now, he is looking for a civilization that can derive his consciousness from this cold machine body.

He cannot find a god-level civilization, so he can only find the top civilization with strength. This star event, talents came out in large numbers, so he chose to come here.

"So I have to find those who dare to offend them, and the life science and technology are strong." Ming Tu's eyes kept flashing in the holographic video frequency, and soon, the video frequency was turned off.

...

Back at the manor, Chen Mo plunged into the study.

In the Star Forest, the moment of inspiration communicated his thoughts since this time, and now various ideas spring up regarding the existence of the fourth dimension of life.

He needs to digest those inspirations and ideas.

The consciousness of life in the fourth dimension, an unprecedented existence, is also a blank spot in the life of the universe, which has never reached a height.

Objects of the first dimension can only perceive one dimension. For example, a bug walking along a rope, and an object leaving the rope will disappear from the insect's field of vision in the first dimension.

Objects of the second dimension can only perceive two dimensions. Assuming it is the ground plane, when the three-dimensional moving bird flies to the sky, it will disappear from the view of the object of the second dimension.

The existence of the fourth dimension, then the life of the fourth dimension moves in the fourth dimension. When the movement path of the fourth dimension intersects with the space of the third dimension, it will appear in the eyes of the third dimension like a ghost, and then In an instant, it disappeared into the vision of life in the third dimension like a ghost.

What is the hypothetical movement path of the fourth dimension of life?

Taking the elongated timeline of life as the movement path of life in the fourth dimension, then in the movement of life in the fourth dimension, a moment appears at the time of 'now', and there is a momentary intersection with the life in the third dimension, and then ghost Generally disappeared in the timeline of 'past' and 'future'.

The fourth dimension of life moves freely in the time dimension.

The second dimension to the third dimension are the limitations of breaking away from the height of space. The third dimension to the fourth dimension, from the research we understand now, are to break away from the constraints of the time dimension, and the detachment is beyond the time dimension.

However, with regard to the study of the time dimension, the current results are few and far between.

How to think about life in the fourth dimension? How does the fourth dimension work? What is the world seen in the fourth dimension? Assuming that life in the fourth dimension can control time, how is time controlled?

Several questions came to Chen Mo's mind.

This is the most urgent question he wants to know.

Especially the first question, to figure out how to think about life in the fourth dimension, then the latter question is much simpler.

Chen Mo only came out after spending a whole day in the study.

"How is it?" Xiao Yu asked Chen Mo to come out, and the models came, pushing Chen Mo's wheelchair, and asked softly.

"A bit of a harvest." Chen Mo said.

"Are you sure to go to the banquet of the Mu Family's Star Family tonight? Will there be any problems? Now your identity as a wanted criminal of Ziwei civilization has been exposed." Xiao Yu asked with some concern.

"The banquet of the Mu Family's Star Family, it's good to go and see the lively. As for the identity issue, don't pay attention to it, the woman of Ziwei Civilization already knows that exposure does not affect it.

Chen Mo didn't care, thought for a while before speaking again.

"Anyway, it's okay to be idle. Let's go to the Star Forest and find inspiration. Maybe there will be unexpected gains."

chapters.title: Chapter 950: : Brain Thinking Or Conscious Thinking?
chapters.body:
Chapter 950: : Brain Thinking Or Conscious Thinking?

The Star Forest is more lively than last time. Since Chen Mo ’s changes were cast into all corners of Mu Shi Tianxing through the holographic video frequency, the peculiar role of the Star Planet is again widely discussed by all life.

All the people who come to participate in the Star Festival will come to observe the Star Forest in advance.

Every life wants to become stronger.

Divine life means a longer lifespan, a smarter and more responsive brain, and special abilities.

For intelligent life, no matter what point, it is a huge temptation.

The life of the various monuments is obviously more than when Chen Mo first came. In particular, Chen Mo ’s last changed monument of the "Ontology of the Universe" has three layers inside and three layers outside, which cannot be squeezed in at all.

Chen Mo had a thorough understanding of the last cosmological ontology, and this time his goal was not there, but another subject "Research on the Philosophical Consciousness of the Existence of the Fourth Dimension" that interested Chen Mo.

The philosophical consciousness map on the fourth dimension exists fortunately. Although life is a little more, it is not so dense and there are vacancies.

The content is too esoteric, life without professional knowledge, can not understand at all.

The surrounding life recognized Chen Mo and consciously gave way. Now Chen Mo is a celebrity of Mu Shi Tianxing. The guards defeated the war armor master Wan An, or the messenger who killed the Ziwei civilization, the wanted criminal wanted by the Ziwei civilization, plus the star forest. Changes, he has been well-known to the life of Mu Shi Tianxing.

Chen Mo thanked Teng for his life politely, the armor was suspended in the air, and he focused his attention on the monument.

Ku Yao and several armored divisions were standing beside him, blocking Chen Mo in the center, Jing Ge was also present, and Xiao Yu was standing beside Chen Mo.
