Although it is not allowed to do anything in the Star Forest, it is only a rule.

Where there is life, there are rivers and lakes, there is light and darkness, and the dark world is not what you stipulate, they must abide by it, and it is impossible to achieve a 100% ban.

After entering the state, Chen Mo began to read the research manuscript carefully.

Many research materials, manuscripts and rubbings have different feelings.

There are manuscripts, researchers are more willing to read the manuscript, and sometimes a small symbol and letter modification can feel the meaning of the researchers want to express.

Philosophical awareness of the fourth dimension.

The first chapter is naturally a mathematical argument for the existence of the fourth dimension. The dense formulas and solving process are very detailed.

For ordinary life, these formulas are heavenly books. Even researchers must read and answer them carefully. For Chen Mo, a mathematical company of any difficulty looks very simple.

Throughout the solution process, the moment he saw the master formula, it was all clear.

Unconsciously, Chen Mo quickly fell into it.

A pair of eyes are paying attention to Chen Mo's situation in the dark. When Chen Mo stayed on the philosophical consciousness map in the fourth dimension, news about him appeared on the desks of major civilizations.

...

"He passed by again, this time is the study of philosophical consciousness in the fourth dimension." Tara handed the holographic shadow frequency to Tong Qing.

"Let me show the contents of this stele."

Hitomi looked at Chen Mofu's figure in front of the monument with interest.

A holographic projection appears, and the complete projection of the stele engraved with the philosophical meaning of the existence of the fourth dimension [country novel www.yanjuexiangcun.com] will be reproduced in front of Tong Qing.

The dense formulas and solving equations, as well as the peculiar graphics, make the scalp numb.

"Do you have any ideas?" Tong Qing asked Tara around her.

"I'm very glad that the mathematics I learned also has numbers." Tara said.

"Hey, this is indeed the case." Tong Qing smiled lightly, nodded in agreement, looked at the map for a while, and fell on Chen Mo again.

...

"Wang, this life is indirectly related to killing Dan." A subordinate looked at Chen Mo's holographic image, his eyes full of anger.

They are the life of Thor's civilization.

Now it has been confirmed that Chen Mo sold the space connector to Tong Qing, letting Tong Qing take the lead, and then let Dan die in the Shigan Galaxy.

"Dan ’s death, I ’m more angry than anyone else, do n’t be blinded by hatred in your eyes and brain."

Thunder's voice was low.

The subordinates woke up as soon as they dreamed, and they quickly reported yes.

Compared with the past, the current Thunder, the arrogance of his body disappeared, a temperament of the superior, and a kind of self-confidence.

At that time he was also in the Shigan galaxy, and their movements were a step slower. Their space connector was not formed, and Tongqing sent the space weapon into the Shigan galaxy, giving Tongqing a chance.

It was Chen Mo's space connector that gave Tong Qing the first chance.

But to Chen Mo, he has no hatred.

As Dan said to him in the Shigan Galaxy.

If you lose, you have to lose. No matter how you lose, you must admit that the most terrible thing is to find yourself an excuse for failure. That is the weak.

"This Chen Mo is not simple, first check his identity, don't worry about enemies with them, now the situation in the universe is not optimistic, if there is one less enemy, there will be one less." Lei Ting said.

...

The surroundings seemed to be quiet, and Chen Mo's browsing speed accelerated.

In the stele, whenever a problem is encountered, Chen Mo just pauses and thinks for a while, and the answer comes to his mind completely.

Chen Mo is now a god-level life. Strictly speaking, he is half a level higher than a god-level life. In addition, he is a researcher and he thinks about academic problems very quickly, and he has to answer these questions from all levels.

Some curious lives will come to watch Chen Mo browse the stele. After all, it is a star effect, and some lives ignore these and continue reading.

Chen Mo's speed gradually slowed down. With the continuous deepening of watching, Mu Shi Tianxing raised more and more questions in his research, and the level of thinking was also higher and more profound.

Philosophical issues have always been mysterious and mysterious, and need to be slowly considered and chewed.

In the study of Mu Shi Tianxing, he raised many unanswerable questions. Later generations have done many paper answers to these questions. On the other monuments in the Tianxing monument, it is not here. Chen Mo has no time to go Looking at each one, most of the problems can be solved by Chen Mo himself.

There are also many questions about philosophical paradoxes. However, the existence of parallel universes and the ability of life in the fourth dimension can well solve those paradoxical questions.

Starting from the 40th monument, Chen Mo's speed became faster again.

Finally, here are the various superpowers that the fourth-dimensional life consciousness may possess.

The conjecture is very simple. Mu Shi Tianxing believes that the fourth dimension of life, in addition to being able to travel freely in time and space, also has all super powers. It is the superpower of cosmic god-level life, which is a partial reflection of the fourth-dimensional life ability. But having all superpowers does not mean being the fourth dimension of life.

This discussion is not the first time that Chen Mo has seen it in the science and technology library. Therefore, this part of Chen Mo is easy to understand and sweep away.

Chen Mo had to admire that Mu Shi Tianxing was indeed a great pioneer.

After reading it, however, the harvest was a bit, but nothing really touched him, Chen Mo regretted.

But if you think about it carefully, it seems that you have no regrets. If you can get a lot every time, then you can only explain that he has learned everything in the science and technology library.

A little greedy.

"Dad, why can he read the stele, but we can't?"

A milky milky voice sounded in the crowd of life, and looked around, it was a humanoid little loli sitting on the shoulders of his father's armor.

"Because he has learned so much, we haven't learned so much."

"Why didn't we learn so much knowledge?"

"Because we haven't done professional research, those knowledge needs to spend a lot of time on professional research, and we must have a very smart brain to think." Father answered patiently.

"Why is the brain thinking? Isn't consciousness thinking? Is the brain and consciousness the same thing?"

...

"Why is brain thinking? Isn't conscious thinking? Is brain and consciousness the same thing?"

The milky voice of the milky voice made Chen Moru thunder, and his body just wanted to leave the map stele.

Is the brain thinking or consciousness thinking? This is a philosophical question, one that Chen Mo never thought of, and a question that Mushitianxing did not raise in his research.

Is the brain and consciousness the same thing?

No!

Xiaoyu's ability can see the conscious body. When Chen Mo and Xiaoyu connected their consciousness, they had seen the perspective that Xiaoyu saw. The conscious body exists.

And Mo Nu's consciousness was created out of thin air using quantum mechanics. The brain and chip are just a container.

If the brain is just a container, can consciousness and physical thinking go to other containers? For example, the body's footsteps, arms, etc., or directly detached from the living body, and think on other living bodies or objects?

A series of questions suddenly appeared in Chen Mo's consciousness.

Chen Mo froze in place, and Ku Yao just wanted to ask, but was stopped by Xiaoyu, and he begged him not to speak.

She felt that Chen Mo had changed again.

The second change.

chapters.title: Chapter 951: : It Seems A Bit Abnormal
chapters.body:
Chapter 951: : It Seems A Bit Abnormal

A word awakened the dreamer, saying what Chen Mo is now.

Chen Mo is addicted to the control of consciousness. His body is different from ordinary people. He has long abandoned the concept of the brain and nerves, reaching a state that life sciences cannot understand now.

What the little girl said just now is like a guru initiation.

His consciousness can no longer be limited to the brain in the head, so that he can easily control other parts of the body. The initial consciousness transfer is still very jerky, and it becomes more and more familiar later, and the consciousness is scattered to various parts of the body, and the sense of control of the body appears again.

A sense of joy from the depths of consciousness flooded the whole body.

Chen Mo was set there, motionless, but his consciousness was very active.

At midday, the Star Forest is flooded with life.

All eyes are on the eye, Chen Mo is a life that is focused on. Its abnormal shape naturally attracts attention on the field.

"No? Come again?"

The onlookers were a little unbelievable. Seeing Chen Mo's fixed actions, an incredible possibility came to their minds. The first change has just passed, and now comes the second time, letting life die.

They are destined to witness extraordinary moments, and each life is breathless.

Many life-spectrum cameras that life expects appeared again with the drone and fell on Chen Mo.

At the next moment, a huge holographic light curtain rose, and Chen Moding's figure appeared again on the holographic light curtain, accompanied by Chen Mo's body changing spectrum.

"[新 笔 趣 阁 www.xsbiquge.vip] really, my god."

"Life is more life than life, I am mad."

"Perverted, dead perverted."

The inner life of the onlookers was wailing. In just a few days, the body had evolved for the second time. This is already a normal existence.

Can Chen Mo awaken the second superpower, or the third time? There are not many god-level lives with multiple abilities in the history of the universe. Mu Shitian was once one.

The spectrum of Chen Mo's body is changing more and more drastically.

The atmosphere seemed to freeze, causing the surroundings to become dead. Suddenly, an inexplicable buzz appeared, and the Star Forest began to shake and vibrate as if it were an earthquake.

Countless lives looked at the visions horrified

They have all seen earthquakes, and there are some god-level life that can control the earthquake, but in the evolution of the Star Forest, only Chen Mo was the one that caused this kind of vision.

...

In an unknown castle of Mu Shi Tianxing, Ming Tu sits in front of the screen and looks at the information of the top civilizations coming indifferently. He sees no less than 10,000 top-level civilization materials, however, it has not yet been determined which top-level civilization is worth trading with him.

The civilization he is looking for, the leader must be a courageous and talented life.

At this point, Tong Qing and Thunder are undoubtedly the best candidates, but he is from the deep consciousness of the existing god-level civilization. In his view, the roots of today's god-level civilizations are all rotten.

Suddenly, Ming Tu raised his head and looked at the latest news that the system jumped out of.

Chen Mo floated in the air like an old monk entered his eyes, his indifferent eyes fluctuated.

It was him, the life wanted by the Ziwei civilization, which had evolved twice.

Ming Tu's eyes began to flash, and he realized that maybe Chen Mo was a good choice. In the Shigan Galaxy offended the three god-level civilizations, this life is powerful enough to evolve twice in the Star Forest, which is unprecedented at this time.

After pondering for a long time, Ming Tu slowly closed the information page of the holographic screen.

He decided to gamble.

...

Tuyun stared at the falling holographic light curtain and looked amazed. The young humanoids in the Shigan galaxy that year may have grown beyond his predecessor.

This terrible life cannot be described by genius, only evil.

At the beginning of the Shigan galaxy, the gods gathered, and he stood out. For example, in today's star monument, where geniuses from all over the universe gather and many god-level life gathers, he still stands out.

No matter where he goes, he is destined to be a protagonist, a life that is not lost to the flow of pupils and thunder.

Tuyun looked forward a little.

At the time of the gathering of heroes, I was born, and this time I am afraid that it will be lively again.

But this is not what he should worry about, but those big guys should worry about. At their level, it is natural to know who is their opponent and who is their friend.

Tu Yun knew, and Tong Qing and Thunder also knew.

The next era is the era of the giants fighting for hegemony.

...

Ku Yao stared at Chen Mo's figure with great piety.

This is the style of God King.

They have always believed that the **** king is the most intelligent and perfect genius in their hearts. Although the gods usually don't do much, they can feel that not only wisdom, but the perfection of omnipotence.

Today, King Shen has evolved twice in the Star Forest, which is enough to show his genius wisdom.

Throughout the history of the universe, there has never been life that has evolved here twice in the Star Forest, still within a few days.

Now the style of the **** king spreads all over the stars and monuments.

Many **** guards are overwhelmed with joy, holding up a twelve-point spirit to guard, fearing that there will be problems at this critical moment.

The happiest is Xiao Yu.

She has been with Chen Mo for the longest time. She knows how good this man is.

Life in the universe is now showing style. As his closest person, Xiaoyu is naturally very proud. Without a woman, I don't want to see my man become better and show his style.

She knows Chen Mo's current physical condition. After the development of quantum life, Chen Mo's body is very special, and any changes are normal.

Now she just wants Chen Mo to control her body.

Chen Mo couldn't control his body. Although he didn't affect anything, he was sometimes inconvenient.

Moreover, at home, Mo Nu can only sit in a wheelchair, or rely on war armor to assist in movement, and can't move.

If Chen Mo is active, then any troubles will pass in the future.

As long as Chen Mo is safe and sound, the marching ant group is not afraid of any disturbances, and they will be at ease.

...

The video frequency of Chen Mo's changes in the Star Forest is already tens of billions of light years away.

Lan, who has always been calm, also looked at Chen Mo's changes in shock, while Zhao Min's beautiful eyes were Mo Chen, who was sitting in a wheelchair next to him, also looked at Chen Mo in surprise.

In the war room, there are a large number of other senior executives.

"It seems a bit abnormal." Lan Du muttered.

Zhao Min nodded in agreement: "He has always been so perverted."

In the war room, all other senior leaders agreed to nod. The mainstream technology of the march ant group is all from Chen Mo, and in such a short time, it has grown from a low-level civilization to a top-level civilization.

Apart from perverts, they can't think of other adjectives.

And actually caused a vision in the Star Forest and there is no previous achievement.

...

Chen Mo's body changed for the second time in the Star Forest, causing a sensation in the entire Star Forest. Almost all news pictures and live broadcasts are broadcast in real time with Chen Moding's scene above the Stele Forest.

Two evolutions have triggered the Star Forest Earthquake Vision, which I had never dared to think about before. They seemed to see that the most dazzling new star was rising in this star event.

Under the intense attention of countless eyes, Chen Mo, fixed in the air like a clay sculpture, slowly returned to focus, and his body moved in the air.

chapters.title: Chapter 952: : Consciousness Is No Longer Confined To The Brain
chapters.body:
Chapter 952: : Consciousness Is No Longer Confined To The Brain

Countless battleships appeared in the floating debris at the entrance of Hongqiao Cave. The symbol of the white star civilization was particularly obvious on the battleship.

"Adjust the star chart."

Gou Xuan stared at the star chart, her eyes motionless, and a prominent wolf totem on her armor. She is a white star civilization half-orc wolf girl, also a star of this war department, a female star.

Werewolves are good at group warfare. Almost natural stars. In the history of the White Star civilization, the Werewolves have seen many famous stars, especially during the war period when the White Star civilization rose.

In this generation, Gou Xuan is the leader of the werewolf star.

"Adult, here is the dark forest area, Bianyunzao, what do we do next? Attack the dark forest civilization?" The deputy next to him asked seriously.

They captured the Hongqiao to the dark forest civilization, which means that they need to consider the next plan.

"Don't touch the dark forest civilization for the time being." Gou Xuan shook his head, then pointed to the situation marked by the holographic image: "Is this Hongqiao leading to the empty cave?"

Gou Xuan clicked on the information of a rainbow bridge one billion light-years away from Bianyuncheng. Intelligence personnel had already investigated the condition of these rainbow bridges.

Today's universe is like perforated cheese. Hongqiao is a small hole in the cheese, which accelerates the pace of war and increases the complexity of cosmic warfare.

"Yes, it was the collapse of a large black hole in the Muwu galaxy in the constellation Mufu, called Muwu Hongqiao. According to intelligence information, this Hongqiao is now occupied by marching ant groups." Said the deputy.

"Marching Ant Group?" Gou Xuan was puzzled. She heard about this group for the first time.

"A large group of forces comparable to the top civilizations, originated in the Pisces cetaceans supercluster complex, which has been around for a short time, only a dozen years, and suddenly rose to conquer the Pisces cetacean complex. Technology, and various mastery of various space weapons, speculation that it should be a migration from a top civilization, their specific origins are still unknown. "

The lieutenant said the obtained information again.

"I don't know the origin of the top group?" Gou Xuan suddenly became interested: "Send a spaceship to the past, and let the spies detect the deployment of the army ant group in Muwu Hongqiao."

"Okay." The lieutenant nodded.

...

Chen Mo twisted his neck in the air, a very normal movement, but for Chen Mo who had been unable to move for several months, this was good news.

The body is fully recovered.

He has never had such a comfortable feeling, and his physical changes are all clear to his heart.

Now I feel that there is endless power in my body, as if he is omnipotent.

All thoughts are natural, he now consciousness throughout the body, every flesh and every cell is under his control. It can be said that the whole body is the brain, which is the strength of this body.

But now does not seem to be the time to experience change.

Above the Star Forest, countless lives surrounded them, staring at him, as if looking at a monster.

At this moment, Chen Mo felt like a giant panda in a zoo.

Deathly silence.

Even Chen Mo, in the face of countless pairs of strange eyes, couldn't help but lose his body. Almost all those lives want to take him to the laboratory for analysis.

Xiaoyu reminded softly that Chen Mo knew that he was changing in the Star Forest, so it attracted so many strange eyes.

"Go back first."

Chen Mo led a few people to slowly fly away from the sky and star monument, along the way, all life gave way to them.

Countless pairs of eyes fell on Chen Mo, each pair had different emotions, envy, jealousy, exclamation, admiration, worship, etc., everywhere. At this moment, Chen Mo is the most dazzling life of the Star Monument.

When Chen Mo left, the stele he just looked at was immediately occupied by other life, hoping to gain some benefits from the stele he just looked at and find out the true meaning of life evolution.

As Chen Mo left, the onlooker's life also dissipated, but the intense discussion was just beginning.

Two changes occurred in the Star Forest and it also caused an earthquake in the Star Forest. It was incredible. Many lives are speculating about Chen Mo's specific origin, and what capabilities Chen Mo gains from it.

...

In the manor's room, Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo's body in wonder.

After the body was under control, Chen Mo's body changed slightly, and some details changed.

Every muscle and every bone has reached the perfect point, and the lines are the most comfortable. It looks full of power but without losing the beauty. The eight abdominal muscle lines of the abdomen are soft and even.

Even Xiao Yu, who was accustomed to Chen Mo's body, was fascinated by the changes in Chen Mo's body lines.

This body is simply the most perfect masterpiece of heaven, no girl can be expected to refuse. Xiaoyu stretched out his fingers and gently moved Chen Mo's chest muscles, not soft or hard, and quite comfortable.

Xiao Yu couldn't help but touch a few more times.

Chen Mo looked at Xiaoyu, who had an idiot, and a black line appeared in his forehead.

It has to be said that the feeling of being in control of the body is really cool, and you can do whatever you want, rather than fighting the armor to help yourself move.

"What is your body's ability?" Xiao Yu asked.

"Not sure." Chen Mo said helplessly.

Even if he controlled his body well, he didn't find out all about it. This physical ability.

"I feel like I am omnipotent, but I have not explored how to use these abilities." Chen Mo thought for a while and added.

"Apart from controlling your body, what special gains do you have?"

"Yes, I learned to think with my ass."

"Speak seriously." Xiao Yu pinched Chen Mo's waist and gave him a blank look.

Chen Mo looked innocent.

He is serious.

After consciousness spread throughout the body, the world he knew collapsed in his mind.

Let Chen Mo get dressed, and Xiaoyu takes out the quantum communication device and dials Mo Nu's number. Because of the development of quantum life, Mo Nu helped Chen Mo open a head start to confirm that Mo Nu's body is still out of control.

"Mo Ge, little fisher sister."

When Mo Mo saw Chen Mo and Xiao Yu, she smiled in surprise, and Zhao Min was beside Mo Nu.

"We saw that Mo Ge was in the Star Forest."

"The news is really fast. The husband's body can now control himself, and now let her husband and Mo Nu talk about controlling the body." Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo and gave him the topic.

"Mo girl, it is not difficult to control the body. Now our body is different from traditional life. Strictly speaking, there is no difference between traditional organs. Every cell of the body is special, and the brain is just a container of consciousness. Consciousness can be found everywhere in the body. "

Chen Mo told Mo Nu his experience.

This is what he came up with after he woke him up in the Star Forest.

"Our body, consciousness can no longer be confined to the brain."

Hearing this, the ink girl far away from the earth has bright eyes. She was born with quantum consciousness and a terrible IQ. Chen Mo picked out the situation, and all her ideas came together.

"I try." Mo Nu said.

chapters.title: Chapter 953: : Banquet
chapters.body:
Chapter 953: : Banquet

The outside world is still staying on the topic of Chen Mo's second change, and the great civilization that came to participate in the Star Festival is focusing on another major event.

Banquet of the Mu Family Star Family.

Only powerful civilizations, or particularly famous nobles, will receive an invitation letter from the Mu Family Star Family.

At each Star Festival, the family of Mushi Star will feast on the representatives of the envoys of the top civilizations and provide a platform for all civilizations to communicate with each family group.

Now that the space war is fierce, this star event is a very rare exchange platform for major civilizations. To form alliances and help each other, or to cling to the chances of great civilizations, the chance of surviving in troubled times is greater if there is one more ally and friend.

Xiaoyu helped Chen Mo to organize his collar and patted his chest with satisfaction. He wore a tuxedo with the characteristics of the earth. Chen Mo's figure was a perfect hanger. If it were on the earth, I don't know how many women would be fascinated.

This banquet usually wears the dresses of their respective civilizations. This is a traditional etiquette. Even today, when the warframe civilization is developed and high technology is everywhere, it is no exception.

"It's handsome and fits nicely." Xiao Yu nodded with satisfaction after looking at it again.

The clothes are made of nano-materials. When you need to wear the armor, it can automatically shrink to the body without affecting the use of the armor.

Guests can wear armor in, just like every guest's luxury sports car in the Earth Banquet, excellent or outstanding, or the use of the latest technology armor show, is also a face.

"Are you sure not to go?" Chen Mo asked.

"This kind of intrigue is not suitable for me." Xiao Yu shook his head and said: "Will you go to the banquet this time, will you have no problem?"

She knows that Chen Mo directly offended three god-level civilizations and indirectly offended one. At the banquet, if the four god-level civilizations were in trouble, there would be no small trouble.

"No, did you forget how powerful I am now?"

Chen Mo patted Xiaoyu's back, signaling that she didn't have to worry.

When coming out of the room, Chen Mo saw Jing Ge was already wearing a suit of the earth waiting in the hall of the manor.

This time Jing Ge accompanied him.

For Jing Ge, it would be a miracle to be able to promise him to go to the banquet together.

In addition to Jing Ge, there are several guards led by Ku Yao who are responsible for Chen Mo's bodyguard tonight. This year, when I go out without a few bodyguards, don't mean to say that you have a head and a face.

The old mansion of the Mu Family Star family is not far from the Star Forest, on a small plain beside the mountains and water.

The reason why Chen Mo took part in this was to admire the courage of Mu Shi Tianxing, and secondly, I wanted to see what the elite banquets of the most powerful civilizations in the universe were.

The speed of the armor is very fast, and there is no need to worry about being late.

A group of people flew in the air, Chen Mo looked at the scene below. The night view of the main star's city will be very beautiful, all kinds of strange high-rise buildings, in line with the aesthetics of various life, as well as the various shuttles and aircraft flying through the air.

About fifteen minutes, Warframe entered the air control range of the Mu Family Star family.

A reminder sound came from Chen Mo's battle armor's public communication channel, reminding them that the Mu Family's Star Family Banquet had landed, and could not enter the no-empty area, otherwise it would be regarded as an intruder.

After landing on the armored platform, various machines will appear to check whether the armor carries weapons of mass destruction. If so, it will be taken out and destroyed, and if it is not checked, it will enter the armored docking area.

Security screening is very strict, after all, it is the most banquet banquet.

Chen Mo came out of the battle armor, took out the invitation card given to him by Mu Changsheng and handed it to the waiter who came to greet him.

Seeing Chen Mo's face clearly, the waiter's heart is awe-inspiring. The life in front of him is the life that has evolved twice in the Star Forest. This is a big event that caused a sensation in the Star Monument. As long as you pay attention to the life of the news, you know Chen Mo's appearance.

The invitation was sent by the eldest son of the Mu Family's Star Family, Mu Shi Changsheng, and the signature of Mu Shi Changsheng.

"Sir, please."

Under the leadership of the waiter, Chen Mo and Jing Ge entered the banquet. The bodyguard cannot enter the battlefield, so Ku Yao and other guards can only wait outside the manor.

Soon, Chen Mo saw the longevity of Mu Shi under the guidance of the waiter.

Because the banquet has too many lives, the patriarch of the Mu Family's Tianxing family alone cannot receive him.

Therefore, the principle of the Mu Family Star Family Banquet is to give invitations to the excellent life of the family, and part of the list that must be invited, let them send invitations, whoever sends out invitations, whoever is responsible for receiving guests.

At this time, Mushi Changsheng stood at the door with a smile on her face. She was dressed in the traditional costumes of the Mushitianxing family. The clothing is in line with the temperament of the Mushitianxing family. She is low-key and restrained, and looks friendly and confident.

Mu's longevity is the eldest son of the Mu's Star family. It can be said that he is the younger owner of the Mu's Star family in the future. The guests he receives seem to be in low status.

Beside him, is his assistant, occasionally reminding him of the name and civilization of the person coming.

When Chen Mo arrived at the door, Mu Shichangsheng's eyes were bright and his smile was even worse. He stepped forward and greeted him a few steps: "Sir, don't come unharmed. I have heard about the past few days. I did not expect Mr. to be so genius. excuse me."

Zi Yun personally told him that Chen Mo offended several god-level civilizations, including the Ziwei civilization, but Mu's longevity did not stand in the way.

The rules of the Mu Family Star Family are all visitors. They will all be greeted by the host's courtesy, and they will not ask about the grievances and hatred between the guests. This is their position as a permanent neutral.

Chen Mo naturally knows the number of courtesies and politeness, and also politely greets the longevity of Mu Family: "You're welcome, and thank you for your ancestor's stele, benefit a lot."

These words are advancing and retreating, Chen Mo's expression is calm and confident, not overbearing.

Mu's longevity smiled and looked at Chen Mo again. He apologized and said: "Sir, there are many guests tonight. Waiting for the time, I will talk to him again, I hope Mr. does not mind."

Chen Mo nodded slightly, said goodbye, and entered the banquet scene with Jing Ge.

An open air banquet

The location of the banquet is in the grassland of the Mu Family Star Family Courtyard. There is a large lake in the center, and the lake is covered by bridges. At night, you can vaguely see the colorful birds playing in the water.

The traditional music of the Mu Family Star family is played, making the surroundings seem less monotonous and the atmosphere is gentle.

On the grass, there is one long table every three meters, extending hundreds of meters, and there are three similar tables. The long table is filled with various gourmet drinks, and various waiters shuttle among them, or add gourmet food, or lead guests.

At the banquet, the guests arrived in groups of three or five, either talking or laughing, or whispering.

This is the largest banquet that Chen Mo has attended. There are no fewer than 100,000 lives in sight. According to the average of two representatives from each civilization, there are gatherings of life from about 50,000 top powers.

Chen Mo's appearance attracted a lot of attention.

Now in Mu Shi Tianxing, Chen Mo is a celebrity. The most dazzling life before the Tianxing Stele Forest evolved twice to become the star festival, was also found to be the life wanted by the crape myrtle civilization.

At this moment, an uncertain voice came from behind: "Brother Jing Ge?"

Chen Mo and Jing Ge were both stunned.

When I turned around, I saw a petite, cute-looking female humanoid looking at them in surprise. It was the female life they saw when they went shopping on the nightless street that Chen Mo gave her Bai Yun of Jing Ge's communication number.

At this time, Bai Yun, a white dress, shines brightly under the light. The dress is not the design style of the earth, but with Bai Yun's appearance and figure, it looks very cute and sweet. At least Chen Mo looks like this in human aesthetics.

"You are there too." Chen Mo and Baiyun greeted each other.

"It's really you, brother Jing Ge, Mr. Chen Mo, I haven't seen you for a long time." Bai Yun looked at Jing Ge in surprise, the light flashed in his big eyes, and quickly walked to Jing Ge: "Mr. Chen Mo, your news, I See it all. "

"That was a fluke." Chen Moke smiled.

Bai Yun smiled and did not speak. He was able to get lucky twice in the Star Forest. Looking at the entire universe, he couldn't find the second one.

Chen Mo looked around Baiyun, and no other life followed: "You came by yourself?"

"I came with my father. My father and good friends were chatting. I was a little bored and walked around alone. I didn't expect to meet you." Bai Yun's big eyes gave Jing Ge a glance from time to time.

Chen Mo patted Jing Ge with a smirk. This time he was not afraid that Jing Ge was bored at this banquet. He turned to Bai Yun and said, "You mentioned this, I suddenly remembered that an old friend had asked me, you accompany Jing Go chat, and find you later. Hey ... "

Chen Mo laughed softly and walked away quickly.

Jing Ge can't wait to fight Chen Mo. He obviously heard gloating from Chen Mo's laughter, but Bai Yun followed him, making his scalp numb.

chapters.title: Chapter 954: : Sir, Good Or Bad, I Like It Very Much
chapters.body:
Chapter 954: : Sir, Good Or Bad, I Like It Very Much

Looking around, I don't know.

Chen Mo did not deliberately know the representatives of the great civilizations, because it was not necessary, he could see that some representatives of the big civilizations were more or less guarded, because he was a wanted criminal of the Ziwei civilization.

The food prepared by the Mushitian family is very rich, mainly some foods that are not toxic to all life. They drink the traditional drinks of Mushitianxing. Chen Mo tried it, and the taste is not bad.

Suddenly he thought of Jia of Qingshuixing, the alien who loves to drink.

When he returned to earth, he had people go to Qing Mercury to pick up Ga, but unfortunately the war armor repair shop had already been empty.

"Mr. Chen Mo."

A somewhat familiar voice appeared behind Chen Mo, the voice was cold, and Chen Yun could not help but emerge the figure of Zi Yun.

Zi Yun wore a purple dress, her purple skin was all exposed, and her arms were embroidered with bright crape myrtle flowers, making her look very noble.

The appearance of Zi Yun immediately became the focus of the field.

Ziwei civilization.

The representatives of the great civilizations around and the nobles and nobles instantly calmed down, and it took a few seconds before they became commotion. Ziwei civilization, Ziyun civilization came to the delegation, Zi Yun as the representative messenger.

The guests began to whisper, and the already lively banquet venue became more noisy.

The guests looked at Chen Mo's eyes with a little sympathy.

Chen Mo is a wanted criminal of Ziwei civilization. They all received news, so Chen Mo made such a big noise in the Star Forest and showed extremely talented ability. None of the great civilizations and forces sent him an invitation letter.

Now at the banquet, I met the representatives of Ziwei civilization, and now there is a good show.

Although the Lagerstroemia civilization is not the most powerful among the seven god-level civilizations, the Lagerstroemia civilization has been the most powerful in history. The first batch of cosmic civilization pioneers created the Warframe system and countless geniuses have become stars.

It was only the emperor Zizi defected, killed a group of geniuses, and uncovered the decay inside the Ziwei civilization. The Ziwei civilization did not have an excellent successor, which led to the decline of the Ziwei civilization in the past two thousand years.

But even the crape myrtle civilization is still unfathomable, and not just life and civilization can offend.

Although they knew that Chen Mo had masters of top-level armored divisions, there were many such masters in Ziwei civilization. Top-tier armored divisions were everywhere, and the most terrifying was the strength of the war department of the god-level civilization army.

If Ziwei civilization is in a difficult situation, no one dares to help Chen Mo.

Chen Mo, who has become the center of the guest's topic, is at this time affectionate and calm, and does not care about the appearance of Zi Yun.

"Mr. Chen Mo, don't come unharmed." Zi Yun stood in front of Chen Mo and said coldly, as if to say hello to ordinary friends.

This time, the surrounding guests were amazed and suddenly upset.

Is Chen Mo not a wanted criminal of Ziwei civilization? How it looks like a good friend meets. Chen Mo is definitely a wanted criminal of Ziwei civilization. They have paid attention to the news about Chen Mo and confirmed the wanted list of Ziwei civilization. Until now, that kind of wanted order is still on the list of Ziwei civilization.

In other words, Ziwei Civilization did not want to set hands on Chen Mo at Mu Family's family banquet.

It seems that this is the best explanation.

"Mr. Chen Mo, how was the transaction I mentioned last time? It is still valid." Zi Yun said.

"Do you want to deal with a civilized wanted criminal?" Chen Mo Yile threw the question back to Zi Yun.

"The main gentleman promised that the wanted order can be removed now, and the gentleman will become the most important VIP of our crape myrtle civilization.

Chen Mogang wanted to speak, and another female voice appeared, interrupting the dialogue between the two: "It seems very lively, I'll come to join in the lively."

Chen Mo turned his head, and came over with a fox girl, a face with fox ears, and a white fox tail in the back, and a red-pink evening dress, like the coquette in the movie.

And beside Hu Bingxin, there is a mighty middle-aged life, looking like a lion, with a brown mane around his neck, and a lion tail.

Bai Xingming's Hu Bingxin and Shi Xuan, Chen Mo have seen on the roster materials of the high-level civilizations participating in the Star Festival, but he and the other party seem to have no intersection.

The surrounding guests saw another appearance of Hu Bingxin and Shi Yun. Even the guests who didn't pay much attention to them turned their heads to see the situation.

Mrs. Fox of Baixing Civilization has always been famous, and there are many rumors about her. However, few people have really met, so the identity has always been mysterious. I knew that this time I participated in the Star Festival on behalf of Baixing Civilization before appearing publicly to the outside world.

...

"Brother Yu, Wei, this Chen Mo, what do you think?"

In the corner, three middle-aged lives glanced at Chen Mo's location and communicated with each other.

Without looking at the meaning of hilarity, the topic is very serious.

No other life around dare to approach them. They are the three famous emperors of the Universe Alliance: Yu Di, Wei Di, and Wu Di.

The three emperors are the land of Wu Xian, the head of the land, the Great Wall of the Northern Crown of Wu Xian, sitting in a star field of 10 billion light years.

The three belong to the civilization of the most powerful god-level civilization. It was only suppressed by the **** level all the year round, and now that the universe is in chaos, they have a tendency to faintly become a trend.

"It looks like a personal thing, but it's too young." An emperor whose skin is like a rock gully opens, and his voice is thick and low like a rock: "Mu Xiu Yulin, the life that is targeted by the god-level civilization, does not end It will be good, the magic flame civilization is a lesson. "

The Emperor Yu, with golden metallic luster on the skin beside him, nodded in agreement: "If he didn't offend the Ziwei civilization and the Thor civilization, he could solicit it for our use."

"It's a pity to have a talent." First of all, Emperor Wu nodded slightly: "This event is estimated to be very exciting."

...

"It seems that I just heard that Ziwei civilization seems to have a deal with Mr., I don't know what? Maybe the price of our Baixing civilization will be higher."

Hu Bingxin looked at Chen Mo shiningly with a smile on his face, and the snow-white that could not be covered by the dress, like a ripe peach, was very charming.

Zi Yun's expression suddenly cooled down, glancing at Hu Bingxin, not anxious to talk, but looked at Chen Mo.

She wants to see if Chen Mo is really nervous about the news that superpower development technology is in his hands.

Once the news is leaked, Chen Mo will continue to have trouble.

Even in the face of the two high-level civilizations, Chen Mo was equally calm and confident, saying slowly: "Listening to the rumor that the lady is very smart, or do you guess?"

"It turns out that in the mind of Mr. Bing Xin is so clever. Doesn't the gentleman give a hint?" Hu Bingxin's voice was full of temptation.

"Giving a hint, I can't show my wife's ingenuity." Chen Mo said.

"Mister is really interesting, then I guess."

Hu Bing Xinmei laughed, her beautiful eyes flashed the color of thought, and then looked carefully at Chen Mo.

"There are not many technologies that can interest the old god-level civilization like Ziwei civilization. Special warframe technology? Life evolution technology more advanced than god-level? Super-power development technology? Technology that can extend the life of god-level life ? "

Hu Bingxin's attention is on Chen Mo and Zi Yun. When she said these, she hoped to see some reactions from Chen Mo, but she was disappointed. Chen Mo had a plain expression from beginning to end, and Zi Yun It is a coldness that has remained unchanged for thousands of years.

"Isn't it, Ziwei civilization has no successors, seeing Mr. superior ability, want to recruit Mr. to become a star owner of Ziwei civilization? Then accept Ziyun as Mrs. Zhaizhai?"

Zi Yun's expression froze, looking at Hu Bingxin a little badly.

The other party's meaning is obvious, that is, the Ziwei civilization has decayed, no one succeeds, and he still shy his face and stuck to Chen Mo.

"Mrs. really clever, admire admiration." Chen Mo laughed: "She really traded with me on this condition, you just said, can White Star civilization produce better conditions?"

"Mr. laughed, they gave Ziwei civilization a gift, and they also got a wife. Our white star civilization's net worth is not as rich as the Ziwei civilization. How could there be better conditions than this."

"Who said no? For example, Madam, you are better than her."

Hu Bingxin's beautiful eyes flashed, and Mei smiled: "Cough, sir, good or bad, I like it very much."

A hearty voice emerged from behind Chen Mo, interrupting the exchange of several people: "It's very lively, very happy, did I miss any wonderful topic?"

chapters.title: Chapter 955: :Undercurrent
chapters.body:
Chapter 955: :Undercurrent

The appearance of Tuyun and Shuiling together attracted everyone's attention.

The endless sea appeared, and the cloud of Yunzhou civilization. Needless to say, the guests of many great civilizations in the universe know that the video frequency of Shui Ling's victory over the dark forest civilization, the dark dragon prince, has spread throughout the universe.

The guests of Tuyun are no strangers, attracting a large group of god-level life to follow, with great courage to create a top-level civilization Yunzhou civilization, become a party hegemony, personal strength, is also known as the powerful in the universe.

Although he is a little older than Tongqing, he is not lost to Tongqing in other respects. Tong Qing inherited the position of the speaker of the black pupil civilization, but Tuyun used his own hands to create a top civilization step by step.

Chen Mo is like a magnet, attracting the attention of many god-level civilizations.

The three god-level civilizations, plus the strong man of Tuyun, all gathered at Chen Mo, and Chen Mo's location became the focus of the audience.

"I haven't seen you for a long time, brother Chen Mo." Tu Yun greeted Chen Mo heartily.

"Long time no see, Mr. Chen Mo."

Shui Ling also greeted him politely. Her teacher told her that when she met Chen Mo in the future, she should be friendly. Although she didn't know the reason, she believed the teacher's ability unconditionally.

"This is Mrs. Fox and Ms. Ziyun, and you have long admired your name." Tuyun looked at Hu Bingxin and Ziyun, and was also polite to say hello.

In their lives at this level, what they see is more than just love and hatred. No matter the opponent or partner, the necessary etiquette is definitely not less.

"Mr. Tuyun, please."

Both Hu Bingxin and Zi Yun responded to him, but Hu Bingxin smiled, and Zi Yun, as always, was cold and did not show a smile in order to say hello.

"Just now you guys had a good chat, did we miss something?" Tu Yun asked with a smile.

"Not missed, we just talked."

"Ms. Zi Yun wants to make a deal with Mr. Chen Mo, in fact, I am also interested, but Mr. Chen Mo is not willing to tell me the content of the transaction. If Mr. Tu Yun is interested, you can also ask him." Hu Bingxin said with a smile.

Tu Yun's eyes flashed, and he was also a veteran, naturally knowing the pit in Hu Bing's words.

"Brother Chen Mo is unwilling to tell his wife about the transaction. It must be confidential. I will not ask more." Tu Yun narrowed his eyes and smiled, "Brother Chen Mo, Shi Ganxing, say goodbye now, goodbye now. "

Tuyun diverted the topic and did not want to stay on the original topic.

"It's okay, everything is going well." Chen Mo said: "It's a last resort not to contact my brother during this time."

"Ha ha ha, understand and understand." Tu Yun sun smiled.

Chen Mo offended several god-level civilizations and was naturally cautious about his whereabouts.

"Mr. Chen Mo, let's go back to the topic just now." Hu Bingxin interjected and said, "Ying Yingying said:" The little girl is really curious. The transaction content between Mr. and Ziwei Civilization is serious. "

Both Shui Ling and Tu Yun looked at Chen Mo, waiting for his answer.

Although they didn't ask, they were still curious. After all, the transactions that interested Ziwei civilization were definitely not ordinary things.

Chen Mo was naturally not afraid, and said lightly: "Did you guess it just now?"

"Sir, people say that they are serious, not a joke." Hu Bingxin smiled undiminished: "I heard that Mr. Shi made a deal with Shi Ganxing and Tong Qing, and that transaction could cost us Baixing civilization. Mr. is a businessman, we naturally No wonder, but sir wants to sell things, show everyone, maybe a few competitions, can have better prices. "

"You ask her if you really guessed it." Chen Mo's face didn't matter, and he pointed to Zi Yun next to it.

Zi Yun's eyes gave Chen Mo a cold look.

The man in front of me is not so clever. There are quite a few ways to make gags, and now she is pushing the problem back to her.

Thinking of what Hu Bingxin said just now, Ziyun purple eyes flashed slightly.

"You really guessed it."

The unknown Tuyun and Shuiling were puzzled. Their latecomers didn't know what they just said. Shui Ling couldn't help but ask: "Can you take care of us who just joined, guess what?"

"I admire Mr. Chen Mo's talents. As long as Mr. Chen Mo agrees to my conditions or joins my Ziwei civilization, I can marry Mr. Chen Mo. Obviously, if Mr. Chen is capable, it will not be impossible for Mr. Ziwei to be the master of the future. But Mr. Chen Mo has never given me an answer. "

As soon as this remark came out, they were all surprised.

Fortunately, when several god-level civilizations arrived, the surrounding guests all knew a little bit about the principles. Otherwise, I heard that the conditions released by Zi Yun might arouse uproar.

It's hard to imagine that the core heir of Ziwei civilization can say such conditions.

Tu Yun and Shui Ling have incredible faces. In their view, this condition is almost the most terrifying condition they have ever heard of. Bet on the future of Ziwei civilization, this kind of courage can only be seen by this woman.

But it does n’t have to be the meaning of the crape myrtle star, it may just be the cake given by this woman.

Not only was Shui Ling and Tu Yun shocked, but both Hu Bingxin and Shi Yun were incredible. I thought it was just a joke. I did n’t expect Zi Yun to admit it.

Is the Ziwei Civilization short of talents?

impossible.

Even though Chen Mo is capable and talented, Ziwei civilization is definitely not so urgent.

The only explanation is that Chen Mo has something urgently needed by the Ziwei civilization, so he will use all means to bind Chen Mo.

Several of them looked at Chen Mo.

"I have a wife." Chen Mo said with a shrug.

"I can be small."

"Cough cough ..."

Chen Mo was choked by Zi Yun's words and looked at the expressionless Zi Yun in shock.

Is this woman crazy?

Chen Mo has heard of desperation, but has never seen such unscrupulous ones.

An heir to a god-level civilization, he was given a nameless little **** as his wife. This was heard by other great civilizations who wanted to marry a god-level civilization.

This woman is a bit scary.

Chen Mo gave Zi Yun a deep look.

Tu Yun and Shui Ling's **** expressions, and just a few minutes of chatting, their world collapsed.

Shui Ling used to just listen to the teacher saying she wanted to make Chen Mo, but she was never so crazy. Today, Zi Yun's words refreshed their worldview.

"Mrs. Fox did n’t just say, could you give me better conditions than the Ziwei civilization? Mr. Chen Mo also said, Mrs. Fox is better than me, it ’s better to be the younger Mrs. Fox married Mr. Chen Mo. He'll give it to you. "Zi Yun spoke coldly, and his voice did not fluctuate.

Hu Bingxin, still in shock, has a stiff expression on his face.

She had never imagined that this cold-eyed Ziwei girl, who was so independent, was so ruthless, she first launched herself and then dragged her down.

As the heir to Ziwei civilization, it really is not a fuel-efficient lamp.

This woman doesn't talk much, but it is more terrible than anyone else.

"Ms. Zi Yun laughed, I never knew what you were trading with Mr. Chen Mo. Mr. May you tell me the details of the transaction, let people see if they are worth the price?" Hu Bingxin smiled, eyes Bent into a crescent moon to look at Chen Mo.

None of these two women is easy to deal with.

Questions are thrown over again, Chen Mo is still calm, he naturally will not jump into the pit.

"Princess Ziyun said just now, she admires my talents, and my wife looks at my talents, can you let my wife make me small?" Chen Mo smiled and looked at Hu Bingxin.

Lion's face turned black, looking at Chen Mo's eyes a little badly. For him, this is blasphemy against his wife.

Even the old rivers and lakes of Tuyun, hearing Chen Mo's answer, could not help secretly giving Chen Mo a compliment. This speaking technique is very old-fashioned, and now Hu Bingxin is in a dilemma.

As Hu Bing's heart flashed, thinking about answering language, an untimely voice interrupted them.

"It's hilarious, is it convenient for me to join?" Thunder walked slowly with the glass on his face, with a standard smile on his face: "A few people get together, talk about something, don't you mind me one more?"

There is a high level of god-level civilization, this time is the thunder of the king of thunder civilization. The youngest king of the Thor dynasty has managed one of the most powerful civilizations in the universe.

Secretly paying attention to the guests here is shocked.

But in the circle of god-level civilization, they can't get in touch, and naturally dare not bother to rush in the past.

However, some of the top civilizations who are eyeing the god-level civilizations are always paying attention to the movements here.

Hu Bingxin, who did n’t know how to answer Chen Mo ’s question, saw Thunder appear, her eyes brightened, her smile recovered, and Xiao Yingying looked at Thunder: "Of course welcome, Mr. Thunder. Let me introduce it to you Shi Gan Galaxy, and Mr. Chen Mo of the connector of Tongqing Trading Space. "

Chen Mo narrowed his eyes and glanced at Hu Bingxin, his expression didn't move, but he was alert in his heart.

The light flashed in Thunder's eyes.

Both Tuyun and Shuiling realized that something was wrong. The expression of Hu Bingxin was not bad. Dan's death had an indirect relationship with Chen Mo selling the space connector to Tong Qing.

The atmosphere suddenly became subtle.

Suddenly, Thunder smiled and opened up the subtle atmosphere.

"I have heard Mr. Chen Mo's name. Not only did he deal with Tong Qing, but as far as I know, Mr. Chen Mo rescued the experimental body that Mo Yan civilization escaped from the laboratory when he was in the Shigan Galaxy. At that time, it seemed that you had a fight with your armored division of the White Star Civilization, did you not know each other, right? "

chapters.title: Chapter 956: : Before The Banquet
chapters.body:
Chapter 956: : Before The Banquet

For a time, the scene was turbulent.

Several of the people present did not have a fuel-efficient lamp. Between the lines, they were all intriguing. If the answer was wrong, they would pit themselves in.

Even the less-experienced water hyacinth noticed that the atmosphere was not right.

Anyway, it has nothing to do with yourself. Both Shui Ling and Tu Yun are watching the show.

Hu Bingxin's beautiful eyes flashed slightly, Li Mang was covered in his eyes, and his face remained unchanged.

Chen Mo once rescued the experimental body of the magic flame civilization, but they did not find the news. At first, because the experimental body was taken away, their White Star civilization fell into a passive position in the back competition. Originally, they were the first to know the news of the superpower development technology of the Demon Flame Civilization.

As in her words, Zang Feng said that Chen Mo was indirectly related to Dan's failure. Thunder's words also contained a lot of information. At the time, their failure at Shi Ganxing was caused by Chen Mo.

At this time, Hu Bingxin was in a bad mood, but he couldn't break out. At this time, whoever shows the mood swings first will lose.

Don't look at the two teaming up when dealing with the Thor civilization. The two will really not be allies, otherwise they will not be so happy in the Shigan galaxy. The two teamed up, the real purpose is to destroy the black pupil civilization.

It is a pity that Tongqing appeared, stabilized the black pupil civilization, and also achieved reforms and major blood exchanges, so that their ideas fell through.

Now that the Hongqiao is in shock, the universe channel is open, and the two stars are also connected by the Hongqiao. In the battle for control of the Hongqiao, the two have already had small frictions, but there is no comprehensive war.

Now the confrontation on this occasion is the silent battlefield.

Soon, Hu Bingxin fell into thought.

If Chen Mo rescued the experimental body, then he was in the Shigan galaxy, and he was also very likely to have contacted that technology, and another possible thing appeared.

Ziwei civilization transaction.

Hu Bingxin took a deep look at Zi Yun.

On the other side, Thunder looked at Chen Mo as if nothing else: "Long admiration for the name, Mr. Chen Mo."

"Hello." Chen Mo replied neither coldly nor coldly.

When the eyes touched briefly, the two staggered and did not form a confrontation.

Thunder simply greeted several other players on the field.

In a sense, there is indirect hatred between him and Thor's civilization. It's like during the war, someone bought an airplane from him, then bombed it with an airplane transport weapon, killing the relatives of the other party.

From a rational point of view, this matter has nothing to do with him, because his ‘airplane’ can be bought by anyone, mainly because of the high price, and the corresponding money is paid. From the perspective of human nature, Thor civilization can use him as an accomplice to kill Dan.

"The gentleman's presence in the Star Forest is amazing. I hate the husband very late. If you know the talent of the gentleman, you should make friends in the Shigan Galaxy." Thunder said with regret.

As for whether it is a real regret, it is impossible to determine.

Obviously, several players on the field will not take his regret seriously.

Chen Mo is more or less related to the thundering defeat of Thunder God's civilization in the Shigan galaxy. For Thunder, as a big brother, it is impossible to mind. Thunder is not a saint.

"You're welcome." Chen Mo smiled.

"What were you talking about just now? So hilarious?" Thunder naturally removed the topic from him.

"Mrs. Fox and I are both interested in Mr. Chen Mo's talents. We both want to be Mr. Chen Mo's wife and let him join our civilization. We just talked here just now. Mrs. Fox is considering."

Rao is the Thunder who has seen the world, Zi Yun's words fell in his ears, his expression was still frozen.

The amount of information is a bit large.

Fight for husband, or be a little wife?

There are various civilizations in the universe. There are countless wives in male life and countless wives in female life, but both are the core high-level civilizations of the god-level civilization.

As for lying, looking at the expressions of Tuyun and Shuiling does not seem to be the first time I heard it. Obviously, I am prepared.

For a time, Thunder also began to watch the drama.

Although Chen Mo didn't touch Ziyun very often, the coldness of this female person is from the heart, and he can feel it every time. But the woman was ruthless and she was really desperate.

He was happy to watch the play. Although he was the protagonist, it was not his business.

None of these two women can handle it.

Hu Bing's expression was cold, and soon returned to normal, Xiao Yingying said: "Your transaction content is not just that Mr. Chen Mo's talent is so simple? You don't tell the truth, how dare I promise this kind of thing."

"Ziwei Wenming and Mr. Chen Mo still have a deal?" Thunder heard this and became interested instantly, interjecting: "I wonder if I can listen to what Mr. Chen Mo wants to buy or sell? After all, we didn't talk to Mr. Chen Mo in the Shigan Galaxy. The transaction has suffered heavy losses, and this time we cannot repeat the same mistakes. "

The topic returned to Chen Mo again.

Chen Mo is still calm.

Speaking of super power development technology, he will immediately become the focus of the field, and then be counted by countless top civilizations, let him make super power development technology clear, obviously impossible.

"I didn't say anything to buy or sell from beginning to end." Chen Mo said with a smile.

This time, several people looked at Zi Yun.

"I didn't say what to buy." Zi Yun said coldly.

Several people looked at Hu Bingxin.

Hu Bingxin's brows frowned slightly, and he quickly spread out, with a smile on his face: "That may be because I heard it wrong."

The audience is clear.

Will Tuyun and Shuiling believe their words? Obviously impossible.

Thunder is even less likely to believe their words.

Maybe there is really a transaction between Ziwei Civilization and Chen Mo, but the content, because Chen Mo did not want to sell, so it was not announced.

"I seem to be late."

At this moment, a thick voice appeared.

Tong Qing appeared in the meeting place, not far from them, and was coming towards several of them.

On his left, is the life of the Mu star family, there is a national costume, like a highly respected character of the Mu star family, and on the right of Tong Qing, is a female life of the black pupil, his assistant Tara, The dress is the traditional dress of the black pupil civilization.

The appearance of Tongqing caused a great uproar.

"What happened? Tong Qing has passed?"

"What special charm does that male person have, attracting the most powerful civilized power leaders is incredible."

"This is a big show."

"..."

"Tongqing is also here. Who are the people Mr. Chen Mo knows?" Bai Yun looked at Chen Mo and asked Jing Ge curiously.

However, Jing Ge still did not answer his question.

Beside Jing Ge, Bai Yun is the one who actively speaks. She seems to know that Jing Ge doesn't like talking very much.

"Several representatives of god-level civilizations are big figures. Mr. Chen Mo, will he be okay?" Bai Yun couldn't help worrying. Chen Mo also came with Jing Ge.

"He's okay." Jing Ge glanced calmly and said.

"You are finally willing to talk, hehe." Bai Yun was suddenly surprised.

Among the onlookers, countless gossips began to discuss in a low voice.

Today ’s overlord of the universe, Tong Qing is the well-deserved strongest person, not only personal force, but also courage, mind, vision and strategy.

Even if Thunder defeated the former speaker of Black Hitomi Civilization, in the eyes of the outside world, he still lost better than Hitomi.

Take charge of the black pupil civilization, and allow the black pupil civilization to complete the reform and centralization in a short time, abolish the black pupil council that is dead and dull, controlled by the nobles and large families, and change the legal system of the black pupil civilization for hundreds of millions of years. , Not everyone has it.

In today's chaotic world, apart from a few god-level civilizations, no other civilization dares to actively provoke the black pupil civilization.

In the battle of the Shigan Galaxy, there is widespread speculation in the outside world, including killing Dan, using military weapons privately, and being sentenced to black hole prison, all designed by Tong Qing.

If it were only to kill Dan, it would be impossible for the black pupil civilization to send Tong Qing to the black hole prison, or even punish him. What is angry with Wei Luoyun is that he privately uses military power.

While Tong Qing was imprisoned, the two civilizations joined forces to exert pressure, and the important military figures of the black pupil civilization could not be hidden, causing a crisis of the black pupil civilization. When Wei Luoyun lost his prestige, Tong Qing appeared with the trend, and took over the black pupil civilization in the crisis, in order to carry out drastic reforms, the resistance was very small.

It's just about all this, it's all speculation from the outside world. Tong Qing won't personally confirm these rumors.

"Long absence, Brother Chen Mo."

Tong Qing smiled and Chen Mo greeted each other, looking at several others, and also greeted each other.

Even though the black pupil civilization and the thunder **** civilization have enmity, at this moment the pupil Qing and thunder are still slightly greeted, and there is no hatred and confrontation in each other's eyes.

A small detail has attracted many high-level civilized accidents.

Tong Qing greeted Chen Mo first, and then greeted representatives of other civilizations. This shows that in Tong Qing's heart, Chen Mo's position is more important than the others.

And Chen Mo's status cannot be compared with several others? It's just a notorious little pawn.

...

Chen Mo responded lightly to Tong Qing, and didn't feel very cold about Tong Qing's title of 'brother'.

Hitomi impressed him.

This man is terrible, and he doesn't want to have any intersection with the other party [Guchengdushu.com].

"This is Mr. Chen Mo, who has changed in the Star Forest at noon today. I am glad to be here. I am the head of the Mu Family Star family. Mu Family is heavy." The old Mu Family Star family who came with Tong Qing introduced themselves with a smile : "Last time when I was going to send you an invitation, my son Changsheng said that it has been sent to you. I didn't expect that you are familiar with these people and almost missed it."

Mu Shi looked at Chen Mo up and down. This young man gave him a very special feeling, which was extraordinary. This came from his intuition.

"The patriarch passed the prize." Chen Mo humbled back.

Chen Mo naturally knew the courtesy of the scene.

"Then a few of you are talking first. The banquet is about to start. I will move to prepare first." Mu Shizhong and the people on the court said goodbye and turned to leave.

"Remember to meet Brother Chen Mo for the first time, in the Shigan Galaxy. At that time, I knew that Brother Chen Mo was not a mortal. The deal with Brother Chen Mo was the most cost-effective deal I have ever done. Say thanks to Chen Mo Brother. "Tong Qing said.

"It's just a deal. You buy me and sell. Other people come and sell like me. You are just lucky." Chen Mo naturally paid attention to the look of Thunder next to him. He didn't want to be labeled as a black pupil civilization.

"It seems that Brother Chen Mo is very thorough." Tong Qingshuang smiled.

"Nothing is opaque, I used to be a businessman." Chen Mo's tone was still plain, even when faced with Tong Qing, he had no pressure.

When several people wanted to chat in depth, the music of the banquet started and the fireworks show began. The colorful fireworks, like a fleeting masterpiece in the sky, illuminate the whole venue.

chapters.title: Chapter 957: : Princess Arowana
chapters.body:
Chapter 957: : Princess Arowana

The main banquet of the banquet officially began, robots entered the venue, and tens of thousands of tables and round tables spread out neatly in the venue. Each table is numbered, and each invitation card is numbered and has its own position.

If you need to change the location, you can explain to the organizer that the Mu Family Star Family will help add a location to the table he wants to go to.

The main table No. 1 is in the center, which is no different from the surrounding tables. The only difference is that the life and the representative of civilization behind it can sit on that table.

Chen Mo said goodbye to a few people on the court and went to his numbered seat.

Jing Ge also appeared beside Chen Mo, passing towards their location.

The petite girl Bai Yun also followed, making Chen Mo a little surprised, and looked at Jing Ge deeply. Jing Ge threw him a white eye and was helpless to follow Bai Yun.

"Baiyun, why don't you go to your father?" Chen Mo asked.

"I go the same everywhere. My father is talking to his so-called friends. It doesn't matter if I'm present or not." Bai Yun leaned to the left of Jing Ge.

Jing Ge's left hand froze, motionless, subconsciously away from Baiyun, took it and was attached.

"Brother Jing Ge, why are you still afraid of me?" Bai Yun muttered.

"He hasn't been close to girls, you are so close, he doesn't know what to do." Chen Mo said.

"Brother Jing Ge is very cute." Bai Yun smiled.

"It's very cute." Chen Mosha agreed with his own affairs, and his face was smiling. Jing Ge is a **** guard, as well as a martial arts instructor who is armed at the top of the marching ant group. His style is fierce and aggressive, and now he is said to be cute by a girl.

Jing Ge's cheeks also twitched, and this time he dared not stay away, but his body was extremely stiff.

He regretted following Chen Mo.

Chen Mo's round table is a table of several top civilizations, with good strength, but compared with other top civilizations on the field, it can only be at the lower middle level.

Seven domains, twelve places, one hundred and eight cities, as well as some other major forces of the universe, except for several star cities destroyed, representatives of powerful top civilizations and major power groups, all present.

This banquet brought together the most powerful and powerful civilizations and forces in the entire universe, just like the G20 summit forum on Earth, but this is a universe-level forum platform.

Chen Mo appeared, and the top civilization representatives on the table recognized him.

Today, there was such a big noise that there were two changes in the Star Forest, and it was difficult for them to pay attention to Chen Mo.

And I have just heard that several senior leaders of the god-level civilization went to Chen Mo. Although Chen Mo may be attracted by the heat or the grievances of the Ziwei civilization, at least Chen Mo talked to the god-level civilization.

The three Chen Mo sat down, and there were no guests on the table communicating with them.

Mainly unfamiliar, Chen Mo only appeared in the battlefield as a distinguished division, not a representative of a top civilization, they were also afraid of being mistakenly targeted by Ziwei civilization, causing trouble.

The three Chen Mo were happy.

"Mr. Chen Mo, where is your home?" Bai Yun is like a curious baby.

"You should ask Jing Ge." Chen Mo smiled.

"Brother Jing Ge didn't speak to me."

"Hey, he is cold-hearted, in fact he likes you very much."

Chen Mo tried his best to promote Jing Ge out of the market, ignoring Jing Ge's threatening eyes, what to see, this lively girl and Jing Ge's dull oil bottle really have a bit of complementary character.

"After waiting for this star event, I will tell you the address, you can take friends to travel when the time comes, our hometown is very interesting."

"It's a word."

Bai Yun has also heard that Chen Mo is a wanted criminal of Ziwei civilization, and it is normal to disclose the address inconveniently.

"Look at the performance." Chen Mo pointed to the performance venue in the lake.

After the fireworks stopped, a huge stage floated out of the lake in the middle of the banquet hall. Under the lights, it burst into unparalleled colors.

A figure jumped from the lake, and in the air, the fish tail disappeared quickly, turned into a pair of flawless long legs, and landed on the stage steadily.

At the waist is a fish scale short skirt, perfect barefoot, straight jade legs completely exposed to the air, flat belly, willow waist, and Xuefeng partially covered by the fish scale suit. A typical human face has sequin-colored fish scales at the corners of its eyes and crystal blue eyes, pure and flawless.

"Arowana, it's Princess Arowana."

"Unexpectedly, the Mu Family's Star family invited Princess Arowana to perform."

"Blessed ears this time."

"..."

The appearance of the woman attracted a lot of discussion in the banquet hall, and Bai Yun beside Chen Mo even exclaimed.

Chen Mo was so surprised that he saw the mermaid for the first time, so human-like.

After the fish tail of the dragon fish turns into legs, it is the shape of a human. It is exactly the same as the mermaid in the earth movie. This is the magic of the creator.

"Is this Dragon Fish Princess famous?" Chen Mo asked Bai Yun curiously.

"You wouldn't even have heard of the princess Arowana? She is one of the princesses of the mermaid civilization and the hottest star in the universe. From an early age, she gave up the life of the royal family of the mermaid civilization, traveled the universe and watched the universe. At last, she entered the entertainment industry. Countless lives are her admirers. Her singing voice is the most beautiful voice in the universe, and countless lives are fascinated by it. "Bai Yuntao introduced continuously.

Between the speeches, a melodious and beautiful song sounded, and Bai Yun did not consciously calm down. Ethereal and pure, as if singing from the depths of the soul, it makes people uncomfortably emerge the scene in the singing.

I dropped the armor and returned to the hidden pastoral, only because of your tears

I thought it would be your gentle smile

Your eyes are as pure as the stars, but you are sad in the morning

Endless war, your smile is no longer perfect

Billions of light years away

Xinghe is your home, filled with **** Yunxia.

Under the smoke, pull out the armor in the dust

Brilliant galaxy, endless battle song

...

The tenderness is mixed with the song of war, and the love and hatred of life are written, which makes many guests bloody. In the singing of the dragon fish princess, it has a peculiar attraction.

Mermaid singing.

Until the song fell, the mood of the guests could not be calmed down for a long time, and they were still immersed in the mood of the song.

Applause was enduring in the venue.

Chen Mo was very surprised. He heard such a beautiful voice for the first time.

Not only was it amazing, but Chen Mo made a strange discovery from the singing of Princess Arowana. This dragon fish princess is an ability, the voice is her ability, can bring people into the illusion, similar to the ability of hypnosis.

"Thank you, it's my honor to perform on this stage for everyone." Princess Longyu bowed towards the banquet and walked away from the stage.

An assistant said a few words in Princess Arowana's ear, and Princess Arowana walked over to table 1.

Starting with other performances, this banquet is an exchange platform, and these performances are essential for fun. All the programs have a strong cultural flavor in the Starfield.

Chen Mo enjoys the performance while enjoying the food, leisurely.

There are not many friends at the banquet, but the food is very good for Chen Mo's appetite.

On the other side, table one, which is the main banquet table, is another atmosphere.

Princess Arowana was invited to the No. 1 table, and the life sitting around the No. 1 table was the most powerful civilization of this star event.

Tong Qing, Thunder, Fox Bingxin, Zi Yun, Shui Ling, Tu Yun, Dark Forest Civilization, Dinnamiro, Ming Civilization, Ming Qiyu, and their assistants, Mu Shizhong With the eldest son Mu Shichangsheng, and the princess Arowana just joined.

"I'm very happy to be appreciated by everyone. Dragonfish is sincere, I would like to salute you first." Princess Dragonfish took the wine glass in front of him and saluted everyone at the table, and then sat down.

The table was quiet, and the big guys on the field were reluctant to speak.

They are the seven god-level civilizations, but private relations are all fighting each other, there are alliances, but the relationship of allies is not reliable, and no one will obey anyone.

Now that the universe war is coming, war frictions between each other appear, and on this occasion, they have more confrontations in their words.

"Miss Arowana's ability is very special."

Tong Qing took the lead to break the silence and looked at Princess Arowana with a friendly smile on her face.

"Thank you Mr. Tongqing for his compliment. Dragonfish is only a little capable. It is an honor for Dragonfish to be appreciated by Mr. Tongqing." Princess Dragonfish said with a smile.

"Seeing the Dragon Fish Princess reminds me of a person. It is very similar to the life characteristics of the Dragon Fish Princess. It is almost the same life group as the princess. He seems to know everyone on the field. A friend, everyone has a topic. "Tong Qing looked around for a week and said lightly.

"Mr. Tong Qing said that Mr. Chen Mo just now?" Mu Shi asked again.

"Exactly, you invite people to invite him to our table. Will you have any opinions?" Tong Qing said with a smile, looking very friendly.

"Mr. Chen Mo, I like it tightly, naturally no opinion." Hu Bingxin smiled.

The other few did not speak, obviously the default.

"Then trouble the patriarch, send someone to ask Chen Mo to come over and tell him." Tong Qing's voice was much softer.

For a time, the table was quiet, and everyone looked calm, without waves.

chapters.title: Chapter 958: : Do Super-Power Development Technologies Sell?
chapters.body:
Chapter 958: : Do Super-Power Development Technologies Sell?

It must be said that this banquet prepared by the Mu Family Star Family is a feast of sight, hearing and taste.

When Chen Mo was immersed in the show, a butler of Mu Shi Tianxing appeared, pulling him out of the immersion.

Chen Mo froze.

Ask him to go to the main table at this time?

But thinking about the reason, Chen Mo knew it.

"Jing Ge ..."

"Go by yourself." Jing Ge said lightly.

It was rejected before speaking.

Chen Mo can only be alone, keep up with the housekeeper, and walk towards the No. 1 table.

Along the way, many people were concerned about Chen Mo, especially when Chen Mo was near the No. 1 table.

Chen Mo has recently been a figure of the wind and clouds. Is this to be valued and invited by the god-level civilization?

"Princess Arowana was praised by her face, what qualification does Chen Mo have to serve?"

"Unclear, maybe related to their chat just now."

Many lives on the field are speculating about the reason why Chen Mo arrived at table one.

Chen Mo gave a courtesy to everyone and sat calmly in the position prepared for him. Next to him, was the dragon fish princess just invited: "Dragon fish princess, your song just sounded good."

"Thank you for your praise."

Princess Arowana curiously looked at Chen Mo who was similar in appearance to her.

After her tail becomes a leg, she is now a human being, and Chen Mo is a human being. For the first time, she saw the same life as her, except for the clan, and this life is a little special.

However, several of the people present were the core high-level leaders of the god-level civilization and even those in power, and all of them were hegemons in the universe.

And Chen Mo seems to be the genius life with the second change in the Star Forest today.

She was able to sit at this table because she was lucky. Several overlords saw her singing nicely, and she was also a beauty star, and she came to see her face. Chen Mo was personally spoken by Tong Qing, and everyone else agreed to be invited, which made her have to wonder, what the **** is this.

She wouldn't simply think that because the overlord on the field was looking for Chen Mo's talent to let him come.

"Is Princess Longyu curious about Mr. Chen Mo?" Tong Qing looked at Chen Mo's Longyu Princess secretly and smiled.

"Yes, Mr. Chen Mo feels like my kind, but it doesn't seem to be." Princess Longyu did not shy away. She knew that on this occasion, any thoughts she had were superfluous, and she didn't shy away.

"Unfortunately, she is not the same as Princess Longyu." Chen Mo said politely.

"Mr. Chen Mo is incredible. Has Princess Longyu heard of the incident of the Shigan Galaxy?" Tong Qing asked with a smile.

"Slightly know one or two. Is there any connection between Mr. Chen Mo and the incident of Shigan Galaxy?" Arowana asked curiously.

"Mr. Chen Mo is the promoter of the Shigan galaxy event, both at the beginning and at the end. Mr. Chen Mo is also one of the lives I admire the most, and the future is unlimited." Tong Qing said.

Princess Arowana looked at Chen Mo in surprise.

"In the whole event that year, I was just passing Shiganxing in the course of cosmic travel, passing by antimatter energy. If I knew that such a big thing would happen there, I would never go to Shigan Galaxy. I was a little late to go home Months, I almost couldn't go back. "

Chen Mo spread his hand and expressed his frustration.

But Thunder next to him looked a little bad, but was hidden. Mentioning the time of the Shigan Galaxy is a thorn in Thor's civilization and his heart.
