Hu Bingxin stared at Chen Mo with a smile on his face, and seemed to be thinking about the incident of the Shigan Galaxy. Just now, Thunder told her that Chen Mo was the one who robbed the experimental body, and she connected all that. The intelligence personnel of Baixing Civilization , Work is still insufficient.

"Brother Chen Mo, I had a fresh memory of the transaction with you. I have been looking for you for so many years. I don't know where the brother Chen Mo is developing now? I will visit when I have time." Tong Qing asked curiously.

Several others cast their eyes.

Several families have been searching for Chen Mo's news these years, but since the time of Shigan Galaxy, Chen Mo has been hidden like the evaporation of the universe.

"Don't you know?" Chen Mo asked curiously: "I thought you all know that, since you don't know yet, then maybe you don't care about me either. You don't have to use the condoms, the house is a bit messy, and I ask you to visit you someday."

Everyone on the field turned black, and he said nothing.

"After the Shigan galaxy came out, I always wanted to visit Mr. Chen Mo and make a friend with Mr. Chen Mo. Why can't I find someone, and I thought I wouldn't be able to see you anymore since then. It has been a pity. Now it seems that Mr. Chen Mo doesn't want to We make friends. "Tong Qinglan laughed.

"I know where Mr. Chen Mo is."

The mute civilization, who had been silent on the table, said that Qi Qiyu suddenly opened his mouth, attracting the attention of all the guests on the field.

Ming Qi Yu, a typical life of the civilization of the Ming body, the head of the animal, the skin is gray-black, like the color of lead. After attracting attention from the field, Ming Qiyu swallowed away the alcoholic beverage in the glass before slowly speaking.

"It seems to be in Pisces Whale, am I right, Mr. Chen Mo?" Ming Qiyu asked.

"Congratulations on the guess, but no reward."

Chen Mo did not deny it and admitted frankly.

Several other assistants around the field [tick novel www.mt1988.com] immediately took out the communicator to obtain information about Pisces and Whale.

"Did the marching ant group belong to the Chen Mo brothers?" Tong Qing asked in surprise.

In recent years, the news of the war of the universe's great civilization has appeared on Tong Qing's desk. He noticed that the marching ant group, mainly at the beginning of the Hongqiao panic, unified Pisces Whale, like a sudden top-level civilization.

The fighting power of Pisces Whale is strong, and various weapon technologies are not weak. Because Pisces constellation is not in contact with the star domain of the black pupil civilization, and the chaotic pattern of the universe, Tong Qing did not pay too much attention.

"It's an honor to surprise Mr. Tong Qing." Chen Mo said.

"It seems that Brother Chen Mo is really not an ordinary life. He has laid such a large foundation, and is so low-key, admire and admire." Tong Qinglang laughed: "It was just heard that Brother Chen Mo and Ziwei civilization have a deal?"

When the pupil Qinghua turned, the scene became quiet.

All eyes are on Chen Mo and Zi Yun.

The dragon fish also looked over and thought it was a normal transaction between the two civilizations.

"Yes, but Mr. Chen Mo did not agree." Zi Yun said coldly, expressionless.

Chen Moruo watched the banquet performance casually before saying, "It's mainly what Ziyun Girl wants to buy, I don't want to sell it now."

"It turns out that it was Ms. Zi Yun's wishful thinking." Tong Qing understood, saying lightly: "Since Brother Chen Mo and Ziwei Civilization have not dealt with, and we have also cooperated, it is better to talk about a deal with us. "

"I also said something." Hu Bingxin interjected, interrupting the communication between Tong Qing and Chen Mo, and Mei Xiao said, "I also want to make a deal with Mr. Chen Mo."

"It seems that everyone has a good heart, and I also have this idea." Lei Ting said.

Uninformed Dinnamiro and Ming Qiyu frowned, not knowing what they were fighting for, and Shui Ling and Tu Yun also looked at each other in confusion, and the father and son of Mu Shi Tianxing left for some reason, and handed over table 1 completely to them. .

As for the princess Arowana, she was just watching. Now that the banquet was in the middle of the banquet, some overlords would not let her go. She did not dare to leave like the patriarch of Mu Shi Tianxing. She didn't know the grievances. She was still watching the program on the stage. Generally, she listened to a few people chatting and didn't feel anything wrong.

The confrontation on the table has already begun.

"That's not as good as the lady said first, the lady has priority, universal rules of the universe." Tong Qing gave Hu Bingxin the next words.

Hu Bing Xinmei smiled and said: "President Qing Qing is polite, queuing is the universal rule."

"First come, then come, Mr. Tong Qing said the transaction first, not as good as Mr. Tong Qing, you said first." Lei Ting said after Hu Bingxin.

"Since it's so polite, I'll say it first." Tong Qing smiled and drank the wine in the glass. Just after the program was introduced on the stage, the scene was a little quiet, and he said: "I don't know Brother Chen Mo, you have it 'S super power development technology, can you sell it? "

Tong Qing's voice was not loud, but all the guests who were concerned about the communication at the No. 1 table could hear clearly, dumbfounded.

chapters.title: Chapter 959: :Deadlock
chapters.body:
Chapter 959: :Deadlock

Ming Tu looked at the manor in front, without hesitation, the armor slowly flew past. As he approached the manor, he was suddenly stopped by the two guards who appeared.

"What's the matter with your Excellency?" A guard asked calmly.

Both guards watched Ming Tu alertly.

They all know that the King of Gods is in the Star Forest, and now they are in trouble, they dare not relax.

Once a problem occurs, none of them can afford it.

"I'm looking for Chen Mo." Ming Tu said coldly.

The two guards stared at each other, and were suddenly alert.

"I am not malicious, and ask him to make a deal."

"Sorry, our king is not here now." The two **** guards are now unsure of Ming Tu's identity, looking up and down at Ming Tu.

"I can wait for him to come back." Ming Tu's voice didn't feel anything, like a cold robot, in a sense, he was a robot.

"What's your name? Where do you come from, we report it."

"Mingtu, there is no power."

"Wait a moment."

One of the guardians immediately contacted Xiaoyu in the manor. Now the **** king is not here, only the **** can make the decision, in case the other party is a valuable guest, they refuse to go out, it will cause trouble.

Xiaoyu was puzzled when she received the contact.

Ming Tu?

She had never heard of this name, nor had she heard Chen Mo say. It is unlikely that she was a familiar friend of Chen Mo.

The holographic projection of Ming Tu was right in front of her, and she was sure that she had never seen this life.

"Do you have anything to do with him?" Xiao Yu asked softly.

Ming Tu looked at Xiao Yu's holographic projection, without expression: "Do a deal."

"What deal?" Xiao Yu asked in doubt.

"The transaction is very important to me. I want to speak with Chen Mo personally." Ming Tu said coldly.

This transaction is not trivial. He only came to bet on his own destiny. He will not talk to any life until he sees Chen Mo.

"he is not here."

"Can you contact him?"

"He went to the banquet of the Mu Family Star Family, I am not good to disturb him now." Xiao Yu looked at Ming Tu, thinking about the purpose of Ming Tu, unable to guess, and finally said: "If your matter is really important , You can come in and wait for him to come back. "

"Yes." Ming Tu thought slightly and nodded.

"Bitter letter, bitterness, please come in." After that, Xiaoyu closed the hologram.

"Sir, the rules of our manor, foreign war armor can not enter." Ku Xin said.

Ming Tu nodded slightly, separated from the armor, and marched towards the manor.

...

Does super-capacity development technology sell?

The meaning of Tong Qing is very clear, that Chen Mo possesses super-powered development technology. This technology that can allow life to evolve to a higher level is a technology that is now being explored throughout the universe.

Why is the Shigan galaxy sensational?

Not because of the death of the trillions of lives in the Shigan Galaxy, but because of the superpower development technology of the Demon Flame Civilization, which attracted the competition of the god-level civilization.

The technology coveted by god-level civilizations, let alone other civilizations.

This news appeared and spread throughout the banquet in a short time, and suddenly there was a commotion.

No guest puts their thoughts on the performances of the banquet anymore. The news of super-capacity development technology is much more important than these performances.

All the guests at the banquet table around the No. 1 table looked at Chen Mo, among which there were three emperors and six kings, as well as other top civilized gangsters and high-level leaders.

How tempting this technology is, they all know it.

The dark tide on the field reached suffocation, and the vortex in the center of the dark tide was Chen Mo.

Tong Qing said, dragging Chen Mo into the center of the storm. deny? At this moment, he denied that the outside world would not believe it, and seemed pale and weak and timid.

At table one, the atmosphere was frozen.

Even if the dragon fish is confused, he knows the game, and he has a long mouth and is speechless. Shui Ling and Tu Yun looked at each other, and they saw each other's serious shock.

The dark forest civilization's Dinan Miro looked at Chen Mo, his eyes narrowed, and the light in his eyes went out.

The worst-looking expression was Ming Qiyu, who felt like he was in trouble.

He knew Chen Mo's marching ant group, and the patriarch seemed to be playing the marching ant group's idea, but he didn't know why. Now that the position of the marching ant group is exposed, then if their corpse civilization plays the idea of the marching ant group, I am afraid that other homes will interfere.

The others were calm and seemed not surprised by the news.

"Brother Chen Mo, how do you feel about this transaction? The conditions are up to you." Tong Qing smiled and smiled.

"If I say not to sell?" Chen Mo's expression remained unchanged, and asked back.

Everyone knows that it is meaningless to deny it at this time, so Chen Mo simply admitted. Sooner or later, superpower development technology will be discovered, it is only a matter of time.

In the future, after the human beings of the earth and the armed people of the marching ant group use it, the news will definitely be leaked.

In fact, in recent years, in order to control the super-power development technology from being leaked out, they have very strict communication control on the soldiers. If the news is scattered, they will be much easier in this regard, but they may face greater external pressure.

"Anything, it has a price, super ability to develop technology, and everyone on the field has different levels of breakthroughs. R & D is a matter of time. Why did Brother Chen Mo not use this technology to maximize his own benefits? It should be a smart person. "Tong Qing said.

"Maximize my benefits? What technology do you have that can change my superpower development technology?"

After Chen Mo positively admitted that he had the ability to develop technology, the banquet scene was in an uproar.

Superpower development technology has appeared again, and it is on this occasion, then, Chen Mo will undoubtedly become the focus of the field.

...

"It's a little interesting." Emperor Wu took a sip of the wine in the glass and smiled with interest.

"You said, this time the Seventh Congress will not fight again, and then here in the Star Monument, to reproduce a war in the Shigan Galaxy?" Emperor Wei asked casually.

"The Star Monument is too big to be blocked like the Shigan Galaxy. If the main star is forcibly blocked and there are movements on the periphery, it will be discovered as soon as possible. At that time, it is time to leave early." Yu Di shook his head and looked relaxed.

"I'm afraid this Chen Mo, this time it's not easy to withdraw." Emperor Wu Emperor's mentality of watching the drama.

Play Chen Mo's attention? After hearing about superpower development technology, they all have this idea, when it is useless here. The seven god-level civilizations lined up there, and it was impossible for them to do anything.

Huaibi is guilty not only of the earth, but it is universal. The greed of life has long been the inevitability of this situation.

"This event is getting more and more interesting."

The other gangsters on the banquet table are all like watching a play.

They are not showing greed now because the time is not allowed. If they can contact Chen Mo, I believe that no life can suppress greed in their hearts.

...

What technology can exchange superpower development technology?

On the first table, several of them narrowed their eyes and pondered. Want to impress Chen Mo and let him obediently surrender the technology, there must be exchange conditions, otherwise like Shigan Galaxy, hard to grab?

The Star Monument can't confine space like Shi Ganxing. Once anything is wrong, Chen Mo will leave without hesitation.

They want to go to Pisces and Whale again and attack Chen Mo. And Chen Mo may continue to escape.

"Chen Mo brothers want to say what they want, you can say, if you can afford it, you can sell it. Or you can sell a technology to all our civilizations and maximize the benefits." Thunder said.

"Mr. Chen Mo sold super-powered development technology to our dark forest civilization, and I can also call the shots. We and Mr. Chen Mo's grievances in the Shigan Galaxy have been cancelled." Dinnamiro, who has not spoken, said, the voice of the orc-like **** was a bit muddy. .

"Brother Chen Mo, the magic flame civilization of the Shigan Galaxy, you should know very well." Hu Bing said with a smile, said with a smile.

"I still have that condition." Zi Yun also spoke coldly.

Shuiling and Tuyun didn't speak. They knew that if Chen Mo wanted to sell it to several other companies, they would give the same conditions, and Chen Mo would definitely not refuse. It is not wise to put pressure on Chen Mo now, and the old prophet told him to pay Chen Mo.

Only the poor princess Arowana on the table was stiff at this time, neither walking nor staying, she knew that this table was the center of the storm.

"Do you want me to open an auction too? Those with higher prices will get it?" Chen Mo asked with a smile.

Several people can hear the sarcasm in Chen Mo's words. The technology of the magic flame civilization was that after the auction, it was robbed by several companies and finally ended in genocide.

"You are in Shigan Galaxy. How many of you should have obtained the technology, and are you still staring at me?" Chen Mo returned to calm and said lightly: "I am not interested in trading with you. If I want to grab it, I You are very welcome. "

As soon as this remark came out, the atmosphere on the No. 1 table was cold and stalemate.

chapters.title: Chapter 960: : Clash
chapters.body:
Chapter 960: : Clash

Princess Arowana opened her mouth and looked at Chen Mo strangely.

She even suspected that Chen Mo was wrong, but she was sure she was awake and Chen Mo was right.

She didn't expect that Chen Mo rejected the deal of the five god-level civilizations, among them the actual controllers of the god-level civilizations such as Tong Qing, Thunder and Hu Bingxin.

What kind of person is he who has the courage to refuse the transaction request of the god-level civilization.

Princess Arowana now has infinite curiosity about Chen Mo's true identity.

The god-level civilization stands at the top of the universe civilization. Almost every god-level civilization has the ability to easily destroy the super galaxy cluster.

Princess Arowana has never seen it before, and she has the power to defy the god-level civilization, but she saw today that a young humanoid is too young.

At a deadlock on the table, Arowana saw that Chen Mo was sitting in his place drinking a drink and enjoying the show like no one else. Now the wonderful show performance at the banquet has become boring in the eyes of Princess Arowana. She only hopes that the banquet will end soon, so that she can leave this place.

Several other people on the table had different looks, all uncertain.

Chen Mo refused without hesitation, so that they all began to ponder.

"Since Brother Chen Mo does not want to sell, then we are not forced to force it." Tong Qing said indifferently, breaking the general. Just now, he did not seem to have said so lightly: "Then this topic ends here, let's talk about other of."

Everyone gave Tong Qing a deep look.

Tong Qing's trick is not cruel.

On the occasion of the gathering of the top civilizations in the universe, the news that Chen Mo possessed super power development technology was announced. Now, all universe civilizations know that Chen Mo possesses super power development technology.

It is okay at the banquet now, but Chen Mo will definitely not be peaceful in the future, and will even face endless troubles.

Even though he may be facing a huge threat, Chen Mo, as always, is calm. It seems that the conversation just happened to him. This had to admire Chen Mo's calmness on the table.

They did not know whether Chen Mo was able to face the troubles that were coming, or was angry and not expressing.

"Brother Chen Mo, what do you think of the current situation of the universe?" Tong Qing then asked.

"Mr. Tong Qing, why do you ask me anything? You seem to care about my nameless pawn?" Chen Mo looked directly at Tong Qing and asked.

Tong Qing's black eyes condensed and stared at Chen Mo.

The two are diametrically opposed, and no one loses. The atmosphere on the table instantly solidified, and the other few wanted to be alright, watching the show at the banquet.

Suddenly, Tong Qing chuckled, and the solidified atmosphere dissipated: "Brother Chen Mo laughed, and I just regarded Brother Chen Mo as a friend and exchanged views."

"Mr. Tong Qing's communication cannot bear it underneath."

...

Space is the battlefield, the stars are all battlefields, and the tragic and tragic picture is waving the blueprint of the Sloan Great Wall in space at this time.

The tragic situation in front of him made Qu Shu's eyes crack.

They were attacked by a sneak attack by an unknown war department.

The timing of the opponent's shot was extremely accurate, and it was their most uncomfortable moment, and the target of the attack also caused them to collapse.

This unidentified war department suddenly appeared and jumped all over the Sloan Great Wall, making them unable to rub their hands. When he mobilized his troops to prepare for the clearance, the other party seized the lack of troops and quickly destroyed the main star bases of four important galaxies Jump the fairway to make them unprepared.

When they returned to support, the other party quickly fled and attacked their targets in other galaxies. The radar systems of important galaxies have been destroyed, and the supply galaxies have also been attacked.

Obviously, it is premeditated in terms of action.

He began to suspect that the opponent was the warhead of the corpse civilization, but after fighting, Qu Shu rejected this idea. The war department that is fighting them, neither combat style nor armor, is a corpse civilization.

"General, our opponents have been identified, the marching ant group of Pisces whale."

Suddenly, a piece of information reached his ears, and Qu Shu's face changed instantly, a little unbelievable.

Against them, is it actually marching ant group?

The marching ant group, this newly emerging force, soon conquered the Pisces Whale and quickly expanded. Not long ago, it almost destroyed the Shepherd civilization, occupied the Wuwu Hongqiao, and made the cowardly city owner of the Shepherd civilization pay money.

He did not expect that the other party would stare at them so quickly.

However, no matter what they think, they will not deal with them for no reason.

The running dog of the corpse civilization?

Or a villain?

Qu Shu looked extremely ugly.

Either way, their current situation is very bad.

The frontline of the Hongqiao Bridge was crushed and beaten, relying on a steady stream of space-based weapons and war machinery, it was barely able to resist the attacks of the civilization of the dead body. They all know that this situation will not last long.

Now that the other party is ruining their rear, this collapse will accelerate.

Their main force is dealing with the corpse civilization, and the rear troops are weak. Once they lose their place, the Hongqiao side will be defeated instantly.

Obviously, the situation of Sloan's Great Wall has come to a critical fall.

"Contact the other party's general." Qu Shu looked very dignified.

Wat Mu analyzed the progress of the battle. They did not want to fight this encounter, but were forced into by the other party, so they had to be big.

His plan was to destroy the other party's supply planet, make the other party exhausted and drag into his rhythm, but the other party's commander seemed to see through their intentions and force them into battle.

But they are not afraid of fighting head-on.

The War Wood War Department is the earliest war department established by the Marching Ant Group. During the period of pioneering the small universe, they have experienced countless battles. Their fighting power is definitely the highest number in the Marching Ant Group. Moreover, they are all capable.

Fighting head-on can accelerate the pace of war.

The interstellar distance of the universe is far away, but the pace of war is fast. Because the spaceship can jump to the galaxy you want to go to, this battle changes rapidly.

Eliminating living forces is a way to accelerate the pace of war.

He checked out that three Sloan stars, two at Hongqiao to deal with the civilization of the underworld, and only one war department at the rear was preparing to support it.

Suddenly, the battle on the front weakened, leaving Wat Mu stunned. When he was in doubt, news came from the front.

The other party's master will want to talk to him.

coming!

Wat Mu smiled a little and let the soldiers connect.

Qu Shu's holographic face appeared in front of him.

"Friend, we and the marching ant group seem to have no holidays. Why should we attack us?" Qu Shu asked in a calm voice.

"As a general, don't you think this question is naive?" Wat Mu asked calmly.

"I know there is no reason for war, but at this node, what is good for you when you attack us? Does it cooperate with the corpse civilization to attack us? Is it that the large marching ant group is someone else's stray dog?"

"On the contrary, we are fighting against the underworld civilization."

"We can join forces against the corpse civilization, we are also very welcome, and even after the end, we will thank our friends, why did the friends go the opposite way? You are now helping the corpse civilization." Qu Shu wrote on his face Unbelief.

"We still want Hongqiao." Wat Mu made no secret of his purpose: "We don't want to wait for the underworld civilization to occupy Hongqiao and enter the Sloan Great Wall. The price we will pay will be even greater."

Hearing this, Qu Shu completely understood.

"Friend, do you think that you can withstand the attack of the corpse civilization?" Judging from the fight with the other party, Qu Shu determined that the other party's strength is strong, but he does not think that this strength can resist the corpse civilization. The elite war department.

"We can't stop it, you don't need to care about this, but I'm sure, no matter whether we participate or not, you will definitely not be able to stop the civilization of the corpse." Wat Mu said firmly: "You have two choices now, either drop For us, to be part of us, we take over Hongqiao to deal with the civilization of the underworld. Either we first conquer the Sloan Great Wall and then deal with the civilization of the underworld. "

"Friends, this is a downfall. Do you think we will surrender to you?" Qu Shu's tone was infinitely angry.

"Surrender to us, you can keep the fire of Sloan civilization and become a part of us. If you let the underworld civilization occupy, you will either exterminate the deceased, or take the remnant people and soldiers to the wandering universe. You know, they wo n’t take you in. But with the universe now, do you think the rest of the universe will be peaceful? "

Qu Shu looked hard.

He knew in his heart that Wat Mu was right. But not until the last moment, they absolutely do not want to give up.

"I will retire now and give you two days to consider. If you do not surrender in two days, we will attack the Sloan Great Wall and Hongqiao with all our strength. As for the life and death of your people in Sloan civilization, it has nothing to do with us at that time. I do n’t want the underworld civilization to completely control Hongqiao. "

...

Bianyunzao space, has been staring at the star Xuan Xuan, not in a good mood.

They sent twelve detection teams to Muwu Hongqiao, without exception, all were destroyed. The opponent's strength is very strong, and the control of Muwu Hongqiao is also very strong.

The detection team was destroyed, but some information was returned.

A space interferometer is installed around the Hongqiao.

The technology of space interferometer was only mastered by some powerful top civilizations. The unexpected emergence of the marching ant group actually surprised him.

"Adult, what's next?" The adjutant around asked.

Gou Xuan thought for a moment and said in a deep voice: "Go to the meeting of this marching ant group to see what is coming."

chapters.title: Chapter 961: : Dark Forest Civilization Coup
chapters.body:
Chapter 961: : Dark Forest Civilization Coup

"Din Tu."

Xiaoyu retrieved the information system of the marching ant group and quickly found information about Ming Tu.

The life of the corpse civilization.

Xiaoyu determined that there was no intersection between the marching ant group and the underworld civilization.

Soon, Xiao Yu's eyes locked on a line of words.

The defector of the corpse civilization.

Hesitating, Xiaoyu contacted Lan directly.

"Madam, what's the matter?" Lan was a little surprised by Xiaoyu's contact: "Is the boss in need of help?"

"No, he went to the banquet of the Mu Family Star family, and just now, there is a life, his name is Ming Tu, I checked, the defector of the corpse civilization."

Xiao Yu sent the image of Ming Tu to Lan.

Seeing Ming Tu, Lan Jing's eyes soared, and his body straightened unconsciously.

"Where is he now?" Lan asked.

"I asked him to come in, just at the manor where we are staying now, he said he would wait for my husband to come back, there was something important to tell him. I asked, he said he would tell his husband personally. Excuse to leave. "Xiao Yu said.

"Madam, you immediately notify the boss to come back. The value of Ming Tu is more important than that boring banquet." Lan said cautiously.

"Ok."

Hang up the call, Lan calls up the information of Ming Tu.

This is the information found by the intelligence department, Ming Tu defected, and the location where it finally disappeared is very special, just at the Hongqiao of the Sloan Great Wall.

At first, the Hongqiao was controlled by the Ming civilization, and Ming Tu's defection was controlled by the Sloan civilization.

Ming Tu has always been called the murder sword by the civilization of the corpse, and has been restricted from going out. I definitely do n’t know Chen Mo. Now I am looking for Chen Mo. I am afraid there are articles in it.

As far as he knows, what was taken away by Ming Tu is also the most elaborate war department of Ming civilization, Ming Tu War Department.

During Lan Si's thinking, a prompt sound appeared on the screen, and a hundred thousand hot news appeared on the screen.

Seeing the news, Lan was dumbfounded.

...

On the table not far from table one, there are ten lives sitting around them, and there is a special sign on them. The life around the banquet table is no stranger to the signs on them.

The sign of the Star Department's Security Agency.

Although the Department of Security of the Tianxingbeidi belongs to the Space Alliance Security Department, it is independent of the Security Department and is not a complete affiliation.

Therefore, all the safety issues in the Starfield are controlled by the Independent Security Administration.

The Director of the Security Department sat at this table. A middle-aged man with a strong figure, a metallic silver skin, and black short-haired humanoids, wearing a straight uniform.

Gai Luo, this middle-aged life has a legendary experience.

He was originally an ordinary police officer of the Planetary Security Agency, but when patrolling the Star Forest, he had no intention of feeling the center and successfully evolved.

After that, his strength increased greatly. In a starship and hijacked spaceship hijacking event, he went to the meeting to negotiate with the gangsters, and finally the negotiation collapsed. He killed 50 gangsters who hijacked the spacecraft, each of whom was a senior armored division. The boss who captured the gangsters alive saved 300,000 lives.

Since then, Gai Luo's strength has advanced by leaps and bounds, and his life is like an open one.

And the one time that really laid his power was when a war armor master destroyed a noble ancestral planet in the Star Monument, Gai Luo shot, and killed the war armor master in the battle with the tyrannical war armor master. Since then, he has achieved his powerful title.

After the Independent Security Administration in charge of the Tianxingbeidi, nobles who dared to violate the laws of the Tianxingbeidi were all disposed of and were selfless.

When Gai Luo first came to power, some famous nobles in the Star Monument wanted to provoke his majesty, and finally, after Gai Luo personally went to the noble's ancestral land, seized the nobility's patriarch, and openly questioned on the whole platform It caused an uproar in the Star Monument.

Since then, Gai Luo has also become the object of fear for the major nobles.

Under the strong security management of Gai Luo, such as the order of the Star Monument, it is the best in nearly 100,000 years.

No one dared to provoke the iron-blooded figure in the Star Monument.

As the director of the Independent Security Agency of the Star Monument, in the banquet of the Mu Family Star Family, Gai Luo Natural is on the invitation list, and even part of the security during the banquet is provided by the Independent Security Agency.

At this time, Gai Luo sat quietly on the table and watched the show.

"Is there any problem with table one?" An assistant next to him paid attention to table one from time to time. Looking at the atmosphere, he was afraid that table one would fight.

None of the casual people at table one can afford them. If they really fight, their position of the Security Department will become awkward.

"Relax, their identity is there, they may use means in private, but they will never lift the table in such a public place, otherwise, their sitting in this position is also waste." Gai Luo said calmly.

He didn't worry about what happened to the No. 1 table. In fact, the No. 1 table was the safest.

Those who are fighting on the field can do it, but it is impossible to lift the table. When they reach this position, it is a shame to lift the table on this occasion.

"Super power development technology, if it becomes Shi Ganxing here, it will be in trouble."

"What do you think?"

Several of them looked at Gai Luo.

"Put your heart in your belly." Gai Luo said not too salty.

The star land is different from the Shigan galaxy. The Shigan galaxy is just a galaxy that is easily blocked.

The entire planetarium has a range of hundreds of millions of light-years, which is inaccessible by space weapons. Once approached, it will be detected. Unless hundreds of millions of light-years of space can be blocked at the same time, the situation of the Shigan Galaxy cannot occur.

But even a god-level civilization can't block space that spans hundreds of millions of light years at the same time.

If there is a threat here, the top life and the top leaders of the top civilizations will not hesitate to take the spaceship to jump away, and no one can lock them, so the blockade is just doing useless work.

"Where is this Chen Mo sacred?" Another top police officer on the table murmured, "I've never heard of it before."

"The universe is so big, there are countless lives, countless talents, you haven't heard too much, there is nothing strange." The policeman beside him said.

At the banquet site of the Mu Family Star Family, the topic of Chen Mo's super-powered development technology spread.

The No. 1 table in the center of the topic is very harmonious at this time.

After Chen Mo publicly refused, no one talked about the transaction. Tong Qing also leisurely watched the performance of the banquet and discussed with Hu Bingxin from time to time.

Chen Mo was sitting in a position like a human being, watching the performance on the stage, and occasionally chatting with the dragon fish princess next to him.

In a conversation with Princess Arowana, Chen Mo confirmed the true existence of the Mermaid. The Mermaid is the ruler of the Mermaid, and just like the imagination, but with advanced technology and belongs to the sea-like tribe.

"Brother Chen Mo, what are you going to do after this grand event? I'm afraid your trouble is not small next." Tu Yun sitting beside Chen Mo said.

"The soldiers came to cover up the water, and it was useless to worry." Chen Mo said lightly.

"You can see it." Tuyun smiled.

"What else can I do?"

"Yes." Tuyun picked up alcoholic drinks and touched Chen Mo.

Suddenly, Chen Mo and Shui Ling felt something, looking at a life coming to the No. 1 table, and Tu Yun also looked at them dubiously in the eyes of the two.

The life that comes over looks like a dark forest and looks like a uniform sign.

"What's wrong?" Tuyun asked.

Shui Ling's expression is solemn: "There is a big event."

"Ok."

Chen Mo nodded in agreement, he didn't know why, there was a hunch, I am afraid that this life came, there is nothing to be said.

I saw the life in a hurry, stopped beside Dinnamiro, and whispered in his ear. At the next moment, Dinnamiro's face changed greatly, and he got up immediately, turned away without even saying a word.

problem occurs.

Chen Mo looked at Dinnamiro's back, and was almost certain that something was wrong with the Dark Forest civilization.

Tuyun took a deep look at Chen Mo and immediately asked the assistants around him to inquire about the intelligence department.

Several others at the No. 1 table saw this scene in their eyes. Without them, their assistants contacted their respective intelligence departments and sent the latest information.

"Sir, the Dark Forest civilization has an accident." Tara whispered in Tong Qing's life.

"Madam, just now, Dinnamiro's younger brother Dinnam Yeh launched a coup, hijacked the entire Dark Forest Star, announced the abolition of Dinnamiro's status, and is now seizing power." Shi Yan passed the information to Hu Bingxin.

The information received by several other companies is exactly the same.

Di Nanye launched a coup and is seizing the power of the dark forest civilization.

The civil war in the dark forest civilization began.

This is the first time such a thing has happened in a divine civilization.

Several people looked at each other on the table.

The dark forest civilization has serious internal fighting, and its comprehensive strength is basically at the bottom of the seven god-level civilizations. However, the dark forest civilization has never seen such a thing as seizing power, and it did not happen that this time.

When Dinnamiro left the dark forest civilization and reached a cosmos, he launched a coup, and the protagonist was Dinnamiro's younger brother.

All this came without warning.

The dark forest civilization is over.

This is the voice of all life on the field.

Regardless of the success of Di Nanye ’s coup, the strength of the dark forest civilization will be greatly weakened. At the juncture of the chaos in the universe, such an event is likely to cause the dark forest civilization to fall apart.

"More chaotic." Tu Yun sighed.

Dididi ...

Chen Mo's communication instrument sounded, interrupting their conversation, and seeing that it was Xiaoyu's communication number, which was immediately connected.

"Husband, are you not particularly important at the banquet now?"

"No, what's wrong?"

"You come back."

"Okay, I will go back now."

After hanging up the communication, Tuyun looked over and wondered: "Brother Chen Mo also has a major event?"

"Have you been told, my insider is looking for me, there is nothing bigger than this, otherwise there will be an end to the world." Chen Mo spread his hand.

"Yes." Tuyun smiled.

Chen Mo picked up the wine glass and touched Princess Longyu.

"Princess Arowana, have the opportunity to come and play in my hometown, and you will certainly be highly sought after. In our hometown, mermaid is synonymous with beauty, gentleness and kindness."

Arowana smiled: "Yes, Mr. Chen Mo."

chapters.title: Chapter 962: : The Meditation
chapters.body:
Chapter 962: : The Meditation

Ming Tuan sat on the seat and watched the news on the Universe News platform motionlessly. The tea he was greeted by Shen Wei only wet his lips without taking a sip.

The guards who greeted him looked at each other, but it was hard to disturb him.

Seeing Xiaoyu coming out, Ming Tu's gaze stayed on her body for a while, and continued to watch the news quietly, without any intention of speaking or communicating.

"I just notified my husband that he was on his way back." Xiao Yu said.

"Thank you." Ming Tu nodded politely, still without any emotion.

Xiaoyu doesn't know how to communicate with the other party, she can only sit in the position, she can feel whether there is malicious, but she does not feel malicious from Ming Tu.

Both guards guarded Xiaoyu, in case Ming Tu suddenly attacked Xiaoyu.

In the lobby, there is only the news.

The news is all about the news of the Star Festival, the civilization that came to participate in the Star Festival this year, and the process of the Star Festival.

Suddenly, the picture of the news jumped and an urgent live broadcast appeared on the screen.

"I just received the latest major news, this station news, the dark forest civilization Di Nanye launched a coup, hijacked the dark forest star, and declared the dark forest civilization's current patriarch Dinnamiro's guilt. Then, the dark forest civilization military announced that Di The illegal behavior of Nanye is now in war between the two sides. "

Dark forest civilization coup?

The mediterranean sitting on the sofa only recovered with a slight flash of glance, as if nothing was wrong.

This news made Xiaoyu incredible.

A coup in a god-level civilization? Then there must be chaos in the dark forest, which undoubtedly poured oil on the already chaotic universe.

...

The manor was right in front of me, all the way through, Chen Mo's armor landed on the manor's armor platform and went straight into the manor.

He was a little curious about what happened to Xiaoyu and was anxious to get him back.

As soon as I entered the door, I saw the meditation sitting on the sofa, looking puzzled.

Orc-like?

"This is?" Chen Mo asked in doubt.

"He is here to find you." Xiao Yu handed a piece of information to Chen Mo, which was the information of Ming Tu.

"Find me?"

Chen Mo glanced at the information, and soon found the keyword eyes.

The top star of the corpse civilization defection

When Ming Tu saw Chen Mo appearing, he got up from the sofa, looked at Chen Mo expressionlessly, and spoke after a while: "My name is Ming Tu."

"Hello, please sit down."

Chen Mo also looked at Ming Tu, the top star of the corpse civilization defected came to him, even if he thought again, he couldn't figure out what happened.

"I want to chat with you alone." Ming Tu said without expression.

Xiaoyu looked at Chen Mo, and after turning the guard back, she also turned and left.

In the hall, only Chen Mo and Ming Tu are left.

"Speak." Chen Mo said.

"I want to make a deal with you." Ming Tu's voice did not fluctuate, as if to tell an insignificant thing.

"What deal."

"I have worked for you for a thousand years, and you promised me a condition."

As soon as this remark came out, Chen Mo froze in place.

Ming Tu came to trust him? This matter is not trivial. Think big, let the corpse civilization know, I am afraid they will become the enemy of the corpse civilization. To put it bluntly, now Ming Tu is a big trouble.

The exchange of conditions is a technology.

What he lacks most now is technology.

"How are you sure that I will take you in?" Chen Mo shook the information in his hand: "You are in big trouble now."

"I chose you. I bet on it. Do you dare to bet once?" Ming Tu stared directly at Chen Mo.

The atmosphere in the hall fell silent.

Chen Mo put the information in his hand on the table: "Speak, what are your conditions?"

When saying this, Chen Mo made a choice.

A top-level star will add a ready-made top war department to change a big trouble. Anyway, he has offended enough god-level civilizations, white star civilization, thunder **** civilization, crape myrtle civilization, dark forest civilization, and the black that revealed his alert. Hitomi civilization, the god-level civilization basically offended once, and now do not mind one more corpse civilization.

And he got the news, now in the Sloan Great Wall, they are about to face the corpse civilization, the hatred of both sides is inevitable.

"Help me research a technology." Ming Tu said.

They are all smart people and they know the meaning of each other in one sentence.

A top god-level civilization defected to the star and came to him to study technology in exchange for it, which made Chen Mo somewhat curious.

"What technology?"

The body slowly stretched out his left hand, then grabbed the skin and pulled the machine bones into the air.

Chen Mo's pupils shrank.

robot.

He could not have guessed that one of the top stars of the corpse civilization is actually a robot. Has the intelligence of the underworld civilization reached this point?

"My predecessor was a humanoid. In order to study eternal life technology, the corpse civilization used life as an experiment. Let the fear value of life be the largest, and then kill the experiment body at that moment, and record the consciousness of life into the quantum chip.

For this technology, the corpse civilization has killed countless lives in the laboratory and let them die in fear. I am one of the most lucky ones. I have retained my complete consciousness and successfully entered the quantum chip. It is also the only successful life. "

Ming Tu explained that there was crazy hatred and chill in his voice.

Even if the corpse civilization had brainwashed him for hundreds of years, the scene of the laboratory in the beginning was still clearly engraved in his mind.

At first, in the corpse civilization, he dared not show hatred, and could only pretend to have nothing to do, let the corpse civilization believe that he has forgotten, and finally find a chance to escape the corpse civilization.

Having seen various technologies, Chen Mo was surprised at this technology, but was not shocked.

"How do you feel?"

"There is no temperature, no consciousness, no feeling, like being trapped in a dream, everything is digitally synthesized in front of my eyes." Ming Tu said coldly: "I want to make a real life again, even if the life span is limited. This kind of technology, only top-level civilizations and god-level civilizations have the hope to study it. "

"Why not choose a god-level civilization? Their technology is very strong, and they are likely to accept you, not afraid of the corpse civilization."

"I don't like those god-level civilizations, so I chose you and gambled once." Ming Tu's voice was still the same cold.

Chen Mo and Ming Tu looked at each other.

Suddenly, he admired Ming Tu for a few hundred years in the digital space without temperature and consciousness.

Ordinary people must have been crazy for a long time, and Ming Tu not only maintained a calm and sober consciousness, but also endured secretly under the enemy, becoming a top star, showing how strong the will and endurance are.

"You're right, I have the technology to export quantum consciousness to the brain of the living body." Chen Mo said.

Ming Tu froze in place.

...

The news of the Dinanye coup in the dark forest civilization spread throughout the universe in a short time.

The reorganization of the god-level civilization, which will affect the dark forest area and the star area bordering the dark forest civilization, coupled with the impact of the current cosmic war, it can be said that this is the biggest event after the Hongqiao shock.

It is clear to the outside world that in the eyes of the internal struggles of the dark forest civilization, the seizure of power is a taboo no matter in which civilization.

If the dark forest civilization is not handled well, it may fall apart in a short time.

By then, the strength of the dark forest civilization will be greatly weakened.

Some powerful top civilizations have seen signs of replacing them. As long as the dark forest civilization declines, they may take the place of the dark forest civilization's seventh-largest civilization.

This coup drew the limelight of the Star Festival.

The back of Dinnamiro's hurried departure at the banquet of the Mu Family's Star Family was also put on the universe forum, triggering numerous discussions and reposts of life.

Many public opinion are analyzing this coup, more people think that the internal contradictions of the dark forest civilization have existed for a long time, and the split seems to be a foregone conclusion.

...

Gou Xuan looked at the status of the Hongqiao in the screen. Now the space fleet is only one light-year away from the Hongqiao. With a simple jump, you can get close to the Hongqiao.

But in the past, it is the identification lock period of the other party. If they approach without notification, they can be regarded as an intruder.

The space inside the Hongqiao is blocked, and it is impossible to jump through the Hongqiao and jump to the other end of the Hongqiao.

At first thought that the marching ant group was just an ordinary big power group, now she had to change her mind.

Space jammers, space interferometers, these space blocking technologies are all complete. Obviously, it is not as simple as the ordinary big forces, but more like a powerful top civilization.

"Sir, get connected."

The communication officer opened the communication video and jumped out of a holographic picture. The characters appearing in the picture were the station of Hongqiao and the communication officer of the Neptune War Department.

"I am Gou Xuan of the White Star Civilization, please speak to your master." Gou Xuan said.

As soon as the words fell, Wang Hai appeared in the holographic video frequency.

"I am Wang Hai of the marching ant group, may I ask what you do?" Wang Hai asked calmly.

White Star Civilization, this unidentified war department is the war department of White Star Civilization. He is the first one in the marching ant group to contact the god-level civilization war department.

He didn't dare to underestimate the war department of god-level civilization.

It is not the first time he heard the power of a divine civilization.

"We need to borrow Hongqiao, I hope your convenience is convenient." Gou Xuan said.

"Sorry, our Hongqiao is not open to the public." Wang Hai said.

"Your Excellency, don't you want to give us a convenience for the White Star civilization?" Gou Xuan looked displeased and moved the White Star civilization out.

Where she went, those civilizations were not respectful, and this was the first time that an excuse was rejected.

"Hongqiao is not open, you can bypass." Wang Hai was unmoved.

Even if the other party is a white star civilization, but the military order is there, he cannot open up an excuse to anyone else, otherwise, once something goes wrong, he cannot explain.

Gou Xuan's expression flickered, and from the tone of the other party's answer, she determined that the other party was not afraid of their god-level civilization.

Is it posture? Or is there really the strength to reject them?

Gou Xuan narrowed his eyes into a gap: "So, then we can only offend."

She decided to test the strength of the other party.

chapters.title: Chapter 963: : Battle Of Sloan Great Wall
chapters.body:
Chapter 963: : Battle Of Sloan Great Wall

The marching ants gave them two days.

The sorrowful Qushu thought for a long time, but decided to tell Gros and Kongfan about this matter and listen to their opinions.

However, when he was ready to contact the two, a bad news came first.

The Mingyue Liuhua of the corpse civilization broke through the Hongqiao, and Kongfan and Gros were assassinated by the assassin war armor division.

The news came too suddenly, and Qu Shu thought he had heard it wrong. However, the defeat scene returned from the Hongqiao battlefield made him have to believe this terrifying fact.

The three major stars of the Sloan Great Wall, now only him, Sloan Civilization has no elite soldiers to defend against the attack of the corpse civilization.

Finished.

Qu Shu was in a trance and almost fainted.

When the Hongqiao is broken, then the armor of the underworld civilization will point directly at the Sloan Great Wall.

The two elite warheads were dispatched to Hongqiao, and now there is no army. There are few warheads in the Sloan Great Wall that can resist. The only possibility is to use space weapons to carry the life of the Sloan Great Wall together, to be buried in space together, and not necessarily kill Die each other.

Intelligent machinery and most weapons are transferred to Hongqiao. The current Qu Shu is simply impossible to resist the armor of the corpse civilization.

When Qu Shu contacted the Sloan Civilization Palace, the news of a thunderbolt on the sunny day came again. When the Royal Family of Sloan Civilization learned that Hongqiao had been defeated by the corpse civilization, he took the guard and fled the Sloan Great Wall by spaceship.

The news exploded Qu Shu's mind.

Escape?

But where is the current situation in the universe?

The rest of Sloan Wall's life is too late to transfer, does it matter?

Qu Shu laughed at herself.

Qu Shu echoed the sound of Wat Mu in his mind. The Shilong civilization was over, and he could only hope to save more people.

He did not hesitate to dial a correspondence number.

...

Wat Mu was also somewhat surprised by the sudden penetration of the corpse civilization by Hongqiao. According to the progress, it should take a few more days to break through.

Receiving the contact of Qu Shu, Wat Mu did not hesitate to connect.

The other party has come to this newsletter and has made a choice, even if it is forced.

Qu Shu's expression was somewhat entangled, but in the end he still made up his mind: "Sloan Great Wall is willing to join the march ant group, hoping that adults can save me and preserve the life heritage of Sloan Great Wall.

"Why was it suddenly broken?" Wat Mu immediately responded to the party's conditions.

"Air Fan and Groth were assassinated." Qu Shu was almost desperate, and he was not sure whether the march ant group would be willing to rescue them. If they could not, they could only escape hundreds of millions of lives.

Wat Mu immediately understood.

They had to win the Sloan Great Wall, because here is the star field adjacent to them, the corpse civilization is on the side, and it is undoubtedly a giant beast sleeping next to them.

Underworld civilization is still on Hongqiao. Clearing up the rebel armor division, if they let them completely control Hongqiao and enter the Sloan Great Wall, then it will become more troublesome.

Decisions must be made immediately.

"Enter the space coordinates and prepare to jump."

Chen Bing Shilong outside the Great Wall War Department, jumped to Hongqiao at full speed.

The main ship's Wat Mu looks dignified. In front of him, the layout of the holographic star map is fully displayed, and the armor is on his body. At this time, Wat Mu is like a battle-tested general, and the murderous awe-inspiring.

This is his first time against the God of War civilization.

He has long heard of the prestige of the Ministry of Civilization and Warfare. At this time, he was not only afraid, but a little excited.

When the Guardian War Department appeared in the space of the Sloan Great Wall, it attracted the vigilance of the Sloan civilization, but Wat Mu didn't have time to pay attention to it, and continued to give jumping instructions and went straight to Hongqiao.

At the same time, he also sent a message to Qu Shu: "Organize your armored division in Hongqiao and the important life of the Sloan Great Wall, retreat to Pisces and Whale, and give us the battlefield."

Qu Shu moved.

These words of Wu Mu undoubtedly accepted them and gave their people time to evacuate.

Without time to hesitate, Qu Shu hurriedly issued instructions to retreat the remaining soldiers of Hongqiao, and at the same time ordered the major planets to evacuate the technicians and scientists first.

Qu Shu also took the last war department of Shilong Great Wall to jump to the quadrant of Hongqiao.

On the side of Wat Mu, he also contacted the headquarters of the solar system, so that the headquarters and the life of the Sloan Great Wall can be connected.

At this time, news of the Hongqiao battlefield came back.

"The fleet of the corpse civilization has entered the main battlefield of the space interference zone. It may take two hours to travel through the interference zone at the speed of light." Qu Shu shared the information with Wat Mu.

Now they are willing to march into the army ant group. Next, he needs to cooperate with Wat Mu as much as possible to delay the pace of the corpse civilization, so that the people of the Sloan Great Wall can have time to evacuate.

Looking at the Hongqiao on the holographic projection, Wat Mu's eyes flashed with endless fighting intent.

The fleet is like a group of crazy beasts, approaching its prey.

An hour later, they encountered the main fleet of corpse civilization in space.

...

Mingyue Liuhua is very confident in her strength. She is also a top student of the Mingming Civilization Warfare School. She knows the space war. She can also make the top five in the Mingming Civilization.

She didn't know whether she should be happy or sad. The inner body of the corpse civilization was decaying. The talents had withered and there was no more available. All this time the patriarch promised her to come.

Kong Fan and Gros were successfully assassinated, the war department had no general, and the battlefield naturally collapsed.

She has now successfully entered Hongqiao. She thought she would enter the Sloan Great Wall smoothly. She did not expect to encounter a war department.

"This is the last war department of Sloane Great Wall, is it the war department of Qushu?" Mingyue Liuhua asked his staff with some surprise.

The men next to him were all surprised and frowned. Hongqiao was broken, shouldn't the fleet of Sloan Great Wall take the opportunity to escape? Are you still here, dying and struggling?

"It's not like the fleet of the Sloan Great Wall." A subordinate saw the clues. The style and painting of the spaceship were not from the Sloan Great Wall.

"Following the fleet of the Sloan Great Wall, is it an ally of the Sloan Great Wall?"

"Who dares to offend us near the Sloan Great Wall?"

"Ask what is coming and warn them." Mingyue Liuhua said in a deep voice.

This fleet must have something to do with the Sloan Great Wall. Seeing that they are about to enter the Sloan Great Wall, there is now an unknown team. Their mood is not very good.

"The other party has spoken back, the fleet of the marching ant group." The communication soldier adjusted the holographic video frequency picture to Mingyue Liuhua.

In the picture is Wat Mu.

At this time, the look of Wat Mu was indifferent, looking directly at the moon and the flowers, without any polite expression for the other party's life as a corpse civilization.

"What do you mean?" Mingyue Liuhua asked poorly.

"I should ask you this sentence. What do you mean? Our Great Wall has no injustice with you. Why did you invade?" Hu Mu shot out the war in his eyes, not afraid of the question of Mingyue Liuhua, but questioned back.

As soon as this word came out, the look of Mingyue Liuhua was hard to look.

"This is the grudge between our corpse civilization and the Sloan Great Wall. It seems to have nothing to do with the marching ant group?"

Mingyue Liuhua deliberately aggravated the word "dark civilization", reminding Wat Mu that they are the fleet of the dark civilization. With the name of a god-level civilization, the other party will have some fears, however, she is destined to be disappointed.

"I'm sorry, the Sloan Great Wall has been attached to us. The Sloan Great Wall is ours, and this Hongqiao is also ours. Now please withdraw your troops, we can not blame the past."

As soon as Wat Mu's words came out, all the generals on the Flesh Civilization Fleet were smirked. When will their corpse civilization be blamed by others? This is red, naked, naked contempt, they have never been looked down on so.

"Courage, I hope you are so tough on the battlefield." Mingyue Liuhua hurriedly smiled back: "Let you know, offend the end of my civilization."

The corpse civilization has just returned to the battleship's smart machinery, pouring down into space, and war robots and soldiers pouring into space.

On the other side, the war robots and armor divisions of the Guardian War Department are also continuously pouring into space.

In space encounters, the test is the weapons and armor of both sides, and the complete positive strength is reflected.

At this point, as one of the seven god-level civilizations, the corpse civilization has never been afraid of any civilization. As a group of marching ants with countless technological technologies, the dormant marching ant group is also not afraid.

The distance of tens of millions of kilometers is not too long under the high-speed war machine.

For a long time, the two war departments with turbulent fighting intentions really collided together.

Explosive flames began to occupy the battlefield of Hongqiao.

puff!

There is no sound in space, but intelligent machinery can receive a dull abnormal sound.

The short-pulse laser weapon with blue fluorescent light at the sharp edge can easily cut the shell of the intelligent machine, penetrate the core straight, and instantly tear into pieces.

Both sides are commonplace in the tragic battlefield.

On the side of the corpse civilization, the generals will change slightly.

In the battle between them and the Sloan Great Wall, the smart machinery used by the Sloan Great Wall for consumption is not so powerful, and now the other party's smart machinery in space can be comparable to their smart machinery.

The celestial civilizations will ask themselves, in the seven god-level civilizations, even if their robot technology is not the top, but they can also enter the top three.

Now, they are indistinguishable from a top force that has suddenly emerged. They are still slightly disadvantaged and somewhat incredible.

The wreckage floated in space, and the light on the intelligent machinery slowly dimmed.

During this period, the Guardian War Department has completed the deployment of combat readiness and defense. The soldiers are scattered in space and ready to go. If there is an order, they will go to the sword.

Mingyue Liuhua's expression was slightly dark, staring intently at the battlefield, her body exuding a dangerous breath.

This war department should not be underestimated.

The war machines from deployment to the front are extremely fast, which is essentially different from the War Department of the Sloan Wall.

The other party did not have any timid fear because they were god-level civilizations.

A tough opponent.

chapters.title: Chapter 964: :Fighting
chapters.body:
Chapter 964: :Fighting

Sending away Ming Tu, Chen Mo went back to the manor's study alone, turned on the holographic computer, and entered the earth's network.

Xiao Yu has finished taking a bath, enters the study in cool pajamas, and sits next to Chen Mo.

Chen Mo couldn't help but look at her a few more times, and took her in her arms and sat down.

"How? He came to see you for what?"

"Talking about a deal, he has served us for thousands of years, and I will give him a new life."

Xiaoyu leaned quietly in Chen Mo's arms and asked curiously, "Rebirth?"

"He is a machine life, and the consciousness is that the corpse civilization wrote the consciousness of life into the quantum chip. He worked for us, and I exported his consciousness to the living body, which is almost the same as Mo Nu."

After Chen Mo finished, Xiao Yu was a little surprised.

For other people, it may be shocking to be speechless, but with Chen Mo, she has seen all kinds of weird technologies, so she is just surprised. Unexpectedly, the corpse civilization defected, it was actually a robot, and it still wrote human consciousness into the machine life of the machine.

Just now Chen Mo and Ming Tu talked a lot.

During the chat, Ming Tu revealed a lot of content.

The entire Ming Tu War Department is composed of the top robots. It is a consciousness chip used by some survivors of the experiment of the corpse civilization, but the complete consciousness is not retained, or it becomes a madman, an idiot, or a Tyrannical murderer.

The corpse civilization gave those consciousness chips, instilled various combat skills, and after a lot of killing and training, all those soldiers were trained to command the killing machines for combat killing.

In the core quantum chip of Ming Tu, there is a control unit to facilitate the control of the body civilization. He destroys the quantum communication components in the body, and at the same time shields the electromagnetic communication of the body with the instrument, so as to get rid of the control of the body civilization without receiving signals. .

So now he cannot connect to the universe network like artificial intelligence, and can only obtain information through external devices.

The agreement between Chen Mo and Ming Tu confirms that Ming Tu will serve him for thousands of years, and he will help Ming Tu turn back to life.

For Chen Mo, this is a very good deal.

After reading the current situation of the marching ant group, Chen Mo turned off the holographic computer.

There are now two battles in the family, the Battle of Hongqiao at the Sloan Great Wall, and a small-scale encounter with Baixing Civilization. But under Lan's grasp, there were no major problems, so he didn't have to worry about the marching ant group.

"What's next? Bring Ming Tu back?"

"After the Star Festival, it is rare to go back with him again. It is fifty years after this event, and no one knows what will happen in the future."

Putting down the holographic computer in his hand, Chen Mo swept back and forth on Xiaoyu's body. After facing his eyes, he laughed.

"It's rare that the body is under control now. Let's play something else tonight."

Xiao Yu's cheek was slightly ashamed, and he gave Chen Mo a light blow, then felt his body light, and was hugged to the bedroom.

...

"Put high-level war robots." Mingyue Liuhua turned around and ordered the adjutant around him.

Advanced war robots are different from smart machines that consume death. They are equipped with anti-matter cores, anti-matter weapons and long-range laser weapons. They are quite unmanned armor and have complete functions.

Because of the high cost of advanced armored robots, they will not be mass-produced on an unlimited scale like smart machines, but in the space battlefield, advanced war robots are the complement of armored divisions.

As for the specific strength of war robots, it depends on how intelligent each civilization is. The best war robots of the general top civilizations are at least equivalent to an intermediate armor division, while the god-level civilizations generally have the strength of advanced armor divisions.

The war robots poured down, and this scene was captured by radar and sent to the headquarters of the handguard.

Underworld civilizations have the desire to win, and they also have the faith to win.

Take a step back, and then there is the Sloan Great Wall. Although the Sloan Great Wall has little benefit from them for the time being, the strategic buffer zone of Pisces and Whale is gone, and the next goal of the corpse civilization is them.

And the layout of Lan instructors, they must take down the Hongqiao of the Sloan Great Wall.

"Two million war violent madmen, galaxy surfers and sharpshooters are released." Wat Mu ordered without hesitation.

The same continuous input of war robots, seeing this, the eyes of Ningyue Liuhua narrowed, seeming to be thinking.

But the Qu Shu in the rear was not calm, he did not expect that the Guardian War Department was so powerful, he thought that the other party was only to delay the battle, and then wait for the support from the marching ant group to come, and the corpse civilization continued to consume, unexpectedly and The opponent played back and forth.

When Wat Mu fought with him, he obviously did not do his best, otherwise he would have difficulty coping with it last time.

Qu Shu still had some palpitations in her heart.

The collision of war robots is much stronger than the collision of smart machines just now.

Antimatter bombs and lasers are raging in space, and the rays of explosion, like thousands of small suns, envelope the battlefield.

Mingyue Liuhua conceals shock at the moment, but does not show it.

They are god-level civilizations, and the intelligent technology of the corpse civilization is also famously powerful in the Seventh Congress.

The opponent's war robots are not weaker than them.

What kind of force is the marching ant group? Could it be the forces that have been lurking for a long time, coveting the position of god-level civilization in the dark?

She suddenly remembered the promise of the patriarch to him. I am afraid that this battle of Hongqiao is not only as simple as winning the Sloan Great Wall, but also the Pisces and Whales are within their swordsmen.

"Let the assassins go and mess up their fleet deployment. The second fleet, separated from the team, marched towards the second quadrant, circled the opponent's sixth quadrant, attacked their fleet's flanks. The third fleet, proceeded to the sixth quadrant, circled The third quadrant of the opposing fleet. "

"Yes."

The holographic screen flashed a video of the star leading the life, and then closed. The two fleets separated from the main fleet and flew away from their positions according to the instructions of Mingyue Liuhua.

Mingyue Liuhua took it seriously, her eyes gleaming dangerously.

She sensed that this battle might not be easy to fight, but she wanted to see if the opponent ’s war machine was powerful and the tactical command had matching strength.

"Bao Yu, Keshu, you will lead the fleet, and you will meet them." Wat Mu looked at the flight path of the two fleets and immediately notified the two fleets on the flanks.

...

Muwu Hongqiao.

Gou Xuan's face was gloomy, and the star beside her didn't look very good.

Ten million smart machines, two hundred thousand advanced war robots, and thousands of assassin teams all failed.

The captain of the Assassin Squad is now standing in front of Gou Xuan with his head down, a little embarrassed.

The headquarters of the main ship had a terrifying atmosphere in depression.

The stars on the field did not dare to speak out, fearing that they would anger Gou Xuan.

For a long time, Gou Xuan took a breath and calmed down. In the whole process just now, they all saw clearly and deeply, but at least the level of combat effectiveness they showed was not weaker than them.

Ten million smart machines are just a temptation to see how much power the other party spends responding.

However, they were quickly surprised that the other party put almost the same intelligent machinery to come and confront them, but depending on the battlefield situation, the other party's intelligent machinery did not lose to them.

In order to further explore, they chose to send advanced war robots, this time, they were still shocked. The war robots of the marching ant group are not weaker than them.

The most incredible thing is that one thousand assassins. The stealth armor controlled by the top armor division is close to the opponent's defense line. When they actually fought, they found out that the opponent's armored division had the same top and top soldiers.

Especially in close combat, the close combat style of these soldiers, brave and strong, does not lose to their soldiers at all.

This discovery shocked their hearts.

Mastering so many top-level technologies and gathering many god-level lives to form a war department, I am afraid that only a powerful top-level civilization can do it.

"I was defeated by a soldier from an unknown war department. Your assassin squad's ability really makes me proud." Gou Xuan sorted out his mood and did not forget to beat the generals on the field.

The captain in front of the assassin squad was embarrassed, and he dared not say much.

"It seems that you haven't been fighting for too long, and you are all relaxed and relaxed. Starting tomorrow, training intensity will be increased by half, let's go." Gou Xuan said flatly.

The captain of the assassin squad rushed aside as if he was amnesty.

"Go back to Bianyuncheng first."

Gou Xuan ordered to retreat and waited until the crowd would disperse before her expression dimmed.

The opponent's level of the star is temporarily unclear, but from the point of view of the opponent's technical strength, they do not lose to them. Although it is only temptation, failure always makes people unhappy.

Marching Ant Group?

It seems that in addition to them, there are many powerful civilizations hidden in the universe.

chapters.title: Chapter 965: : Full Firepower Preparation
chapters.body:
Chapter 965: : Full Firepower Preparation

Blackhawk connected to the communication from the armed headquarters, and it was the instructor Lan who appeared in the video frequency of the communication. Black Hawk straightened his body immediately, meticulously.

Since the establishment of Kunpeng War Department, most of the time has been training troops in the small universe.

Fighting against the Zerg or powerful beasts of the unexplored planet of the small universe with bare hands, this battle facing life and death makes the war department miserable. .

But there is no real battle.

After receiving the contact from Instructor Lan, Black Hawk felt a little hope inside.

"How about training?" Lan asked.

"All of them are done in strict accordance with the established plan." Black Hawk replied immediately.

"Well, yes." Lan nodded slightly and glanced at the information: "Calling Kunpeng War Department, there will be war for you."

At the next moment, the black eagle's eyes soared sharply, and his body was sharp.

"The message to you is the battle at the Sloan Great Wall. Where is the War Wood War Department? The strength of the other party has been investigated. Maybe next, they will have some reinforcements, not too much, nor their most elite war Ministry. You pull the team in the past to be a soldier."

Hearing Lan's words, Black Hawk's eyelids jumped.

Take the god-level civilization warfare department to train troops, the entire universe, only the instructor Lan so crazy?

But the Blackhawks dare not express it.

"Yes." Black Eagle said with a deep voice.

"Now, pull the team away." Lan closed the holographic communication.

For half an hour, a fleet of ships appeared in the space connector of the solar system.

The curvature engine started and it didn't take long for the spacecraft to disappear.

...

He always had a preliminary understanding of the information received, and the battlefield situation of Sloan Great Wall. The corps of the Sloan Great Wall were broken up, and a marching group of ants appeared to obstruct it. This was a change.

From the intelligence, it can be determined that the strength of the marching ant group is very strong, which makes him anxious, and even has a bad hunch.

The fleets carried by Mingyue Liuhua are all the sharp fleets of the corpse civilization, but they are not the fleets of the meditation warfare department, and they are not the most powerful existence of the corpse civilization, but they are definitely not weak.

A force that can play against their corpse civilization war department, they never understood it, and this alone is disturbing.

With another jump, they can reach the Hongqiao beyond the Sloan Great Wall.

I hope that the moon and flowers will be fine, and Ming often prays in his heart.

Once Mingyue Liuhua had problems, the impact on Ming Ah was unimaginable.

...

Coming out of the virtual reality network, Carrie sat in her study, staring a little dull.

After she was dismissed, she could only conduct war deductions in the virtual reality network, but after all, virtual reality was only a simulation, not a real battle. The two mindsets were different and there was no real feeling of being on the battlefield.

The ideal from childhood was to be an outstanding star, however, now her wish seems to have failed.

I'm afraid I will have such a boring life in the future.

And she knows that beyond the starry sky, various civilizations are engaged in various wars.

This was supposed to be the golden age of the star, a hero in troubled times. However, as a star, she can only stay in her own home and spend time by playing virtual reality deduction games.

Didi!

A doorbell sounded, and a holographic projection appeared in front of her.

She was sure that she didn't know anyone.

"Who are you looking for?" Carrie didn't mean to open the door, but she had a little extra precaution.

"General Carrie, we want to talk to you." The person came with a respectful tone, apparently showing good intentions.

"You are not a shepherd, who is your door?"

"A group that appreciates the talent of General Carrie." The person said: "General Carrie, this should have been the best era of stars. The ideal of the general is on the battlefield. You are willing to remain silent for the rest of your life. Is there no future for the pastoral civilization?"

"You made me betray the shepherd's civilization?" Carrie said in a very bad tone. The most hated thing in her life was betrayal.

"The general misunderstood. We did not let you betray the shepherd civilization. We just hope you go to a place where you can accomplish your ideals and pursuits. We will not fight against the shepherd civilization." Lai Ren said.

Carrie was unimpressed: "Just by saying a few words, do you want me to follow you?"

"General, don't you want to have your own war department? Don't you want to play against other stars in the universe? The master of the Shepherd City is weak and incompetent. You are here, just burying your talents."

Hearing his own war department, Carrie's eyes flashed and he quickly recovered.

She really hopes to have a war department of her own, but the origin of the other party is unknown and she has to guard against it.

"This is my business. I like my life now." Carrie said calmly.

"Then don’t disturb the general for the time being. I leave the communication to the general. If the general changes his mind, we are always welcome. I am here to assure the general that our forces are definitely not enemies of the shepherd’s civilization, nor will the general make Betrayal of the civilization of the shepherd." After the person finished, leaving the contact information, he retreated from Carrie's house.

Looking at the contact information left by the other party, Carrie flickered, thinking.

...

The flames of war filled the entire Hongqiao, and the colorful light filled the entire space. There was no sound from a distance, but the center of the light was the color of death.

Lasers, antimatter bombs, armor, battleships, space-based weapons, various equipment such as fish in the sea, explosions are accompanied by countless debris, fierce flight, collision, close combat, long-range cross-fire, chasing various states Abound.

Every moment, war machines shattered inside, debris floating in space, or lasing into other directions.

Among them, the battleships on both sides of the battle are the most fierce. The light masses exploded by antimatter bombs drown the space between the warships, and the huge light masses are like small suns. The explosions are invincible and engulfing the intelligence of the battle. mechanical.

From the beginning of the battle, they entered the fierce stage, and they did not retreat.

...

The Guardian War Department all killed their eyes at this time. They used to think that the god-level civilization was invincible, but they only found out today that the enemy was not as invincible as imagined.

Confidence is formed, the inner shackles are broken, and for a time, the Guardian War Department is quietly transforming.

Every member of the Guardian War Department is extremely excited, and the advantage of fighting the enemy assassin is gradually expanding.

Wat Mu's eyes have never left the holographic projection screen, and his eyes are like wild wolves smelling fishy smell.

In terms of the situation, it is in their favor.

Their soldiers have been developed with super powers, and they have rich combat experience. The most important thing is that they have more weapons and ammunition than the other. Over time, their advantages will increase.

When the Guardian War Department began to form, it was just a guard group to leave the Shigan Galaxy. No one expected that it would grow to this step today.

At the beginning of the battle with the god-level civilization, the soldiers below were still a bit uncomfortable, and they were very helpless.

Their combat experience is not inferior to each other, because the war department soldiers have limited service time and age. They have also climbed barefoot in the **** sea of corpses, and the armor and weapon technology are not inferior to each other.

The difference between the soldiers of the two sides is in the mentality. The god-level civilization has been famous for too long. Their soldiers have a deep psychological awe for the god-level civilization.

Now there is no awe to the god-level civilization war department, then they will be fearless in the future.

Adapting to the battle, their advantages begin to become prominent.
