Even if it is a heads-up, the soldiers can fight back and forth against the other assassin soldiers one-on-one.

You know, assassin soldiers can almost be said to be sharp knives in the war department, and their personal strengths are the strongest.

...

Mingyue Liuhua feels stressed.

This is the first time she has encountered such a powerful enemy.

The other party broke her high evaluation again and again, constantly refreshing the upper limit of strength in her heart. This war department, like a strong combatant, is not afraid of any offensive to them.

The opponent's strength is very strong, whether it is single strength or comprehensive strength.

At first I thought that the opponent just pulled the most elite part to bluff them, but as the battle progressed, the assassin squad was dealt with easily. She soon discovered that the opponent did not pull the most elite team, but each battle Soldiers are at this level.

An armoured division of top-notch soldiers is comparable to the soldiers of their elite warriors. Well-trained and experienced in combat, the general’s tactical command is not weak.

what's the problem?

Are forces outside the god-level civilization so powerful?

The fleet is now heavily consumed. Their battle with the Sloan Great Wall consumes a portion of their weapons. They enter the wormhole's space interference zone without supplies. The other party is fully equipped. The two sides have similar strengths.

Mingyue Liuhua was a little flustered, but she was forcing herself to calm down. At this time, the more flustered, the more prone to problems.

After thinking for a long time, Mingyue Liuhua's eyes flickered with ruthlessness. She wanted to see if the other party was really strong, or she was strong outside.

"Don't get entangled with them, prepare with full firepower."

Command, all warship ammunition and ultra-high-energy lasers have entered the preparation stage.

I saw the advanced war robots and soldiers in the battlefield, quickly leaving the battle, leaving the front line of the battlefield, and the speed was all turned to the highest.

chapters.title: Chapter 966: : Reinforcement
chapters.body:
Chapter 966: : Reinforcement

"From the battlefield, the fleet opened the distance and prepared with full firepower."

Finding the changes in the battlefield, Wat Mu did not hesitate to order.

The other party is now ready to suppress it with firepower. They are not afraid of the other party. The more this situation is, the more the other party is helpless to them.

In terms of firepower, even if the other party is a god-level civilization, they are not afraid.

There are no space destruction weapons and beam destruction weapons. In the space interference zone of Hongqiao, they are almost the same as each other in terms of firepower. The competition is more ammunition and more accurate defense.

Mingyue Liuhua glanced at the data. In the battle just now, they lost millions of advanced war robots and 30,000 soldiers, including 5,000 assassins.

Assassin soldiers entering the opponent's defensive zone have no one in ten.

It was a shame for her to be dominated by an unknown force.

The soldiers and war robots withdrew and gathered in the space beside the battleship to stand by. Mingyue Liuhua glanced at each other's situation, and all the firepower was activated.

Dare to confront them?

After sorting out his emotions, Mingyue Liuhua repeatedly shot on the button in front of him: "Fire."

Countless bullets of the spaceship light up, as well as laser weapons, glowing with glare. The muzzle becomes the most terrifying tongue, and a steady stream of anti-material bombs are launched.

In the radar detection, countless antimatter is in an activated state, and like a raindrop, the fleet of the Warwood War Department passed by and accelerated continuously.

No bells and whistles, no machine can survive once it falls into this devastating attack.

Supporting this kind of fire attack requires massive amounts of anti-matter as energy support, and the general top civilization cannot afford it.

...

Wat Mu saw such a large-scale attack for the first time, but he was calm.

This huge attack is a nightmare for a fleet with insufficient defensive firepower. For a fleet with the same firepower, this is the problem of accelerating consumption, quick battles and quick decisions to see who consumes first.

The other party's consumption through the Sloan civilization is now the second consumption, and their team is complete, not afraid of the other party's consumption.

The real battle has just begun.

Fight against the attrition of the god-level civilization and see who can stick to the end.

"Open the fire." Wat Mu's palm pressed heavily on the red button at hand.

The tongue of fire exploded in space, and the silent battlefield even appeared to suppress terror.

The radar shows that the anti-material weapons in space are not capable of psychological stress. In this terrifying environment, every moment is suffering, and may even collapse.

It's about to start!

Seeing the anti-matter bombs of both sides approaching, all the soldiers crossed this sentence.

Wat Mu stared at the scene.

Instructor Lan’s tactical teaching once thoroughly studied the tactical superiority of the god-level civilization. Instructor Lan's goal at the beginning was very clear. Their enemies were several god-level civilizations.

Regarding the classic war tactics, tactics and outstanding stars of the god-level civilization, they have conducted in-depth intelligence collection and research.

Now is the time to fight.

The first luminous group lights up, followed by the second, third, fourth...

Countless light clusters lit up in space, quickly expanded to the size of the moon, the light enveloped the space, and the space seemed to be burned and fluctuated by high temperature.

No explosion sound was heard, and the silence in space was suppressed. Only the alarm that sounded at all times in the spacecraft echoed in my ears, adding a bit of tension to the atmosphere of death.

Smart weapons, each anti-matter bullet, will automatically cruise to resist attacks from the fleet. Once the fish that leaked out of the net appeared, the laser of the battleship would be fired immediately, detonating the flying antimatter.

The light of antimatter annihilation envelops the space into colorful, beautiful, and outsiders see the beauty, and only when you are inside, can you know that the more beautiful the dangerous.

The atmosphere was terrible.

"Don't cherish the ammunition and fire all the anti-matter bombs from the ammunition depot."

"Go to the god-class civilization of my mother-in-law, they all beat me hard."

"The warhead of the god-level civilization is nothing extraordinary, as it will die, and it will be withdrawn by our dry helmets and armor."

The captain of the battleship is cheering on the team channel.

Now at the most critical moment, from the previous battle, they initially realized the strength of the god-level civilization, which was not as unbeatable as they imagined.

It was difficult to get this battle from the instructor Lan, so the upper and lower guards had pressure on this battle. After the battle, the pressure was a little bit lower, but the heart was uneasy.

Stimulated by the atmosphere and pressure of the battlefield, every soldier is now like a wolf, and his eyes are fierce.

...

In space, countless fireballs, which are denser than holiday fireworks, explode suddenly.

The sirens of the spacecraft are particularly harsh.

With full firepower, an alarming amount of anti-material ammunition is being consumed.

Beware of omissions, and ammunition from fish that have leaked into the net will fall into a warship or space-based weapon and become a fireball.

The silent explosion is extremely depressing, and soldiers on standby in space can even hear their heartbeats. In the battleship, the alarm sound tightened the nerves of every soldier.

Ammunition is constantly being consumed and accelerated.

Both sides put antimatter bombs on the battlefield like no cost, and the violent radiation raged like an invisible magician, turning spaceship fragments and warframe fragments suspended in space into nothingness.

Both armor and battleships rely on energy shields to resist the high-energy radiation particles from the tyranny.

Anti-matter bombs touched one place without fancy, and space fell into a white space.

One minute!

Two minutes!

...

ten minutes!

Eleven minutes!

...

The firepower of the two sides continued to shoot for 25 minutes, until the tongue of the warship's muzzle on the side of the wooden guard disappeared, but the attack on the side of the corpse civilization did not stop.

The captain at the forefront of the Guardian War Department changed greatly.

The opponent's ammunition is more than they are. They have no fire ammunition to intercept the opponent's ammunition.

Twenty-six minutes! Twenty-seven minutes...

Thirty minutes later, the tongue of the muzzle of the corpse civilization warship disappeared, and countless antimatter bombs rushed towards them.

"Don't panic, all lasers are turned on, and I have intercepted the anti-matter missiles."

Wat Mu immediately ordered.

The battle between the Wraith Civilization and the Sloane Great Wall War Department caused them to consume part of their firepower. I didn't expect that they would still consume more ammunition than they do in wartime.

Worthy of being the war department of god-level civilization.

Their wood guard war department, compared to the opponent's corpse civilization, is still half way ahead. If the opponent is in a state of full firepower that is not consumed, I am afraid their loss and pressure will be greater.

The flames dissipated, and the full firepower declared the end.

The space battlefield became dark and dead again. The radiant energy of the anti-matter projectile fired by the full firepower was enough to turn ten star systems into scorched earth purgatory.

Mingyue Liuhua looked gloomy as she saw the data coming back.

In the battle of attrition, they lost more than 60 warships, while the other side lost more than 80 ships. They had five minutes more firepower than the other side, and the results were only a little more.

She was very dissatisfied.

She did not lead the fleet of the Ming Ah War Department, but in the civilization of the Dark Body, it was still the elite war department.

No matter how they say, they are also god-level civilizations, actually tied with an unknown war department. Although the results are a little more, in the eyes of Mingyue Liuhua, it is a draw.

"All prepare, kill me." Mingyue Liuhua's voice was extremely annoyed.

After the ammunition has been consumed, it is time to fight the bayonet.

She doesn't believe that this unknown warhead can still defeat their god-level civilization warfare in close combat.

...

"Hahahahaha, brothers, did you see that? Divine civilization is not invincible." A captain in the front saw the number of warships lost by the other side, laughing loudly.

On the team channel, all soldiers can hear.

The smile on Wat Mu's face also appeared slowly, very cheerfully.

The Guardian War Department was carefully organized by him. After a lot of brutal training, it has the scale of today.

From a small **** regiment to a fleet that can now confront the god-level civilization warheads, he is the creator of the warfare, and it is impossible to be unexcited.

All of this is dreaming.

Suppressing the surprise in his heart, Wat Mu returned his attention to the battle.

Now comes the most exciting part of the war.

Fight bayonet.

Mass destruction of ammunition is exhausted, and bayonet fight is inevitable. Whoever wins the bayonet will win the war.

"Brothers, our chance to defeat the god-level civilization is here, kill!"

"kill!"

On the team channel, the roar of murderous roars stirred the blood of every soldier.

Short soldiers meet, the most primitive collision is in the battlefield, and it will never be outdated.

The two war departments quickly entangled together.

Now their state is not like letting the other side leave. They all have reinforcements with each other, just to see who's reinforcements come first.

Why is there the core of Ming's war department led by Ming Chang? Mingyue Liuhua has an undefeated faith in Ming Ah's war department. As long as Ming Chang arrives, the other party can't run away.

The marching ant group is the first battle of the Black Hawk Kunpeng War Department.

In the same way, Wu Mu also has confidence in Kunpeng War Department. Kunpeng War Department has exactly the same training as them. They are going to fight against the Zerg or the Beast with their bare hands in the small universe. The overall combat quality may not be lost to the underworld civilization.

The full firepower is a carnival of ammunition, and today's close-fitting bayonet has written the tragedy more deeply.

Soon after a message came, both Wat Mu and Mingyue Liuhua smiled. Their reinforcements have gone outside the space interference zone and are entering the Hongqiao battlefield.

Kunpeng War Department and Ming Ah War Department.

chapters.title: Chapter 967: : Whetstone
chapters.body:
Chapter 967: : Whetstone

Black Hawk carefully browses the data transmitted from the Guardian War Department, has a general understanding of the current battle situation, and also has a preliminary concept of the strength of the Underworld Civilization War Department.

Soon, the specifics of the battlefield appeared in space.

The Black Hawk suddenly became serious, his expression a bit grim.

The other's reinforcements also appeared in the radar detection. The reinforcements have only one fleet, and the fleet size is only a quarter of the Kunpeng War Department, which is not a complete War Department.

"Xi Xian, lead your team out, you will know them." Black Hawk narrowed his eyes and observed the battle.

"Yes."

Xi Xian, the captain of the First Fleet, hurriedly should be.

The first time Kunpeng War Department reached the battlefield, a fleet was separated from the War Department Fleet and greeted the battlefield.

Entering the state of combat quickly, it is completely seamless.

...

Ming Chang was relieved when he received the message of Mingyue Liuhua. Mingyue Liuhua is all right, everything is all right. However, when his eyes swept over the information from the front, his pupils shrank.

The situation on the battlefield now seems not very good.

The loss is not small, the downsizing is serious, the opponent's team is not weaker than them?

Ming Chang's heart is awe-inspiring, but his mood is not very good. The civilization of the corpse actually suffers from an unknown force?

Without his opening, Mingyue Liuhua ordered that all soldiers retreat and give the battlefield to Ming Chang.

The mundane war department cut in seamlessly, and when he saw a fleet of opponents appear in front of their battlefield, he smiled angrily. The other party actually used the same size fleet to face the battle. When have they been so despised?

As an elite fleet of the Azerbaijani War Department, when faced with the enemy, the opponent did not fight more and less, hoping to suppress them by the number. Now there is a war department that wants to play against them on an equal basis?

If you don’t give the lesson a lesson, you don’t know what innocence is.

Cold killing broke out in Ming Chang's eyes.

...

Xi Xian behaved calmly.

At the beginning of the formation of Kunpeng War Department, he was the first group to join the Kunpeng War Department.

Since the first training session, he has not fallen.

The positioning of their war department is an elite team comparable to other top civilizations and god-level civilizations, but the formation time is too short, so the chief instructor gives the most horrible and dangerous training method.

Especially after the development of super powers, the chief instructor asked them to fight with the Zerg or the Beast with bare hands in the original wild star.

Even if there is a Nano Warframe facing the guardian of the edge of death and the top-level medical cabin, there are still some casualties, and during that time, they also wandered in the edge of life and death.

The threat of death and the real pain caused Kunpeng War Department to quickly grow and chase the footsteps of other war departments.

His strength in the armor, along with his good tactical qualities and talents, made him delay from the millions of soldiers and successfully became the captain of the first fleet.

He used to be an obscure senior armored division. He only joined the march ant group in a special period. Now he has become a god-level life, and he is also the captain of a fleet.

Today is the first battle, the first to face the war department of the god-level civilization.

Xi Jian's eyes fell on the fleet of the corpse civilization, and it can be seen that the support from the other party must be the elite of the corpse civilization. However, he has no fear, but his heart is more excited. The crazy fighting intention is burning.

The Guardian War Department just proved with strength that God-level civilization is not invincible.

And novices beat veterans, and they are everywhere. They may not necessarily lose to each other.

They are not vegetarian.

This is the first battle of Kunpeng War Department [August 1 Chinese website www.81zw.info], and it is absolutely necessary to fight the momentum.

As soon as the fleet entered the battlefield, Xi Xian ordered without hesitation: "Full firepower ready."

What is the style of Kunpeng War Department?

fast!

Fight at a fast pace and drag the opponent into their rhythm instead of falling into a passive position.

From instruction to action, it is fast.

Offense is the best defense.

The other party’s reinforcements are not many, and naturally the ammunition will not have more firepower than them. First consume their ammunition inventory, and then, everything will be easier to handle.

Ooo...

The warship's alarms began to buzz, and the radars were all activated anti-matter warning signals.

Ming Chang's expression was cold, but he didn't expect that the other party was so decisive that he shot at the fire with full fire. This is a completely unprecedented way of fighting.

"Full firepower ready." Ming Chang ordered.

Full firepower is turned on, and the firepower rivalry is turned on again.

The technology of warships is almost the same, so when firing fire, see who has more ammunition, accurate weapons and strong defense capabilities.

The soldiers of the Guardian War Department didn't understand why they used full firepower at the beginning, and thrown out all the firepower. Later, the intelligent machinery played against each other. Once the intelligent machinery lost to the opponent, the defense of the fleet would fall into a large passive, The firepower to deal with intelligent machinery is missing.

Although they are puzzled, they will not ask, this is the tactics of Kunpeng War Department, they just look at it.

They have fought against Kunpeng War Department in the virtual reality battlefield, and it is difficult for opponents to entangle. They win mainly because they have more actual combat experience than Kunpeng War Department and training time than Kunpeng War Minister.

Moreover, every time you play, you can feel that the Kunpeng War Department is growing.

This is the first time since the establishment of Kunpeng War Department, they also want to look at the tactics of Kunpeng War Department.

The two sides were stalemate under full firepower, and the space was enveloped by huge spheres of light. Because the fleet was small, it was not as fierce as the Guardian War Department's battle against the Mingyue Liuhua.

As time went by, the ammunition of both sides was being spent, a battleship was exploded, and the balance was slowly lost. Both sides came and went, debris and explosions filled the entire space.

...

Mingyue Liuhua stared blankly at the battlefield projection. From the perspective of the full firepower, the two sides were half a catty and did not occupy much advantage. She was not surprised by this situation, because she had just fired with the opponent's full fire power just now.

It can only be explained that the opponent's weapon technology and battleship technology are not weaker than them.

The march ant group is a force that is not weaker than their corpse civilization and is hidden deep.

However, she felt something was wrong.

Why is the opponent rushing to shoot at them?

Mingyue Liuhua's pupils shrank, and she was startled. Her eyes fell on the main fleet of Kunpeng War Department, which was swept by them in the rear. With two flanks missing, don’t know where to go?

She only remembered that the other side's reinforcements were three times that of them, and that the whole war department came.

Looking at the position of the enemy warship displayed by the radar, Mingyue Liuhua's face changed greatly.

The opponent's goal is to leave all of their teams.

...

"Wu Mu, I'm getting started for the first time, grab your opponent, don't you mind?" Black Eagle connected to Ming Tu's newsletter, said lightly: "The instructor said, let me use them as a whetstone."

Wat Mu cheated.

The command center of the main ship of the Mumu War Department was almost not scared when he heard the words of Black Hawk.

I am afraid that the entire universe, only the chief instructor dare to say such crazy words.

Use the elite warhead of god-level civilization as a whetstone? If it is heard by ordinary life, I am afraid they will be treated as fools.

But the chief instructor said this, and they were really confident.

"Go back and ask me to drink." Wat Mu looks back to normal.

"It's a word." Black Hawk smiled, and his eyes stayed on the warhead of Mingyue Liuhua, revealing a fierce fighting intention: "The third fleet, blockade the battlefield, the fourth fleet, full firepower preparation, destroy this for me Warships of the War Department."

...

Ming Chang's face became more and more anxious, and the other party took the lead in attacking, forcing them to use full firepower, and now they were dragged.

The opponent's tactics suffocated him a little.

This little-known marching ant group actually has such a good weapon technology, which is completely beyond his expectation. He now understands why Mingyue Liuhua is so embarrassed.

"Adult, Lord Mingyue's fleet is targeted by the other party with full firepower."

"What?" Ming Chang's face changed greatly.

Ming Chang was immediately chaotic, the ammunition of Mingyue Liuhua was exhausted, and the scale of the other party's reinforcements was larger than them. He now understands the reason why the other party has full firepower as soon as he speaks.

One fleet is holding back their firepower, and in the time of full firepower, the other fleet of the other party can respond.

He thought of a very serious problem. Under the same firepower, their fleet was inferior to each other, and their fists were invincible.

And the opponent's rhythm is too fast.

He pointed directly at the point of action, this fast-paced and classic tactics are different, he was a bit uncomfortable.

In the case of disadvantage, their response time is shorter.

Before coming, they just calculated the strength of the Sloan Civilization Fleet. It was completely unexpected that a humble army ant group would drop two elite warheads into the battlefield.

"Immediately adjust half of the firepower to support Lord Mingyue's fleet and ask the headquarters for help, immediately."

Ming Changxin panicked.

Even if one of their fleets attacked Black Rose City, they didn't feel that way.

He was afraid.

chapters.title: Chapter 968: : Ink Girl Recovery
chapters.body:
Chapter 968: : Ink Girl Recovery

Ming Ah has a bad hunch.

He looked up at the star chart in front of him and shook his head with a smile, probably due to his long-term battle and fatigue.

It's time for a break.

Ming A glanced at the message of the battle.

There are the largest number of Hongqiao bridges in the celestial body star field, so they are also the most divine civilization facing the most troubles. Now the situation of the celestial civilization is very complicated.

Black Rose City is so powerful that it became their first goal. Now it has been destroyed under his butcher's knife, and then other civilizations will be cleaned up.

However, due to the scarcity of stars and the defection of Ming Tu, Ming Ah had to accept the handsome position and lead the entire battle.

Now his mental strength is in the battlefield of the Ming Dynasty civilization. If Mingyue is around, he can relax a lot, but Mingyue Liuhua received the order and went to the Hongqiao battlefield of the Sloan Wall.

When Ming Ah wanted to take a rest, an intelligence officer ran over and stopped beside him.

"Sir, Master Chang Chang asks for help." The intelligence officer presented all the news from Ming Chang to Ming Ah.

At the next moment, Ming Ah's face changed greatly.

"Recent War Department, how long will it take to adjust to the Sloan Great Wall." Ming A is not calm, even in the face of the siege of the universe civilization, he has not been so perverted.

"one day."

This answer made Ming Ah feel dark in front of him, his body shaking and falling down.

...

The light dissipated, and the space was full of fragments of battleships, blasting away from the Hongqiao.

Also suspended in space are corpses of civilized soldiers and advanced war robots. Warframes and advanced war robots have energy shields that can withstand the energy radiation that erupts. As long as they are not directly hit by antimatter, they will be fine.

But the battleship was destroyed and they faced a terrible situation.

No battleship fled.

This makes them turtles in the urn.

Space that spans light years and wants to cross with armor is no different than finding death.

"The two players are a team and will meet them." Blackhawk ordered.

"Yes."

The spirits of Kunpeng War Department were shocked, and all of them left the range of the fleet and flew towards the remnant army of the corpse civilization.

Every team member has a strong fighting intent. This is the first time they have faced a god-level civilization. Once the god-level civilization made them out of reach, but now they are their opponents.

What a great thing it is to defeat the god-level civilization.

The war broke out, making the blood of every soldier seem to be burning.

The battle armor was as fast as the battlefield, and it was entangled with the remnant army after Mingyue Liuhua was broken by the fleet.

Fighting broke out.

The style of Kunpeng War Department is fast, much faster than the general War Department.

This is related to the combat style of Blackhawk.

Blitz, raid and guerrilla warfare is the essence of their tactics, so whether it is the fleet or the soldiers, this style.

In order to adapt to their combat style, Mo Nu also specially tailored their armor for them.

Their warframes and advanced war robots are the fastest among the six major war departments of the march ant group. Of course, for speed, they made some compromises in firepower, but this has little effect on them.

...

Mingyue Liuhua's body was trembling, not fear, but anger.

The battleships were destroyed, and they are now trapped in space with nowhere to escape.

What's more annoying is that the opponent is actually preparing to use war soldiers to deal with their soldiers. When can the soldiers of the corpse civilization be challenged by any war department?

Mingyue Liuhua blazes.

She hoped that she could seize the important person of the other party, so as to threaten the other party and let them leave, but no other important person appeared.

Soon, she discovered that the situation was not right.

The opponent's fighting rhythm is very fast, belonging to a two-on-one situation, one battle, one battle.

During the one-on-one period, their soldiers had an advantage, and they could see that the enemy was a little jerky. When one of the soldiers falls into danger, the other soldier will shoot and then exchange opponents.

And the opponent's escape speed is very fast.

Wheel fight.

Does the other party want to kill them by wheel battle?

As soon as this idea appeared, Mingyue Liuhua immediately rejected it.

For God-level life, the cost of battle is almost non-existent. In the face of battle, they can fight for three days and nights without fear. Without waiting for them to die, their reinforcements will arrive.

The other party is definitely not as simple as consuming them.

Mingyue Liuhua stared at the battlefield constantly, constantly browsing the data on the armor of each warrior, she had to determine what the opponent's strange way was for.

Not long after, Mingyue Liuhua discovered the clue.

The enemy soldiers were jerky from the beginning, and now they are gradually proficient. It seems that every enemy soldier has changed, and it has not been at the beginning.

This is an invisible transformation.

Not one or two, but the other team as a whole.

She vaguely remembered her training as an instructor when she was a new soldier. This is to cultivate the self-confidence and actual combat experience of the soldiers. Does the other party use them as a whetstone?

This discovery made her face change greatly and her face became extremely angry.

Was the elite warhead of the god-level civilization she led by the other party treated as a whetstone?

This is a complete insult.

"They are using us as a whetstone." Mingyue Liuhua gritted her teeth to contact Chang Chang.

Found that something was wrong, almost a burst of blood rushed into the brain, and was trembling with anger.

They are a member of the Nether Arab War Department. It can be said that they are the elite among the elite, the top warheads of the god-level civilizations for which countless civilizations are shaking, and now they are the grindstone of others?

But after all, he is not an ordinary life. After discovering this situation, Ming Chang's face was even more ugly.

Because he saw that the other side of the other side of the war had not moved, and he also followed the Qushu warfare with the Shilong Great Wall in which Wu Mu came in. The two wars watched the war.

What if they all participate?

The hands and feet become cold without control.

...

Time is slowly passing by, and the soldiers of Kunpeng War Department are a little different from the beginning.

As commander-in-chief, the Black Hawk can clearly feel the changes in the soldiers. Looking at the statistics of the armor, they know that their battles are more confident, and their awe of the god-level civilization is disappearing.

"Have you ever experienced fighting with God-level civilization soldiers?" The voice of Blackhawk echoed in the ears of every soldier.

"Yes."

All the players answered seriously, not to mention how excited they were.

After fighting, they found the gap between themselves and the god-level civilization soldiers. In many aspects, especially the systematic combat skills, the god-level civilization soldiers had a solid foundation.

Combat skills and resilience are top-notch. On the whole, there is not a small gap between their individual soldiers and each other. This time it takes advantage of it, which accounts for much of the reinforcements.

In the first battle, it is not easy to fight with the top war department of the god-level civilization to this extent, and the soldiers of the god-level civilization are not invincible.

In the war department, a confidence is being formed to break the confidence of the invincible impression of god-level civilization. The momentum of the entire Kunpeng war department is quietly changing.

Black Hawk's smile became brighter, connecting the handguard department: "Watmu, it's time to fight quickly."

"it is good."

Wat Mu agreed immediately.

The two war departments, like the huge waves in the storm, swept toward the war department of the corpse civilization.

...

Earth, March Ant Headquarters Building 1.

Mo Nu closed her eyes and tried to focus her attention. She tried to control her body according to Chen Mo's method of controlling her body.

Zhao Min was waiting quietly, not disturbing.

Now Mo Nu's body is too special. According to her cognition, it is a more mysterious existence than superpower. She can't help at all.

Chen Mo's transformation scared them enough, but fortunately, everything is safe now.

In the future, there is no need to worry about Chen Mo again.

Waiting for Zhao Min, boredly browsing the group's affairs, it is now in a troubled autumn. Only when it develops to the present, she deeply understands that the cosmic power is difficult to manage.

They have to manage countless lives, and even she feels pressure.

Suddenly, Zhao Min stopped with a feeling, and the ink girl sitting in the experimental chair also opened her eyes and showed a smile.

"How is it?" Zhao Min asked.

"It's time to move." Mo Nu slowly rose from the back of the chair, slowly extended her legs, and fell to the ground.

Zhao Min was somewhat pleased: "It's finally all right."

"Sister Zhao Min, do you want to go to Mo Ge?" Mo Nu asked for a moment with a stunned look.

"So far away, there are still a lot of things in my family that I have to deal with, and I can't get away. And the universe is a little messy now, and he won't promise us to go." Zhao Min shook his head and smiled, "If you want to go, you will Come on, I can just watch it at home."

"Soon, after adjusting to my body, I seem to have a special ability." Mo Nu said mysteriously.

The protagonist of Mushitian star.

The main star's early morning came as scheduled, Chen Mo opened his eyes, and the people around him were lying on his body like a lazy kitten. As soon as he wanted to move, Xiaoyu opened his eyes, looked at each other, and smiled.

"Get me up and get up."

Chen Mo picked up the lazy pleasant in his arms and went to the bathroom.

At the dining table, Chen Mo enjoyed breakfast in the style of the main star of Mu Family Star, while watching the intelligence affairs coming from the earth. The breakfast tasted good. He found that the style and taste of the food here at Mushi Tianxing is a bit like the earth.

Suddenly, the ringtone of the communication instrument made Chen Mo and Xiao Yu stunned.

As soon as it turned on, the smiling face of the ink girl appeared on it.

"Mo Ge, I recovered." Mo Nu smiled.

"That's good." Chen Mo nodded gently, with some joy.

"Sister Zhao Min and I went to find you."

"Uh?" Chen Mo froze: "A little far away, now the universe is a bit messy, is it unsafe on the road?"

"Give you a surprise, look behind." Mo Nu smiled and turned off the communicator.

Chen Mo and Xiao Yu were extremely puzzled, but they still looked back behind. I saw slight ripples in the hall, and a three-meter-high colored hole appeared in their sight.

Zhao Min and Mo Nu walked out from inside holding hands.

The several guards guarding the hall, including Jing Ge, stared at Mo Nu and Zhao Min, staring at them dumbfounded.

chapters.title: Chapter 969: : A Free Space
chapters.body:
Chapter 969: : A Free Space

"The patriarch, the Sloan Great Wall battlefield sent back news, dispatched the entire war department to be annihilated, Mingyue Liuhua died in battle, and Mingchang who went to support was also a matter of life and death."

Wu Kun knelt down on the ground, his head buried deep near the floor, and the atmosphere didn't dare to gasp.

He could feel that in the totem hall, the horrible anger of the old patriarch was brewing, and huge pressure was covering him.

For a long time, the old patriarch spoke: "Is the Sloan Wall so strong? Or is the War Department too wasteful?"

"No, Mingyue Liuhua killed the two generals of the Sloan Great Wall and almost captured Hongqiao, but as he prepared to cross the Hongqiao, the war department of the Marching Ant Group appeared there."

Sweat drew sweat on his forehead and dropped on the floor of the totem hall, but he dared not move.

"Based on the intelligence assessments returned, including the war department that came to support, two top war departments of the Marching Ant Group appeared in the Sloan Great Wall."

"Marching Ant Group!"

The voice of the old patriarch who didn't know the emotion spread throughout the totem hall and spoke after a while.

"Is there anything else?"

"Yes, Ming Qiyu sent back the news, Chen Mo, the owner of the marching ant group, appeared in Mu Shi Tian Xing. Tong Qing exposed the news of Chen Mo mastering super power development technology at Mu Shi Tian Xing's banquet. I am afraid he is now stared by countless forces. Go up."

"Let Ming Qiyu capture him at all costs." The old patriarch's deep and old voice came into Wu Kun's ears.

"Yes."

Wu Kun promised and hurriedly got up and left the Totem Hall.

The magnificent totem palace, this temple that symbolizes the highest power of the corpse civilization, has regained its silence.

...

Today is the opening day of the Star Festival.

As the largest event in the universe, here gathers hundreds of millions of elites from all over the universe. It can be said that the Star Festival is a cosmic academic festival.

The Star Venue is the largest open-air venue of Mu Shi Tianxing, enough to accommodate tens of millions of people to watch the opening at the same time. This is the site of the opening ceremony.

Only top power groups and top elite talents will be invited to participate in the scene. Other life can use virtual reality technology or holographic news to see the situation on the scene.

As a member of the Mu Family Star Family Banquet, Chen Mo was also invited to attend the opening ceremony.

Zhao Min followed Chen Mo, close to the venue, and looked up at the star venue in front.

This should be the largest venue she has ever seen.

Outside of the meeting place at this time, there are countless strange lives, one after another.

There are many events in the event, which belong to different fields and are the top academic forums in this field.

This open academic event has greatly increased the academic exchanges among cosmic civilizations. Even if some civilizations are slightly conservative about this, there is still a general trend.

"The atmosphere is pretty good, no wonder the universe civilization can blossom everywhere," Zhao Minran said.

It is difficult for a small earth to achieve such a good academic opening, not to mention the universe and the universe with countless lives and countless civilizations.

"This is the admirable place of Mu Shi Tianxing. It has left an unparalleled wealth for the life and civilization of the universe. It is more precious than his Tianlin Stele Forest." Chen Mo also exclaimed.

There are ten people in their party.

The three females plus a pet, a small mother, a pet, as well as five **** guards such as Jing Ge and Ku Yao.

The security at the scene was extremely harsh.

The speed limit within 200 kilometers of the venue is less than 1,000 kilometers, and the combat armor is prohibited from flying higher than 100 meters within 10 kilometers, and the speed is also limited to 100 kilometers. When entering the site, high-energy weapons must be unloaded and prohibited from being brought into the site. Including high-energy melee weapons.

This can effectively ensure on-site security issues.

Today's opening ceremony can be said to focus on the top armored divisions of the Mohs Star Safety Agency to ensure the smooth progress of the opening ceremony.

Now the universe is in a special situation, and this is the most important event in the universe. If there is a big accident here, the status of Mu Shitian will fall into embarrassment.

Through the scanning inspection of the security tunnel, Chen Mo led a group of people and began to find his place.

"Head, the one at Mu Family's Star Family Banquet."

A police officer from the Security Department stood in the air, pointing in the direction of Chen Mo.

"This one is also bold, and actually dragged his family to bring his mouth. Black pupils exposed that they have super ability to develop technology. If I fled here early, I hurried home to hide."

The policeman next to him was a little surprised. He was a member of the family banquet of Mu Shi Tianxing and naturally heard the news.

Gai Luo glanced at Chen Mo and his party.

"Don't gossip, this is not what we should talk about, he is here, we are responsible for his safety, let the players pay attention to his security, otherwise there will be a problem, the Planetary Security Agency may face the anger of the forces behind them. "

Chen Mo is in the limelight, a life that dares to have equal dialogue with the god-level civilization, he doesn't think it's that simple.

"Let's see if we can recruit some talents back this time."

Find a seat and sit down, Zhao Min read the news of the home forum of this event.

It’s okay if she doesn’t come, she can ignore it, but now that she can come here, she has to add up and find some talents to go back.

The march ant group is expanding, requiring countless talents.

After the opening ceremony, various forums will begin, and Zhao Min will prepare his homework in advance.

After hundreds of millions of years of determination, there will be several main venues to discuss intelligent computing, quantum physics, mathematics, chemistry, antimatter, dark matter, war armor machinery, life sciences, superenergy, cosmic space science, cosmic economics, in addition , As well as the War Game and the Star Elite Contest.

In addition to several important mainstream venues, there are many sub-disciplinary forums, but the venue is chosen to be held on a planet other than Mushitianxing.

In the real academic forum debate, except for the top scholars in the field who are invited, all other life needs to buy tickets to enter the forum site, and you can also buy virtual reality tickets to listen to the academic forum academic debates in virtual reality.

The content of the forum debates are the top research in the field, the most cutting-edge technology and the most influential issues.

This open academic wave is once every 50 years. As for which forces and which civilizations can gain in this grand event, it is entirely up to you.

Scientists of some civilizations get inspiration for breakthrough technology in this open academy, thus pushing their civilization progress. Some civilizations have recruited top scientists in such venues, thereby driving the progress of their own civilization.

The gains vary, but they are all for the advancement of their own civilization.

...

"Several people, it seems that there is a free space."

On the rostrum with the best location in the star venue, Tong Qing looked at the vacant seat at the edge of the eye.

That is the seat of the dark forest civilization.

A coup d’état in the dark forest civilization, Dinan Miró hurried back to the dark forest area, and now this position is vacant.

On the rostrum, several other people looked at each other and looked at Tong Qing.

"Mr. Hitomi wanted to invite a capable person to come up and fill this vacant position?" Hu Bingxin's words were meaningful and his face seemed to be a smile.

"I have this idea. I wonder if there are any suitable candidates?" Tong Qing asked with a smile.

Zi Yun gave her a cold look, not speaking, as if not interested in their conversation. Nine Qiyu did not speak. In terms of status, in the podium, except for the dark forest civilization, his true status is the lowest.

Shui Ling has an indisputable appearance and is not interested in participating in their intrigue.

"Tuyun is pretty good, would you like Mr. Tuyun to come over?" said Thing.

"Tuyun is indeed very powerful, but I have someone else." Tong Qing's eyes turned to Chen Mo's position: "The Tianzong Wizard, Mr. Chen Mo."

For a time, all the players on the court were quiet.

Ming Qiyu looked gloomy and ugly.

As the core personnel of civilization, they will be informed about important events in the universe at the first time.

The annihilation of the corpse civilization in the whole army of the Sloan Great Wall has long spread to the core high-level of several god-level civilizations. This was the first defeat of the corpse civilization after Hongqiao's shock, and it was located in the Sloan Great Wall.

Moreover, intelligence revealed that Netherworld civilization lost two outstanding generals, including the generals of a fleet that captured the Dark Rose War Department of Black Rose City.

All this was done by the marching ant group.

When they first heard the news, they were shocked, and they confirmed it again and again before they were sure it was true.

Hu Bingxin was even more surprised. The news she received was not only that the corpse civilization was defeated, but also their civilized gourds were frustrated in Muwu Hongqiao.

At Mu Family Star's family banquet, they can all feel that Tong Qing is exploring and targeting Chen Mo.

They still don't understand why Tong Qing cares so much about an unknown pawn, and now they have to admire it.

The fleet of the god-level civilization is defeated, no matter what means is used, then the calculation is enough to show the strength and ability of the other party, and it can be calculated to the war department of the god-level civilization.

"I don't think so."

The reticent water hyacinth is rarely interrupted, opposing Tong Qing's proposal.

The teacher asked her to make good acquaintance with Chen Mo. This position will become the focal point of the universe during the Star Festival, which is not a good thing.

"Oh? Shui Ling girl talk about where to go? Mr. Chen Mo is not worse than us in terms of pattern, strength, talent, knowledge and courage?" Tong Qing asked with a smile.

Shui Ling was asked all at once, unable to answer for a while, and thought for a while before saying: "He has not enough prestige to convince the public."

"Prestige is such a thing, the strength is right." Tong Qing said.

"It's useless for us to argue, maybe ask Chen Mo's opinion, maybe he doesn't want to sit here? If he was invited, he refused to come, and it was us who was ashamed." Zi Yun said coldly.

chapters.title: Chapter 970: : Chen Mo Seated
chapters.body:
Chapter 970: : Chen Mo Seated

The special waiter of the organizer appeared in the senior VIP area, attracting the attention of the surrounding life.

Because the status of special waiters is very special, they generally only serve forces and lives on the podium. Even in the premium VIP area, only ordinary waiters greet you. There is no waiter in the senior VIP area.

The appearance of the special waiter means that there is life in the rostrum to send him down.

Soon, the surrounding life recognized Chen Mo's identity.

Chen Mo's appearance of mankind was known to the outside world when he changed twice in the Star Forest.

The genius of Tianzong was wanted by the Ziwei civilization. Many lives and forces were a pity for him, and he was also impressed.

"I don't know what to do with him on this podium this time?" The next life began to mutter in a low voice.

"Don't you know? I heard that at the family banquet of Mu Shi Tianxing, the black pupil exposed a huge news that Chen Mo has the ability to develop technology in his hands." A friend said next to the life that spoke.

"Isn't it? Such shocking news, why don't I know?"

"All of the participating forces are top powers. Which one does not want to win him? Spread it out to the outside world. Isn't that adding a competitor to yourself? And things will get complicated.

"I was found to have super ability to develop technology, but still dare to come to the Star Festival, are you afraid to go back?"

"If I were, I would have escaped."

"..."

Hearing some gossip, a lot of discussion broke out around.

I was very surprised at Chen Mo's ability to develop technology.

Buck looked at Chen Mo. He didn't understand why those on the rostrum wanted to invite Chen Mo up. He has heard of Chen Mo, but he has only seen it in the news, the earliest genius figure in this star festival.

But it is impossible to sit on the rostrum just by the name of a genius.

But he is also just a little hello. Those things should be considered by those on the rostrum. All he needs to do is complete the things that the rostrum has explained.

"Mr. Chen Mo, the rostrum invites you to go to the rostrum." Buck said respectfully.

"Invite me to the podium?" Chen Mo looked puzzled. For him, it was a bit weird, but soon he thought of some possibilities, but he was not sure which one: "What does the podium invite me to do?"

"The delegation of the Dark Forest Civilization left, and there was a vacancy on the rostrum. Several adults on the rostrum jointly elected and hoped that Mr. Chen Mo would take the seat." Buck said.

"Invite me to take the chair?" This answer surprised Chen Mo.

Xiaoyu and Zhao Min's third daughter also looked at each other, wondering why this happened.

But it must have been bad.

The others on the stage, except for the water hyacinth, were somewhat more or less at odds with Chen Mo. Inviting Chen Mo to go up, how does it feel wrong, because in the premium VIP area, which life is not as prestigious and qualified as Chen Mo?

"..."

Chen Mo just wanted to say no, he was caught by Zhao Min.

"Wait a moment." Zhao Min said politely to Buck.

Buck looked at Zhao Min and Chen Mo again. He was slightly puzzled and nodded.

Chen Mo looked at Zhao Min in doubt.

Based on Zhao Min's understanding of him, he should know that he will refuse at this time.

"I know that although there may be fraud, your strength should be self-confident. Your current position and identity are different. You are under the entire army ant group. We are not a army ant group on the earth, nor is the Taifo system." Zhao Min solemnly said: "High-profile once, to fight,"

Chen Mo froze for a moment, thinking about it.

...

On the rostrum, several people are paying attention to Chen Mo's position.

No one spoke, because Chen Mo couldn't get up, it was related to what they should do next. Seeing Chen Mo and his party follow up with Buck, the expressions of several people were different.

"Student Tong Qing, you seem to have wished." Hu Bing smiled heartily.

Tong Qing smiled and shook his head, looking at Chen Mo, not knowing what he was thinking.

Seeing Chen Mochao on the rostrum in the past, countless concerns about his life and doubts.

"You said, what did Chen Mo do on the podium?" Emperor Wu looked at Chen Mo's back with interest.

"Unclear." Emperor Wei shook his head.

Emperor Yu was also surprised: "Tu Qing seems to be very concerned about this life."

"Not very concerned, but very concerned. The god-level civilizations are all concerned about this life." Emperor Wu looked at the podium intently, drinking all the wine in his hand.

The life of the premium VIP area is all concerned about the area on the podium.

The civilization in the special VIP area is the most promising group to be a god-level civilization. Unfortunately, the seven seats of the universe alliance are occupied by god-level civilizations. If you want to enter the ranks of god-level civilization, you must have a god-level civilization exit, or the universe The pattern disrupted reorganization.

Now when I see Chen Mo going to the rostrum, I am puzzled.

...

Reaching the rostrum, Buck took the lead in front of Tong Qing and several people. He respectfully replied: "Several adults, Lord Chen Mo has come up."

After successfully completing the task, Buck stepped aside.

On the rostrum, in addition to the lives of the seven god-level civilizations, that is, the life of the Mu Family Star Family, the life of the Mu Family Star Family has never been in charge of the disputes between the major civilizations.

"Brother Chen Mo, welcome." Tong Qing said with a smile.

"It's an honor to be here." Chen Mo nodded slightly to several people.

"Please sit down." Tong Qing's palms led to the empty seat of the dark forest civilization podium, and he gestured towards Chen Mo, his expression was indifferent, making people see what he was thinking.

Shui Ling frowned, and now she couldn't persuade Chen Mo.

She did not know whether it was lucky or unfortunate this time, but from now on, Chen Mo will undoubtedly become one of the focus of the audience and will face continuous troubles.

The position vacated by the dark forest civilization on the podium will be taken over by Chen Mo.

This position is not just as simple as a seat. Once Chen Mo sits down, it will not only completely offend the dark forest civilization, but also arouse the disapproval of many top civilizations.

Looking at Tong Qing, Chen Mo slowly walked towards the podium and sat up.

Several other actions that did not hesitate to Chen Mo were stunned. They are all smart people, Chen Mo is not stupid, it is impossible not to know what this means, but he still sat down calmly.

Wow! !

When Chen Mo was sitting on the rostrum, in the dark forest civilization position, he paid close attention to the life of the rostrum and was in an uproar.

Is he trying to take the place of dark forest civilization?

"Why did he sit in that position? What qualifications do he have?"

"Is it possible for him to sit in that position by defeating a famous teacher with his two limelights? The podium is too authoritative?"

"Will a Maotou sit on the podium at such a serious occasion as the opening ceremony of the Star Festival?"

"Don't think that a little talent is great."

"..."

"Let him roll down, my first disapproval."

When Chen Mo took the next position, he aroused countless indignation. On the rostrum, only the identity and authority of a god-level civilization can sit on it. In addition, it is the sponsor of the Mu Family Star Family.

But Chen Mo, a young and unknown life sitting there, is not a representative of a god-level civilization, and naturally dissatisfied.

There are too many lives that want to sit in that position. There are countless others who think they are stronger and better than Chen Mo.

"Even if there is no dark forest civilization at that location, you are more qualified to sit up in Tuyun?" said a blue-skinned, life-like blue orangutan in the premium VIP area. Next to him was Tuyun.

"Ah!" Tuyun sitting in the premium VIP area sighed.

"Brother Tuyun, don't be angry. This kind of hairy boy is not worth mentioning. I think that with a little achievement, I am arrogant and dared to sit in any position." The life of a blue orangutan is extremely puzzled.

"I'm not angry. I'm worried. I'm afraid he will have a lot of trouble."

"What does that mean, brother?" the friends around him asked indifferently.

"He is my friend and the relationship is not bad. I'm not angry that he took that position. In many ways, he is much stronger than me. I am also convinced when he sits." Tu Yun said.

His friends suddenly realized that he remembered that Tu Yun and Chen Mo had talked with each other yesterday, and they looked familiar.

"How much does that brother worry?"

Tu Yun looked at Chen Mo on the chair and sighed: "I'm afraid that he will fall into Tong Qing's calculations. Have you forgotten the special program at each opening ceremony?"

chapters.title: Chapter 971: : Everyone'S Attention
chapters.body:
Chapter 971: : Everyone'S Attention

"The 2734902 Mu's Star Festival is officially started now."

The host's voice sounded, and the scene of the Star Star venue fell into a fierce carnival. This is a grand event that many people look forward to, and countless days have gathered here, a real event.

"Here are the members of the rostrum coming this year."

"The first is the 29,417 heirs of our great man Mu Shi Tianxing, and is now the patriarch of the Mu Shi Tianxing family Mu Shizhong, chairman of the Mu Shi Tianxing event.

A huge holographic influence appeared at the meeting place that held tens of thousands of lives. A giant holographic projection of up to 500 meters appeared in the center of the meeting place, standing majesticly and ushering in countless cheers.

As the patriarch of the Mu Family Star family, Mu Family is the most prestigious person in the Star Monument, and it is believed to be convincing and convincing.

The Star Festival is held every 50 years. Since Mu's re-takeover of the Mu Family's Star family, he has hosted 72 games.

Mu Shi from the seat smiled back at the camera and said hello.

"The second member of the rostrum is Mr. Hitomi, the current speaker of Black Hitomi Civilization."

Accompanied by the host's voice fell, a holographic projection of 500 meters high, the huge holographic projection of the pupil, once again triggered a wave of cheers.

The iconic black pupil, scattered black hair, strong cheeks, and strange black eye texture on the skin make people feel mysterious and powerful.

Whether it is live or participating in the opening ceremony of life in a virtual network, it is no stranger to Black Hitomi.

As early as his youth, Tong Qing's genius spread throughout the Universe Alliance only by his name. He was the object of countless life worships and the dream lover and fantasy object of countless female lives.

Tong Qing stood up and greeted the scene, and the majesty of the superior was reflected most vividly.

"This year's podium member is the most luxurious one I have ever seen. The third one is Mr. Thunder, the new king of Thor's dynasty. Mr. Thunder is the youngest king of Thor's dynasty in nearly 100 million years."

Under the introduction of the host, Thunder stood up indifferently and waved towards the camera.

On the huge holographic projection, the Thunder's projection was surrounded by blue thunder and bursting hormones, which attracted screams of countless female lives.

"Fourth place, Hu Bingxin of Baixing Civilization, Mrs. Fox."

The image of Hu Bingxin and Fox Girl appeared in the center of the venue, and cheers broke out in countless male lives. But Hu Bingxin just stood up with the host's introduction, waved his hand toward the court, a slight smile appeared on his face, and the etiquette was the ultimate.

"Fifth place, the old civilization that created the armor system, and the genius of Ziwei civilization, Ms. Ziyun."

"Sixth, the genius student of the Prophet of Endless Sea Civilization, Ms. Shui Ling."

"The seventh place is Mr. Ming Qiyu, a high-level body civilization."

The emergence of everyone on the field will bring huge cheers and thunderous applause. As a place where countless lives yearn for god-level civilizations, in the pursuit of powerful lives for hundreds of millions of years, they all hope to join god-level civilizations.

"Due to the special circumstances this year, the dark forest civilization retreated from the Mushi star event. Therefore, the vacant podium position of the dark forest civilization was decided by Mr. Tong Qing and Mr. Lei Ting. To replace the last seat on the rostrum. The result of the vote was five votes in favor and one against."

When Chen Mo's holographic image appeared, the otherwise lively meeting place suddenly fell silent.

Many lives haven't responded yet. Which master Chen Mo of the marching ant group?

Before long, some lives recognized Chen Mo.

"The genius who broke through in the Star Forest."

"It was the life that just walked to the podium. Why should he be the substitute for the dark forest civilization?"

"Is the gold content of the podium so low? A life that makes a little noise in the Star Forest will be able to sit up? Isn't it too much a play?"

"I'm afraid it's not that simple. Didn't you hear the introduction of the host? There should be some special circumstances when Tong Qing and Thunder recommended them together."

"..."

Uninformed life broke out fiercely on the seat, including the virtual network scene, the barrage of the virtual reality network opening ceremony, the barrage has been crazy, even though Chen Mo has exposed his face twice in the Star Forest, but there is still a lot of life Not the same thing.

There is no connection between the high talent and the position on the podium. There is no prestige and strength, and there is strong support behind it, and you will not be convinced when you sit up.

Whether it is the opening ceremony site or the virtual reality network site, the audience looks at Chen Mo's gaze, it is not worship and admiration, but it is all unconvinced and doubtful.

"Is it because he made a deal with God-level civilization? Or why would they support him in that position?"

"transaction?"

"You have forgotten that he has superpowers to develop technology, as long as he gives the technology to those civilizations and agrees that he will sit on the podium at this opening ceremony, it is not uncommon."

Special VIP areas are also discussed.

This situation is too strange.

Many old civilizations, such as the Three Emperors in the Land of Wuxian, as well as the leaders of the five-nation alliance, are also present, and there are some new civilizations, such as Yunzhou Civilization, which is also extremely powerful.

No matter how you rank, you can't get a young and unknown group to take that position.

So what they can guess is the position Chen Mo paid for in exchange.

"There is no reason, Mu Shizhong is also there. He cannot make such a thing happen in the Star Event as a trade in interests."

"But he is facing the leaders and core senior leaders of the seven god-level civilizations."

"..."

The controversy spread among all life, and this scene also spread throughout the virtual reality network venues, at the same time spreading among the stars and even the civilizations that broadcast the opening ceremony of the star festival in the universe.

What kind of force is the marching ant group? Can sit on the rostrum and sit on par with the seven god-level civilizations.

"what's going on?"

Lan, who is in the solar system, was very surprised to see Chen Mo in the live broadcast of the Star Festival.

They have a small universe, and they have all kinds of infinite technology of the boss. As a god-level civilization, the foundation is sufficient, but the war department is still far from the god-level civilization. It needs to be polished.

Not long after they had just jumped out of Pisces Whale, the outside world did not know their true strength, nor were they famous.

But now the boss replaces the dark forest civilization, what is going on on the podium? Even Lan couldn't understand.

Just looking for the reason, a message from Zhao Min came back.

Other god-level civilizations invited the boss to go up.

This news is critical.

"I'm afraid the boss will be in trouble." Yang Siqingyue around Lan said lightly.

"How to say?" Lan asked curiously.

He would always listen carefully to his daughter's words, and compare his daughter's ingenuity to his inheritance, clever and smart.

"Every Star Festival, in order to attract talents, has a tradition, did your father forget?" Yang Siqing reminded.

Lan's body shook and immediately sat upright, the eyes of Yinhuan kept turning.

"If this is the case, it should be fine." Lan said, looking up.

This time, Yang Siqing's turn was surprised.

"You still don't know enough about the boss, he is omnipotent, the most versatile and genius life I have ever seen." Lan praised.

...

Chaotic land.

In a large hall, the poisoned skin girl stared at Chen Mo's live video, expressing her admiration.

Gray twenty-one next to it, full of worship and respect. Gray 21's slightly childish face has long since disappeared. In these years, he has grown up in the dark world of the chaotic land with the poisonous skin girl. He is now a well-deserved second person in the organization.

"How is the arrangement of Xingxing's affairs?" Dudu Girl asked.

"Negotiating with her, she was a little shaken, but she didn't really agree." Gray 21 said: "The film crew is afraid that the twisted melon is not sweet and has not forced her."

"Well, notify the film crew to ask her to come back as soon as possible. The next development is the key, and the integration of chaos is imperative."

"Ok."

Gray agreed blackjack.

...

On a small square in Mu Shi Tianxing, a life wearing a **** cloak looked up at Chen Mo on the holographic projection.

Under the big cloak, there are a pair of purple pupils, purple light flowing in the skin.

"Nice life, hope it's not wrong."

The cloak man's voice was a little surprised, thinking for a while before he stepped away.

In the crowded little square, no one paid attention to this life.

...

Inside the space connector of the Endless Haven Star Domain.

A huge blue planet with a transparent luxury palace standing in the deepest part of the water. The palace is blue and made of special blue crystal. It is beautiful and exudes light blue fluorescence.

In the middle of the palace, there is only one old man.

The old man turned his back to the holographic projection, and looked down at Chen Mo's image, his eyes gleaming wisely.

"Growing so fast, all stand on this stage." The old man exclaimed.

The voice fell and the sea palace was dead again.

...

As the center of discussion, Chen Mo stood calmly and greeted him, then sat down in his seat. There was no applause, only noisy discussion, but he was still unmoved.

"Guests on the podium have finished their introduction. Next, we will introduce the guests in the premium VIP area."

The typhoon of the host is very stable and does not affect these things.

In the introduction of the premium VIP area, it will not be introduced one by one like the rostrum, but it will project the identity of many guests and the civilized power of the representatives to let many lives know.

They are all the top civilization forces in the universe, and there are many traditional and well-known forces that are well known in the universe.

On the rostrum, the atmosphere was a little quiet. Everyone was calmly looking at the opening ceremony, applauding from time to time. As for the exchanges, they knew each other well, and did not open the topic for the time being, and it was not easy to communicate.

"Here's Mr. Mu Shizhong to announce the official start of the Mu Shi Tianxing event."

After the beginning of the process, the host gave the topic to Mu Shizhong.

chapters.title: Chapter 972: : Opening Ceremony Of Star Festival
chapters.body:
Chapter 972: : Opening Ceremony Of Star Festival

"I announced the opening of the 2734902 Mu's Star Festival," Mu said loudly.

Wow~~

Gorgeous fireworks and holographic projection lights up in the venue, completely submerging it in the visual feast.

Countless colorful life, as well as the stunning scenes of previous scenes in the hologram, are lit up in the hologram, physicist debate, mathematician's proof, life science scientist's speech, battle of armored division, star The conquest of the starry sky.

Every scene is enough to make people bloody.

Except, it is a general holographic evolution of the great prosperity of cosmic civilization.

This is the platform where the thoughts of the major civilizations of the universe collide.

Countless geniuses have risen here, and countless universe scientific problems have collided with new possibilities and directions in academic debates.

The dazzling fireworks disappeared, and the holographic projection gradually faded.

"Princess Arowana, please sing the theme song of the opening ceremony." The host Yang Ang shouted.

Wow! !

The carnival broke out again on the scene. In the virtual reality network, the carnival was even worse, and countless lives cheered on the neck.

...

Starry sky plucks soft strings

Meteor burning sky

The **** rolls the dice and spins to the edge of the universe

He is still studying, experimenting, exploring and practicing.

The mystery of all things

Who will be found in

The integral solves the mysterious answer, quantum painting draws ancient time,

Cell code, the covalent bond that locks atoms

Who is thinking outside the universe

...

The theme song of the celestial event sounded, let countless lives sing along.

This is the most classic theme song of the Star Festival, and it is a household name in the universe. However, every time it is heard, it still makes people feel awe of the universe.

All life in the venue was immersed in the singing of the dragon fish princess. They all knew that the singing of the dragon fish was nice, and they knew the reason.

Princess Arowana has a super power of sound, which can make every kind of life's aesthetic can hear the beauty of singing.

Many mermaids have such wonderful singing ability, so mermaid singers are the most popular musical life in the universe.

The dragon fish's singing is cheering, but Zhao Min has no intention to appreciate it, and is reading the information about Mu Shi Tian sent by Lan.

It must be said that the information of Mu Shi Tianxing is huge.

And Lan also told Zhao Min some things that Chen Mo should pay attention to in the most concise language.

Among them, there is only one that worries Zhao Min most.

Getting up from the seat, Zhao Min walked to Chen Mo's side, handed the information to Chen Mo, and opened the ear to his ear: "This opening ceremony, you have to pay special attention to a special link."

"What link?" Chen Mo's result information.

When he took this position, he was mentally prepared for trouble.

"The last special program link." Zhao Min pointed to the last part of the profile information and said: "This link, you have to be careful, they may give you a set."

After being told, Zhao Min returned to her seat, and she believed Chen Mo would have her own judgment.

Special challenges!

This is a session of every Star Festival.

The major forces on the rostrum will send representatives to the venue to conduct a few battle armor challenges to give the scene a warm atmosphere and at the same time send invitations to elite lives from all corners of the universe.

It can be regarded as a declaration to recruit talents from the rostrum.

Although it is an exhibition game, the major civilizations on the podium will naturally not be defeated because it is a form of strength.

There used to be eight god-level civilizations. This time Chen Mo joined, obviously there are many articles to do.

The theme song performance of Princess Arowana has ended, and other large-scale performances have begun, and the content of the performance is very rich.

Dance, music, technology, group performances, cultural connotations, armor, and abound, all highlight the progress of cosmic science and civilization, and countless universe life is immersed in it.

The opening ceremony was an audiovisual feast.

Almost all the life on the field is immersed in the huge live performance.

As time goes by, all scheduled programs are completed perfectly, whether it is the opening scene or the virtual reality network, the atmosphere has reached the hottest moment.

"Here are some field experts who invited us to enter this year's Star Festival."

After all the show performances are over, the host brings the topic back on track.

"The first entry is a team of famous quantum physics experts. Physics has always been a constant study of the universe. It reveals the truth of the universe and the most important field of the progress of cosmic civilization. As long as there is a big civilization, physics will always be the most important. One of the important disciplines.

This year's team of famous physicists, led by the universe's top physicist Anlan Nuo, brings together top physicists from the seven god-level civilizations and top physicists from the universe's major civilizations, a total of 10,000, they represent The most dazzling pearl at the top of the cosmic physics pyramid. "

A team of famous physicists enters the stadium. Everyone wears armor and hangs in the air. Everything is very orderly. On the large holographic projections on the scene, every one of them immediately appeared.

Many of them appear in the physics books of the current Universe Alliance.

In physics, this small group of people represents the highest level of contemporary cosmic physics.

Chen Mo looked at all this curiously, and sighed a little.

This is hundreds of times larger than the Olympic Games on Earth. In addition, the venue of network virtual reality can be said to be countless times larger. He is also amazed at this level of grand event.

Countless lives are reveling. This is an era of worship of technology and knowledge. This is also what civilization will never fall behind.

Chen Mo didn't know any of the famous expert teams he entered, but he had seen some news in the field of physics when he was watching the Universe News. Among the few famous experts, he had only seen it in the news.

"The second team is a team of famous mathematicians." The host's voice was excited: "Mathematics is a very attractive subject. A great man once said that given me time, space and mathematics, I can create the universe. Mathematical science is the universe. Language is also the most basic tool for the progress of civilization."

The second team played, cheers and applause were still hot.

The number of teams entering the opening ceremony was more than 100, which involved disciplines in various fields and even subdivided disciplines.

Among them, the field of university subjects held at Mustar, including quantum physics, mathematics, chemistry, antimatter, dark matter, life sciences, superenergy, cosmology, cosmic economics, etc., each group gathers top scientists in this field team.

Chen Mo saw a familiar figure in the famous team of life sciences, that is, he accidentally rescued Joel Nanro halfway along.

"The next entry is the team of General Star."

As soon as the host's words fell, the life in the VIP seat was turbulent.

Many of their lives came from representing their own civilized forces. Recruiting talents in the Star Festival is one of the purposes. Now that the universe is in chaos, even the dark forest civilization has suffered a coup d’état, making Xing naturally the hottest talent.

"The General Star team is composed of General Stars who have not joined any civilized forces. They are either students of major Star War Colleges, or geniuses cultivated by their families, or they may be life from the Armored Regiment.

The admitting team is just a handful of outstanding representatives of the star, and there are many unadmitted, the star elite contest of the star event. At that time, all registered freshmen will participate in the competition. There is a civilization that requires talent. Go to contact. "

The host talked eloquently and introduced the basic situation of the team.

Unlike other forums, which are top scientists, those who come to participate in the Star Star Contest will be starless contestants. They can join the forces of civilization that recruit them.

As for the top star game in the universe, it is impossible to appear, because every top star, their fighting style, does not like to expose the opponent to the star contest.

Moreover, the strength of the real forces where each top star is located is different, and the outcome of the actual battle cannot be determined at all.

Entering the star, the civilization and forces on the field, began to think about their own conditions and how to choose their own talents.

"The final admission is the team of Warframe Armored Masters, which is composed of top-level armored masters with no power in the universe. Each armored master is a god-level life, and its single person is powerful."

The single player of the armored master is powerful, and is a god-level life. Naturally, it is the sweet and sour meat of all civilizations and forces.

The entrance of the team set off a craze, and countless lives reveled.

But it quickly calmed down because there will be a special program next.

"The next is a special session that will take place in every Star Festival, and it is also the most exciting show."

As soon as the moderator's words fell, in the center of the meeting place, a pillar with a diameter of 200 meters rose slowly from the ground. For the life standing on the meeting place, the picture was extremely visually impacting.

"Several civilized representatives on the podium took the stage to accept the discussion of the top armored teachers and also issued a declaration to recruit talents."

chapters.title: Chapter 973: : Special Program
chapters.body:
Chapter 973: : Special Program

The final challenge show, the Star Festival will give the welfare of several great civilizations.

Several civilizations on the rostrum showed their faces and showed their strong strength, which attracted more talents' attention.

Except for the top part of the life that comes to the star festival, the vast majority of them are all elite geniuses of ordinary advanced civilizations.

No civilization can overestimate the desire for talent.

Many legendary talents will emerge in the star event at the beginning. Being able to be selected as an elite in all major civilizations and at the same time stand out in such a gathering of gatherings of elites is certainly an extraordinary elite among the elites.

Today, the universe is in chaos, and it is the era that talents most desire.

"Mr. Chen Mo, I am waiting for you on the platform, I look forward to it." Tong Qing said with a smile, his body was covered with black and black armor.

boom!

A detonation exploded on the rostrum, a wind blew, and then looked at the pupil Qing, which had already appeared on the platform in the center of the venue, slowly dropped, and stood at the most central position.

"Wow! Tong Qing, it was actually Tong Qing who played in person."

"my idol."

"It's so handsome, so strong, it's an understatement."

"You can see Tong Qing's battle, this time the trip to the Star Festival is also worth it."

"..."

Hitomi appeared in the middle of the stage and made a sensation.

Today's Tongqing, known as the strongest life in the universe, is also the speaker of the black pupil civilization, and has infinite charm.

At this special stage of the Star Festival, it would be the best sincerity for the god-level civilization to take the stage in person.

Shortly after Tong Qing came to the stage, Thunder's body in battle armor floated up, disappeared instantly on the battle armor regiment, and flew to the central stage quickly, landing in a handsome posture.

"Thunder, it is Thunder, and the king of the Thunder God dynasty also went up and went crazy."

"This is a strongman who singled out the former speaker of the Black Hitomi Council. If he fights Hitomi, it will be interesting."

"I don't know who strengthens them."

"Tuqing can defeat Dan, and the Thunder should be half a chip."

"..."

The conference aroused countless discussions, and the grudges of the Black Hittite Civilization and the Thor God Civilization in Shiganxing are no longer secrets in the universe.

Ming Qiyu didn't speak, put on the battle armor, flew away toward the central stage, and landed on the stage fiercely. Zi Yun just gave Chen Mo a glance, and the armor covered her face, slowly falling off.

"Mr. Chen Mo, don't listen to Tong Qing. I suggest you find your strongest subordinates. Otherwise, you might be in danger. For some of the top armored masters, I am not sure I can win." Shui Ling glanced at Tong Qing. , Said lightly.

"Thank you." Chen Mo smiled slightly, thanking Shuiling for his reminder.
