Afterwards, the water blue armor of Shui Ling was covered, leaping like a water elf, drawing a perfect blue arc in the air, falling down on the stage and standing firm, looking up at the venue of the star event, with a god-level civilization proud.

"Unfortunately, I'm not good at armor, otherwise I will go up." Hu Bingxin smiled at Chen Mo, turned his head to look at the Lion next to him: "Uncle Lion, you will go for me instead."

"Okay, ma'am."

Lion's armor covers the body, jumps from the rostrum, and the same arc as Shui Ling hits the stage. The faded armor is extremely relaxed on the face.

Six god-level civilizations came on stage, the dark forest civilization encountered a coup, and Dinan Miró left. In this grand event, the position of the dark forest civilization was replaced, and the attention of countless lives fell on the last Chen Mo.

"Her husband, be careful." Xiao Yu, who acted behind Chen Mo, realized that Chen Mo was going to play in person and reminded him.

"Will do."

Chen Mo's armor covered his face and jumped up.

boom!

The armor fell on the stage, Chen Mo stood on one knee, slowly stood up, the helmet opened, and looked around the venue.

Tens of millions of lives on the scene, as well as countless lives in the invisible virtual reality scene, the focus is on the central stage. As the only life on the field that is not a god-level civilization, Chen Mo has received much attention.

...

"He went up on his own."

In the position of the super VIP, Tuyun looked surprised.

I would have thought that Chen Mo would let Jing Ge go up, at least he felt that Jing Ge with a cold face was absolutely very strong.

But Chen Mo actually played in person, which is a little irrational.

In his view, this link will definitely be troubled. Once Chen Mo is defeated by the famous armored master on the stage, he will face the mockery and satire of the entire universe. If he is not determined, he may be completely destroyed.

...

On the podium, Hu Bingxin looked at Chen Mo in surprise.

After contact, she knew that Chen Mo was not stupid, and it was impossible to find that there was a suit set by Tong Qing, but Chen Mo did not hesitate to come off in person, making her very surprised.

The only explanation is that Chen Mo is confident that he can beat those famous Warriors.

But when she looked at Chen Mo, she didn't feel that Chen Mo was very powerful, but just starting from seeing Chen Mo, the man dared to talk face-to-face with Tong Qing and let her take a look.

...

Seeing Chen Mo coming up, Tong Qing couldn't help but glance at him deeply, and after a little thought, his face recovered indifferently.

Chen Mo did not hesitate to come up in person, indeed something unexpected to him.

To Chen Mo, his intuition is a terrifying opponent, not worse than Dan.

After Shi Ganxing met, he had this intuition, so he kept the intelligence department searching for Chen Mo's news to monitor his development, but he never found it.

Once again when he met Mu Shi Tianxing, he felt like an opponent, so he would pay so much attention to Chen Mo.

...

Concerned about Chen Mo's life, he was quite surprised by his personal appearance.

"Why does this life stand with the six civilizations? Is his power strong?" a life asked in the audience.

"He just had good luck in the Star Forest and appeared twice in evolution." The next life said disdainfully, with a tone of contempt: "He is not qualified to stand up, I am more qualified than him."

"Isn't his guard defeating a famous armored division?"

"That's his protection, not him, and Wan'an's strength should have moisture."

"It seems to be a wanted criminal of Ziwei civilization, and offended the Dark Forest civilization and Thor civilization."

"Can you offend so many people and sit on the podium?"

Half of the countless lives applauded while discussing the conspicuous Chen Mo on the field.

In their view, Chen Mo was simply not qualified to sit on the rostrum and appeared on the stage to come to seek abuse.

There have been no deaths in the special links of previous Star Events.

Because the top-level armored division of the god-level civilization will not kill the life with him, they are here to recruit talents. And the challenged life, if the strength is stronger than the representative of the god-level civilization, will also give face, not let the other party be too miserable, let alone kill.

But now it is different, Chen Mo does not have a strong force to do the backstage.

The special program of the Star Festival did not seem to say that the other party must not be killed. Once Chen Mo was killed, they only needed to make a mistake. Chen Mo had no strong backstage and could not retaliate against the other party.

...

"Several adults on the podium came down in person, this is a rare scene in history."

The host's excited voice resounded throughout the audience.

The special program, in the Star Festival, was initially an impromptu program.

But because of the battle between the famous armored divisions of the armor and the top armored divisions of the god-class civilization, countless armor divisions like it very much, so this impromptu program has been retained to this day and has become the traditional program of Mu Shi Tianxing.

More often, it is the representative of the god-level civilization on the podium, and the masters who follow it are sent out. It is very rare that today the leaders of the god-level civilization and the core high-level leaders come out.

"The rules for special programs are simple. The challenger chooses the adult you want to challenge. The system will randomly select two lucky winners from each challenger to challenge the adults you choose. The challenger begins to choose the challenge you want to challenge. Lord."

chapters.title: Chapter 974: : The Strength Of Hitomi
chapters.body:
Chapter 974: : The Strength Of Hitomi

This time the lineup is luxurious enough.

In the team of famous armored warriors, many armored divisions looked up and looked at the stage of the projection in the light curtain.

Hitomi, Thunder, Lion, Shui Ling are the long-known top armor divisions, Zi Yun is low-key, and the record is not known to the outside world, but the representative of the Ziwei civilization is definitely not bad. The core high level of civilization, the strength of the armor will not be weak.

In addition to Chen Mo's recent fame, the representatives of several other god-level civilizations are certainly not weak.

Many well-known players have already eagerly tried.

They are not god-level civilizations, and their resources and technology are not as strong as god-level civilizations. They must step through the limits step by step, and at the same time be lucky to awaken their ability to become top-level armor divisions.

The players on the field, except Chen Mo, are the top elites of the god-level civilization. They want to try out how far they are from the top elites of the god-level civilization.

All the armored divisions who signed up to participate in the armor competitions of the Stars Gala, a registration box popped up in the armor communication.

For a moment, after all the champions in the armor had confirmed the challenger, all the challengers were displayed on the light curtain.

Seventy thousand masters of battle armour, the most people choose to challenge Tong Qing, close to thirty thousand, almost all the top famous teachers who have been famous for a long time, all choose

Tongqing is hailed as the first life in the universe. On this cosmic platform, if it can defeat Tongqing, it will definitely shock the universe alliance. Even if it fails, it will not be laughed at.

Second is the Thunder.

The Thunder publicly challenged the former speaker of the Black Hitomi Council and won. He became famous in one battle. Naturally, he is regarded as the second most powerful life among the seven. More than 10,000 war division masters chose to challenge the Thunder.

The numbers of Shuiling, Shizhu, Ziyun and Ming Qiyu are about 7,000.

As a new face, Chen Mo's strength was not exposed, and the marching ant group was even less known. Only more than a thousand armor divisions chose to challenge, ten times less than Tong Qing.

The names of all challengers are beating randomly, and after a while, fourteen names appear on the light curtain.

Hu Disi, Yu Duoqing

Frost River, Hepburn vs Thunder

Fire punishment, ebony er

...

Lu Hua, Galahad vs Chen Mo

Fourteen armored teachers appeared on the stage from the team, cheering through the sky.

There are countless lives in the universe, and there are no warrior divisions that appear in layers. There is no fuel-efficient lamp. No one ranks in succession. Because the universe is too large, these warrior divisions have few chances to fight each other, and ranking is naturally difficult.

"How many of you, who will come first?" Tong Qing smiled and asked the thunder and lion around him.

"If the speaker has an idea, you can start." Thunder said lightly.

"Then I'll start with an opening example." Tong Qing stepped forward and looked at his opponent with a smile: "I'll make it a little more difficult. Let's two come together."

As soon as this remark came out, the scene was sensational.

One to two?

A little crazy idea.

It's like a boxer suddenly saying to two opponents that he can hit one or two. This is contempt for the opponent and will undoubtedly stimulate the opponent's ferocity.

"A bit irritating."

"Tongqing is too confident?"

"First person, see what is powerful."

Countless life expectation, all looked at the scene.

Hu Disi and Xu looked at each other, and they both saw the anger and fighting intention in each other's eyes. Tong Qing's words were undoubtedly contempt for their strength.

Any master armor division is an elite among the top armor divisions and has its own pride. They used to fight other senior armor divisions one-to-many, but now they are beaten one-to-many.

Hudith took a step forward, the armor covering his face, and Fu also took a step forward.

Since Hitomi proposed, they will not refuse, if they can join forces to defeat Hitomi, they will make the famous name universe, the proposal is proposed by Hitachi, defeating Hitomi is not too much to bully, and if Hitomi loses , Will increase arrogant infamy.

The trio's armor slowly floated, and the cheers on the field reached hysterical levels.

boom!

The sonic boom exploded and the two sides opened.

Hu Disi and Xu took the lead, and the cold weapon in his hand pointed directly at Tong Qing's heart, meaning no mercy.

Facing the two menacing famous teachers, the long sword in Tong Qing's hands excited a short-pulse laser, covering the black blade with a layer of ice blue glare, with a dangerous atmosphere.

One shot, one sword, came to the key of Tongqing.

On the occasion of a thousand hits, just listening to the sound burst, Tong Qing disappeared in place.

Hudith and Shaw followed, urging the armor.

This kind of top battle armor master battle scene is extremely rare, detonating the scene in one action, especially Tong Qing facing two war armor masters, easy to handle, so that countless lives are shocked.

Those who can stand here are the god-level life at the top of the pyramid, but Tong Qing's horror is beyond expectation.

All the masters looked dignified.

Tong Qing's combat moves are very simple, not gorgeous but very practical, and he is still in a hurry in the face of the two top famous teachers.

In the past, the name of Tong Qing's genius was more about his record and ability in his youth, and there were rumors in the black pupil civilization. The outside world knows little about Tong Qing's actual combat strength.

Now, the outside world finally sees the horror known as the first life of the universe.

On him, any difficult movements come hand in hand, it seems that it will not cause any burden to the body, just this one detail, then know how terrible the strength of Tong Qing's body.

Hu Disi was more and more frightened during the war. After he became famous, he faced a lot of masters, but he never encountered such a stressful life.

Tong Qing's momentum suppressed him like a storm, no matter how he moved, he could feel extremely dangerous.

This feeling is not good.

And the other party is still in the one-to-two situation.

He feels the same as he does, and there is a lock.

The brain of the god-level life is extremely developed, and the reaction speed reaches the extreme. This terrifying nerve and brain give them a very fast reaction force, which is why their top armored division can defeat the war robots.

The developed brain and body, so that they are different from ordinary life from the innate, destined to have stronger strength.

But Tongqing is faster than them.

His joint work with Hudith did not put any pressure on Tong Qing.

The emergence of this idea made the scalp a little numb.

Suddenly, the air around Tong Qing exploded, no longer converging momentum, and sonic booms spread throughout the venue, stirring waves of cheers. At this moment, the pupil was out of the sheath like a sword, and the sharp sharp edge spread out.

The excitement of the carnival resounded throughout the audience, and millions of lives in the audience, with the expression of excitement and madness, like devout believers.

"It's over."

Tong Qing raised the sword in his hand, the momentum was boiling like boiling water, rising up and down.

In the square, Tong Qing became the most dazzling center. The fighting intention on his body, like a lion out of the cage, roared unscrupulously in the sky above the star venue.

This raging momentum [Biqudao www.biqudao.info] shocked every audience.

Only when you are on site can you feel the excitement. Tong Qing's admirer, only felt a blaze burning in his heart, blood trembling in boiling.

"kill."

As soon as the words fell, Tong Qing's body disappeared in place, and the short pulse laser-wrapped sword seemed to tear the air, dragging a long tail over the sky star venue.

At this moment, the cheers of excitement on the field went wild.

chapters.title: Chapter 975: : It’S Your Turn
chapters.body:
Chapter 975: : It’S Your Turn

Hitomi landed steadily on the center of the stage, the sword in his hand was put away, and the armor showed his face.

Hudice and Jian were taken away by medical staff and were seriously injured, but there was no danger to life. The medical cabin will leave them intact within a few hours.

For Hitomi, this battle ended perfectly.

The carnival in the venue continued, and the fight that Tong Qing had just been too exciting and inspired too much blood in life.

Many lives looked at Tong Qing, with fanaticism in their eyes, like faith.

Thunder and Hu Bingxin and others on the field saw this scene and their expressions changed slightly.

They are not afraid of the strength of Tong Qing, but the momentum just now, so that countless life in the universe can see that the worship and admiration of the black pupil civilization is undoubtedly a higher level.

This is the heart of the people.

Just now, Tong Qing doesn't seem to be showing strength, it's more like gathering people's hearts.

If you make Tong Qing a belief in the life of the universe, the consequences will be terrible. In the future, which civilization Qing Qing wants to invade, there will not be much resistance.

And there will be countless top experts, who will choose to join the black pupil civilization.

"It's your turn."

Tong Qing showed Hexi's smile and finished talking to Thunder several people, walked to his place on the sidelines.

"I'll come." Thunder stepped forward and looked at his two opponents: "Let's go together."

As soon as this remark came out, uproar broke out again.

Hitomi is the first, and Thunder is not outrageous.

That particular program is even more interesting.

Thunder's two opponents, Shuanghe and Hepburn, are not very good. The failure of Hudice and Xu seems to make the other party think they are weak, which is an insult to them.

The armor floats, and the battle erupts instantly.

"He is stronger than when he battled Vivroun." Wei Di sighed on the special VIP stage.

Thunder grew faster than he thought.

They have seen the battle between Thunder and Vivroun. The current Thunder is more stable than it was at that time, with a little shadow of Dan in it.

"It is certainly not ordinary life to be able to take over the life of the Thor Kingdom." Emperor Yu nodded.

"Thunder is still a bit worse than Tongqing, and Tongqing is too strong." Emperor Wu's eyes instead focused on Tongqing. Just now Tongqing was creating momentum for himself, and he did not show real strength. This man was unpredictable.

"It's useless to have a single player's strength. In a legionary war, the role of personal strength is limited. If he is strong, he can withstand the anti-matter bomb? The universe fights for the overall strength of the legionary soldiers, weapon technology, and strategic layout. Emperor Wei laughed.

"We should pay attention to Chen Mo, this kind of person, Tong Qing is very concerned about him, it should not be simple." Emperor Yu's eyes fell on Chen Mo.

...

Tuyun shook his head.

Without a real hands-on, how strong the opponent's strength is can not be easily concluded.

At least in terms of Thunder's movement and fighting style, even in his prime, Tu Yun, who has been famous for a long time, has no certainty.

Every action of Thunder is accompanied by thunderous sounds, and the fighting style of wide open and wide open makes the eyes of countless armor divisions shine. Powerful, decisive, and upright fighting style is the most orthodox style of Thor's civilization.

Fifteen minutes later, the battle ended.

The Thunder once again showed his strength in defeating the former speaker of Black Hitomi Civilization. The moment he fell on the court, the audience fell into revelry.

This special program is the most exciting one they have ever seen.

Thunder put away the hammer and landed on the stage. This event, he will not show weakness, at least it will not make people feel that the Thor civilization is much worse than the black pupil civilization.

"It's your turn."

Thunder returned to the center and glanced at Shuanghe and Hepburn who were rescued by the doctor and left the venue.

"I'm coming." Lions stood up and took off slowly.

The armor's engine disturbs the air and makes a dull sound in the air.

Lions looked down at the two opponents on the stage and pointed towards them, the meaning is self-evident.

One to two again?

The venue was uproar again.

Hitomi took a head, this posture, the seven players on the field must be one-on-two? After all, God-level civilization will not admit that it is weaker than anyone.

The opening ceremony of this star event seems to be much more exciting than the previous one.

"court death."

Xu Shuang and Chang Deli were irritated. Like the first four, why have they suffered such contempt?

The two shot at the same time, the momentum was not weak, two detonations in the air exploded at the same time, and a single step disappeared in place. The two goals are the same, both are lions.

Facing the two menacing men, the lion was not afraid. The spear in his hand was activated by a short pulse, covered by the blue light, the tip of the gun was scratched, and the dragging shadow dragged in the air was full of freehand, pointing directly at the scowling. double.

Seeing Lion's calm movements, Sheshuang and Chang Deli were stimulated, and suddenly accelerated, the air was like a blown-out flower, and their figures appeared on both sides of Lion's body. There was a small sonic boom in the long sword, which turned into a slight ripple, swayed in the air, and turned towards the lion.

"Good job."

The lion whispered, the air appeared quiet momentarily, exploded violently, and was able to escape.

The brilliant level of the battle on the field was not lost in the two games. In the face of the double attack of Chang Shuang and Chang Deli, Shi Yan calmly took it easy. In terms of overall strength, the strength of Xu Shuang and Chang Deli did not lose the four famous teachers who just played.

"Humph!"

Xu Shuang stayed in the air, sniffing softly, his body slowly pulling up, and the armor changed rapidly as his body changed. Under the armor, there is a beast-faced human form with red eyes.

Maniac form.

The muscle lines of the body have become extremely perfect, with the texture appearing, delicate and complicated.

Chang Deli was not outdone. The humanoid body and muscles exploded, and the armor also entered the second form as his body changed.

Both use their abilities.

Suddenly, the air around Shiyun stirred up a mist of water. The air rioted, disappeared in an instant, and appeared in the sky thousands of kilometers away.

At the next moment, Lion's body also changed.

The body is elevated, regular textures appear on the skin, the lion-faced half-beast form, the speed and power are more terrifying than before, and it is still at ease at supersonic speeds.

Seeing this kind of scene, the armored division was all awe-inspiring.

The abilities of the White Star civilization are uncertain, and each master's ability is different, because their ability is inherited, and they are not directional mutation. The combination of humanoid and orcish and orcish variants achieves the particularity of the white star.

Countless top civilizations want to evolve into god-level races through inter-ethnic combination. Unfortunately, they all failed. This is also unique to the White Star family.

Shi Yan's eyes were fierce in battle.

The air around the body responded, constantly being stirred up by water vapor, and the buzzing sound seemed excited.

Opposite the attack of Xu Shuang and Chang Deli, the short pulse of the spear became brighter, and the short blue pulse twisted the surrounding air.

Hiss~~

The sound of tearing a piece of paper through a long knife.

The armor of the armor was picked up by the point of the gun, and the reactor was destroyed, revealing amazing blood marks.

Defeated!

Short-term defeated, Chang Deli alone, did not hold on for five minutes in Lion's hands, and was eventually picked down.

"It's your turn." Lion said with his spear away and said lightly.

chapters.title: Chapter 976: : Chen Mo Comes On Stage
chapters.body:
Chapter 976: : Chen Mo Comes On Stage

Zi Yun took a step forward. As one of the two female life representatives on the field, her appearance was also a big topic.

In front Hitomi, Thunder and Lions have won one-on-two, and her appearance has become a great anticipation.

"Come on together." Zi Yun's cold face remained undiminished. On her face, she couldn't see a trace of mood swings, as if telling a trivial matter.

Hearing these few words, her two opponents looked bad.

After all, it was their turn. I didn't expect Ziyun to be one-on-two.

The battle is going on. Unlike the strong and strong of the top three, Ziyun's fighting style is very stable. There are no gorgeous moves, but there are killings everywhere.

"Wait a minute, you'd better not one-on-two. Maybe Qing Qing wanted to cheat you. Don't try to be brave." Shui Ling reminded Chen Mo in a low voice.

"Thank you." Chen Mo looked up at Zi Yun's battle.

Shui Ling did not know whether Chen Mo listened in or continued to persuade her. She believed that Chen Mo would have her own judgment and she could not intervene. She did everything she had to do.

"How is she better than you?" Chen Mo asked curiously.

"She is very strong, this lady Lagerstroemia can't see through." Shui Ling said unabashedly.

This woman really can't see through, and always looks cold. It seems that any major event can't excite her waves, and never show how strong and quiet she is.

Chen Mo nodded his head and agreed with Shui Ling's idea.

This female Lagerstroemia, who lived in an invincible way of old age, seemed to be an old monk who had escaped into the empty gate. He didn't care much about anything, but once he cared, it was very sharp, such as the White Star at Mu Family's Star Banquet The civilized Mrs. Fox squabble, that is very exciting.

It can be used as the core high-level of the old god-level civilization such as Ziwei civilization, which is definitely not a fuel-efficient lamp.

Soon, Zi Yun confirmed their thoughts with real cases.

The two famous armored divisions fell from high altitude and fell heavily on the floor of the venue.

The battle is over.

There was an uproar on the field, screams and cheers, resounding through the sky.

"It seems that Ziwei civilization has a good seedling."

Outside the star venue, a figure wearing a black cloak stopped and looked up at the live broadcast video. His dark purple eyes were interested in Ziyun's body.

Listening to the cheers of life around him, the cloak man smiled faintly and went to the tavern in the distance.

After landing on the stage, the Ziyun models walked back to their own positions, from beginning to end, they were all a cold look, which made people unable to see through.

"I'm coming." Ming Qiyu took a step forward.

"Really think of us as soft bugs?"

Long Tai's voice was annoyed. The four god-level civilizations singled out their armored masters. If the whole army was wiped out, then the reputation of these armored masters would fall to the bottom.

"You are responsible for the side, and I and him are frontal."

"Okay." Lu Luo said next to Longtai.

The loss of the first four divisions in the first division made them feel ashamed. The same is a group of famous armored divisions. If the name is not correct, it will be laughed at by countless lives in the universe.

"Then start."

Long Tai screamed angrily, the muscles and blood vessels of his body exploded, and he wound like a root on his body. On his skin, there was still a slight heat, and his mouth was long, and he turned into a grim wolf head, and he was addicted to his eyes. blood.

Covered by the armor, [Biquge www.biqugex.biz] A pair of iron claws are fixed on the armor of the armor, and the blue light on the iron claws makes people shudder.

"drink!"

Long Tai shouted, and the armor was fired like a cannonball, stirring a ring of water mist on the spot.

"Good to come."

Ming Qiyu shouted, and the body under the armor quickly turned gray and spread to every inch of skin. His armor paintings also changed to gray and white as he changed.

The corpse of the corpse is similar to the madness of the dark forest civilization, which can greatly increase the strength and reaction speed of the body.

There was a war in the sky.

Lu Luo was outside the battle and did not participate.

In the match between the two, it is obvious that Ming Qiyu has a slight upper hand, but Longtai will not lose at once, so Lu Luo needs a suitable opportunity to chaos the rhythm of Ming Qiyu from the flanks.

The sonic boom echoed in the venue. Lu Luo flew away on the edge.

Suddenly, Lu Luo stepped in, only to hear the air around him explode, and the green armor disappeared. When reappearing, Luluo was behind the Qi Qiyu with a short sword, which was passing towards his back.

The sudden change disrupted the rhythm of Ming Qiyu. At this moment, Ming Qiyu's expression changed greatly.

Tear...

Ming Qiyu turned his head back, and a sword cut Lu Luo's arm down, even with the armor, the incision was very flat, and the sound of the metal being torn was particularly harsh. Before he was happy, there was a pain in his chest.

Long Tai's claws pierced from the back through the chest.

The off-white liquid fell on the tip of the claw, it was his blood.

Lost.

Seven Qi Yu planted from the sky.

The doctors waiting outside the court immediately showed up in the medical cabin, and sent injured Qi Qiyu and Lu Luo to the medical cabin for treatment.

Divine civilization lost.

This time, unlimited cheers came out on the field, seeming to be carnival and excited. After five games, the Netherworld civilization became the first deity-level civilization, under the eyes of the entire universe.

"It's your turn," Longtai said coldly.

Shui Ling took a step and looked at his two opponents, Huo Pu and Wu Mu Er.

The fire punishment had red hair like fire, a nose ring on his nose, and eyes as big as a bell. The skin of ebony is dry like snake skin, wrinkled like a dry tree, like a dead body that has been sleeping for thousands of years, wearing a brown dress, but his eyes are bright and bright.

"Who will come first?" Shui Ling said.

The fire punishment and Wu Mu Er who just wanted to enter together were stunned, and almost suspected that they had misheard.

Shui Ling did not choose to let them go together, but chose to let them come up one by one.

As soon as these words came out, there was a commotion in the venue, followed by boos.

In addition to the dark forest civilization that was not present, the representatives of the other five god-level civilizations all chose one-to-two. Even if the seven Qiyu were not strong enough, they still cling to the scalp.

Shui Ling chose one-on-one.

Disappointed countless audiences.

Boiling the audience, Shui Ling was deaf, and looked directly at the fire penalty and Wu Mu Er, waiting for their choice. They are endless and never look at other people's faces and act. They only insist on what they think is right. What others do and how they are in the limelight has nothing to do with them.

"I'll come first." Huo punishes an anxious temper, and stands the first.

The two flew high into the venue, and fighting broke out.

There is not much suspense in the two battles. Even if the fire punishment and ebony are long-time famous masters, facing the water ling's ability to fight against the prophet, he has no effect.

In less than ten minutes, both failed.

There was only the last group left in the field who did not play. Chen Mo played against Lu Hua and Galahad.

When Seven Feathers failed, Shui Ling chose one-on-one, and for Chen Mo, who had just become famous in Mu Shi Tianxing, the audience did not have much hope.

All eyes are on Chen Mo.

Chen Mo appeared too abruptly. The ordinary audience's perception of Chen Mo was limited to the two big movements in the Star Forest. In addition, it was a wanted criminal of Ziwei civilization.

Except that Tu Yun and others have seen Chen Mo's shot in the Shigan Galaxy, no life has seen Chen Mo's shot, nor do they know his true force.

However, Chen Mo's guards can pick down the top armored divisions, and the audience expects Chen Mo's strength to sit on the podium.

With hundreds of millions of eyes, Chen Mo took a step forward.

He found that Tong Qing was interested in looking at him, and there was some expectation in Thunder's eyes. Except for Shui Ling's brow slightly, the others were indifferent, waiting for him to do what he did.

Crossing with Tong Qing's gaze, Chen Mo turned his head to look at Lu Hua and Galahad, hooking his fingers towards both.

"Let's go together."

chapters.title: Chapter 977: : He Is Like A God
chapters.body:
Chapter 977: : He Is Like A God

Chen Mo's words caused a commotion in the venue.

"This guy doesn't think he made a little noise in the Star Forest, so he thought the universe was the first?"

"I think he looked at the first couple of dozens and it was too easy. I thought he could do it."

"Sitting on the podium, you think you are awesome?"

"He floated."

"..."

On the audience's stage, ridicule came one after another.

Chen Mo's choice was unexpected.

After the defeat of Ming Qiyu, a corpse civilization, Shui Ling chose one-on-one. I thought Chen Mo would choose one-on-one as Shui Ling. Because Shui Ling is one-on-one, so is the god-level civilization, and the original rule is one-on-one, Chen Mo one-on-one, and will not feel shameful.

But he still chose one-on-two.

Tong Qing was a little surprised and gave Chen Mo a deep look.

Other lives watched this scene with great interest, looking forward to the next.

"Too impulsive." Tuyun frowned, sighing slightly.

In his view, Chen Mo's choice was not a wise move.

He has seen Chen Mo do it and is a top-level armored division, but in the face of two famous armored divisions, in his opinion, it is still a lot worse. Failure here, the pressure to face, but infinite, it may be destroyed.

The contest between top boxers is still famous, one-on-two, the difficulty is beyond imagination, but also Tong Qing's armored divisions who are very confident in their own strength, dare to make this choice.

...

Lu Hua and Galahad looked at each other and stepped forward.

After seeing the previous games, they were mentally prepared and not so angry. The only thing that could get rid of their dissatisfaction was naturally the ugly point that made Chen Mo lose.

Unlike the six god-level civilizations, Chen Mo has not heard of any powerful forces behind his support for the time being. Even if he offends, he is not afraid. He only needs to join the other six god-level civilizations.

"How about we have an air football?" Lu Hua sneered.

"This is a good idea." Galahad's snake-like tongue licked in the corner of his mouth, revealing a cruel smile: "Let him see the beating from the cosmic society."

"Hey, hey..." Lu Hua's laughter was a little murky.

Galahad's body was slightly arched, and his body contracted quickly. On his body, a long snake-like texture emerged from the skin and slowly swam away until it spread all over the body. The pupil of the eye became a snake eye, and the diamond-shaped pupil was mixed with cruel. look.

Lu Hua's eyes changed, and a **** cross that traversed the pupil appeared in his eyes. There was a little black spot in the middle of the cross, which was very strange and gave a very dangerous feeling.

【Snake Body】

【Cross Eye】

The two shot at the same time, the fighting intention was awe-inspiring.

Galahad's body technique is beyond imagination. The soft body can dodge attacks in an incredible way. It is soft and boneless. It is like seaweed in battle. Close combat gives people a sense of extreme danger.

Lu Hua's fighting style is calm and gentle, and the eyes with **** crosses seem to be able to see through all the attacks.

The two shots made the venue immediately climax.

...

"Queen, will the King of God have any problems?" Ku Yao asked worriedly.

He tried the strength of the Warrior Master. Wan'an was absolutely not weak at the time. It was only that the other party underestimated the enemy, plus his extraordinary play, it appeared that he seemed to easily defeat the other party.

That kind of powerful armored division, the two combined, the combat effectiveness is inestimable. He looked at Chen Mo on the field and squeezed a sweat secretly.

"I don't know, he should know." Xiaoyu shook his head and said worriedly.

In the face of two top-level warriors, even if she believed Chen Mo, she had no idea.

"Mo Ge will be fine," Mo Nu said lightly.

"Jing Ge, can he handle it?"

Zhao Min asked Jing Ge in the seat next to him.

On the earth, Chen Mo’s combat training has always been in training with Jing Ge. To understand Chen Mo’s combat power, he is definitely better than anyone.

Chen Mo seems to be a researcher, but also has a mysterious enthusiasm for combat.

From the time he was on earth, his personal strength was not weak. Later, he was arrested and went to the origin city. He also trained day and night in order to escape. Later, he went to meet Jing Ge in the small universe. Then it was the event of Shi Ganxing. These years The idle time of research is all in training with Jing Ge.

After such a long time, although Chen Mo does not often appear in front of others, his strength is definitely not weak.

It's just that Zhao Min couldn't be sure if he could deal with two famous Warriors.

"He couldn't cope with it before, but I don't know now. It depends on the situation." Jing Ge said coldly.

"why?"

"His body has changed." Jing Ge said.

Xiao Yu and others did not tell him about Chen Mo's body's transformation of'quantum life', but Jing Ge was able to detect it himself, which surprised Zhao Min.

What's so special about quantum life, Chen Mo and Mo Nu didn't talk to them.

However, Mo Nu’s ability to raise her hand through tens of billions of light years showed them that quantum life is absolutely terrible.

Chen Mo has long been out of the scope of ordinary life.

...

"Galahad and Luhua are the most capable as soon as they come up, and they show no mercy, which is very interesting."

"Who said you can win?"

"Isn't this nonsense? Galahad and Lu Hua, long-time famous armored masters, still have to guess a lonely boy."

In the tavern, the three lives are drinking while paying attention to the situation in the venue.

The battle of holographic projection makes people watch the blood boiling. The current pub, when it is comparable to the Air Football Universe Cup, is extremely hot, and life has opened the market to bet.

Beside the three lives, the black cloak people heard their conversation and couldn't help smiling lightly.

"What are you laughing at? Do you think that kid can win?" A fiery-skinned life glared at the cloak man, very unhappy.

The two partners next to him looked at the cloak provocatively.

"Did you stop seeing people like this?" Another life provoked: "If you think that kid can win, dare you gamble?"

"What bet?"

The cloak man raised his head and faced the three lives with a straight face, showing a smile.

Seeing clearly the appearance of the cloak man in front of him, three lives froze, panic slowly appeared on his face, and his hands and feet were shaking.

They recognized this face.

...

Chen Mo in the high altitude, in the attack of the two, was relatively uncomfortable from the beginning, and now has a degree of progress.

The strength of the two is not weak, and the pressure they put together is similar to that of Jing Ge, but there are still some differences. Jing Ge’s strong offensive style is like a storm, and the two are like a viper and one is waiting for opportunity. Fox, the trick is fierce, and if you are not careful, you will win.

Consciousness penetrated into every cell of the body, and the skin on his body showed a faint blue fluorescence.

Without being able to appreciate this peculiar change in detail, Chen Mo kept a close eye on Lu Hua and Galahad.

His eyes changed, and the black and white of the pupils melted into a phantom dark blue like the skin of the body. In the middle of the pupils, two small glowing particles swirled and entangled irregularly.

From the perspective of God, Chen Mo can see the trajectory of each other's attacks. He can even see the excited look of the audience in the audience, a feeling of omnipotence in controlling the life of the universe.

An overwhelming sense of life emerged spontaneously.

This should be what Mo Nu said.

There is no desire, no sorrow and joy, and the state of mind is like a windless water for hundreds of millions of years. Looking at Lu Hua and Galahad's eyes, it is like judging two ants.

Very special feeling.

Originally from the letter-filled Luhua and Galahad, his expression changed slightly.

They now feel that Chen Mo is like air, the breath disappears completely, as if there is no such space, in their eyes, Chen Mo becomes more and more dangerous.

"Don't keep it, try your best." Lu Huaning said solemnly.

"Okay." Galahad realized something was wrong.

...

Tong Qing stared at Chen Mo in the air, without looking away for a moment.

Even with the armor in between, he determined that the faint blue light was a change in Chen Mo's ability. Such a Chen Mo gives him a feeling of being out of control, which is very dangerous.

He is guessing what Chen Mo is capable of.

This man made him feel different from the beginning.

Very confident, always wrapped in mystery.

The little fisherman stared at Chen Mo happily, looking surprised. Her superstate is activated, and she can see that Chen Mo's consciousness is scattered in every corner of the venue, like countless shadow avatars, she is definitely not dazzling.

Moreover, Chen Mo's consciousness is entangled like an irregular quantum.

She didn't know what this was, but she could feel that Chen Mo's body might have changed because of his ability.

Because Mo Nu also has some abilities beyond imagination.

"What did you see?" Zhao Min asked softly.

Xiao Yu's delicate face moved slightly and smiled lightly: "He is like a god."

Zhao Min was even more curious. As soon as he wanted to continue speaking, Xiaoyu reached out and touched her temple. The consciousness was connected. The world in Xiaoyu's eyes was clearly displayed in front of Zhao Min.

...

Over the venue, the challenge entered a fierce stage, the three battled in one place, and the speed was extremely fast.

In a blink of an eye, there are more than a dozen rounds.

Lu Hua and Galahad tried their best, but the sense of danger made them chill.

Chen Mo is like a ghost. He can't hit it. With every attack, Chen Mo can avoid it without any haste. Even if Lu Hua's eyes can see through his movements, he still can't touch it.

They don't feel the existence of Chen Mo's breath, and they seem to be everywhere. As long as the other party is willing, they can kill them at any time.

In the auditorium, the discussion became more and more intense, from the initial incompatibility, to the now very calm, this change of Chen Mo calmed them all down.

They knew that Chen Mo was a god-level life, but they didn't know what his ability was.

Suddenly, the expressions of Lu Hua and Galahad changed suddenly, and Chen Mo like a pool of water finally appeared.

chapters.title: Chapter 978: : Interview
chapters.body:
Chapter 978: : Interview

Chen Mo disappeared.

Disappeared in the venue, disappeared in the radar detection display.

Wow!

There was an uproar in the audience.

Teleport?

Or other abilities?

Countless attention to Chen Mo’s eyes, and speculations about Chen Mo’s ability came to mind. But the instantaneous movement should also appear, shouldn't it disappear completely?

Or did Chen Mo use his ability to escape from the venue?

That would be too funny.

There are many opinions.

But every audience stared at the venue, holding a noisy meeting place of ten thousand life levels, and there was a short silence.

This kind of picture appears in the virtual reality venue and the live broadcast venues of the major platforms of the universe.

The outside world is watching the bustling, but Lu Hua and Galahad in the center of the field are not so relaxed. Despite the noise of the venue, they are terribly quiet in the armor.

Can't see the enemy, but feel that the opponent is everywhere.

It is like strangling the throat with a rope, and the rope is constantly tightening, taking their lives at any time.

Cold sweat is flowing, and the weapons in their hands are unconsciously tight.

The opponent is an assassin war armor division?

There was a speculation in Lu Hua’s mind that the ability to hide the body shape was the most classic ability of the Warframe Division at the moment, but more often, the other party’s hiding was either quantum radar or optical radar, whichever was the better. .

He encountered it for the first time while disappearing in both radars.

The other party left the detection range of the radar?

Lu Hua doesn't think so.

He could clearly feel that Chen Mo was still in the meeting place, and that kind of threat was always there, and it was very clear. Fine sweat oozed out of the skin, the chest was undulating, and Lu Hua could even hear his subtle breathing and heartbeat.

Suddenly, Lu Hua's expression changed suddenly.

A sense of danger pinched his throat by death, enveloped his body, and the biting cold from his tail vertebrae ran straight into the brain. He wanted to escape from the same place, but found himself like a drowning swimmer. Even if he struggled, he could not break free.

Severe pain struck his chest and penetrated his body.

When his gaze returned to focus, Chen Mo's figure didn't know when he was standing in front of him.

The spear penetrated his heart and nailed him in the air.

The opponent did not attack from behind, but chose to be positive.

He has always put his focus on the back, because after the assassin war armor division, after hiding, according to inertial thinking, the metropolis chooses to sneak attack from the weakest defense, which is a required course for the assassin war armor division.

But Chen Mo didn't play cards according to the routine.

The cross-eye he was most proud of, but he could not see the enemy who appeared in front of him.

He lost.

Wow!

When Lu Hua fell from a height, the scene erupted instantly, and countless lives stood up and looked at Chen Mo with shock.

They determined that they did not see how Chen Mo appeared.

Just like a ghost, she appeared in front of Lu Hua out of thin air.

Lu Hua lost.

On the field, only Chen Mo and Galahad remained.

Seeing Chen Mo addressing Lu Hua lightly, there wasn't even room for resistance, and Galahad's pupils shrank.

They didn’t underestimate their opponents, they tried their best at the beginning, just to make Chen Mo lose his face in front of the universe life, but their full strength was like playing on a soft cloud of clouds, and hidden in the cloud of clouds. There are thousands of iron nails.

Lu Hua's strength is a little stronger than him. Now that Lu Hua is defeated, Galahad's heart has formed a huge pressure, which makes him sweat.

When he was ready to take the initiative and take the initiative, the atmosphere around Chen Mo exploded and his body disappeared.

...

The pupils on the stage squinted, and the black pupils showed subtle changes, which lighted up indefinitely.

Just now he could not understand how the other party appeared.

Tong Qing's expression gradually dignified.

Now, he confirmed the idea in his heart, Chen Mo gave him a very special feeling. This feeling is even stronger than what Dan gave him.

After pupil Qingping calmed his emotions, he said: "Play back the previous video."

"Okay, sir."

Warframe's artificial intelligence promised that the holographic video frequency that Chen Mo had just disappeared was tuned out.

Hitomi stared at the replay of the battle.

When seeing the moment when Chen Mo appeared, Tong Qing's body shook slightly. Chen Mo did not fly in an instant, but the body emerged from the virtual to the real like a ghost.

What a terrible ability, what a special ability.

This is an ability he has never seen before.

I am afraid this Chen Mo is really not that simple.

Tong Qing smelled something unusual.

Just now he also turned on the armor's radar. His armor can be said to integrate the world's most advanced technology, and he could not detect Chen Mo's position.

It's not just him, Thunder and Lions, etc., whose faces have also changed from what they were just now.

If Chen Mo's personal strength was considered weak at the beginning, they have already changed.

They all know that this ability is terrible, even if they face it, they must be careful, otherwise it will be easy to win.

Both the special VIP seats and the rostrum were dead, in stark contrast to the ordinary auditorium that was screaming, but it was Xiao Yu and Zhao Min on the rostrum who all smiled at the moment.

...

"This is interesting."

Inside the tavern, the black [Biquge www.sbiquge.co] cloak people gazed at Chen Mo on the holographic projection, slowly tasting the alcoholic beverage in the glass.

Next to him, the three armored divisions who just talked to him just now behaved like docile kittens.

They were once murderers who were not afraid of the sky, but they did not dare to move at this time, their bodies were shaking, they did not dare to speak, they did not dare to leave, fearing that the killing **** next to them would kill them directly.

The battle picture is wonderful, but they have no intention of enjoying it.

"I said he won?" The black cloak had purple eyes and narrowed his eyes at the three armored divisions beside his eyes.

"Yes, you are right." The heads of the three armored divisions were nodded like woodpeckers.

"Since I won, is there any reward?"

"Whatever you say, we will give you what you want." The three armored divisions were crying with grief, and dared not have any thoughts of resistance.

"Something terrible?"

The three armored divisions almost didn't cry. They stood daring not to move and dare not answer.

"Then this wine, you invite me?"

"Xing Xing Xing..." The three of them feared to say late and were nodding desperately.

The man in the black cloak chuckled and drank the wine from the glass.

"Remember to checkout."

Until the black cloak men disappeared in the tavern, the three armored divisions sat paralyzed in position, ignoring the fact that the opening battle was being intensively discussed next to them, and immersed in the fear brought about by that life just now.

"It's dangerous, I didn't expect him to appear here."

"Those eyes, just a glance, I feel the blood coagulating all over the body." The next armor division recalled the feeling just now and shivered.

"Don't spread what happened to him, or we will suffer."

The third armored division had a sense of the rest of his life after being robbed. He was just glanced at that life just now, like half a foot stepping into a ghost gate.

It used to be a legend, but he didn't want him to be so scary.

At this moment, just listening to the tavern, the exclamation sounded.

Shit!

Like the sound of a sharp blade cutting into a piece of paper, the long spear in Chen Mo's hand penetrated Galahad's body and was just picked in the air.

The light of the armor goes out.

Retracting the spear, let Galahad's body fall down, Chen Mo was standing empty, looking down at the direction of Pu Qing, the two were separated by half-air, and their eyes hit one place.

chapters.title: Chapter 979: : Life Science Forum
chapters.body:
Chapter 979: : Life Science Forum

In front is a huge planet with clear words engraved on the surface.

Star sign.

A spacecraft slowly sailed into the area of the Star Monument.

Inside the spaceship, there is a whole body of gray-red life, the head of the animal, the eyes are gray, and the explosive muscles on the body are particularly conspicuous.

"Identity verification, the spaceship is safe and accessible."

The broadcast received a reply from the Space Channel Administration of the Star Monument and the spacecraft's engine started and disappeared into space.

It reappeared on the periphery of the Mushi sky galaxy. Once again the permission of the Mushi sky galaxy was obtained, and the spacecraft disappeared and appeared over the Mushi sky star.

The grey-red life took the lead, left the spaceship in a war armor, and flew down towards the Mu star.

"Master, Lord Ming Yan is here." A man said in the ear of Ming Qiyu.

At this time, Ming Qiyu looked extremely bad.

He is the only lost life in that special part of the opening ceremony, which is now the laughing stock of the whole universe, and it is also disgraceful to the corpse civilization, which he cannot bear.

But unhappy, unhappy, his task will continue.

As a life of corpse civilization, it is absolutely no stranger to mingyan.

In order to catch Chen Mo, the patriarch actually sent Ming Yan and a group of elite masters, showing how much importance the patriarch paid to Chen Mo.

The door opened, and the gray-red life led the twenty armored divisions to enter.

"Seven Feathers." Ming Yan's big voice began to salute Qiming Qiyu.

"Well, coming from afar, it's hard work." Ming Qiyu nodded slightly.

"Where is the mission target, now?" Ming Yan said.

"Don't worry, make a plan first." Ming Qiyu understands Ming Yan's character, his impatience and bravery, which is his fatal weakness, so even if he is strong, it is only a strong personal force. Can not enter the ranks of the core high-level civilization.

"A nameless boy, what's a good plan?" Ming Yan said disdainfully.

"There are masters around him, and he himself is not weak. If they are found to flee, we will not catch him. The mission failed. Do you and the patriarch explain?" Ming Qiyu said seriously.

Ming Yan's impulsive personality is difficult to control, and Ming Qiyu had to move out of the patriarch.

"As you like." Xing Yan's eyes flashed disdainfully.

...

"Teacher, do you really want to make it public? This research is enough to affect the changes in the age of the universe and has infinite value." A student with big eyes looked at the old life in front of him with concern.

Loinu, one of the top supernaturalists in the universe.

In front of him, is a research material, suspended by various genetic data.

Erlie looked nervous, but he knew the importance of this mastery of Loinu. This was the hard work of his life.

"There is nothing wrong, Mu Shitian can disclose his life-long research, why can't I? The same is for the progress of the universe's life and civilization." Loinu said: "And this information is a hot stone, we do not disclose, Once leaked in the future, we will all suffer."

"You can choose to hand it over to a god-level civilization in exchange for what you need." Er Xuan said.

"What's the change? Money? We don't lack a name? I also have. Right? I don't like it." Loinu said solemnly: "I decided, so I don't have to persuade me."

"Okay." Er Xuan sighed, respecting his teacher's decision.

...

"We have placed the solicitation information on the official website of the event. As a member of the rostrum, our announcement of soliciting talents is together with the other six god-level civilizations. At present, there are a lot of views, but there are not many elites who choose to join. Many lives do not understand our situation."

Zhao Min explained the situation briefly.

After the opening ceremony came to an end, Chen Mo became a well-known figure in the universe, but the outside world knew little about their marching ant groups.

"Naturally," Chen Mo said.

The expansion of the march ant group does indeed urgently require talent, but there is no urgent need to be particularly hungry.

They have their own set of talent training systems. All kinds of technologies are not lacking, so recruiting talents is just the icing on the cake. As an emerging force, all of them are flourishing without the burden of the old forces.

"Go to the forum first." Chen Mo looked at the time and said.

"Which forum to go to?"

"life sciences."

...

Life science is one of the main forums for the Star Festival.

Since the birth of life civilization, the life science discipline has been the main subject of major civilization research. This discipline has greatly extended the lifespan of major civilizations, made them smarter, and solved most of the problems of illness and pain.

It can be said that without life sciences, there would be no current great exchanges of cosmic civilization.

As the main forum, there are two main topics in the Life Science Forum:

"In what form is life higher than god-level life? 》

"What is the deep reason why the supernatural power of the god-level life body? 》

This is by far the last two black clouds in the life sciences. As long as the two black clouds are solved in life, the final foundation of cosmic life science will be established.

Immediately, the life science community can guide the life body to evolve in this direction.

In the life sciences scene, Chen Mo, with the chairman's card, successfully entered the forum site and sat down in the VIP area in the front row.

Seeing Chen Mo in the surrounding life, there was a lot of discussion, but he did not do anything too compelling. Entering the venue were all scholars of the universe who were devoted to the study of life sciences. They were not very cold to Chen Mo and those in power and had little relationship with themselves.

"Tui Qing is also present."

Zhao Min looked at the other direction of the VIP area. Tong Qing and his team sat there, very conspicuous.

Chen Mo glanced in that direction, and Tong Qing also looked over. The two stared at each other, nodding slightly, and staggered their eyes. The two did not intend to communicate, they just wanted to listen to the forum quietly.

"According to the research data of our team, we made a bold conjecture that there is a higher level of life beyond the God-level life, and this life exists in the form of energy.

Energy life can control one's own body shape at will, even without physical form, but with self-consciousness, we can't see and touch it. They can exist in any corner of the universe, master the relationship between space, time, matter, energy, and gravity, and they are quite in charge of the gods of the universe.

We know that particles change strangely at the speed of light and at the speed of light.

Studies have shown that the nerve conduction speed of god-level life is quite sub-light speed, and the reaction ability is fast, this kind of nervous system with almost no synapse. It is one step further, the speed of life's thinking reaches the speed of light. At that time, there may be more peculiar changes in life. But the particles can reach this speed, it must be electromagnetic waves or energy bodies, and the nerves of living bodies will become more peculiar. "

A life science scientist on the field is pretty good.

Now the life science academia of the Star Festival is discussing this topic.

The exploration of the higher-level life of God-level life is the ultimate direction of cosmic life science research.

Once the direction is determined, all powerful civilizations and life sciences will take this direction as the main research direction.

"This issue is a little special."

Xiao Yu subconsciously looked at Chen Mo and Mo Nu.

Beyond the existence of God-level life, these two should be, for these two themes are not conjectures, but reality.

Chen Mo's choice to listen to this topic seems to have little effect.

"We are quite a baby right now and have peerless martial arts, but don't know how to use it. We need to develop our own special body a little bit, otherwise there is no difference between it and no." Chen Mo guessed Xiao Yu's question and answered her: " Stones from other mountains can attack jade. Here, we are looking for stones to attack jade and find a key to unlock the peerless martial arts in our body."

Xiaoyu nodded clearly.

"Do you want to be like me and Mo Nu? Go back and develop for you." Chen Mo said.

"Do you always catch your wife to experiment?" Xiao Yu ridiculed and looked at Chen Mo.

Chen Mo felt a bit embarrassed.

"It was not dangerous before. Now I can continue to adjust and improve the problem of quantum life ball. For me now, the technology of quantum life ball has no secrets and no danger."

But thinking of the last question, Chen Mo calmed down.

"What's wrong?" Xiao Yu felt Chen Mo's change.

"Thinking about a final question."

Chen Mo thought of the science and technology library, the last task of the science and technology library, he has not been able to get it until now, and the technology library has not changed.

Although any technology is no longer a secret to him, he still wants to know the final secret of the technology library.

At the scene of the Life Science Forum, the debate has entered an intense stage.

The universe of life sciences now recognizes that there is a higher level of life than god-level life, but they have not been discovered for the time being. But what form it exists is a research on the direction of research. In the future, we can seek to allow existing life to evolve beyond the existence of god-level life.

"Our team believes that the existence beyond the divine level of life exists in the way of "black hole life", which is different from the view of Professor Cardivin. In our research, we found that there is a very obvious life in the existing universe. The evolutionary trajectory, physical strengthening.

The flesh of red-class life is extremely fragile, requires atmosphere and nutrition to sustain life, and is extremely susceptible to illness. The spread of a cell mutation may kill them. Up to Cheng and Huang, the difference between this life and the red life is not much, but the physical quality is a little stronger than the red life.

The green-level life above has been able to perform unprotected activities in space for some time. All the way to the purple-level god-level life, the strength of the body has changed significantly. The strongest physical strength of the **** level is already able to resist the gravity of the edge of the black hole.

It is not a secret that the black hole of the god-level civilization has been successfully survived and reappeared in history. And the president of the black pupil Civilization, Qing Qing, once appeared again from the black hole prison..."

chapters.title: Chapter 980: :Ambush
chapters.body:
Chapter 980: :Ambush

The life on the field looks in the direction of Tong Qing.

At first, Hitomi was in the Shigan Galaxy, privately using military power, so that the former speaker of Black Hitomi Civilization was angry and sent to the black hole prison.

Finally, when the black pupil civilization is in crisis again, it controls the black pupil council and takes a strong attitude to reform the black pupil civilization, let the black pupil civilization transform, get rid of the decaying mud of the old civilization, and become the strongest god. Civilization.

For eyes from all directions, pupil blue is unmoved.

In the god-level civilization, the physical strength of their top powers is enough to survive the gravity of the black hole, which is no strange secret.

There are many types of debates on the scene about the direction of life beyond the god-level civilization.

"I don't agree with Professor Gabe's "black hole man" point of view. According to the definition of our issue, life beyond God-level life is a higher-dimensional life.

The higher dimension known in our existing universe is time. So life we explore is life that can travel through time and space.

If the "black hole man" follows the evolutionary direction of life with high body density and strong body strength, then even if life becomes a strong body life, it is only the life of our existing cosmic system.

This kind of life is still in the rules of the universe, even if it can affect the surrounding time, but it can't travel in the direction of the universe's great time.

According to the definition, the life that Professor Gab's team said is just a god-level life that is more powerful than a god-level life. And we define life beyond God-level life as a higher-dimensional life. The one most likely to satisfy all definitions of life in higher dimensions is the'quantum man'. "

Another life science scientist stood up and refuted that he is a life science scientist who is a supporter of quantum life theory.

"The road has to be taken step by step, why can't we advance to a more powerful point, and then seek life beyond the dimensions of the existing universe?" Professor Gabe said, obviously not to be outdone.

"What's the difference between this and the long-term training of god-level life, the way to strengthen the body?" Professor Khadivin stood up and said.

"The process of the development of the cosmic life civilization is originally a process of continuously making yourself stronger, and the direction of making yourself stronger is the direction of life evolution, is it not right?" The life science scientist who supported Professor Gabe stood up.

Another life science professor also stood up and said: "I disagree with the arguments of several of you. Whether it is energy life, or'black hole man', or'quantum man, I disagree.

There is a big misunderstanding in your thinking. You are all making arguments around the evolution of the body of life. However, the evolution of life in our universe is a process in which the brain of life continues to become smarter, and the strengthening of the body is just a product of the stronger and stronger brain.

All the civilized achievements in our universe are now products of brain creation. The rest of the body is just the aid of the brain.

In the current technology, the brain can leave the living body and survive in the special nutrient solution. Once the living body loses its brain, it becomes waste.

I think the higher living body is sublimation and evolution at the brain level. The consciousness of the living body is no longer confined to the brain, but is integrated into the environment, thus completing the sublimation of life and manipulating all cosmic particles.

The higher level of life is more suitable for conscious life. It is the soul of the universe and controls everything in the universe. "

The debate on the field is not unexciting.

Life science scientists are divided into several schools, all trying to persuade each other to accept their research ideas.

Black hole life, energy life, quantum life, conscious life, particle life, and even ghostly life, these views have become the most accepted mainstream views.

Because according to the direction of the evolution of life, this is the most likely direction.

"Good." Tong Qing opened his mouth, applauding with a smile.

All other life applauded.

"Mr. Chen Mo is also interested in this research? Would you like us to communicate?" The debate on the field continued. Tong Qing looked directly at Chen Mo and asked with a smile.

"Not interested." Chen Mo shook his head slightly.

"Not interested in this research?"

"I'm not interested in communicating with you." Chen Mo said with a blank expression.

"What do you mean?"

Tara beside Tong Qing looked angry, glaring at Chen Mo, but was stopped by Tong Qing.

"Oh? Why are you not interested in communicating with me?" Tong Qing's expression remained calm and not angry.

"You are not a researcher. Communicating with you has little effect." Chen Mo said bluntly.

Under the existing cosmological knowledge about the fourth dimension of life, the debate on the forum will have no result, let alone discuss with Tong Qing, a non-researcher layman.

"That's really ashamed." Tong Qing smiled slightly and continued to look at the forum debate.

As Chen Mo said, until the forum was closed, there was no real conclusion.

On the way back, Chen Mo was still thinking about the forum debate just now.

Although there is no conclusion, this trip is not without gain. From Chen Mo's cognitive point of view, this debate has identified a lot of questions about the fourth dimension of life.

Chen Mo has benefited greatly from the viewpoint of conscious life body theory.

Use consciousness to control the body.

There is no life for the time being to prove that there is only one form of life in the fourth dimension, so any form is possible, and it is not excluded that there are other forms of existence.

Now only the research conjectures are released. When there is no real case to verify their conjectures, everything just stops at the paper argument.

...

Ming Yan is standing on a large transport spaceship above the city, using the busy armor and aircraft in the city to cover up the tracks. In daily flight, he will never notice their existence.

"Are you sure they will come back in this direction? How come there is no figure yet?"

"Now the other party's route is uncertain, only by luck." Ming Qiyu stared at Ming Yan.

They arranged a large number of intelligence personnel in the dark and bright places of Mu Shi Tianxing. It is not difficult to know the other party's whereabouts.

The news was sent back by intelligence personnel at the scene of the Life Science Forum. After leaving the forum, Chen Mo and others returned to the manor where they lived. According to their direction calculation, there are also feedback from intelligence personnel along the way to calculate the route that the other party is most likely to appear.

The patriarch asked them to take Chen Mo back with no means, so they had to make a move and start working on Mu Shi Tianxing.

Anyway, it's just an insignificant character. Mu Shitian didn't dare to blame the civilization of the dead body.

As long as you stay on the sidelines this time, catch Chen Mo and lose a little reputation, it's nothing.

They stayed here for a day. On the way Chen Mo passed, they didn't keep it. On the way back now, they can only rely on luck. In addition to the impatient temper, the other armored divisions can calm down.

Suddenly, a few black spots on the horizon were approaching quickly in this direction.

The sound of the Warframe Radar appears.

The spirit of Ming Qiyu was shocked, and he opened the team channel and whispered: "They are here."

Ming Yan raised his waist plate and pressed the hilt in his hand. The other armored divisions are all fighting, the performance of the armor is adjusted to the maximum, and the engine is ready to go.

Ming Qiyu carefully looked at the life around Chen Mo.

Three female armor, six male armor, five of which are **** armor, a total of ten.

When the distance determined by the computer is the shortest, Ming Qiyu whispered lightly: "Hands."

The first to do so is Ming Yan.

Two flames erupted in the armor, the long sword in his hand was activated, and a blue short pulse laser covered the blade.

At the same time, Ming Qiyu and other armored divisions all acted.

I saw the sword in Ming Qiyu's hand lit up, mixed with dangerous light, and gray and white paint appeared, covering the battle armor.

One of the other armored divisions was not slow, covered with gray and white paint, and turned into a residual image in the air, pointing directly to Chen Mo’s team.

The long-established movements of the Underworld Civilization Division are extremely decisive.

The war armor suddenly appeared in front of Chen Mo. Seeing that the long sword was about to stab Chen Mo's heart, I saw Chen Mo in high-speed flight, and the armor erupted instantly.

boom!

Around Chen Mo, the air exploded suddenly, leaving a cloud of water vapor.

"Premonition is true, it is indeed dangerous, this is an assassin of the corpse civilization." Chen Mo stood still and looked at the armored division from the raid. Judging from the style of armor painting, it is the armor division of the corpse civilization.

More than thirty armored divisions are surrounding, which is not a good situation.

"Mo Nu, take Xiaoyu and Zhao Min away, bring reinforcements over." Chen Mo immediately ordered Mo Nu.

"it is good."

Mo Nu didn't hesitate, she held out her hand, and an aperture grew slowly in mid-air.

The five guardians are also facing the enemy, protecting the three women in the middle. These three identities, they are all clear, even if they are dead, they will not be allowed to suffer any harm.

Both Xiaoyu and Zhao Min knew that the situation was urgent and stayed there without any effect, so they flew into the aperture without thinking.

Seeing this situation, Ming Qiyu's expression changed.

"The ability to control space? Stop them."

It's just that Qi Qiyu spoke a little late, and the three girls had disappeared into the sky. There is a special ability, Mo Nu can control the space, which he did not count.

If they let the other party bring reinforcements, they will be passive.

"Call for reinforcements, we have a quick decision, Ming Yan, cooperate with me to win Chen Mo, Ming You, you killed those guards."

chapters.title: Chapter 981: : Fierce Fighting
chapters.body:
Chapter 981: : Fierce Fighting

Ming Yan's figure flashed, his face under the armor was mixed with contemptuous sneer. But the movement was not slow. After a few sonic booms flashed out of the armor, he approached Chen Mo very quickly.

He was the first master of the corpse civilization. Although he was very reluctant to obey the orders, the patriarch said that he could only obey the instructions of the Seven Qiyu, to avoid big mistakes in his actions.

Because the purpose of their coming to Mu Shi Tianxing was not to compete, but to catch Chen Mo alive.

The long sword in his hand circulated the blue light, the sweeping atmosphere, dragging a long trailing shadow, and the low-pitched sonic boom screamed, crying and complaining, making people creepy.

Seeing Ming Yan go all out, a glimmer of joy appeared in the eyes of Ming Qiyu. As long as Ming Yan didn't fall off the chain, the two of them working together to catch Chen Mo was definitely not a problem.

Sonic booms from battle armor came from the surrounding air, such as wind and thunder sweeping, and the atmosphere was agitated, making people bloody.

Chen Mo's expression was cautious, and the other party had ambushed here long ago. A group of top-level armored divisions are all elites, looking at their rough strength, no one is worse than the armored divisions in the opening ceremony.

This is the essence of god-level civilization.

There were only seven people on their side, and they were besieged by nearly thirty people.

The master of the first corpse civilization, who is the first to shoot, has the strength above the seven Qiyu. The ability to be above Ming Qiyu means that Ming Yan's strength is not weaker than Chen Mo. Other masters dragged on Jing Ge and Shenwei, and the two strongest masters came together to deal with him.

Long-term delay, I am afraid that there will be more and more evil.

The attack of Ming Yan and Ming Qiyu was very sharp, and he did not attack his brain, but tried to choose his heart and other key attacks. As long as Chen Mo was subdued and did not die directly, after they were alive, they could use the medical cabin to recover. They were not worried about Chen Mo dying.

The attack between the two is not as tacit as the imagination, but the pressure on Chen Mo is not lost to the pressure on Jing Ge.

Two top-level armored divisions, and the elite of the elite.

It's probably not good to continue fighting hard and hard, he is not afraid, but Jing Ge and Shenwei are in trouble.

Chen Mo kept sinking in one heart.

Anti-matter bombs and high-energy weapons are restricted when they enter Mu's star, so they do not have long-range high-energy weapons and anti-matter weapons. Chemical corrosion weapons and jamming weapons are still there. Melee is the only way.

Not only they, but the other party is also subject to this restriction.

Masters of almost the same level, the difficulty of one-on-two victory is not as great.

Chen Mo thought about the reasons why several corpse civilizations attacked them. The war of the Sloan Great Wall? Or the superpower development technology in his hands? Or is he known about his admission to Ming Tu?

These thoughts disappeared in a flash, and Chen Mo left behind them.

Whatever the reason, it does not matter now.

There is a little carelessness right now, they are all planted here. He is not afraid, his body is special, but Ku Yao and Jing Ge, he does not want to lose any one.

The situation on the field quickly took shape in Chen Mo's mind.

Seven to thirty, no matter the quantity or quality, they have no advantage. The only advantage is Chen Mo's own special body, but this cannot be turned into a team advantage.

If someone loses their fighting power, their disadvantages will widen.

Compared with the armor, they are the same as the god-level civilization. In terms of combat effectiveness, the other party is the elite armor division of the god-level civilization, and the strength is not lost to any of them. They are top masters. The pressure that Ming Yan gave him was not weaker than Jing Ge, and Ming Qiyu was only weaker than him.

The seven of them were isolated, and the five guards of the guards teamed together. They had the tacit advantage of the soldiers, but they were under great pressure.

He has special abilities. He can abandon Jing Ge and Ku Yao with some special abilities, but he can't.

Chen Mo's consciousness was turning fast, his body was not idle, and he was ready to dodge the coming attack. He didn't dare to fight each other. Once he was entangled with each other, the two attacked together, and he had nowhere to escape.

Hyperstate.

The tranquility of consciousness allowed Chen Mo to have a figure.

Ming Yan, who was above his head, noticed that Chen Mo was wrong, and he whispered: "This is the ability to use? But now use the ability? Is it to death? For us, your ability has no effect, just grab it."

The air around Ming Yan exploded, leaving behind a cloud of water mist, which suddenly appeared one meter away from Chen Mo, and the long sword fell towards his shoulder.

When the sword blade approached Chen Mo's shoulder, he grinned.

Succeeded.

In the next moment, Ming Yan's smile froze on his face, and his sword was slashed, without any obstacle to penetrate Chen Mo's body, but he felt a sense of emptiness.

The imaginary cut-offs did not appear.

Chen Mo's body disappeared in midair.

"What's going on?" Ming Yan was unbelievable.

The optical radar cannot detect the position of the other party, and there is no trace in the quantum radar.

This ability is beyond his imagination. Among the superpowers that have been discovered so far, there is no such ability to transform one's body into nothingness. Because matter always exists, especially the living body.

"You can feel that he is still here, keep the periphery, don't let him escape. This ability is very special, it should consume a lot of mental energy. If he is mentally fatigued here, he will be easier to catch than a bug."

The sound of Nine Seven Feathers fell into the ears of every armored division.

"Ming Yan paid attention to him. I went to solve the other armor divisions. I didn't believe that he watched his subordinates being killed as head-suckers."

"Okay." Ming Yan chuckled and pulled high, always paying attention to the battle in the field, and his vigilance was the highest, fearing that Chen Mo would suddenly appear and attack them.

Chen Mo's special body and mental consumption of special abilities have not imposed a burden on him. But Qi Qiyu was right, he really could not watch Jing Ge and Ku Yao killed.

Jing Ge and Ku Yao have been urging him to leave, but he still doesn't want to.

Now his existence is a threat to the other party.

...

Gai Luo heard the news, and his face changed greatly. He immediately got up and left the venue.

The life of the corpse civilization is ambushing Chen Mo and his party openly over the city of Mushitianxing. This kind of behavior is very bad. Once it has serious consequences, Mu Shi Tianxing, and even the Star Monument will suffer.

During the high-speed flight, Gai Luo only hopes that Chen Mo is all right now, otherwise, he, the Director of the Planetary Safety Administration, is negligent.

Behind Gai Luo, followed by twenty armored divisions. They are all top-level armored teachers of the Planetary Security Agency. Each armored division, the look under the armor is not very good. It is the first time that a god-level civilization ambushed a life here.

When it comes to god-level civilization, it is troublesome every time.

The other armored divisions of the Planetary Security Agency are advancing to where the battle is sitting.

"Aren't people going to protect Chen Mo and his party?" Gai Luo's voice was low.

Since Chen Mo was revealed to have the ability to develop technology, he worried that this scene would appear today, but he did not expect it to happen.

"The manpower is not enough, so he is sent to protect the life of other god-level civilizations." The subordinate said: "The masters of the corpse civilizations have just entered the Mu Shi Tianxing not long ago."

Specially sent masters to come to ambush, or during the Star Festival.

Run out of prestige.

Underworld civilization is crazy.

"How long will it be there?"
