"According to calculations, it takes five minutes and forty-four seconds." Warframe intelligently replied coldly.

Five points?

Daylily is cold.

"What about the armored division of the nearest police station?"

"Drew by the armored division of the corpse civilization."

Gai Luo's face was as gloomy as water, and he only hoped that Chen Mo could stick to it for a while, otherwise there would be big problems.

chapters.title: Chapter 982: : My Name Is Purple Emperor
chapters.body:
Chapter 982: : My Name Is Purple Emperor

Chen Mo always pays attention to the changes in the field, even a slight position change.

The situation on the court is critical.

The collision of the battle is extremely fierce.

Especially Jing Ge’s location, the siege of seven armored divisions, and the entry of the Seven Feathers, Jing Ge’s pressure multiplied, and the sound of air explosion was deafening in the field.

If it is not Jing Ge's horrible fighting consciousness, he will be seriously injured if he is hit by the opponent at random.

Seven to thirty, almost opponents of the same level, want to win, almost whimsical.

Chen Mo's mind was spinning rapidly, thinking about countermeasures.

Suddenly, Chen Mo's eyes narrowed and his body appeared without hesitation. The black and red armor slowly appeared behind a armored division who besieged Jing Ge. The tip of the lance flashed cold, with a breath of death.

The figure that appeared suddenly did not hesitate to wave a spear at the neck of the corpse armor division.

At the same time, Ming Yan, who always pays close attention to Chen Mo's figure, exploded in place and joined the battlefield in a grinning manner.

Hiss!

The sound of the metal being cut is particularly harsh, causing the hair to burst. In the high sky, the head of a corpse armor division separated, and the armor failed in the air, flying like a headless fly.

The air burst came, and Ming Yan's long sword had been cut down, but it was still one step late. With one blow, Chen Mo flipped in the air to avoid Ming Yan's attack and quickly left the battlefield.

Chen Mo's sneak attack made the opponent's attack rhythm appear chaotic. The engine of Jing Ge's armor urged to the highest power, exploded in place, and escaped from the entanglement of the siege.

"Their goal is me, seven to thirty, I can't beat them. Hold them in the city and wait for support."

After Chen Mo ordered, the speed of the armor was urged to the highest, and the city below quickly fell. It was only a minute or so since the beginning of the battle, and they simply couldn’t stay in the siege for too long.

After receiving the order, the guardian who cooperated with the battle did not hesitate to leave the battlefield in different directions and flew over in the direction of Chen Mo.

They can protect Chen Mo's safety at all costs.

Ming Qiyu's face changed slightly, and if Chen Mo escaped into the city, it would be troublesome. They didn't have much time. After a few more minutes, when the other's reinforcements came over, they had no chance.

I thought that under the siege of so many top armored divisions, the opponent could not hold on for two minutes, but did not want to be so tenacious, and was killed by the opponent.

Ming Qiyu immediately ordered: "All besieged Chen Mo, regardless of other soldiers."

Ming Yan smiled angrily, and the other party attacked his men under his eyelids and wanted to escape, just in his face. "Shut up, I can give you a little affection, otherwise I will be caught, and I will let you know what is called universe capital punishment."

The speed of Ming Yan is extremely fast. His armor, the collection of the most advanced technology of the corpse civilization, is impeccable in performance and speed. It seems that he still underestimated the strength of the other party.

I thought that the siege would quickly resolve Jing Ge, but I didn't expect the other party to insist on so long in a one-to-seven situation. There is more than one top expert in the team, Jing Ge's danger level is definitely not weaker than Chen Mo.

Corrosive smoke exploded around, Chen Mo dared not relax.

This thing sticks to the armor, and it is not a good thing that the material is corroded.

...

Ming You's attention locked Chen Mo's body, he was closest to Chen Mo, and not far from the side. Not far away is the city. Once the other party falls into the city, between the high-rise buildings, there are various aircrafts, and intensive life, the difficulty of siege will double.

This time the patriarch gave them a death order and came back to Chen Mo by any means. The patriarch said that no corpse dared to disobey. Without completing the task, they go back and will face the anger of the patriarch, it is not a joke.

In any case, Chen Mo will not be allowed to escape this ambush.

At this moment, seeing the radar flashing an attack signal, Ming You raised her eyebrows and launched without hesitation.

Boom!

The four missiles on the back flew away from the armor, exploded in the air in front of Chen Mo, and blocked all routes in front of Chen Mo.

When Chen Mo stopped, the sound of a sonic boom in the rear exploded in the atmosphere, and each figure appeared, blocking all Chen Mo's routes.

For a time, the killing was revealed.

...

Chen Mo became so calm that he pinned his time on waiting for the arrival of reinforcements.

The overstate appears.

Chen Mo looked at the long sword cut by Ming You indifferently, and then swept unhindered from his illusory body.

With the same strength, the other side is playing more and less, or they are still ambushed, they currently have no chance of winning. But with this special body and the reason for the special ability, Chen Mo does not need to worry about life danger now.

If he is allowed to fully master this physical ability, he believes that this armored division in front of him has no threat at all. Now, like a baby with a peerless sword, he can't exert his ability at all.

This ability to transform into nothingness is terrible, but he has not fully mastered it, and can only delay the time. The other party can't take him for the time being, but he wants to escape, and it is a bit troublesome.

Looking coldly at the corpse civilization armored division in the field, he could see every corner, but the range of his body could not exceed one kilometer, and once he appeared, he would be under siege.

Both Shenwei and Jing Ge floated in the air, ready to wait for Chen Mo to appear when they appeared.

Suddenly, Chen Mo felt something, looking towards the direction of the city.

A purple armor is coming to the battlefield at a terrifying speed.

The armor of the Ziwei civilization? Could it be that the crape myrtle civilization has to be inserted horizontally? If so, then his situation will be more troublesome. The masters of the two god-level civilizations are besieging him, this is not a joke.

Soon after this idea appeared, Chen Mo threw it away.

Because there is only one armored division coming, not a group.

What's the use of a Warframe Division?

Not only was Chen Mo aware of this scene, the armor division of the corpse civilization on the field also paid attention to the armor that was flying at a rapid speed. Looking at the style, it is the armor of the crape myrtle civilization, but the logo of the crape myrtle civilization is marked with a scratch, which is very conspicuous.

"Is the Ziwei civilization's armor division's IQ so low? Want to come alone?" Ming Yan chuckled with a disdainful voice.

He spoke on a public channel, and the other party would surely receive it, with unabashed sarcasm.

However, what made all life unexpected was that the purple armor actually appeared in a low reply: "The standard of the armored division of the Ziwei civilization is indeed not very good."

The meaning in words is stunned.

Wearing the armor of the Ziwei civilization, but taunting the Ziwei civilization, Ziwei civilization appears traitors?

boom!

The purple battle armor stopped at the periphery of Chen Mo's location, and looked directly at the scene. Ming Qiyu and Ming Yan's brows are tight, and they are secretly alert.

"Your Excellency, don't worry about anything, this is not the business of Ziwei civilization." Ming Qiyu's voice was threatened.

"Oh, I didn't say that I was Ziwei civilization." The voice from the armor was low and thick, with a special attraction.

"Your Excellency, wouldn't you change a set of armor before you intervene? You can't pretend, isn't it a fool? Still want to clarify the relationship with Ziwei civilization?" Ming Yan sneered.

"Don't talk nonsense with him, pay attention to Chen Mo, he may appear at any time, this Ziwei person is distracting and delaying time." Ming Qiyu noticed something was wrong.

"It's quite smart, introduce yourself." The life of the purple battle armor smiled softly: "My name is Purple Emperor."

chapters.title: Chapter 983: : Hunters Become Prey
chapters.body:
Chapter 983: : Hunters Become Prey

Purple Emperor!

This name stunned the life on the field.

The Purple Emperor, who once slaughtered the top elite geniuses of the Ziwei civilization, once caused the Ziwei civilization to fall into recession, leaving the position of the top of the seven civilizations.

In Ziwei civilization, this name is a taboo.

Ming Qiyu reacted suddenly, and his expression was shocked. In a flash, all his mind was put on Purple Emperor.

In their hearts, the name Purple Emperor is more threatening than Chen Mo.

With his own strength, he slaughtered the top elite of the Ziwei civilization generation, and caused the Ziwei civilization to fall into decline, but it was a generation of sand gods. His fierce name, until thousands of years later, still makes people tremble.

Ming Yan's expression was solemn and he felt a sense of pressure.

The name alone makes people feel stressed.

In the name of killing God, his danger level far exceeds Chen Mo. In mid-air, there was death and silence all around, and they were all vigilant to the coming people. They were temporarily unable to determine whether the Purple Emperor was the true identity.

"I'll play with you."

The deep voice of Purple Emperor spread on the public channel, making the armored division of the corpse civilization tense.

The next moment, the Purple Emperor disappeared in place, appeared behind a Warframe Division, the slender knife flashed a fuchsia light, and cut towards the Warframe Division of the Underworld Civilization.

Hiss~~

Just like cutting into tofu with a sharp blade, there is no hindrance.

With just a knife, it shows the power of terror, the name of the killing **** is worthy of the name.

Just now, there was a bit of a fluke in the mind of Ming Qiyu and others, thinking that the armor division in front of him was posing as an outsider to delay their time. It is only now that the other party is true.

Ming Qiyu and others who had been holding the winning ticket sank a heart.

One to eight, easy to handle.

Each one is comparable to the elite of the armored division, but the Purple Emperor copes with it as usual and poses a threat to their armored division.

The terrifying reaction speed and combat skills, like a gorgeous show, the difficult movements in one go, let the onlookers marvel.

Soon, the expressions of Ming Qiyu and Ming Yan suddenly changed.

Two other armored divisions were cut under the sword of the Purple Emperor.

"Ming You, take two people with you and contain him together." Ming Qiyu ordered.

He and Ming Yan did not act rashly, they should pay attention to Chen Mo's situation, otherwise Chen Mo escaped, there will be no such opportunities in the future.

The Purple Emperor, one person against ten armor divisions, contained one-third of the power of the corpse civilization. His meddling made the situation suddenly complicated.

"Don't just watch, you guys play too." Purple Emperor pulled away from the siege and stretched out his palm.

suddenly.

Chen Mo felt that the surrounding space was not right, his body slowly emerged from the void.

At this moment, Chen Mo's face changed slightly.

The Purple Emperor has the ability to pull him out of nothing and return to the entity.

This is Zidi's ability?

Chen Mo encountered this ability for the first time, like mindfulness, which had an effect on the incorporeal body.

Several thoughts emerged in his heart, but it was too late to reflect.

The emergence of Chen Mo immediately became the target.

Ming Yan and Ming Qiyu didn't even think about it, and urged the armor to fly over to Chen Mo's location. The other armor divisions also approached him.

Jing Ge and Ku Yao saw this, and without hesitation they rushed towards them and joined the battle.

Chen Mo didn't say anything, and chose a direction with less armored division to break through. If surrounded, there are so many elites in the other party, and his armor can be abolished in one attack.

With the emergence of Chen Mo, fierce fighting broke out again.

Unlike last time, this time the pressure is much smaller, and the Purple Emperor joins in to contain a quarter of the armored division of the underworld civilization, giving them a huge space.

The other armored divisions haunted Shenwei and Jing Ge, Ming Qiyu and Mingyan, and two armored divisions joined forces to siege Chen Mo.

They all exhausted their strength and dared not give Chen Mo the time to use his strange ability to delay time. They hope to end the battle in the shortest time and take Chen Mo away, otherwise their plans will go bankrupt when the reinforcements come.

Chen Mo exhausted all his strength, and his siege armour division was not weak.

Most of the time he chooses to evade or escape attacks, not daring to face hard, otherwise he will definitely lose once he gets entangled.

I hope Mo Nu can hurry up.

Suddenly, Mo Nu's voice came from his ear.

"Mo Ge, look above."

A space opening slowly emerged above their battle. At the beginning, the size of the egg expanded like a vortex of water waves to a diameter of three meters, and the periphery was colorful.

An endless stream of guards emerged rapidly from the cave entrance and fell into the battlefield, protecting Chen Mo in the middle.

Every guardian has great anger.

Their king is ambushed by the enemy, which is unforgivable.

"kill."

The bitter dragon expression was extremely angry, and the first time it fell into the battlefield, it launched a siege on the elite of the underworld civilization.

The originally passive scene instantly reversed.

The appearance of hundreds of **** guards changed the expression of Ming Qiyu.

He knew that the other's reinforcements were coming.

The woman's strange spatial ability can connect the two places and send all Chen Mo's guards.

Failed.

"retreat."

Ming Qiyu did not hesitate to urge the armor to escape.

However, Shenwei does not seem to want them to leave, corroding missile launches, and dragging in the atmosphere like a viper.

Boom!

A continuous stream of corrosive mists exploded in the atmosphere, blocking the path of the corpse civilization armor division. All armor contaminated with corrosive smoke slowly disintegrated during supersonic flight and eventually lost performance.

Three hundred guardians appeared, in groups of ten, and besieged a corpse civilization's armored division, just like a gesture of annihilation.

The strength of Shenwei itself is not weak, coupled with strict training, enough to deal with these elites.

The position reverses and the hunter becomes a prey.

Surrounded by Chen Mo, surrounded by Shenwei, there are as many as forty. Shenwei puts Chen Mo's safety first. In this situation, they can no longer let Chen Mo go to battle and take risks.

Between the gods and guards, after long-term battlefield cooperation, the mutual understanding is impeccable, and the fighting power displayed is far beyond the one plus one situation.

The balance on the scene is tilting.

Jing Ge intercepted Ming Yan, and Ku Yao and Ku Long also caught Ming Qiyu, and had no intention of letting the other party escape.

"Young humanoid, take care of your guard." Zi Di's deep voice spread on the public channel.

He is now under siege by a dozen guardians.

The **** guard who just entered the field is mainly to protect Chen Mo. As long as they don't know them on the field, they are regarded as assassins, and they should all be damn.

"Stop, he is not an enemy." Chen Mo ordered.

Although the other party pulled him out of nothingness, he didn't feel too much maliciousness from the other party, otherwise he would not rush over and help him out, but he didn't think the other party was here for sightseeing.

"Why help me?" Chen Mo asked.

After the besieged Shenwei flew to the armored division of the corpse civilization, Zidi took a deep look at Chen Mo: "I pulled you out, how do you think I came to help you?"

As soon as this remark came out, the guards surrounding the Purple Emperor began to be alert, and they would not hesitate to siege each other when Chen Mo ordered them.

"We don't seem to know."

"Now I know." Purple Emperor looked at Ming Yan and others.

Suddenly, the cue of the radar appeared, and the radar showed that a group of armored divisions were coming towards their battlefield.

chapters.title: Chapter 984: : Within Range, Truth Everywhere
chapters.body:
Chapter 984: : Within Range, Truth Everywhere

Gai Luo appeared on the battlefield with the masters of the Planetary Security Agency, but the situation in front of him made him stunned.

More than three hundred armor.

The information given back to him, including the sneak attackers of the corpse civilization, is less than fifty. How come there are 300 more armor divisions suddenly, and looking at the armor, it is a uniform standard armor coating.

"What's going on? Where did these armor come from?" Gai Luo asked the intelligence personnel who had been watching the battle from the outside.

"The Director is a female person beside Chen Mo. She has the special ability to connect the space and sent Chen Mo's bodyguard." The intelligence personnel hurriedly replied and passed the image of Mo Nu to Gai Luo.

"Three hundred armored divisions besieged the armored divisions of the corpse civilization, and hunters became prey." Gai Luo shook his heart.

"Head, shall we intervene? The armored division of the corpse civilization seems to be in danger." a subordinate said.

"Send a warning signal to stop them all."

A red warning signal lights up over the battlefield, staining half of the sky red.

"Stop it now."

A warning sound sounded on the public channel.

Chen Mo glanced at the people, and from the signs, he was a police officer of the Planetary Security Agency.

"Don't ignore them."

Chen Mo’s words fell, and the guard’s attack was even sharper. It was completely a wound-for-strike attack. In just a few seconds, five armored divisions of the corpse civilization died under the deadly siege.

"I am Ming Qiyu, the messenger of the corpse civilization. They attacked us and rescued us immediately."

Ming Qiyu spoke on the public channel, apparently speaking to the officers of the Planetary Security Agency. All the officers of the Planetary Security Agency are waiting for Gai Luo's order. As long as he orders, he will act according to his order.

Now Ming Qiyu is a little shameless, and he clearly attacked others, but said that others attacked him.

But after all, he was the messenger of the celestial civilization coming to the star festival, and the Planetary Security Agency had to manage it.

"I advise you not to participate. It's them who break the rules. It has nothing to do with you." As Gai Luo prepared to give orders, Chen Mo warned.

Gai Luogang's breath was ready to stagnate. It was indeed the corpse civilization's first ambush, but the messenger of the corpse civilization died here, and he could not explain to the corpse civilization.

And listening to Chen Mo's tone is warning them.

"He is the messenger of the corpse civilization and can't die on Mu Shi Tian." Gai Luo said in a low voice.

"Then I can just let him not die on Mu Shi Tianxing."

"Stop your subordinates, they can't have an accident."

Gai Luo activated the anti-matter bullet in his hand, the meaning was obvious, and they would start without stopping.

When entering the Starfield, the coming life cannot carry anti-matter bullets. Only the officers of the Planetary Security Agency have anti-matter bullets. Now the officers of the Planetary Security Agency are quite pointed at a group of gangs fighting with bare hands.

"Are you sure you want to shoot?" Chen Mo said lightly.

"We are sorry for your being attacked, but they are messengers of the corpse civilization after all, and we have an obligation to protect." Gai Luo said.

Suddenly, Gai Luo's face changed.

In the air not far away, a three-meter-high space opening appeared, and a steady stream of armor flew out of the opening, with a clear display on their radar.

It is a standard armor.

How did these three hundred guards appear?

At the next moment, the warning from the Warframe Radar changed Gai Luo's face.

Signal reaction of activated antimatter.

These warframes carry a large number of antimatter bullets.

At this time, the barrels of the armor were all aimed at the scene.

"They are called war violent madmen, armor for space wars, and anti-matter bombs equipped on them. It should be simple to destroy the planet. If you can escape the blast of thousands of smart bullets, you can do it." Chen Mo said.

Gai Luo turned black.

This strange space transmission ability is simply against the sky.

He has been in contact with the outside world for so long, and he has never heard of this ability.

"The first truce, if you have anything to say, let them compensate you. They are messengers of the corpse civilization. If they are killed, the corpse civilization will not be willing to give up." Gai Luo warned.

"You may not know, we just ended the battle of the Sloan Great Wall, we destroyed an army of corpses civilization."

Gai Luo's pupils shrank.

He once thought that Chen Mo's power was an ordinary top civilization, but after seeing the war video, Gai Luo froze.

No wonder the six god-level civilizations want to invite Chen Mo to the podium.

Speaking on the public channel, all the armor can be received, and for a time, the public channel becomes dead.

The news that Chen Mo said was too shocking.

"We are dying here, the Star Monument will bear the wrath of our corpse civilization. Director Gai Luo, stop them immediately." Seeing Gai Luo didn't start, the call of Ming Qiyu became more and more anxious.

The voice of Ming Qiyu was threatened and commanded, and the disgust on Gai Luo's face flashed away.

Now he rides a tiger.

To stop it, they all have to take it in. Chen Mo's army strength does not allow them to organize. Do not stop, the messenger of the corpse civilization will die here.

The second batch of guards at the entrance of the space is still entering, and there are nearly a hundred people who have surrounded the battlefield.

Once thought that the security work of Mushi Tianxing reached the highest level, now under a special ability, it is fragile like paper paste.

At this moment, Gai Luo's communication instrument rang, and the head of the Mu Family Star family came in contact.

Just connected to the video, I saw Mu Shi's dignified face.

Planetary radar shows that there is a large amount of antimatter on the east side, which is enough to destroy Mu's star. As the owner of Mu's star, he got the news in the first time.

"Director, why are there so many antimatter excitation signals on the east side of the planet?"

"Underworld civilization is here to ambush Chen Mo, and Chen Mo's men use special space abilities to send armor carrying antimatter bombs into the planet. Now they are anti-siegeing underworld division armour division."

Gai Luo's voice was low, and he had never suffered such suffocation since he took the position. In the face of war, he could only watch.

Seeing the video on the scene, Mu's scalp was numb.

On one side is the corpse civilization, on the other side is Chen Mo with an antimatter.

"I'm connected to Chen Mo's newsletter, please don't act lightly."

Everything in the Mu Family Star family is on this planet. If Chen Mo is angry, destroying Mu Family Star, then their family's hundreds of millions of years of accumulation will all be lost.

Putting down the communicator, Mu's head was sitting in a chair with great depression, and he had a headache.

The sudden activation of the antimatter reaction, which can be scanned by the advanced armor, makes this signal tense the entire planet.

Now during the Star Festival, there are a large number of elites from all over the universe on the planet, and the impact is not trivial.

Soon, Chen Mo's communication was connected, Mu Shi rearranged his expression and sat up.

"Mr. Chen Mo, is there anything you did on the east side of the planet?"

Mu Shizhong's tone is very gentle, for fear that the tone is too heavy, and was misunderstood by Chen Mo to come to trouble, then their trouble will be great.

"Yes." Chen Mo said without evasion.

"Is there any misunderstanding? Can you stop using anti-matter bombs on Mu's star? Now, in a special period, once it is used, the consequences will be unimaginable." Mu asked carefully.

"I don't want to move either. Out of defense, I won't move as long as the police officer of the Security Department doesn't move the anti-matter bomb. I only need the armored division of the corpse civilization. If they move, don't blame me."

Chen Mo no longer ignored Mu Shizhong.

Fists are the basis of reasoning in this universe.

...

"Head, what now?" The policeman at the scene was a little nervous.

They have seen big scenes, but for the first time they have experienced the atmosphere of near war.

"Don't act rashly first."

Receiving a communication from Mu Shizhong, Gai Luo felt helpless. Weighing the pros and cons, they dare not mess up at this time, otherwise they will anger Chen Mo, and the entire planet will suffer.

Who gives him that special ability, provokes him, opens a hole in the space, and throws the destruction weapon into Mu Shi Tianxing, no one feels bad.

All police officers can only watch the battle on the field.

The armored divisions of the corpse civilization were killed one by one in the siege, making their eyelids jump straight. The elite civilization-level elite, so unscrupulously killed, they had to admire Chen Mo's fierceness.

Five minutes later, more and more police officers were on the scene, but no one dared to act rashly.

On the other side, Mu Shi re-ordered, closed the channel of the corpse civilization team into Mu Shi tianxing, and no longer allowed the corpse civilization team to get close to Mu Shi tian, lest the situation develop more and more crazy.

...

Ming Tu received a message from Chen Mo, it was a video, a video of fighting on Mu Shi Tianxing. At the moment when watching the video clearly, the corpse's eyes narrowed, staring at the armor of the corpse civilization on the field, indifferent and indifferent.

Also sent with the video, there is a Chen Mo command and a coordinate.

This is a letter of submission.

chapters.title: Chapter 985: : The Gift Of Purple Emperor
chapters.body:
Chapter 985: : The Gift Of Purple Emperor

Chen Mo has always been curious about the emergence of Purple Emperor.

In the remarks he heard, this ruthless man has always been mysterious. Since the slaughter of the elite genius of the Ziwei civilization, he fled the Ziwei civilization and there is no news.

But his legend has never stopped.

According to legend, after Dan's death, he is the only life that can compete with Tong Qing for the position of the strongest in the universe.

This killing **** has a bad name.

He hadn't seen it before, but since Chen Mo was pulled out of nothingness by him, he dared not underestimate the great god.

Purple Emperor looks like a middle-aged Lagerstroemia man, plain and uncommon. On his forehead, there is a Lagerstroemia flower symbol of the Lagerstroemia civilization, which was destroyed by a "乄" word scar, and there is a blood-red tattoo on the right face, like ancient The inscriptions, purple fluorescence floating on the skin, the most pure purple.

Those eyes, like shining purple gemstones, are deep and translucent. These eyes are impressive. Chen Mo only saw similar eyes in one life, Zi Yun, the messenger of the corpse civilization.

There was no expression on the knife-like face, cold and secret.

After looking at each other, Chen Mo opened the topic: "What are you looking for me for?"

"Send you a gift." Purple Emperor waved his hand and threw a thumb-sized memory card to Chen Mo.

"what is this?"

This answer was beyond Chen Mo's expectation. He thought that the other party would come to discuss cooperation or ask him for help. But he didn't expect to give him something.

There was a wicked smile on the corner of Purple Emperor's mouth: "My experience of developing special abilities to control the body should be of some use to you."

"Why?" Chen Mo asked holding the memory card.

He knows how precious this memory card is. If you sell it, you can get a constellation.

"Your body is very special, and there is this little girl who has a very special life like you." Zidi looked at the Mo girl beside Chen Mo: "Like an unopened treasure, if you learn to go Control it, it should be the most perfect artwork."

Purple Emperor looked at Chen Mo.

Chen Mo's pupils shrank.

Did Emperor Zi see that he was different from Mo Nu?

"What are the conditions?" Chen Mo took the memory card naturally.

"If you can, I will send a crape myrtle flower in the future, but it doesn't matter if it's there or not, don't force it, whatever you want." Purple Emperor grinned, unrestrained and arrogant in his smile, the helmet of the armor closed , Turn around and leave.

...

"Head, leaving that life, it seems to be..." The police officer of the Planetary Security Agency looked at the direction of the purple emperor's departure with shock on his face. He seemed to remember a special life.

"It seems to be removed, it's him, Purple Emperor."

Gai Luo deeply glanced at Chen Mo who had just talked to Zi Emperor.

The mysterious Purple Emperor appeared on Mu Shi Tianxing, and also gave Chen Mo something. The information was too rich.

A police officer swallowed and was startled by the name Zidi: "What is his relationship with Zidi?"

"I do not know either."

Gai Luo's expression is solemn, he only hopes that this killing **** will not cause any major incidents in Mu Shi Tianxing, otherwise things will be very troublesome.

"What about fighting on the field?" Another policeman had just recovered from the shock.

The body armor of the corpse civilization is getting less and less, and Chen Mo did not give the Ming Qiyu a chance to escape.

Soon, the battle on the field ended.

The body of Ming Qiyu was penetrated with the armor, lost its resistance, and was captured by the guard, pulling the body out of the armor, killing it without hesitation, throwing it away like garbage, but the battle of the civilization of the Ming body A, all taken away.

On the other side, Ming Yan stiffened in front of Jing Ge, and his face under the armor was still unbelievable. At his chest, he was penetrated by a palm, and he still held fragments of his heart. Then, his The brain is also penetrated, and consciousness falls into darkness.

He never thought that he, who is confident in his own strength, will one day be defeated by an unknown soldier.

"Where is the corpse civilization's station in Mu's Star?" Chen Mo glanced at the dead battlefield and looked at Gai Luo.

As soon as this remark came out, Gai Luo's face changed greatly.

Ruthless, this is ready to kill.

"Mr. Chen Mo, give me a face, this matter is over? Can you?" Gai Luo said with a gritted tooth. If Chen Mo wants to come, he is really helpless.

Since Chen Mo brought the antimatter bomb into Mu Shi Tianxing, he had no choice.

"Then in Mu Shi Tianxing, I promise that they will not attack you again and retaliate against you. The grudges between you and the corpse civilization are not that small."

"Give you a face." Chen Mo looked at the dead battlefield and turned away.

It wasn't until Chen Mo and his entourage left that the police officers of the Planetary Security Agency recovered and looked at Gai Luo one after another.

"Clean the battlefield, collect the body of the corpse civilization armor division, send it back to the corpse civilization, and send a team to protect Chen Mo around the clock." Gai Luo said with his teeth.

"How to explain to the civilization of the dead body?" asked a police officer beside him carefully.

"No need to explain, they started first, this is the grievance between them and the marching ant group, it has nothing to do with us."

Gai Luo's voice was full of anger, and the corpse civilization was unscrupulously working here, only to cause such great trouble to Mu Shi Tianxing, he is also very angry now.

...

Ming Qiyu, the messenger of the corpse civilization, was killed by Chen Mo.

The news exploded like a powerful gunpowder on the Star Monument. Since the start of the Star Festival, the first time the messenger of the god-level civilization was killed, it can be seen that its impact is great.

Along with the news, there was also a video of Ming Qiyu besieging Chen Mo and his party.

The ambush was killed.

The private use of force is prohibited on the Mu starry sky. This is a clear rule. For hundreds of millions of years, many civilizations have tacitly complied with it. Even if they use force, they will send secret personnel and clear relations.

The corpse civilization actually disregarded the influence and carried out ambush assassinations so boldly. Moreover, the operation failed and was destroyed by a group of people. It lost a group of elite armor divisions. Ming Yan, the master of corpse civilization, was also killed in the operation.

This news made the prestige of the corpse civilization suddenly fall to the bottom.

The photos of Chen Mo and the legendary Purple Emperor standing together were made public by anonymous people, detonating public opinion in the universe.

Chen Mo's name quickly spread.

Before the Star Festival, most of the lives in the universe did not know this name. However, during the Star Festival, this name was born out of the eye, and it was amazing.

What's the reason, so much hatred of the corpse civilization has been attracted, so that they will do everything during the star festival?

This issue attracts the attention of major civilizations.

Being watched by many forces, intelligence was also sent to the public.

In the battle of the Sloan Great Wall just ended, a legion of corpse civilization was damaged in the hands of marching ant groups, and a famous general was also lost.

The intelligence of the marching ant group was extracted and displayed in front of the entire universe.

At this moment, the outside world knew what kind of forces the marching ant group arrived.

This silent force appeared without warning. After the panic change at Ganghong Bridge, it quickly occupied Pisces Whale and launched its strategy for the surrounding constellations.

Shepherd, and Sloan Great Wall.

With such a large army and forces, the outside world knows nothing about it.

The march ant group appeared this time with a blockbuster.

...

In a stationed galaxy outside the planet.

Ming Tu looked indifferently at the holographic planet that appeared in front of him. This is where the guards and warships of Mu Shi Tianxing, where the corpse civilization came, were stationed.

Chen Mo sent him a message, a letter of commendation: to wipe out all the warships and **** groups of the corpse civilization who came to the Star Monument.

This was the first time he left the old club after he left the corpse civilization.

This appellation is very suitable for his taste, so I can greet you well.

"action."

The voice of Ming Tu is mixed with infinite hatred and anger.

Behind the battleship where he is, a silent war department skimmed through space and disappeared into space.

chapters.title: Chapter 986: : Research Results Of Loinu
chapters.body:
Chapter 986: : Research Results Of Loinu

"The patriarch, the team headed to Mu's Tianxing, has..." Wu Kun knelt in front of the totem hall, sweating and sweating, daring to report the news completely. The news just returned was too shocking.

"What's wrong?" The old patriarch of the corpse civilization sitting in the center of the totem opened his eyes and his voice was thick.

"The whole army is wiped out." Wu Kun gritted his teeth and reported the final message.

Dead silence, dead silence.

The atmosphere in the totem hall seems to have solidified, pressing heavily on everyone in the field.

"Following the guards of the past, led by Ming Tu to slaughter the war department."

"What about video frequency?"

"it's here."

Wu Kun tapped the communication device in his hand a few times, and projected the video frequency into the Totem Hall.

From the siege of Chen Mo, to the opening of the space channel by Mo Nu to send the guards, and then the death of Ming Yan and Ming Qiyu, the process was complete. They even saw the incredible expression even when Ming Yan died.

The upper body of the corpse civilization in the totem hall shook uncontrollably, and did not know whether it was angry or frightened.

"Who of you can deal with marching ant groups?" The old patriarch's voice was much older.

No one spoke in the totem hall, all eyes and noses, and speaking at this time, speaking is not a good choice.

"Why not? Aren't you very good at fighting for the benefits? Now that you have paid, no one is there? Isn't there even a general who finds a leader?" The old patriarch's voice was ridiculed and angry. : "If you deal with other civilizations, you can have half of the benefits of your internal struggles. My civilization has already unified the universe."

None of the high-level civilizations in the Totem Hall dared to squeak.

The atmospheric pressure was terrible.

"Hand over half of the soldiers' power in each hand." The old patriarch's voice was terribly calm.

In the Totem Hall, many high-rises lowered their heads, their eyes blinking.

Carrie sat in a daze at the desk, her eyes darkened.

Since she stepped down as the shepherd's civilized star, trouble has continued.

She has thought about the future of the Shepherd City countless times. Once she was in the position of the star. Even if it is difficult, she is willing to make every effort to build this civilization. After all, this is where she grew up.

However, now that we are far from the center of power and looking at it from the perspective of ordinary life, we find that this civilization is dead.

I thought that after she stepped down, she would be able to survive peacefully, and now she found something naive.

In order to shirk Hongqiao's lost responsibility and cover up the incompetence of the high-level, the lord of the city overthrew the responsibility of her outgoing general, and she became the sinner of the shepherd civilization.

Going on like this, A Mao A [Biqu Ge www.xbqg5200.info] dog can come to mock her a few words.

When she truly loses everything, she will never let her go before her rival in the core power circle.

How to do?

Carrie looked blankly at the communication number in her hand.

Are you really here?

In the end, Carrie still dialed the number in her hand.

...

Thoughtful control!

This is the most detailed one of the special abilities that Zidi introduced to Chen Mo's memory card. Through the experience of these special abilities, Chen Mo only realized the terrible Zi Zi.

In theory, this ability is omnipotent.

Controlling time, space and matter is the highest form of mindfulness. But between the imagination and the limitation of life, even the Purple Emperor has only reached a certain stage, and can only control part of the matter, but not time and space.

The Purple Emperor stated in the record that this is the power of God.

This is God, not God-level life, but God who controls the universe.

This ability allows material molecules to decompose and reorganize material molecules.

"The 9816th."

Mo Nu took a stone and placed it on the white metal plate in front of Chen Mo. In front of him, Chen Mo is connected with various sensors to collect data on his body.

The bodies of Chen Mo and Mo Nu have undergone quantum development and have a higher level of life than all known life.

According to the theory of the ability of quantum life, the bodies of the two belong to the non-physical body, the quantum body of the non-energy body, immortal, and the reaction speed can reach Planck time, 10E-43 seconds, which is the shortest time.

They possess all the superpowers, the ability to control all particles in the universe, decompose and reorganize matter and body, move instantaneously, analyze matter, create life, manipulate time and space, predict the future, travel time and space, and cut off cause and effect.

As the Purple Emperor said, the body of the two is a treasure, but they have not found a suitable way to open the treasure.

Once they successfully master their physical abilities, they can dominate the universe and become the master of the universe.

The stone slowly floated under the control of Chen Mo on a small platform, and then, like weathering, a little sand fell down.

In five minutes, the stone with a big fist turned into a pile of sand and piled on a metal plate.

Suddenly, the heap of sand appeared again and again, a little bit of sand floated up and slowly condensed, and a stone as big as the original was formed. It's just that this stone is slightly different from the original stone.

Chen Mo stopped, unlocked the sensor on his body, and took a look at the stone of the small platform: "I will stop here today."

"it is good."

Mo Nu brought him his clothes and put them on.

"What about Xiaoyu and Zhao Min?" Chen Mo asked.

"Little fisher sister is on the earth, and Zhao Min’s recruitment of talents during the gala event, since the team of the corpse civilization was wiped out by us, many elite lives came to surrender, and many of them have hatred against the corpse civilization, Even the wanted criminal of the corpse civilization." Mo Nu said.

"Yes."

"Go and see the liveliness of the Star Forum."

Everyone is preparing for the Superpower Forum now.

"Below, I have asked Professor Loinu to publish his latest research results." After a super scientist published his research, the host named and focused his attention on Loinu.

Loin stood up slowly, politely greeted many of the colleagues on the court, and went to the podium.

As one of the top superpower scientists in the universe, Loinu has always been a talent for major civilizations. However, Loinu has no interest in going to a god-level civilization, so he conducts research in his own research room in a low-key manner. .

After more than a year Thinking, I finally decided to unconditionally announce this project to cosmic life and make my only contribution to cosmic life."

The field was silent.

Three hundred years of research by the top superpower scientist, the most important project in a lifetime.

Loinu's solemn voice made all life on the field attentive, and even the scenes of live forum speeches were gathered on Loinu, afraid of missing a historic moment.

"After my three hundred years of research, I discovered the code of the superpower gene of life. chapters.title: Chapter 987: :Influences
chapters.body:
Chapter 987: :Influences

At the Super Energy Forum, there was one shoulder behind the other.

Today, Loinu's disclosure of this technology has considerable impact.

Almost in the foreseeable future, this technology will change the life of the universe. At that time, it will be a new era of superpower.

All the experts of superpowers on the scene were attentively looking at the research results announced by Loinu, and looked excited.

"..."

The development of super-powerful technology is of great significance. If this technology is in his hands, what Professor Loinu wants, I am afraid that other civilizations will change, but he chooses to publish his research results for free at the Star Festival.

Tolerance admires the life of watching.

Even if the god-level civilization wants to block these messages, there is nothing it can do. Loinu's speech has been broadcast to all corners of the universe.

"The super-energy factor is the last dark cloud that lies on the head of the universe’s code of life. Although I initially touched the gate of super-energy, the reason and principle of its real formation are still a mystery. I wish that no matter what the future will be, the cosmic civilization And life can evolve in the general direction, and future life sciences can completely unlock the code of life in the universe."

Loinu finished his last sentence, applause rang from the field, enduring.

His public release of this research and development achievement has become the starting sign of the advent of the superpower era in later generations.

Suddenly, there was a commotion in the auditorium.

"The patriarch is here."

Mu Shizhong's figure appeared in the vision of many lives and was coming over to the forum.

All lives know what Mu Shizhong’s arrival means.

The announcement of the super-energy gene code and super-energy factor will undoubtedly have a huge impact on the life of the universe, and the choice to make it public at the star event is inestimable.

"Professor Loinu, hello." Mu Shizhong said politely.

"Hello, patriarch."

"Professor, did you choose to make your research public to life in the universe?" Mu Shizhong asked politely.

Loin nodded slightly: "Yes."

"Then do you want to make this research stand on the Star Monument, and respect this cosmic civilization's Kui Bao for future generations to admire." Mu Shi asked again.

There was an exclamation on the court.

In the Star Forest, there are maps left by Mu Shi Tianxing, which is the most sacred place. The general map steles are in some peripheral academic stele forests. They cannot enter the star stele forest at all. Only the studies that have a significant impact on science and cosmic civilization can enter the star stele forest for preservation.

"can."

Loino promised to come down and chose to make this achievement public, and now he felt relaxed.

"Mr. atmosphere." Mu Shizhong bowed solemnly to Loinu.

This achievement will likely change the pattern of cosmic civilization and the course of life, and will have an infinite impact on future generations.

...

"Mo Ge, this molecular formula is a bit similar to ours." Mo Mo beside Chen Mo said.

"Well." Chen Mo nodded.

"According to his research conclusion, the success rate is only one percent." Mo Nu said: "Shall we recruit this life?"

"No." Chen Mo shook his head: "Our development technology is several generations more advanced than him. We were exposed to mastering superpower technology originally, which came out to solicit afterwards and became a concern."

Chen Mo looked at several other directions in the forum.

Tong Qing, Zi Yun, Thunder, Hu Bingxin and others, as well as a mass of the world's top civilizations are all present. The purpose is obvious, and they are here to solicit.

He could not give the conditions of the god-level civilization, nor the reputation of the god-level civilization. In the eyes of outsiders, they were just a sudden rise and did not understand the details, so he now has little chance to recruit each other.

"Then we now?"

"Go to other forums, walk around, play around."

Chen Mo and Tong Qing stared at each other and turned to leave.

...

The research and development results announced by Loinu became the first achievements to be established in this star event.

This achievement was engraved into a map stele and placed in the most central area of the Star Forest. It was named [Loinu Map Stele] and was also called the super map stele by the outside world.

There have been no such public research results for tens of thousands of years.

The superpowered stele has just been established. For a time, the core area of the Star Forest was filled with superscientists from all over the universe. The content of the stele was also printed and recorded by video, and spread to all corners of the universe. In the hands of civilization.

There is no scramble within Shi Ganxing, and there is no war, because the technology is already public and there is no need to **** it. The civilizations who came to participate in the Star Festival are so calm that they are all hurrying to digest and record the results of this research.

And Loinu also received invitations from the major civilizations of the universe, hoping to join their civilization.

The name of Loinu has been successfully selected as one of the top 100 scientific giants in the universe, becoming a living legend.

This is predicting that the universe will lead to a new era of superpower.

...

In the holographic field in the study, images of Lan are suspended.

Lan is telling Chen Mo about the current situation of the universe.

According to Chen Mo, this superenergy factor molecular formula and the techniques he masters have similarities and similarities. They are somewhat similar, but different.

But even this is terrifying.

There are countless one-hundredths of life in the universe, which is also a huge number.

In the future, the major civilizations of the universe may also be improved on the basis of this molecular formula, the success rate will be higher and higher, the foundation will be laid, and this tall building will be higher and higher.

This technology has opened the gap between the top great civilizations and ordinary civilization soldiers. At the time of the chaos of the universe, the war will be more fierce. The soldiers of ordinary civilizations will no longer be weak. But the space at the top of the pyramid is limited.

Superpower development has changed the genes of life and changed the nerve structure of the brain. After the development of life, the reaction ability is the top. The strength of the armor division can be imagined.

The prince would rather be kind.

In chaotic times, the most important thing is a kind of life.

Lan had to admire this Loinu, and actually chose to publish this epoch-making technology for free.

After talking about the layout and situation of the current home, Lan asked: "Boss, are you still going to stay at Mu Shi Tianxing? Now there shouldn't be too big things."

After the last incident, it was fortunately Mo Mo's special ability, otherwise Chen Mo was really in trouble.

But Chen Mo wanted to stay on Mu Shi Tianxing, he could not object.

"For the time being here, I have a feeling that I should stay here now, maybe there will be some other gains." Chen Mo said.

His hunch is not out of thin air, because his body is so special now.

Lan thought about it, and then Feng Feng suddenly turned: "If so, you can pay attention to another message."

"what news?"

"The Star Chamber."

chapters.title: Chapter 988: : Star Chamber
chapters.body:
Chapter 988: : Star Chamber

Star Secret Chamber?

In Chen Mo's vocabulary, this is a new concept.

"A secret left by Mu's Tianxing in the Tianxing Secret Chamber in the Tianxing Stele Forest. The place where the secret is hidden is also called the Tianxing Secret Chamber. Mu Shi Tianxing once said that only the life closest to the gods can get the secret of the Tianxing Stele Forest. . And the **** he defined is the **** who controls the universe. For this reason, this secret is also called the secret of the gods."

Lan introduced to Chen Mo.

"Mu's Tianxing spent his entire life, building the Tianxing Stele Forest, and left that sentence at the end. The universe civilization has searched for hundreds of millions of years in the Tianxing Stele Forest, and recorded all the contents of the stele without missing a punctuation mark. The computer and artificial intelligence analyzed it, but did not find the secret, and later generations thought that the secret did not exist.

But every time the Tianxing Festival, the Great Civilization will look for this secret, because they all think that Mu Shi Tianxing does not need to tell this lie, so it is guessed that Mu Shi Tianxing used his special ability to hide the secret in a certain place in the Tianxing Stele Forest. It’s been removed, or it’s scattered and recorded in every tablet, but the rules are not found. "

Chen Mo listened very carefully. For the first time he heard that the Tianxing Stele Forest still has such a history.

The little mother beast beside her blinked her eyes as she ate the dried fruit while listening to the conversation between the two, and she didn't know if she understood it.

"Mu's Sky Star is also a god-level being, what is his ability?" Chen Mo asked curiously.

"His special ability is very mysterious, no one knows it in detail, and there is no record, and there is no record in the family tree of Mu's Sky Star. Therefore, the outside world has always believed that Mu's Sky Star used his special ability to hide this secret in the Star Forest Forest. According to the definition in his words, boss, you are the life closest to God, you can try to find this secret, maybe you will have special gains."

Lan told Chen Mo about the origins, and for any high-level civilization, these are not secrets.

The only secret is that the secret room does not exist.

...

Tong Qing's attention was on the holographic map of the Tianxing Stele Forest, his eyes were long and he didn't know what he was thinking. He didn't look up at her until Tara appeared.

"We sent an invitation letter to Professor Loinu, and he refused." Tara said.

As if expected, Tong Qing responded.

"What should I do next? Do you want?" Tara cut his throat on his neck, with murderous expression in his eyes.

"Technology has spread, no need." Tong Qing shook his head, his face calm: "This day will always come, just a little later or a little earlier, I thought it would be a little later, I didn't expect it to come so suddenly."

"Then what do we do next?"

"What do you think I am here for? Is it really to participate in this forum?"

Tong Qing's eyes returned to the holographic map of the Star Stele Forest.

"At this special time, there is nothing particularly important. I really don’t necessarily come to this starry gala in person. It’s all for the secret room of the star. The Ziyun of Ziwei civilization has stayed here for a few years. You think it’s coming. Are you traveling?"

"Speaker, does the Star Chamber really exist?" Tara asked curiously.

Hitomi nodded slightly, and said firmly, "Existence."

"However, life in the universe has been searched for hundreds of millions of years. Why has it never appeared? The Mu's Sky Star family has checked the records of Mu's Sky Star. Their family is not sure whether Mu's Sky Star has left a secret in Sky Star. Forest of Steles, I haven't found even a clue yet."

"If Mu's Sky Star's ability was so easy to find, it wouldn't be him." Tong Qing said.

"Then what should I do now? Can you still find it?"

"Look." Tong Qing said without hesitation, suddenly remembering something, and then said: "Is the information about the woman next to Chen Mo clear?"

"No, that woman's special ability is very special, it seems to open the space channel." Tara said.

During the sneak attack on Chen Mo's team by the Underworld Civilization, the space teleportation ability displayed by Mo Nu was recorded, shaking all the great civilizations in Mu's Sky Star. This special ability, if used properly, is very scary.

Many civilizations are now paying attention to the Mo Girl next to Chen Mo.

However, they couldn't determine the exact location of the headquarters of the marching ant group now.

I always thought she was an assistant to Chen Mo, but after the last sneak attack, this idea changed completely.

"Let them continue to figure out a way to follow up." Tong Qing said.

He needs to determine how many beings with this ability are in Chen Mo's hands, one or two, or ten or twenty, which belong to the controllable range, but if there are thousands of beings with this ability, the universe will have to be rewritten. Up.

"Notify the laboratory and find a way to engrave this ability."

"Understand." Tara nodded and said, "Speaker, there is one more thing."

"Say."

"The spies reported that Chen Mo, who was silent during this period, appeared in the Forest of Star Steles just now."

"Oh?" Hitomi's expression condensed, and slowly got up from the seat: "I'll go over and take a look."

...

Chen Mo appeared in the Star Stele Forest, and the news fell into the ears of many forces.

Since the mission of the Pluto civilization was destroyed, and the **** fleet stationed outside the Star Stele was completely wiped out, Chen Mo has rarely appeared in public in front of the outside world. Now it has appeared publicly in the Star Stele Forest, which immediately attracted the attention of many civilizations.

This ruthless man, from the beginning of his namelessness to the present renown in the universe, it didn't take long.

Every time it appears, it will lead to a big storm.

It can be said that Chen Mo is one of the focus figures at the Tianxing Festival. Upon learning that Chen Mo had appeared in the Star Stele Forest, major civilizations sent personnel there.

Chen Mo appeared again in the Star Stele Forest, this time there were still not many guards, at least not many guards on the bright side.

In addition to the ten guards led by Ku Yao, Mo Nu and Jing Ge, as well as the little mother beast. For the sake of safety, Xiao Yu was sent back to Earth by Mo Nu opening the door of space. Zhao Min also arranged the recruitment of talents behind the scenes.

Hundreds of millions of lives are flying in the Tianxing Stele Forest.

The most densely populated area is the core area of the stele forest. The stele from Loinu was erected and occupied by life everywhere in the universe.

For this reason, the Mu's Tianxing family had to temporarily take over the Tianxing Stele Forest, restricting the traffic here, and fixing the traffic opening at each time by appointment.

Avoid major problems in the Tianxing Stele Forest.

The area other than the Loinutu Monument is still the same as before, and there are many lives to visit, but it is not yet at the point where the mountains become the sea.

With the cover of battle armor, Chen Mo and his party were not recognized.

"Brother Mo, how should I find it?" Mo Nu asked.

"I don't know. The Star Stele Forest is so big, there are countless pictures, and a secret is hidden. It's really not that easy to find."

Chen Mo stroked the little mother beast in his arms without any clue.

The secret of the Star Secret Chamber has been hidden for hundreds of millions of years since the death of Mu’s Heavenly Star. Many picture tablets have been decayed and weathered for hundreds of millions of years, and some have even been replaced again and again.

If Mu's Sky Star hid the secret in the original picture tablet, I am afraid that this secret has already been submerged in the long river of time.

Mu's Sky Star belongs to one of the smartest beings in the history of the universe. It is impossible to even think of these, so it is impossible to hide the secret in a certain monument.

Therefore, if there is a secret, Chen Mo guessed that the biggest thing is probably to disperse all the secret narratives in each tablet, and then combine these words through a certain rule.

The little mother beast was eating the dried fruit with her small paws, her round eyes blinked, very cute, let Chen Mo touch it.

Xiao Yu returned to Earth, but the little mother beast stayed and followed Chen Mo.

Suddenly, the little mother beast was stunned for a moment, stopped the dried fruit she was eating, and looked towards the center of the Tianxing Monument Forest.

chapters.title: Chapter 989: : The Discovery Of Mo Nu
chapters.body:
Chapter 989: : The Discovery Of Mo Nu

"Momomo~~~" The little mother beast patted Chen Mo's arm and pointed in the direction of the center of the Tianxing Stele Forest. Her big eyes blinked, very cute.

"There is something there?"

Chen Mo was taken aback and looked at the direction where the little mother beast's claws pointed.

"Momo." The little mother beast nodded.

"Then go take a look." Following the direction the little mother beast pointed, Chen Mo led a group of people to fly over. Since he met the little mother beast, this little guy occasionally gave people some unexpected surprises.

After flying for about half an hour, Chen Mo and his party stopped in the air above the forest of steles.

Everyone looked at the little mother beast, waiting for its answer.

"Momo~Momo." The two little claws of the little mother beast gestured around.

"Things are here?"

Chen Mo glanced around, except for observing the life of the star map stele, nothing special.

"What is it?" Chen Mo asked.

"Momomo!"

The little mother beast stretched her paws and gestured while talking. Soon, Chen Mo understood what it was trying to say.

A hole?

What hole is there?

Chen Mo looked around carefully, and didn't see any special holes or the like.

"Look around and see if there is something like a secret room at the entrance." Chen Mo suddenly thought of a possibility, but was not sure.

"Yes."

The ten guards began to scatter around, looking for the hole said by the little mother beast.

The surrounding people were watching the life of the picture tablet, and they were suddenly attracted by their movements.

"Are they looking for life?" a life looking at the stele asked curiously.

"When you come to the Star Stele Forest, you can still find life. In addition to looking for the picture tablet, it is the legendary Star Secret Chamber." Another life has already seen no surprises, with a sneer in his voice: "The Star Secret Chamber is still uncertain whether it exists. And hundreds of millions of years have passed, maybe it's already annihilated for a long time, and there are still life illusions."

The two beings looked at Chen Mo and others who were looking for a mockery and continued to focus on their own affairs.

...

The Mo girl also tended to follow Chen Mo, she was also looking for the hole described by the little mother beast, but she didn't find anything at first glance.

Suddenly, her gaze was fixed in the sky ahead.

She felt the difference in this area, but couldn't tell the difference.

The super-state appeared, causing Mo Nu's body to emit a faint blue light, and her temperament also changed, becoming extremely mysterious.

Mo Nu's beautiful eyes swept over the Tianxing Stele Forest.

She felt a clear difference now, not because the forest of steles was wrong, but the space was wrong. In her sense of super state, this space is a little different from the surrounding space.

A strange feeling came up, Mo Nu noticed that her body was slowly changing, and the invisible space gap in front of her slowly grew wider in her eyes.

Chen Mo was searching for the hole said by the little mother beast, and found nothing unusual.

"Mo Girl." Chen Mo was stunned as soon as he turned his head.

Mo Nu is missing?

"What's the matter? What about Mo Girl?" Chen Mo looked around, but didn't find Mo Girl's trace, and turned to ask Ku Yao.

"Report to the King, I just saw Goddess Mo's body suddenly disappeared, like your special ability, hidden in the space out of thin air. She seems to have activated the super state, I thought she was using a special ability." Ku Yao Hurry back.

"Ok?"

Chen Mo was stunned. If Mo Nu was going to do anything, she would definitely tell him first. Without even thinking about it, Chen Mo hurriedly connected Mo Nu's quantum communicator.

...

At the same time, Chen Mo didn't know that a group of people were watching them far away from the Tianxing Stele Forest.

"What are they looking for?" Tara asked curiously.

"I'm afraid only they know."

Hitomi watched Chen Mo and others searching intently, telling him intuitively that what Chen Mo was looking for was very important.

Their armor was disguised and integrated into the life of ordinary visiting the Star Stele Forest. The outside world could not see his true face at all, let alone know that the famous Tongqing had arrived here in the Star Stele Forest and was paying attention to Chen Mo.

As the two spoke, the green pupils of the pupils changed rapidly, a little surprised and puzzled.

Mo Nu was right under his nose and disappeared in place without warning. This situation is a bit like Chen Mo's ability. However, there is no fighting here, why disappear here for no reason?

what happened?

Tara suddenly remembered something, her expression full of shock.

"Speaker, are they looking for the Star Secret Chamber? Do you want to go there?"

"Watch first, don't move."

Tong Qing also had some expectations. He was expecting that Chen Mo could surprise him.

If their ability can find the secret room of the star, then Mu's star will not be so peaceful. The emergence of a secret that has been hidden for hundreds of millions of years will surely attract a lot of noise.

...

Mo Nu didn't know what was going on, just in a daze, everything happened.

At this time, Mo Nu was in a strange space, no other beings were found, and the surroundings were completely empty.

On the barriers of space, there are colored lights, and you can't see farther. The surroundings are very quiet, no sound can be heard. There are no stars in the sky, but it is not dark here.

Brother Mo is gone, and the forest of Star Steles is gone.

Mo Nu can be sure that she is in a different space from the outside.

"Brother Mo?"

Mo Nu yelled, but did not hear a response, nor did the ordinary wireless communication. The next moment, the War Armor’s Quantum Communicator remembered, but without even thinking, Mo Nu connected to the communication.

"Brother Mo."

"Where are you?" Chen Mo was obviously relieved when he finally contacted.

"I'm in a strange space." Mo Nui looked around and said.

"Strange space?"

Chen Mo's spirit was shocked. It should be the hole that the little mother beast said. Once, when the little mother beast described the small universe, it also said it was a hole.

"Are you in danger now?"

"No, this space is small."

Mo Nu focused her attention on the objects in the space. In front of her, there were nine steles with the same style as those in the Star Stele Forest. On top of the steles, a book was quietly placed.

Nine picture tablets and a book?

Star Secret Chamber?

Almost at the same time, Chen Mo thought of the Star Chamber.

No wonder countless lives have not been found for hundreds of millions of years. It turns out that the Star Chamber is in a folding space in the Star Stele Forest.

"Now go and take a look at the content of the picture tablet." Chen Mo said.

"it is good."

The camera of the Ink Girl's Battle Armor was scanned across the nine tablets, and the content on it was recorded verbatim.

Over the Tianxing Stele Forest, Chen Mo's body was still in the air, looking at the contents recorded on the tablet that Mo Nu passed back in surprise.

The content recorded by the picture stele is the growth and development process of Mu Shi Tianxing's own super powers, which are astonishing hundreds of types. Mu Shi Tianxing is a multi-powered person with hundreds of species.

The situation of Mu's Heavenly Star was beyond the scope of ordinary god-level beings.

This is a very shocking news.

It's a pity that he can't live forever, even with such a powerful life, he still can't escape the erosion of time.

"Pick up the book on the tablet and take a look." Chen Mo said, "Be careful and pay attention to whether there is any danger around."

"it is good."

Mo Nu floated to the stele and slowly stretched out her hand to press on the book.

The material of the book is a special material, like jade but not. The texture is harder and much lighter than jade. This material has been placed in this space for hundreds of millions of years, but it has not been corroded by the years.

The moment Mo Nu picked up the book, a sudden change occurred.

chapters.title: Chapter 990: : From The Great War
chapters.body:
Chapter 990: : From The Great War

The colored streamer of the space secret room suddenly rippled.

On the Star Stele Forest, there was a wave of spatial fluctuations.

In the sky above the stele in front of Chen Mo, a huge colored ripple appeared, nine mirages of the stele, and the shadow of a female armor appeared in the sky, but they were not physical.

"A mirage?"

"Is there a mirage over the Tianxing Stele Forest?"

"The shadow is like a star map monument, why is there a mirage here?"

"Is the legend true? That is the projection of the Star Chamber?"

A single stone caused a thousand waves, and a mirage appeared above the Tianxing Forest of Steles, and the mirage was like the picture of the Tianxing Forest of Steles. The news was immediately spread.

And the mirage is slowly clearing, it seems to become a reality.

...

"It's this guy again. You can make a little movement anywhere." Hu Bingxin Meimou looked at the situation in the holographic image in surprise, and immediately ordered: "Call the guards immediately, go to the Star Forest Forest, and let the fleet prepare. The elite team immediately Hurry to the Tianxing Stele Forest, don't let them get the contents first."

"Yes." Shi Ming nodded.

The other guards are ready.

"set off."

The elite team headed up to the highest speed and headed towards the Tianxing Stele Forest.

At the same time, Thor Civilization, Ziwei Civilization, Endless Sea, Wuxian Civilization, etc. all made big moves, and all members went to the Tianxing Stele Forest.

The picture of the mirage spread, plus the strangeness of Chen Mo's team, they are most likely to be sure that it is the legendary Star Chamber.

The Star Chamber really exists,

...

"It seems I was the first to arrive."

Thunder's armor hovered in the air, and he could see spatial ripples in the air from this position.

The mirage is becoming full and clear, and Thunder is no longer calm.

For hundreds of millions of years, mirages have also appeared in the Star Stele Forest, and they are also like a picture stele. They will appear every once in a while in different corners of the Star Stele Forest.

This is also the reason why the legend about the existence of the Star Chamber can be passed down for hundreds of millions of years.

The mirage in front of him had one more figure than before. The silhouette of this figure was similar to that of the woman next to Chen Mo. Now Chen Mo seems to be in the center, which also confirmed his guess.

The woman entered the Star Chamber.

The mirage has become so real that it can almost be judged that there is a folding space hidden in the Tianxing Stele Forest.

The spatial fluctuation detected by the battle armor is absolutely true.

Being able to create a folding space in this area, this special ability made Thunder feel extremely admired, and his heart floated with respect for the legendary character of Mu Shi Tianxing.

In an instant, Thunder's eyes recovered, and his heart was extremely calm.

He stopped thinking about other things, and compared with the Star Secret Chamber, other problems seemed trivial.

Pop!

The atmosphere around him exploded, mixed with sonic booms, and the battle armor no longer meant to pretend, and the speed suddenly accelerated. He is like a peerless soldier forward, making no secret of his aura.

By his side, each guard's expression became excited, and the fighting spirit was raging. The armor was restored to its original appearance, and every guard was like a sword out of its sheath, vowing to drink the enemy's blood.

"First control the entrance and notify the guards to come to the forest of steles and let the fleet come to Mu's Sky Star." Lei Ting said in a deep voice, looking around the scene.

"Understand." Many of the guards were shocked.

"There may be a big secret hidden in the Star Secret Chamber, which is related to the future of my thunder civilization and must be taken down." Lei Ting shouted softly, his eyes bursting into battle, and in his hand, the sword was unsheathed.

"War." Many guards shouted in unison, their eyes flashed with fanaticism, and all their weapons were unsheathed.

Thunder raised the sword in his hand and shouted, "Thunder God."

The thunder's blood was surging, turbulent like a rainbow, and entered a super state, his aura reached an unprecedented height. In the sky above the Star Stele Forest, the aura that seemed solid, like fireworks in the dark night, was extremely conspicuous.

His raging aura affected the surrounding guards.

They felt a fanatical flame burning in their chests, and their blood continued to accelerate, all of them entered a super state, showing their strength.

Even in this sacred and inviolable forest of Stars of Heaven, they have no scruples. The blood eroded every cell of them, making them excited involuntarily.

At this moment, even if there is a sea of swords and flames ahead, or even the road to hell, they will not have any fear.

All the guards raised their weapons and shouted: "Thor."

Before the words fell, Thunder took the lead and turned into an afterimage in the air, flying towards the opening of the space that was constantly emerging, followed by the guards.

In an instant, the fighting spirit raged.

...

The waves spreading out of the space hole disturbed the space of Mu Shi Tianxing, and the atmosphere raged turbulently.

Chen Mo allowed the turbulent wind to stand still in front of the space cave.

He looked at the thunder flying towards here, as well as other lives, and felt the raging fighting spirit and unparalleled momentum. His eyes became calm, the blue gloomy light floated, and his eyes became cold, like gods. Overlooking the mortal world.

In the super state, Chen Mo could clearly feel the fighting spirit, and every part of the armor was urged to the extreme.

Through the battle armor, he saw a world without emotion, everything was cold without temperature, and every detail of the world became clear in his eyes, even if it was a stream of atmosphere.

"That's the Star Chamber."

I don't know which life yelled in the public channel, and for a while, there was a commotion in the life of the entire Tianxing stele forest.

There is only one direction of spatial fluctuation.

Space gradually emerged, and the swarming war armor divisions saw this scene, and their hearts became more anxious. The speed of Thor's Civilization War armor also accelerated a little, and the momentum was like a rainbow.

The battle armor divisions of other civilizations only hesitated slightly, and quickly decided that all the battle armor flew over here.

If the Sky Star Secret Chamber is occupied by Thor civilization, they will have nothing.

Chen Mo is at the center, but the movement of the Thor Civilization is the most obvious. Almost all the armored divisions on the field have set their targets on the Thor Civilization, which is the most threatening force on the field.

...

Now it's up to see who is faster, facing the tide of War Armored Division, Thunder is unmoved.

His speed suddenly exploded, the roaring sonic boom ignited the restlessness of the Star Stele Forest, and there was a thick silence in the sky, like a comet falling from the sky, pointing straight to the center of the ripples in the space.

"Protect the king."

The captain of the guard drank, and the guards who followed Thor quickly accelerated and drew a graceful arc of motion in the air. The front of the arc was facing the war-armored division encircled in all directions.

As for the front of Thunder, they ignored it. In their opinion, no one was the king's opponent.

And right in front of Thunder is the bitter dragon.

Kulong's expression was dignified, the other party didn't mean to retreat, his aura was like a rainbow, he shouted, and his whole aura rose.

The battle armor was urged to the extreme, the blue engine flame, like a dream, with a long spear in hand, and a small short pulse laser covering the blade of the spear, standing in the high air, with a certain force in the air.

In an instant, with the bitter dragon as the center, the water mist in the atmosphere suddenly rose, the sonic boom spread to the surroundings, the bitter dragon disappeared quickly, and the momentum was directed towards the thunder, without any fear.

At the moment when the two sides approached, the long spears that were charged out, such as the dragon exploring the abyss, the slight sonic boom on the spear head turned the atmosphere into nothingness.

Woo!

A weird scream appeared in the atmosphere, and the spear pointed like a dragon, heading towards Thunder's chest.

This scene made the war-armored division onlookers startled.

One shot is the strongest method, there is no meaning to keep hands.

It was Chen Mo's guard again.

Last time, Chen Mo's guard was amazing enough, and now there is another one.

Kulong's fighting consciousness has been locked on Thunder, as long as the opponent has the intention to escape, the tip of the gun will follow the escape trajectory he predicted. The target is in the front, and everyone knows that this gun must deal with it head-on, and there is no way to back down.

It's that terrible fighting spirit again.

Some armored divisions observed the smell of the shot that Ku Yao stabbed.

An indomitable trend.

The ambition to be trapped is death but no life.

Shenwei is a guard group that has never appeared in front of the great civilization, but it does not mean that they are weaker than anyone. With the support of science and technology from the marching ant group at no cost, and the meticulous creation of Lan, they are preparing to appear in front of the stage one day.

Accumulate thin hair, soar into the sky.

The performance of the guards made the onlookers shine, however, other armored divisions were not optimistic, because his opponent was Thunder.

Once singled out and defeated the former speaker of the Black Eye civilization.

...

"Good come."

The fighting spirit on Thunder was stronger.

Every cell in his body was excited, his flesh and blood became fiery, it seemed that there was thunder light flowing, and thunder humming in his body.

The armor can sense his excitement, and the power will be maximized.

As the king of Thor's civilization, his battle armor is a collection of the top technology of Thor's civilization, tailor-made for Thunder, and can perfectly match his abilities.

Facing the bitter dragon's spear, the blade of the long sword in Thunder's hand suddenly bursts with hot short-pulse laser light, as if it was inlaid with a dark blue, and under the beautiful appearance was the most dangerous aura.

In the depths of Thunder's pupils, the flashing pupils of thunder light became extremely deep.

哧~

The sound of air rubbing against the blade is transmitted in the atmosphere.

As long as the dragon meets the divine sword.

The spear was cut into two sections under the sword, the metal humming sounded very harshly, and the sword came towards his chest.

Hearing the bitter dragon snorted slightly, the long sword followed his shoulder, the wound reached his waist, the energy core of the armor was destroyed, and it fell straight from the air.

Only one sword shook the armored division above the Tianxing Stele Forest.
