As for Chen Mo, who stood in front of the ripples of the space hole and watched this scene, there was no change in his expression, his pupils exuding pale blue light were extremely calm.

chapters.title: Chapter 991: : Consciousness Is The Fourth Dimension Matter?
chapters.body:
Chapter 991: : Consciousness Is The Fourth Dimension Matter?

Thunder's sword shocked the Tianxing Stele Forest.

Outside life is not clear about the strength of the bitter dragon, but judging from the action, even some famous divisions in battle may not be able to take it. With such strength, he was severely injured by Thunder's sword.

Thunder stopped in the sky above the Star Stele Forest, the long sword in his hand flickered, and the aura was strong, the battle armor's eyes were cold, looming arrogant, strong and unruly.

He did not move, but shocked the audience, giving a strong sense of oppression.

Countless lives around looked up at Thunder, with awe.

Since his rise, his name has always been weak. Now many lives have realized that this is the real strength of Thunder.

All the lives of Thor's civilization couldn't help crying wildly, looking up at Thunder with fiery eyes.

This is their king.

Strong, arrogant, unruly, fearless.

This is the character that their Thor civilization should have.

Their king, standing at the center of the universe's attention with the help of the sky, this figure is deeply inscribed in the hearts of every citizen of Thor Civilization and becomes their new faith.

"He already has Dan's shadow."

"Thor Civilization has such a king, it is also a lucky thing."

The lives onlookers whispered.

The performance of Thunder just now shocked countless lives. When the Thunder came to power, many lives were skeptical about whether this young Thor tribe could manage the huge Thor civilization.

At this time, the thunder like a **** of war convinced the outside world.

In the era of the armor system, force is one of the convincing conditions.

At this time, the thunder was floating in the air, turning a deaf ear to everything around him. His attention has been on Chen Mo who is standing in front of the space ripples.

When he was preparing for the next move, four figures suddenly appeared, blocking his front.

Bitter Yao, bitter flowing clouds, bitter heart, bitter stone.

Four guards.

"Your Excellency, stay here." Ku Yao's spear was in his hand, looking directly at Thunder, not afraid.

The other three guards were silent, but the spears in their hands all flickered.

The guards who can follow Chen Mo are the strongest in the guard team, and they are not afraid of any life.

Thunder didn't seem to see the guards appearing, and his eyes were still on the mirage.

...

Chen Mo was indifferent to everything around him, he was waiting for the opening of the space hole.

He can't walk away here. Once the Star Secret Chamber is opened, Mo Nu will become a target of public criticism, and they are about to face more and more terrifying enemies.

The ripples in space are expanding, and the scene of the mirage is getting clearer.

Every second, the ripples in the space will become stronger and stronger, and the fluctuations will become bigger and bigger. This is similar to the recovery of space folding, which releases huge energy fluctuations and spatial fluctuations every moment.

As the fluctuations grew, Mo Nu's figure became clearer and clearer.

You can almost see the true content.

But if you touch it with your hands, you will find that you can't touch the person at all, and they are not in the same space.

At the same time, Chen Mo was still browsing the content of the book passed back by Mo Nu.

A conjecture about the existence of life in the fourth dimension of the universe, and in the book how to control time, space, elementary particles and energy.

In the fourth dimension of life, Chen Mo is now half-footed into the door.

Time, space, elementary particles, and energy are the essence of the universe. He has the ability to control these, but he lacks a key.

This key is sometimes just an inspiration.

As for the appearance of touch, it can be anything.

The essence of time is the constant movement and change of elementary particles, and all this requires consciousness to feel.

The aging of life is a trace of time, that is, the particles in the life body are moving and changing.

When the stone is weathered, the particles are also moving and changing.

There is no space without matter particles and consciousness particles, because there is no matter movement, and there is no consciousness to feel the changes of time.

The particles of the universe are constantly moving, and the combined time axis is forward.

Back in time is to restore all the particles in the universe to the position and form of the previous second. From the point of view of consciousness, that is back in time.

It can be seen how difficult it is to restore all the material particles and energy in the universe to the position and form of the last second at the same time.

Only the higher-dimensional life that can control all the particles in the universe can control time in this way. Just as life can control the timeline of the virtual reality world, program algorithms are the soul of virtual reality.

To control all particles in the universe, higher-dimensional life needs to find the ‘program algorithm’ of the nature of matter.

And what can feel the time change is consciousness.

Consciousness particles are fourth-dimensional matter.

The third-dimensional matter cannot escape the shackles of time, space, elementary particles and energy, while consciousness can transcend time and space. It is faster than a light beam and is not restricted by the highest speed of normal matter. It can imagine and create existing matter. Objects that are not in the universe transform matter.

The time in the physical universe cannot flow back on its own, while the time in the conscious universe can flow back or accelerate with consciousness.

All the particles in the universe are controlled by consciousness at the same time. This consciousness is the ‘program algorithm’ of the universe.

Consciousness particles are fourth-dimensional matter.

Chen Mo was indifferent to all the conjecture theories, but was shocked by this short sentence.

Chen Mo entered a very mysterious state.

He can see every particle in the atmosphere moving, and as far as he can see, it is a world without color and temperature, and everything is made of particles.

Only the masses of consciousness matter in the life body are constantly beating.

...

Thunder's armor was a little scarred, and the long sword in his hand was much dim with the short-pulse laser, with gaps all over it.

He has not been able to break through the joint interception of the four guards.

The cooperation of the four guards made him feel a headache. They belonged to the gods and guards, and they were both unknown, which surprised Thunder. Their battles were very tacit, and they cooperated closely to make up for each other's shortcomings.

"It's terrible. It can stop the four of us from joining forces." There was admiration in the painful voice.

Before that, they had encountered a life that could resist their cooperation, only instructor Jing Ge. Their cooperation in close combat was taught by Instructor Lan, and they had experienced thousands of trials with bare hands on the primitive planet.

Being able to be the life of Thor's civilization is indeed not an ordinary life.

It's terrible.

The expressions under Kuliuyun and Kushishi battle armor were solemn.

But attention never dared to leave the Thunder.

Just now Kulong Yijian was severely injured, and they did not dare to take it lightly.

The most calm one is Ku Yao. He has experienced the sneak attack and siege of the meditation civilization. He has seen the legendary Zidi easily block the siege of eight top armored elites with ease. Facing the thunder and blocking the four of them, he Not surprising.

The top bunch of lives are very scary.

The other guards of Thor's Civilization were entangled, because the strength gap was not too big, so although the guards were downwind, there was no danger for a short time. Jing Ge's situation was even worse than that of Thunder. He was besieged by six Armored Divisions, and his strength and momentum were not weaker than Thunder.

Fortunately, there were not many guards following the Thunder this time.

The battle was a bit fierce,

...

Thunder looked a little embarrassed, but he could feel the cells of his body become more excited, and the light of thunder was transmitted between flesh and blood, making his aura more powerful.

He evaluated Chen Mo's ability to defend, but he still underestimated him.

The strength of these four guards is not weaker than that of the previous one. The four guards have obviously gone through long-term cooperation training and are in an extremely tacit understanding.

Their abilities are very strange, they seem to be able to predict his next move in advance, and they cooperate tacitly to resolve his attacks and even counterattack him before he starts.

In his impression, this special ability, similar to foresight, can only be found in the life of the endless sea.

The four guards, placed in other places, are definitely battle armor masters.

Even with the four opponents, Thunder is still not afraid, and the battle intent in his heart is constantly rising. As the battle intent rises, the thunder light in his body flows faster.

This is the ability of Thor's civilization.

He suddenly raised the long sword in his hand and fixed his eyes on Ku Yao.

As the fighting spirit continued to rise, his aura became stronger and stronger, the thunder light under his skin seemed to be activated, and his body was like a drum, accompanied by the roar of thunder.

The four guards looked solemn, and they could feel the thunder becoming more and more dangerous.

Just as the Thunder was preparing to do something, a wave came from behind, and a strange buzzing sound appeared.

All beings turned their eyes to the source of the movement.

For a time, the eyes of all lives were hot.

chapters.title: Chapter 992: : The Book In Her Hand
chapters.body:
Chapter 992: : The Book In Her Hand

"It seems that this Secret Chamber of Heavenly Stars really exists." Emperor Wei looked at the mirage above the Forest of Heavenly Star Tablets and said in surprise.

"Nonsense, it's all in front of you." The Emperor Yu responded coldly, and they could all see that under the armor radar, the spatial fluctuations in front of the mirage were especially obvious: "If there is a small universe hidden behind it, then the matter will be big. That’s it."

"You really dare to think about it." Emperor Wei smiled slightly: "I am afraid that Mu's star is not at peace this time. It seems that staying here is an adventure."

Between the two, Emperor Wu suddenly spoke and smiled: "If you don't even have the courage to take risks, what about fighting for the universe?"

"That's right." Yudi nodded: "Now it is estimated that the warships of all major civilizations are coming to the main galaxy to see who has the strongest strength and who will take the initiative. Tongqing needs a dike, Shi Ganxing's time, his method It's obvious."

"That's not necessarily." Emperor Wu said with a sneer: "Tongqing may not be able to gain the advantage. After all, this is different from Shi Ganxing. The Star Festival is at the right time, the universe is gathering, and all major civilizations have fleets stationed outside. It's really chaotic. Can't escape."

Emperor Yu and Emperor Wei were both taken aback and nodded slightly.

"After all, this place is different from Shi Ganxing. The Mu family has absolute control over this place, and it is their base camp. The Mu family will not sit back and watch. Moreover, all of us who come in do not have high-energy weapons and weapons of destruction, so here It will be chaotic, but the entire galaxy will not be destroyed like Shiganxing."

The content discussed by the three emperors made the guards around them extremely admired.

"What should we do next? Watch or participate?"

"If you have a chance, you will fight, and if you don't have a chance, you will be on the sidelines. After all, god-level civilization will come, and other big civilizations will come. Whoever is targeted will suffer." Emperor Wu thought for a while and said: "If there really is a big secret in the Star Secret Chamber, this time , Don’t want to swallow it alone."

Suddenly, the alert sound of the battle armor echoed in the ear, and the three expressions moved, and their eyes focused on the direction of the mirage.

The other onlookers saw a scene in the sky, their faces changed.

...

The ripples in the space expanded from the middle, a small hole appeared, and the picture inside was becoming clear.

The atmosphere flows back, forming an atmospheric vortex in front of the cave entrance, rushing into the cave entrance, forming a strong wind outside, surging endlessly.

The sharp buzzing sound swept across the sky above the Star Stele Forest, like ten thousand wolves roaring together,

Right below the ripples of space, the earth is moving, the surrounding space is shaking, and all the monuments are standing still.

There was movement below the most central piece of land, and nanoworms suddenly emerged from the ground, corroding the surrounding soil, and slowly piled up, seeming to be building a platform.

Under the eyes of everyone, a huge platform composed of nano-robots floats at a speed visible to the naked eye, leading to the bottom of the ripples of space, awe-inspiring.

is coming.

The onlookers kept their eyes on it. They saw this kind of abnormality in the Star Stele Forest for the first time, and everyone had a strong premonition in their hearts.

The secret of the Star Chamber is about to appear.

Boo! !

A sound as if the bubble was breaking sounded in the ears of the onlookers, weak but real. The space secret room seems to have reached its limit. When the platform is formed, it completely disappears, and that space is as if a folded quilt is straightened.

A faint sound appeared, like a signal.

Immediately afterwards, the first tablet fell on a high platform and was fixed by the spreading nano-robots. The second picture monument followed closely, and a huge picture monument stood on the high platform.

The third piece!

Fourth piece!

...

Numerous beings stared with breathlessly, and every tablet appeared, which made the lives onlookers excited and excited.

After a while, nine monuments landed perfectly on the platform formed by the nano-robot and were fixed on it. As the brilliance brought by the spatial fluctuation disappeared, the true face of the picture monument was revealed in front of the entire universe.

hiss!

The light of the clouds dissipated, and the nine steles were obviously a lot taller than the steles in the Tianxing stele forest.

The dust has appeared for hundreds of millions of years, and the vicissitudes of the vicissitudes of the picture monument has dispersed.

Chen Mo, who stood in front of the stele, looked up at the stele, but there was no wave in her heart.

Mo Nu was standing on the stele. When the spatial fluctuation disappeared completely, she slowly landed next to Chen Mo and stood quietly without disturbing Chen Mo who was thinking.

After the shock, the star stele forest was silent.

Many lives are still in a daze.

Legend has it that the hundreds of millions of years of the Star Chamber really existed, and it appeared before their eyes.

"The book in her hand."

Not knowing which life, shouted in the public channel.

All lives subconsciously looked at the book in Mo Nuv's hand. Mo Nu was the first being to enter the Secret Chamber of Stars, and when the Secret Chamber of Stars appeared, she had an extra book in her hand.

Judging from the style of the book, it is the legacy of Mu Shi Tianxing.

The eyes of all beings are fervent and fierce.

Mu Shi Tianxing is known as one of the great men in the history of cosmic civilization and the smartest being in the history of cosmic civilization. He has exhausted his mind to hide secrets for hundreds of millions of years, which is definitely not an ordinary secret.

Even Lei Ting's eyes focused on the book in Mo Nuv's hand.

As the king of Thor's civilization, he still knows some special cosmic secrets. There is a secret, only the Mu's Heavenly Star family and those in power of several god-level civilizations know it.

The Star Chamber exists, and Mu's Star has left behind the conjecture leading to life in the fourth dimension.

The fourth dimension of life.

This name fascinates all life.

Being the fourth-dimensional life means that they can control the time of the universe, have immortal life, immortal body, and the ability to control all life and matter in the universe.

There is nothing more tempting than this secret.

Staring at Chen Mo, he had an urge to kill the opponent for the first time.

Judging from Chen Mo's performance and his current power, he is definitely a strong opponent in the future cosmic hegemony. Now the secret of becoming a higher-dimensional life is in Chen Mo's hands. This raises the level of danger that Chen Mo is in his heart to the same level as Tongqing, or even surpasses Tongqing.

Almost instantly, the Thunder made up their minds.

The battle armor was mobilized to the extreme, and Thunder's figure disappeared in place, leaving only the roar of drum thunder.

The four guards including Ku Yao had no time to react.

At this moment, Chen Mosuo's eyes were fully restored to focus, the battle armor's eyes also lit up, and he looked up at Thunder. The lightning-fast figure became clearly visible in his eyes.

...

"The Star Secret Chamber in the Star Forest of Steles appeared."

"Thunder God civilization and Chen Mo's forces have fought in the Tianxing Tablet Forest."

"The fleets of the major civilizations stationed on the periphery of the Tianxing Tablet have been mobilized abnormally, and they are jumping into the inside of the Tianxing Tablet."

Within a short period of time, Mu Shi reconnected to the news from the Tianxing Stele Forest.

What worries him most is the last one.

The fleet of God-class civilizations is shifting, and there seems to be a Star Secret Chamber above the Star Stele Forest, and the Thor civilization has been fighting, and the major civilizations are rushing to the Star Stele Forest.

If you are not careful, Mu Shi Tianxing will become a battlefield.

All signs indicate that if it is not handled properly, this place will become the second Shigan star.

"Changsheng, if you encounter this situation, what would you do?" Although Mu Shizhong was worried, he still remained calm and turned to look at Mu Shi Changsheng beside him.

For the first time in hundreds of millions of years, the Tianxing Stele has encountered this situation. The great cosmic civilization fought here, and the consequences would be disastrous.

Mu's Changsheng frowned.

He stared at the intelligence from all over the place of the Heavenly Star Tablet, thinking.

For a moment, Mu's Changsheng's eyes slowly turned into focus, and he exhaled.

"Father, for the present plan, the only way to do this is to block the galaxy and keep things to the smallest extent. Otherwise, the space destruction weapons of major civilizations will come over, and this will suffer. The star event is underway, and the galaxy of the universe is gathered here, which cannot be experienced here. The battle of destruction."

The room fell silent, and both father and son were watching the news on the holographic platform.

Finally, Mu Shi nodded gently.

"Then block the galaxy."

chapters.title: Chapter 993: : Confrontation
chapters.body:
Chapter 993: : Confrontation

The life onlookers, the attention just now was on the battle between Thunder and Shenwei, and now on the book in Mo Nuv's hands.

For that book, all lives are very passionate, and they can't wait to grab it right away.

However, reason tells them that it is not suitable to enter the venue now.

Thunder and other king-level figures of Thor civilization have all participated, which shows that this incident has become different.

Many beings are still a little jealous of Thor's civilization. At this moment, it is not a good thing to grab the fruits of Thor's civilization, and Chen Mo seems not easy to provoke.

Seeing Lei Ting approached and snatched the books in Chen Mo's hands, the other guards of Thor Civilization didn't want to fall behind. They burst out on the flank with high speed and headed towards Chen Mo.

"court death."

The four guards were murderous.

Just now they didn't stop Lei Ting, and their hearts were all in fire. Now Lei Ting's men still want to go over and besiege the King of God. For them, it is simply a shame.

"kill."

Ku Yao yelled loudly, and the guards dispersed and rushed to the guard of the nearest Thunder God civilization.

Jing Ge glanced at the direction of Thunder, with an indifferent expression, but did not intend to stop him, focusing on dealing with the six armored divisions who besieged him. His eyes gradually became bloodthirsty, as cold as a beast, without any emotion.

During the high-speed movement, the thunder light circulated on the armor of Thunder, flashing light in the atmosphere, and the momentum was like a rainbow.

Thunder knows whether he can win the book or not.

"Thor."

The thunder yelled, and the lightning arc flowing on his body became more intense.

A light flashed in the sky, accompanied by thunder.

In other directions, the guards also burst out with a strong thunder light, like a series of thunder and lightning, walking high in the sky, their eyes become more crazy.

This is the style of Thor's civilization, arrogant and strong, and acting like lightning, extremely fast.

The eight guards flew in the direction of Chen Mo like a stream.

However, Shenwei could not make them wish.

In the eyes of the guards, the trajectories of these guards were clearly shown. The figures of eight guards appeared directly in front of these lights, and the long spears in their hands were stabled,

A little short-pulse laser light flashed at the tip of the gun.

"kill."

Just one word, murderous shot.

boom!

When the gun tip was about to pierce the guard's figure, only eight sonic booms erupted in the air, and the eight guards stopped instantly and were nailed in midair.

Ten meters in front of them, there is the long spear of the gods, if it does not stop, the long spear will pierce their bodies.

Under the battle armor, Ku Yao's killing intent surged in his eyes, like an angry dragon beast.

Seeing that the guard did not give up seeing Chen Mo, he shouted angrily: "Looking for death."

In the other directions, the guards such as Kuchuxin and Kushi, their eyes became cold and angry.

puff! hiss!

On the other battlefield, Jing Ge's hand was flashing a pulse laser fighting thorn, penetrating the brains of two armored divisions, and coming out.

boom!

The corpse fell on the stele in the Star Forest of Steles, and after several bumps, it hit the floor of the Star Forest of Stars. Until his death, the guards were still fighting, thinking of ways to exchange injuries with him.

Jing Ge's indifferent eyes wrinkled slightly, and instantly disappeared in place, heading for other armored divisions.

...

Chen Mo was thinking of the moment of inspiration and understanding just now, and he felt that he had touched the threshold.

As long as he works hard, he will enter the second step of a higher-dimensional life.

However, now is not the time for enlightenment.

The eyes of life in the universe are all gathered here, and everyone is full of sight, and the Thor civilization is coming fiercely, and other onlookers also look at it. If they are not careful, they will become the target of everyone.

"Mo Nu, leave with the book first, and lead the reinforcements." Chen Mo was not sure if there were any other secrets in the book, so he didn't plan to give up.

It is impossible to hand over the things in his hands so easily.

Although it seems to him now that he has obtained this secret and is not particularly important to him, it is not a reason for him to hand it over casually.

"Good." Mo Nu nodded.

The palm of the hand was bluffing, and only after a while did a fist-sized hole appeared, and after Mo Nu stopped, the hole was rapidly shrinking and recovering.

"What's the matter?" Chen Mo asked.

"The difficulty of opening the space has increased and it has been reinforced. I haven't further mastered this ability." Mo Nu said.

"Space trap."

Almost as soon as Mo Nu spoke it out, Chen Mo confirmed the problem on Mu's Sky Star. He experienced the battle of Shi Ganxing and knew how troublesome space traps were.

The Mu's Sky Star family discovered that they were working here. In order to prevent the fight from getting out of control, they adopted a restrictive approach and kept the fight to a minimum.

Without the support of the outside fleet and the support of outside weapons, even if there is fierce fighting here, the damage is limited.

The lives of god-level civilization are here.

...

Lei Ting's attention was only on Chen Mo, even if he caught sight of Jing Ge killing the guard, there was still no mood swing.

His speed did not slow down in the slightest.

The thunder and roar of the armor reached its highest point.

He is like a purple thunder and lightning, accelerating suddenly again and again, and is constantly leaning towards Chen Mo.

There was no obstruction in front, the guards were all restrained by his guards, only Chen Mo and the woman with strange spatial ability.

After Chen Mo and Mo Nu communicated, the urging of the battle armor reached the extreme, colliding with Thunder's eyes in mid-air, and his battle armor also slowly left the high platform and pointed directly at Thunder.

Thunder's heart shuddered and murderous intent ran across the air.

He had seen this kind of look, and the feeling Chen Mo gave him was the second green pupil, even more special.

At the opening ceremony of the Star Festival, he had seen Chen Mo's strength. That ability was very special. Relying on that special ability, he won the battle, but facing the situation, Chen Mo was still a little behind the top strength.

He has only one idea now, which is to get the book in Mo Nuv's hands.

Mu Shi Tianxing left the secret of life in the fourth dimension. Once unlocked, Thor civilization will be fearless.

Seeing Chen Mo getting closer and closer, the Thunder Armor twisted, turned around the target, and directed towards Mo Girl.

He was not interested in fighting Chen Mo. The goal at the beginning was the book in Mo Nuv's hands. It was meaningless to win or lose at this time. The secret of the Star Chamber was the most important thing.

Moreover, Chen Mo had that kind of weird ability and could not end the battle in a short time.

Soon.

Coming.

Chen Mo's strength is very strong. Although he is confident to defeat Chen Mo, the battle between the two cannot be ended in a short time.

He only needs the books in that woman's hands.

It is not difficult to grab a book from a woman.

He didn't think Mo Nu was a top master like Zi Yun or Shuiling. Just when the Thunder thought it was successful, suddenly, a prompt sound of the armor appeared in his mind.

At some point, a gun shadow stabbed him from his side, and a sense of danger swept through his body.

Thunder's expression changed slightly.

His reaction was extremely fast, and the armor quickly rolled in the air, threatening to circumvent the tip of the gun.

It was a pity for Chen Mo. From the very beginning, he foresaw that Lei Ting's target was Mo Nu. No matter how he judged it, the temptation of the book was greater than anything, so he was prepared to give the other party a surprise kill.

Unexpectedly, Thunder was avoided.

Chen Mo floated in the air, and Thunder also hovered, and the two faced each other in the air.

chapters.title: Chapter 994: : Maybe You Die, But I Live?
chapters.body:
Chapter 994: : Maybe You Die, But I Live?

Lei Ting looked at Chen Mo carefully.

The blow just now was nothing. What surprised him was that Chen Mo knew his attack and was able to react. I thought that Chen Mo's ability was that blurring ability, but now it seems that it might not be that simple.

Multi-ability at their level is not so unusual.

But Chen Mo's reaction speed just now really surprised him.

Now is not the time to marvel at Chen Mo's abilities, the book is right in front of him, and he wants to get it at all costs.

The battle armor moved again, and the long sword in his hand lit up and stab Chen Mo.

Chen Mo was not afraid, raised his hand and pointed directly at Thunder's chest.

The thunder cast unabated. At the moment when the spear was about to be stabbed, his body twisted, and he was able to avoid the short-pulse laser at the tip of the spear.

Snapped!

The moment the sword approached Chen Mo, there was a muffled sound.

With a whip, Chen Mo hit the arm of the Thunder armor and bounced the attacking sword away.

Lei Ting shook his body slightly, his face changed slightly, and when he really fought against Chen Mo, he realized that Chen Mo was stronger than he thought. That kind of reaction ability is definitely not weaker than him.

Chen Mo withdrew the spear in his hand, and the tip of the spear was pointed at his waist. The movement did not stop, which surprised him. This kind of attack gave him a slight sense of threat.

He suddenly felt awe-inspiring, and he was sure that he seemed to underestimate the enemy. Regardless of the speed of reaction or the means of attack, Chen Mo is not what he imagined.

This kind of attack is not something that a high-ranking person should have for a long time.

Damn it.

The Thunder no longer relaxed, and the counterattack became sharp.

Chen Mo suddenly felt the pressure doubled. He felt that he was fighting against a thunder light, very fast, even faster than Jing Ge.

Going all out, Lei Ting slashed with a sword. This sword, he had his plan. As long as Chen Mo avoided, he could take the opportunity to escape and point straight to the Mo Girl ahead. If Chen Mo did not escape, this sword would be enough for him to be embarrassed. .

Chen Mo chose to dodge.

good chance.

Thunder urged the battle armor engine to the extreme. After a sound burst, Thunder made an instant step and appeared in front of Mo Nu.

In the current situation, robbing that book is more important than deciding the outcome with Chen Mo.

But when Shan thought he was about to succeed, Mo Nu raised her head and looked at him.

The eyes of the two collided, and Thunder's pupils shrank.

He felt a sense of danger.

...

Mo Nu looked directly at the approaching Lei Ting, in her eyes, Lei Ting's movements were not fast.

Despite her fighting skills, her body structure has long been different.

Facing this kind of danger, Mo Nui's mood did not fluctuate at all, and she did not know when there was an exquisite dagger in her hand, flashing with a blue light.

She has a special body and is not afraid of thunder attacks at all.

As long as it can hurt the Thunder, it is a victory for her.

The sense of danger enveloped the thunder, and he no longer had the joy that he was about to succeed in a sneak attack. The woman in front of him was definitely not simple. It seems that you want to exchange injuries with him, or even die together?

He now suspects that he has fallen into Chen Mo and Mo Nu's calculations, but it doesn't matter, he doesn't think he is attacked, what else can the other party do with him.

The long sword fell, engulfing thunder and thunder.

Hiss! ! !

No accident, Lei Ting's long sword slashed the ink girl's shoulders, but when Lei Ting was about to reach out and grab the book, a cold light appeared in his vision and pointed directly at his neck.

So ruthless.

Mo Nu did not retract her hand holding the book, and did not intend to stop Thunder from stealing the book, but instead used it as a bait to attack Thunder's neck.

Damn it.

Lei Ting's face changed drastically. He didn't expect that Mo Girl would be able to move freely after hitting him with a sword.

There is thunder light in his long sword, as long as it pierces the battle armor, the thunder light can paralyze the armor division, and he can't move at all. And Mo Nui's shoulder was a huge wound, and she could still attack him at such a fast speed.

Female lunatic.

Lei Ting cursed secretly, and didn't dare to reach out to grab the book anymore. As long as he hesitated a little, the dagger would definitely cut through his armor and cut off his neck.

hiss!

The sound of daggers across metal.

A scratch was left on Thunder's battle armor. If he hesitated a little earlier, it was his neck that was now being scratched.

He flew upside down and was in a cold sweat.

The next moment, Thunder's pupils shrank.

Mo Nu's battle armor was restored to its original shape under the repair of the nano robot, and Mo Nu was standing in place like an okay person, without saying a word from beginning to end.

Mo Nu is now becoming more and more mysterious in Lei Ting's eyes. In the past, based on their judgment, they determined that Mo Nu was an assistant to Chen Mo, and the force would not be too strong.

Until the siege of the Underworld Civilization, they determined that Mo Nu had a special spatial ability. This time, the Star Chamber was even more certain of his thoughts.

But now, the Thunder's idea is broken.

What kind of monster is this female person? Now the Thunder have to take it seriously.

"I can give you more status and rights than by his side, and even everything you want. There is no need to work hard. I will also ensure your safety as long as you hand over the books to me." Lei Ting said in the public screen, with a voice tape. Follow the temptation.

The thunder light in his armor was flickering, and his body was like a thunder drum, roaring all the time. The power of the battle armor is pushed to the extreme, and the long sword is always ready, standing proudly, with the unique strength of Thor's civilization.

He was ready to lure, if Mo Nu was persuaded, he could get the book effortlessly.

Mo Nu didn't say a word, but looked at him calmly.

At most, Mo Girl communicates with people around her, and at other times, she keeps silent, especially at this time, she will not communicate with other beings other than them.

"How?" Thunder said again.

I didn't hear Mo Nu's reply, but got a ridicule: "As the king of Thor's civilization, are you a bit naive? Don't you be afraid of embarrassing when you say this at this time?"

Chen Mo appeared in front of Mo Girl, mocking unceremoniously.

Thunder did not take Chen Mo's mockery seriously.

"I'm doing it for your good. As far as I know, you have offended other god-level civilizations except endless sea civilization. Regarding Shi Ganxing, I don't want to be held accountable. After all, the winners and losers. Now you offend me again Thor civilization is not a good thing. I admit that you have some strength, but god-level civilization is not as simple as you think."

"This will not bother you."

Chen Mo was unmoved and didn't mind the threat in Thunder's tone at all.

"You should be a hero, a man of great things. Make a deal, give me the book, we can cooperate, this secret is not exclusive to you. I believe other god-level civilizations have also arrived, but there is no Join. If you want to swallow it alone, I'm afraid you won't be able to get out of Mu's Sky Star.

Lei Ting looked around a circle of onlookers, and instead of using the public channel, he directed this to Chen Mo.

"The book we got with our ability seems to have no reason to give it to you. Also, whether we can go out or not, this should have nothing to do with you."

Lei Ting looked at Chen Mo again, and didn't mean to back down: "You should know that if we don't join hands, you can't leave the Star Stele Forest safe and sound. If you fight, you are not my opponents, so why fight you to death?"

"Are you sure we are not rivals? Maybe you die, but I live?"

chapters.title: Chapter 995: : Desperately
chapters.body:
Chapter 995: : Desperately

Chen Mo's voice was full of threats and spread on the public channel. For a while, the life onlookers in the Star Stele Forest was shocked.

The strongest person who dared to confront Thor's civilization head-on, and threatened face-to-face, they had to admire Chen Mo's courage.

Changing for any of them, dare not say such a thing.

They all saw Chen Mo's weird abilities, but experts could see that Chen Mo hadn't reached the level of Thunder, and now he actually said something threatening Thunder.

They have to wonder whether this is Chen Mo's big talk, or he really has this confidence.

You know, Thunder is the hand with the best blood and genetics in the Thor civilization. The congenital conditions are perfect, and the acquired environment is perfect. Those who dare to say things like surpassing Thunder, besides Tongqing, they can't think of other lives. .

Lei Ting looked as usual, turning a deaf ear to Chen Mo's threat.

One-on-one, he is not afraid of each other.

He wants to kill Chen Mo, but the books in the hands of Mo Nuv are the most important. Apart from that, everything else can be ignored.

However, it seems that it can only be snatched by strong means, otherwise it is impossible to get the book.

He felt a threat from Chen Mo, and the threat was clear, not inferior to the feeling that Tongqing gave him. If you keep him, I am afraid that he will be a tricky opponent in the future cosmic competition.

If you can kill the opponent here and get the book, you can kill two birds with one stone, that would be best.

This thought flashed in his mind, and his armor was mobilized to the extreme, and the flashing thunder light on his body became rich.

The long sword in his hand was wrapped in blue light at its blade. The current situation becomes more complicated as it drags on for a long time. It is just that man's strength that threatens him greatly, but he is now being held back by their guards.

Outside the court, other god-level civilizations must have arrived, but they have not yet appeared, waiting for them to lose out here.

Mo Nu felt very mysterious to him, and adding a strangely capable Chen Mo, if he dragged on, he might really lose to Chen Mo's hands.

There is not much time for him.

Lei Ting raised his eyes and looked directly at Chen Mo, now that there is no point in saying anything and can only fight.

"bring it on."

Thunder's faint voice, with unparalleled arrogance.

The atmosphere over the Star Stele Forest changed.

The armor on Thunder's body was surrounded by thunder snakes, like a group of fiery rays, which made people unable to look directly at it, accompanied by the roar of thunder drums.

His body is straight, looking straight ahead with a strong and arrogant attitude, like a born thunderbird.

In the sky, thunder light was flashing, and the thunder snake smashed down on the forest of steles, and the sound was shocking. The map stele below the thunderbolt was shrouded in thunder light. The floor tiles under the map stele were hit by thunder light.

Thunder body.

This is the strongest form of Thor civilization.

The Thunder Snake on the Thunder armor seemed to be screaming and wailing, and Thunder's eyes were completely thundered and turned into blazing white. The world seemed to slow down several times in his eyes.

Without any hesitation, Thunder raised his sword, and his body disappeared.

The sound of thunder shook the Tianxing stele forest.

The light kept flashing, the terrifying thunder snake flooded the sky, and the roar continued, as if invoking the anger of the gods.

boom!

The entire forest of Star Steles vibrated suddenly, like the sound of landslides and rocks cracking from far to near, violently knocking on the heart of every life, giving people a sense of suffocation.

Even the top armored divisions are the first to see this type of battle. Their abilities and armors complement each other and exert the most terrifying combat effectiveness.

This is the real strength of Thunder.

The light dissipated, and all beings immediately cast their gazes over the forest of steles, looking for the two figures.

Thunder's body is as strong as a sword.

In front of him, is Chen Mo's armor. On Chen Mo's body, the sword marks spread from the shoulders to the legs, and half of his body was almost torn apart. And Thunder's body is not intact, the spear passed through his body and came out from the back of his heart.

Both lose.

Chen Mo did not dodge, and took the cut abruptly.

If he gets out of the way, the opponent will succeed, and his target will be Mo Nu directly.

As for injuries? does not exist.

Lei Ting stared at Chen Mo in an incredible way.

He had no idea that Chen Mo didn't mean to dodge at all. He chose to hurt both sides. What made him even more incredible was that he saw that Chen Mo's body wound was recovering.

Yes, he read it right.

From the huge wound from his left shoulder to his right leg, he did not see Chen Mo’s blood. There was only a blue light in the sword marks, and then the blue light was slowly healing. At a speed visible to the naked eye, the cut marks of the battle armor were also Repaired by nanobots.

This terrifying healing power made him horrified.

He suddenly remembered the sword he used to cut Mo Girl, Mo Girl also had no blood stains, and healed quickly.

Since the appearance of this man, people can't see through it. As the fight gets deeper, he finds that Chen Mo is really unfathomable, with endless mysteries.

In Shi Ganxing, he mastered the space connection technology unique to the god-level civilization, and then mastered the super power development technology, and his subordinates defeated the conspiracy civilization and the white star civilization. The opening ceremony was one enemy and two. The ambush of the Killing Mind Civilization now not only found the Star Secret Chamber, but also hurt both.

This is a monster.

...

Lei Ting's eyes were a little startled, and his body became weak.

He thought about Chen Mo avoiding this blow, he could directly grab the book in Mo Nu's hand behind Chen Mo, but Chen Mo remained motionless.

With this blow, he exhausted all his strength, at the cost of consuming himself, to urge the Thunder Body, the highest form of Thor Civilization's special ability, to obtain the strongest speed and strength.

He was so desperate for the first time.

Even in the battle with Vvroyun, the former Speaker of the Black Eye Civilization, he had never worked so hard. Even if the opponent was strong, he was confident. He thinks he is not the number one in the universe, but there are only a handful of armored divisions who can make him so embarrassed.

Before attacking Chen Mo and robbing books, he never thought that he would fail.

This sudden rise of life, and his strongest state, will lose both sides.

It wasn't that both sides were hurt. Chen Mo's terrifying self-healing ability made him recover quickly. He lost.

Special ability and physique?

Lei Ting looked at Chen Mo's brightly healing wound, feeling lost.

The weird ability to escape into space is now such an undead body that has never been seen before. Chen Mo gave him too many mysteries. Is this a multi-powered body developed by super power development technology?

It's not that he has never seen a body with many capabilities.

But in the current cognition of superpowers, there are very few special forms of superpowers, and he has never seen such a variety of powerful special abilities.

This subverted his perception and imagination of superpowers.

No wonder he can give himself a similar threat to Hitomi.

Thunder gave a bleak smile. The opponent could recover, but he did not have the ability to recover quickly. He had to admit that he had failed this time.

But for failure, he didn't care about it. It is not uncommon to have failed in Shi Ganxing. He and Chen Mo looked at each other at close range, and said, "I look forward to fighting against you in the cosmos competition in the future."

After speaking, the engine in front of Thunder's armor exploded, providing a driving force, abruptly freed from the spear in Chen Mo's hand, and flew out.

The guard that Thor Civilization was fighting against the Shenwei instantly gave up on the opponent, came to the thunder, and protected him in the middle.

The Thunder lost.

The hearts of all beings were extremely shocked, and their eyes all fell on Chen Mo.

This once unknown life has appeared in their field of vision since before the Tianxing Festival. Today's amazing talents are stunning and shocking the Tianxing Monument. All the geniuses of the Tianxing Festival have become his foil.

This battle will undoubtedly shake the universe.

I don't know when, Chen Mo, a mysterious humanoid, emerged and became one of the giants of the universe.

However, with the Thunder's defeat, the matter did not end.

...

The huge wound on Chen Mo's body healed, his body recovered, and he looked scared for a while. He was also taking risks, trying his special body's self-healing ability for the first time.

He was right.

Quantum body has unparalleled self-healing ability, immortality.

At the time, he could choose to dodge, but he did not. At that time, the two were like two boxers, and Mo Nu was behind him, no matter his mentality or other reasons, he was not allowed to dodge.

This battle also made him try to bring the fighting mentality of a small group of masters at the top of the pyramid.

The wound disappeared completely, and the battle armor was repaired by the nanorobot. Chen Mo stood with a gun and glanced at the onlookers.

God-level civilization and other great civilizations are all present now.

I am afraid it will not be easy today.

chapters.title: Chapter 996: : Come Together
chapters.body:
Chapter 996: : Come Together

Carrie looked around at the environment.

Looking at the appearance and layout, this is an underground organization.

The life that attracted her was the life of the dark organization? When she thought of this, Carrie frowned. As an upright general star, she is not cold to the dark world.

But now that she has accepted the other party's invitation, she can only move on.

Shepherd City is rotten and has threatened the safety of her and her people, and she has to seek help.

Entering the hall, Carrie saw the leader of this mysterious organization.

A female life?

This answer surprised her very much.

A large underground organization is controlled by a female life, which is not much in the universe.

In addition to the female leader sitting in the first seat, there are two other lives in Your Highness.

Will star.

With the sense of smell of the general star, she can feel the other two general stars.

Like her, other generals came here after accepting the other party's solicitation. I'm afraid these two will be her future colleagues.

"Welcome to you." The poisonous woman said with a cold voice. This is a sequelae of staying in the dark world. There is no emotion here: "Before taking over, you need to have a general training. After passing, you can Take over the big responsibility."

"Will the star train?"

Carrie raised her eyebrows, and looked at the star with the other two, both seeing the surprise in each other's eyes.

Does the dark world have general training?

Just one piece of information, the hidden information behind it is too big. They are not novice generals, but a hundred warriors. Even so, they must receive training, indicating that there are stronger than them as instructors.

Using the stars as instructors stronger than them reveals that there is a larger group of forces behind them that is controlling this dark organization.

Before they came, the other party had revealed some information to him, and the other party was already the strongest force in Chaos Land. The most powerful group that can control the chaos is probably also famous in the universe.

"Yes." Carrie nodded.

"Yes." The other two generals nodded at the same time.

"Come with me."

Hui Twenty-one led the three and passed towards the back of the hall.

...

"Director, what shall we do?" asked the subordinates next to Gai Luo.

Police officers from their Planetary Security Agency arrived early in the morning, but under Gailuo's order, they had not dared to act rashly, and could only pretend to be mixed in the lives of the onlookers.

Seeing that Thunder, whose momentum is second only to Tongqing, retreated under Chen Mo, the police officers on the field were all shocked.

The rise of Chen Moqifeng has become the focus of almost all lives.

Especially during the Tianxing Festival, an accident occurred in the Tianxing Stele Forest and Mu's Tianxing was blocked. Now the Universe News platform is broadcasting live here, and the battle is spreading throughout the universe.

Today, an unknown life, the strongest person who defeated a god-level civilization, was shocked.

Gai Luo shook his head. He has no good way to deal with it now: "Keep waiting to see if the Mu family has now blocked the main galaxy and see how they deal with it. Now it is a fight between the gods and we may not be able to control it when we go in."

"There are so many ruthless people in this session than before." The subordinate said helplessly.

"As long as you don't use anti-matter weapons, everything else is easy to say." Gai Luo's brows were sad.

The security situation on the planet is now out of control. Once a problem occurs, the consequences will be disastrous.

...

More and more lives came to watch. Now Chen Mo and his party are surrounded by the center.

Obviously, paying attention to their lives, it is impossible to let them go so easily. The most important book is still in Chen Mo's hands. It is the biggest secret of the Star Chamber. Any civilization with a little ambition wants to get the secret inside.

It's just that Chen Mo just repulsed the thunder, and the limelight was in full swing. No one wanted to go out to be a bird and explore the way for others, but he didn't want Chen Mo to leave with that book easily.

Suddenly, Chen Mo smiled and looked to the south of the Tianxing Stele Forest.

The life onlookers followed his gaze and found that a team of guards was coming in this direction at an extremely fast speed.

The team has nearly 800 guards, unified standard armor, and all paintings.

When Chen Mo discovered that Mo Nu was in the Star Secret Chamber, he notified the guards stationed in the manor to come. The flight movements of the entire Shenwei battalion were unified, flying at a super-high speed of sound, and within a minute, it entered the Tianxing Stele Forest.

They were meticulous in their flight. When they entered the center of the circle of life around Chen Mo, eight hundred guards surrounded Chen Mo in an orderly manner, and they changed in one go without any lag.

Seeing this scene of life, I felt awe-inspiring.

Well-trained, just a detail of the action, you can see the horror of this guard group.

"First save Kulong and the others." Chen Mo said solemnly.

"it is good."

Ku Yao did not hesitate to let several guards dive under the Star Stele Forest, rescue the Kulong and other guards who had been seriously injured between the steles, and put on dormant medicine to temporarily prevent the deterioration of his body injuries.

In the battle with the guards of Thor's civilization just now, in addition to the bitter dragon was seriously injured, two guards died and one guard was seriously injured.

Zhao Min was also among the guards, and Chen Mo secretly breathed a sigh of relief when he saw Zhao Min and the guards coming from the manor.

News from the bitter sky stationed outside the Tianxing Tablet Site, the entire Mushitian galaxy was blocked.

The Mu family blockade has issued an announcement that no large civilized fleet is allowed to enter here to avoid the result of destruction.

Here has become a prison again.

When Chen Mo just wanted to lead the team to leave, a group of lives stood in front of them, and groups of guards from afar were gathering quickly.

Chen Mo's mind became heavy again.

More and more lives came to the Tianxing Stele Forest. Many of them appeared in whole teams. The number of each house was quite large, ranging from one to two hundred to as many as thousands, depending on the scale, as many as hundreds of thousands.

Eight hundred to hundreds of thousands.

Without a good result, none of them can leave here.

If they are besieged, I am afraid it will be a lot of trouble.

At this moment, there was a commotion in the sky in front of them, and everything looked back. A few black spots zoomed in on their field of vision, approaching the sky above the Star Forest at an astonishing speed.

Black pupil, Thor, crape myrtle, white star, endless sea.

The forces of the five parties are all the standard armors of their respective civilizations, which are extremely conspicuous.

"God-level civilization, god-level civilization have come together, and black pupil civilization is also here." I don't know who shouted.

God level civilization.

The emergence of god-level civilizations together made all the lives on the field awe-inspiring, causing bursts of exclamation. With a god-level civilization, Chen Mo could not retreat so easily.

All the eyes of life returned to Chen Mo again, somewhat gloating.

Chen Mo suddenly sank.

Zhao Min next to him had concerns in his eyes, but at this time, she couldn't persuade Chen Mo to do anything. Mo Nu's expression did not fluctuate, and she didn't care about the appearance of god-level civilization.

Jing Ge's eyes were full of fighting intent. He had just fought with the guards of Thor's civilization, and he still had some ideas. Now the strongest in the universe are almost all here, which is a rare opportunity for him.

chapters.title: Chapter 997: : Confrontation With God-Level Civilization
chapters.body:
Chapter 997: : Confrontation With God-Level Civilization

Wang Hai rubbed his eyebrows.

In the outer space outside Hongqiao, there is a black army armor.

"This battle is a bit troublesome. The White Star's warhead is even more crazy."

The legions and battle armor in space are the warhead of the White Star civilization.

Since the last defeat, Goxuan returned to the frontier cloud city, but an accident happened midway. The dark forest domain leading to the white star domain Hongqiao was captured by the sudden appearance of the Ziwei Civilization War Department. Now Goxuan War Department is The lone army that had broken the road was stationed in the dark forest, like a rootless duckweed.

And this rootless duckweed finally chose them as a breakthrough point.

Fortunately, they were ready for the opponent's crazy attack, sealed off the space around Hongqiao, intervened in the space, blocked the speed of light, and avoided the opponent's destructive weapons.

Even so, it still did not stop the opponent's desperate attack.

The sirens came again, and Wang Hai turned to the holographic sand table.

He forgot how many times this was the alarm.

Because the opponent is a god-level civilization, after occupying Hongqiao, they have been strengthening the Hongqiao defense. Large-scale space reinforcement, space interference, space interference, and light speed blockade.

The defensive range has been expanded ten times to win the depth. In the follow-up, they built a weapon arsenal in the galaxy closest to Hongqiao to maintain the supply of weapons and warships in Hongqiao.

The unprecedented scale of defense and defensive weapons gave Wang Hai full of confidence.

The Hysterical Attack of the White Star Civilization now only needs to withstand their smashed attack, and it will be much easier next.

At the beginning of the offensive, space interferometers were scattered all over Hongqiao, and space weapons were ineffective here, so large-scale anti-matter weapons were replaced.

In the face of the huge space-based weapon defense zone, even the white star civilization has no choice.

But she had to attack. The dark forest area was the longest distance from the White Star Civilization. The Hongqiao, which confirmed the situation, was guarded by big forces. Because of his carelessness, the warhead of the Ziwei Civilization took advantage of her original Hongqiao.

Now pass through the whale Pisces where the marching ant group is located, and then go through the Kibokao cavity to the white star domain, which is the closest route.

Otherwise, in such troubled times, being alone is very dangerous.

Goxuan's attack was very violent, regardless of the cost.

The battle in space is very terrifying, unscrupulous, regardless of loss. The battle was far more fierce than the battle she had commanded in the past, and the space-based weapon defense belt of Hongqiao was shattered under the bombing.

There are space-based weapons everywhere, as well as the remains of war machinery.

The top war machine made by the Goxuan War Department exerts a powerful effect in the offensive, which is why they have the confidence to attack the Hongqiao Fortress arranged in layers.

It was also the first time that Sea King’s battle department encountered such a fierce attack. A steady stream of space-based weapons and war machines entered through the rear and was dropped into the defensive zone.

In order to ensure that there is nothing wrong, Wang Hai even contacted the Great Demon War Department to hold the line in the rear.

Gou Xuan was crazy, attacking at all costs. The tide of war machines were constantly being sent outside the Hongqiao line of defense, all thrown into the battlefield.

Such a large-scale war machine does not know how many planets can be excavated to make it.

In space, debris is everywhere, densely packed.

Even the spacecraft cannot fly in this kind of space full of debris.

In a war of this scale, the number of deaths of the Armored Division is very terrifying, and the Sea King Warhead lost more than half of its personnel in the battle.

Wang Hai once again experienced the strength of the god-level civilized warhead, and finally had no choice but to pull all the warhead's reserves over and throw it into the battlefield.

Over time, the line of defense slowly stabilized.

Whenever there is a breathing space, build robots and nano-robots to clean the battlefield in space for the first time, digest and corrode all the debris in space, and use it for the repair of space-based weapons and the construction of defense machine structures.

"This is the real space war, the war of god-level civilization." Zhong Lei's eyes flashed with excitement, and he had not rested for a long time, making his voice sound a little hoarse: "After this level, our warhead will truly be reborn. ."

"They are alone now, without back-up supplements, and can't withstand the consumption. The longer the delay, the greater our chances of winning."

Wang Hai's expression was calm, and his eyes never left the space war sandbox.

His initial strategy was to drag, using a war of attrition.

Although the war fought horribly, they also grew up in the war. This is the most typical space fortress offensive and defensive battle, with a frontal attack without any bells and whistles.

This kind of actual combat under strong pressure allows them to grow quickly.

...

Gou Xuan stared at the space defense belt in front of him, not knowing what he was thinking.

The enemy's defense is comparable to a god-level civilization, which surprised her very much.

With space interference capabilities, space interference capabilities and space solidification, a full set of space blockades will completely cut off their space weapons and space jumps.

This full set of space defense capabilities only appeared in god-level civilizations and some top-level civilizations in the past.

For attacking a fortress with a full set of space defense capabilities, there is no strategy or skill at all, only a strong attack.

He was prepared for loss from the beginning.

But now the loss of more than half of the staff is beyond her original psychological bottom line.

The opponent's soldiers are only slightly weaker than them in strength, and they will hurt the enemy a thousand, and they will also harm themselves by 800. But the problem now is that the opponent has backup power, and his back path is cut off by the Ziwei civilization.

The marching ant group, a newly emerging power, had to re-examine it.

The opponent's main general at the Hongqiao Fortress has a steady style, steady, and seldom made mistakes. In this fortress war, she did not find the opponent's flaws and mistakes.

And such a strong general is not the commander-in-chief of the marching ant group.

As far as she knows, there is also a commander in chief.

As time went by, Gou Xuan felt the harder the attack. They were like a sharpening stone, sharpening the opponent's knife sharper. Compared with the first match, they have now made higher progress. It is an elite warhead.

Perhaps it was the title of the previous god-level civilization that made them comfortable and underestimated the life in the universe.

They belong to the strong offensive side, and they do not have the advantage in the first place, and they are even more troublesome if they do not have backup supplements.

Only half of the war department remains.

In the case that the opponent has a steady stream of reinforcements and a steady fight, she can't find the possibility of victory.

"retreat."

Only two words made Gou Xuan's expression lonely.

Lost to the opponent for the second time.

...

Zi Luo shut down the intelligence system, moved his fat body, and looked at the holographic sand table listlessly, as if thinking.

"My lord, the front responds to the news that Gou Xuan retreated at Muwu Hongqiao, and lost more than half of the crew, and returned to the frontier cloud seat. Should we give them another knife at this time." The subordinate gestured fiercely with his hands.

A new Hongqiao suddenly appeared in the Ziwei Wen star domain, and it just happened to appear near the Hongqiao from the White Star Civilization to the Dark Forest Civilization.

Fatty Luo, the top star of the god-level civilization, naturally knew the value of this Hongqiao, how could he miss such a good opportunity.

Immediately ordered, at all costs, taking advantage of the opponent's unpreparedness, take down Hongqiao in one fell swoop.

What surprised him even more was that the genius heroine Xing Gou Xuan of the White Star Civilization actually led the warhead and went deep into the Dark Forest Civilization. They captured Hongqiao and made Gou Xuan a lone army by accident.

Now they are Shuanghongqiao, the location echoes, as long as the space connector is built, the two Hongqiao joint defenses are solid.

Now that Gou Xuan was at a loss, Fatty Luo became interested.

"It seems that this marching ant group can't be underestimated. It can actually defeat Gouxuan's strong attack and make her lose more than half of the staff." Fatty Luo knocked on the counter table lazily.

The other subordinates dared not speak up, waiting for Fatty Luo's answer.

"Ignore Gou Xuan's place for the time being. The primary goal is to strengthen the defenses of the two Hongqiao bridges and set up the spatial connectors. The fighting in the dark forest area is serious. Next, there will be enough for her to drink a pot. Now first pay attention to collecting information about the marching ants. Power has the meaning of rising recently."

Fatty Luo tuned out the holographic video frequency, which is exactly what Chen Mo looked like when he was at the Star Festival.

...

The densely packed life encircled the Tianxing stele forest. The emergence of the god-level civilized guards made the field silent.

The five god-level civilizations, and the armors painted in five colors, fell solemnly among the onlookers.

The life onlookers faintly turned into five strands, while Chen Mo was in the center.

The most conspicuous thing is the black pupil civilization, the cold and strange temperament of the black pupil guard, and the cold and solemn, and the strongest person, the existence of the universe's most concern.

There was no sound from the guard group, and its strong momentum made the onlookers chill and unconsciously stay away.

Chen Mo didn't feel cold to the battle in front of him, but when the opponent appeared, he still glanced around. The number of guards of the five god-level civilizations is about the same as him, and they add up to less than 4,000.

This number is understandable, because there is a limit on the number of guards you can bring to participate in the Star Festival.

Seeing this situation, Zhao Min also leaned to Chen Mo's side: "Chen Mo, it is obvious that we are being targeted now. The warhead can't get in, we can't get out. Mu's Tianxing is now a trapped beast cage. Xiaoyu asked me and you just now. Said that if things cannot be done, there is no harm in handing over the book."

From Zhao Min's voice, Chen Mo could hear the concern: "Well, I have a sense of measure."

It's not as simple as that book now.

Five great god-level civilizations appeared together, shaking all lives.

And the black pupil guard in the center of the five sides stood coldly and solemnly, separated in the center, guarding the pupil blue from it. Representatives of other god-level civilizations also appeared from the guards.

The scene was trembling and breathing was short of breath.

And Chen Mo's eyes were calm as water, without any fear.

Tong Qing raised his head, and the two eyes met in the air. The atmosphere of the Tianxing Stele Forest seemed to stagnate, and the pressure suddenly increased.

"Hand over Tian Xing's suicide note, I will guarantee you nothing."

chapters.title: Chapter 998: :You Can Try
chapters.body:
Chapter 998: :You Can Try

"Hand over Mu's Tianxing's suicide note, I will guarantee you nothing." Tongqing's voice spread on the public channels of the universe with supreme majesty, and it seemed to shock the heart with strange magic.

Even some of the masters on the field are awe-inspiring.

The public channel of the universe became dead silent, and no life was speaking.

The gazes of the onlookers fell on Chen Mo, more or less gloating.

It is impossible for a single life to swallow the secrets left by Mu's Sky Star. Now that the book is in Chen Mo's hands, countless lives are jealous.

Now that the five great god-level civilizations have joined forces to encircle him, even if Chen Mo becomes more popular, he can't stir the situation now.

"No?" Chen Mo's voice was calm, as if to say something insignificant.

As soon as this remark came out, the lives onlookers were all taken aback, unbelievable to this answer.

What does it mean? Chen Mo doesn't want to hand over Tianxing's suicide note?

Dare to resist the five god-level civilizations?

Are you so fat?

Even the lives of the five god-level civilizations were startled by Chen Mo's answer, and his expression became angry, especially the black pupil civilization, looking at Chen Mo with murderous eyes.

Don't even pay attention to god-level civilization?

Without waiting for Tongqing to continue speaking, Ziwei’s Zimu of Ziwei civilization stood up and spoke, disdainfully said: "Do you think you are a character? As President Tongqing said, surrendering Tianxing's suicide note obediently is considered to be aware of current affairs."

As soon as this remark came out, Chen Mo and others raised their eyebrows.

Before Chen Mo could speak, Zhao Min stepped forward and stood beside him: "When did the life of the Ziwei civilization become the running dog of the black pupil civilization?"

The onlookers were shocked by Zhao Min's words.

This Chen Mo's kind of human being is not so cruel, and a word made the Ziwei civilization ashamed in front of the entire universe.

The onlookers Shui Ling and others watched this scene with interest.

At this moment, Zi Yun took a deep look at Zhao Min, turned her head, and looked at Zimu with a cold look, which was self-evident. Zimu's expression was extremely ugly, his eyes were murderous, and he stepped back calmly, no longer daring to interject.

"The mouth is pitiful, can't solve the reality of your being under siege, obediently hand over the Tianxing suicide note, the speaker promised to spare you once." Tara next to Tong Qing said.

"The book is here, see if you can get it."

Chen Mo took the book in Mo Nuo's hand and raised it in her hand.

"A group of counselors, don't dare to do it, I'll come first." A war armor division appeared in the onlookers, some angrily opened his mouth, the armor urged, rushing towards Chen Mo at a speed.

Before the starter approached Chen Mo, Jing Ge, who was on Chen Mo's right, suddenly disappeared in place, his fighting thorn shining with the cold light of death.

Huh!

The sound of metal being penetrated appeared, and then fell into dead silence.

The head of the player was pierced by the fighting thorn, and was hung in the air like dried bacon. There was no sound from beginning to end, and it was too late to even scream.

From the beginning to the end, it took less than three seconds, and the time to fight was less than half a second.

The onlookers were startled by this scene and looked at Jing Ge incredible. They only remembered that this little-known armored division was very strong. Just one-on-six, they also killed a Thor civilized armored division.

Because of the battle between Chen Mo and Lei Ting, he was ignored.

Now shoot, let him enter the field of vision of the onlookers.

They used battle armor to replay the scene just now. The invisible man who attacked was found to be wrong in a short time and made a dodge action, but Jing Ge perfectly pierced in from the back of the player's head as if predicting the trajectory of the opponent. Through the eyebrows.

There is no lag in the whole process.

Master!

The top armored division on the field is chilling.

Including Tong Qing and others, their eyes focused on Jing Ge.

No wonder Chen Mo is not afraid of God-level civilization, he is calm and calm on the court, with top masters by his side, and there is no meaning to be weaker than the top elite of God-level civilization.

This is Chen Mo's confidence?

This problem appeared, and onlookers shook their heads.

Two fists are hard to beat four hands, and it is impossible to solve the dilemma in the field by relying solely on masters.

The five great god-level civilizations came together, and there were other great forces. Even if the god-level civilization let him go, other forces could not easily let Chen Mo leave.

Jing Ge made a move to restrain some of the lives that wanted to move, but the situation in the field did not change.

In the guard of the black pupil civilization, a war armored division covered in black eyes stood up and said loudly: "Speaker, I will meet them."

"Speaker, let me come." A war armor division next to him also said.

"Don't worry."

Tong Qing shook his head, his expression as calm as ever.

"Brother Chen Mo, you are indeed capable of a lot of people, but you can't change much. It will be good for you and me to get to know you and me, and hand over the final letter of the Star of Heaven. It is rare for you to think that you can safely leave the Forest of Stars with the letter of Star Star. Is it? If you let you go, I'm afraid everyone on the field will become a joke of the whole universe."

Hitomi's words made the onlookers nod secretly.

Hundreds of thousands to eight hundred, if Chen Mo is allowed to leave the Tianxing Forest of Steles with the Tianxing suicide note, all participants on the field will become a joke.

Now there is only a lack of hands-on opportunities and methods. Once swarmed, there will be a big chaos on the field, which is beneficial to Chen Mo, because they have seen Chen Mo's ability, which is a bit special.

"You and I met, shouldn't it be you who helped me leave, and then we shared secrets? Now we are rivals? It seems that the friendship of Speaker Hitomi is worthless." Chen Mo said.

Tong Qing smiled and shook his head: "Someone has always done the most right thing. The Tianxing suicide note should not be possessed by a single being."

"Who owns the super power development technology of Demon Flame Civilization? Who owns it now? You publicize the super power technology you obtained from Demon Flame Civilization. How about I publish this book?" Chen Mo seemed to say something. Things that are irrelevant, understatement.

As soon as he said this, the blue pupils of the pupil became deeper and fell silent for a while.

The other beings were sweating coldly.

This Chen Mo really wasn't afraid of death, and brought the problem to the culprit of Tong Qing and several other god-level civilizations. Especially Tongqing, Shi Ganxing was spurned by the universe after the battle, and was also imprisoned in the black hole of the black pupil civilization.

"The technology in the hands of Demon Flame Civilization was obtained through a legal transaction from us at that time. It was only halfway through the transaction and was disturbed by other forces. Moreover, Demon Flame Civilization was not destroyed in my hands. I am not responsible for it."

Tong Qing smiled indifferently, without taking what Chen Mo said to his heart.

"It's no use delaying time. If you don't hand over the Star Star's suicide note, then I can only represent the many beings in the universe and the Council of the Universe Alliance to retrieve the Star Star suicide note."

Hitomi took a step forward. Behind him, all the guards entered a fighting state, and the atmosphere suddenly became depressed.

The lives onlookers are also ready to move.

Chen Mo waved his hand, and all the guards immediately entered the state. The three hundred guards on the outermost periphery dispersed, all their weapons were revealed.

War violent frenzy.

In an instant, the expressions of life on the court changed a lot.

Anti-matter weapons.

At the moment when the violent war was activated, all their armored divisions had antimatter activation alarms on their radars. And those activated antimatter have the equivalent of destroying this planet.

Why can Chen Mo's subordinates carry anti-matter weapons into Mu Shi Tianxing? The news made them extremely shocked, and their hearts were filled with fear.

"You can try." Chen Mo's voice was as flat as water as before.

In just an instant, the swords were tense.

chapters.title: Chapter 999: :On Gambling
chapters.body:
Chapter 999: :On Gambling

The sky above the Star Stele Forest was as silent as death, and the anti-matter weapon that Chen Mo showed was beyond all life's expectations.

No life dares to act rashly.

The radar response of the antimatter bullets activated by the three hundred guards was enough to destroy Mu's Sky Star.

Once annoyed Chen Mo, the guards shot around here, and they were not shot dead by antimatter bullets. Even the Tianxing stele forest and even Mu's Tianxing might not be able to exist.

Moreover, if the planet is destroyed, they will all escape into space. At that time, Chen Mo had a great chance to escape.

Everything looked at Chen Mo's gaze, with deep fear.

The scene fell into an awkward stalemate.

All eyes were focused on Tong Qing, to see how he should move next.

"Even if the planet is destroyed, you still can't run." Hitomi looked at the guard who opened the weapon, and didn't panic about being pointed at by the anti-matter weapon. He still looked calm.

"How do you know if you don't try?" Chen Mo said.

"slow."

At this moment, a shout appeared on the public platform of the universe, interrupting the dialogue between the two.

Gai Luo didn't want to appear, because the struggle of god-level civilization really wasn't something they could participate in. But when Chen Mo showed off his anti-matter weapon, he realized the seriousness of the problem and had to appear.

Otherwise, the problem will get out of control and no one will be held responsible, Mu's Sky Star will also become a victim, and the god-level civilization will not suffer any loss.

Gai Luo and two [biqugeso.vip] ten police officers appeared on the scene.

At the same time, other police officers on the scene entered the scene one after another to control the situation, as many as thousands. Every police officer is equipped with anti-matter weapons and is on guard at the scene.

"Mr. Chen Mo, give me a face. After all, the Tianxing Stele Forest is a legacy of cosmic civilization. Can we not use anti-matter weapons here?" Gai Luo said.

Chen Mo didn't mean to let the guards lay down their weapons: "The space is blocked, can you tell me a better way?"

"This……"

Gai Luo suddenly became embarrassed. With such a scene, he could not persuade Chen Mo's life to be besieged. Tian Xing's suicide note is in Chen Mo's hands. There may be a big secret in it, and none of them want to give up.

...

"Will this continue to lose control?" the assistant next to Tu Yun asked.

The guards of their Yunzhou civilization also came, but just to join in the fun, the mystery of the star was born, no one would miss this opportunity to witness history.

"No, they are all superiors, knowing the pros and cons of the struggle." Tu Yun's voice was much more relaxed.

"Then what should we do with this deadlock? Now everyone can besiege him, but it is impossible to let them leave." Said the assistant beside Tu Yun.

"Step by step, there will be a way."

Tu Yun wanted to look at Chen Mo in the field, a little worried. He wanted to help Chen Mo, but he couldn't help.

Now that the elite civilizations of the entire universe surround this place, whoever helps Chen Mo will become the target of public criticism. He can help if he has a personal relationship, but when this situation comes out to help, he is an enemy of the elite civilization of the entire universe. At that time, Yunzhou civilization will also be in trouble and be regarded as a target.

Tu Yun took a deep look at Chen Mo, who was wearing a battle armor in the middle of the Star Stele Forest. This young humanoid can always surprise people, and he doesn't know if he can escape safely this time.

...

The appearance of Gailuo can only temporarily stop the situation from deteriorating, but it cannot solve the dilemma. Maybe he is very prestigious here in Mu Shi Tianxing, but in the universe, especially in the eyes of the big civilization, he is just an insignificant little figure.

His prestige cannot support all civilizations.

The stalemate is still going on, no one dared to do anything, Chen Mo also stood quietly in the air. At this time, he was more patient.

"Everyone, give me a face."

A hearty and hurried voice suddenly appeared in the public screen of the universe, and the onlookers subconsciously looked in one direction.

I saw Mu Shizhong and Mu Changsheng father and son, galloping towards here.

And beside them, besides the guard, there was a third life, flying side by side with Mu Shizhong. Judging from the etiquette, this life is highly valued by the Mu family.

"He is Zidi." I don't know who called, and the identity of the third person next to Mu Shizhong became clear.

Zidi, the legend who once shook the universe, once again appeared in public.

His body was covered by a black cloak, and he couldn't see his face clearly. The cloak swayed in the wind, adding a bit of mystery to him.

All beings subconsciously look at the Ziwei civilization.
