Zi Yun looked at Zidi calmly. As a legend of the Ziwei civilization, it was a taboo in the Ziwei civilization. In private, it was also the object of many life worships in the Ziwei civilization.

"Everyone, I hope to give me a face and end this dispute through peaceful means."

Mu clan saluted everyone on the court again.

As soon as this remark came out, all the eyes of life were once again focused on the book in Chen Mo's hands. Obviously, this dispute cannot be resolved peacefully if Chen Mo does not hand over the Tianxing suicide note.

"Give me the book."

Zidi suddenly spoke, and a deep voice appeared on the Battle Armor public channel, shocking all the lives on the court. They are in awe of this murderous **** who has a legendary experience.

Chen Mo casually threw the book in his hand to him like a worthless stone.

"Is it so simple?" said a life in disbelief.

"Zi Di knows him?"

"It is rare that he is also afraid of Zidi?"

"Unlike being afraid of Zidi, they are more likely to know each other."

Chen Mo threw the book to Zidi like a worthless one, shocking the lives of onlookers.

Just now Chen Mo had a fight with Thor Civilization for that book, and confronted several other god-level civilizations, which almost triggered a space war. Now Chen Mo gave it up lightly, making them suspect that the book was genuine.

Zidi grabbed the book in his hand, but didn't look through it.

"War A bet against each other, two wins in three rounds." Zidi's voice was beyond doubt.

Mu's eyes lit up and nodded slightly, agreeing with Zidi's method, which now seems to be the best way to resolve this dispute peacefully.

"inappropriate."

A voice of no objection appeared, and all beings looked towards the speaking life.

Tong Qing looked at Zidi directly, and the two eyes collided in the air. This was a collision between two generations of legends, and it seemed calm and calm.

"It's okay to bet, the Cosmos League has five big players on the scene, and naturally they all have to work hard and win three games in five rounds," said Hitomi.

Before the Purple Emperor could speak, Shuiling stepped forward, the battle armor floating in the air, the trident exuding a faint blue light, heroic: "This dispute has nothing to do with the endless sea, and the endless sea does not participate."

After Shuiling finished speaking, she returned to the team, still looking at the play.

As if all this has nothing to do with her.

Wu Endless Sea is now befriending Chen Mo. The teacher told her not to be an enemy of Chen Mo, and it is even more impossible to help Chen Mo at this time, so she can only abstain.

As soon as Shuiling's words fell, Thunder appeared from the guards.

His armor returned to its original state, and his expression did not look like he was seriously injured. Obviously, the guards had already treated him just now, and the severe injuries were controlled.

"Thor's Civilization just lost, no longer participate in the competition."

As soon as Thunder's words fell, the exclamation recurred.

Chen Mo couldn't help looking at Lei Ting and took a high look at him. There are really not many seniors who dare to publicly admit that they have failed. Thunder is considered one, and they are not small.

Even Zidi and Tongqing looked at Lei Ting more.

Now there are three families left: Heitong, Baixing and Ziwei.

"Since the endless seas and the Thors have given up, then we are willing to replace the family and produce a armored division."

Another voice appeared, and all beings followed the voice and looked towards the source.

chapters.title: Chapter 1000: : You Are Worth Fighting Against Me
chapters.body:
Chapter 1000: : You Are Worth Fighting Against Me

Emperor Wu, Emperor Wei, and Emperor Yu appeared from the crowd, together with them, and their guards.

Wuxian civilization.

The Land of Martial Immortals is one of the twelve places other than the Seven Territories. It is located in the Hercules constellation-the Great Wall of the North, with a star field spanning 10 billion light-years. It is the largest power group apart from the seven god-level star fields.

The Wuxian civilization rules the land of Wuxian, and the three emperors of Wuxian are the three of them.

Wuxian civilization is known as one of the quasi-god civilizations. It is a candidate for the god-level civilization. The technological advancement is almost the same as that of the god-level civilization, but there is no small universe with the god-level civilization as a safe base, and there is no god-level civilization in the universe alliance. He has a veto right, and he doesn’t have the influence of a god-level civilization.

The appearance of the three emperors immediately attracted the attention of onlookers.

In my impression, the land of Wuxian has always been low-key, but now it appears in the center of the universe.

"We can come up with one, and suggest that another one choose an influential armored division from among the elites to represent ordinary life in the universe. Once they win, the contents of the book should be made public." Emperor Wu glanced around among the onlookers. Said calmly.

The appearance of the three emperors naturally unavoidable the attention of god-level civilization and other civilizations.

As soon as Emperor Wu's proposal came out, many beings nodded lightly and looked at Zidi and Tongqing with questioning eyes.

"can."

Tong Qing looked at the two civilizations of Baixing and Ziwei.

Hu Bingxin did not respond to Tong Qing's gaze, and turned to look at Lion Min next to him: "Here we are, Uncle Lion, you are going to fight."

"Okay, protect your madam."

Shi Ming immediately agreed, and the armor slowly emerged from the front of the guards and stood still, waiting with his arms folded.

As soon as Zi Mu wanted to stand up and speak, he was stopped by a cold look in Zi Yun's eyes and stood obediently. Seeing Zi Yun stepped forward, her expression was indifferent, obviously meant to play.

"I'm coming." Emperor Wu stepped forward with Hexi's smile still on his face.

In the lives of the onlookers, they looked at each other. They all wanted to go up in this kind of scene. After all, they were on the same stage with the power of God-level civilization and legendary characters. This is almost the highest platform in the universe.

Just dare to go up, you must have absolute confidence in your own strength.

"I come."

A hoarse voice appeared in the public channel, and a battle armor appeared in the life of the onlookers, landing in the center.

"He is a long coat, a lone traveler long coat."

Lone Ranger: Long clothes.

The moment the long clothes appeared, they were recognized by the surrounding lives.

A top-tier war-armored master, powerful, as an interstellar Lone Ranger, his origin and background have always been a mystery. Many lives want to investigate him but have no way to find out, only knowing that he is very strong.

He has challenged five hundred well-known teachers in the universe and has never failed.

Many forces paid a big price to recruit him, and without exception, they were all rejected.

The onlookers wanted to see the true face of the long clothes, but they were blocked by the tattoos and masks on their faces and couldn't really see them.

The long clothes appeared, and no life objected. Because the lone ranger, the long clothes, is a typical figure of a powerless group and is very powerful.

Changyi, Emperor Wu, Shi Ming, Zi Yun, four.

Tongqing swept around the four of them. Just as the subordinates around him wanted to come forward, he was stopped by him and said lightly: "I'm coming."

The most luxurious lineup.

The elites of the universe besieged Chen Mo, and they couldn't think of a reason for not winning.

Chen Mo stepped forward, Mo Nu followed him, Jing Ge also appeared, Ku Yao and Ku Chu Xin followed closely. The bitter dragon was seriously injured when he fought with Thunder. He hasn't been healed yet, so he can't play at all.

"Which one do you think can win?" a life onlooker asked.

"Nonsense, don't even think about it. The top armored divisions of the three god-level civilizations, plus Wuxian's Wudi and long clothes, I can't think of the possibility of Chen Mo winning. The Zidi just gave Chen Mo down the steps in disguise."

"It seems so."

...

Emperor Wu was a humanoid, much sturdier than a human. His eyes are deep and composed, flying in the eyes of many onlookers.

Wuxian civilization is low-key, not because they want to be low-key, but have to be low-key. They are called quasi-god civilizations. In the peaceful era, if they are high-profile and targeted by the gods civilization, it will be a trouble for Wuxian civilization.

Now it’s different. The universe is in chaos. The small universe of god-level civilization is also connected by Hongqiao. There is no longer a place of absolute safety. The universe will usher in a major reshuffle. This time, they only need to show their strength. When the universe is in chaos, elites from all walks of life in the universe Talents will choose to seek refuge.

Now that endless sea and Thor civilization give up, he happens to take this opportunity to appear.

Emperor Wu urged his battle armor and raised his head gently. Under the attention of the world, his body disappeared in place, leaving only a sonic boom in place.

boom!

The moment the sound exploded, he appeared in mid-air and stopped.

Move and stop.

Insiders can see the doorway.

Just one step, easy and freehand, as if it was just a step in the air, the expression of the top armored masters changed slightly, even they may not be able to do this.

Tong Qing's eyes condensed, this Emperor Wu's strength is not low, it hasn't been shown before, now it seems that it is hidden well.

Ku Yao's spirit was shaken.

He didn't understand the magic of Emperor Wu's action, but it didn't affect his knowledge of how strong the opponent was.

But even if the opponent is strong, he can't back down.

The whole universe is watching this battle, and in any case, it must be carried out beautifully.

After thinking about it, Kuyao relaxed a lot.

Since being selected as the leader of the Shenwei, his training and fighting have not stopped. High-intensity training and fighting, like rough whetstones, polish them over and over again, after dulling, and then polishing...

After going through battles, they had already reborn without knowing it, from an ignorant and primitive bitter man to a god-guard with faith.

No distractions, no worries, firm eyesight, even if the opponent is stronger than him, there is still no hesitation.

The spear in Ku Yao's hand lit up, and his body disappeared in place.

Emperor Wu's appearance was relaxed and freehand, while Ku Yao's figure was a fierce and brave style. The styles are very different, but equally dangerous.

Seeing this, Emperor Wu smiled and didn't care to laugh at himself: "Send a guard to fight with me. It seems that I am a little bit down."

In the words, there is no slightest politeness, just look down on Ku Yao.

Ku Yao stood upright, and the dark red armor of murderous aura loomed, like a knight in the wind. His breath is deep, his eyes are firm, his fighting spirit is boiling, but his voice is thick as iron: "Your worth is only worth fighting with me."

When the words fell, Kuyao's palm tightened and his spear was like a dragon.

Emperor Wu's face was slightly surprised, and the long knife in his hand was raised and cut forward.

The sonic boom started like ripples, spreading little by little, exploding in the air, arousing mist.

Murderous.

Ku Yao's eyes were extremely firm, and the dark red armor gleamed in the sun. With the long spear in his hand, the trailing shadow brought by the short-pulse laser is connected into a magical brilliance, like a dancing light snake.

The astonishment on Emperor Wu's face became heavier and heavier, and the figure of the battle armor flashed flexibly in the air, and the engine exhaled smoothly, with ease. The long knife in his hand swung at an extremely fast speed, and the knife shadow carried the aurora.

In an instant, the atmosphere was stirred, sonic boom after ring, metal collision, but there was rhythm in the mixture, floating, but murderous.

Two different voices converge, depicting the agitation of the battlefield in the sky.

chapters.title: Chapter 1001: : Emperor Wu
chapters.body:
Chapter 1001: : Emperor Wu

While the onlookers were still discussing, the killing air exploded in the sky.

Ku Yao and Emperor Wu exploded directly.

Both exploded at the same time.

A short fight, not long, but the momentum is completely out. The moment Ku Yao stood firm, the engine of the battle armor exploded and shot out in mid-air. Emperor Wu was still relaxed, his legs flexed, his foot engine exploded like a dragonfly, his body knocked out, and the sonic boom caused ripples in the air.

Kuyao was awe-inspiring.

The spear in his hand was slightly tightened, waving towards Emperor Wu.

The long spear drew a long light and shadow, condensed murderous aura, sandwiched the sonic boom, as if a dragon was roaring, shrouded in Emperor Wu.

The Emperor Wu was not afraid, raised his hand lightly, murderous in all directions.

"cut."

The long knife in his hand is as precise and light as a mantis.

There was a sharp howling sound in the sky that had been cut, dragging light and shadow like a silver moon, and surrounding him. The cold light flashed by Moonblade contained a cold light.

Emperor Wu looked indifferent, maintaining a freehand posture.

He is a superior, and he seldom takes action in front of the public in the universe, but it does not mean that he has little actual combat experience. In the existing cosmic system, the battle armor system is dominant and the martial arts culture is strong. As a superior, if the force is not strong, it is an expression of incompetence.

Therefore, in many civilizations, the power of those in power is not low, and even Tongqing and Thunder, even the strongest, are more convincing.

As one of the three emperors of Wuxian civilization, Emperor Wu is himself a god-level life, with innate conditions, naturally not weak.

He decided to show this rare opportunity.

"Not bad." A hearty voice came from Tong Qing's mouth, with appreciation in his tone: "I didn't expect Emperor Wu to be so strong."

The other beings all looked shocked, and their eyes were full of admiration.

The strong will be respected wherever they are in the universe.

Emperor Wu's freehand slashes came casually, but they were infinitely murderous.

"I didn't expect this Emperor Wu to be low-key enough."

Tu Yun was a little surprised. The force displayed by Emperor Wu was definitely among the strongest.

Shuiling's eyes were surprised and a little serious. Even if she encounters this kind of opponent, she must do her best to deal with it. In the endless sea, no such top-level Xeon can be found.

Even she was one step away.

The slightest loss is a thousand miles away.

She looked at Chen Mo, this male person, the teacher has always valued, making her inexplicable. But the teacher's prophetic ability is very strong, so she can only listen to the teacher.

She could not see through this life.

In this battle, she couldn't see Chen Mo's winning side.

Chen Mo did not object, as if giving herself a step, but based on her understanding of Chen Mo, is it really giving herself a step? Or does he have the confidence to win?

...

"Aohou attacked here." The subordinate reported.

This news made the already difficult situation worse.

Aohou is a famous general in the dark forest civilization, and the commander is the Ao clan warhead. Even in the dark forest civilization, the Ao clan warhead is also a famous elite warhead.

But it's just elite.

In normal times, she wouldn't put this kind of warhead in her eyes, but not now. They can no longer consume it, otherwise it will be even more difficult to return to the White Star Territory.

The galaxy is different from Hongqiao. Without a full set of space defenses, the galaxy is easy to attack and difficult to defend.

The opponent only needs to bomb the base to easily destroy the base planet, thereby destroying the foundation and driving the troops out of the base camp.

Bian Yunzuo is not their base camp, and can't afford to spend with each other. Now Hongqiao returning home is cut off by the Ziwei civilization.

Gou Xuan dared to swear that this was the biggest failure she had ever experienced since becoming a top star, and also the most embarrassed one, and it hit her mentally severely several times.

The dark forest civilization is in chaos, it must be impossible to stay here, and the great power of the dark forest star field cannot allow them to settle in the edge cloud constellation, otherwise it will be like a needle in the flesh and blood.

"What to do?" All the subordinates are waiting for Goxuan's news.

"Leave Bianyun Seat." Gou Xuan was a little depressed.

"Where?"

"Towards the Hengshan Galaxy, the sixth quadrant." Gou Xuan raised his head and glanced at the holographic map.

"Except for the Muwu Hongqiao and the Hongqiao that was snatched by the Ziwei civilization, the nearest Hongqiao to our White Star Territory should be in the Ohye Galaxy, in the second quadrant," said a subordinate familiar with the universe map.

"Don't grab Hongqiao." Gou Xuan shook his head.

Many genera look at each other.

"Every force with Hongqiao must be guarded by concentrated forces. Hongqiao is easy to defend and difficult to attack. Ono Hongqiao is occupied by Tianzhucheng. Even if we take it down, the price to pay is certainly not small." Gou Xuan analyzed.

They can no longer afford the halving loss of combat troops, otherwise the team will be over.

"Let's go." Gou Xuan's voice is beyond doubt.

...

"The Goxuan War Department retreated in the direction of the Hengshan Galaxy." One of his men reported to Zi Luo: "Should we chase?"

"Don't chase."

Fatty Luo dropped the bird's leg bones in his hand, wiped his hands with a wet towel, and looked up at the holographic map.

On the holographic map of the universe star field, there are densely packed colored flashing dots, and between the two flashing dots, there are faint colored lines connected. The marks are very clear, and between the blinking light spots is the star field connected by the Hongqiao.

This is the location of the Hongqiao that has been discovered in the universe and its connected location.

After an unknown incident occurred in the black hole and the Hongqiao Incident, the military defense environment of the universe became more complicated.

If they have not studied the strategic significance of the emergence of these rainbow bridges, they will also suffer in future cosmic wars.

"My lord, what do you do next?"

"Now guard the Hongqiao first, when it's not moving."

Fatty Luo turned his eyes to the holographic star field of the black pupil civilization, staring at the above Hongqiao Point and thinking.

...

The battle in the air has reached a white-hot stage.

Emperor Wu changed freely in the air, in Ku Yao's powerful attack, like feathers in the wind, letting the wind swept, floating lightly, without hurting anything.

Suddenly, Ku Yao's face changed suddenly.

A long knife was slashed from his chest, and an opening was made in the armor on his chest, dripping with blood.

The sting penetrated his nerves and swept through his body, and his heart shattered in the slash, which was extremely terrifying. The blood ran down his armor, dyed all over his body, Ku Yao's expression remained solemn.

"Ah!"

Emperor Wu's long sword slashed with a backhand, his expression relaxed, and the long light and shadow dragged into the first moon. With the momentum of thunder, he slashed down sharply, transforming into the word'Zhou' on Ku Yao's chest.

Onlookers all took a breath, and their hearts twitched.

With two swords in his body, Ku Yao did not snorted in pain.

The eyes of all beings in the universe were paying attention, and Ku Yao did not retreat in the slightest.

With the spear in his hand tightly, he raised his head to Emperor Wu.

The steadfast eyes were as steady as a rock, the spear danced, the armor bullied him, the blood from the wound exploded into blood mist in the air, dyeing the surrounding atmosphere red.

The ambition to be trapped is death but no life.

I saw the spear pierced out, carrying a long shadow like a drill, with the will to die, and the momentum burst out. No sound was heard, no hesitation.

Emperor Wu's expression changed.

"kill."

Ku Yao shouted loudly.

The tip of the spear glowed with cold light, as if breaking through the barrier, the speed became faster. Ku Yao's steadfast figure, in the high air, is moving forward.

The tip of the gun touched Emperor Wu's battle armor, and the short laser pulse instantly sank into the battle armor.

Emperor Wu's figure was shocked, his pupils shrank, a little unbelievable.

Huh!

The spear pierced his shoulder and penetrated his back shoulder.

At the same time, Ku Yao was still in midair, holding a spear in his palm, letting the blood drip down from his body, the two wounds in front of him were hideous and terrifying.

The needle drop in the audience can be heard.

chapters.title: Chapter 1002: : Mind Control
chapters.body:
Chapter 1002: : Mind Control

There was a dead silence over the Tianxing Stele Forest, and a clear wind could be heard.

Many lives were horrified and speechless for a long time.

Ku Yao lost, but he made the onlookers awe. He was obviously different in strength, but he still showed a strong will to fight and injured many opponents stronger than himself.

The aura of death just now was still fresh in their memories.

At the moment before the coma, Kuyao still didn't groan in pain, but fell straight down.

The spear dropped from his hand and fell from midair. Upon seeing this, the guards immediately left the team, caught Ku Yao's body, let Ku Yao's body enter the dormant period, flew back to the team, and started treatment.

Emperor Wu was floating in the sky, with Ku Yao's spear stuck in his shoulder.

Even if he wins, his face is not very good and his mood is not very good.

I wanted to win beautifully, but in the end he was stabbed by the opponent. Although it was not the key point, it made him very embarrassed.

He grasped the spear in his hand, drew it fiercely, and threw the spear towards Chen Mo.

Snapped!

Chen Mo grabbed the spear that flew toward his chest with one hand and handed it to the guard behind him.

But at this time, the painful heart flew out of the team, extremely fast, straight to take the long clothes. Jing Ge's battle armor urged, and suddenly disappeared in the air. At the same time, Mo Nu's figure also disappeared in place.

boom!

A collision sound appeared in the air, as if a giant truck collided head-on, and two shadows bounced away.

Mo Nu's body is elegant, and she suddenly appeared in front of Zi Yun.

The lines of Mo Nui's body are perfect, and she belongs to the most perfect human being. She is extremely quiet, and her movements have an indescribable taste, but at this time, she is not polite.

Her tactical moves are the result of all the training of the marching ant group, and she has even studied Jing Ge's combat mode strictly.

Although she didn't do much, her strength was not weak.

All the top combat skills of the Battle Armor, made on her body, are calculated by supercomputers, very natural and smooth.

The onlookers were shocked by Mo Nu's methods.

...

Jing Ge's fighting moves were vicious and secretive, but he was very open and close. When he appeared next to Lion Min, he almost caught Lion Min by surprise.

The fighting thorn shone with cold light, killing infinitely.

He is an orphan. His parents sacrificed while hunting wild animals. He was adopted by the patriarch, and he remained silent since then. Once fighting was his ability to survive, in the primitive jungle, he faced an unknown crisis every day.

The awakening of combat consciousness allowed him to grow up in a short time and become the strongest fighter in the clan.

The battle consciousness super ability that Chen Mo studied was to use his super gene as a template, and then to develop medicines that targeted this super gene.

He doesn't know which step he realized in the battle, but he has never feared in the face of battle, no matter how powerful the enemy is.

His fighting style is very different from that of any armored division.

As soon as he took a shot, he suppressed the top armored division on the field.

The close combat stab, with the intrepidity and the secret, and the fierceness and the fierce style, made his dark red armor become the most eye-catching existence in midair.

The fighting factor in his body was activated, but he became more and more indifferent.

Any movement of Shimin has a clear path in his eyes. He can fully see the opponent's next move. The battle armor cooperates with the combat consciousness, and his ability is completely released.

Fighting with the first master of the White Star Civilization, never let the wind fall.

This scene made the onlookers stare. This is the battle between the strongest.

...

"Unexpectedly, Chen Mo actually has two such powerful masters in his hands. I am afraid that few can reach this point." The onlookers sighed.

"No wonder it's so hard."

"Even an ordinary guard can injure Emperor Wu, who is close to the strongest. It is so terrifying."

The master of god-level civilization has always been the object of attention by the outside world.

The number one master of the White Star Civilization is Shi Ming, the guard guarding Hu Bingxin's side. Ziwei civilization has blocked itself over the years, and the outside world rarely knows about him, but it is rumored that Ziyun is currently the strongest genius of Ziwei civilization.

Now Chen Mo's subordinates are able to fight against them without losing the wind, making those who think Chen Mo will lose quickly, shockingly.

"Very interesting." Hitomi looked at the battlefield in the air, and said quietly: "This is the first battle I expected after Dan left. I didn't miss him."

"According to the analysis of his bone age, he is less than a few dozen years old." Tara solemnly said: "In the Universe League, a dozen-year-old life is still studying in the War A Academy."

Hitomi nodded softly in agreement: "When I was the same age as him, I was still an ordinary armored division in the corner of the academy, training hard every day, so don't underestimate the universe life."

"As long as you get the suicide note of Mu's Tianxing and solve the mystery of the fourth dimension of life, the universe will still be the Speaker at that time." Tara said confidently.

In response, Hitomi only smiled and did not answer.

...

Zi Yun has never been so embarrassed as she is today, even in the face of masters, she remains elegant. But today, she was beaten by a female life.

This female type is very weird, with a faint blue fluorescence appearing on the battle armor, combined with the information she has obtained, is a multi-powered person, one of which is an immortal body.

She knew from the fact that she had been attacked by Thunder just now and forced the Thunder back.

The action seems gentle, but the murderous intention is hidden.

Every technique is extremely perfect, really perfect, just like the movements calculated by a sophisticated supercomputer.

Zi Yun is the best genius in the generation of Ziwei civilization, inheriting the noble blood of Ziwei people. The genes of the crape myrtle people are inherently excellent, and once they are awakened, they belong to the top armored division.

They possess mysterious mind-reading skills and can see through each other's methods.

And Zi Yun was awakened as early as ten years old. In the Ziwei civilization, she was a genius among geniuses. She can understand the human heart, so she is indifferent to everything in the universe, including everything about the Ziwei civilization.

However, today is a bit weird, she can't see through any fighting ideas of Mo Girl.

Mo Nu's heart was like a lake in the deep mountains, with no fluctuations in the depths, and extremely clear. It was the first time she encountered such a clean life in her heart, which really shocked her.

This kind of clean thinking world is the nemesis of her ability.

The most troublesome thing for her was that Mo Nu was confronting her as if desperate.

Injury for injury.

Knowing that the other party has [immortality], she didn't dare to do this, so she couldn't let go of fighting.

Suddenly, Zi Yun's cold expression moved slightly, and her purple pupils shrank.

She felt a sense of danger.

Mo Nu suddenly disappeared in front of her, teleporting to her back, the fighting thorn in her hand, just like Jing Ge, pierced Zi Yun's back.

This is impossible!

This is teleportation.

She knew that Mo Nu was a multi-competent person, but the abilities displayed shocked her.

Each ability is a special rare ability.

This is beyond her understanding of God-level life.

She can't lose this kind of battle. This is related to the honor of the crape myrtle civilization. Once it fails, the reputation of the crape myrtle civilization will be hit again, and this will have a huge impact on the crape myrtle civilization.

As the first veteran god-level civilization, the Ziwei civilization once stood on the top of the universe and laid the foundation for the battle armor system of the universe for hundreds of millions of years.

The crape myrtle civilization can be in a trough temporarily, but its noble attitude will never change.

She can be injured, but the honor of Ziwei civilization cannot fail.

Determined, Zi Yun's momentum changed.

Flashing a blow from Mo Nu's back, she stood still in the air, her purple eyes calmed down and became deep and cold.

[Mind reading] is the ability of the Ziwei people, and it is also the ability to assist their ethnic group to flourish. Zi Yun was able to use mind reading skills at his fingertips, but apparently it could not be used to assist her in fighting now.

With her penetrating mind-reading skills, she became the strongest genius of Ziwei civilization.

But other beings didn't know that she had already successfully entered the final stage of [Mind Reading], another ability derived from it.

【Mind Control】

This is her biggest secret.

In history, the Ziwei people who successfully entered the [Mind Control] stage are all legends of the Ziwei civilization. Among them, there is only one life in this world who possesses the ability of [mind control] besides her.

Purple Emperor.

The defector of this crape myrtle civilization used [Mind Control] to slaughter the strongest generation of crape myrtle civilization and the purest genius elite, as many as hundreds of thousands.

In the past few thousand years, the Ziwei civilization has experienced a talent gap, retreating from the throne of the strongest civilization, and has fallen to this day.

Therefore, Zidi became a taboo of the Ziwei civilization.

[Mind Control] This ability has also become the most feared ability for those in power in the Ziwei civilization.

She has never revealed this ability, otherwise, with the character of the star master, she will be intensively monitored. Unexpectedly, the first time it was revealed was to deal with an unknown female person here.
